Towards foreigners who were willing to scatter a handful of gold coins all over the floor, he would try to advise them to settle this issue amicably. He once again straightened his full plate and lightly swiped the captain badge on his shoulder, purposely adjusting his “Blood Wave” to show that his wealth was not worse off. Then the foreigners before saying in a voice that hinted he had control over the situation.

“Esteemed visitors, first I welcome you on behalf of Rizhao City, and now, I think, the misunderstanding in your hearts has been cleared up. It’s not that the Potential Alliance won’t sell it, rather it’s that the treasure wasn’t on sale in the first place. Perhaps you can take another look at the other war beasts, I as captain have the authority to help reconcile any misgivings. And can promise that the Potential Alliance will give you a five percent discount as bringing benefits to the people is what brings us the most joy.”

Finally, Captain Ao Chu shot a very sincere look towards Fatty Hai and Ye Kong.

With the corner of his eyes, he had already swept a look over Liu Ye and Bao’er, and now it seemed that these deeply protected Clan Misses didn’t want to cause trouble, so he decided to give the other side a chance to settle this peacefully.

Ye Kong and Fatty Hai exchanged a glance and were about to take a stand.

Suddenly, a guard squeezed in from the other side of the crowd, and immediately started whispering to Captain Ao Chu urgently.

Those with exceptionally good ears could hear the words ‘cousin of the city lord’, ‘on the way’ and so on.

At this remark, Captain Ao Chu’s face changed.

His face started to change color.

As a feeling of gloom set in.

His face started to darken from red, to black.

Habitually straightening the armor on his body, he gently rubbed the badge on his arm with his finger. With a swift and thunderous gesture. He drew out the Blood Wave cleaver at his waist, pointing the blade at the two of them, Ye Kong and Fatty Hai. ”Despicable pair of liars, I was almost fooled by both of you. So you are professional liars who have come to our Rizhao City with the intent to cause trouble… I’ll tell you right now, this isn’t a place where you can get away with anything. If not for someone reporting to me in time, I was almost fooled by you. Are you thinking of ripping off the Potential Alliance? Let me tell you once again, unless I am dead, you will never succeed.”

Outside, there was the sudden sound of horses’ galloping.

A luxuriously dressed entourage on war horses, with smartly armored knights, surrounding a noble man of years dressed in a brocade, sped through the streets.

They didn’t stop, even though Captain Ao Chu rushed out to greet them respectfully. The other party turned a blind eye to him and continued riding.

The people around them all started to murmur at the sudden turn of events.

“Look, it’s the city lord’s cousin, the mighty General Weng, who seems to be out hunting.”

“What’s so special about that, actually he does that several times every month…..”

“No one reported the matter of the Potential Alliance to Lord Weng?”

“Why would he care about a golden flying dragon, this is only the smallest of General Weng’s fifteen shops. Only the main shop can be called the general’s shop, everything else is just an alliance shop.”

“Right, right, to General Weng, a Golden Flying Dragon is indeed nothing, this Golden Flying Dragon has won too much recently. There is no one at the upper level who is willing to fight with it anymore, even General Weng wants to sell it for a Heaven Ranked Flame Lion. I heard this news from my nephew and he also said that the Flame Lion has already been chosen, just not yet delivered. You don’t know my nephew? He is the son-in-law of General Weng’s butler and is now a member of General Weng’s guard, who was there just now when he rode off at a gallop.”

“Does Lord Weng really want to sell this Golden Flying Dragon? Are you sure of the accuracy of this news?” Captain Ao Chu asked in a small voice.

“Absolutely sure, this Golden Flying Dragon has won too many games, even the ones that shouldn’t have been won. Especially the Purple Eye Nightmare that was just cultivated by the young city lord was also beaten by it. The young city lord was so angry that General Weng had tried to kill the Golden Flying Dragon to make amends to the young city lord last time, but the young city lord refused. This hunting trip, presumably, is to get some good magic crystals and make amends to the young city lord… This troublesome Gold Flying Dragon, General Weng has long wanted to sell it, otherwise, why would he ask the steward to buy a Heavenly Rank Flame Lion in Lok Ma City?”

Captain Ao Chu straightened his full plate and lightly rubbed his captain’s badge, his face became even gloomier.

Turning from black to blue.

He rushed back to Ye Kong and Fatty Hai laughing coldly, ”Don’t you guys want to buy the Golden Flying Dragon? This captain has decided to sell it to you cheaters. Take out the money, I won’t charge you as high as five million, but at the minimum you would still have to pay four and a half million for it, I want to let you have a taste of trying to cheat the law.

(onom.)

A deafening roar came from the street outside.

A silhouette, falling heavily into the heart of the street, smashed a distinct human figure on the flagstone floor.

As the man was about to struggle to rise, a dignified figure with a platinum mask on his face descended from the sky and he used his foot to step on the man.

The man whose head was being stepped on was General Weng, the cousin of the city lord, who had just been surrounded by an escort.

General Weng, whose head was being stepped on, was normally very bad tempered but astonishingly he wasn’t angry.

Rather, he pitifully begged, ”Spare me, powerful Heavenly Ranker, a strong man like you, isn’t one to care about a mere insect like me. That would only stain your hands and tarnish your excellence’s brilliant reputation. I’m willing to apologize for my rude conduct and for my insolence, please forgive me, powerful Heavenly Ranker. Accept this humble villain kowtowing to you.”

General Weng, who was dressed in a brocade, struggled to crawl up and kneel, all the while with the distinguished figure stepping on his head.

(piak,piak)

General Weng even started to slap his own face, turning it into a pig’s head.

Until that noble masked man kicked General Weng ten meters away and shouted disdainfully, “Scram!”

General Weng respectfully retreated, all the way bending backwards, quickly burrowing into the crowd where he disappeared. The guards all hugged their heads and scurried away. The people around them were almost suffocated with fear. It was too frightening, what kind of existence was this? Even the cousin of the city lord was so frightened that he slapped himself in the face. Could it be the special envoy of the Central God Hall?

The masked man drifted away.

It took a long time before the crowd gradually came back to their senses.

Captain Ao Chu’s face, once again was turning from blue to purple, he shivered, and now he was so scared that his vest was full of cold sweat.

He was so embarrassed that the General Weng, whom he had wanted to flatter, was not even a fart in the presence of this noble superior. Who could only beg for his life like a wretch. Now, he was no longer in the mood to deal with these few outsiders of the business. Holding in his displeasure, he straightened his full plate, and hastily rubbed his badge. In the process of rubbing his badge, he thought of what to say. He took hold of “Blood Wave” and pointed it at Ye Kong and the others. “Scram!, Immediately scram out of Rizhao City. This is not a place where liars such as you can stay. Take these liars and escort them out of the city, the money on the ground is all to be confiscated!”

“I can still forgive you if you just chase them out of the city, but you still want to confiscate my money?” A voice rang in the ears of Captain Ao Chu.

“Who dares to question my decision?” Captain Ao Chu was enraged and his face turned green. In his heart he thought, don’t think just because a Heaven Rank beat up General Weng you can undermine my authority. He decided to teach whoever it was a lesson and use this opportunity to gain back some of his authority. But as he turned back, his heart almost stopped beating.

The masked man who had stepped on General Weng’s head just now was standing menacingly behind Captain Ao Chu.

Captain Ao Chu’s face immediately turned a deadly earthy yellow, and he tried his best to calm down, wanting to kneel down and apologize to the other side like General Weng did. However his body was too stiff from fear, he couldn’t kneel down, instead, he inexplicably breathed out a sentence from his mouth. “This money on the ground, is it yours?”

Fatty Hai stepped forward and nodded his head with a devilish smile, ”Do you want me to introduce you? He’s the leader of your so-called liars.”

The crowd that had gathered to watch were all mostly stunned. Not a single sound could be heard after Fatty Hai’s words.

The rest of the people were looking at Captain Ao Chu, who was flushed and blue in the face. Everyone wanted to see how this chameleon, known for its side-hopping and ruthlessness, who was usually many faced and beyond shameless, would face the wrath of the sudden appearance of this noble supreme being…..

***

chapters.title: Chapter 763 - Esteemed Guest, Please Enter
chapters.body:
Chapter 763 - Esteemed Guest, Please Enter

Chapter 763 – Esteemed Guest, please enter

Editor: BlueBear

Sun Island, City Castle

The Lord Tu Hai, who had just woken up from an afternoon nap, felt that it was a little noisy outside.

He picked up his favorite sweet date tea and took a sip while asking the respectful butler at his side, Jiao Shi, if everything was alright.

“Master, there are two small things today,” Butler Jiao Shi pulled out a chair and helped City Lord Tu Hai to comfortably settle down. At the same time, he deftly laid the table while receiving the cup from his lord’s hand at the same time. Butler Jiao Shi continued to report that a powerful Heavenly Ranker had passed by in a flying car. He had passed over General Weng who was out hunting, annoyed, he had ordered his guards to drive away the strong expert above his head, and ended up being beaten.

“Is that so?” City Lord Tu Hai replied carelessly while he shook his head in an aloof manner. This useless Ah Weng who only knew how to enjoy life, if he wasn’t beaten up by somebody, it would seem he would’ve never acknowledged how weak he actually was. At least it would seem that this expert had chosen to give him some face, otherwise he would have directly wringed off Ah Weng’s dog head.

“Another interesting piece of news, in the Potential Alliance, a shop assistant who looked down on some foreigners had deliberately messed with them; and offered to sell them the shop’s treasure, the Gold Flying Dragon, at an extravagant price. However, that shop miscalculated. The foreigners could actually fork up that huge sum of money which caused a ruckus. The captain of the guard went to intervene, and because the Potential Alliance is General Weng’s shop, the captain of the guard was biased towards the Potential Alliance. As a result, his tongue was elongated and he was flown up into the sky as a human kite. This caused an uproar in the entire city and would be the cause of disturbance you heard earlier…” Butler Jiao Shi explained the general situation to the City Lord dutifully.

“An elongated tongue can allow one to be put into the sky to turn into a human kite?” City Lord Tu Hai was surprised.

Is this even possible?

It wasn’t as if City Lord Tu Hai hadn’t flown human kites before.

This glorious and special tradition was said to have begun 6,000 years ago during the Great War against the Tong Tian Tower’s army..

At that time, the armies of the Heavenly Realm had been utterly routed and In order to vent their anger, they executed the captives of the Tong Tian Tower’s army by various means.

The process of flying a human kite was usually like this: a captured enemy would be brought to a steep and high cliff, the steeper the better. Then the belly of the unlucky guy would be cut open and his innards disemboweled. The tormentor would then throw the captive down the cliff and fly off into the distance; pulling the captive by his innards behind him. This would force the still-alive captive to use up all his remaining energy to float and chase after his tormentor in order to reduce the pain.

Some of the tormentors with particularly good control could fly a human kite with an enemy chasing after them in mid-air for more than an hour.

Such a cruel human kite is also one of the top ten tortures in the Western Sky.

Maybe the mercenaries were not afraid of death, but they were terribly afraid of the pain from this torture.

For CIty Lord Tu Hai, he has flown such a kite many times to a point that he’ already grown tired of them. However he had never before heard of flying a human kite by elongating their tongue and thus his interest was piqued.

Butler Jiao Shi immediately replied, “That unlucky guard captain came from a tribe of chameleons. Their tongues can elongate up to several times the length of their bodies. Although I did not see it with my own eyes, the people below reported that the unlucky guy first had his tongue stretched, before a large amount of gas was pumped into his throat. Allowing his stomach to expand to become a ball. Finally, when the body started to float, a rope was tied to his neck and he was flown into the sky. The other guards were then forced to take the rope and ran rampant up and down the street.”

“How interesting!”, City Lord Tu Hai started clapping his hands in joy.

Then, falling into thought, City Lord Tu Hai suddenly exclaimed. “We should try it too! Lets find a chameleon tribe prisoner and use the same method to fly a human ball kite. Then tie it on the north wall of the city. As a warning to the little insects so they can see what exactly happens if they offend me.”

The butler, Jiao Shi, immediately bowed ninety degrees, and answered courteously. “As you wish, my beloved master of the city.”

Lord Tu Hai thought for a moment about it and asked, “Do you have any way to invite the Heavenly Ranker to come and talk to me?”

As for making friends with Heavenly Ranked experts, Lord Tu Hai thought the more the merrier

It’s never too much.

City Lord Tu Hai was never stingy when it came to matters that could be achieved with finances.

With his strength of a peak Heavenly Rank Four, he had always been denied entry to the Upper Heavenly Realm. Lord Tu Hai felt that he lacked not only strength, but also the substance… More than once, he saw Heavenly Rankers with strength below his, being allowed to enter the Upper Heavenly Realm. Not to mention those disciples of major sects with high potential, more often than not even before reaching the Heavenly Rank, or even the quasi-Heavenly Rank. They would borrow their elder’s influence and enter the Upper Heavenly Realm that he dreamed of entering but could not enter.

The younger City Lord Tu Hai couldn’t understand why and always felt that it was unfair.

Only after Lord Ling Yun’s reminder did a sudden enlightenment dawn on him.

Although Tu Hai was the City Lord of Rizhao City which acted as the doorkeepers for the Upper Heavenly Realm while also possessing strength of the Heavenly Rank Four. Was far more than other CIty Lords, wanting to enter the Upper Heavenly Realm without any background or support was still impossible.

Even Lord Ling Yun can’t bring his men into the heavenly realm… However he has given the Lord of Tu Hai hope.

As long as they can get the support of 300 Heavenly Ranked experts, then City Lord Tu Hai will be eligible for the nomination.

In order to obtain this qualification, Lord Tu Hai had worked hard for two hundred years and found one hundred and thirty-seven Heavenly Rank experts to support him. During this period the amount of his finances spent to achieve his goal was beyond imagination. Even though there were many Heavenly Rankers around City Lord Tu Hai. Although there were none he hadn’t tried pulling into his camp before. Unfortunately not every Heavenly Ranker was willing to support Tu Hai. In the same situation as the City Lord Tu Hai, the City Lord’s of Golden Wheel City, Wishing Light City and Wisdom City etc. Were also active in recruiting Heavenly Rankers in order to reach the same goal. Up till this day not one of them had succeeded in getting the support of 300 Heavenly Rank Experts!

Now for City Lord Tu Hai, he would even try to solicit those Heavenly Rankers passing by and try to befriend them in order to get them to support him.

It’s been half a year since any Heavenly Rankers passed through Rizhao City.

Finally today another Heavenly Ranker had passed by his city, even though this Heavenly Ranker had beaten up his cousin, he couldn’t care about that fact in the least.

Jiao Shi the butler shook his head while sighing. “General Weng has first offended the other party not to mention the captain of the patrol guard and the Potential Alliance also tried to cheat and bully him. This Heavenly Rankers impression of us isn’t very good at the moment. In fact, the outsiders that the shop assistants tried to cheat were this Heavenly Ranker’s subordinates. Moreover the captain of the patrol guard was turned into a human kite under the orders of the masked man and was flown in the sky. He’s still hanging from a flagpole right now!”

“Damn.” City Lord TuHai was annoyed and slapped the table out of frustration, his favorite sweet date tea spilled all over.

With his usual temper, he’s going to be furious.

If he didn’t kill a hundred people, the depression in his heart won’t come down.

However, three months ago, Lord Ling Yun had summoned CIty Lord Tu Hai to criticize him for being too bloodthirsty and murderous. After receiving the warning from Lord Ling Yun, Lord Tu Hai changed his usual murderous ways and wanted to rebrand his reputation.

After agonizing over this issue for a while and thinking how to change this Heavenly Ranker’s impression of him, he finally exclaimed. “If this expert is willing to support me, even if I have to destroy the Potential Alliance to appease him the benefits would be worth it. Even more so, for a Heavenly Ranker like him. It would have been easy for him to completely destroy that shop in rage however he had not done so. The only cons were that he flew a few human kites, this is to show that he is a forgiving person! Go, bring some gifts and invite him to my castle. If he is willing to come and meet me, I will be waiting to receive him here with a banquet!”

The butler, JiaoShi, immediately bowed his head and went off to fulfill his master’s wishes…

Before leaving, he once again cautiously reminded his master that near one of the major cities in the Ling Yun country, there were also the remnants of the Tong Tian Tower Army. Passing through although six thousand years have indeed passed. But those insects still haven’t given up yet and are still trying to find a way to open the doors to the Celestial Realm.

Rizhao’s City Lord waved his hand saying. “Rest assured, those remaining incests no matter how rampant; they dare not come to our Rizhao City. This sun island has the Heaven Rank Great Formation even the great leader Night Light was besieged and killed here. His loyal subordinates were slaughtered one after the other. Since then, the remnants of Tong Tian Tower have never been able to recover their strength. I’m afraid they don’t even have any Heavenly Rankers anymore, each of their generations are becoming worse and worse… Thousands of years ago, their strength was so powerful that they could conquer several cities in a row on a whim, but thousands of years have passed. Their powerful Heavenly Rankers have all died out, and their remnants are all ants, we should no longer be afraid of them.”

“Yes, I was too worried and thought too much,” Butler Jiao Shi bowed and replied to his lord’s explanation.

“You’re right to be concerned however, indeed we have to monitor the remaining rebels, but with the Sun Island, not to mention their strength right now… Even if they had the might of the Heavenly Rankers from 6,000 years ago,they would not be able to take this city. Do you know how many Heavenly Ranked rebels are imprisoned under our feet? Nearly a hundred, even with just the leaders of the past generations, there are 20 to 30 of them…” City Lord Tu Hai laughed at those numbers

Everyone out there thinks Sun Island is the city’s main residence.

In fact, this is a prison with great sealing power, with the nodes sealed by the giants of the heavenly realms. Even if they were Heavenly Rank experts, they would not be able to escape from this place. The Rizhao prison in the north of the city is nothing more than a farce. The powerful Heavenly Rankers can’t be locked up in a simple iron barred cell. At most it can only lock up the lazy miners and the random hooligans who like to steal from the city.

The butler Jiao Shi bowed deeply, even though City Lord Tu Hai did not see it, when Jiao Shi bowed his head, his eyes emitted a weird glow!

But before City Lord TuHai could notice the random anomaly, the glow faded away very quickly.

His gaze turned back Into one filled with respect, reverence and adoration.

Half an hour later.

Butler Jiao Shi came back to report his results.

For City Lord Tu Hai, who was hell-bent on entering the Upper Heavenly Realm, this was good news, because the Heavenly Rank expert who beat up General Weng. Who turned the captain of the patrol guards into a human kite; had accepted the CIty Lord’s apology and invitation to a banquet.

Per courtesy, the powerful man asked the butler to bring back an excellent red coral stone for City Lord Tu Hai.

This type of stone could only be found in the Upper Heavenly Realm.

It’s a precious gem that you can’t buy here in Rizhao City.

When City Lord Tu Hai saw this stone, he jumped in his heart, could it be that this man has been to the Upper Heavenly Realm before? At the very least, this Heavenly Ranker is not of simple origins, amongst his master, relatives or friends. There should be some who have been to the Upper Heavenly Realm. Otherwise he would not have such a precious item such as the red coral stone, and would not give it away at random.

What is the strength of that Heavenly Rank expert? City Lord Tu Hai felt that he should receive this Heavenly Rank expert carefully and try his best to pull him into his camp… Of course he would first have to catch hold of his weaknesses.

“I could not see through his strength… The first time I saw him, I didn’t even feel that he was a Heavenly Rank expert. But even those of quasi-Heavenly Rank strength feel like ants in front of him. He wears a unique platinum mask, comparable to a saintly treasure, I have never seen a platinum treasure with such spirituality and power… This treasure is a treasure that is rarely possessed even among the Heavenly Rankers from the Upper Heavenly Realm. On the hand of this expert is a glove, although I am not sure, I think it is a Heaven Scorpio Glove of an Earth Divine Artifact rank. They are treasures hard to come by amongst experts of the Upper Heavenly Realm. As for his strength, please forgive my incompetence for being unable to identify his strength.” Jiao Shi gave his report of the masked expert.

“Really?” Tu Hai was very excited to hear this. If this Heavenly Ranker had really come from the Upper Heavenly Realm, then it would be extremely lucky if he could pull him into his camp.

The City Lord slapped the table in excitement. “Quick invite him to the castle, I will personally go to the castle gates to receive him!”

This translation belongs to Centinni.

***

chapters.title: Chapter 764 - Who Is He?
chapters.body:
Chapter 764 - Who Is He?

Chapter 764 – Who is he?

Editor: BlueBear

The trumpets sounded loud and clear, a beautiful flag with a magnificently embroidered dragon was gently swaying in the light breeze.

The majestic ceremonial squad, under the command of the city lord’s personal guard captain, was divided into two squads. They were in high spirits as they waited to welcome the coming of the esteemed guest.

City Lord TuHai stood at the forefront, waiting silently for the luxurious flying car to drift down. Normally, apart from welcoming the Lord of Ling Yun Country, City Lord TuHai had never entertained the idea of personally leading a group to welcome a guest. His cousin Tudor, who was currently acting as captain of the welcoming guards, felt that his cousin was overreacting this time. Even if the esteemed guest was a Heavenly Ranker, he wasn’t qualified to enjoy the courtesy of being personally welcomed by the City Lord himself.

What’s more, Rizhao City was not an ordinary city.

This was the City of Honor which was glorified as the city that broke the invasion of the Heavenly Rankers from the Tong Tian Tower many years ago.

Of course, regardless of his position as guard captain or his status as the CIty Lord’s cousin, Tudor would not easily offend TuHai’s grandeur, as he was also very familiar with TuHai’s fierce temper.

When the luxurious flying car stopped, the door opened, and out of the limo came two men, one fat and one skinny. Following them was a dog of such low rank it made one speechless. Many people thought it was a pet dog, for eye candy. Not only that, everyone who saw the mangy mutt secretly ridiculed the taste of the dog’s owner.

Even if you like pets you should get a nice one.

“Such an ugly dog!”

“What kind of taste is that? It’s so bizarre!”

The generals and rich tycoons, who had rushed here after getting wind of the fact that the City Lord was going to welcome an esteemed guest, all secretly felt proud of themselves after seeing that mangy dog. This was because all the pets that their wives and concubines reared were either extremely beautiful or fierce beasts, or else they were unique or rare beasts that were hard to find. If the owner of this mangy dog wasn’t a powerful Heavenly Ranker, they would have broken out into uncontrollable laughter by now.

However, when City Lord TuHai saw Hui Tai Lang, his eyes snapped wide open.

He was secretly paying attention to the generals and rich merchants in the back. Out of the corner of his eye, he swept a glance at the various pets that were lying in the arms of the noble women, then compared them to Hui Tai Lang who was lying half dead on the ground in front of him. Suddenly, he felt a little ashamed and a little annoyed that he had lived and played with a bunch of stupid and self-righteous idiots for hundreds of years! Was he a fool!?

Between the noble ladies who were secretly tittering behind him and those generals with huge pot bellies, the City Lord TuHai was being driven mad.

In the entire heavenly realm, what kind of Heavenly Ranker would keep a Bronze-Rank, Level 3, dog as a pet?

No!

Even the West Heaven Realm Ranker “Lion Mastiff”, who was known as the “King of Dogs” did not have such a low-level dog amongst the thousands of dogs he had reared.

As a Heavenly Ranker, how could he have such a lousy dog? Not only that, was it so favored that it’s master allowed it to accompany him—in front of others!?

There could only be one real answer.

All the people standing behind him had been tricked… this warbeast, that on the surface looked weak, must possess a strength nearing that of Holy Rank, most likely an evolution from a three-headed emon Wolf. It was just that this beast had an extremely strong camouflage ability and excelled at complete transformation in battle, the same as the secondary evolution of some insect-like warbeasts in battle…

City Lord TuHai secretly compared the wolf to his own war beasts.

Apart from his Golden Horned Black Dragon which had the strength of a Heavenly Rank 2 that he was certain could beat Hui Tai Lang, even his Demon Sucking Oni and Stone Chariot Scorpion which were of Heavenly Rank 1 seemed to be inferior in the face of Hui Tai Lang.

Habitually, City Lord TuHai looked down at the wrist wheel on his wrist, on that gem polished surface of his wrist wheel, a dozen green dots emerged.

Safe!

The people who came were not invaders from Tong Tian Tower, otherwise, the City Lord’s Wrist Wheel would immediately present itself in red to warn that the enemy was invading.

On the surface of the wrist wheel, on the green dot that represented the earth dog lying lazily on the ground, there was a pale gold circle surrounding it. This signified that the strength of the beast was at least that of Heavenly Rank, just that it was hiding it’s real strength and that was why it exuded pale gold. Likewise, in the luxury car, there were several green dots with pale gold light circles. However at that moment, the other party seemed to have noticed his prying and all the dots disappeared, leaving only one green dot with a double gold circle.

“A full 5 Heavenly Rankers disappeared, they should have gone back to their grimoires.”

City Lord TuHai was shocked, what did an expert with a double gold circle, protected by at least 5 Heavenly Ranked guards signify?

This would signify that this expert at least had the strength of a Heavenly Rank 5 or above! There was absolutely nothing wrong with this deduction, because this wrist wheel was a tester that the Heavenly Realm had spent hundreds of years developing back in the day to identify the invaders from the Tong Tian Tower.

If this contraption might malfunction elsewhere, it would absolutely not malfunction on this Sun Island. This was because Sun Island was the main base for researching the Wrist Wheel back in the day, and although the research center had moved to the Central Shrine thousands of years ago, the test energy and energy ripples that remained here, however, were still running continuously.

Suddenly, in the silent gaze of City Lord TuHai, the green dot with the double golden circle instantly started to change.

First it became a single golden circle, then a green dot with no golden circle around it.

No different from the surrounding green spots.

“…..” City Lord TuHai sighed darkly in silence, no wonder that earth dog was so inconspicuous, it turned out that not only the watchdog, but even the owner, was extremely good at hiding their strength.

Hidden strength? Tu Hai suddenly had a thought in his mind and went to look at the fat and thin escort again. On the surface, there seemed to be nothing special about these two. With the strength of moles and ants that was less than an Earth Rank 5. The fat man had a snarky smile on his face, while the thin man had a very serious look on his face, with piercing eyes, like a martial artist who had experienced real war.

On the surface, there was nothing special to see.

However, if the wrist wheel was used to assess the two…

The Tu Hai City Lord discretely used the pointer on his wrist wheel to point at two targets.

One was the obscene fat man with a snarky smiled who looked particularly incompetent. The other was a member of this elite guards who had the strength of an Earth Rank 6… As a result, to the immense shock of City Lord TuHai, the scale of the pointer completely tilted towards the green dot that represented the fat man. This fat man’s victory rate was surprisingly as high as ninety-nine percent. This would mean that the elite guard member who looked much stronger on the surface would definitely lose if he fought against this seemingly weak fat man. There was not even a possibility of fighting back!

From the limousine, four more young men came down.

Two were escorts.

Twin brother escorts.

The other two were like the companions of the Heavenly Rank expert. One as cold as ice, exuding a strong killing aura, although looking to have not entered the Heavenly Rank yet, still surprised TuHai with his unusualness. The other one was handsome and elegantly behaved, and at first glance, one could tell that he was a disciple from a famous sect or house.

Neither of them had Heavenly Rank strength, but he couldn’t ease the feeling that something was off about their appearances… Lord Tu Hai couldn’t help but use the pointer to point at the elegant young man and at one of the generals behind himself who was of Quasi Heavenly Rank strength. As a result, the winning percentage showed that the elegant young man with a smile like a spring breeze would defeat the general he relied on with a certainty of 95 percent.

TuHai once again used the pointer, comparing his own cousin, the elite guard captain Tudor, to the young man like an ice block.

The result was even more dizzying.

Tudor the elite guard captain who had the strength of a Heavenly Rank 1 had a ninety percent chance of defeat.

Although the wrist wheel was only a test and did not represent actual combat capability, it could also reflect many things. Every single member of the opponents party were hiding their true strength, whether it was an escort, a war beast, or the real expert who had not yet stepped out of the luxury flying car.

“The strength of those escorts are too weak, almost all of them are below Earth Rank 5…”

“Their pets are not only weak, but also ugly!”

“However their treasures are not bad at all, I see that the escorts all have gold-grade treasures, as expected for the guards of a Heavenly Ranked expert, how lavish.”

The generals, rich merchants, and noble snobs behind them were softly discussing in the local language of Rizhao City. They were not afraid of being overheard by the exalted guests as six thousand years ago, in order to make it impossible for the martial artists from Tong Tian Tower to obtain their intel, the experts of the Heaven Realm had specially created a secret language to be used during war. This language was later passed down and became the local language of Rizhao City. If anyone hasn’t studied that language specifically, they wouldn’t be able to understand a single word.

City Lord TuHai, felt very embarrassed.

He was tempted to turn back and give each one of them a slap to wake these buffoons up.

However, he felt that the Heavenly Rank expert in the luxurious flying car was watching his performance, The City Lord hastened to show a huge smile, and very politely returned the salute to the saluting escort, as a gesture of welcome.

Lord Ling Yun, had once said a sentence that was still fresh in City Lord TuHai memory.

The quote from Lord Ling Yun was, “the more you stay with the confused, the more you appear sober; the more you stay with the foolish, the more you appear intelligent.”

City Lord TuHai felt that the quote could not be more appropriately applied to him than right now… He stepped forward and personally welcomed the Heavenly Ranked expert as he got out of the car. As soon as this sincere move was made, the other party immediately reacted; first the atmosphere changed slightly, then accompanied by the blinds of the car moving slightly, a man with a platinum mask on his face, accompanied by a fox-like man with a face full of wisdom, got off the flying car and walked towards City Lord TuHai.

The looks of this esteemed guest had exceeded the expectations of City Lord TuHai.

Even though he had already learned from his butler, Jiao Shi, that the other party was a young man, City Lord TuHai still did not expect that the other party would look so youthful.

Perhaps he was only in his twenties and felt like a child who had not yet fully grown up, yet this young man with such an immature appearance was precisely the anomaly with a double gold circle rating who most likely possessed the strength of Heavenly Rank 5.

On the surface, this young man did not give out any indication that he possessed the strength of a Heavenly Rank expert.

But the feeling wasn’t quite of Earth Rank either, it was very confusing, sometimes the aura seemed weak and sometimes it was strong.

On his body, he wore a hand-woven white robe, on which was embroidered a Heavenly Realm Talisman so intricately designed that it dazzled City Lord TuHai’s eyes. The Heavenly Realm Talisman formed a pattern that looked like decoration on the surface. However the design actually ran down his robe, and would be an extremely powerful guardian battle formation. Lord Tu Hai, had once seen a similar robe at Lord Ling Yun’s palace, however, the patterns on that ‘National Treasure Talismanic Robe’ that Lord Ling Yun regarded as a treasure, were still no match to the ones on the robe currently worn by this mysterious expert.

Even if he took a hundred of Lord Ling Yun’s treasured robe to exchange for the robe this expert currently wore, he would most likely not accept.

On one of the hands of this esteemed guest, there was also a glove with a very special style, faintly shining with a brilliant glow.

City Lord Tu Hai didn’t have to look, even if he was blind, he could still see that this was an Earth Grade artifact!

At least having the strength of a Heavenly Rank 3 or above!

Apart from that, there was a steel puppet following behind the expert like an obedient dog which was also an Earth Grade artifact…..The most dizzying thing for the City Lord TuHai was that on the young man’s other hand, there was a special being that looked like a wrist guard and yet at the same time looked like a divine weapon.

It was an extremely special being, like the divine dragon of the legendary Eastern Immortal Clan, wrapped around the young man’s arm.

What’s this?

Heaven Grade artifact?

Who the hell is this young man? Which noble existence is he?

The Tuhai City Master didn’t dare to think more about it, fearing that he would be so scared that his heart would pop out of his throat.

Right now there was only one thing on his mind, and that was if he could serve this ‘young master’ well, not to mention a qualification to enter the Celestial Realm, even becoming a City Lord inside the Celestial Realm would not be a big deal. Now, the only question was how to make this man happy and satisfied! This was the source of City Lord TuHai’s greatest headache!

“Welcome esteemed guests! It is my honor that you have accepted my invitation!” If it weren’t that all his acquaintances and subordinates were watching, Tu Hai would have wanted to prostrate himself on the ground to welcome this guest.

This translation belongs to Centinni.

chapters.title: Chapter 765.1 - A Lack Of Preparedness (1)
chapters.body:
Chapter 765.1 - A Lack Of Preparedness (1)

Chapter 765.1 – A Lack of Preparedness (1)

City Lord Tu Hai had learned about his esteemed guest long before his arrival from his steward, Jiao Shi.

This esteemed guest was surnamed Yue, first name Titan, and was a young master from a big family in Southern Heaven Realm. Which family exactly was left unsaid, but Tu Hai thought that it was definitely either one of the top ten clans in Southern Heaven Realm or possibly even the top ten clans in the entire Heaven Realm. In regards to the great difference in both strength and status, he did not dare to address him by name. No matter if it was out of courtesy, respect, or deliberately trying to flatter the esteemed guest, Tu Hai could not address him directly by name as with the other youngsters: even if his own name was more than a hundred times greater than the others.

He very respectfully addressed the other party as ‘Third Young Master’, using the title that the butler Jiao Shi had inquired about on the other party’s side.

At Tu Hai’s deference, Tudor, and the generals behind him, were a little puzzled.

It didn’t look like he was a Heaven Rank expert at all, how could the city lord be so gracious in welcoming him?

Could it be that this young man’s status is particularly honorable?

“I am grateful to the city lord for welcoming me today, and our hearts are touched beyond words.” The old fox standing beside Yue Yang was in charge of speaking, while Yue Yang nodded his head slightly and put forth a look of a great young master.

“This is just a small town in the countryside, I’m afraid the simplicity would tarnish your esteemed honor.” Although Yue Yang only nodded his head, it also made City Lord Tu Hai feel particularly happy.

An Overlord!

This is the aura of a man with power!

The job of speaking and flattering should be done by the butlers. Which powerful person would keep on speaking non-stop?

None.

Not a single one.

Generally speaking, when those in positions of power open their mouth and give a command, no matter whether right or wrong, it must be executed.

“Welcome esteemed guests……..”

The butler, Jiao Shi and the others, hurriedly bowed.

“No need for formalities.” The old fox by Yue Yang’s side replied. With a wave of his hand, the Li brothers immediately started handing out red packets one by one to those who greeted them, to show the generosity of their master. The red packets did not contain gold coins, which were unbefitting of their masters status, but rather a crystal-clear falling star bead.

The falling star beads were definitely something that was not available in Heaven Realm.

Even in the Tong Tian Tower, it can only be found near the Falling Star Islands.

The people from Heaven Realm were unaware of the true value of these beads.

When seeing that it was a treasure they had never seen before, their first impression was that it must be a rare and precious gem.

This small investment by Yue Yang was the key to Rizhao City. Following this, Yue Yang had a series of plans to implement here in the future, in order to take over Rizhao City. This was just the first step in his plan!

As both sides exchanged pleasantries, two people were silently spying on each other.

Yue Yang couldn’t help but observe City Lord Tu Hai who had been guarding Rizhao City for three thousand years.

No matter how inadequate City Lord Tu Hai was in managing his internal affairs, at least, he was a qualified guard. The Gate of Heaven Realm, which connected Western Heaven Realm and Tong Tian Tower, had never been lost when he guarded it for thousands of years. Moreover, all the cities around Rizhao City had fallen before, at least once. Only Rizhao City, which was guarded by Tu Hai, had never fallen.

From this, it could be seen that City Lord Tu Hai’s abilities were extraordinarily powerful.

City Lord Tu Hai was also observing Yue Yang.

He had seen tens of millions of young people, but none of them were able to hold a match to this ‘Third Young Master’ in front of him.

Even excluding the esteemed Third Young Master, even the two young men beside him who were called Tian Luo and Tan Lang, even those two escorts Ye Kong and Fatty Hai, were all extremely talented geniuses. These youngsters, at a very young age, had reached Earth Rank, Level 5 and above, some reaching Quasi-Heaven Rank and even Heaven Rank. How could they have reached this realm in their twenties if it wasn’t for the backing of some great clan or sect, cultivating these talents with all their might and spending all their heavenly talents and treasures on them?

After eating and drinking for a while, City Lord Tu Hai, who was constantly searching for topics, was acutely aware that the usual popular songs and dances that he was proud of had actually made the esteemed guest a little bored and was secretly distressed.

The esteemed guests came from a renown background and grew up amongst riches.

These songs and dances naturally would not amount to anything in their eyes ….

What exactly does the Third Young Master like?

If he didn’t come up with something new, he wouldn’t be able to keep the other person. Giving gifts is one way, but it’s harder said than done. What excuse should he use to give the esteemed guest a gift? A low grade gift would displease him; and he obviously would not need things like gold and money; on the matter of women, he would most likely not be lacking and the women in his group might even take offense; as for treasures, even his guards are given Gold Rank treasures!

“I have heard that the Potential Alliance War Beast Shop was arrogant and bullied its customers. I have ordered my men to punish them heavily. Would you perhaps be willing to show us the Golden Flying Dragon that your subordinates purchased from the shop? Or perhaps we can head over to the fighting ring and see its performance in a beast fight while having a drink?” City Lord Tu Hai was testing Yue Yang to see if he liked watching beast fights, if so, he could use this opportunity to purposely lose a few rounds through betting. That way he could push a bit of money over to Yue Yang.

This had been his usual practice whenever he had previously tried to curry favor with Heaven Rank experts.

City Lord Tu Hai felt that it would not be so simple to draw this Third Young Master into his camp but he had to at least try.

Yue Yang waved his hand, “No need.”

The old fox who was sitting beside him laughed loudly, explaining while giving off the air of Yue Yang’s strategist, “The Potential Alliance War Beast Shop, has been taught enough lessons, Third Young Master’s sister has also gotten a grey sparrow’s egg that she liked. As for the golden flying dragon, Ye Kong and Fatty Hai originally wanted to buy it to feed to master’s Reaper Mantis, if it had been a fair deal, the price wouldn’t have mattered… Anyway, this matter is already in the past, our Third Young Master won’t pursue it again, the parties involved have also learned their lesson, so let’s just write it off!”

“Warbeast fighting, we’re interested.” Ye Kong and Fatty Hai stood up.

City Lord Tu Hai gave a signal to his cousin Tudor…

Tudor immediately led a group of generals and surrounded Fatty Hai and Ye Kong as they left their seats and headed towards the fighting ring.

Butler Jiao Shi, on the other hand, dismissed the singers and dancers, then personally served City Lord Tu Hai and his esteemed guest, Yue Yang. Xue Tan Lang ignored the others around him and took out a book before reading out loud. Beside Tu Hai, Xiang Wen, who was known as the top bureaucrat of Rizhao CIty, and who was appointed as the consul of Rizhao City’s tax administration, was having a light conversation with Prince Tian Luo. As he was chatting, he subconsciously swept a look at the book that Xue Tan Lang was reading.

There were many people who read books in public just to show off that they were knowledgeable.

Often holding an upside down book even without noticing it.

The consul, Xiang Wen, had just rushed over for the banquet and hadn’t had a chance to scout out any information about the other party from the butler Jiao Shi.

He was still a bit disdainful towards Xue Tan Lang for reading in public, thinking that this was a really pretentious young man. Even if he really was thirsty for knowledge, must he try to read and recite from a book at a banquet? He must be faking it!

However, when he took a closer look, he was shocked to see that the writing on that book were not ordinary words, but actually Heaven Realm Runes.

There were no words to explain them at all.

This translation belongs to Centinni.

chapters.title: Chapter 765.2 - A Lack Of Preparedness (2)
chapters.body:
Chapter 765.2 - A Lack Of Preparedness (2)

Chapter 765.2 – A Lack of Preparedness (2)

They were densely packed Heaven Realm Runes… The weirdest thing was that these Heaven Realm Runes would move with the passage of time, constantly combining into new forms. Xiang Wen had studied Heaven Realm Runes before and he felt that he had a certain understanding of these runes. However, he was shocked that he could not understand a single one that he saw.

Just as beads of sweat were starting to form on Xiang Wen’s forehead, Xue Tai Lang pulled out a notebook, and started copying excerpts to it.

The runes he copied were quite accurate.

The only difference between the copied runes and the Heaven Realm Runes in the book was that the ones he copied did not have the power of the original Heaven Realm Runes, and would not automatically move about over time, constantly recombining into new combinations and changing into new formations.

“Perhaps, even the sage mentor who taught us, has not mastered as many Heaven Realm Runes as this ice cold man.” Xiang Wen broke out in cold sweat.

Now, he knew that the other party was not pretending, but really learning.

What a thirst for knowledge!

On the other side, City Lord Tu Hai also secretly broke out in cold sweat.

He realized that the more he talked to Third Young Master, the more he realized that he was an ignorant fool.

Anything that Third Young Master said had such profound meaning, If not for the wise man who called himself “Shui Dong Liu”, who explained his words in a roundabout way, he might not have understood them, or might have understood them wrongly. Not to mention the matters regarding the current happenings around the Heaven Realm or about warbeast cultivation and rare treasures, even regarding matters that had happened centuries or millennials ago, there was none that he was not familiar with.

As soon as his unique insights were spoken, Tu Hai felt that he was not deliberately trying to flatter Third Young Master, but was genuinely applauding his extensive knowledge and wisdom.

“It turns out that Black and White Chess was brought to the Western Heaven Realm from Tong Tian Tower! Rumors have twisted its origins so much that I didn’t expect the actual truth to be like this.” The housekeeper, Jiao Shi, was also sighing at the secrets Yue Yang was sharing.

(I think this game is called Reversi)

“How about we continue chatting over a game of chess?” City Lord Tu Hai proposed, overjoyed.

If Third Young Master likes to play chess, then he would have found the way into his heart.

Although he wasn’t very good at chess, Lord Ling Yun loved to play chess, and Lord Tu Hai had studied it for a long time in order to please Lord Ling Yun, and to this day, he would occasionally play chess with his steward, Jiao Shi, to keep his strength from receding. City Lord Tu Hai had always felt that learning a new skill was a good thing, even though he might not be able to use it often, but it would come in handy sometimes.

For example, playing chess.

This skill was useless in combat but was a good tool for socializing.

If he blatantly gave money to those more powerful than him, they would not even be moved. But if they could play chess with each other, there was a better chance of becoming friends over time…

Originally being a very normal noble from Ling Yun country, the matter of City Lord Tu Hai being appointed Rizhao’s City Lord by the Lord of Ling Yun Country was not entirely unrelated to him often playing against the Ling Yun Country Lord……

“Very well, it’s just that I don’t have the best chess skills. I hope the city lord will be merciful.” Yue Yang humbly replied.

“This city lord is also only a beginner. Haha, sometimes my hands feel itchy, so I’ll play a few games.” City Lord Tu Hai felt that if the opponent really wasn’t very strong in chess, he could go easy on him, of course, he mustn’t let the opponent realise this, otherwise it would be disrespecting him. He often played against Lord Ling Yun, so learning how to go easy on an opponent had become a habit long ago. He was so skillful that even Lord Ling Yun couldn’t see it, or maybe saw, but enjoyed the performance of this subordinate.

The butler, Jiao Shi, set up the chess game.

After one match.

City Lord Tu Hai was so ashamed of himself that he wanted to find a crack in the ground so he could hide inside.

He dared to say that if the other side hadn’t secretly let him off several times, he estimated that he wouldn’t have a single piece left on the board.

Although he wasn’t yet at the Grandmaster level, City Lord Tu Hai felt that he could be considered as one of the most powerful chess players in the whole of Ling Yun Country.

However, in front of this Third Young Master…

Tu Hai felt like he was a child learning how to play chess, he essentially had no control of the game whatsoever. When he saw that Third Young Master looked a bit bored, he almost wanted to cry. God, it wasn’t that he didn’t want to be an interesting opponent, it was just that Third Young Master was too good! Even if the other party played with a handicap, he could still beat him with his eyes closed.

“Cough cough, why don’t you allow this servant to have a game with Third Young Master!” The butler, Jiao Shi, who was better at chess than City Lord Tu Hai, took the initiative to take over so that the city lord would not continue making a fool of himself.

“Very well.”

Halfway into the second game.

City Lord Tu Hai couldn’t bear to look at the chessboard anymore, he was afraid he would really start crying

It was way too scary! Even though the butler hadn’t lost a single piece yet, it was plain to see that not a single piece could survive. Every piece seemed to have a chance to live, but was still bound to die. No matter how many more moves were made to save it, the result would still be the same: suicide.

Jiao Shi wiped the sweat from his forehead and apologized to the other party again and again.

Seeing the look of boredom in Third Young Master’s eyes, City Lord Tu Hai clenched his teeth darkly. Suddenly, he thought of a person.

At the entrance of the passage to Sun Island’s dungeon sealing the powerful experts from Tong Tian Tower, there was an old, powerful man at Heaven Rank, sent by the Central Palace Hall to guard the passage. For six thousand years, that old man had never left the passage by even half a step: playing chess to entertain himself every day. Even the Lord of the Ling Yun Country had once called his chess power unmatched. If I can let Third Young Master play a match with that old man, I believe I can definitely succeed in befriending the noble and esteemed Third Young Master……

The only problem was that nobody was allowed to enter the entrance to the passageway leading to the dungeons except for the city lord.

City Lord Tu Hai wasn’t worried about someone taking advantage of this opportunity to break into the prison.

However, if the Central Palace Hall found out, he was afraid he might even lose his position as city lord.

Besides, that Heaven Rank expert wouldn’t necessarily agree to let an outsider come in to play chess with him, this matter must be considered carefully… City Lord Tu Hai looked at Third Young Master again, feeling that this young man had the loneliness of an expert. Tu Hai watched as Third Young Master messed up the chessboard before getting up and leaving, taking with him Shui Dongliu, who was as wise as the sea, Tian Luo, who was elegant and composed, and Xue Tan Lang, who was cold and learned.

City Lord Tu Hai sighed, alas, how ill prepared he was, to have such an honored guest right before him, but no way to befriend him.

I can’t even play chess properly myself.

I must have been such a disappointment!

“What?”

When the butler Jiao Shi and the consul Xiang Wen heard the proposal of City Lord Tu Hai, they immediately paled, waving their hands in unison to oppose: “No, you must not do this!”

They didn’t see the mysterious smiles that appeared on the faces of Yue Yang and the others who walked out of the city’s main residence and back to the luxury flying carriage.

“At the latest, the day after tomorrow, they’ll surely come,” said the old fox with certainty.

Prince Tian Luo smiled, “Perhaps they will come tomorrow, if we choose to leave tomorrow.”

The sly old fox waved his hand, saying, ”No, we have to give them some time to think about it. If we force the issue too quickly, it will cause them to be unable to make up their minds. The Old Dragon Turtle’s previous guesses were not wrong, there really are martial artists from Tong Tian Tower still sealed here…”

He trailed off before continuing thoughtfully.

“Yue Yang, what’s next will be up to you. If you don’t use the Supreme Will and the Genesis Realm, I’m afraid it won’t be easy to win against an old chessboard monster who has been drilling for thousands of years.”

Yue Yang faintly sighed, ”I think after all these years of being sealed away, they wouldn’t mind being sealed for a little longer. We should first find that old pirate, Cook Caribbean. It won’t be easy to breakout so many people out at once without alarming the Central Palace Hall.”

This translation belongs to Centinni.

chapters.title: Chapter 766.1 - Vomiting Blood (1)
chapters.body:
Chapter 766.1 - Vomiting Blood (1)

Chapter 766.1 – Vomiting Blood (1)

Editor: Erudite

Huge Thanks to Nathas for sponsoring 3 chapters of Long Live Summons! (3 out of 3)

City Lord TuHai secretly went to visit the real expert guarding the dungeon passageway—the ”old chess master”.

He talked with the chess master about having a match with the mysterious Heaven Rank expert.

However, the loyal chess master refused.

Though it was forbidden for outsiders to enter at will, City Lord Tu Hai managed to come up with a plan, one that involved a specific chess game. He would first ask the “old chess master” to give him 3 sets of unsolvable games, ones that he had studied for thousands of years. Then, he would turn it over to Yue Yang. He would also send his butler, Jiao Shi, to ask Yue Yang to create some unsolvable chess games for the chess master himself to crack.

Using such a long-distance game method would surely lead them to become good friends over time.

This would also certainly benefit the one who was facilitating this exchange—himself!

Sure enough, his proposal had the tacit approval of both sides. The chess master had set up three unsolvable games for Yue Yang. Meanwhile, Jiao Shi brought back ten games that Yue Yang had created.

After each side received the games, they fell into deep thought.

“It is too hard. Every possible move will affect the other pieces. I cannot move anywhere safe.”

That night, City Lord Tu Hai studied all night long. He even invited all the masters of the chess world to crack the game. The result was tragic. Not a single person could make one move on the three unsolvable secret games posed by the chess master nor the ten unsolvable games created by Third Young Master.

“Before making a move, everything looks fine but as it turns out, every single possible move will result in a loss,” said the chessmasters.

The chess masters, famed in the city of Rizhao, were so depressed that they were on the verge of vomiting out blood.

Even Jiao Shi, an exceptionally skillful and careful thinker, was at a loss for words. “How exactly are we supposed to crack this chess puzzle?”

Thinking, discussing, arguing…

The night passed.

Before setting up another banquet to welcome Yue Yang, City Lord TuHai went to check on the old chess master.

To his surprise, the old chess master had actually managed to crack one of the ten games! A puzzle that no other could solve, one that stumped the entirety of Rizhao city, was solved in a single day and night by none other than the old chess master. City Lord Tu Hai was so excited he couldn’t stop smiling.

He rushed out and asked his butler, Jiao Shi, to send the deciphered chessboard, along with the method, to Third Young Master.

Much to his delight, the old chess master was actually able to crack a game overnight.

Looks like his plan was going to work after all.

As long as this went on, regardless of whether it was Third Young Master or the old chessmaster who managed to solve the puzzle, their relationship would flourish. After a thousand years of indifference to Third Young Master, it seemed like things were starting to improve.

However, moments later, Jiao Shi brought back an even greater wonder—two deciphered chess puzzles!

Hearing such news, City Lord Tu Hai fell into disbelief.

No way!!??

Even the old chess master, who had spent nearly a thousand years trying thousands upon thousands of methods, was unable to crack the three chess puzzles he had sent to Third Young Master. Who the hell was he? What kind of brain does he have? City Lord Tu Hai had seen intelligent people, and geniuses of geniuses, but intelligence of this caliber was unfathomable!

The old chess master was no idiot!

Even an unparalleled grandmaster such as the old chess master would have needed close to a thousand years just to crack a single game; yet, Third Young Master had managed to crack two of the puzzles in just one night.

Possessing such superior intellect compared to himself, City Lord Tu Hai could not help but feel inferior.

Of course, City Lord Tu Hai would never know that Yue Yang possessed a treasure called the “Three Realms Compass”, which could allow him to travel freely between Heaven Realm and Tong Tian Tower; and City Lord Tu Hai would never know that Yue Yang’s fiancée, Xue Wu Xia, who was at Tong Tian Tower’s Gate of Life and Death, had a “Book of Truth”. For the “Book of Truth”, cracking a few chess puzzles was too easy.

Besides, with Yue Yang’s wisdom, as long as the Book of Truth pointed out the first step to correctly crack the puzzle, figuring out the remaining steps would be no problem for him.

Still, Yue Yang deliberately chose to keep a low profile.

Otherwise, even the third set, the hardest puzzle, would have been cracked and sent back via the butler Jie Shi, together with the other two puzzles.

In this exchange of chess puzzles, Yue Yang was one hundred percent confident he would win. This proposal of City Lord Tu Hai could be said to be perfectly tailored for him. If he were to play a game with the old chess master face-to-face, he might not be able to triumph. But for the exchanging of chess puzzles, this tradition had a long history in Tong Tian Tower. The number of unsolvable chess puzzles that had been created were too many to count. Even when excluding Tong Tian Tower, just the main libraries in the Soaring Dragon Continent had extensive records of such unbreakable chess puzzles. One of the most powerful predecessors in this field, had a special class beast which was known as the Starstone Disc. Aided by his special beast, he had created a puzzle compilation known as the “Blood Vomiting Spectrum” and it had been passed on, generation after generation.

Just simply taking any random chess puzzle from the dozens of puzzles recorded within the “Blood Vomiting Spectrum” would be sufficient to cause City Lord Tu Hai and his subordinates vomit blood…

Yue Yang, Xue Wu Xia, Sickly Beauty, and Old Fox had all seen the Blood Vomiting Puzzles before, and out of those ten puzzles sent to City Lord Tu Hai, five were from the Blood Vomiting Spectrum.

The other two puzzles were set up by Xue Wu Xia and Sickly Beauty.

There were two sets that Yue Yang had acquired in the knowledge inherited from Fourth Mother, known as the “ancient unbreakables,” these two sets of ancient unbreakables could not be cracked fully even by the Book of Truth. Only a few steps had been played, proving that even the Book of Truth, which was a piece of half-divine equipment, could not fully decipher them. Yue Yang estimated that even if the old chess master had studied the puzzle to death, he would be unable to crack the two “ancient unbreakables”, which were definitely the result of wisdom from ancient times.

The old fox had also set up a game, and it was his game that the old chess master had cracked successfully.

It wasn’t because the old fox’s level of skill was low, he was just worried that it was too difficult and would be unable to lure the opponent, so after consulting with Yue Yang, he chose to set a relatively easy one… Sure enough, that old chess master had spent a whole night but finally managed to crack it.

Ten puzzles, one cracked.

The remaining nine puzzles wouldn’t be that easy.

Five puzzles came from the “Blood Vomiting Spectrum”, their difficulty were on par with the three set by the old chess master himself. It was estimated that even for an opponent to crack a single one alone, he would need not less than hundreds of years, and hundreds of thousands of attempts. In fact, the puzzles in the Blood Vomiting Spectrum had all remained unsolved until the correct decryption method, left by that predecessor, was found. 600 years ago, Ghost Genius Yue Gong had used the Quintet Golden Puppet Mice and other puppets to find the secret postscript of the Blood Vomiting Spectrum. The martial artists of Tong Tian Tower had always thought that the Blood Vomiting Spectrum was unsolvable, but only after the postscript was released did they realise that there was a way to solve each and every one of the thirty-six spectra!

Without the Ghost Genius Yue Gong, the Blood Vomiting Spectrum would have remained as one of the greatest mysteries in Tong Tian Tower for the past three thousand years..

Not to mention the “ancient unbreakables” set by Yue Yang.

No one has been able to crack it yet.

According to the memories of Fourth Mother, Yue Yang could deduce the first 18 steps, which was ten steps more than the 8 correct steps the Book of Truth could uncover.

For the remaining two puzzles, they were jointly set up by Xue Wu Xia, who loved to read and had read countless books, and Sickly Beauty, who was proficient with Heaven Realm Runes which she had started to study when she was young. Yue Yang dared to say that if the other party wasn’t proficient in Heaven Realm Rune diagram formation changes, it would be foolish to try to crack those puzzles.

Because Xue Wu Xia and Sickly Beauty had set up those puzzles by incorporating the diagram formation changes from some Heaven Realm Runes, the kind of chess puzzle that constantly evolved with every step while still concealing the true path, they would definitely become the nightmare of anybody who tried to solve them. It could be said that they were even more fearsome than the puzzles from the Blood Vomiting Spectrum…

chapters.title: Chapter 766.2 - Vomiting Blood (2)
chapters.body:
Chapter 766.2 - Vomiting Blood (2)

Chapter 766.2 – Vomiting Blood (2)

The puzzle set up by Xue Wu Xia was literally a nightmare. The constant evolving of the Heaven Realm Rune diagram formations would lead the person attempting to crack the puzzle deeper into a spiral of despair.

Sickly Beauty was kinder, and she didn’t want her opponent to go crazy while trying to break her chess puzzle.

Of course, she didn’t want the other person to crack it successfully either.

So, the sick beauty set up a “Dazzling Eye”. It was a pattern that evolved from the Dazzling Eye’s numerous and densely packed array of Heaven Realm Runes.

To solve this kind of chess puzzle, a single pair of eyes were nowhere near enough to constantly monitor the entire board. Multiple runes that were unrelated to the actual puzzle, as well as thousands of different combinations of morphing runes would dazzle one’s eyes, creating a masterpiece that would defeat any attempt to solve it. Of course, if one was proficient in the various diagrams of Heaven Realm Runes and realized that this was a combination of The Desperate Nightmare and The Dazzling Eye patterns, it wouldn’t be difficult to crack it.

As for Yue Yang, he did not ask for any hints from Xue Wu Xia or Sickly Beauty, yet he only needed to spend ten minutes before he successfully cracked both puzzles.

“What? Third Young Master has cracked two unsolvable chess puzzles?” The City Lord, Tu Hai, rushed to see Lord Ling Yun, but even Lord Ling Yun was startled.

Once he heard “Yue Yang has solved two unsolvable puzzles in just one night”.

He was greatly shocked!

Lord Ling Yun, whose interest had been aroused, also attempted to solve the chess puzzles, now named The Ten Absolute Chess Puzzles”, at his palace… As a result, to his surprise, he ended up like City Lord Tu Hai, unable to make even a single move.

No matter which move he made, he immediately lost the game…

Among the ten puzzles, there was only one puzzle which looked relatively easy. That was the one that the old chess master had cracked overnight.

As for the remaining nine chess puzzles, Lord Ling Yun had stood and stared at them for half a day, with a chess piece in hand, but ultimately, he still could not put it down anywhere on the board! Lord Ling Yun was depressed, if he could at least make a move, he would create an opening. That was a much better outcome than not being able to make any move at all. Were all his years of playing chess in vain?

“My lord, this cracked game is obviously easier. The opponent must have set it according to our standards, lest we be embarrassed by our inability to crack even a single puzzle. In addition, these five puzzles have certain similarities, obviously they came from the same person’s hand. This person’s mastery of chess is a thousand times better than myself. Coming up with even one puzzle of this difficulty would be very rare. Furthermore, there are five of them here. Whoever laid out these five puzzles, I would guess, should be the teacher of Third Young Master or an elder from his clan. Otherwise, there wouldn’t be such wisdom in them”. For these following two puzzles, Tu Hai felt a kind of spiritual pull towards them, and his mind could not help but be pulled into the puzzle, causing him to be unable to think clearly. These two puzzles should have been the work of Third Young Master himself, as he is extremely good at hiding his abilities, always giving off a sense of mystery about him. It’s as if one is peering into a fog. As for the last two puzzles, CIty Lord Tu Hai didn’t even dare to comment about them. They were totally beyond the capability of Tu Hai to comprehend…. Both puzzles were remnants of a complete game. There were thousands of possible steps that could be made. What was even more stunning was that both of these puzzles looked as if they could be merged into one bigger puzzle, creating even more branches and possibilities. Tu Hai had studied these puzzles all day and night. Now, he could finally identify slight differences in each of the two puzzles.

“There’s no mistake. If you’re talking about difficulty, these two are the highest. The other five should be ranked second. These two puzzles that have some hidden mental indications are extremely difficult, but on the other hand, they should have some kind of trick to them. If we want to crack these puzzles, these two games must be our main focus. By the way, what are these two puzzles called?” Lord Ling Yun asked.

“This puzzle which has less pieces is called ‘Silence’, while this puzzle which has more pieces, and looks more complex, is known as ‘Clarity’. In Tu Hai’s eyes, their names were simply rhetorical. When trying to solve “Silence” one’s heart would become restless, fidgety, and one was unable to think quietly… When trying to solve “Clarity”, one’s eyes would be dazzled, dizzied, and it was difficult to free oneself from the puzzle… In order to solve these two puzzles, Tu Hai had not slept and eaten for a full day and night, it was literally as if he was trying to solve them with his life! Tu Hai shook his head and sighed.

“What about those five?” Lord Ling Yun laughed and asked again.

“Their names, Blood Vomiting Spectrum, one, two, three, four, five, I feel that’s an apt name, as it’s impossible to crack these games without vomiting at least three liters of blood. It’s just that I don’t know how high their mastery of the game must be, to fabricate five such exquisite puzzles.”

For the last two sets, Tu Hai waved his hand to indicate that these two sets were nameless.

There were no names worthy of them either.

He suspected that only the wisdom of the gods could have created such chess puzzles.

“This Third Young Master is truly a rare genius in this world. Tu Hai, arrange an opportunity for this king to meet with this man as well.” Lord Ling Yun made this decision after some thought.

chapters.title: Chapter 767.1 - [Reappearance Of The Golden Crow]
chapters.body:
Chapter 767.1 - [Reappearance Of The Golden Crow]

Chapter 767.1 – [Reappearance of the Golden Crow]

Rizhao City.

When City Lord Tu Hai and Lord Ling Yun returned to Sun Island, there was a Heaven Rank expert, radiating a sun-like presence, who was visiting Sun Island.

At first, City Lord Tu Hai thought that this Heaven Rank expert was Third Young Master, but upon closer inspection, he realized that he was a different young man. This Heaven Rank expert was from the Eastern Demon Tribe. As the growth rate of these demons was vastly different from humans the demon warrior in front of him was at least eight-hundred years old, if not a thousand years old, but he still maintained the look of a twenty-something youth. City Lord Tu Hai was not surprised by this. He knew that Eastern Demon Tribe members aged very slowly, some of them aging even slower than Ancient Dragons.

Humans reach full adulthood in a few decades.

A cycle of one or two hundred years can be enough to give birth to a generation of powerful warriors.

Of all the races, humans have the fastest growth. Other races like the Ancient Dragons, the Ancient Titans, and the Eastern Demon Tribe are the opposite of this. An Ancient Dragon that’s a dozen years old would still be considered a baby. It would need a few hundred years to grow to be a child, not old enough to even reach into its teenage years.

The Eastern Demon Tribe also had a few abnormal members who grew slightly faster but, in general, they were a slow-growing race.

For many of the younger members of the Eastern Demon Tribe, their looks would not change within a span of one to two hundred years—they would all look like babies! Only after a thousand years would there be a visible change in members of the Eastern Demon Tribe. To reach full maturity and their peak strength it would take about ten thousand years… Such a slow rate of maturation, even when compared to the Ancient Dragons and Ancient Titans, who were famous for their slow growth rates, could be said to be one of the slowest within Heaven Realm.

Not only did the Eastern Demon Tribe have a slow growth rate they also had a low fertility rate.

An ancient sage once joked about this, saying that if the Eastern Demon Tribe had the reproductive power of humans, they would have dominated Heaven Realm long ago.

In reality, not only the Eastern Demon Tribe, all slow-growing, high-potential races, face the problem of low fertility rates. No matter how diligently the Eastern Demon Tribe and the Ancient Dragons trained their newer generations, they were still not a match for the lazy human race.

“Distinguished guest, may I ask why you have come to Rizhao City?” Tu Hai was startled by the appearance of this strong young warrior. Just recently they had been graced by the passing Third Young Master, now, there was another expert who had come to visit? Was some divine treasure recently unearthed in Rizhao City? After closer inspection, City Lord Tu Hai realized that this Eastern Demon Tribe warrior, with the radiance of the sun, actually had the strength of Heaven Realm, Level 5! His heart started to beat even faster.

“You’re the City Lord? I am Eighth Prince Wu Hai of the Three-Legged Golden Crow Tribe of Tang Valley. I came to your city to retrieve my concubine.”

Tu Hai was overcome by despair that Eighth Prince Wu Hai would accuse him of such a heinous crime.

Tu Hai thought, “Boss, Rizhao City is millions of miles away from Tang Valley, even traveling via teleportation circles, it would take more than a month to get there. How can you say I went to Tang Valley and abducted your concubine? Besides, even if I had the guts, I wouldn’t have the ability to run to Tang Valley. Because the Tang Valley, also known as the Valley of the Sun, is the settlement of the Golden Crow Tribe. It’s a famous forbidden place in the Upper Heaven Realm. How could a small city lord like himself run to the Tang Valley and abduct the concubine of a Prince?”

He had never entered the Upper Heaven Realm and knew next to nothing about the goings-on in the Upper Heaven Realm. Even Lord Ling Yun felt that Tu Hai had been unjustly accused.

Apart from occasionally running around outside his own city, and sometimes visiting the surrounding ones, Tu Hai would normally not set foot outside of Ling Yun country. Although Tu Hai had a lot of women, Lord Ling Yun believed that even if Tu Hai had the guts of the whole of Sun Island, he would not dare to abduct the royal consort of the Eastern Demon Tribe.

Lord Ling Yun tentatively inquired, “Your Highness… this… could there be some misunderstanding here?”

Eighth Prince Wu Hai waved his hand firmly, “There is no misunderstanding, my concubine is in Rizhao City.”

Tu Hai nearly burst into tears upon hearing this. Screw this!

Although he had snatched many women in the past, he had never tried to snatch a beauty from the Eastern Demon Tribe before. He would never have the guts to go against the Eastern Demon Tribe. Wouldn’t that just be looking for death?

“Your Highness, Eighth Prince, why would your concubine be in Rizhao City?” Tu Hai asked. Fortunately, just at that moment, a savior appeared. Yue Yang, who was on his way to the Sun Island City Lord’s castle, just happened to pass by in a luxurious flying carriage. When he saw the glittering member of the Three-Legged Golden Crow Tribe standing in mid-air, feeling a bit curious, he stopped.

“What race are you? Why do you feel so much like us?” the Eighth Prince was even more curious when he looked at Yue Yang.

“Human.” Yue Yang replied, shrugging his shoulders.

“Impossible… Forget it, while the vast majority of humans are weak, there are strong ones, and you may be an exception.” The Eighth Prince’s words actually resonated with Tu Hai, who also felt that the Third Young Master didn’t feel like a human, but who couldn’t deny it. During this time, Lord Ling Yun secretly observed Yue Yang but did not immediately come forward to introduce himself.

“What a matchless young man!” After he had observed Yue Yang, Lord Ling Yun secretly praised him in his heart.

Lord Ling Yun had originally been a bit skeptical about Tu Hai’s previous comments. Could there really be such an outstanding young man?

Could you really say that he was matchless just from the ten puzzles he sent? Now that Lord Ling Yun had seen him with his own eyes, he knew that what Tu Hai had said was true.

If there hadn’t been anybody to compare him too, this feeling might not have been so strong… Right now, before them was the extremely outstanding Eighth Prince of the Eastern Demon Tribe, standing right in front of Third Young Master. When comparing the two, Yue Yang, a human, was not only not intimidated by Eighth Prince Wu Hai of the Three-Legged Golden Crow Tribe, who was releasing a sun-like radiance, rather he had an air around him that suggested that he would leave Eighth Prince Wu hai behind in his dust. In the eyes of the surrounding people, this only made Yue Yang all the more outstanding, and all the more abnormal.

Even Lord Ling Yun, who had been a Lord of Ling Yun country for thousands of years, couldn’t help but feel ashamed of himself when he saw this young man.

Was this the difference between clouds and mud?

This was it!

chapters.title: Chapter 767.2
chapters.body:
Chapter 767.2

Chapter 767.2

When looking at Eighth Prince Wu Hai of the Three-Legged Golden Crow Tribe, Lord Ling Yun felt that this was a young man with excellent potential. One who had a limitless future, that he would surely entertain him politely but never fear. However, as to the Third Young Master, who claimed to be a human, Lord Ling Yun was unable to view him as a junior. He faintly felt that this Third Young Master was no ordinary Heaven Ranker. He could possibly be a Heaven Ranker that had awoken his Supreme Will.
