In ancient times, all of Heaven Rankers who had awoken their Supreme Will were called Supreme Innates.

The ones who have awoken their Supreme Will and have derived the Power of Law from it would then be known as Divine Innates, who were like the Gods.

However, during the great battle six thousand years ago, when war broke out between Heaven Realm and Tong Tian Tower, while breaking off the relationship between the two, those in Heaven Realm decided to stop using the term “Supreme Innates” that those from Tong Tian Tower used. Instead, they designated all Rankers above the tenth Earth Rank as Heaven Rankers. However, in both Lower Heaven Realm and Upper Heaven Realm, those who had yet to awake their Supreme Will would not be fully recognized as Heaven Rankers. This can clearly be seen in the requirements to enter Upper Heaven Realm; one had to own a grimoire, be at least Heaven Rank, Level 5, or have awoken their Supreme Will.

As for Eighth Prince Wu Hai of the Three-Legged Golden Crow Tribe, Lord Ling Yun could see that this young man of the Eastern Demon Tribe had already grasped a little bit of his Supreme Will but had not yet fully awakened it. Given time, the future of this Eighth Prince was unlimited.

But when looking at Third Young Master, Lord Ling Yun could be absolutely sure that the other party had already started to awaken his Supreme Will and was learning to control it. However, it was still unclear whether or not he could use the Power of Law.

With a human body, he was able to reach this level just by cultivating for twentysomething years. Even Lord Ling Yun, who was once known as a prodigy, felt that he himself was inferior and could only sigh. If this Third Young Master had cultivated for two hundred years before reaching this level it would already have been a very terrifying and incredible feat. It was said that even the most outstanding human genius of Tong Tian Tower, Prison Emperor, had to spend three hundred years cultivating before he reached the realm of a Supreme Innate. Even with the assistance of three Divine Artifacts, it took him another three hundred years before he grew strong enough to battle the Giants and became the Prison Emperor, a peerless expert. It took him more than 600 years to achieve all of this. His speed was beyond amazing. Since then, his record had never been equaled.

However, Prison Emperor, who had cultivated at an unprecedented speed… This Prison Emperor who took 300 years to cultivate to the level of Supreme Innate… In front of Third Young Master, his efforts seemed so futile.

Third Young Master, whose origins were so mysterious, had become a Supreme Innate in a mere twenty or so years… Luckily, he wasn’t from Tong Tian Tower, otherwise, Heaven Realm would break out in war once again!

The first thought that came to Lord Ling Yun’s mind was one of rejoicing.

His second thought was one of suspicion.

According to what Eighth Prince Wu Hai of the Three-Legged Golden Crow Tribe said, Lord Ling Yun was eighty percent sure that the noble Third Young Master had come from the mysterious and unfathomable Eastern Immortal Tribe… Apart from that mysterious and powerful race, there could not be any other race that could give birth to such a perverted life. Compared to the cultivation of the Prison Emperor, not to mention the warriors in Tong Tian Tower or even those in Heaven Realm, he would rank in the top 5.

Currently, the only one in Heaven Realm who could be confident in overwhelming the Prison Emperor was Ming Yue Guang. One of the Three Great Leaders.

As for Third Young Master, Lord Ling Yun did not dare to think about it at all, fearing that he would scare himself.

“There’s something very familiar about you. I think you must have some relatives who are from our tribe. I’m Wu Hai, the eighth son of the Golden Crow King, and you are?” Eighth Prince thought that Yue Yang looked particularly special and took the initiative to go over and greet him.

“My last name is Yue and my first name is Titan.” Yue Yang introduced himself, then introduced the people around him; Ye Kong, Fatty Hai, Xue Tan Lang, and Prince Tian Luo.

Taking advantage of Yue Yang’s conversation with Eighth Prince Wu Hai, Lord Ling Yun hurriedly had a discussion with City Lord Tu Hai.

First of all, Lord Ling Yun wanted to be one hundred percent sure that Tu Hai really hadn’t touched that concubine.

On this matter, City Lord Tu Hai swore a poisonous oath, that would cause his joystick to rot off, that he had truly been unjustly accused! Even if he really was a pervert, he would not dare touch the concubine of Eighth Prince Wu Hai from the Three-Legged Golden Crow Tribe!

Lord Ling Yun nodded, since this was a misunderstanding, it should be easy to handle.

Additionally, with Third Young Master’s appearance, Eighth Prince Wu Hai’s attention had been distracted. He did not seem to be about to lose his temper, so this was a perfect time to try to explain and resolve the misunderstanding.

So, both of them stepped forward to pay their respects and join the conversation… It turned out that Eighth Prince Wu Hai did not think that Tu Hai had stolen his concubine. His beloved concubine had been kicked out of the house by his official wife, after making a small mistake, due to her jealousy. By the time Wu Hai returned home, his concubine had already returned to her hometown, Sun Valley, near Rizhao City. So, he came to take her back home.

“My Que’er [1] is pregnant. During her travels, if anything happened to her, I wouldn’t want to live anymore!” From the looks of it, Eighth Prince of the Golden Crow Tribe was a really loyal husband. If it were any other prince, they would not chase after a concubine, kicked out by their official wife, so diligently. He searched for her, all the way back to her hometown.

“Rizhao City does not have a woman of that description.” the consul, Xiang Wen, who had a knack for remembering other’s faces, weakly replied.

“Indeed, there is no such pregnant lady here.” The butler, Jiao Shi, also hurriedly denied.

“If she’s not at her hometown, it can’t be that she met with some accident somewhere right? Chi Huor [2] said that she had two of her own guards travel with her to protect her all the way back to her village, just for her safety. So, how can she not be there? My Que’er… My unborn son… It’s all my fault… If I hadn’t gone out such a thing would never have happened!” The Eighth Prince Wu Hai’s face changed drastically—he was in pain!

“Don’t be so pessimistic. With two guards accompanying her, she will surely be fine. Perhaps you acted too quickly and arrived before her. If she was walking slowly, she may not have arrived in Rizhao City yet.” advised Yue Yang, as he secretly laughed, “Who would dare to move against Golden Crow Tribe guards?”

Besides, could an ordinary person become the concubine of a prince from Tang Valley?

He casually reassured Wu Hai, “I have a friend who is skilled in the art of divination. Later, I’ll ask for her help to predict where she is. I’ll see if I can find a clue!”

[1] Que’er is his nickname/pet name for his concubine.

雀 què > small bird/sparrow and ‘er = young.

‘er’ is the equivalent of the English ‘-y’ or ‘-ie’ ending and is a term of endearment.

chapters.title: Chapter 768.1
chapters.body:
Chapter 768.1

Chapter 768.1 – [ A Beauty’s Tongue? 1.1]

“Where’s your friend? Please ask her to come quickly!” Eighth Prince Wu Hai seemed to be a loyal and straightforward man.

If it were any other Heaven Rank expert, they would not be so anxious.

Moreover, even if they were anxious about their loved one, they wouldn’t show it so easily.

Yue Yang certainly couldn’t tell him that Xue Wu Xia, who could make predictions using the Book of Truth, was currently cultivating at the Gate of Life and Death inside Tong Tian Tower. Smiling, while waving his hands, he indicated that his friend wasn’t with him, and the divination would have to wait until he had time to go and visit them. There were many strange people in Heaven Realm, and they were all of different temperaments, including some of them who did not like to meet strangers and would only see their friends. Eighth Prince Wu Hai and Lord Ling Yun did not doubt Yue Yang’s words, they just felt that this strange expert, who was skilled in the art of divination, must definitely be a peerless expert that hid themself from the world. They never would have imagined that it was a human woman from Tong Tian Tower like Xue Wu Xia.

Lord Ling Yun and Tu Hai, both consoled Eighth Prince Wu Hai. They surmised that something along the way had delayed his consort’s trip, so that Eighth Prince’s beloved concubine had not yet returned home.

Using a bit of persuasion, CIty Lord Tu Hai once again invited them to a banquet.

Although Wu Hai was a bit anxious to search for his concubine, he had still come to this Rizhao City hoping to expand his search together with the power of local rankers. On the other hand, he also wanted to draw on Yue Yang’s power to find useful clues through that hidden expert who was skilled in divination.

So, he forcefully pushed down the restlessness in his heart and entered the city castle with Yue Yang and the rest.

In terms of the banquet, Tu Hai had put in a lot of effort.

All sorts of delicacies were served one after another, the last one in particular was a unique dish only found in Rizhao City, Braised Sparrow Tongues.

After the most tender and delicious parts of several thousand gray sparrows have been marinated by the most renowned chefs of Rizhao city, the bird’s tongues are cut off. These are then sculpted into various shapes, then braised in their own juices infused with honey. To finish them off, they are fried with mushrooms. The resulting masterpiece literally melts in your mouth, yet doesn’t taste greasy. A superlative dish with a well rounded taste and just the right amount of richness. A dish that has a crispy outer skin that, as soon as you bite into it, oozes with sweet juices.

“Come, all of you must try our unique specialty of Rizhao City, Braised Sparrow Tongues. This type of grey sparrow is only found in the area surrounding Rizhao City. Although it is useless as a beast of war, it is superior to other fowl in terms of the quality of its meat, and is the most suitable for consumption. The sparrow’s tongue is long and thin, tender and smooth, and is known as a ‘Beauty’s Tongue’, which makes it the greatest amongst all our delicacies. It is said that thousands of years ago, there was a grey sparrow which successfully evolved into a Grey Sparrow Beauty, and transformed into a humanoid form. Then, a few Heaven Rank experts cut out her tongue. After it had been thoroughly marinated and perfectly prepared by a famous chef, its deliciousness was rated as one of the top ten delicacies throughout all of Heaven Realm!” Tu Hai’s cousin Tudor, who was a famous gourmet in Rizhao City, recounted this while presenting the Braised Sparrow Tongues to the esteemed guests.

Of course, this specialty had been prepared to be served to Yue Yang and his companions.

This allowed Eighth Prince Wu Hai, who had come unannounced, to have the opportunity to try this local delicacy as well.

As Tudor proudly introduced this famous dish, both Tu Hai and Lord Ling Yun looked at each other and gave a surreptitious nod.

Although Tudor, who was the captain of the elite guard, usually seen as a dissipated loser, doing nothing all day but eating, drinking, and having fun. However, in terms of hospitality, he was still able to do a good job, and could be counted on to act as a barely useful host.

The “Braised Beauty’s Tongue” of ancient times could not be replicated.

But with this similarly unique “Braised Sparrow Tongues”, it could be said that they would still not lose face.

If the two esteemed guests, Third Young Master and Eighth Prince, could return home satisfied, then in the future, when Tu Hai made a diplomatic trip to Upper Heaven Realm, he would start off with some friends. At the very least, he would be able to call on the Eastern Demon Tribe… Lord Ling Yun and Tu Hai even thought that Third Young Master was most likely from the Eastern Immortal Tribe… If he could gain his friendship, his future would be brilliant and prosperous.

“Sparrow tongues?” As soon as the servant serving Eighth Prince Wu Hai removed the cloche[1], he was stunned.

In front of everybody was a Grey Sparrow Beauty.

It was made from braised sparrow tongues, which the chef had carefully arranged and stacked, one by one, to form the shape with the head of a beauty and the body of a sparrow, seasoned with honey and mushrooms.

The beauty’s head could be said to be almost lifelike.

The beauty had an intricate design and was clearly the masterpiece of a great chef who had spent many hours preparing this dish. It was so beautiful that it was almost a pity to eat it.

Tudor was very proud of the arrangement of the sparrow tongues, not to mention the cooking process, it took hours just to arrange and stack the massive number of tiny sparrow tongues. In Heaven Realm, no other chefs, except the famous chefs of Rizhao City, had ever been able to produce this dish. A dish which is aesthetically pleasing while having a wondrous aroma and mouth-watering taste. The only regret that Tudor had was that this was not the tongue of an evolved humanoid Grey Sparrow Beauty, otherwise it would have been one of the top ten delicacies throughout all of Heaven Realm.

Tudor was even more delighted to see that the guests had been charmed by this famous dish.

He appeared to be modest, but was in fact proud. He laughed, “Unfortunately, you can’t find any grey sparrows that have evolved into a humanoid or near-humanoid form around Rizhao City, otherwise, you would have been treated to ‘A Beauty’s Tongue’! Rizhao City might be in the middle of nowhere, and we have to make do with simple food, but hospitality is our forte. Our offering you a taste of the delicacies available from our countryside is a symbol of our sincerity.”

“Have any of you ever eaten a ‘Beauty’s Tongue’? I mean, a real Beauty’s Tongue? One cut off from an evolved humanoid Grey Sparrow Beauty?” Eighth Prince Wu Hai suddenly stood up and inquired.

“Your Highness, don’t worry. The tongue of a real Grey Sparrow Beauty is so hard to come by, we have never been blessed with a chance to try the real thing.” Tu Hai was deeply afraid that Eighth Prince was a gourmand[2], if he really demanded for a Grey Sparrow Beauty’s tongue right now, where could he go to find one for him? The gray sparrow was such a low-rank war beast, they rarely evolved into humanoid Gray Sparrow Beauties. Although he had been in Rizhao City for many years, he himself had never seen an evolved, humanoid Grey Sparrow Beauty. Both the Grey Sparrow Beauty and ‘A Beauty’s Tongue’ only existed in legends.

“However, this isn’t a problem!” Tudor smugly boasted, ”If His Royal Highness wants to try it, I’ll send people to search for it right away or cultivate one with magic crystals, only the latter might take more time. I think that there are tens of millions of grey sparrows around Rizhao City. There must be some evolved, humanoid Grey Sparrow Beauties amongst them. It’s just that they have been hidden away, lest the mercenaries catch them… Your Highness, you don’t know how many grey sparrows we eat in Rizhao City every year. It is absolutely not less than a million! Some hunters might have encountered these humanoid Grey Sparrow Beauties and killed some but did not report it to us. Even though I have not personally seen one, maybe there is even one in this dish…”

“I’ll kill you!” Eighth Prince Wu Hai of the Golden Crow Tribe, suddenly burst into a rage.

He flashed in front of Tudor, then reached out and grabbed Tudor by the throat, choking him as he lifted his body up from the floor, prepared to slap the pathetic frightened wretch to death.

[1] Cloche > A bell-shaped metal or glass cover that is placed over a serving dish/plate to keep the food warm or fresh. The plate is presented to the diner and the cloche lifted off to the delight of the gourmet!

Image of a fancy antique French cloche bell > http://www.brightonyourhealth.com/wp-content/uploads/2016/01/Cloche_argent_1_082006-768×576.jpg

Full article is here > Service Under a Bell: The Reason A Plate Is Served With A Cloche

[2] Gourmand > Someone who is extremely (and often excessively) fond of eating and drinking. (Example: Fatty Hai, if he could afford it)

Gourmet > Someone with refined tastes who enjoys (and knows a lot about) fine food and drink. (Example: Zhi Zun)

chapters.title: Chapter 768.2 - A Beauty’S Tongue? (2)
chapters.body:
Chapter 768.2 - A Beauty’S Tongue? (2)

Chapter 768.2 – A Beauty’s Tongue? (2)

Editor: Erudite

Tudor, who possessed Heaven Rank, Level 1 strength, was not even a fart in front of Heaven Rank, Level 5, Wu Hai. If it wasn’t for Lord Ling Yun’s intervention, Tudor’s head would have been broken like a rotten egg.

Except for Yue Yang, who had noticed a slight change of expression on Wu Hai’s face just now, everyone else was shocked to see this.

Hadn’t they been chatting nicely just now? Why does he suddenly want to kill someone?

How had Tudor offended Eighth Prince?

City Lord Tu Hai felt dizzy. What an unlucky day today was. Even in the process of enjoying a meal such a murderous situation had occurred. What kind of taboo did he commit to garner such bad luck?

“First, everyone, calm down. Any misunderstandings can be resolved. Right now, let us not start fighting… Your Royal Highness, what is going on? Has Tudor been disrespectful? Is the food not to your taste? If so, we will clear the offensive item immediately.” City Lord Tu Hai’s first thought was that perhaps the Three-Legged Golden Crow Tribe of the Eastern Demon Tribe didn’t eat grey sparrows as they could be considered a type of crow. Had Tudor unknowingly stepped on his tail feathers while trying to gain his favor?

“My Que’er, you died such a miserable death!”

Eighth Prince Wu Hai shook off Lord Ling Yun’s arm, then threw Tudor onto the floor in front of him. He stepped on him, pinning him firmly in place with his feet.

After that, he turned to face the braised grey sparrow tongues that had been sculpted into the form of a ‘Beauty’, as his tears fell like rain.

The incessant sound of his lamentations seemed to go on without end.

Lord Ling Yun and City Lord Tu Hai, who were prepared to continue beseeching Wu Hai to release Tudor, were struck dumb.

A terrifying thought surged through the minds.

They could not stop themselves from shuddering.

Could it be that the beloved concubine of Eighth Prince Wu Hai was an evolved humanoid Grey Sparrow Beauty? If that was the case, then it was over, completely over!

In the hopes of entertaining a guest, they had caught his beloved concubine, roasted her, then served her to him on a platter. This type of grudge and hatred could never be appeased regardless of how much money or precious gifts they prepared for him. Right now, the only hope was that Tudor, that idiot, hadn’t turned Eighth Prince’s beloved concubine into a ‘Beauty’s Tongue’. Otherwise, from today onward, Rizhao City would be the target of the Three-Legged Golden Crow Tribe, and all their people would be massacred in a reign of blood and fire.

“I already told you from the start, she returned long ago. How is it that there is still no trace of her? It turns out that you killed her and turned her into a dish!” Eighth Prince Wu Hai began shedding tears of blood. His killing aura shook all of the City Lord’s Castle. His radiant aura exploded around him. He was prepared to burn the place to the ground.

“Kill!”

At this moment, Wu Hai was furious. He had entirely lost control of his mind.

Sun-like flames condensed in his palms of his hands. Once he let them erupt, there was absolutely no possibility for anyone within the City Lord’s castle to survive.

Even City Lord Tu Hai and Lord Ling Yun, under this crazed attack of Wu Hai’s extreme anger, would be in danger, not to mention Tudor, who was still trapped beneath Wu Hai’s feet. He would surely be reduced to ashes. How long that took would depend on how long Wu Hai wanted to torture him.

Just as Tu Hai and Lord Ling Yun were about to go mad with worry, a hand, reached out from the void.

Easily grabbing hold of Wu Hai’s arm.

A clear and very calm voice rang out, ”Eighth Prince, calm down! Your beloved concubine must be fine. These are just common sparrow tongues. They are only similar in shape!”

It was Yue Yang.

Wu Hai was stunned by Yue Yang’s ability to so easily approach him and grab his arm.

The Golden Crow Tribe’s protective divine flame was number eight in Heaven Realm rankings. How could an ordinary person touch it?

However, at this moment, he had no capacity to give this much thought. He immediately struggled to free himself but was shocked when he realized that he was unable to break free from Yue Yang’s grip. Instead, he felt a binding power that seemed to be capable of binding his soul to his spirit, his spirit to his will, and his will to his body—he had been completely subdued![1] Being restricted like this, he hadn’t completely calmed down yet but a new burst of hope was rekindled in his heart. He shouted: “My beloved Que’er isn’t nearly at Heaven Rank strength. How can she beat them? If they didn’t catch Que’er, how could this dish look so much like her? Is she really still alive? You, how do you know? Have you ever seen my Que’er?”

“If you can calm down immediately, I’ll give you an analysis.” Yue Yang removed his hand, and sure enough, Wu Hai regained his senses.

“I can’t live without my beloved Que’er. Please, you must… you must give me some good news!” Wu Hai looked at Yue Yang with a hopeful look on his face.

However, Tudor was still trapped beneath Wu Hai’s feet.

If something really had happened to Que’er, he would kill him to avenge his beloved concubine.

At the same time, he hoped his lover was not dead. He hoped that she was still alive and well. Now, due to these contradictory feelings, he was conflicted.

Yue Yang slowly made his way back to his seat and sat down. He slowly took a sip of tea. He was not in a rush to speak. All of the people in the room, every one of them, were looking at him.

This included Tu Hai and Lord Ling Yun. Everyone was looking at Yue Yang with a hopeful gaze, hoping he could bring them some good news that would turn this situation around. If a fight really broke out, not to mention Rizhao City, even the Ling Yun Kingdom or even ten Ling Yun Kingdoms together, might not be enough to successfully fight against the Golden Crow Tribe.

“Eighth Prince, how about going back to your seat, then listening to my careful analysis?” Yue Yang made a gesture for Wu Hai to sit back down.

“All right!” Wu Hai forcefully suppressed the anger in his heart as he pulled Tudor up onto his feet. Tudor was so frightened that he had peed in his pants. Wu Hai growled viciously, “I’m praying and you had better pray too, “Don’t let anything happen to Que’er. If anything does happen, I’ll definitely roast you and eat you!” Then, as he threw Tudor away, he cried out again and shed mournful tears: “My beloved Que’er, my poor child…”

“Please don’t worry. Your beloved consort and child will definitely be fine!” City Lord Tu Hai hurried to persuade Wu Hai. With his other hand, he frantically waved to his butler, Jiao Shi, to stop him from pulling Tudor to safety. Tudor’s death would be a pity but in case something really had happened, there must be a scapegoat.

“How do you know that?” Wu Hai glared angrily at Tu Hai, “My beloved Que’er, where the hell is she?”

“Ah…” Tu Hai broke out in a cold sweat. How would he know where Wu Hai’s beloved concubine was!? Furthermore, telling the currently enraged Eighth Prince that he did not know where she was would only serve to make him even angrier. That would be the stupidest move he could make. He did not dare to answer Wu Hai’s question directly and hurriedly sought help from Yue Yang. He hurried to Yue Yang’s side and bowed deeply, ”Third Young Master, please use your great power to solve this misunderstanding! If this matter can be resolved peacefully, I, Tu Hai, will repay Third Young Master with everything I have!”

Every one of the people in the room was staring at Yue Yang hoping that he could fully resolve this issue.

[1] [Spirit Pacifier] > A summoning skill gained from his completing the Gemini Temple test.

chapters.title: Chapter 769.1 - Egg, Truth, Favor (1)
chapters.body:
Chapter 769.1 - Egg, Truth, Favor (1)

Chapter 769.1 – Egg, Truth, Favor (1)

Yue Yang did not open his mouth to explain.

Instead, he beckoned to Ye Kong to come over and whispered a few words in his ear.

Ye Kong immediately took off after receiving his orders. Meanwhile, Yue Yang remained sitting quietly, leisurely drinking his tea. Just as Tu Hai and Lord Ling Yun thought that His Royal Highness, Eighth Prince, would not be able to stand it anymore, and was about to explode, out of the blue, Eighth Prince Wu Hai of the Golden Crow Tribe, stood up and bowed to Yue Yang. With admiration and conviction in his eyes, he nodded and said, “So it was like that. Thank you. My heart is now at ease. But this matter is not over yet. Rizhao City must pay a price.”

Prince Wu Hai turned to look towards Lord Ling Yun and City Lord Tu Hai. While suppressing the anger in his heart, he squeezed out, “You should be thankful that Third Young Master is here today, giving you a chance at redemption. Today is a really lucky day for you.”

When did Third Young Master explain?

He didn’t even speak so much as a single word the entire time!

Consul Xiang Wen, butler Jiao Shi, as well as all the other generals, who were cowering in a corner, were utterly shocked.

However, Tu Hai and Lord Ling Yun looked at each other in surprise… What Third Young Master had probably done was use a special summoning skill called [Spiritual Telepathy][1]. Only the target of his skill, in this case, Prince Wu Hai, could hear Third Young Master’s explanation.

If Prince Wu Hai was an ordinary person and Third Young Master, who was a Heaven Ranker, used [Spiritual Telepathy] on him, it would be almost effortless to do. Ordinary people’s spiritual defenses were so fragile they were almost defenseless. Be that as it may, Prince Wu Hai was not just an ordinary person, he was also a Heaven Ranker. His strength was as high as Heaven Rank, Level 5, and he was even a member of the Golden Crow Tribe, which is well known for their spiritual defense capabilities. To be able to perform [Spiritual Telepathy] with Prince Wu Hai, who was still angry, was as difficult as a blind man trying to pass a thread through the eyes of nine bent needles, yet Third Young Master was able to do it easily.

From this, it can be seen…

The hidden strength of Third Young Master was absolutely amazing.

Although both Lord Ling Yun and City Lord Tu Hai did not know what Third Young Master had said to Eighth Prince Wu Hai, they were sure of one thing, and that was that Third Young Master must have put in a good word for them. Otherwise, Wu Hai would not have forgone taking revenge on them so quickly.

This kind of result was exactly what Lord Ling Yun and Tu Hai wanted to see happen the most.

The two of them could not immediately express their thanks to Yue Yang. Right now, they could only keep the two of them company and wait for Ye Kong’s return.

They assumed that Ye Kong’s departure must have had something to do with this incident. Perhaps he was going to ask that hidden expert, who was skilled in the art of divination, to step in and help.

“He’s back!”

Ye Kong did not come rushing back with an expert. He had returned with a golden elf maiden named Bao’er. She looked like a big loli with a flat chest. On the palm of one hand, Bao’er grasped a Grey Sparrow War Beast Egg. Lord Ling Yun and Tu Hai did not feel that there was anything at all remarkable about the egg,” but Eighth Prince Wu Hai’s eyes opened wide. His eyes locked onto that seemingly unremarkable Grey Sparrow War Beast Egg.

He leapt to his feet and stretched out his hands, desiring to get hold of his son. He was afraid that Bao’er might let the egg slip—it could fall and break at any moment!

Could it be that this egg is…

Lord Ling Yun and Tu Hai finally started to understand the situation, a little bit.

“Bao’er, let’s return this precious child to his father!” Yue Yang gestured for Bao’er to return the Grey Sparrow War Beast Egg to Wu Hai, who was still anxiously staring at it.

“Humph! I guess!” Bao’er reluctantly handed the egg over to Wu Hai, who still had both hands extended, before she began to criticize him. “How did you ever become a parent? How careless can you be? Even before your baby has been born he has met with such terrible misfortune. Luckily, we found him first or he might have already been cooked and eaten by others!”

“Yes, yes, yes. It’s all my fault!” Eighth Prince Wu Hai’s eyes turned red and he burst into tears.

“Humph! I don’t want to talk to you anymore, crybaby!” Bao’er saw that this guy was even more prone to crying than herself. She was too embarrassed to say anything more to him. However, she finally gave him another piece of advice, “You better prepare quickly. For the last two days, we have been infusing energy from magic crystals into him. It seems that he is about to hatch.” Eighth Prince Wu Hai naturally knew how to handle this kind of situation. He thanked Yue Yang, then immediately prepared to leave: “Third Young Master, I’ll take leave first. I, Wu Hai, will not forget the great favor you have done for me today!”

He didn’t even glance at Lord Ling Yun or the others. An instant later, he emitted a blinding light before immediately departing.

Not ten seconds had passed before he came to a sudden stop in mid-air…

Just as suddenly, he flashed back to the banquet hall.

First, he carefully moved the egg from the palm of his left hand, placing it inside an interior pocket next to his chest. Next, he unfastened a Divine Rank necklace, set with moonstones[2], from around his neck. He pulled Bao’er over to him, then gently placed it on the palms of her small hands. “This is the gift I had prepared for my beloved Que’er. Now, I will entrust it to you. Thank you, golden elf, if not for you, my child would have had to bear the greatest of misfortunes, a result that both Que’er and I are most unwilling to see… I know that even the most expensive treasures of the realm can not be compared to his life but this is all I have at the moment to express the gratitude in my heart, I hope you will accept it. Thank you very much. Also, my deepest thanks go to you, Third Young Master.”

Without giving Bao’er a chance to refuse, Eighth Prince Wu Hai disappeared once again from the City Lord’s castle.

Bao’er pouted, “I actually preferred to keep the egg. If he had hatched, he would have recognized me as his mother. What a shame.”

Her words made everyone present break out in a cold sweat.

If the hatchling had recognized her as his mother, the entire matter would have caused massive headaches. In other words, it would have been an absolute mess.

Fortunately, this matter was still redeemable. Even if Eighth Prince Wu Hai came back, he would not massacre all of Rizhao City. At most, he would curse a lot and beat up a few people.

As soon as Prince Wu Hai left, questions started appearing in the minds of Lord Ling Yun, City Lord Tu Hai, as well as some of the other people present. How could such a coincidence occur? Let’s just say that the egg was really the one laid by Prince Wu Hai’s concubine, how had Third Young Master obtained it? After obtaining it, why did he give it to this Golden Elf maiden instead of sending it directly to the Golden Crow Tribe through official channels? Furthermore, the descendants of the Golden Crow Tribe were said to lay a kind of egg that shone as brightly as the sun. How could Prince Wu Hai’s Golden Crow Tribe child’s egg look so ordinary?

All these doubts flashed through the minds of the people present.

While the servants quickly cleared the vacated table, Lord Ling Yun and City Lord Tu Hai once again invited Yue Yang to join them before continuing the banquet. After thanking him profusely, they couldn’t help but ask some questions.

“I bought it!” As soon as Bao’er said this, several people lost control of themselves and wine spewed out of their mouths.

“Cough! Cough! Cough!” Even the old noble Lord Ling Yun couldn’t control himself and started coughing.

[1] [Spiritual Telepathy] > A summoning skill gained from his completing the Gemini Temple test.

Summons a double that has a spiritual connection with the summoner.

The double can perform [Spiritual Telepathy] and [Vision Exchange] within a certain distance of the summoner.

[2] Gem Encyclopedia > MOONSTONE – A ghostly sheen moves under the surface of this feldspar, like moonlight glowing in water.

Gemological Institute of America > What Is Moonstone Gemstone | Moonstone Stone – GIA

chapters.title: Chapter 770.1 - [ Drastic Changes, Nothing Remains Forever ]
chapters.body:
Chapter 770.1 - [ Drastic Changes, Nothing Remains Forever ]

Chapter 770.1 – [ Drastic Changes, Nothing Remains Forever ]

City Lord Tu Hai, managed to locate the beloved concubine of Prince Wu Hai, Grey Sparrow Beauty, then brought her back to Rizhao City safely. He was extremely satisfied with his good luck.

Of course, all this luck had to be credited to Third Young Master.

If he hadn’t shown up, then the entire matter would be headed for an irreversible tragedy and Rizhao City would have been completely destroyed.

“Is my child still alive?” Grey Sparrow Beauty asked, again and again. She couldn’t wait to see her baby. At her side were two wounded female Dragonhawk guards. The faces of these two Heaven Rank guards were tinged with a guilty look of self-condemnation. After a long and arduous round of communication and explanation, the matter had finally been cleared up.

It turned out that the two vicious dragons had met up with her two guards, who were on the way to her home, then suddenly, without any provocation, started to savagely attack them.

Although the two guards were Heaven Rankers, they were still no match for the two vicious dragons. They could only grab Grey Sparrow Beauty and escape. Nevertheless, during their escape, Grey Sparrow Beauty was badly injured, causing her to lay her eggs prematurely. She had just laid a pair of Gemini eggs when the vicious dragons caught up with them. One of them snatched a Gemini egg! Facing the two vicious dragons whose strength was at Heaven Rank, Level 2, the two female guards, who were only at Heaven Rank, Level 1, were unable to snatch it back. They could only seize hold of their mistress, who was weak from blood loss, and attempt to escape. When they arrived at her hometown, all three of them thought that the Gemini egg that had been snatched by one of the dragons was unlikely to survive. Even so, they harbored a slight hope that it might still be alive, so they offered a reward of two million gold coins to look for traces of the vicious dragons’ trail. Additionally, through the Warriors’ Guild, they contacted Sun Valley in the hope that Eighth Prince would learn of their plight and come to help.

Surprisingly, the dragon that stole the Gemini egg didn’t destroy it.

Due to this, eventually, the Gemini egg fell into the hands of the mercenaries from Rizhao City, who ended up selling it to the Potential Alliance War Beast Shop, where Bao’er was able to buy it.

Coincidentally, Prince Wu Hai was already searching for his pregnant concubine.

After gathering together all of this information, Third Young Master had managed to piece together these two incidents. Consequently, he had Bao’er brought to him in order to return the dim, dull, ordinary looking egg to its father. This would allow for the best possible ending to occur. As soon as Prince Wu Hai had worked out a way to properly take care of his and Grey Sparrow Beauty’s Gemini egg he would surely return to thank them again. At that time the loving couple would have quite the reunion.

Tu Hai felt very excited that he had been lucky enough to survive such a major catastrophe. What else was there that could stop him from entering Upper Heaven Realm? Not only had he befriended Prince Wu Hai of the Three-Legged Golden Crow Tribe, he had also become friends with the mysterious and inscrutable Third Young Master… Tu Hai had previously been afraid of Eighth Prince Wu Hai returning. Now, he was anxiously waiting for him to return. He hoped that Eighth Prince Wu Hai would immediately return, so that he could be happily surprised when he saw Grey Sparrow Beauty once more.

By reuniting them, he did not believe that Eighth Prince Wu Hai would ask Rizhao City for compensation anymore. Eighth Prince would only feel grateful!

“Haha!”

If all of this becomes true, the heavens will have favored me so much, I will wake up from my dreams laughing.

Just as City Lord Tu Hai was about to set up a feast and drink all night long while he waited for the return of Eighth Prince Wu Hai of the Three-Legged Golden Crow Tribe, the sky suddenly turned dark…..

What was going on?

Rizhao City, which was also known as Sun Island, was the base used by Heaven Rank powerhouses to defend against the invaders from Tong Tian Tower. Even after countless battles, the sky had never turned dark before. Why was this happening today? City Lord Tu Hai, Lord Ling Yun, and all of the inhabitants of Rizhao City looked up at the sky in astonishment. However, Grey Sparrow Beauty and her two guards were unexpectedly shuddering, Their intuition was so keen that they could sense that something dreadful was about to happen.

Even Yue Yang was a bit stunned.

He hadn’t caused this change in the weather.

Originally, his idea had been to create a diversion to attract the attention of City Lord Tu Hai and Lord Ling Yun, before leaving to change into a different identity, so he could secretly explore the forbidden underground dungeons underneath the city. He had not expected that, even before he found a pretext to leave, such an abnormal phenomenon would appear in the sky.

“Bao’er, get into the grimoire.” Yue Yang ordered Hui Tai Lang to immediately escort Bao’er, Fan Lun Tie, the Old Fox, and the others into the grimoire, then protect them.

“The sky is cracking open!” Fatty Hai exclaimed. In the center of the sky, although not so obvious at first, was a black line. As they watched, the black line gradually widened. Finally, it spread out in a bizarre way that split the whole sky into two parts.

“It looks kind of like a space-time rift.” Ye Kong could not be certain because the blackness was simply too huge.

“Without a doubt, it’s a spatial rift. I just don’t know if it’s man-made or it occurred naturally.” mused a worried Lord Ling Yun.

Suppose the space-time rift that had divided the sky into two was a natural occurrence.

That would be better than if it was not.

If it was artificial, then it was over. They would all die.

He really had no idea what kind of powerful expert would be able to create such an immense space-time rift.

Yue Yang didn’t say a word. He gestured, signaling Ye Kong, Fatty Hai, Xue Tan Lang,

Prince Tian Luo, and the others to immediately gather around him. His intuition was screaming “DANGER! ”, leaving Yue Yang no choice but to handle the situation with extreme caution. At this moment, Grey Sparrow Beauty, looking a bit panicked, glanced at Lord Ling Yun and Tu Hai before sweeping her gaze over Yue Yang. Subsequently, she quietly moved a few steps towards Yue Yang. She felt more comfortable and at ease when standing next to Yue Yang’s side.

Then, the two female guards screamed.

They were the most elite female warriors of the Dragonhawk Tribe. Their intuition was far beyond that of ordinary Heaven Rankers, “The legendary Dark Realm! The souls of the dead and countless other evil beings that dwell within the Dark Realm are currently coming this way. They will engulf everything and everyone!”

The Dark Realm, was in fact, part of Heaven Realm.

To be more accurate, it was a special realm set up by warriors in ancient times to imprison some depraved and fallen warriors, similar to some prisons in the human realm. Additionally, there was an incredibly powerful, ancient [Dark Realm Seal] that locked up the entire space, preventing anyone from leaving. Heaven Realm warriors could throw depraved and fallen warriors into the Dark Realm at several locations that connected to the Dark Realm, such as; the Valley of Sealing, the Abyss of Exile and the Dark Chamber of the Central Palace Hall’s Prison. Of course, the incredibly powerful, ancient [Dark Realm Seal] sealing technique, that could seal such an immense space, had been lost tens of thousands of years ago. Nowadays, the only sealing techniques that Heaven Realm’s summoners could master were the relatively lesser sealing techniques, like the one used on the underground dungeon in Rizhao City. Unfortunately, they could no longer throw fallen warriors into the Dark Realm to banish them wherever they felt like it anymore.

The Dark Realm that had been created by the ancient powerhouses had an extremely strong [Dark Realm Seal].

For tens of thousands of years, there had only been a single case where some Dark Realm fallen warriors were able to break free of the ancient [Dark Realm Seal].

Only that one single time. It was just after Empress Fei Wen Li had stormed Central Palace Hall and was about to destroy the Dark Chamber inside the Hall’s Prison. At that time many depraved and fallen warriors of the Dark Realm had been able to escape from within it.

That resulted in a small riot that lasted a while.

However, the incredibly powerful, ancient [Dark Realm Seal] had still managed to emanate a power that affected those hundreds of depraved and fallen warriors as they broke free and fought against Empress Fei Wen Li.

When they were defeated by Empress Fei Wen Li, they were all absorbed back inside by the power of the ancient [Dark Realm Seal]. Even though all those depraved and fallen warriors had managed to break free of the ancient [Dark Realm Seal], they were almost immediately resealed back inside. They never had a chance to harm Heaven Realm.

“Everyone pay attention, there are hundreds of Heaven Rankers emerging from the space-time rift. The number of Heaven Rank, Level 5 warriors might be as high as ten.” Yue Yang shouted out a warning. With this statement, he confirmed the words of the two female guards. City Lord Tu Hai and Lord Ling Yun’s faces immediately fell. If the sky had turned black for any other reason, they might still be suspicious that it was a plot. However, it was not at all surprising that the Dark Realm was opening a space-time rift in the skies above Rizhao City because in the Sun Island dungeon there was a similar seal to the one in the Dark Realm.

chapters.title: Chapter 770.2 - [ Drastic Changes, Nothing Remains Forever ]
chapters.body:
Chapter 770.2 - [ Drastic Changes, Nothing Remains Forever ]

Chapter 770.2 – [ Drastic Changes, Nothing Remains Forever ]

Editor:Erudite_Birdy

Both were almost identical.

They just differed in scale.

When the forbidden Radiant Light Seal Dungeon was created six thousand years ago, a great sage had warned about the possibility of the Dark Realm interacting with it. Regretfully, the higher-ranking powers didn’t listen to the sage back then. Over the years, those higher-ranking powers seemed to have completely forgotten about this possibility.

Consul Xiang Wen panicked. This was not a situation that he could solve using his intelligence and abilities.

What should we do?

Should we escape?

Should we prepare to fight?

If they fled, millions of residents of Rizhao City would become victims of their enemy’s rampage; if they were brave enough to stand and fight, based on their current strength, it would be akin to serving themselves up on a platter! Even if an alarm was sounded immediately, and help was requested from the higher-ups, it would come too late, too slowly… City Lord Tu Hai and Lord Ling Yun had an urgent, whispered discussion. After they finished, they hurried over and bowed to Yue Yang. Then, Tu Hai said, “Third Young Master, if you want to leave this place, I will not blame you, I just hope that you can take the consort, Grey Sparrow Beauty, with you.”

Yue Yang faintly shook his head, “I can take care of Grey Sparrow Beauty for the time being but I won’t leave Rizhao City until the very last moment. Right now, there is no place that is safe.”

“Excellent. Third Young Master, please come with us into the secret passage. We intend to rely on the Radiant Light Secret Passage to thwart the enemy while we wait for reinforcements. The Radiant Light Secret Passage is permeated with strong sealing power. Those depraved and fallen warriors, should not be able to break through it.” Tu Hai was overjoyed when he heard that Third Young Master would not forsake them. Luckily, Third Young Master hadn’t chosen to leave immediately. Otherwise, even with the Radiant Light Secret Passage, they might not necessarily be able to defend themselves against the invasion of the fallen warriors from the Dark Realm.

“Boom!“

The roar of battle resounded from a distant area of the sky.

Sun-like rays shone throughout the sky forcing the people on the ground to squeeze their eyes shut.

Grey Sparrow Beauty cried out in sorrow.

Immediately afterward, Tu Hai and Lord Ling Yun saw that there were eight fallen warriors, who all possessed Heaven Rank, Level 5 strength, attacking Prince Wu Hai in turn. Each and every one of the eight was riding on the back of a vicious dragon… By now, everyone realized that the Dark Realm had not just suddenly opened today. Instead, it had started to crack open some time ago, only the original rift was not very large, so only two people had managed to escape.

They were the ones that had driven the flying dragon herd away from the area around Rizhao City using their vicious dragon mounts but not with the intention of slaughtering them.

Rather, it was to draw the local people’s attention away from the crack.

In this way, they would have enough time to open the space-time rift. From the look of it, the plans of these fallen warriors had succeeded. Without outside interference, the space-time rift to the Dark Realm had successfully been opened.

Depraved and fallen warriors who had been sealed for tens of thousands of years had returned to Heaven Realm once again. Without a doubt, a chaotic battle, that would shock all of Heaven Realm, was about to take place. If this group of fallen Dark Realm warriors, that had successfully escaped, guarded the space-time rift, then there would be a steady stream of expert warriors from the Dark Realm who would break through the ancient [Dark Realm Seal] through sacrifices, pass through the space-time rift, and enter Heaven Realm.

“How spectacular!” After seeing that there were at least ten thousand Dark Realm warriors who had teleported out from the cracks in the sky, Fatty Hai sighed indifferently.

In fact, the probability of forcing such a breakthrough of the [Dark Realm Seal], then successfully crossing the space-time rift was very low.

Some of the fallen warriors only managed to teleport halfway through.

And were swallowed up by the space vortex.

Some warriors teleported out only to become a corpse, some warriors were only left with their head, and, of course, there were some lucky warriors who succeeded. Nearly ten thousand fallen warriors, regardless of injuries, as long as they were still alive, gathered behind the ten expert warriors. The vast majority of them were at Quasi-Heaven strength. Not more than a hundred of them had reached the level of Heaven Rank strength.

“This is just the first batch.” Yue Yang knew that to break through this kind of seal, it would be even more difficult than trying to teleport to the Soaring Dragon Continent from the Demon Abyss inside Tong Tian Tower. However, the Dark Realm had been slowly accumulating its strength for more than tens of thousands of years. There would definitely be more than just this little bit of Heaven Rankers in there.

Much stronger, more terrifying fallen Heaven Rankers had yet to make their appearance.

City Lord Tu Hai rushed into the castle and activated the City Lord’s [Sun Crystal] sealing stone.

Immediately, all around the entirety of Sun Island, countless rays of dazzling light shot out, releasing a special kind of sealing power. This kind of sealing power was ineffective against ordinary people but for those fallen warriors, who still had some residual sealing power in their bodies, or the warriors from Tong Tian Tower, who had been imprisoned and recorded, it was a strong sealing power that even the strongest Heaven Ranker could barely resist.

Prince Wu Hai was unable to defeat the opponent’s eight-man team and fled back in disarray. Fortunately, he was a prince of the Eastern Demon Tribe’s Golden Crow Tribe. Due to this, the opponent was reluctant to kill him, just yet. Otherwise, he might not have been able to successfully return.

“Why are you here?” Prince Wu Hai was momentarily surprised to see that Grey Sparrow Beauty was crying.

“Quickly retreat into the Radiant Light Secret Passage before it’s too late!” City Lord Tu Hai had no time to waste. He could not allow the newly reunited couple the time needed to share their stories. Instead, he rushed to get them to leave together.

“Is there a secret door to the Dark Realm here?” Yue Yang acted incensed, even though he already knew the answer. Then, he grabbed City Lord Tu Hai by his collar, and angrily yelled, “Do you want us all to die? Those people are communicating with their comrades on the other side of the Dark Realm Secret Gate. They will kill their way out of it and the entirety of Sun Island will collapse!”

“They won’t. The people imprisoned inside are not the same as those depraved and fallen warriors. They won’t join forces with the fallen warriors of the Dark Realm. Besides, even if the entirety of Sun Island collapses the Radiant Light Secret Passage will still exist unscathed. Let’s go! It’s impossible for us to rival the forces of the Dark Realm. Being able to protect ourselves inside the Radiant Light Secret Passage is the best we can do for now. As for whether or not they can communicate with the rest of their forces inside the Dark Realm, there is nothing we can do to stop it. We’re not gods. That is not something our strength alone can stop!” When City Lord Tu Hai took a look at the hundred Heaven Rankers who were arranging themselves into a giant formation and charging up their strength in preparation to attack, he knew that the destruction of Rizhao City could not be avoided.

“As I don’t have a better choice, this will have to do.” Yue Yang was secretly happy. He had intended to free the sealed warriors of Tong Tian Tower himself. He just had not found the right opportunity.

Currently, it seemed like there was no need for him to take any action on his own. The Dark Realm’s fallen Heaven Rankers would open the seal for him.

As of right now, everything had been prepared. All that was missing was the final push.

The only thing missing from this plan was to bring Old Dragon Turtle to Heaven Realm and let him identify all of his old comrades. Otherwise, Yue Yang wouldn’t recognize who was who when they were rescued!

chapters.title: Chapter 771.2 - Let Me Tell You A Piece Of Bad News (2)
chapters.body:
Chapter 771.2 - Let Me Tell You A Piece Of Bad News (2)

Chapter 771.2 – Let Me Tell You a Piece of Bad News (2)

Huge thanks to Nathas for sponsoring 3 chapters of Long Live Summons! (2/3)

“Hui Tai…”

Yue Yang was the first to take action. With a single wave of his right hand, Hui Tai Lang leapt to his feet.

He pressed down lightly with his hand and Hui Tai Lang immediately transformed into a World Destroying Demon Wolf.

Huge and unmatched.

Capable of destroying the heavens and swallowing the world.

The moment Hui Tai Lang transformed into a World Destroying Demon Wolf, regardless of whether it was Lord Ling Yun, City Lord Tu Hai, Prince Wu Hai, or even the Heaven Rankers of the Dark Realm, they were all shocked into silence. The Power of Law! Although it was not obvious which law it belonged to, what they all had witnessed was Yue Yang using the Power of Law.

During that moment of shock, Hui Tai Lang attacked.

He opened his huge mouth and directly swallowed a Dark Realm fallen warrior at Heaven Rank, Level 2 strength.

The enemy formation was instantly disrupted.

Lord Ling Yun, Tu Hai, and the others were overjoyed and immediately chased after Hui Tai Lang… The encircling enemy could have intercepted them but they were a bit hesitant due to Hui Tai Lang’s huge mouth that could devour the sky and the sun. Even though Hui Tai Lang had swallowed a Heaven Ranker, it still was not enough for him. In the blink of an eye, he summoned his grimoire and it appeared in the sky. To the amazement of their enemies, two more Hui Tai Langs appeared. Both attacked, in different directions, each swallowing a Heaven Ranker.

“Take them away!” With one finger, Yue Yang shot out a long double-edged blade of [Invisible Sword Qi], which cut through the black arrows fired by, and golden spears thrown by, two Dark Realm Heaven Rank, Level 5 warriors. Next, he flew up to an extremely high altitude before spreading his hands, then summoning and releasing his [Heaven’s Fury Fire Lotus], to block the other Heaven Rank, Level 5 Dark World warriors from chasing after the fleeing Hui Tai Langs.

“Awoo!” Hui Tai Lang and his two grey wolf [Clones], whose appearance was incredibly lifelike, left quickly, doing their best to escort the group to safety.

Lord Ling Yun and Eighth Prince both use their most powerful skills to clear away the Dark Realm warriors in front of them.

Meanwhile, City Lord Tu Hai summoned a great gust of wind, bringing the entire group out from within the circle of their enemies.

After they had rushed out of the encirclement, they turned around and saw that Yue Yang was now using his [Eternal Wheel] Domain of Power to freeze all of the Dark Realm Heaven Rankers that had surrounded him in mid-air.

Because of the huge difference in their strengths, it was impossible for them to return to help him.

To return would mean that everything Yue Yang had done would have been in vain… Lord Ling Yun immediately pulled Xue Tan Lang and Prince Tian Luo over to him while shouting: “Go on. Third Young Master will definitely be able to escape!”

Tu Hai dragged Xiang Wen and Tudor while Prince Wu Hai caught hold of Ye Kong and Fatty Hai. The one person remaining, butler Jiao Shi, who could no longer keep up, turned back while shouting, “You guys go on ahead, I’ll go back and help Third Young Master!”

When Tu Hai saw Jiao Shi turning back and going to Yue Yang’s aid, he was deeply moved.

Although he had hired Jiao Shi as his butler, and left everything to Jiao Shi, in his heart, he had never really trusted this person.

Unexpectedly, in the final moments of life and death, this butler, whom he had never really trusted, proved by his actions that he was actually the best butler in the world.

When Jiao Shi turned back, Tu Hai didn’t even have to think about it. He knew Jiao Shi was destined to die. Their enemy’s strength was just too great, it would be impossible for Jiao Shi to even get close to Yue Yang, much less help him. He would probably be slain the moment their enemies caught up to him. Rather than saying that he was returning to aid Third Young Master, it would be more accurate to say that he was choosing to commit suicide, lest he drag the others down and make his master feel guilty. At this moment, City Lord Tu Hai even had the thought of throwing away the useless Tudor and taking this loyal butler, Jiao Shi, with him instead.

But it was too late to act on that regret.

“Go!” Lord Ling Yun landed a flying kick on Tu Hai, who had stopped in his tracks to look back. Then he roared, ”Do you want to let Jiao Shi’s sacrifice go to waste? The sooner we get out of here the safer Third Young Master will be!”

“Get out of my way!” Although Eighth Prince of the Golden Crow Tribe was wounded, his strength was still formidable.

He released a [Golden Radiant Sun Blast] which combined with Xue Tan Lang’s [Ice Roar] and Prince Tian Luo’s [Doomsday Flowing Fire]. This combination drove back over a dozen Heaven Rankers that were hot in pursuit.

Hui Tai Lang took the rearmost position. Only after he had gobbled up another couple of fallen Heaven Rankers did the remaining pursuers choose to retreat. In the midst of the distant flashing lights and rolling thunderous strikes, Lord Ling Yun, City Lord Tu Hai, and Prince Wu Hai, each of them holding onto a person with each hand, fled far away, into the sky, at top speed. They had no choice but to flee. If it weren’t for the fact that the Forbidden Light Star device had already been activated they would have stayed and fought alongside Third Young Master.

But now, as the seconds continued to tick down, Rizhao City was about to explode at any moment.

If they had not yet passed beyond the mountain range within ten minutes, they would still be in danger.

Also fleeing together in the same direction as them were various demonic beasts and war beasts from all over the mountain range. Some poured out in droves, like the Grey Sparrows that were almost useless but had a keen sense of danger. Some of them even rushed to get ahead of Lord Ling Yun and the others…

“My God!”

Eighth Prince Wu Hai of the Golden Crow Tribe looked behind them.

Then screamed.

One after the other, Tu Hai and Ling Yun turned to look back, to peer at the battlefield which was already quite far away. The huge [Heaven’s Fury Fire Lotus] exploded over the field of battle and the force of the impact rippled out, spreading far and wide. Waves of scorching heat rushed towards them. The waves were right behind them, about to catch up!

This wasn’t the explosion from the Forbidden Light Star. It was clearly Third Young Master’s killer move. The amount of its power was equally terrifying.

Prince Wu Hai silently made a comparison in his heart. He suddenly realized, as a Prince of the Golden Crow Tribe, even if he tried his best and released all his power at once it would still not be comparable, in any way, to the explosion he saw in front of him, right now. In that case, would not Third Young Master’s strength be far above his own Heaven Rank, Level 5 strength? No wonder he had been able to remain calm when he was facing over a hundred Heaven Rankers.

“Ehhh, this strength…” Old Chess Master, who was still playing chess in the Radiant Light Secret Passage, suddenly paused.

The chess piece he had been holding in one of his hands fell onto the chessboard.

He felt a pang of danger at the level of power that the explosion of Yue Yang’s [Heaven’s Fury Fire Lotus] had just released.

Just as Old Chess Master stood up, a hand slowly reached out from behind him and gently picked up the chess piece that had fallen onto the board. Shocked, Old Chess Master turned his head around to take a look. The most unlikely person appeared before him.

“It’s you?” Old Chess Master asked, surprised. The person before him was actually the insignificant butler, Jiao Shi.

“It’s me.” replied butler Jiao Shi as he casually sat down across from Old Chess Master, as if he was going to play a game with him. The air he exuded was completely different from what he had shown before.

“You’re one of the four kings that served under the Prison Emperor. You’re the Sky Prison King, Gao Peng. How are you still alive?” Old Chess Master was filled with disbelief. His expression showed even more shock than his seeing a dead man that had crawled out of his own coffin. There were a great many dead people in the world. If any of them had been resurrected, Old Chess Master would not have been so shocked. However, this man in front of him, he had killed him, with his own hands—six thousand years ago!

“Yes, I’m still alive, but it took me a long time to regain my full strength. Most importantly, I lost some of my memories, so it took me even longer to recall all of those memories.” The Sky Prison King, Gao Peng, who had been disguised as butler Jiao Shi, sighed, “Time flies by so quickly. In a blink of an eye, over six thousand years have passed.”

“You were the one who orchestrated all that happened today? It’s a pity that no matter how elaborate your plans were, you’re still too late. The Forbidden Light Star device has already been activated.” Old Chess Master quickly regained his composure, then sat down and calmly picked up a chess piece and placed it on the board.

“You’re still the same as always. Always so sure of yourself.” Gao Peng, who had previously disguised himself as Jiao Shi suddenly smiled, “Shall I tell you a piece of bad news?”

“What could be worse than watching your companions get blown into a [Black Hole Seal], unable to save them and bring them back to life?” Old Chess Master sneered back.

“Hmph, for example, what if the Prison Emperor has been reborn!?” Gao Peng heartily laughed.

“Impossible!” Old Chess Master jumped up, he was so surprised.

“Of course it’s impossible for Prison Emperor Zhan Feng to be reborn. However, there’s already a new Prison Emperor that was born in Tong Tian Tower. He’s younger, stronger, and even more outstanding! ” Gao Peng picked up a chess piece and made a move on the board,

“Break![1] What a lousy move you just made. Do you even know where this “Blood Vomiting Spectrum”[2] came from?”

“Certainly. It was brought here from Tong Tian Tower by that young man. This is a product of the wisdom of the warriors of Tong Tian Tower! You who always called yourself the “King of Chess”, you who were always so sure of yourself—you have already lost!”

“It’s him…” As he recalled a recent memory of Yue Yang, Old Chess Master finally understood, and could not help but shiver.

Damn. He hated knowing full well that a new Prison Emperor had been born.

Yet had been unable to recognise him.

He had even exchanged chess puzzles with him. Who would have known that his opponent already had him dancing, right in the palm of his hand?

Old Chess Master suddenly felt a dull pain in his chest. He lost control for a moment and spit out a mouthful of blood. Instantly, his appearance aged by a thousand years.

[1] TN: ‘Break’ is an unofficial term that is often shouted when a player breaks out from their opponent’s siege. It sounds cool and very normal when you shout it in Chinese.

[2] EN: 呕血谱 ǒu xuè pǔ = Blood Vomiting Spectrum

A compilation of insanely difficult chess problems that will make you want to vomit blood.

chapters.title: Chapter 772.1 - I Am Me, He Is Him (1)
chapters.body:
Chapter 772.1 - I Am Me, He Is Him (1)

Chapter 772.1 – I Am Me, He Is Him (1)

Huge thanks to Nathas for sponsoring 3 chapters of Long Live Summons! (3/3)

Old Chess Master laughed miserably, then said, “Man’s plans are nothing in front of Godly intervention.” He rushed towards the Sky Prison King, Gao Peng, who had disguised himself as the butler, Jiao Shi, intending to die together with him in the impending explosion of the Forbidden Light Star.

The Sky Prison King, Gao Peng, however, reached out a hand and made a grabbing motion, binding Old Chess Master in mid-air. He smiled before retorting, “I am no longer the same person as I was six thousand years ago. Besides, if I hadn’t been exhausted from multiple battles, how could you have killed me with your level of strength back then? King of Chess, my old friend, I shall send you off first, I still have a mission and can’t accompany you.” Gao Peng then lightly shook his hand.

Old Chess Master was instantly flung backward.

By the time Old Chess Master was able to rush back and lay out his Thousand Chessboard Diagrams, the Sky Prison King, Gao Peng, had already turned into a shadow and disappeared into the Radiant Light Secret Passage.

“Sigh, I am too old…”

Old Chess Master grimly stopped his summoning, then bent down and slowly picked up the chess pieces that had scattered all over the floor. After that, he sat down again.

His six thousand years of guard duty was superficially to guard against the enemy, but at the same time, it was also a kind of self-imprisonment.

It was only now that his responsibility as a guard had truly left him.

It is only now that “freedom” belonged to him once again.

During these last moments of his life, although short, Old Chess Master was once again able to fully enjoy the feeling of playing chess. When he placed a piece on the board, a smile appeared on his face. He told himself, as if he was talking to someone else, “Finally, you can just relax and play chess. You, what do you have to regret? Although you are unable to prevent what is about to happen, you have done your best. In the next life, if you can be reborn in Tong Tian Tower that would be the greatest gift. ‘Blood Vomiting Spectrum’, how I wish to be able to fully learn everything about you…”

When he placed the pieces gently on the board, he found that the board had changed a bit.

“This? Is this my Supreme Will?”

At first, Old Chess Master was stunned, then he smiled bitterly. After recovering his freedom, after letting go of his responsibilities, during the last moments of his life, he had finally managed to comprehend and awaken his Supreme Will. What irony, what a cruel fate life had thrown at him.

Could it be that the responsibility of being a guardian for six thousand years had “imprisoned my own consciousness”?

~ Outside, above Sun Island ~

Yue Yang had already disappeared without a trace.

Regarding this strange young man’s departure, the Dark Realm fallen warriors also did not chase after him. Instead, they intensified their communication with their comrades in the Dark Realm.

Approximately 10,000 Quasi-Heaven Rankers and nearly 100 Heaven Rankers had joined forces to study the Dark Realm Passage that had existed for tens of thousands of years. They had successfully connected it to the Forbidden Light Dungeon before discovering the existence of all the experts that were sealed inside the Forbidden Light Dungeon, experts who quickly dispersed and began to flee. Even an idiot would know that Sun Island was a giant ticking time bomb that could explode at any moment. The power of the seal had reached the limit of what it could withstand. It had been weakened so much that countless peals of thunder could be heard and flashing lightning bolts were flying chaotically all over the place. Due to the failing power of the seal, the entirety of Sun Island was forcefully being shrunk. Once it reached its tipping point, it would release all its cooped up power, resulting in an unimaginably huge explosion.

“BOOOOOM!”

A deafening roar erupted and a huge mushroom cloud rose high into the sky. Space itself was distorted due to the massive explosion. Spatial cracks formed in the sky directly above where Rizhao City had been. These spatial cracks quickly grew in size, merged into each other, and eventually evolved into a huge black hole that devoured everything.

All the creatures that fell inside would never be reborn!

Due to being interconnected to the Dark Realm when the passage between both realms was destroyed, the realms overlapped, resulting in a mysterious and eerie phenomenon—the ground cracked!

The entirety of Sun Island had been split into two halves!

The space around Sun Island was incredibly unstable. Countless spatial fissures were opening and closing. When these spatial fissures rubbed against each other they generated tyrannical energy streams that would destroy anything that came into contact with them.

The sturdy city lord’s castle had crumbled. Except for the Radiant Light Secret Passage, the entirety of Sun Island was deformed and twisted. It was as if a pair of invisible demonic hands were wringing it.

The surrounding skies were packed with fleeing people. The majority of them were fleeing towards the far valleys, intent on escaping beyond the barrier of the canyons and mountain ranges. Meanwhile, a few panicked stragglers seemed to have lost all rational thought and flew, like blind flies, towards Sun Island. On Sun Island, the enormous, cross-shaped center avenue suddenly burst open. The huge opening shorty formed into something that looked like a ferocious monster’s giant maw, silently mocking the remaining survivors.

The historical Rizhao City, which had never fallen, the bastion which six thousand years ago had successfully broken the invasion of the rebels from Tong Tian Tower, had finally fallen today.

~ Minutes ago, inside the Radiant Light Secret Passage ~

Old Chess Master closed his eyes. His steady fingers gently lowered the last piece he had been holding in one of his hands.

Only ten seconds were left.

These would be the last ten seconds of his life.

Just as Old Chess Master’s face broke into a smile, when he was ready to die, he suddenly saw a young man coming out of the secret passage. Standing behind the young man was a group of ghostly guys. Many of them were old acquaintances of the Old Chess Master.

“Impossible!” Since he was about to die, Old Chess Master preferred to believe that this was all a hallucination.

“Although I can’t stop the explosion of the Forbidden Light Star device, I can delay it for three minutes,” the young man said. Three minutes is not much, not even enough to play a full game of chess, yet a lot can happen.” The young man who walked out in front of Old Chess Master was, of course, Yue Yang. The group of ghostly shadows behind him were the Tong Tian Tower warriors who had been sealed, as well as the remaining rebel leaders that had remained in Heaven Realm.

“So, it turns out, Gao Peng appeared just to cover for you.” Old Chess Master now understood the situation completely.

Why had the Sky Prison King, Gao Peng, come in and exposed his identity when he couldn’t stop the explosion? He wasn’t trying to show off in front of his old nemesis. Rather he did it to give this young man cover so that Old Chess Master wouldn’t notice him infiltrating the sealed underground dungeon.

When he saw the Sky Prison King, he was so shocked that his attention had been wholly focused on his old enemy, Gao Peng. He didn’t realize there was a young man who was saving prisoners right under his nose. This young man was the Prison Emperor of the younger generation. A young man that was even younger than the previous Prison Emperor, and also wiser, Yue Yang, who was walking past him at this moment, did not even spare him a glance.

Old Chess Master felt like a huge hammer was rhythmically hammering on his heart.

Defeated!

Again![1]

This time, he was not defeated by the invincible power of the previous Prison Emperor. He was defeated by the wisdom of this young man.

If the other party hadn’t taken the initiative and shown up, he was afraid he would have died without ever knowing that he had failed in carrying out his duties.

[1] EB: I think these are the thoughts that Old Chess Master feels are like rhythmic hammer blows timed to his heartbeat. It’s implied that these blows repeat, over and over.

(thump) Defeated! (thump) Again!

chapters.title: Chapter 772.2 - I Am Me, He Is Him! (2)
chapters.body:
Chapter 772.2 - I Am Me, He Is Him! (2)

Chapter 772.2 – I Am Me, He Is Him! (2)

Amongst the ghostly shadows, a tall, thin shadow stood out. It smiled at Old Chess Master while saying, ”King of Chess, we have all aged and become old fogeys. Now that this realm belongs to the younger generation, why be so obsessed? Come with me to Tong Tian Tower. It is far better to be a free chess master than to be a mere watchdog for the Central Palace Hall! As for our past feuds and grudges, as long as you are willing to forget about them, they can be overlooked… Come with us. You have already wasted six thousand of your best years here. You have done enough.

Old Chess Master shook his head heavily.

Then sighed, “Thank you. You should be familiar enough with me to know that I do not deal well with changes to my environment. Six thousand years ago, I admired the fact that all of you fought to the death for the Prison Emperor. If I went with you today, I would look down on myself for the rest of my life. I really envy you guys. Six thousand years have passed, yet someone is still thinking of you and has come to your rescue. Is that a military tradition in Tong Tian Tower?”

“There are no military traditions at all in Tong Tian Tower. If there must be one, it would be for the older generation to get out of the way and let the younger generation rise in prominence.” Another ghost-like shadow roared with laughter.

“Sadly, I wasn’t born in Tong Tian Tower.” Old Chess Master sat down slowly, then reached out his hand and—flipped the entire chessboard over!

The chess pieces scattered every which way, as they fell to the ground, mirroring his innermost feelings at the moment.

A shadow approached…

Reached out a hand and lightly touch the chessboard.

All of the pieces simultaneously returned to their original positions. It looked exactly the same as when Old Chess Master had previously set them out.

He earnestly replied, ”You are completely wrong. Our Legacy of Will in Tong Tian Tower does not go by; place of birth, race, or bloodline but is determined by one’s spirit! Our Legacy of Will is so strong that it is present everywhere, including our spirit, body, will, wisdom, and even our soul. It is extremely abstract and can not be described by words. Only those who can feel its existence are considered to be warriors of Tong Tian Tower. The difference between us and the beings of Heaven Realm is that our Legacy of Will, generation-by-generation, is not one of power but one of spirit. Only those who wholeheartedly want to improve and refine their spirit through cultivation can truly be considered strong. Only they will be recognized as being a true warrior of Tong Tian Tower.

You were not recognized by us back then, not because you were born in Heaven Realm, or because your race and bloodline were different from ours. You were not recognized by us because you never really possessed true strength. The reason a person becomes strong in life has always been about more than just power.

After saying this, the shadow strode away.

The other ghost-like shadows followed suit.

Old Chess Master closed his eyes as his body trembled.

His face was afflicted with shame.

He staggered to his feet and walked towards the end of the Radiant Light Secret Passage, towards the activated Forbidden Light Star device that was about to explode, muttering to himself as he walked. “So I was never really a real warrior? Now, it is too late. If I had known that was so, I would have turned my life over fully to chess which I love so much. I was wrong!”

Sun Island, in a blinding light storm, exploded.

The entirety of Rizhao City, the surrounding mountain range, as well as its many valleys, was instantaneously utterly annihilated.

In the minute after the massive explosion, when the dust and debris started to clear, Sun Island had ceased to exist. What was left was a big black hole that was gradually growing larger and larger, sucking in all of its surroundings. It sucked in everything without regard, debris, raging flames, shockwaves, all kinds of energy, and even space! Everything was absorbed by it, into a silent space where everything ceased to exist.

Roughly a hundred kilometers away, a group of ghostly shadows gathered in front of Yue Yang.

All of these men, the youngest included, were old guys. Every one of them sported a long flowing beard, was unkempt and dressed like a beggar.

In fact, none of them had bodies. They existed as disembodied souls. With their power, just a simple thought could transform their appearances into that of stately old gentlemen, Yue Yang was very confused about this. Even if they did not choose to become overly handsome guys, why did they deliberately choose such a beggarly look? Is it possible that people who have died once have a particularly dark psyche?

“So, this is what happened. It was Old Dragon Turtle who asked me to come up and find you guys. In fact, I didn’t expect to be able to get you guys out this fast.” Yue Yang glanced at Sky Prison King, Gao Peng, who had reverted his appearance back to that of the butler, Jiao Shi, then asked tentatively, “When do you intend to go back to see Old Dragon Turtle?”

“We are not going back.” replied Sky Prison King, Gao Peng as he shook his head, “Tong Tian Tower belongs to you. We old guys are completely redundant existences.”

“Just bring the Emperor’s Dragon up to spend some time with us in the future.” A shadow laughed.

“The truth of the matter is, we still have a lot of work to do and some of it is not done. We can not go back and report to His Majesty the Prison Emperor, then say, ‘We who have disgraced you, the remnants of the army, have returned.’ Son, leave us alone. You take care of your business. You don’t need to worry about us old fogeys.”

A shadow with a particularly loud voice, and a particularly explosive temper, grabbed Yue Yang by the collar as he shouted, “You boy. If you want to become the new generation’s Prison Emperor, your strength is still lacking, you need to work harder on yourself!”

“I am me, he is him!” said Yue Yang as he broke out in a sweat. Who would want to be the second Prison Emperor? He wanted to make a name for himself in Heaven Realm. However, he wouldn’t go about doing that like a Second Conquering Empress or a Second Prison Emperor. He would make a name for himself as Third Young Master of the Yue family, the new heir of Tong Tian Tower, and a new legend!

“Let’s meet here again in a year’s time, Third Young Master. You should also work hard to hone yourself even more. We will first work to restore our strength. Otherwise, Heaven Realm’s leaders will be able to exterminate us with one hand.” Sky Prison King, Gao Peng patted Yue Yang’s shoulder, ”Even though there are so many young juniors in Tong Tian Tower, and I’ve met all types of people, there is only one like you. Third Young Master, you really are a very perverted existence. If you weren’t the heir of Prison Emperor, I might not be able to resist killing you.”

“Hey, is that what my senior should say?” Yue Yang started to get angry. Are not you going to give me some treasure or a magic weapon as a reward? Are you kidding me?

“Wait until you have the approval of the Prison Emperor’s Divine Seal. Then you can give us orders.” All of the ghost-like shadows gave a slight bow to Yue Yang. Then, the most serious and conscientious of the ghost-like shadows said, “We shall take our leave first.”

Yue Yang was speechless for a while.

Currently, the Prison Emperor’s Divine Seal could only be used to smash walnuts for Shuang’er.[1] In the meantime, how in heaven’s name would he get its approval?

Forget it. Your own treasures are the most powerful. You should not count on other peoples’ magic weapons!

As if hearing the grumblings in Yue Yang’s heart, Star Gathering Heavenly Scorpion, Tao Tie Blade, and even Tong Tian Beast, that lazily formed a bracelet on Yue Yang’s wrist, squirmed slightly while radiating a joyful feeling.

[1] The Prison Emperor’s Divine Seal could only be used to smash walnuts for Shuang’er.

Possibly, a reference to the story “The Prince and the Pauper” by Mark Twain.

~~~
