“Speak up, good lad, and fear nothing,” said the King. “How used you the Great Seal of England?”

Tom stammered a moment, in a pathetic confusion, then got it out—“To crack nuts with!”

chapters.title: Chapter 774.2 - Glorious Days Of The Past
chapters.body:
Chapter 774.2 - Glorious Days Of The Past

Chapter 774.2 – Glorious Days of the Past

Only when the people from the Golden Crow Tribe had left did the tightness in Lord Ling Yun’s heart loosen, bit by bit.

Just now, he was really worried that Eighth Prince Wu Hai would invite Third Young Master to travel back with him to visit Tang Valley. He was sure that if Eighth Prince Wu Hai had made such an offer Third Young Master would have chosen to go to Tang Valley. That would have left him with no opportunity to further his relationship with Yue Yang. Fortunately, he had hastened to mention the ancient ruins of the Mysterious Snowy Plains or Third Young Master might have already bid farewell to him and set out for the Three-Legged Golden Crow Tribe.

Lord Ling Yun quickly had a welcoming banquet set up for Yue Yang. He also ordered his men to prepare the best and most luxurious airship for their use. Once the banquet was over, he immediately invited Yue Yang to board the ship. Once everyone was on board they set sail for the Mysterious Snowy Plains, which avoided any more unforeseen circumstances that might disrupt his plans.

Not to mention Yue Yang; Fatty Hai, Ye Kong, Xue Tan Lang, and Prince Tian Luo were also treated with great courtesy throughout the entirety of Ling Yun Country.

Even though Fatty Hai and Ye Kong repeatedly refused, Lord Ling Yun and City Lord Tu Hai still managed to force a set of Gold-Rank equipment on each of them, respectively named ‘Conqueror’ and ‘Slayer’.

Originally the way these two looked was terrible, like beggars from the streets. However, once they put on the Gold-Rank equipment their demeanor immediately changed.

Now, below the golden shine of finely polished armor, a powerful expert’s aura could be perceived. Although their aura was still slightly lacking, completely different from the mature aura of peak Heaven Rankers such as Lord Ling Yun and the others, anyone with a keen eye could tell that they were still growing and that their prospects were unlimited. In the future, their achievements would probably not be below that of Lord Ling Yun himself.

On the other hand, Xue Tan Lang and Prince Tian Luo chose a book and a pot of rare Heaven Realm flowers, respectively. They could not refuse Lord Ling Yun’s enthusiastic generosity. So they picked gifts for Xue Wuxia and Luo Hua City Mistress. If they managed to please those two sisters with the gifts they chose, they might even give them some pointers[1]. As for treasures for their own use, unless specifically given to them by Yue Yang, they would never use treasures and equipment obtained from other people.

Both of the Li brothers asked for a pair of Heaven-Rank armored boots. Actually, Yue Yang had many excellent pairs of armored boots as well as weapons. However, the Li brothers seldom used any of them due to the fact that Yue Yang had told them, “A man should be hard on himself. Only under the most difficult conditions and during the fiercest of battles, will you be able to raise your strength.”

If not for the fact that they were pretending to be escorts, they would not have brought any weapons with them at all. They would have fought with their bare hands, just like Fatty Hai and Ye Kong, to better sharpen themselves by taking on the greatest challenges.

~ Mysterious Snowy Plains ~

Half a month later the luxurious airship had passed through countless teleportation formations had finally arrived at the Mysterious Snowy Plains.

It was literally another world. Everything was covered by a blanket of ice and snow. Here the color scheme was, without a doubt, white.

These Mysterious Snowy Plains were not very famous a thousand years ago when Empress Fei Wen Li had chosen to camp on the Mysterious Snowy Plains. Eventually, she built a city there to fight against the forces of Heaven Realm. This, in turn, created a location with a hellish environment that few people could survive in, yet, at the same time, made it infamous, similar to Rizhao City. Who would have known that there was a Rizhao City in Heaven Realm if not for the Prison Emperor’s great battle against it?

However, unlike the censoring and erasure of all records regarding the invasion of the Prison Emperor, the conquest of Empress Fei Wen Li has always been celebrated. Conqueror’s City, which was built by Empress Fei Wen Li, quickly became a symbol of honor in Heaven Realm. This was due to the fact that even as the allied troops of Heaven Realm were falling in battle at the walls of Conqueror’s City, the leaders of Heaven Realm and the Central Palace Hall had no choice, they were forced to formally acknowledge her as ‘The Conquering Queen’. Additionally, they were compelled to sign the infamous Treaty of the Conquering Queen. Yet nobody amongst the warriors of Heaven Realm took this defeat as a stain on their honor. It did not matter if it was one of the Great Leaders or the Supreme One of the Central Palace Hall, they were all proud that during this defeat, as it was Empress Fei Wen Li’s defining battle of the war, it was the only battle in her entire life where she neither completely massacred nor fully captured the opposing forces.

This battle, in addition to signifying the birth of a strong expert, signified the end of an era. From the birth of Empress Fei Wen Li to the sealing of the experts from Tong Tian Tower there had never been another expert like her, one who could sweep across the entirety of Heaven Realm.

Regardless of how powerful the Prison Emperor had been, he had still been unable to emulate the feats of Empress Fei Wen Li. She only had to point her finger and her troops would sweep everything from her path until she had conquered it all. As it was impossible to completely eliminate the indelible impression that Empress Fei Wen Li had left on the inhabitants of Heaven Realm. The Central Palace Hall and the Great Leaders were forced to acknowledge her existence and affirm the greatness of her strength. At the same time, they also sent out a vague hint that they, the ones who defeated Empress Fei Wen Li, were an even greater power and deserved their considerable prestige.

Who exactly had sealed Empress Fei Wen Li? The ordinary residents of Heaven Realm did not know. Be that as it may, the Central Palace Hall and the Great Leaders of Heaven Realm, who had fought against the Conquering Queen, knew. In their fight against Empress Fei Wen Li, they had never stopped fighting, so they had never been totally overwhelmed. This was their greatest achievement. The one of which they were most proud. It should have been impossible for them to actually defeat the Conquering Queen or seal her.

“Conqueror’s City?” Yue Yang’s thoughts flickered briefly after hearing the introduction from consul Xiang Wen.

“Yes. In Conqueror’s City, even after ten thousand years have passed, the giant statue of Empress Fei Wen Li still stands today. Moreover, every year, her worshippers gather like faithful devotees, led by veterans from the old days. They parade around the city in memory of the great Conquering Queen. In Conqueror’s City, anyone can bad-mouth the City Lord or even curse the Central Palace Hall but it is absolutely prohibited to blaspheme against the Conquering Queen. Even the slightest verbal disrespect will make the local residents very angry and demand punishment. For cases that are less severe they will request a duel. For serious cases they will immediately order a public execution!

Consul Xiang Wen had traveled to a lot of places in the past. So, of course, he did not miss out on visiting a place as infamous as Conqueror’s City. Therefore he was quite familiar with the local customs.

“Long live the Conquering Queen!” Fatty Hai and Ye Kong exchanged a glance and cheered.

chapters.title: Chapter 775.1 - Conqueror’S City, Good News
chapters.body:
Chapter 775.1 - Conqueror’S City, Good News

Chapter 775.1 – Conqueror’s City, Good News

People like Fatty Hai and Ye Kong were originally unaware of this secret. However, as time passed and their knowledge grew, they found out about the existence of Empress Fei Wen Li. By observation and inference, they became curious about Xiao Wen Li’s identity.

Over time, they noticed that it wasn’t a good idea to keep this secret from Princess Qian Qian and the other girls, so they mentioned the matter of Empress Fei Wen Li to them in passing, warning them to never discuss it or other related matters with outsiders. Actually, Yue Yang had never specifically talked to Princess Qian Qian and the girls about Xiao Wen Li’s identity. However, even before Xue Wu Xia possessed the Book of Truth, Princess Qian Qian, and the other girls, who were all intelligent women, could guess a little.

Inside Tong Tian Tower, the Serpent Demon Tribe was almost extinct.

So, it was impossible for Yue Yang, who had the young snake demon, Xiao Wen Li, following him everywhere, to not fall under suspicion. Not to mention that Xiao Wen Li already had such formidable power even when she was still an infant. Wouldn’t she grow up to become a terrifying expert? As long as one wasn’t an incurable idiot, they would be able to connect Xiao Wen Li to Empress Fei Wen Li.

Although the Book of Truth did not very clearly present the intelligence regarding Xiao Wen Li.

But at least it confirmed the identities of the reincarnated Xiao Wen Li’s creators, which were Empress Fei Wen Li and Yue Yang. With just a glance, Xue Wuxia and the others could understand what was going on.

Of course, most of the secrets that Yue Yang possessed could still not be discovered by Xue Wuxia’s Book of Truth as it was only a piece of half-divine equipment. These included secrets such as Yue Yang’s [Innate] Inherent Skills, his [Invisible Sword Qi], and the Phoenix Sisters, the Book of Truth was unable to obtain information on them, let alone the Sword Spirit Goddess.

They didn’t pursue Yue Yang’s various secrets, and even if they knew a little, they would secretly help him keep his secrets.

“How far are the ancient ruins from Conqueror’s City?” Yue Yang asked.

“Not very far, if calculating in a straight line on the map, it is but a thousand kilometers.” Tu Hai had spent the last few days rummaging through maps, thoroughly preparing himself for this exploration.

“We may not be fated to obtain the relics of the ancient ruins, but since we have come to this great city of the previous generation’s strongest, it’s really not right to not go on a pilgrimage.” when Yue Yang mentioned the previous generations strongest, Lord Ling Yun and the others did not pay attention, but Fatty Hai and Ye Kong noticed that Yue Yang was referring to Empress Fei Wen Li who was the pride of Tong Tian Tower.

“Conquer, honor.” Even the icy cold Xue Tan Lang couldn’t help but stand up.

Before, it was thought that the Prison Emperor was the strongest existence in the Tong Tian Tower.

Who would have known that before him, there was the even more powerful Empress Fei Wen Li? Amongst the past generations of experts from Tong Tian Tower, there would definitely have been even more outstanding ones, it was just that their records had been lost over the years, so they had become forgotten relics of the past.

The ancient ruin which had been discovered this time was most likely left behind by an expert from the past whose history had not been recorded.

This ancient ruin might even have a little something to do with Empress Fei Wen Li.

For all those who wanted to approach Conqueror’s City, regardless of their strength, regardless of what flying beasts they rode or what airship or puppet or mechanical contraption they had, they had to fly below a thousand meters to show their respect to Empress Fei Wen Li.

In the center of Conqueror’s City, stood a thousand meter tall giant statue of Empress Fei Wen Li.

It was said that it took the Snake Demon Tribe nearly a hundred years to finish sculpting it.

The artistic skill and craftsmanship that was used to create this statue had reached the pinnacle of perfection.

From a distance, you would be able to see a majestic golden-crowned queen with a serpent’s tail standing proudly and gazing afar. Six arms adorned the statue, two held swords in preparation for battle; one held a banner to guide the army forward; another held a majestic bow while yet another nocked an arrow, always ready to let loose to kill the enemy; and the last of her right arms was firmly pointed forward, completing the entire image that radiated a strong devouring aura, unmatched by anybody else in the world.

Not to mention facing the real thing, even in the face of this statue, people would feel their inferiority in their hearts.

In front of the Conquering Queen, even the Great Leaders of Heaven Realm, or even the Central Palace Hall would have to lower their proud heads, let alone the common folk.

Unlike ordinary cities, Conqueror’s City did not have formal business or trade areas like ordinary cities. Even the residential area was set up very similarly to a military camp. The people walking on the streets were not ordinary people… Even the old beggars lying on the ground in rags, whimpering and sleeping, or the physically handicapped old fogeys who were sweeping away the snow with a broom all had strength above Heaven Rank, Level 5, and some were several times more powerful than Lord Ling Yun. Nonetheless, here they were just sweepers, or even like an old beggar.

Without Heaven Rank strength, one would not dare to step foot in this city at all because they would lose their minds and become insane due to their inferiority..

Here, if you randomly picked someone on the streets, no matter if it was the hotel owner with a stomach bigger than a toad standing by the door; or the drunken man who was so drunk that he was propping himself up against the wall and vomiting all over the place; or the draconic transporter offering potential customers a ride on his Heaven Rank Earth Dragon; or the shopkeeper who smiles professionally at the sight of people; or the hunter who is carrying a snow bear on his naked back; or the woodcutter who is pushing a cart piled high with firewood; or the little girl who is selling snow malt sweets along the street; or the hawker who is carrying a huge load of windmills while ringing a bell to attract customers… Not one of them had a strength less than Heaven Rank.

Moreover, Heaven Rankers here are a bit different from ordinary Heaven Rankers. Their countenances all emanated a killing intent that was not present in normal Heaven Rankers.

Although this was normally completely repressed, the slightest bit of accidental leakage would cause people’s hearts to shudder.

Lord Ling Yun was the sovereign of a country and he possessed peak Heaven Rank, Level 5 strength, close to Heaven Rank, Level 6, but here, the streets were filled with people who were stronger than him, and as long as that person had the appearance of an old man or woman, their strength was at Heaven Rank, Level 5 or above. The younger the appearance, the weaker the strength, like that little girl who was selling snow malt sweets, she was the weakest one among the folk of Conqueror’s City, only at Heaven Rank, Level 1.

Possessing similar Heaven Rank, Level 1 strength, Lord Ling Yun estimated that with just one finger, this little girl could easily take out Tudor who was at the same level of strength.

The airships and flying carriages that were parked outside Conqueror’s City were too many to count.

It was estimated that these people came for the ancient ruins and came to worship ‘Conquering Queen’ on their way.

But for those below Heaven Rank, except for Fatty Hai and Ye Kong, ordinary mercenaries from Heaven Realm would not dare to enter the city, even for a Heaven Ranker like Tudor, since entering the city, he had kept on bowing to pay respects to the passing experts that his back had not once been straightened.

Looking up at the giant statue, the majestic form of Empress Fei Wen Li’s iconic ‘Where I point, I conquer’ gesture completely overshadowed the sky, and made the weak tremble so much so they could hardly restrain themselves.

“Let’s find a place to have a drink.”

chapters.title: Chapter 775.2 - Conqueror’S City, Good News
chapters.body:
Chapter 775.2 - Conqueror’S City, Good News

Chapter 775.2 – Conqueror’s City, Good News

Only Yue Yang was able to leisurely appreciate the sights while walking around Conqueror’s City. Empress Fei Wen Li was to others an extremely stern and serious existence but to Yue Yang she was just a sexy empress sis, not to say her statue, he had even hugged and kissed her real body before. Almost every time he went into that black hole he would be sucked dry by her. He had none of the respect others felt for Empress Fei Wen Li. In comparison, the Sword Spirit Goddess was the real bane of Yue Yang’s existence.

It was only now that Lord Ling Yun actually realized the magnitude that differentiated between himself and Yue Yang.

In Conqueror’s City, Lord Ling Yun was trembling with fear and caution, fearing that he had inadvertently done something wrong and would piss off some random person.

How could he mimic Yue Yang’s carefree attitude?… If he didn’t have enough strength, how could he dare to act so leisurely? This was Conqueror’s City, where even the Great Leaders of Heaven Realm had to fly low in respect. Neither magic beast, war beast nor any Heaven Ranker had ever dared to fly over the head of the giant 1,000-meter tall statue of Empress Fei Wen Li—NEVER!

There aren’t many options here.

There were only a few taverns in the entire city, and all of them are very, very small.

Yue Yang took the lead and casually walked into the nearest tavern, completely unconcerned by the inquiring stares of a room full of drunken men and walked straight over to the formally dressed bartender. He reached out his hand and rang the bell there, snapping his fingers in a dashing manner before announcing: “This round is on me!”

As soon as these words were uttered, the entire tavern which had originally been rowdy and loud, suddenly quieted down to a horrible hush.

Lord Ling Yun could only feel this back grow cold with sweat.

For the first time, Lord Ling Yun felt as if mere gazes were as sharp as blades. It was as if those people’s gazes, all of which were like sharp knives, could easily pierce through his body, stabbing straight into his soul.

Tu Hai was still okay, but Tudor the poor wretch was already shaking with fear.

The atmosphere inside was much more terrifying than the day when Rizhao City had been besieged by nearly a hundred Dark Realm Heaven Rankers.

At least, among those Dark Realm Fallen Heaven Rankers, there weren’t as many Heaven Rank, Level 5 and above old guys as in this tavern. Inside this unassuming tavern, there were at least thirty or so old men who had Heaven Rank, Level 5 strength or above. Regardless of whether they were physically disabled or not, as long as they were old men with a head and beard full of white hair, all of them were comparable to Lord Ling Yun in strength, and some were even far ahead of Lord Ling Yun in this aspect.

There were even several old fogeys who were Heaven Rank, Level 6.

None of the drunkards inside the entire tavern were below Heaven Rank, Level 3 in strength.

“Kid, not just anyone can buy a drink in our area.” A middle-aged drunken man suddenly stood up and grunted coldly.

“Fine, if you don’t want to, then don’t drink. You should feel fortunate that I wanted to treat you. I originally wanted to give you guys some face but you, this bunch of drunkards, didn’t know how to appreciate it. It’s not everyday that I simply treat people.” Yue Yang was really pissed. Aiya, this bunch of old drunkards were still so troublesome? Were they growing senile?

“…….” After hearing Yue Yang berate them like this, Lord Ling Yun and Tu Hai were really shocked, and Tudor almost fainted.

Inside the tavern, there was silence at first.

Suddenly, it was unknown who started it, laughter sounded out and immediately spread throughout the entire tavern.

Hahahahahaha.

In the end, almost everyone laughed out loud, regardless of the old or the middle-aged, the bartender or the bodyguards, all were laughing wildly.

An old man who was laughing so hard that tears were spilling out of his eyes, slapped the old table hard and laughed, “Good, good boy, how many years have passed since I’ve seen such a gutsy boy, interesting, so interesting.”

“Bring out the wine, someone’s buying us a drink, it’ll just be a waste if we don’t drink.” An old piece of wood who had been the only one who hadn’t laughed, glanced at Yue Yang and handed the glass in his hand to the bartender. As soon as he spoke, everyone was clamoring for wine, and some couldn’t wait, even crawling into the liquor cabinet, eager to pour the wine themselves.

“Old man, after drinking my wine, do me a favor, will you? I want to ask about a person that goes by the name Cook Caribbean.” Yue Yang plopped down next to the wooden-faced old man, and clinked his cup with the old man’s, as if they were long lost best friends, before getting straight to the point and asking for news about the most famous pirate captain Cook Caribbean from the era of Empress Fei Wen Li. He knew that these old guys were actually the disabled veterans of Empress Fei Wen Li back then, otherwise, they would not stay here, preferring to be a street sweeper, rather than to take the position of country sovereign. With their strength, becoming a sovereign of a country was easy, some of them even had strength to rule an even larger area, such as this wooden-faced old man before him. He at least had the Heaven Rank, Level 7 strength.

Yue Yang’s straight-forwardness once again silenced the entire drinking crowd.

After hearing the name of Cook Caribbean, many people put down their wine cups with a heavy heart, and their drunkenness disappeared from their faces.

Lord Ling Yun and Tu Hai as well as the others silently called out a “GG”, this name seems to be itaboo here in Conqueror’s City, otherwise, these old guys who were drinking happily, would not have made such expressions.

The wooden-faced old man sat blankly for a while, before looking at Yue Yang with slanted eyes and shook his head saying, “Don’t know any Cook Kook.”

Yue Yang knew that they were unwilling to talk about it, afraid that they would expose their comrade.

Very depressed, he took a sip of his wine.

At this moment, it was not convenient to tell them the truth about Empress Fei Wen Li, and it was unlikely that he could gain the trust of these old guys, it seemed that this time, he had really bought them a drink for nothing. But when thinking about it from another angle, this way, at least these old guys still maintained their loyalty to Empress Fei Wen Li, if he exposed them directly, his plan might even backfire.

“Forget it, I’ll buy you another drink, but I won’t take responsibility even if you drink to death.” Yue Yang slapped the table and instructed Fatty Hai, “Settle the bill, don’t let these old guys dump their old tabs on us as well.”

Seeing that there were still some remnants in his cup, Yue Yang immediately lifted his glass.

And very stingily slurped it all up, not at all giving these old guys the possibility to steal his leftover wine.

Lord Ling Yun and Tu Hai were so dazed by his actions they nearly fainted, since he had already treated all of them, he was still afraid they would dump their old tabs on him? Besides, putting aside the money used to treat the house, even that little bit of leftover wine had to be slurped up to not give others the chance to steal his leftover wine?

This, this move was too petty!

Just as Yue Yang was gulping down his wine, suddenly an old man beside him scratched his head, as if recalling something and muttered, “You said Cook Caribbean, I seem to somewhat remember, this, this name is really hard to remember, who, who would call himself this crap name, hey, it seems that there was a guy who headed out and made a name for himself. It seems that his name was Cook…”

Ye Kong hurriedly inquired on Yue Yang’s behalf.

He bowed low to the old man and asked, “May I ask, what was the name or title of that elder?”

The old man scratched his half-bald head and thought for a long time, before finally saying with some uncertainty, “He seems to be called, called, Heaven Domain Emperor or something like that. He’s still in the pirate industry anyway.”

“Poof,” upon hearing this, Yue Yang spurted out all the wine in his mouth, spraying the few old men sitting next to him at the same table.

chapters.title: Chapter 776.1 - Searching, Relative, Middle-Aged Woman
chapters.body:
Chapter 776.1 - Searching, Relative, Middle-Aged Woman

Chapter 776.1 – Searching, Relative, Middle-Aged Woman

Since arriving at the Conquering City, Yue Yang’s biggest gain was not finding out that the old guy, Cook Caribbean, was actually the Heaven Domain Emperor.Rather, it was Xiao Wen Li’s epiphany in front of the giant statue of Empress Fei Wen Li.

When Yue Yang came before the towering giant statue, Xiao Wen Li suddenly came out. She searched unceasingly amongst the dozens and hundreds of hundred meter tall warrior statues, each of them depicting a soldier of different races, and finally, she fixed her gaze onto a two-hundred-meter-tall statue of a Snake Demon, which was placed at the right hand side of Empress Fei Wen Li’s statue as if guarding her. This statue stood heads and shoulders above the other statues and was only second in height to the Empress’s statue.

She watched the statue intently. It seemed that from this statue, she was able to recall more details of some past event from her previous life.

Yue Yang looked at the snake demon statue, it looked somewhat similar to Empress Fei Wen Li, on her head was a brilliant silver crown, and looked like the princess of her tribe, but with a serious expression plastered on her face. She held two swords in her hands and gazed into the distance, as if ready to strike the moment Empress Fei Wen Li gave the command. Among the many elite-guard statues surrounding Empress Fei Wen Li, quite a few were in the form of snake demons, but only her looks were similar to Empress Fei Wen Li’s.

Xiao Wen Li stood. For a long time. Not making a single movement.

Until sunset which casted the last glimmer of afterglow onto the snake demon statue that had been under the shadow of Empress Fei Wen Li’s statue all this while, Xiao Wen Li’s body suddenly burst into a ball of golden light. Without needing the enrichment of Yue Yang’s Power of Law, she automatically summoned the golden Snake Demon’s energy giant statue, which was twice as tall as before and was a full two hundred meters tall, which brought it level to the two hundred meter tall Snake Demon statue in front of her.

The veterans on the street all watched the scene in amazement.

Two snake demons that are so alike.

Xiao Wen Li cried out wordlessly, and the ripples of her voice shook the whole city.

Even the drunken man and the old beggar who were hiding at a corner sleeping on the ground were all instantly awakened in shock, looking in astonishment at the direction of the giant statue of Empress Fei Wen Li, not understanding exactly what was happening.

That statue of the Snake Demon wearing a silver crown on its head suddenly shattered, and ten million rays of colored light shot out from inside.

Countless amounts of colored light energy surged into the Golden Snake Demon’s body.

Letting the glow on her body become more brilliant. The texture of the armor, runes, and skin became more realistic and delicate, as if it were a real person. As for Xiao Wen Li, who was standing below the Golden Snake Demon, her eyes filled with tears, seeming to have awakened her long lost memories.

On Xiao Wen Li’s body, a silver rune emerged, just like the rune battle armor that emerged on the golden snake demon, the two were one.

Even the twin blades in her hand had similarly evolved in the colored light energy.

And upgraded to become an all new warblade.

It was even more similar to her original twin blades, it became larger, longer, and sharper than her originally delicate and cute twin blades.

Yue Yang did not dare to disturb Wen Li’s awakening of her past enlightenment, he had long hoped that this cute little treasure of his would grow quickly. Just when Yue Yang thought that Xiao Wen Li would recover all her previous memories, unexpectedly, Xiao Wen Li wiped away the tear marks on the corner of her eyes and flew towards Yue Yang, diving into his arms exactly the same as before. Never mind, she was nevertheless a reborn being and it was normal that she couldn’t recover all her past memories, it would be nice to be able to find even some of them back. Yue Yang gently stroked Xiao Wen Li’s back and comforted her: whether or not she could recover her past memories, his love and care towards her would never change!

“What happened?”

Fatty Hai, Ye Kong, Lord Ling Yun, Tu Hai and the rest had all rushed out of the tavern when they felt the energy undulations earlier, right now they surrounded Yue Yang and Xiao Wen Li, on one hand they did not dare to disturb them yet on the other hand, they desperately wanted to know what had happened and hopefully learn something from it.

Wen Li had long ago transformed into a beam of colored light and returned into Yue Yang’s body.

Not to mention them, even the veterans who were the closest, were not able to see Xiao Wen Li’s presence clearly.

They had come over long ago, but the entire giant statue seemed to have a huge energy shield that prohibited anyone from approaching.

The only thing that the surrounding people could see was the golden snake demon energy giant statue that stood more than two hundred meters high… Once the obstructing force disappeared, all the surrounding people flew in, but Xiao Wen Li had long since went into hiding. All Fatty Hai and the others could see was that the giant statue was constantly crumbling and cracking, little by little, shattering down and collapsing totally, turning into a pile of rubble.

“This had nothing to do with me, we just got here.” Fatty Hai stood by Yue Yang’s side and immediately started to distance themselves away from this matter, of course he knew that it was Yue Yang’s doing, but this matter was important and he would never admit to causing such an incident.

“That’s about enough staring, let’s go!” Ye Kong also persuaded Yue Yang to leave.

No one paid any attention to Fatty Hai and Ye Kong.

The shocked veterans, suddenly quieted down.

All of them silently looked at the shattered stone statue, hundreds of people, nearly a thousand people, not a single person spoke, the whole place was deadly silent.

The atmosphere was tense to the limit, and Lord Ling Yun and Tu Hai felt that this time, they would have definitely angered these old men, and if their anger burst out, it would definitely be like the wrath of a thunderstorm. What should we do now? Lord Ling Yun was simply at a loss for words and could only look towards Yue Yang. Neither he nor Tu Hai were fools and they knew that this matter must have something to do with this Third Young Master in front of them, because, before this, he was the only one standing in front of this statue, and had even stared at it for a full two hours.

chapters.title: Chapter 776.2 - Searching, Relative, Middle-Aged Woman
chapters.body:
Chapter 776.2 - Searching, Relative, Middle-Aged Woman

Chapter 776.2 – Searching, Relative, Middle-Aged Woman

As if he had not seen the gaze of Lord Ling Yun seeking for help, Yue Yang stood there as if he was a normal passerby.

The wooden-faced old man from the tavern stepped forward.

Immediately following after him was the old beggar who had been sleeping on the ground and the old woman who had been sweeping the floor.

The three of them went up to the stone pile, each picked up a fragment and carefully took it into their arms, saying nothing throughout the process before leaving again in silence. The wooden-faced old man continued to go back to the tavern to drink, the old beggar continued to find a corner to lie down and sleep, while the old woman continued to clean the street as if nothing had ever happened.

The group of veterans came forward in droves, doing the exact same thing.

Each picked up a piece of rubble.

And took it away, pretending as if nothing had ever happened… Only Fatty Hai, Ye Kong and the rest stood there rooted to the ground, staring blankly as the people of Conquering City gradually returned to normal again.

Fifty kilometers outside the city, there was a Heaven Rank Thief, flying with lightning speed.

Within fifty kilometers of the Conquering City, teleportation was forbidden, this thief, who possessed the strength of a Heaven Ranker, sneaked out of the city at the moment the statue of the Snake Demon shattered into pieces, taking advantage of the fact that everyone in the city was still shocked still and sped away as fast as he could, intending to bring this news out of the city.

With a kilometer to go, it was just a matter of seconds before he broke out.

The Heaven Ranked Thief took out a golden teleportation crystal from his pocket, this teleportation crystal was worth ten thousand Heaven Realm gold coins and was a precious teleportation crystal that no ordinary city lord would easily use. Now, he took it out to ensure his safe departure. He believed that this piece of news would definitely be worth more than ten thousand gold, and he was confident that he could sell it for thousands or maybe even ten thousand times higher.

Just as he rushed out of the fifty kilometer range and broke away from the teleportation prohibition, his hand crushed the golden teleportation crystal.

The light of teleportation flashed.

A successful escape was imminent.

The Heaven Ranked Thief’s face showed a happy and pleased expression.

He didn’t sense that behind him, a seemingly harmless red rose, was coming after him.

That red rose shot towards the thief quietly through the air, lightly piercing the back of the Heaven Ranked Thief’s head, and the stalk pierced out from his brow… The teleportation light flashed at that exact same moment, but what was taken away was only a dead body that didn’t even know how it had died.

At this time in the Conquering City, a middle-aged man who was tending to his flowers in his flower garden, criticized the girl who had been selling snow malt sweets a little angrily: “I told you not to take action but you wouldn’t listen to me, see how far you let that bug run, and even wasted one of my roses! The girl who was criticized stuck out her tongue in response while promising never to do it again.

“How much are these snow malt sweets?” Without realising when, Yue Yang had made his way to the two and casually uncovered the girl’s basket while grabbing a handful of sweets and asking casually.

“I’m not selling to you, I only sell my sweets to those who are pleasing in my eyes.” The girl rolled her eyes, she had never seen such a rude person as Yue Yang, who would so casually uncover a young girl’s basket? She had wanted to snatch back the candy, but Yue Yang had stuffed it into his mouth immediately and started chewing so she could only roll her eyes in protest.

“Then it’s free.” Yue Yang’s comprehension was out of the world, and he straightforwardly picked up the plate inside the baskets which held the sweets and poured all the sweets into his pocket.

The girl squealed in shock and almost forgot to cry.

What kind of person is this?

Stealing even a young girl’s stuff?

The middle-aged man looked at them lovingly, like a parent seeing their children fight and bicker amongst themselves.

Besides bullying girls, Yue Yang actually still knew to do the important stuff. He took out a picture of Fourth Mother and showed it to the middle-aged man, asking with some sincerity, “May I ask if you have seen a person similar to the one in the painting? If you know her, can you tell me a little about her? Even if it’s just a little bit, I’ve been looking for her for ages!”

The middle-aged man glanced towards the portrait and shook his head slightly, indicating that he did not recognize it.

And seemed to ask casually, “Who is she to you?”

“Family.” Yue Yang answered truthfully.

“I really envy her, there are still relatives who came all the way to the Heaven Realm to look for her, alas my relatives, I’m afraid……..” the middle-aged man seemed to remember something from the past, and his expression turned a little gloomy, but he recovered almost immediately, and smiled at Yue Yang while looking at him: “Brat, did you come up here to travel, or are you mainly looking for your relatives? I have one thing that requires some help but so far I have been unable to find a suitable person, can you give me some help?”

“Take care of the baby and don’t look for me!” As Yue Yang said this, he looked at the exasperated girl.

“Who are you calling a baby? Why don’t you look at yourself, you are only in your twenties, and simply a fart, I’m much older than you!” The girl was pissed, although her appearance might look young but it didn’t mean she was easy to bully.

“Children shouldn’t interrupt when adults are talking.” Yue Yang made a ‘go play in the mud while you’re at it’ gesture, making the girl even more furious and ready to blow up.

“I’m not asking you to look after her, she, ah, I’m still not yet at ease letting her run around, maybe after a while, I’ll take her back to visit! I am asking you to look for two old friends, we were originally three, some years ago, we met some very powerful enemies, I was wounded and the whereabouts of my two friends are unknown, I would like to ask you to look for them.” The middle-aged man took off a half-divine ring from his own finger and handed it to Yue Yang, indicating that it was a token to prove his identity.

“Such an easy task as finding someone, feel free to give it to me!” When Yue Yang saw that merely looking for two people could land him a half-divine ring, he immediately U-turned and agreed loudly.

“This guy is not reliable at all!” The girl had a headache, she felt that Yue Yang would definitely mess things up.

“Wait for my good news.” Yue Yang ignored the girl and happily turned around to leave, while admiring the ‘Flash’ half-divine ring in his hands. The girl was so angry that she chased after Yue Yang, letting off several kicks towards Yue Yang’s back, but Yue Yang seemed to have eyes behind his back, each kick from the girl was cleverly dodged. This pissed the girl even more so that she angrily hurled the basket in her hands at him and raised her fist in rebuke: “You this big bully, this little girl will one day pass you, and when the time comes, I will help the peasants by eliminating you, see how long you can act so cockily!”

“It’s a beautiful day!” Yue Yang laughed, ignoring the angry girl, and left in a relaxed mood.

“Bastard!” The girl was about to cry.

“What an interesting fellow, I wonder whose family does he come from?” After seeing this scene, the middle-aged man thought for a long time and finally shook his head, unable to determine the answer.

chapters.title: Chapter 777.1 - A Fortuitous Encounter, Together With Danger
chapters.body:
Chapter 777.1 - A Fortuitous Encounter, Together With Danger

Chapter 777.1 – A Fortuitous Encounter, Together with Danger

Mysterious Snowy Plains, ancient ruins.

The looming mountain range that had originally hidden the ancient ruins, formerly was

an off-the-beaten-path place, right now however, it had become a bustling camp. Tens of thousands of mercenaries, merchants, and Heaven Rankers who had got wind of the news gathered here and formed a huge bustling camp.

Even from a distance, one could see it from the sky, a very distinct black spot in the vast whiteness of the snow below. When getting a little closer, that black spot would reveal itself to be a huge snowfield camp. The most impressive thing is that, in order to allow visitors from afar to find their target accurately, a huge pillar of fire up to three hundred meters tall was erected in the center of the Snowfield Camp, and the fire burns continuously day and night.

The pillar of fire guided adventurers from all over the place to the camp.

Lord Ling Yun looked at it and was instantly envious in his heart.

As the lord of a country in the Heaven Realm, there had been several occasions where he had wanted to set up a pillar of fire in his own capital to show off his majesty.

However, in addition to the fact that the erection of such a fire pillar would require the prior approval from the Central Palace Hall, the cost to build such a huge fire pillar would require hundreds of millions of gold coins and these two facts discouraged Lord Ling Yun from pursuing this idea. It wasn’t that he didn’t have hundreds of millions of gold, he did, but even if he had way more gold than this, he didn’t feel that his money should be squandered so extravagantly.

“It seems that the Central Palace Hall is one step ahead of us.” In fact, since arriving at the Conquering City, other than Yue Yang, the others had more or less experienced a sense of inferiority and no longer gave off the prideful aura they once had before coming here.

If one kept on comparing oneself with the people they met, they would soon die of exasperation. In the Conquering City, even a powerhouse above Heaven Rank 5 slept on the streets like a beggar. This made Lord Ling Yun, who was only at the peak of Heaven Rank 5 feel inferior, not to mention Tu Hai, who was not even a Heaven Rank 5. Their ego had taken a battering, and were different from Fatty Hai, Ye Kong and the rest of Yue Yang’s companions. Fatty Hai, Ye Kong and the others had never been ahead in terms of strength, apart from anomalies like Yue Yang, they had also come across many outstanding predecessors of various different strengths, which had resulted in them always playing catch-up all these while.

Therefore, the inferiority that Fatty Hai, Ye Kong and the others felt were more akin to a sense of awe and respect for the strong.

However for Lord Ling Yun and City Lord Tu Hai, this was definitely a huge setback.

If they were unable to overcome this setback they had experienced, it would become a mental demon that would hinder their progress in the future.

Although mentality was not directly equal to strength, as having a strong mentality does not necessarily mean that one can become strong immediately, but without a strong mentality, one will certainly not be able to get strong. The path of cultivation had always been like trying to row a boat against the current.

If you don’t improve, you will definitely slide back.

“This is just for show to attract more people, some worthless tricks, the greed of some powerful people cannot be curbed.” Yue Yang let out a dark sneer.

Of course, he would not directly say that a Palace Lord from the Central Palace Hall had already took control of the fallen martial artists from the Dark Realm and ordered them to come here and kill all the Heaven Rankers who came to these ancient ruins, in hopes to strengthen and expand their scope of influence through this incident.

Yue Yang could already figure out the motive behind these tricks even with his toes.

The reason was that although the Three Great Leaders of the Heaven Realm had recently returned to the Heaven Realm after being sealed in the Temple of the Prison Emperor for 6000 years, their strength had not yet been fully restored, and the Central Palace Hall wanted to seize this opportunity to expand and solidify their influence in the Western Heaven Realm. If the Three Great Leaders had never come back, the Central Palace Hall would have supported a few candidates of their choice from the backup leaders and pushed them to take over the position of the Great Leaders, using this to fully take control of the Western Heaven Realm. For the backup leaders, if they wanted to be formally recognized as a legitimate Great Leader, they would have to first obtain the support of the Divine Palace Hall, this way the Central Palace Hall would be able to do as they please in the Western Heaven Realm. However, Xu Kong, Jiu Xiao and Ming Yue Guang had returned. All the effort that the Central Palace Hall had put in previously and all the plans that they had made had all come to naught, if they did not take this opportunity before the original Three Great Leaders regained their peak strength to create some trouble, they would surely be unable to have any say once the Western Heaven Realm regained its peace. Therefore the appearance of the fallen martial artist from the Dark Realm must surely be the doing of the Central Palace Hall, hoping to use these death row convicts to create a mess and use this opportunity to quickly solidify their power in the Western Heaven Realm.

This was something that Yue Yang would never disclose to any of the citizens of the Heaven Realm.

Instead it will be kept as a secret.

Because the power struggle between the Central Palace Hall and the Three Great Leaders of the Heaven Realm was in fact very beneficial to Yue Yang. It could be said that this was the best time for him to sit on the mountain and watch the tigers fight. What Yue Yang wanted to do right now was to secretly aid in escalating this in-fighting among the powers of the Heaven Realm and create an even bigger mess. The messier the situation in the Heaven Realm, the more favorable it will be for the rise of the Tong Tian Tower, not to mention Yue Yang would gain more time and opportunities to constantly grow stronger.

When the snipe and the clam fights, the fisherman benefits. (yes this is proverb, erudite gambateh wuhuu!!)

What this implied was that for Yue Yang who was currently facing such a situation, he had to take advantage of this opportunity.

This is not only for himself, but also for Empress Fei Wen Li who had yet to come out from the black hole, for the Prison Emperor who died in battle, for Zhi Zun, the Night Queen, the Heaven Punisher, the Dragon Emperor, the Emperor of the Underworld…Xue Wu Xia, Princess Xixi, Luo Hua, the Phoenix Beauty, Yi Nan, Yue Yu, Yue Bing, Yue Shuang, Hai Ying Wu, the Drunken Cat Royal Sister, the Southern Demon King, Fatty Hai, Ye Kong, Xue Tan Lang,Prince Tian Luo, and so on who were still growing in the Tong Tian Tower.

They had fallen behind for six thousand years, if they did not have a good chance to to grow, not to mention overtake, even catching up to the experts of the Heaven Realm would require the effort of a few generations.

Yue Yang didn’t want that.

He felt that he should step up and lead the way forward.

Catching up to the rankers of the Heaven Realm, and even surpassing them like what their predecessors did, trampling the experts of the Heaven Realm underfoot.

The ultimate goal in Yue Yang’s heart had never been the Heaven Realm, but rather the extremely mysterious and inscrutable world beyond, where those legendary gods resided in, perhaps the God Realm, perhaps it was the Immortal Realm of the Eastern Immortal Tribe.

In any case, that kind of incredible world was what Yue Yang was aiming for.

He was close.

chapters.title: Chapter 777.2 - [A Fortuitous Encounter, Together With Danger]
chapters.body:
Chapter 777.2 - [A Fortuitous Encounter, Together With Danger]

Chapter 777.2 [A Fortuitous Encounter, Together with Danger]

Closer to the snowy campground.

Right now, they could finally see the snowy campground. The scale of this snowy campground was simply breathtaking, it was in no way below that of a city, and was very possibly even larger.

Even before their luxurious airship drew close, there were already two hundred griffin knights, each of them of quasi-Heaven Rank strength, wearing the unique insignia of the Central Palace Hall on their arms, and wearing unified and magnificent battle armor, neatly lined up to greet them.

A flag-bearing captain took the lead and shouted: “Welcome, brave explorers, to the Third Column of the Vulcan Warriors of the 19th District of the Central Palace Halls, and while wishing you a bountiful journey, we hope you will report your honorary names in order to register and not mess up the order. Unlike the temporarily established Expeditionary Guild, our service is completely free of charge, and finally, good luck to you again!

“We are from the Eighth Desolate Realms of the Western Heaven Realm, the Silver Trident Region, Xiaofeng 6, Ling Yun country. I, Lord Ling Yun, led my troops and friends here.” Lord Ling Yun knew that Yue Yang would definitely want to hide his strength for the exploration and would not come forward, therefore he very cooperatively came forward and reported his name.

As a Country Lord, although not a big shot in the Heaven Realm, he still more or less had a bit of influence.

The captain of the third column of that Vulcan battle group was startled and rushed to lead the group in a salute once again.

Before boarding the airship personally to pay his respects.

The parking area for the luxury airship was then arranged with great pomp and ceremony.

From the Expeditionary Guild that had obtained the news of their arrival, several warriors of Heaven Rank 5 strength rushed over. Once they saw Lord Ling Yun, they immediately laughed and rushed forward, because they were already old acquaintances.

“I say, old Ling Yun, how bored were you.I didn’t think you’d have time for this kind of adventure.Shouldn’t a rich man like you be busy laying on the knee of a beautiful woman and living the life of a drunken king? Last time you yourself said you weren’t interested, Look at you, you even came here in a luxury airship! Come, come, come. We few old friends should get together and have a drink.” The first one to hug Lord Yun was an extraordinary stalwart man.

“Very well.” Lord Ling Yun laughed bitterly, if it weren’t to get close to the Third Young Master, he wouldn’t have come to this dangerous place. In this type of place, whether or not any treasure found, there is bound to be strife and bloodshed.

However, compared to the friendship of the esteemed Third Young Master, Lord Ling Yun felt the need to fight for it with his life.

Time will not rewind itself and this opportunity cannot be missed.

He determined that the Third Young Master was a noble existence from the Eastern Immortal Clan If he missed this opportunity to build relationships with the Eastern Immortal Clan, he would certainly regret it for life. It’s all well and good to live out his comfortable life as a country lord, but the question is, how long can a comfortable country lord keep his power? In the Heaven Realm, someone could come to challenge your position at any time, and if you are not strong enough and do not have the support of a powerful backing, the final result would only be tragedy.

It is better to look for shade under a large tree. He recognized the potential of the Third Young Master to grow into a giant tree.

Lord Ling Yun naturally would not introduce Yue Yang who was on the ship to these people.

Just bringing along City Lord Tu Hai to participate in their welcoming feast.

On the other hand, he specially ordered consul Xiang Wen who was a careful man to lead Fatty Hai and Ye Kong to walk around the campsite, familiarising themselves while searching for news….two hours later, and thousands of gold pieces lesser, Fatty Hai and the others had managed to gather all the information and leads from the entire campsite.

Although the ancient ruins had been discovered for half a year, almost no one had gone in to explore them because of the lack of sufficient manpower and other conditions.

The only team to try to explore the ruins.

Had been totally wiped out three months ago.

Now, in the entire Snowfield Camp, nearly a thousand Heaven Rankers and nearly ten thousand quasi Heaven Rankers had assembled. Aside from the Central Palace Hall, a Snow Domain Emperor’s forces and the forces from the temporary Expeditionary Guild, there were three other major forces. Among them was a group of Heaven Rankers from the Eight Desolate Realms which was the group of people who had welcomed Lord Ling Yun earlier. Apart from the Eight Desolate Realms, there were two other even more powerful exploring forces from another two different realms, namely the Snow Plains, and the War Song.

In order to enter the ancient ruins, the minimum condition was to be a Heaven Ranker.

It is not that the quasi-Heaven Rankers are not allowed to enter the ruins, but according to the history of the first team’s total annihilation, the mercenaries below Heaven Rank will all be annihilated within ten minutes of entering the ancient ruins, regardless of how many of them there were, they would not be of any use whatsoever.

For the Heaven Rankers that had entered the ruins, even the weakest amongst them had survived for half a day.

The strongest among them had the strength of a Heaven Rank 5, according to his recount at his deathbed, he claimed that he survived in the world of the ancient ruins for ten days, But because of the power of the law inside, he was about to be extinguished, before he died, he wanted to tell his friends the situation inside, so he rushed back…….

“The treasure inside is not something you can imagine, if you are not afraid to die, you can go inside. If you can come out of it in one piece, as long as you are not about to be destroyed by the Power of Law like me, then you will become the luckiest person in the entire Heaven Realm. Come on, warriors, it is impossible for a coward to gain the favor of the gods of fortune, regardless of success or failure. Either way, march over our corpses and continue forward!” These were the words that the captain of the previous expedition said before he died.

It was his warning precisely that kept the later expeditions from making a move. It was also his experience that made all the brave mercenaries satisfied. Especially the brave warriors who had strength of the Heaven Rank.

Opportunity and harvest, are always tied to strength.

To obtain a big gain, one must have enough strength, and at the same time, go forward bravely and without regret!

“Interesting. It doesn’t look like a scam, I’m starting to get a little interested. At first, Yue Yang thought that this entire ancient ruin might be part of the conspiracy designed by the Central Palace Hall, but now the information showed that the ancient ruins does indeed exist, and that the opportunity is proportional to the risk. …

chapters.title: Chapter 778.1 - [Land Of Training?]
chapters.body:
Chapter 778.1 - [Land Of Training?]

Chapter 778.1 [Land of Training?]

Because the ancient ruins were extremely dangerous, the three major groups, the Eight Desolations, the Snow Plains and the Battle Song were all actively recruiting helpers.

It wasn’t just Lord Ling Yun and Tu Hai.

Heaven Rankers were still continuously arriving at the Snowfield Camp.

Therefore, the plan to form large exploratory groups before venturing into the ancient ruins was still in the preparation phase and the actual exploration was scheduled for about a month later, maybe even even longer. Of course Yue Yang would definitely not wait for them, moreover he believed that the people from the Central Palace Hall would not wait that long either. The treasures in the ancient ruins were of course on a first come first serve basis and since Yue Yang had made his way here, he would definitely not allow for these treasures that he had reserved for himself to be taken away by other people.

He got Lord Ling Yun and the others to stay behind while Yue Yang himself went out to scout for more information.

According to the information that Fatty Hai and the others had obtained back during the day, under the cover of the night, Yue Yang quietly made his way towards the distant ancient ruins.

Surrounding the entrance that led to the ancient ruins which had previously been hidden inside the mountain range, there were griffin knights of the Central Palace Hall stationed everywhere, furthermore there were a number of teams patrolling around as well. The three major groups, namely the Eight Wilderness, the Snow Plains, and the Battle Song had also stationed a small number of people nearby, supervising each other at the entrance. These 3 small teams were all led by a Heaven Ranker respectively.

With Yue Yang’s current strength and talent for disguise, it would simply be impossible for any of the people on guard to detect him, unless there was a hidden Heaven Realm expert with strength of a Divine Innate around. However out of prudence, Yue Yang still stayed at the periphery of the entrance for more than ten minutes, and used his phantom to hide into the darkness to explore the surroundings. Only when he was certain that there were no experts from the Central Palace Hall hiding anywhere did he summon Hui Tai Lang and slipped through the guards. The surrounding guards, regardless those on patrol or stationed at the entrance, none of them felt Yue Yang passing by, if it were any other Heaven Ranker, they might have felt a gust of wind, but Yue Yang, who was wearing the “Flash” half-Divine ring was so fast that even Yue Yang himself was surprised by it.

With a single thought, he vanished and reappeared thousands of meters away.

The entrance that was guarded heavily was actually not a real entrance, but just a passageway set up by the Central Palace Hall.

The real entrance to the ancient ruins was a square.

There are numerous statues situated all over the square, there were statues of all races and each was marked with information about the life of the owner.

Despite the different levels of strength, these statues all had one thing in common, and that all of them had at least successfully passed 3 levels.

Inscribed on an obelisk located right at the center of the square were the words, “The world inside is not simply a treasure trove, but a testing ground for the experts of today.”

Inside, it’s divided into ten levels. For every level passed, a certain reward is earned.

If you pass three levels, you will be recognized as a qualifier. Regardless of race or status, if you fail to pass the first three levels, you will still be considered as unqualified.

If you manage to pass all the levels, after the trial you will be rewarded with a treasure that can change the fate of a warrior in the Heaven Realm…

“”Change the fate of a Heaven Ranker?” Could it be, could it be God’s blood?” At this moment, the one standing in front of the obelisk and sighing repeatedly was not Yue Yang but another uninvited guest. This man, who came earlier than Yue Yang, had recorded all the information on the statues that identified as belonging to the Central Palace Hall, and was now standing in front of the obelisk and laughing smugly: “When the others are still vying against each other in the Central Palace Hall and are unable to free themselves to come here, I have come. Haha, this is fate. My destiny will start to change at this moment, if I grab hold of this chance, in the future I will no longer be a mere Deputy Palace Lord who has to lick others shoes, but I will become a Palace Lord, even a Grand Palace Lord! As long as I get that drop of God’s blood, those guys who have been acting all high and mighty, watch how I will trample them underfoot. Six thousand years have passed; my chance has come once again, this time, I definitely won’t miss it again!” , “……” the figure of six thousand years allowed Yue Yang to sharply capture a bit of information.

Perhaps, this guy had something to do with the Battle of the Heaven Realm back in the days of the Prison Emperor.

How else would his past opportunity happen to be precisely 6,000 years ago as well?

After careful observation by the wise eyes of Yue Yang, he realised that this guy in front of him was not the man who shone like a god who had appeared after the destruction of Rizhao City that day, but someone else. Compared to that man, the man in front of him looks somewhat similar and has a similar aura, but his strength is far from him and he does not have such an egotistical aura, he just tries to imitate that man who shone like a god.

The man who claimed to be a Deputy Palace Lord was still cautious, he radiated a dark energy wave and skillfully scanned his surroundings.

Only when he confirmed that there was no one around him did he confidently step towards the glittering teleportation array that was also located in the center of the square.

Only after he entered the teleportation array and teleported away did Yue Yang emerge from the darkness.

With Hui Tai Lang trailing behind him.

The teleportation array started up again.

The two of them, Yue Yang and Hui Tai Lang, instantly teleported to a strange world.

In this world, there are countless powers of law at work, Yue Yang had never sensed a place that was governed by so many powers of law before, and if he was not in a dangerous situation, he would have tried to carefully observe the power of laws here, hoping to glean of some useful information that could help him to gain enlightenment in his own power of law.

There was a huge stone monument at the other end of the teleportation array.

Above, apart from the words, Rain Valley.

There were also a dozen or so lines of Heaven Runes, stating the rules that those who entered must follow.

When Yue Yang saw this, he immediately rejoiced. For it was only now that he understood that this ancient ruin was not created to deliberately kill warriors below the Heaven Rank, but was rather a special kind of trial. For the first batch of explorers who had entered, none of them were well versed in Heaven Runes and were unable to read the restrictions, therefore breaking the rules here and were hounded by the power of laws that governed this place. In this Rain Valley, apart from being not allowed to fly, they were also prohibited from summoning and monsters.

Any warrior who tried to fly would fall hard to the ground, and the higher he flew, the harder he would fall.

Any warrior who attempted to summon any beasts would be attacked by three replicas of the summoned beasts… This restriction on summoning, could be said to be a special kind of training, only a person with the highest confidence in themselves and their war beasts would dare to summon a war beast in this Rain Valley.

It was a pity the mercenaries who entered earlier didn’t know how to read the Heaven Runes, what a tragedy.

What probably had happened would be, as soon as they came in, they summoned their own war beasts, and after seeing that clones of their summoned beast had come to attack them, they would most likely have summoned their strongest war beast to fight.

Such an outcome would undoubtedly be even more tragic then suicide, what’s more the first batch of mercenaries to enter were all unaware of the law that forbade flight, they would most likely have chosen to fly into the air during critical moments to escape, but the higher they flew, the harder they fell, accelerating their impeding deaths.

Six kilometers away, that Deputy Palace Lord was striking out with a bit of annoyance, slaying three Heaven Rank Golden Flying Dragons.

Although the three Heaven Rank 1 Golden Flying Dragons were easily killed, they were all duplicated shadows produced by the power of law, and had no corpses at all, turning into phantoms upon death and disappearing. As soon as the Deputy Palace Lord who had summoned the Golden Flying Dragon to be his mount finished killing the 3 clones, three more Golden Flying Dragons appeared on the horizon and flew towards him, they were exactly identical to the ones he had just killed.

In this Rain Valley, as long as the summoned beasts were still present, then the law will never stop replicating clones to attack the summoner.

When Yue Yang saw this, he had a hard time holding in a sudden urge to laugh crazily.

Again, it was the lack of knowledge that was to blame.

Not being able to read the Heaven Runes, not knowing the true meaning of the inscription on the obelisk, the result would be this wretched situation……

chapters.title: Chapter 778.2 - [Land Of Training?]
chapters.body:
Chapter 778.2 - [Land Of Training?]

Chapter 778.2 [Land of Training?]

On the wall of the main hall in the Changnet Vine Library, there was a phrase written on it: “Knowledge is more powerful than a sword!

If the Deputy Palace Lord and the former mercenaries knew the importance of knowledge, if they knew how to read the Heaven Runes, their outcome would very likely not be so tragic. Of course, the Heaven Runes were not something anyone could learn. Tens of thousands of years ago, it may have been a popular language, but today, Heaven Runes have almost vanished from the Heaven Realm, and could only be found in the hands of powerful people above the level of Country Lords. Even amongst the Country Lords of the Heaven Realm, apart from the minority like the Lionheart King, it is estimated that not many people would dare to say that they were proficient with the Heaven Runes, including the wise Lord Ling Yun.

Overemphasised on strength, not on knowledge.

Similar incidents had happened in the Tong Tian Tower and there were records regarding it, but yet in the Tong Tian Tower of today, not many people had mastered the Heaven Runes.

After being repeatedly attacked by the clones, the Deputy Palace Lord still did not realize that he could not summon any of his war beasts, instead, he felt that some kind of power was playing tricks on him, using the phantoms of his own war beasts in order to deplete his strength.

In a fit of rage, he punched his own golden flying dragon to death.

He didn’t even want his mount anymore.

As a result, the golden flying dragon clones that were constantly coming to attack him really stopped, which made him secretly feel proud in his heart..

From time to time, the Deputy Palace Lord would fly high into the sky and then descend sharply. He didn’t know the reason and thought that the gravity here was particularly weird, feeling that the erratic gravity was at times high and at times low, making it hard to control his flight, but it never crossed his mind that he wasn’t allowed to fly at all in the first place. As a noble Deputy Palace Lord that was respected by many, it had never deigned upon him to walk with his feet, he would not be like Yue Yang who was running at full speed with his legs but would continue to flounder in the air like a rodeo performer, constantly zig-zagging up and down in the sky. He would fly up with all his might, then fall back down and try to stabilise himself before flying back up again, constantly repeating this set of actions. Hui Tai Lang was laughing so hard that he was on the verge of rolling all over the ground, how could it be that this guy’s intelligence was even lower than him by such a large margin?

In the sky, a thunderclap sounded, immediately followed by a torrential downpour.

The rain was so heavy it was like arrows.

To the extent that it hurt when the rain pelted on the body.

Yue Yang and Hui Tai Lang calmly followed after that arrogant Deputy Palace Lord, and when that Deputy Palace Lord left the main path, the two of them started to bet on how many seconds before that guy would be blown back to the main path by the power of law… Here in Rain Valley, it was absolutely impossible to leave the main path, otherwise, one would be punished by a lightning blast.

Boom!

No matter which direction he flew to, regardless to the left or to the right, he would be struck by lightning, forcing him to return to the main path.

After his head had been blasted by lightning until it was smoking, he finally understood that anywhere outside the main path was forbidden land and that he could not leave the main path, not even to circle around.

Hui Tai Lang laughed until he had muscle cramps all over his body and had to stuff his paws hard into his mouth to block out the unsuppressable laughter. In this Rain Valley, every puddle of water were traps, some of them may be harmless and would just sink the foot stepping on it into a pit of sludge: but some were not harmless, some had mud monsters that would not die, dragging their prey deep into their mud holes to slowly feed on them; while others contained an unknown poisonous saliva trap, once a foot stepped into it, the foot would be poisoned.

The Deputy Palace Lord continuously used a cleansing beam to disperse the toxins that were on his body.

While cursing darkly.

No wonder the mercenaries below the Heaven Rank all died in less than ten minutes, even somebody as powerful as himself was forced into such a woeful predicament.

It’s a good thing no one saw this mess, otherwise he would have lost all his face! The Deputy Palace Lord would continuously stop to expel the toxins from his body or to freeze an undead sludge monster into ice, then tidy his clothes and restore his stately looks before continuing to bounce up and down on his journey forward. Yue Yang had many chances to strike, however, he did not want to take out this Deputy Palace Lord for the time being.

It’s better to have such a shield in front of you than to have to test everything yourself!

The most important point is “The Palace Lord is here, but where is the Palace Lord?

Although he was not one hundred percent certain, Yue Yang guessed that there were people in power who were stronger and more greedy for power that had come in long ago, they might even be somewhere ahead……

Killing a Deputy Palace Lord might not count as something too serious, but if he was able to kill a Palace Lord… damn, even thinking about it would make him feel excited. How many Palace Lords are there in the Central Palace Hall? For the time being, the Grand Palace Lords and the Supreme Lord of the Divine Hall were off limits, even if they were standing in front of him right now, he would probably not be able to beat them, but he might have a chance of beating a Palace Lord who was one rank lower! “Hui Tai Lang, this time you must try to put in more effort, if things go wrong, I won’t let you go!” Yue Yang warned Hui Tai Lang not to take it lightly, even a Deputy Palace Lord was no easy opponent, not to mention if there was really a Palace Lord waiting for them in front, if they did not go all out, things would be difficult!

“Meow!” Hui Tai Lang stood up on his hind legs and patted his front paws onto his chest, showing Yue Yang his determination and promising to complete the mission!

On one side the master and servant pair were discussing their future actions, while on the other side, that unlucky Deputy Palace Lord…

Had fallen into another trap!

He was usually cunning and wise, but suffered greatly under the combined terrain and restrictions in this Rain Valley. Restricted from normal flight by the power of law, he was left with no choice but to bounce. Although he was able to accomplish this by relying on his brute strength, the punishment that was meted out to him was in no way light.

Yue Yang had also noticed this, in the Rain Valley, it was allowed for those who entered to challenge the power of law here, unlike the prohibitions in the Tong Tian Tower, once infringed, it would bring about a destructive punishment, or forced movement restrictions, preventing any movements. However, the power of law here was more like an encouragement in disguise, allowing those who enter to challenge it, as long as they possess sufficient strength.

If this place is used for training, it would no doubt be very suitable.

Could it be that this was the Gate of Life and Death that was set up by the ancient Heaven Rankers of the Heaven Realm?

Was this the place the ancient Heaven Rankers used to test and gain recognition for their strength?

Yue Yang’s mind immediately thought of a possibility, and once this thought was stuck in his mind, the more it urged his curiosity. The Tong Tian Tower had the Zodiac Palaces, the Gate of Life and Death and so on, what would the training grounds of the Heaven Realm look like? …

chapters.title: Chapter 779.1 - [Assault, Murder Mystery]
chapters.body:
Chapter 779.1 - [Assault, Murder Mystery]

Chapter 779.1 [Assault, Murder Mystery]

Inside Rain Valley, there were numerous windy and curvy passages.

The most gripping thing is that in this maze of passageways, there are many roads that are interconnected and lead back to each other without a clear path forward. In a storm, it is easy for an entrant to lose his or her way. Only now did Yue Yang understand why they were not allowed to fly, as once they took to the skies, the maze would practically be useless and they would be able to directly bypass it. As for not being allowed to summon warbeasts, it should be to prevent warbeasts that have a strong sense of smell or some sort of direction induction to directly lead the way through the maze. These 2 restrictions forced all entrants to rely on their own abilities to find the true passage in the Rain Valley.

This is a kind of trial.

Yue Yang had waited for a long time at a three forked road, and now that the Deputy Palace Lord had gone through this place twice and still hadn’t found the correct path, he couldn’t help but be bored.

The Deputy Palace Lord, who also had an excellent memory ability, would never repeatedly walk the same path he had chosen before. However, in the face of the completely unfamiliar crossroads, he could only gamble and choose a fork, unable to directly see the correct path like Yueyang, who was able to use his Divine Vision to directly identify the correct path.

“Ah……..”

From a distance, a sharp cry was heard.

Despite the gusty winds and torrential rain, the screams of the wounded were as clear as lightning breaking through the sky.

Even the Deputy Palace Lord who had taken a few steps down the fork he chose, returned immediately, a guarded and wary look appearing on his face.

There was actually someone else apart from himself who had entered the ruins.

And, by the looks of it, it was more than one person.

The Deputy Palace Lord traced the sound and moved towards its location, when he arrived, he saw a man in black who was holding a dagger that was dripping blood.

That Divine-grade dagger, was pitch black as ink, every drop of blood that dripped onto the waterlogged ground would ignite a cloud of green smoke. The black-clothed man immediately laughed coldly when he saw the Deputy Palace Lord coming from afar: “I was wondering who it is, turns out it is Palace Lord Wei Shu. Didn’t the Central Palace Hall declare that it would not send out explorers to explore these ruins personally? Why are they going against their own word?” “Demon Doctor Wei Jing Lue, I originally had no intentions of coming, but since there was murder and unethical snatching of treasures within, how could I not come? If the Central Palace Hall does not take action, wouldn’t it mean putting all the explorers of Snowfield Camp in danger?” The Deputy Palace Lord who was named Wei Shu was a very experienced veteran and was able to immediately change the situation. Using words to instantly shift the blame back to the other party. After a moment’s pause, he continued asking, “Who is it, who is it that dares to attack you, this Demon Doctor whose body is filled with poison? Is it people from Imperial Temple King or is it Sky Realm King’s underlings?”

“Neither, it’s the Ghost Eye King.” The black-clothed Demon Doctor Wei Jing Lue laughed coldly.

“The Ghost Eye King is here?” Wei Shu was faintly startled when he heard this.

“Not only him, but also the Six Pan King, the Sky Water King and the Sea Swallowing King have all come, only they are like fish returning to water in this Rain Valley, leaving me and the Ghost Eye King far behind while they went ahead first.” Demon Doctor Wei Jing Lue exhaled a mouthful of black fog and enveloped himself, and his originally injured and weak body quickly recovered.

The killing intent in the eyes of Deputy Palace Lord Wei Shu was half hidden and a tint of pity flashed past, seemingly regretting the missed opportunity to finish off the Demon Doctor.

Of course, there was some justification for his caution.

Although the Demon Doctor Wei Jing Lue was not as strong as him in terms of rank and strength, yet his reputation as a poison expert was far more feared in the Heaven Realm than any other ordinary King rank Heaven Ranker.

Even if there was a good opportunity right in front of him, Deputy Palace Lord Wei Shu would not take it easily. If he is unable to finish off an opponent like the Demon Doctor, then the consequences were endless. Furthermore, the Ghost Eye King, the Six Pan King, the Sky Water King and the Sea Swallowing King are all here, even if Deputy Palace Lord Wei Shu personally feels that he is stronger than any of them by a comfortable margin, he would not dare to take the enemy lightly.

It would be a good idea to find an ally, such as the Demon Doctor Wei Jing Lue.

With two against four, it would be better than going against the four Kings alone.

The second Deputy Palace Lord Wei Shu thought of this, he immediately laughed and said, “Demon Doctor, the situation now is pressing, why don’t we two join hands? If we can discover the treasures of the Rain Valley, you can choose first. Towards allies, we from the Central Palace Hall would never sneakily attack from the back.” , Demon Doctor Wei Jing Lue immediately sarcastically replied, “Yes, if I let the Ghost Eye King beat my brains out, I will definitely believe your words!” “In actuality, regardless of whether the situation is pressing, or for the common good, our alliance is not harmful, why must we be stubbornly outnumbered?” As if not hearing the Demon Doctor’s mockery, Wei Shu laughed and continued: “I believe the Ghost-eyed King is lurking in the distance, as long as we join hands and get rid of him, the only enemies left are the Six Pan King, the Sky Water King and the Sea Swallowing King. You also know that the Six Pan King is cunning and treasures his life, I reckon he will remain neutral and not participate in the battle between us, as for the remaining Sky Water King and the Sea Swallowing King, the two of them have always been at odds, even if they are forced to join forces, their battle prowess will certainly be far less powerful than us, I promise, as long as you join forces with me, I, Wei Shu, will go all out in the entire battle, absolutely not using the lives of allies to exchange for victory, how about that?” ” What a touching proposal, however, I won’t trust anyone else. The Ghost Eye King and I have been good friends for hundreds of years yet he would still betray me for profit, let alone you?” The Demon Doctor Wei Jing Lue kept away his Divine grade dagger which was black as ink and took the lead, declining the offer of Wei Shu to join hands.

“Well, we have time, take your time to consider my offer.” Wei Shu was not in a hurry, this alliance was not that important to him and he could do without it as well.

As long as, when the need arises, there is an ally to lend a hand.

At that time, not only himself, but also the Demon Doctor Wei Jing Lue will definitely need a hand, the alliance will naturally be formed then. On the battlefield, Wei Shu had experienced this kind of thing countless times and was completely familiar with how it would end up..
