On the verge of walking out of the Rain Valley maze, Wei Shu suddenly heard an extremely soft sound.

Although the sound was greatly muffled by the wind and rain, Wei Shu could be sure that this, was the Ghost Eye King.

chapters.title: Chapter 779.2 - [Assault, Murder Mystery]
chapters.body:
Chapter 779.2 - [Assault, Murder Mystery]

Chapter 779.2 [Assault, Murder Mystery]

If he was able to counterattack successfully and critically wound the Ghost-eye King, he believed that the Demon Doctor Wei Jing Lue would definitely believe in his sincerity.

Whether it’s to reach an alliance or to eliminate a potential rival, any of those reasons is worth taking action for. Deputy Palace Lord Wei Shu was secretly on guard, the next attack would definitely be the Ghost-eye King’s sneak attack, if it was not in this law-filled Rain Valley, but somewhere else, then Wei Shu could wait for the Ghost-eye King’s attack with complete confidence. Because, with his strength as a Deputy Palace Lord, it would be more than enough to deal with a king-level expert… Unfortunately, in this Rain Valley, his strength was greatly reduced.

Of course, the Ghost Eye King certainly had greater limitations as well.

How should he seize this opportunity to strike with all his might and critically injure the Ghost Eye King?

The Ghost-eyed King is very strong, and is especially proficient in spirit attacks. As long as anyone looks at his eyes, they will be affected to varying degrees, for those with weaker strength, it is even possible for the Ghost-eyed King to directly use his Ghost-eye to destroy the spirit, meting out an instant kill.

But the Ghost Eye King also has a weakness, and that is that his eyes can suffer wounds in particularly bright places.

And Deputy Palace Lord Wei Shu just happened to know this particular weakness of his.

“Hoo-hoo!”

It was like the sound of the wind but also like the sound of rain.

However, Wei Shu understood in his heart that this was the sound of wind and rain that the Ghost-eyed King had imitated, and this was the beginning of the opponent’s sneak attack!

Ghost Eyed King, I’ve been waiting for you for a long time! In a flash, Deputy Palace Lord Wei Shu burst out his full force, his body shone like the sun, and his light was like a strong blast, passing through the rain curtain and directly illuminating the entire Rain Valley, blinding everybody to a point where they could not keep their eyes open. In both his right and left hands, Deputy Palace Lord Wei Shu formed two balls of light that was comparable to two mini suns and merged them together.

At the instance he turned around, Wei Shu shot the “Sunsphere” towards the shadow that was rushing towards his back: “Ghost Eyed King, quietly become a blind man!

The Sunsphere exploded with a bang.

The impact of the explosion caused the entire Rain Valley to shudder, the blinding rays causing the heavens and earth to lose their colour.

The dazzling flash filled the Rain Valley for a long time.

It wasn’t until three minutes later before it faded back to what it was.

Demon Doctor Wei Jing Lue originally didn’t want to cause any trouble, but he couldn’t curb his curiosity and wanted to see how powerful the Deputy Palace Lord of the Central Palace Hall was. He wanted to see whether a King-level Heaven Ranker could receive such a powerful blow. Would the Ghost Eyed King be utterly defeated or would he be able to fight on even terms with Deputy Palace Lord Wei Shu?

The sight that appeared before his eyes shocked him.

Shocked beyond belief!

For a long time, Demon Doctor Wei Jing Lue stood frozen on the spot as if struck by thunder, his brain was numb and could not think properly.

It was unknown when, but three shadows had silently glided towards the back of Demon Doctor Wei Jing Lue, they originally wanted to take this opportunity to kill the Demon Doctor, but who would have expected that after looking at the events that took place, the shadows immediately stopped in disbelief and also froze, for a long time not knowing how to react. In front of the four of them, the surrounding valley had exploded into a huge circle, and except for the perimeter protected by the power of the law, the ground had completely exploded into a huge pit with no sign of its bottom.

At the center of the pit, there was a lone pole.

There was a man standing on that pole.

It was Deputy Palace Lord Wei Shu.

Wei Shu was still in the position of swinging his Sunsphere at the enemy, however, he was dead.

Wei Shu who didn’t even know when he died still had a smug look on his face, as if visualizing the Ghost-eyed King turning into a blind man. Yet, he had died……there were no wounds on his body, apart from his eyes which had lost the luster of a living person, apart from his body which did not have a speck of life in it, everything else looked normal, even the treasures he was wearing was still helping him keep his balance.

Who killed Wei Shu from the Central Palace Hall?

This was a Deputy Palace Lord who had the strength of a peak Heaven Rank 6, somebody even more powerful than a King-level Heaven Ranker. Yet he had died in this Rain Valley without a word, who has the ability to do this in a single stroke?

The Demon Doctor’s face was horrified.

He couldn’t imagine.

Wei Shu, outwardly looked unharmed. But inside his body, there were at least three fatal injuries. The first one is the energy crystal in his head, which has been completely shattered, without which Wei Shu cannot fight: the second one is the magic heart, which has been removed, and similarly, without the magic heart, even if Wei Shu was not dead, his body would not be able to function; the third one is the fatal star point which connects the body and the spirit, which had just been circulated by Wei Shu to his arm, yet had been discovered by the enemy and destroyed. This way, even if Wei Shu has a thousand treasures to protect his body, even if he had resurrection crystals, it is impossible for him to revive. Because even his spirit had been completely annihilated. An extremely tall, lean shadow drifted forward, its voice as cold and ugly as ice.

“Ghost Eye King, wasn’t it you who did that?” The leftmost of the three shadows that had joined forces cried out in alarm.

“Ridiculous, Six Pan King, do you think that I, Ghost Eye, can kill the Deputy Palace Lord of the Central Palace Hall? If I had that kind of strength, why would I have to come here to risk my life, wouldn’t it be easier to directly march up to the Central Palace Hall and challenge a Deputy Palace Lord, would that not be better?” The extremely tall, thin and long Ghost-Eyed King faced the others with his back and had his eyes closed.

“If you didn’t do it, who could it be?” One of the three shadows asked out of doubt.

“There must be someone else here, maybe even more than one.” The shadow on the far right of the three shadows made a judgment.

“Being able to easily kill Wei Shu before we arrived, this person must at least have King-level strength, now it’s our turn to be in danger.” Demon Doctor Wei Jing Lue started to laugh maniacally, “Shiver and shake for your lives, inside this ancient ruins all our lives are worthless, the death of a Deputy Palace Lord from the Central Palace Hall is nothing, even the death of a few King-level Heaven Rankers would be nothing! In front of a real expert, we are nothing more than slightly larger crickets, hahaha!”

“That’s enough, the person who killed the Deputy Palace Lord of the Central Palace Hall is not necessarily our enemy.” Ghost Eyed King laughed coldly: “I think the only thing we have to worry about now is the Central Palace Hall, now they have completely found an excuse to send troops into the ancient ruins.”

In the Shrine Sanctuary of the Snowfield Camp, there was a man cloaked in a cloak of concealment.

When he saw the crystal ball on the table shattering soundlessly into pieces, he immediately stood up and waved his hand to the elders of the divine temple who were standing respectfully outside the door, and gave an order: “Wei Shu that pathfinder has really been slaughtered. Give the order to set out immediately, in the name of avenging our comrade, slaughter all Heaven Rankers inside the ancient ruins. As for the campsite outside, after we leave, let those scum from the Dark Realm attack immediately…….the Western Heaven Realm has been peaceful for far too long!

chapters.title: Chapter 780.1 - [The Best Choice]
chapters.body:
Chapter 780.1 - [The Best Choice]

Chapter 780.1 [The Best Choice]

When the man in the cloak of concealment, leading the six elders, came to the place where Wei Shu had died.

His judgement was the complete opposite of those of the Ghost Eye King and Demon Doctor and others before him.

“Wei Shu definitely did not die from three fatal blows, but from the power of the law.” The man in the cloak of concealment laughed coldly, “The man who killed him was an illusionist.”

“The power of Law?” The six elders were astonished beyond words, were there strong experts who understood the power of the law in Rain Valley and making an enemy of the Central Palace Hall?

“It is not that the enemy knows how to use the power of the law, but that he uses illusions. This illusionist used illusions to deceive Wei Shu and put him in a situation where he would be punished by the power of law without realizing it, what really killed Wei Shu was the power of law here. When Wei Shu was killed by Rain Valley’s Power of Law, this enemy, then transported Wei Shu’s body here…this place that Wei Shu is standing right now is definitely not the scene of murer. As for the three fatal wounds, it was a clue that this illusionist had deliberately left, intending to carry out a kind of deception, in order to make us suspect that there was a King-level Heaven Ranker that killed Wei Shu. In fact, this was not the work of a King-ranked Heaven Ranker. I am ninety percent certain that this is the work of the Ghost Eye King who sneaked in, while there’s also a ten percent chance that it’s the Six Pan King who likes to remain neutral but hides his strength and who is very scheming.” With a wave of his hand, the man wearing the cloak of concealment gave the order to the six elders: “Form into groups of two, if you meet the Ghost-Eyed King, kill him without hesitation.”

“Yes.” The six elders immediately received the order and sprinted away like lightning.

The man, cloaked in a cloak of concealment, however, stood his ground.

Looking at the dead body of Deputy Palace Lord Wei Shu which was still standing.

Standing there for a long time without leaving.

Ten minutes later, this man let out a faint sigh, ”Forgive me, Wei Shu, I actually didn’t want to kill you, with your ability, you can still be a competent Deputy Palace Lord. Unfortunately, there are too many secrets that you know, some things may let you think you can save your life if you know them, but in fact, on the contrary, when you know them, you give others no choice but to kill you!”

He held up his golden, glittering right hand.

And cut through the head of Wei Shu like a knife through tofu.

The head of Wei Shu immediately fell, and at the moment the head fell into the abyss, the man in the cloak of concealment flicked his fingers a little.

A wisp of golden light entered the falling human head, and the entire human head immediately exploded, turning into tens of millions of bone fragments. Inside the head was a golden orb that seemed to contain another Wei Shu.

The man in the cloak of concealment, with a beckon of the hand grasped the golden orb that was summoned to his direction.

With a light grip.

The golden orb shattered.

The golden Wei Shu inside turned into white smoke and escaped, but without waiting for it to dissipate in the sky, all the smoke was sucked into the man wearing the robe of concealment.

Wei Shu’s body was no longer able to maintain a standing posture, it fell limply and toppled into the deep pit.

The mysterious man who sucked all of the white smoke no longer looked at Wei Shu’s corpse and left by himself.

Even under the restrictions of the law, his technique was flawless.

Gracefully striding into the air and floating away.

In just the time of a thought, he had disappeared thousands of meters away.

As if waiting for this mysterious man to leave, the surrounding landscape suddenly started to change.

The original pillar and deep pits in the ground instantly disappeared without a trace, allowing the ground which had previously been flattened by the impact of the blast to return to the original landscape of the Rain Valley maze. The most bizarre thing was that someone who had clearly been killed showed up now.

Wei Shu, who should have died twice, suddenly snapped and fell into the muddy water on the ground, panting heavily.

In his eyes.

It was filled with fear and hatred.

“Now, are you willing to join forces with me?” Yue Yang appeared at the side of Deputy Palace Lord Wei Shu, and the dazzling smile on his face as well as the dangerous glint in the corner of his eyes sent shivers down the back of Wei Shu.

Wei Shu had experienced ‘two deaths’ in just a short couple of hours.

The process of witnessing one’s own ‘death’ is a nightmare that will last for a lifetime.

When caught In the other’s domain earlier, Wei Shu realised that he was like a string puppet, his body was not free to make decisions at all, regardless of what actions his body took, while in the domain, they were all the worst possible actions that could have been taken. When he gave up the struggle and grimly closed his eyes waiting to die, the eccentric man in the strange mask didn’t actually make a move, instead making an illusion of ‘killing’ him.

Next, the Demon Doctor, the Ghost Eye King, the Six Pan King, and others came and looked at his ‘dead’ corpse.

In fact, Wei Shu was at their side, watching together.

That dead corpse was only an illusion.

Even for King-level Heaven Rankers, in this strange domain that was completely fused with Rain Valley, did not notice any abnormality at all, and really thought that he had been killed by a King-level Heaven Ranker.

Next, it was his own boss… No one could have imagined that after seeing his dead body, this boss, who is usually kind and helpful to himself, would immediately turn his back on him. Instead of saving himself who still had the Spirit Pearl Guardian guarding his spirit in his head, he ‘killed’ himself again. It can be said that the one who really finished him off was not anybody else, but rather his own superior.

chapters.title: Chapter 780.2 - The Best Choice
chapters.body:
Chapter 780.2 - The Best Choice

Chapter 780.2 [The Best Choice]

As soon as they reached the rank of Patriarch, His Holiness, or Deputy Palace Lord of the Central Palace Hall, the Palace Hall would grant them the ‘Spirit Pearl Guardian’ to ensure that the elite backbones of the Palace Hall would not easily die in battle.

The only people who knew of this secret were their own people.

However, instead of rescuing him, his superior destroyed his own Spirit Pearl Guardian in one fell swoop.

Once his Spirit Pearl Guardian shatters, he would be annihilated forever, there is absolutely no possibility of survival. Thinking about this, Wei Shu winced again, it seemed that he knew too many secrets. Even more terrifying was the fact that he had reached the point where he must die and is not yet aware of it. All the bullshit about sending him out to do a preliminary investigation were all lies! The truth was that they had sent him out to die in order for them to have a concrete reason to send out their troops!

Resentment arose in the heart of Wei Shu.

An eye for an eye, a tooth for a tooth… Since you can strike out and smash my Spirit Pearl Guardian, then don’t blame me for stabbing you in the back.

He gritted his teeth darkly and made a decision in his heart.

He chose to submit to this mysterious man before him.

Promising to his conditions.

“I want to get my revenge, I only have this one condition.” Deputy Palace Lord Wei Shu spoke out the hope in his heart, even though knowing that he didn’t have much qualification to talk about conditions in front of the other party. Being able to use his domain to have one like Wei Shu dance in his palm might still not be considered as perverted, but being able to use his domain to deceive the Ghost Eye King, the Demon Doctor, the Six Pan King… and even to deceive his own boss was simply too scary. Such an ability was simply beyond his comprehension. After witnessing his own two ‘deaths’, Wei Shu was completely unable to resist.

On the surface, the man with the odd mask on his face looked young and weak.

He didn’t even seem to be a Heaven Ranker.

However, this young man, who seemed to not be a Heaven Ranker, had an aura of an expert that pressed down on him.

This, is the true divine expert! If he just relied on his eyes, then he would never be able to see through the truly powerful ones!

“Spare me the superfluous words, just remember one thing, listen to me, and when you leave this place, you will be a Palace Lord.” Yue Yang threw out a bait. If he had wanted to quickly kill off Deputy Palace Lord Wei Shu, it would be no easy feat, but to control him, with the [World Creation] Domain of Power he comprehended at the Gates of Life and Death, combined with the power of Law, it was simply too easy.

Yue Yang’s ploy was not to strike and kill, but to deter and counteract each other.

A two-pronged approach.

Sure enough, this risky move succeeded in making this Deputy Palace Lord, who held resentment in his heart, explode out the hatred deep inside his heart.

To become an absolute pawn for others was already a very strong mental blow, what more having to witness your superior cold-bloodedly crushing your own Spirit Pearl Guardian, this would completely break down all resistance to being controlled.

Wei Shu might not have the guts to betray the Central Palace Hall, but if Yue Yang gave him a promise that he would be able to backstab his boss without betraying the Central Palace Hall, there was absolutely no way that he could refuse. Yue Yang had thrown out a bait that was enough to even tempt a Palace Lord, and if Deputy Palace Lord Wei Shu was not tempted, it would be too fake. Under such circumstances, Wei Shu was shocked, scared, angry and filled with hatred at the same time. Finally, gritting his teeth, he promised Yue Yang.

“I’m at your service, at your command.” Wei Shu, as a high and mighty Deputy Palace Lord, lowered his head.

“No need to show your loyalty to me, Palace Lord Wei Shu, I don’t need your allegiance, there is a more flexible cooperation between you and me, and that is joining hands.” Yue Yang smiled, “Exploring the ancient ruins and searching for ancient relics is not my goal. Or perhaps, if after going through all the places and you still couldn’t get the God’s Blood, I will give you a drop depending on your performance. God’s Blood and Martial Spirits, things that are far beyond your reach, are not a problem for me. Remember this, Palace Lord Wei Shu, opportunity and risk go hand in hand, and reward is always in direct proportion to effort.”

Upon hearing this, Wei Shu immediately raised his head.

Looking at this peculiar man who looked like a demon himself, he wouldn’t have believed a word if it had been someone else talking to him like that.

But the young man before him was peculiar, clearly an enemy, at least not one of his own, yet spoke so convincingly.

This is not a mental illusion.

Rather, it is self-confidence that is built upon the foundations of strength.

Wei Shu sensibly told himself that he shouldn’t trust a stranger easily, but he fervently nodded his head, agreeing to what the other person had said.

“Suppose, you could give me God’s Blood. Then I can do anything for you.” Wei Shu’s words contained his utmost sincerity, for this anything included the Central Palace Hall. When he finished, he had a bit of regret in his heart, in case he really had to betray the Central Palace Hall in the future, could he do it? But this was God’s Blood they were talking about, with God’s Blood, one can shed one’s own bones and be reborn… Most importantly, after this matter is over, can he still return to the Central Palace Hall? If only he was able to escape, then he was afraid that he, this ‘dead man’, would be executed by the Grand Palace Lord in front of the public and become a real dead man.

What should he do from now onwards?

Wei Shu’s heart was in turmoil.

However, his gut feeling and his senses told him that choosing to work together with this young man in front of him.

Whatever the future outcome, it would be for the best.

Although the entire predicament he was currently in was actually caused by this young man, and it could be said that it was he who had caused him his current misery, it was ironic that right now, this young man was the only one he could truly believe in!

“I shall do as you command!” Thinking of this, Wei Shu’s heart firmly settled and his eyes regained their clarity.

After leaving Rain Valley would be a different matter, but right here, he chose to listen to Yue Yang.

Working together with an expert, is always the best choice to make!

chapters.title: Chapter 781.1 - [Little Monster And Old Monster]
chapters.body:
Chapter 781.1 - [Little Monster And Old Monster]

Chapter 781.1 [Little Monster and Old Monster]

Enduring the howling winds and torrential rain, they finally reached the end of Rain Valley.

Here, there was a particularly strange looking rain shelter. Among the countless buildings of the Heaven Realm, Wei Shu had never seen a building of this form, it was open on all sides with only four pillars supporting the octagonal pavilion. Inside, there was an old man who seemed to be sitting down to have a drink.

Only when walking closer, would they realize something was wrong.

This old man was not sitting, but half-sitting, half-standing. He was in this position because his body below his waist had turned to stone, he was unable to stand or sit, but from a distance it looked as if he was sitting. In fact, this half-sitting, half-standing posture, in which you can’t sit down, and even more so, you can’t stand up, is the most exhausting, and it would have been worse than death for this old man to keep this posture for a long time.

In front of this man with fossilized legs, a wine jug and a cup were placed.

The wine jug and cup were placed at the center of the table and looked as if anybody could reach out and take them easily.

However, the jug and the cup were just out of the reach of this old man, and even if he strained his body with all his might, his fingers could not even brush against the jug and the cup, narrowly missing them by a breath.

Being unable to sit down, or to stand up; to look at the wine in front of you, yet unable to reach the jug and pour a drink… This kind of punishment may not seem like much on the surface, but when you think about it, it is the most cruel punishment in the world. When Wei Shu saw this, he felt shivers on his back once again, if one day he was forced to bear such punshiment, he might as well commit suicide. Of course, he also understood that the expert who punished this old man in such a manner would definitely not give the old man a chance to commit suicide, so in this case, it was actually already worse than then death. One might fear death, but facing such never-ending torment, Wei Shu would still prefer death, after all death would pass by immediately, but such torment would last forever.

“Old-timer, please have a drink.” Wei Shu was unable to free the old man from his half-fossilised state as it had to do with the power of law in this place, if he tried to forcefully free the old man, not only would he not be able to save him, but he himself might even turn into stone also.

But, to pour a glass of wine for the old man.

Can still be done easily.

It would be too easy if such a simple action could be exchanged for information about how to leave Rain Valley from the old man.

Wei Shu bowed his head and did not dare to look at Yue Yang behind him, before respectfully pouring a glass of wine for the old man in front of him, whose legs had been fossilized, and served it to him with both hands.

That old man should have been a deprived drunkard, he immediately snatched the cup of wine.

Threw back his neck and gulped down the wine in a hurry.

It’s done.

Wei Shu felt like he had finally made some contributions, any opportunity to serve ‘Third Young Master’ must not be missed. Could he let ‘Third Young Master’ do something like pouring wine for the old man? He naturally couldn’t, he himself must do these menial tasks! The next thing would be how to obtain information from the old man, how to get him to reveal to them the secret of leaving this Rain Valley.

“Ahhhhhhhh!”

The Old man screamed miserably, and his originally red and lively face turned dead black.

Black blood spilled out of his eyes and nostrils, revealing a look of severe poisoning as if he would suffocate and die at any moment.

“I didn’t do it, I didn’t do anything!” Wei Shu was startled and hurriedly pleaded with Yue Yang. It must have been the Demon Doctor, Ghost Eye King, etc. who passed by before and put poison in the cup, otherwise, he had done nothing himself, how could the old man get poisoned? But what made Wei Shu feel suspicious was that when he first took the cup, he had already scanned the cup for poison and found it to contain none, otherwise he would not have offered it to the old man to drink, therefore how could the old man be poisoned immediately after drinking from the cup?

“Stupid.” Yue Yang grunted coldly, “This is the power of punishment.”

As soon as Yue Yang spoke, Wei Shu thoroughly understood.

It was not that his hands were problematic.

It also wasn’t the Demon Doctor and the others who poisoned the old man, but the punishing power of the law that was at work, no matter who took pity on the old man and poured wine for him, the wine that went into his throat would become poisonous wine. That is to say, even if the old man had wine to drink, he would not be better off, rather he would be even more miserable and painful!

Wei Shu’s act of pouring wine was a good act on the surface, but in reality, it only added to the torment of the old man.

“Yes, yes, I was reckless.”

Thinking about this, Wei Shu sweated and almost fainted.

Even in the Central Palace Hall, he himself was considered to be a superior being of high intelligence, how could he make such a mistake?

The old man coughed for a long time, as if he were about to cough out his lungs.

After a long period of time.

Only then did it stop.

His facial expressions gradually returned to normal, his eyes regained a little bit of clarity and he no longer looked liked on the brink of death like before. He coughed painfully while waving his hands, “No, it’s okay, I haven’t had a drink for a long time and have been yearning for it for a long time. I was really yearning for it, and I can’t die anyway so having one drink is fine. You guys are also training right, there were many warriors of your strength who came here to train in the past, but not as many now……..The conditions to pass through the Rain Valley is actually very simple. you just need to catch a live Lightning Rain Swallow and return within a day’s time, and then release it on top of this rain shelter.”

The Lightning Rain Swallow was a special class of flying war beast with very fast flying speeds.

It flies in the sky all year-round.

Even when it is sleeping, it doesn’t stop flying, and if there are no special circumstances, it hardly ever stops flying.

In the Heaven Realm, this bird is also known as the ‘footless swallow’. What was even stranger was that despite this lightning rain swallow’s good fighting strength and fast flying speed, it was very cowardly. War beasts that were much weaker than it could scare it into fleeing away, and if it were captured by a powerful war beast or warrior, it would most likely die of fear on the spot.

Therefore, many warriors in the Heaven Realm also called it the ‘Gutless Swallow’.

With the strength of Wei Shu, it would not be very difficult to catch a Lightning Rain Swallow, even though he was forbidden to fly in this Rain Valley.

But to bring it back alive and release it on top of this rain shelter would be a little difficult… Wei Shu looked at Yue Yang and realising that he had no indication of expressing his opinion, Wei Shu just waved his hand and hurried out of the pavilion to look for the Lightning Rain Swallow.

It seemed that not only was he required to bring back live Lightning Rain Swallows, he had to bring back two of them as well!

With Third Young Masters identity, would he personally go and capture Lightning Rain Swallows?

It was impossible to even think about it!

The moment Wei Shu thought about this, he hurried out, focusing his thoughts on how exactly was he supposed to capture live Lightning Rain Swallows?

chapters.title: Chapter 781.2 - [Little Monster And Old Monster
chapters.body:
Chapter 781.2 - [Little Monster And Old Monster

Chapter 781.2 [Little Monster and Old Monster]

Yue Yang waited for Wei Shu to leave, after which, not sparing the old man a glance, he sat down on the stone bench in the pavilion and picked up the wine jar, directly pouring wine into his mouth……..The old man’s eyes almost fell out in envy and his hands started to shake. However, Yue Yang ignored him like he did not exist, drinking mouthful after mouthful, and drank nearly half of the wine in the jug, only when half a jug of wine was left, did Yue Yang let out a burp.

“This is bad wine, very spicy and on top of that hard to drink.” Yue Yang poured the rest of the wine from the jug onto the ground in front of the old man.

“You’re such a fool, this is a Hundred Fruits Brew, a fine wine made from a hundred kinds of fresh fruits from the Heaven Realm, it’s also a top ten ranked wine in the Heaven Realm, how can it be hard to drink! Besides, if it’s that bad, why have you drunk so much of it? Even if you drink all of it I wouldn’t say a word, but why do you waste such good stuff!” When he saw Yue Yang pouring the wine onto the ground, his heart was simply broken.

“Because I feel like it!” The tone of Yue yYang was similar to that of a good for nothing young master.

“I really don’t know what to do with you, if you don’t want to drink it and really have to pour it away, you might as well pour it into my mouth!” The old man had no choice but to throw away his pride to beg Yue Yang.

”This wine is poisonous to you, didn’t you just scream a lot? You still want to drink?” Yue Yang didn’t turn around, but stopped pouring wine onto the ground, seemingly wanting to listen to whatever reason the old man could come up with.

“It turns out that you saw through it…… that’s right, I will get poisoned even if I don’t drink the wine, I will have to go through being poisoned a fixed 10 times everyday. The wine merely reacted with the poison lurking in my body, causing it to react faster that’s all. It won’t die anyway, just let me drink it. Furthermore, it’s me who’s suffering from the poison, not you!” The old man was suggesting that he wouldn’t die after drinking the wine, but even if he would die after drinking the wine he would still drink it, it would even be better if he could be drowned alive in a wine tank.

“That won’t do, I don’t have many good virtues, but I still have some compassion, and I generally don’t do things that are harmful to others.” if what Yue Yang had said were to be heard by Princess Xixi and the rest, they would definitely not agree.

“Young man, don’t be so compassionate!” The old man hurriedly persuaded, “Letting me drink again is a relief to me, at least spiritually!”

“What good is it to me to give you a drink?” Yue Yang asked again.

He expressed himself as a person who would never do anything without benefit.

What is detrimental to others can still be done, but being detrimental to others yet totally not beneficial to himself? Absolutely not!

The old man choked when he heard Yue Yang’s question. This son of a bitch, he had too much of a character, the old man had lived for so long, yet he really had never seen this kind of person entering the Rain Valley. He was obviously very young, yet was very bold, and most of all, he was incredibly stubborn and headstrong, which made it much more difficult to deal with than one would think. But the more character Yue Yang had, the more interested the old man became in Yue Yang and stopped discussing about drinking and asked instead, “Whose family are you from?”

Yue Yang spoke up, “One of the four great clans, the Yue family.”

The old man asked incomprehensibly, “I’ve heard of the Four Great Clans, but it seems there is no Yue Family!”

Yue Yang criticized, ”How could there not be? What era is your version of that? Not updated at all, these four great families of mine are the four great families of the present!”

The old man immediately cried out when he heard it, “So you’re not a member of the real Four Great Clans, I thought so too, with the quality of the Four Great Clans, how could they have raised such an ill-tempered monster, it turns out you’re an imposter! Okay, okay, you’re not an impostor, we’re not going to discuss this, where you came from has nothing to do with me! I’m only curious now, you’re only in your twenties, how did you manage to cultivate into Supreme Innate? Who on earth is it that has the power to make a child become so powerful!”

“I’m still at the threshold of Supreme Innate!” Yue Yang waved his hand with faked modesty and brought up the issue of his master: “Speaking of my Master, if I tell you, I promise to scare you half to death!”

“Really? Who is it?” When he heard it, the old man’s breathing sped up, and his face lit up as if he had guessed a few possible answers.

“My master is named Shui Dong Liu, and is the Vice Principle of Ivy Academy and specializes in space teleportation, having spent long years researching how to improve space scrolls into teleportation crystal balls, shortening teleportation time and increasing teleportation distance.

“When did you run up from the Tong Tian Tower? Wasn’t that gate to the Heaven Realm sealed?” The old man seemed to know a little about the outside world.

“Your news is so outdated, what you have heard is all stale news or yesteryear.” Yue Yang unceremoniously criticized, ”If i can’t come from the main gate of Heaven Realm, can’t I come in through the back door?” As long as there is a back door, it’s much easier to take the back route than the regular route!”

“You know of a back door?” The old man asked curiously, ”Who do you know? Don’t tell me that kid, Prison Emperor, is still alive? Was he the one who sent you up here?”

“……” Yue Yang started to sweat, it was his first time hearing others refer to the Prison Emperor as ‘that kid’.

“Hey, hey, wait, I know, you’re Fei Wen Li, that young girl’s apprentice, that’s right, that girl snatched a Three Realm compass from my unlucky old friend back then, presumably she has given that compass to you. If it wasn’t for your hidden Snake Demon Imperial energy, I wouldn’t have guessed it! Not bad, little monster, you’re actually a disciple of Fei Wen Li that girl. Eh wait a minute, wasn’t she sealed by someone? She’s broke out? How unfair, the bad things I’ve done are not even half as much as her, and it’s so unfair that I’m still suffering here while she has broken free, this is just too unfair!” The more he said, the more aggrieved he felt.

“Even if you keep pretending to cry, I still won’t save you.” Yue Yang recovered from the initial shock in his heart. As expected, this old man was the kind of ancient existence he had guessed him to be, his mind surged, but his facial expressions remained neutral, from his storage ring, he took out a bottle of Qilan wine, carefully poured a glass, and started to sip it slowly.

“Even if you wanted to save me, you don’t have that ability…hey, what kind of wine are you drinking, it’s so fragrant, ah, it’s almost killing me, give me a sip, please pour some for me!” The old man opened his mouth wide, a pathetic look of a hopeless drunkard on his face.

“No way.” Yue Yang flatly refused.

“Oi oi oi, anyhow I’m still your senior, is this the way a junior treats his senior?” The old man hurriedly brought out his seniority.

“Is it really a senior? Name, place of origin, country, nationality, date of birth, ID number, etc. give me all your info!” Yue Yang immediately brought out the air of an immigration officer and acted as if wanting to check for the old man’s credentials, causing the old to fall into a daze.

He had only seen seniors questioning juniors before, and had never seen juniors questioning seniors in such a manner.

Today, finally, he had seen it all.

The old man started to sweat while replying: “Little monster, this Old Master is the same as you, as long as you are not blind, you can see, don’t play dumb with Old Master.”

Yue Yang replied in a straightforward manner, ”Old monster, don’t be so sure, you must know that there are many liars in this world, some cheat for food, some cheat for money, and even some cheat for sex, I have to be sure of your identity, otherwise if will let you abduct me into a pyramid scheme, I might even have to count money for you! Even if we are considered to be slightly familiar with each other, these are unrelated, your id number is still required…your name? your gender?”

The old man shouted with a headache, “I’ll kill myself! After 20,000 years being sealed here, this is the first time I’ve had suicidal thoughts! Which hole did you pop out from, you this little monster?”

chapters.title: Chapter 782.1 - [Calculations, Greatest Setback Of My Life]
chapters.body:
Chapter 782.1 - [Calculations, Greatest Setback Of My Life]

Chapter 782.1 [Calculations, Greatest Setback of My Life]

“You make people feel suspicious.”

Yue Yang put on a Sherlock Holmes face, as if ready to investigate the case and raised a doubtful point, “You said that you have been imprisoned here for 20,000 years, let’s first put aside the credibility of this point, but how did you know about the Prison Emperor and Empress Fei Wen Li if you really had been imprisoned here for 20,000 years?”

The old man replied calmly, ”Both the Prison Emperor and Fei Wen Li have come in for the trials before, you say I can’t know them both? The last two or three thousand years have been boring. This place used to be very busy. What did you say? Trials? No, there has been nobody who successfully completed the entire trial, not even the Prison Emperor or Fei Wen Li, both of whom you seem to worship, correct. They did not pass all ten stages, the Prison Emperor seemed to have completed eight stages, while Fei Wen Li that little girl was a bit better, passing the ninth stage and managed to reach the tenth stage but because some conditions were not met, she could not complete it and finally gave up. Little monster, let me tell you a secret, this trial is much harder than the Gate of Life and Death on the tenth floor of the Tong Tian Tower, the conditions for a full completion require not only strength, but also courage.”

Yue Yang grunted coldly and retorted, “The Heaven Realm is so wide and there are as many experts as there are stars in the skies, yet there is not a single one who has both strength and courage?”

The old man was very happy: “Kid, you might not believe it yet, but that is the way things are. Sometimes those who have strength do not necessarily have courage; while those who have courage do not necessarily have strength; and those who have both do not necessarily have luck.

“Luck?”

Yue Yang fell silent.

If the old man had said something else, Yue Yang would definitely have retorted.

But what he said was luck, and this cannot be questioned, because luck is an invisible being, and possessing it or not, even for the exact same person, would produce very different results. A person can be without strength and even without courage, but he definitely cannot be without luck…..

When the old man saw that Yue Yang was silent, he couldn’t help but tease him, “One look at you and It’s clear that you are not a lucky kid, you who have grown up amidst hardships, how would you know what luck is, haha.”

Yue Yang sweated again as he listened, if this was said to someone else, it might still be a bit reasonable.

But to say that to him, it would make others sweat profusely.

In fact, even Yue Yang himself had to admit that if they were comparing luck, there was no one more fortunate than him, not in the whole Tong Tian Tower or even the entire Heaven Realm.

The old man felt that Yue Yang already had such a strong strength at such a young age and probably had been strictly brought up by his master, forcing him to train day and night without rest, this upbringing was simply too bitter … … who could expect that it wasn’t the case with Yue Yang at all. His training, although there were also some periods where he trained bitterly, but he mostly relied on all kinds of enlightenment and fortuitous encounters. Yue Yang’s training was thousands of times faster than the average person. In addition to his own outstanding talent and incredible speed of enlightenment, he was also blessed with the different inheritance from the Sword Spirit Goddess, Fourth Mother, and Empress Fei Wen Li.

In a word, the old man had looked at Yue Yang and made a deduction based on his experience on gauging normal people, but this time he had made a mistake.

Yue Yang smiled.

He wasn’t going to jump out and laugh crazily while proclaiming himself as a lucky baby…this kind of bragging and foolishness was probably something only Fatty Hai would do!

“Go in and challenge yourself and see how many stages you can pass. This Rain Valley of mine is the easiest stage, every time you break through a stage, the difficulty will increase several times, after reaching the sixth stage, that difficulty is simply on a perverted level, if you can break through to the sixth stage, it is already enough for you to gain a bit of fame in the Heaven Realm.” The old man said that although successfully completing the first three stages were the minimum requirements to qualify as having completed these trials, the real difficulty only started after the sixth stage, and only those who were able to pass six stages and above were considered as the real experts.

“What will be the reward for passing all the stages?” Yue Yang felt that if there was a divine weapon reward, even if he had to spend some time to challenge it, it would be worthwhile.

“Don’t dream, even Fei Wen Li, that little girl couldn’t challenge the tenth stage.” The old man shook his head and waved his hand again: ”You kid, are not even as strong as me, do you know how many stages I broke back then? I broke through six stages and got stuck on the seventh, never able to pass it.”

“Old man, I have something you don’t.” Yue Yang laughed, a smug look on his face, “Just because you can’t pass the seventh stage doesn’t mean others can’t.”

“What do you mean? You mean you’re smarter than me?” The old man laughed coldly, “Young man, don’t think that just because you’re a little smart, you can bullshit as you like.”

“How about, let’s compete a little.” Yue Yang stretched out his hands and challenged the old man.

“It’s time for you to learn how to respect your seniors.” The old man rubbed his fists.

“Don’t cry your nose off when you lose and say I’m bullying the old, the weak and the sick when I beat you…” Yue Yang’s attitude made the old man gape, he had seen a lot of proud juniors, but he hadn’t seen anything more infuriating than Yue Yang.

chapters.title: Chapter 782.2 - Calculations, Greatest Setback Of My Life
chapters.body:
Chapter 782.2 - Calculations, Greatest Setback Of My Life

Chapter 782.2 [Calculations, Greatest Setback of My Life]

“Let’s not compete in things that I’m good at in case you complain that I bully you later, let’s compete with something simple.” The old man suddenly gave an example: “1 times 9 plus 2 equals 11, 12 times 9 plus 3 equals 111…and so on, 123456789 times 9 plus how much equals 1,111,111,111? How about it my friend, I shall give you ten minutes, please calculate it out.”

“This is so simple.” Without batting an eyelid, Yue Yang immediately spelled out the answer, “Plus ten.”

“What?” The old man was stunned.

“Please come up with something harder, I’m sick to death of solving something so shallow like kindergarten level.” The old man was stunned by Yue Yang, whose tone was simply asking for a beating right now.

“How did you figure that out?” The old man did not understand, this was such a troublesome question with so much calculation, how could this kid be able to give the answer at once?

“No explanation.” Yue Yang struck a pose of gazing into the starry skies at a 45 degree angle like a superhero.

“Just now, you were just lucky and managed to guess the correct answer, even if you were a genius, it would be impossible for you to calculate the answer in one second,” the old man firmly believed in his heart, without knowing the correct answer beforehand and calculating by heart, it was impossible to come up with the answer immediately. He resolved to make a few more questions, and strike this arrogant kid in front of him down a few pegs, he pondered slightly in his mind, before tossing out another question, “1 times 1 equals 1, 11 times 11 equals 121, 111,111,111 times 111,111,111 equals how much, answer immediately, don’t spend time to think if you can…….”

“Equivalent to 12345678987654321. “Yue Yang said the answer immediately, without even spending a second to think.

“No way!” the old man was stunned.

“How much does it take to multiply 123456789 into 987654321?” The old man asked incredulously.

“Multiply by 8, then plus 9. “Yue Yang shrugged dashingly, indicating that this was too easy, senior, you can still come up with some more difficult questions, right?

“How do you know the answer? Fei Wen Li that little girl’s test was not at all like mine, these were my questions, how do you know the answer?” The old man was about to lose his mind, if Yue Yang had quickly calculated the answer, that would still be okay, but this kind of coming up with the answer without even thinking was really unacceptable for him.

Of course, the old man didn’t know that before Yue Yang had transmigrated over to this world, he had once read a book on fun math.

Inside there are various number arrangement riddles, as well as various mathematical calculation techniques.

The all-encompassing mathematical arrangement that the old man used to test Yue Yang were all relatively simple and not very complicated. In addition, even if Yue Yang had not read this book, with his current wisdom and mental arithmetic ability, it would not be difficult to calculate, especially with the aid of the two guiding conditions. If he were unable to calculate the answers to these questions, he would be too embarrassed to call himself a transmigrator.

The old man did not know the truth and was quite stunned in his heart, he had not received such a heavy mental blow in his life before.

If his strength was lacking, he could still forget it; but if his intelligence was lacking, then he would really be helpless…..

It took ‘half a day’ for him to recover.

Glancing at Yue Yang, he muttered, “You kid, what a monster, forget it, there’s no point in comparing this with you…you might as well go in and break through by yourself.”

When Yue Yang saw this, he felt a little bit overwhelmed in his heart, and reached out to pat the old man’s shoulder: “Don’t be too sad, for one as smart as me, there is only one in the Tong Tian Tower, you could even say that in the entire Heaven Realm there is only me, and I guess there won’t be a second one either.”

The old man almost fainted after hearing that. Was that supposed to be a consolation? It’s just giving him a bigger blow, right?

If there was a wall in front of him.

He would immediately smash his head in.

Because he was a disgrace to his predecessors.

He quickly opened the teleportation portal on top of the Rain Shelter Pavilion and told this little monster to leave the Rain Valley, the sooner the better, because the longer this monster stayed here, the more inferior he would feel.

“If these topics are the ones that are posed in the stages, then it’s not that hard. Do you know why there are two preconditions before each question? If you can figure this out, you will not be stuck in the seventh stage, unable to pass further,” Yue Yang kindly advised, but the old man was so ashamed. This brat, causing him to get lectured by a junior, although he knew that Yue Yang did not mean to goad him purposely and was actually advising him with a good heart, but he really did not know where to hide his face.

“I’m just a bag of old bones, what breaking stages, you youngsters go break them,” the old man saw that Yue Yang had left the Qilan wine behind and was even more ashamed, this kid looked really unpleasant on the surface, but could be quite touching at times.

“This Rain Shelter Pavilion is clearly subject to you, whether it’s the teleportation portal or the various spatial prohibitions, why did you let Wei Shu and the others go and catch some Lightning Rain Swallows?” Before Yue Yang left, he asked out of curiosity.

“Cough, I’ve stayed here for 20,000 years, how boring would it be if I don’t find some things to amuse myself with,” the old man started to cough without stopping, only this kid knew that the Lightning Rain Swallow was not a condition to break through this stage. For nearly ten thousand years, only this son questioned him about this, even the Prison Emperor many years ago, honestly went to capture a group of lightning rain swallows and led a group of men to pass this stage, not questioning him at all. As for Fei Wenli, that fierce girl, she simply did not listen to any conditions, and had directly pulled out her double blades, pressing them against his neck, forcing him to let her pass.

“I see, the older you get, the more perverted you are,” Yue Yang came to a conclusion.

“You’re the one who’s perverted, no one’s as perverted as you,” the old man raged, cursing in shame.

“Well, before I leave, I would like to know your name, it’s not really called ‘old pervert’ is it?” Yue Yang’s words could make a dead man jump up from his coffin.

“You…..forget it, I won’t lower myself to your level and argue with you…. My name is called ‘Rain Elder’.” The old man peeked at Yue Yang as he gave his name, seemingly wanting to see his shocked and surprised expression.

“Never heard of it.” Who would have expected, Yue Yang reply was one of nonchalance.

“Alas,” the old man had no strength left to be angry, in fact, he already had a feeling that the answer would be this.

“Is it true that if someone passes all ten stages, the sealed people like you can be freed?” Yue Yang finally asked again, but without waiting for the old man to answer, he had already crossed the teleportation portal and disappeared from the Rain Valley.

“With just your strength?” The old man grunted angrily.

But when he thought about it, he thought that there might be such a possibility. This was a monster, different from the others, and was even that little girl Fei Wen Li’s disciple, he might just be able to pass all the stages…..if he really managed to do that, then wouldn’t it mean…..It;s over, looks like misfortune would befall him soon, upon thinking of this, the old man felt a headache creeping up on him, almost wanting to just smash his head onto the stone table.

chapters.title: Chapter 783.1 - [Cute Tiger Girl]
chapters.body:
Chapter 783.1 - [Cute Tiger Girl]

Chapter 783.1 [Cute Tiger Girl]

Yue Yang stepped into the second stage, Wind Valley, leaving behind a ‘Heaven Horse Feather’ that floated with the wind as a teleportation marker and immediately left using the Three Realms Compass.

He returned to the camp and gave the Old Fox, Fatty Hai, Ye Kong and the others a little warning.

After learning about the nefarious plot of the Central Palace Hall, Fatty Hai hastened to seek out Lord Ling Yun and the others to discuss with them how to deal with the impending attack of the Dark Realm Fallen Martial Artist. When Lord Ling Yun learned of the news, he was stunned and hastened to consult with the other lords from ‘Eight Desolations’. Yue Yang didn’t pay attention to these things, but instead urged Fatty Hai and his other companions to be more careful, and to escape back to the Conquering City if the situation became dire as the Conquering City should be the safest place in the entire Heaven Realm.

And finally, he left Hui Tai Lang behind, just in case.

As for the great chaos that was about to engulf the Western Heaven Realm, Yue Yang had no intention of mediating.

Instead, he hoped that the more chaotic the situation, the better, because the Tong Tian Tower needed to take this opportunity to rise again… Yue Yang then returned to Tong Tian Tower’s Gate of Life and Death and found the Night Empress and Zhi Zun who were cultivating there, and reported to them what was about to happen in the Western Heaven Realm shortly.

“Well done, this kind of chaos caused by large scale battles, I’m afraid it’s not going to be pacified for a short time, if we can grasp this chance, it is possible for the Tong Tian Tower to make a reappearance in the Heaven Realm once again. What we are still missing now is strength. We have to work hard, Yue Yang, you also have to work harder,” the Night Queen was as gentle as always, she affirmed Yue Yang’s trip to the Heaven Realm, but reminded Yue Yang to cultivate at all times, after all, strength was the key to decide everything.

“Alright you may take a day off, gather here tomorrow and we shall go to the blood-red altar at the entrance of the Heaven Staircase to train together.” Zhi Zun gave Yue Yang a day off.

“Brother, why don’t we go back and visit our mother?” Yue Bing felt that a day’s break was just the right amount of time to go back and stay a night at the Tian Luo Imperial Palace.

“Okay, but we just came out not long ago and if we keep running around, Fourth Mother will say that we are not putting in enough effort.” Yue Yang sweated a little, it would be nice to go back to the Soaring Dragon Continent’s Tian Luo Palace to visit Fourth Mother, but first putting aside that he might be criticized by Fourth Mother, most importantly was that he would lose the chance to have a good time with Princess Qian Qian and the rest. If they returned to the Tian Luo Palace, Princess Qian Qian and the other girls would study with Fourth Mother in a proper manner and would not let him do anything anymore. Even at night, they would most probably leave him alone.

“How can you talk about Fourth Mother like that, don’t spout nonsense…” with her supreme intellect, how could Xue Wu Xia not understand Yue Yang’s ulterior motives, she gently reached out her hand as if about to spank Yue Yang for speaking badly about Fourth Mother.

“I was wrong.” Without any sincerity, Yue Yang confessed his mistake and secretly grabbed Xue Wu Xia’s hand, holding it tight and not letting go.

“…… “Xue Wu Xia glared at him. But silently consented to his wolfish move.

“Wen Li seems to look a little different.” Princess Qian Qian’s Six Senses gift was just too awesome, she realised that Wen Li seemed to have ‘grown up’ a bit.

“It’s like this, when we arrived at the Conquering City, which was the first city Empress Fei Wen Li established in the Heaven Realm ten thousand years ago, we met some of her old subordinates, we also spent a lot of time beneath the statues that were placed at the city…” Yue Yang briefly recounted all that had happened at the Conquering City. After listening to his recount, the girls looked at each other and nodded in unison to show their understanding.

“Strange, why haven’t you changed?” The question of the Phoenix Fairy Beauty was also the source of curiosity in everyone’s mind.

“What, do you think that breaking through is like eating cabbage, how can it be that easy,” Yue Yang also wanted to break through his current realm and truly become a Supreme Innate, perhaps then, he would be able to open that Celestial Grimoire.

“About that Heaven Realm Training Grounds, to enter there, must one be a Heaven Ranker?” Luo Hua City Mistress asked about it.

“No need, but I guess it’ll be very hard in the later stages.” Yue Yang shook his head.

Even if it was a Heaven Ranker, trying to pass just the first three hurdles might still not be easy.

To pass the later stages while not being a Heaven Ranker was almost impossible.

One must be a true Supreme Innate, and work together as a team, relying on the strength of the team and the collective wisdom in order to go far!

The Heaven Realm’s Training Grounds had ten stages, while on the surface it did not seem to be very famous, but just the fact that the two strongest people, Prison Emperor and Empress Fei Wen Li, surprisingly were not able to pass all of them. Furthermore, even someone as strong as the Prison Emperor, could only pass eight stages, so it was possible to imagine how difficult the later stages would be. Although Prison Emperor and Empress Fei Wen Li did not necessarily take the challenge when they were at the peak of their strength, yet, this testing ground was difficult enough.

Yue Yang didn’t say much, but Luo Hua City Mistress and the other girls understood completely.

To go further, you must be stronger.

“Practicing in the Heaven Stairway should allow us to get stronger, I really hope we can all ascend to become Supreme Innates sooner, when that time comes, we’ll go in together and break through those stages together.” Princess Qian Qian was not too satisfied with her cultivation, even though she was improving by leaps and bounds right now, she still hoped in her heart that she would be able to advance to Supreme Innate a little faster.

Of course, it wasn’t just her.

There were also Xue Wu Xia, Luo Hua City Mistress Yi Nan and the other girls, all of whom were of the same mind.

In particular, after seeing Phoenix Fairy Beauty improving faster and faster in the Supreme Innate realm. Leaving the others further and further behind made those who were stuck below the Supreme Innate realm even more anxious.

It was because of this situation that Zhi Zun and Night Empress decided to lead everyone to the Heaven Staircase entrance that was guarded by Yue Qiu in advance… In fact, inside the teleportation gate that was guarded by Yue Qiu, there was still a Heaven Staircase World…

That’s where the real Heaven Staircase was.

For the sake of improving Yue Yang’s morale, Zhi Zun had given him a day off to have a good time with everyone.

In fact, not only Yue Yang this perverted wolf, even Princess Qian Qian and the other girls had also started to miss this naughty villain, although they did not say so directly, but seeing him come back from the Heaven Realm, all of them were more spirited, faces glowing with excitement. They did not go anywhere else but chose to return to the grimoire world, in that beautiful home which they made, no longer thinking about anything else, physically and mentally completely relaxed, they laughed and chatted, amusing each other.

After the half-elven slave, the Sickly Beauty and Yue Bing joined hands to prepare a feast, everyone cheered and did not choose to eat in the dining room, but rather directly spread a tablecloth on the grass outside and sat on the ground.

Enjoying a rare moment of respite while enjoying the food.

“Won’t you go and sit with him?” Lie Yan was having a drinking match with the Drunken Cat Big Sis when suddenly, she threw out this sentence.

“Ahem, me and him, it is not what you think.” The Drunken Cat Big Sis’s face turned red, waving her hands with a bit of panic, denying her relationship with Yue Yang.

“Forget it, let’s continue drinking, as long as we have wine it’s fine. “Although Lie Yan’s character was straightforward, she was definitely not a fool, she didn’t ask again, she just smiled and lifted a bottle of wine and downed it to the last drop.

“……” Drunken Cat Big Sis also continued drinking, but with the corner of her eye, she stole a glance at Yue Yang’s direction.

chapters.title: Chapter 783.2 - Cute Tiger Girl]
chapters.body:
Chapter 783.2 - Cute Tiger Girl]

Chapter 783.2 [Cute Tiger Girl]

No one was paying attention to the movements of the Drunken Cat Big Sis and only Princess Qian Qian, who possessed the gift of Six Senses, could keenly catch the minute movements of her gaze. She didn’t reveal it either, but smiled and looked at Xue Wu Xia, who was leaning on Yue Yang’s back reading a book. Xue Wu Xia lifted her bright eyes when she felt Princess Qian Qian’s gaze on her and nodded slightly, indicating that she had also realised it. As for Luo Hua City Mistress who was using Yue Yang’s tummy as a pillow, she was already a bit intoxicated as she lightly sniffed at the few stalks of flowers that Yue Yang had secretly stolen from the middle aged man’s flower garden in Conquering City and sighed with satisfaction, “It’s really fragrant, as fragrant as Sister Yu’s body odor.”

Yue Yu was ashamed to hear it.

She first glanced at Yue Yang to see if he had heard Luo Hua’s remark, and then whispered, “Why are you talking about me again, drink, drink more wine.”

By the time she poured another glass of wine, Luo Hua City Mistress had already fallen asleep, and the fresh flowers in her hand also gently slid down to rest on her snowy mounds. Yue Yu smiled gently and picked up the flower for her, reaching out again to gently comb a strand of hair that had fallen down over her face, before handing the glass of wine in her hand to Yue Yang.

Yue Yang clinked glasses with Phoenix Fairy Beauty and raised his glass to Lie Yan and Drunken Cat Big Sis who were sitting at one side.

Only after Yue Yang downed that glass of wine, Yue Yu remembered that this cup was the one she had just drunk with.

A great shyness went through her mind.

On the surface, she pretended as if nothing had happened.

Yi Nan and Yue Bing on the other hand, huddled on one side of Yue Yang, It was unknown what they were talking about, only that their conversation was never-ending, filled with short bursts of laughter and gleeful noises.

By now, the Sickly Beauty had already started studying the Heaven Rune Formations that Yue Yang had brought back from the Heaven Realm. When by his side, she was most inspired. The half-elven slave and Red were giving her a hand, recording changes or preparing new paper for her to draw on… A little farther away, Ah Man was drinking glass after glass of wine as she tried to learn ‘wine tasting’; Duo Duo was giving her instructions on wine tasting techniques while covering her mouth to hide her laughter.

As everyone grew weary, Yue Yang gently picked up the sleeping Luo Hua City Mistress and returned to his room to rest.

Before entering the door, he rushed after Princess Qian Qian who had Yue Bing in her arms, wanting to steal a kiss.

Princess Qian Qian, seeing that nobody was paying attention, gave him a quick peck on the cheek.

Yue Yang felt that it was too fast and wanted another.

Princess Qian Qian didn’t dare to argue with him, fearing that Yue Bing would wake up, she just glared at him with her fierce tiger eyes, warning him not to go too far. She looked around once again, and seeing that everyone still wasn’t paying attention to them, quickly tilted her face and kissed Yue Yang again full on the lips, but when she felt Yue Yang starting to ‘counterattack’, she hurriedly retreated, then faked a glare at him. When Yue Yang entered the room, her face blushed rose red, her pink tongue licked her lips to savour the taste.

“Turns out it’s nothing special,” she made a conclusion that went against her heart.

“I think it’s not bad.” Xue Wu Xia who stepped out from the house at this very moment had conflicting views. Princess Qian Qian almost fainted. Excuse me, catching us stealing a kiss is already embarrassing enough, can you please not shout it out so loudly, Princess Qian Qian felt a deep sense of embarrassment overwhelming her, it had already took a lot of courage for her to make the first move and kiss Yue Yang voluntarily, yet it had been witnessed by this Snow Beauty, how embarrassing……It’s all that perverted wolf’s fault, why did he have to chose to do this here, this is the front door!

The next day, the Tigress, who hadn’t been able to find a chance to beat up Yue Yang, took advantage of everyone’s lack of attention to quickly pull up his hand while he was eating breakfast in the morning.

And took a bite.

Last night, she had already wanted to get back at him.

But without waiting for her to enter, she had already heard Phoenix Fairy Beauty and him “start a big battle”, that kind of moment, she did not dare to go in at all, if she was caught by him during that phase, maybe she would have been pushed down together…….

The Phoenix Fairy Beauty had been nourished by love and her whole body was glowing radiantly.

The charming glow that radiates from her body, was simply astonishing to people.

She happily enjoyed her breakfast, while eagerly urging everyone: “Everybody look sharp, don’t let Zhi Zun and Night Empress wait for too long, I have a feeling that something good will happen today,” Princess Qian Qian was raging silently, if she was really in such a hurry, why did she still have such a big ‘battle’ in the middle of the night, causing others to not be able to sleep. She couldn’t be angry with Phoenix Fairy Beauty, so she could only secretly stomp on Yue Yang’s feet to vent her discontent.

“Tigress, you’re stepping on my foot,” Xue Wu Xia indicated that Princess Qian Qian had hurt the innocent.

“Why is your foot with him?” Princess Qian Qian was dizzy.

“Actually, I also tried to step on him, but my foot was trapped by his.” Xue Wu Xia nonchalantly explained, but the other girls were already bent over with laughter, Luo Hua already had tears of laughter in her eyes, only Yue Bing that innocent girl did not quite understand, and she seemed quite confused, wanting to peek under the table to see what exactly was happening, Yi Nan hurriedly reached out to pull her back.

When everyone saw this, they just laughed even harder.

chapters.title: Chapter 784.1 - Endless Heaven Staircase, World Tree]
chapters.body:
Chapter 784.1 - Endless Heaven Staircase, World Tree]

Chapter 784.1 [Endless Heaven Staircase, World Tree]

Fifth level of Heaven Staircase, Blood Red Altar.

When Yue Yang returned to the Heaven Staircase, the place looked just the same as it had after that great battle that day, full of devastation and dilapidated everywhere.

On the way, they met the students from Hell class, who had been sent by Grandma Wu Teng to come here to collect meteorite fragments, and when they saw Yue Yang, one by one, they all appeared to be very excited and started shouting loudly. For these ‘old classmates’, Yue Yang not only encouraged them, but also gave each of them a ‘Martial Elixir’, and even gave each of them one of the dozens of high-grade war beast eggs that he had obtained in the Heaven Realm.

Most of the people in the Hell Class who were the same age as Yue Yang had already graduated, and many of them already had formidable strength.

Although none of them had become Innates, many were beginning to reach the threshold, and even a very small number of the geniuses had already reached the quasi-Innate stage.

What’s left of the Hell Class now, for the most part, were all children.

“Wow wow, Brother Yue Yang is the best!” Princess Bei Bei, who often played with Yue Shuang, cheered with joy.

”Is it really a war beast from the Heaven Realm?” Gold grade? That’s great, I will definitely train it well!” There was also Princess Qi Ming, who was not much older than Bei bei but also admired Yue Yang.

“Well, well, Brother Yue Yang has something important to do, so we shouldn’t disturb him.” It turned out that the tall girl from the original Hell Class had stayed back at the academy to be the assistant of Grandma Wu Teng and was now leading this group of brats on their cultivation. With her leading the group, the little brats in the Hell Class were all improving rapidly, even faster than when the eagle-eyed Xia Hou Wei Lie was the tutor in the past. The current eagle-eyed Xia Hou Wei Lie, was instead training the Hell Class graduates and certain elites that had been painstakingly selected to form an army of youths that were conducting extremely hellish training at the Tong Tian Tower, with the goal of catching up with the Fatty Hai and Ye Kong who were one step ahead of them.

Of course catching up was impossible, but at least a large number of elites would be cultivated in the Soaring Dragon Continent.

In the Hell Class, the Yue Family’s Ninth Young Master, Yue Feng, was also present.

Since the time he had been taught a lesson by Yue Yang, his original brashness and arrogance was all gone, and he had also become a great fan of his brother.

When Yue Yang saw him paying his respects, he reached out his hand and caressed his head, as a gesture of praise towards this little brother of his. Yet this simple action of his caused Yue Feng’s face to glow red with excitement.

“Everyone should work hard, and you will definitely be stronger than big brother in the future, and when I am free, I will go and give you all some lessons.” Yue Yang gave these little brats some encouragement before finally waving goodbye to them. Only when they reached the Blood-Red Altar did Yue Yang rub the corner of his forehead, “So tired, greeting these little brats is even more tiring than a big battle!”

“Who made you pretend to be a good brother!” Princess Qian Qian appeared nonchalant on the surface, but in her heart, she actually really liked this side of Yue Yang.

“No, he wasn’t pretending.” Yue Bing hurriedly came to her brother’s defence.

“She was just kidding!” Yi Nan couldn’t help but start giggling.

When everyone saw Zhi Zun and the Night Empress at the Blood-Red Altar, they rushed up to pay their respects.

Red’s mother, who dwelled in the passage at the base of the statue, also came out and paid her respects to all the people present.

Upon entering the Heaven Staircase Gate, Yue Yang, Xia Wu Xue, Princess Qian Qian and the others in turn, paid their respects to Yue Qiu, whose physical body had been completely destroyed but whose soul still guarded the Heaven Staircase Gate. Regardless as a senior or as a guardian, Yue Qiu was deserving of their respect.

With the approval of Yue Qiu’s soul, Yue Yang entered the Heaven Staircase Gate.

The world inside, was the actual Heaven Staircase.

Before this, Yue Yang had thought about it a lot.

However, it wasn’t until after entering the Heaven Staircase World and seeing the scene in front of him that he realized that everything he had thought before was all wrong. The real Heaven Staircase World turned out to be a tree!

This, Yue Yang could never have imagined this even in his wildest dreams!

Even though Yue Yang had seen countless giant war beasts, and he himself possessed an Ancient Island Whale of massive size. However, not to mention any war beast in this world, even the buildings, islands, or even those huge mountain ranges that Yue Yang had seen in his previous life, none of them were comparable in size to the massiveness of the tree in front of him. To be precise, this tree is the entire Heaven Staircase World.

Even with Yue Yang’s eyes, he could not see the top of the tree.

Nor could he see the edges either.

Countless mountains, hills and lakes, were on this world tree. Huge waterfalls could be seen everywhere, pouring down from the skies above the tall mountains.

Yue Yang would never have thought that this was a tree if he hadn’t been able to see some unimaginably large roots, and uncountable branches and leaves that proved that it was a World Tree suspended in the middle of the sky.

Even from a distance, they were unable to see it all.

As they flew closer, they were even more amazed by its monstrosity… Underneath the Heaven Staircase World Tree, there was an extremely large swathe of empty space, and beyond this unimaginable space, only Yue Yang using his Divine Vision was able to see the truth, it was a piece of nothingness, a black hole that devoured all things. Above the World Tree, in the towering mountains, there are countless grand stairways that seem to have been carved out by hand. These stairways were indescribably large, each step was ten thousand meters long, and each step was ten metres high, making it suitable even for a Titan to walk on.

If these stone steps were created by intelligent beings, it must have been the work of gods.

There was no one else, except the gods, who could have pioneered such a vast and immense project here!

chapters.title: Chapter 784.2 - [Endless Heaven Staircase, World Tree]
chapters.body:
Chapter 784.2 - [Endless Heaven Staircase, World Tree]

Chapter 784.2 [Endless Heaven Staircase, World Tree]

Only now did Yue Yang understand why it was called the Heaven Staircase, because it really was……He raised his head and looked into the sky, gazing into the vastness and endless sky, even in the places where there were twinkling stars, the World Tree grew……To climb this tree of such a magnitude, was no different from ascending a stairway to heaven!

“It is said that the Heaven Staircase has 100 million steps.” As soon as Night Empress said this, Yue Yang felt a sense of dizziness, 100 million steps? My god, what’s the point of building such a long staircase?

“There is a forbidden law here, every time you climb up a distance, you will feel the pressure increase several times, every hundred steps, is one level. According to the standard of the Tong Tian Tower, all those below Innate can only cultivate below the first hundred steps, and it was unlikely that they could even cross the hundred steps if they wanted to! For those who have reached the Heaven Rank according to the standards of the Heaven Realm, they would be able to climb up to 10,000 steps at most, and wouldn’t be able to go any higher! For those who have reached the level of Supreme Innates according to the standards of the Tong Tian Tower, their situation will be better, and it is estimated that they would at least be able to climb up to 50,000 steps.” Zhi Zun looked at Yue Yang, then glanced at Xia Wu Xue and Princess Qian Qian as well as the others while slowly turning around, “I’ll wait for you guys at the 100,000th step, don’t make me wait too long!”

“Here, it is okay to fly elsewhere, but flying on the stone steps is not allowed, one must walk up the stone steps step by step.” The Night Empress remained invisible, but she carefully reminded Yue Yang about this point before setting foot on the staircase together with Zhi Zun.

They drifted away with ease.

Just as Yue Yang was about to be the first to step onto the lowest stone step, Lie Yan suddenly jumped out, “I’ll try it first!”

However, when she jumped up the stone stairs, she was surprised and geeked out, “This feeling……”

Her astonishment drew the curiosity of everyone and they promptly stepped onto the first step, before gasping in astonishment. Yue Yang was the last to step onto the Staircase and first felt a divine force pressing down on him from the top, as if wanting to press his entire body to the ground. The pressure was not meant to crush or cause injury to people, but rather it was a huge movement restriction. If a person just stood quietly on the stone steps without moving, then the pressure would not affect that person, but in order to make just a little movement required great physical effort, and no matter what movement one made would easily lead to extreme fatigue.

“Oops, I can’t even take two steps?” Giant Lolli also came out to try it out, and she was surprised to find that she couldn’t step over the second stone step, and move up to the third step.

“I’m feeling the strain, too!” Even Ah Man who had the Heart of the Earth and Strength of a Titan, who would never get tired when stepping on the ground, was extremely surprised to realise that when she jumped up to the second step from the first step, felt tired for the first time ever. It was no wonder that without the strength of an Innate, one could only cultivate below a hundred steps of the Heaven Staircase, and even to move up the hundred steps, they could only slowly climb up at the speed of a snail

“Everyone, don’t raise any strength or summon any war beasts, just go up together in your most normal state!” Princess Qian Qian who had the Six Senses Innate Skill sensed that this was the best place to cultivate.

“The effect is estimated to be better if we carry some weights!” Xue Wu Xia opened the Book of Truth and among the ten cultivation methods suitable to be used here, one of them was as stated.

Weight training, everyone would have more or less undergone some weight training at some point during their cultivation.

Those like Lie Yan and Drunken Cat Big Sis would have comparatively undergone more of such training.

The Phoenix Fairy Beauty and Luo Hua City Mistress, less so.

As soon as Xia Wu Xue suggested increasing their loads, everyone took out their own equipment from their storage rings. These load-bearing equipment were all made by Yue Yang when he was bored, with different weights depending on each person. Yi Nan, Yue Bing and Yue Yu’s equipment were relatively much lighter, and for Princess Qian Qian, Drunken Cat Big Sis, Lie Yan and some others whose equipment were in the form of heavy armour, theirs were the heaviest.

Ah Man would definitely join in to climb this Heaven Staircase, and was also secretly helping Yue Yang keep an eye on Yue Bing to keep his sister out of any danger.

Naturally Red also came out to participate in this training, even Duo Duo gave up her sleep and excitedly took part. She took it as a great exploration of a far away land and leisurely ran forward, disappearing in an instance…. Only the Spirit of Sky Fire and the Reaper Mantis who were adept at flying and not used to walking on land were faced with a huge challenge.

Even Jiang Ying who had not fully recovered came out in her muddled state.

Groggily starting to climb the Heaven Staircase.

With her strength, even if she didn’t walk properly and seemed to be staggering as if drunk, there shouldn’t be any problem with her walking tens of thousands of steps, after all, she was a dragon girl who had inherited the divine power!

The War Goddess Guard Sisters, Yao and Yu, chased after Duo Duo, hand in hand.

As if wanting to race with Duo Duo.

Instead, it was Ika who came out to accompany Jiang Ying, since the last time she teamed up with Jiang Ying to fight, her relationship with the dragon girl had become the best!

“Do you want to join too?” Yue Yang saw that Wen Li had also come out, how strange. Normally when they were passing trials or undergoing training, unless there was fighting involved, Wen Li seldom came out to participate, why would there be an exception today? Moreover, this Heaven Staircase was the hardest type of trial, it was beyond extraordinary! Wen Li, however, threw Yue Yang a bright smile, her body flashed and suddenly transformed into a jade white girl.

The slender and long legs, a slender and shapely waist, and also a white as snow ass.

She looked just like a human!
