When looking closer, her original six hands had now turned into two hands, except for her face which had remained the same, the current Wen Li, if changing into the clothes of a human child, would be totally unrecognizable as a Snake Demon Lolli.

When Princess Qian Qian saw this, she immediately exclaimed with joy, ”Wen Li, you can transform into a human? It’s so perfect, so well evolved!”

Yue Yu was the most attentive and hurriedly draped the naked Wen Li with some clothes.

“Maybe it had to do with the Conquering City in the Heaven Realm….” The moment Xue Wu Xia brought up this point, everybody suddenly understood. Wen Li was a divine beast, it wasn’t that she couldn’t transform into human form, she just didn’t transform into a full human appearance, she hadn’t been willing to change her original snake demon body. It wasn’t until she had acquired the inheritance of her missing memories and energy in the Conquering City, that she became whole once more, finally showing herself to Yue Yang.

“Hmm!” Wen Li both nodded and shook her head.

She was actually able to perfect the human form long ago, it was just that the ene rgy consumed was great, and there was no need for it, also she didn’t know how to do it properly; When in the Conquering City, she gained the inheritance of her previous energy and memories, improving herself in all aspects. Now, even maintaining a human appearance for long periods of time would not consume excessive amounts of energy. Also, her humanized form was now almost identical to a real human, which was why she had decided to come out and use this human form to train together with Yue Yang!

Yue Yang was ecstatic, and immediately picked up Wen Li, he tossed her into the air and cheered, “Good baby, you’re too awesome! You must keep up the good work in the future too, you know?”

Wen Li gave a sweet smile towards Yue Yang and nodded her head seriously, “Mm na!”

chapters.title: Chapter 785.1 - A Good Kid Will Get Good Karma]
chapters.body:
Chapter 785.1 - A Good Kid Will Get Good Karma]

Chapter 785.1 [A Good Kid Will Get Good Karma]

After climbing up a hundred steps, there was a huge platform above it, so big that it was no problem to build a few Yue family castles at random. Further up, there was a path branching away.

One side of the path was lush woods, while the other side was a beautiful pristine lake.

Except for the stone steps, there were no law prohibitions on the platform, which was not very different from the ground, and should be considered as a resting place for warriors who were climbing the stone steps.

“Let’s take a break!” Of course Yue Yang would not be tired from climbing the hundred steps, but seeing that Yue Bing’s face was already covered in sweat stains, he gently wiped the sweat away from her face and stroked her head as a form of praise. It hadn’t been too long since Yue Bing broke through to become an Innate, and although she had gone through several great battles, she was still only an Innate Rank 5. Her main fighting style was assasination, and relying on the combination of her inherent skill [Intense Poison] together with [Antiaris], she could often kill enemies far more powerful than her. If any warrior below Innate Rank 8 were to face Yue Bing in battle, they would be in for a headache. However, this did not mean that Yue Bing had the strength equal to an Innate Rank 8, she had just listened to Yue Yang’s advice and adopted a fighting style which maximised her battle potential and capabilities. In regards to this sister of his with excellent potential, Yue Yang was not in the least bit anxious to let her quickly rise to the next level in cultivation, instead preferring to let Yue Bing take her time and lay a good foundation.

If it wasn’t for her excellent foundation, it would have been a bit of a struggle for Yue Bing to climb the hundred stone steps while fighting against the pressure that was exerted by the Power of Law here in one go.

Now, in just one minute, Yue Bing had climbed to the top of the hundred steps with her brother.

If it were any other Innate Ranker of the same rank, it would have been an impossible feat!

Besides, Yue Bing was still wearing armour that was several times the weight of her body.

The difficulty would have multiplied by several times.

The Golden Crown Thorny Flower Queen Duo Duo, the War Goddess Guard Sisters, Red, Ika and the Hornless Dragon girl, Jiang Ying, as well as Lie Yan, Drunken Cat Big Sis and Giant Lolli, all of them did not stay to rest, but continued rushing upwards in a frenzy, racing against each other. Especially the first few to start this mad dash, Duo Duo and the War Goddess Guard Sisters, Yao and Yu, had already disappeared ahead without a trace.

The Phoenix Fairy Beauty brought her Charm Demon Queen, and Luo Hua City Mistress brought her Snow Fox, both of them waving to Yue Yang, indicating that they would wait for him at the front.

He’d catch up anyway, and they were not worried about leaving him behind and going ahead first.

Ah Man stood guard by Yue Yu’s side, but Yue Yu waved her hand, indicating that she was still fine and could stand by herself. Although she had only climbed a hundred steps, her fragrant sweat was pouring down like rain, thoroughly soaking through her underwear, her breasts were undulating slightly, and she couldn’t help but gasp softly, looking even more strained than Yue Bing. Yue Bing could be said to be a main fighter. Both her physical strength and battle power were much better than Yue Yu, Yue Bing’s usual training intensity was also quite high, on the other hand Yue Yu belonged to the support type, and as she could not fly using her Angel’s Blade, she had to rely on her two legs to support her up the flight of steps which was indeed a bit hard for her.

When Sickly Beauty saw that there was a lake and a scenic view in front of them, she excitedly took out a drawing board, preparing to paint a drawing to commemorate this training while everyone was resting. She preferred to have fun more than cultivate, and as for her, Yue Yang just wanted her to be happy, and even if she cultivated, it would be dual cultivation where they cultivated together, such physical training was not Sickly Beauty’s forte.

Besides, if she had this much time to spend, she would only spend it on studying various rune diagrams. She wasn’t a main fighter, so she chose to assist Yue Yang in a different way.

She and Yue Yu both counted as Yue Yang’s back supporters.

Princess Qian Qian leaned her back against a tree root and meditated with her legs crossed, while the Prison Emperor Divine Sword rested on her lap, entering the human-sword unity realm of enlightenment that Yue Yang had taught her.

She would never waste any spare time that could be used to cultivate.

Xue Wu Xia was reading.

Occasionally, raising those bright eyes under her long eyelashes to look at Yue Yang.

At this moment, Yue Yang was leading Yue Bing and Yue Yu towards the lake and tested the water himself first: “It’s so sweet, this water can be drunk, it’s very refreshing, I don’t see any problem even if we were to take a bath here!”

“Just leave us alone and go up first yourself, we’ll catch up later!” Yue Yu blushed bright red when she heard this and rushed to urge Yue Yang away.

“That’s right, brother, you go up first, I’ll definitely catch up with brother later!” Yue Bing raised her fist. Chasing after her brother had always been her goal, not only in climbing this Heaven Staircase, but also during normal cultivation, she would not relax. Although she didn’t have the great endowment or enlightenment that her brother had, she was not going to give up, and she definitely wouldn’t let her brother get further ahead from her!

“I’ll stay with them, don’t worry about it, or else, Ah Man could also stay with us.” Immediately after Yi Nan tested the waters, she happily took off her shoes and dipped her pearly white feet into the cool lake water with fine sand as its base, enjoying the comfort of the moment.

“Alright!” Yue Yang was of course at ease if Ah Man stayed behind to guard them, but he knew that if he did not turn back at some point and just continued climbing upwards, it would be impossible for Yue Yu and Bing’er to catch up with him, and they would only fall further and further behind. With their strength, it was estimated that it would be a bit difficult to even climb up to a thousand steps, yet he himself needed to climb up to the hundred thousandth step, it was impossible for them to keep up. He smiled and gently stroked Yue Bing’s forehead, helped her straighten her slightly sweat-soaked collar, and gave this stubborn sister of his another hug, encouraging her once more: “Try hard, brother is just a little ahead of you, you must do your best, I’ll be waiting for you up there!”

Yue Bing nodded hard.

With a steely determination on her face.

On the contrary, Yue Yu was unwilling to let Yue Yang hug her and hurriedly dodged, and when she really couldn’t escape, lightly boxed him with her fist: “I try my best, don’t rush me!”

However Yi Nan who was listening at a side knew that should Yue Yang start rushing ahead, then he would definitely be tens of thousands of steps ahead of them, they might not even be able to catch sight of his shadow, but instead of being sad, she was happy for him! She took the initiative to open her arms and cuddle with him: “I’ll try my best too, you wait for me!” Nibbling his ear, she quietly whispered, “Why don’t you sneak down at night, I’ll just keep quiet without telling Sister Yu and Bing’er!”

Ah Man stayed behind and was responsible for keeping the three of them safe.

With her, this battle god who possessed the Heart of the Earth and the Power of the Titans who would never tire, Yue Yang was at ease.

Besides, Yue Qiu’s Soul who was guarding the main entrance wouldn’t let anyone in, it had to be someone who could get his approval to come in and cultivate on this Heaven Staircase.

chapters.title: Chapter 785.2 - A Good Kid Will Get Good Karma]
chapters.body:
Chapter 785.2 - A Good Kid Will Get Good Karma]

Chapter 785.2 [A Good Kid Will Get Good Karma]

Yue Yang decided to go ahead and train himself by climbing the Heaven Staircase. Once he made his decision, Xia Wu Xue closed the Book of Truth, and Princess Qian Qian also stood up quickly, returning the Prison Emperor’s Divine Sword to her back, both of them accompanied Yue Yang, one on either side of him, and started to make their way forward.

Behind them followed Wen Li who had been silently following after Yue Yang so far.

Although perfecting her human form.

But she still didn’t like to talk.

With the strength of these four people, not to mention the platform that was without the restriction from the Power of Law, even if it were on the stone steps, their speed was like lightning.

Four shadows swept across the curving path beside the lake and disappeared in a flash. When the shadows next reappeared, Yue Bing and the other girls saw that Yue Yang and the three girls had already reached the end of the pathway which joined back to the stone steps that was located a few kilometres away; and when they caught sight of them once again after a minute, they could only look up, barely able to see the shadows of Yue Yang and the three girls as they flashed past on a stone step tens of kilometers away to the extremely right from their current position. That spot was very likely already at the thousand step mark of the Heaven Staircase… “We have to work hard too!” Yue Bing retracted her gaze and decided, she would definitely chase after her brother.

Yi Nan whose mental intuition was incredibly sensitive, suddenly seemed to notice something floating up from the depths of the lake.

Ah Man rushed forward to place herself in front of Yue Yu and Yue Bing, acting as a shield for them.

On the clear surface of the lake, a transparent water monster floated up from the bottom of the lake.

As if the surface of the lake had suddenly bulged up, the huge water monster gradually emerged from the lake, looking like a ball of water, but instead of a ball, it was flowing irregularly, constantly changing shape, and if one looked closely, one could vaguely make out a vague ‘human form’.

Sickly Beauty didn’t stop drawing, but just muttered faintly, ”A water man, I’ve heard before that there is a kind of water man in the Heaven Staircase. This kind of water man is not a war beast, it’s just an energy consciousness projection of the Heaven Staircase warriors that live in the rivers and lakes, they are responsible for guarding the water source of the Heaven Staircase and generally do not attack other lifeforms, if they move to attack, we can also gain their recognition by defeating them………oh, by the way, they can never be killed.”

Before Sickly Beauty had even finished her introduction of this beast, Ah Man had already beaten up the water monster.

With her strength, even an Innate Ranked war beast could be killed by her within seconds easily.

Not to mention this water man that only had quasi-Innate strength.

But as how Sickly Beauty had introduced earlier, the defeated water man slowly recovered on the lake once again, and without fear, slid towards Yue Bing’s side.

In addition to the first waterman that had emerged from the lake, there were dozens of other watermen that emerged from the lake in succession, and they all advanced towards Yue Bing’s side.

“They can never be killed, so how do we defeat them?” Yue Bing asked curiously while entering an attack stance.

“We need to overwhelm them with absolute power, or with skill, there are many ways to achieve this.” Sickly Beauty smiled faintly.

With the brush in her hand, she lightly dotted on the empty space in front of her.

Drawing a Heaven Rune formation in the air, and imprinted it on the liquid body of the first Waterman to rush closer.

The water man immediately stopped and his body instantly disintegrated into a fog and disappeared without a trace.

By the time it reappeared, it had long since returned to the lake.

But it no longer attacked, sliding silently to the bottom of the lake, fading away, seeming to have acknowledged the Sickly Beauty’s prowess.

A waterman that Ah Man couldn’t beat with one move, yet had been easily forced to acknowledge Sickly Beauty. This was the result from the combination of wisdom and skill, and of course, the power of the Heaven Realm Runes!

Yue Yu realized that all of them would have to be acknowledged by the Watermen and so she immediately summoned grimoire, summoning her platinum level beast ‘Surging Tide’, and with its [Water Stop] skill, froze all the Watermen that were emerging from the lake. Three seconds later, Yue Yu had already been acknowledged by the Watermen and they sank back down in droves. However, the Watermen on the shore continued to attack Yue Bing, Yi Nan, and Ah Man.

“[Reverse Mirror].” Yi Nan lightly pointed with her finger, and all the Watermen surrounding her were instantly destroyed by their own attacks that had been reflected back on themselves..

“[Trample].” The method that Ah Man used was totally different from Yue Yu’s elegant use of Surging Tides [Water Stop] ability, she prefered brute force. With one foot, she stomped on the ground and all the Watermen, regardless of those that were currently sinking back into the lake, or those currently surrounding them, all of them were affected by the aftershocks and dispersed into mist.

“But I haven’t fought them!” Yue Bing was anxious, she didn’t want to miss out on the recognition from the Watermen.

Hastily, she ran along the shore of the lake, hoping to find some Waterman who had not yet been defeated.

She searched for a long time before finally finding a Waterman that was just emerging from the bottom of the lake. She was so happy that she rushed over, not forgetting to be polite, and saluted beforehand as if she was practicing with someone, not knowing that the Watermen had no sentience at all and were just a projection of the energy intent of the warriors of the Heaven Staircase.

Yue Bing gave the Waterman a salute that was used by Innates before fighting and said happily, “I must be acknowledged, please give me some guidance!”

As the Waterman attacked with rain, she gently swung around, her palms like butterflies piercing flowers, using one of the close combat techniques Yue Yang had created for her, ‘Butterfly Palm’, mysteriously gathering all the attacks in her palm and coalescing them into a ball. With a wave of her hand, she tossed the Watermen up into the air, forming a long water dragon that waved back and forth in the air, and finally pointing her finger up into the skies, she used her consciousness to guide the water dragon to fly straight up into the skies, eventually bursting into raindrops and raining back to the ground.

When the Watermen coalesced once again, it had already acknowledged Yue Bing.

And sank slowly back into the lake.

However, Yue Bing once again performed an Innates salute saying: “Thank you, if this is the first stage of the Heaven Staircase, then, on the way to catch up with my brother, I will defeat all the Watermen and gain the approval of all the seniors, living up to the expectations of my brother.”

Yue Yu, Yi Nan and the others looked on, not knowing whether to laugh or to get angry, this girl was just too serious.

Actually at the lowest levels, it didn’t matter if they were not acknowledged by the Watermen.

This kind of quasi-Innate Watermen were simply too weak, and it was estimated that those that were really formidable opponents were the energy consciousness projection of those Heaven Staircase warriors above a thousand steps!

Besides this kind of Waterman had no intelligence, it wasn’t an intelligent being at all, it was just a projection of energy consciousness left behind by warriors of the Heaven Staircase. That is to say, they were just some shadows, responsible for protecting the water sources here. If it wasn’t for Yi Nan going down to the lake to wash her hands and soak her feet just now, it was estimated that those Watermen would not have surfaced from the bottom of the lake at all. Just as Yue Yu was about to call back Yue Bing, she suddenly saw another Watermen, floating up from the bottom of the lake.

Strange, why continue to fight when everyone has been acknowledged?

Could it be that Bing’er’s powerful move just now was not even acknowledged?

Yue Yu and Yi Nan were puzzled, and Ah Man prepared to rush over to guard Yue Bing, Sickly Beauty also stopped painting with her brush somewhat curiously… To their surprise, the Watermen did not move to attack, but only extended its constantly flowing ‘hand’, in front of the stunned Yue Bing and gently put down a large pearl.

“What’s going on?” Yue Bing can’t help but reach out and take that large pearl, but she still could not understand what was happening and turned back to look at Sickly Beauty.

“It may be that in thousands of years, never has there been a challenger as polite as Bing’er, so you were rewarded by that Waterman’s predecessor who left this behind. Hee, I’m simply guessing, and it’s also possible that you were the most serious about this, and so was given the most recognition and received a gift. Either way, it’s good to be rewarded, come on, let me see, what pearl is this, from the looks of it it’s something good!” Sickly Beauty smiled and waved to Yue Bing.

“Ah, yes.” Yue Bing hurriedly saluted the Waterman who was sinking back into the lake once more, “Thank you!”

After Yue Bing ran back, she handed on that beautiful large pearl to Sickly Beauty.

Sickly Beauty, however, smiled and shook her head, not picking it up.

She reached out once again and gently stroked Yue Bing’s head, “Good Bing’er, this is not an ordinary pearl, but a treasure pearl that belongs to you forever, it is a gift from that senior. It should be even more precious than the ‘Meteor Pearl’ and should be a ‘Fantasy Pearl’. I don’t know exactly what it does, I’m afraid only your brother knows! Work harder Bing’er, for such a hardworking girl as you, this Heaven Staircase will surely be like a treasure trove to you!”

Yue Bing looked at the ‘Fantasy Pearl’ in her hands in surprise, and then looked up at the sky again, thinking silently in her heart about Yue Yang: Brother, Bing’er will try hard, wait for me!

chapters.title: Chapter 786.1 - Don’T Fool Around, A Weak Warning
chapters.body:
Chapter 786.1 - Don’T Fool Around, A Weak Warning

Chapter 786.1 [Don’t Fool Around, A Weak Warning]

Yue Yang, Xia Wu Xue and Princess Qian Qian rushed all the way up to the three thousandth step, the two girls were slightly exhausted by then.

And they decided to stop and rest.

Seeing Yue Yang looking down frequently, Xue Wu Xia couldn’t help but laugh, “Don’t look anymore, just go back and have a look at Bing’er, she needs your encouragement the most right now.” Yue Yang looked to Princess Qian Qian this rouge tigress, Princess Qian Qian nodded in agreement: “Go back and tell them about our climbing experience so far, the pressure faced when climbing above the thousandth step is vastly different to that below, the further up you climb, the more difficult it is to continue forward, you better think of a plan for them, that will be more efficient.”

The two girls decided to return to Yue Yang’s Grimoire World to rest and not affect Yue Yang’s ability to be a good brother!

When Yue Yang went down the Heaven Staircase, he found that Yue Bing and the others had already climbed to the six hundredth step.

And were currently resting on the platform at the six hundredth step.

Climbing up the six hundred steps, Yue Bing and Yi Nan were still okay, and could still go on, but Sickly Beauty and Yue Yu were quite tired, especially Yue Yu, after obtaining the acknowledgement of the Windmen at the six hundredth step, she had collapsed on the platform from utter exhaustion, almost unable to move. In this Heaven Staircase, there was also an artificially created day and night and at this point, it was already night, therefore Sickly Beauty had decided to set up camp and continue climbing in the morning.

As it happened, Yue Yang came down from above and appeared in front of everyone in surprise.

Yue Bing cheered and threw herself into her brother’s arms.

Yi Nan also leapt up and seeing that his arms were already occupied, she jumped on Yue Yang’s back, and without caring for the feelings of the others around them, she kissed him a few times, despite the fact that Sickly Beauty and Yue Yu were watching, only then could she barely vent her joy.

Seeing that Yue Yu was soaked in sweat and exhausted from her weighted clothes, yet still pushed herself up to greet him, Yue Yang hurriedly sat her down: “Rest well.”

And then casually questioned, “So, how was it, got anything good?”

He didn’t know that Yue Bing had obtained the ‘Fantasy Pearl’ at the Hundredth Step, and just casually asked about everyone’s cultivation status. Who would have guessed, the moment this question popped out of his mouth, Yue Bing immediately smiled and took out the ‘Fantasy Pearl’ and showed it to her brother; even Yi Nan, whose Spirit Mirror had leveled up when fighting at the five hundredth step, summoned her Spirit Mirror happily, and showed to Yue Yang the results of her cultivation.

Sickly Beauty and Yue Yu looked at each other and smiled.

Yue Bing and Yi Nan were still children at heart, but it was hard to find fault with them for feeling happy.

Afterall cultivating on the Heaven Staircase.

Although many could defeat the guardians at every level, it wasn’t always possible to get the best treasures and rewards like Yue Bing. And it could even be considered top-tier luck if one’s summoned beast had been rewarded with a merging with the Heaven Runes like what had happened to Yi Nan’s Spirit Mirror. But the rewards that they had obtained weren’t without reason, these two girls had put in their best effort at every level and had given their all in their cultivation, which was why they had received the acknowledgement and recognition of the seniors from the Heaven Staircase… Yue Bing got the Divine Rank Fantasy Pearl; while Yi Nan had also gotten a very good reward, which was for her Spirit Mirror to fuse with the Heaven Runes and obtain an upgrade.

Two hours ago, at the five hundredth step, Inan skillfully defeated the ‘Lightmen’ with the Spirit Mirror to gain maximum recognition, a Lightmen projection dissipated, and its energy and the runes on its body automatically fused to the Spirit Mirror to become part of the Spirit Mirror, thus allowing the Spirit Mirror to gain an upgrade.

Although this reward was not as good as the Divine Grade ‘Fantasy Pearl’ in Yue Bing’s hand, it was also very good.

Precisely because of the second reward.

Sickly Beauty and Yue Yu could officially confirm.

If one could get maximum recognition in the battle at any of the platforms, then one would have a chance to get the different rewards left behind by the Warrior seniors of Heaven Staircase!” Really? This, you guys are amazing!” Yue Yang really sweated a bit when he heard it, he himself had just charged upwards, and did not stop to accept the test, and did not know that there was such a reward. As for the Spirit Mirror that Yi Nan had successfully upgraded, Yue Yang repeatedly praised it, making her feel a bit dizzy in her heart, but Yue Yang also sighed with a bit of regret: “It’s a pity that Sister Yu and Sister Wu Heng haven’t got anything yet…….”

Sickly Beauty hurriedly consoled him, “It may be that the rewards of 200, 300, 400 and 600 steps have already been taken away by somebody else and there is nothing we can do about it, however there are many more rewards in the higher levels, we will do our best to get the rewards to improve. In fact, it’s not just a matter of strength, but also adaptability and luck as well as other various factors. Even if we get the maximum recognition from the Heaven Staircase Platform Guardian, if the reward isn’t appropriate with the cultivator’s attribute, I think that reward won’t be given casually, so in addition to strength, suitability and luck also cannot be missing.”

Yue Yu nodded, ”That’s right, this is just the beginning. In the higher stages, the rewards might just get better and better!”

Yi Nan certainly agreed with this statement, It should be that the higher they climbed, the better the rewards. But of course, this was not taking Bing’er’s Fantasy Pearl into consideration, her pearl was much better than her own Heaven Rune fusion, it was a Divine-grade treasure.”

Yue Bing looked at her brother, hoping that he would say something about her pearl.

However, Yue Yang didn’t immediately speak up, but instead took the pearl and flipped it over and over.

It went on for a long time without stopping. Yue Bing and the other girls waited with bated breath, fearing that they would disturb his observation. “It’s true that this pearl is a Fantasy Pearl, but there’s also another power inside it, a bit like the Power of Law and a bit like Divine Power, I can’t say for sure for the time being either, but that energy is very pure, which is something that ordinary Divine Grade treasures don’t even possess.” Yue Yang found that his Divine Vision was still unable to fully see through this pearl. Once Yue Bing heard it, she was so excited that she almost leapt up in joy. “So saying, this is a super Divine Grade Fantasy Pearl?” Yi Nan was full of envy and exclaimed uncontrollably. “Brother, here!” Yue Bing decided to give this treasure pearl to her brother.

In her mind, the best things should go to her brother. And this treasure had been obtained solely by her, it was the best thing that could represent her sincerity and was the most suitable gift to give it to her brother. Yue Yang didn’t reject Yue Bing’s kindness and reached out to receive it, first planting a light kiss on Yue Bing’s small hand, then gently placing the Fantasy Pearl back into her small hand: ”The energy of this pearl, I have a feeling that it will be very useful to you in the future… Not only can it enhance your strength, it can also enhance the Green Light Tree Demoness… Brother hasn’t fully researched it yet, Bing’er, take it with you first, wait until brother finds a way to draw out the power stored within before handing it over to me once again! Moreover, this Fantasy Pearl is also extremely beneficial to your spiritual cultivation, as well as in the realm of enlightenment!”

When Yue Bing saw Yue Yang returning the Fantasy Pearl to her, a sense of happiness surged out from her heart.

This, too, can be considered as a gift from her brother!

Anyway, listening to Yue Yang would always be the right choice!

She placed the Fantasy Pearl carefully in the pocket of her inner clothing and nodded firmly at her brother again.

Holding up a huge bucket of water, Ah Man ran back in big strides, she had just been fetching water for everyone. As she saw that Yue Yang had returned from above, she hurried up her pace, the corner of her lips couldn’t help but curl into a smiling arc.

Because of the virtuous rivalry with Red and Duo Duo, and also coupled with the fact that she had lived together with Sickly Beauty, Yue Yu, Yi Nan, Yue Bing and the other girls for a long time.

Her human emotions had progressed by leaps and bounds.

chapters.title: Chapter 786.2 - Don’T Fool Around, A Weak Warning
chapters.body:
Chapter 786.2 - Don’T Fool Around, A Weak Warning

Chapter 786.2 [Don’t Fool Around, A Weak Warning]

If she was still the former Barbarian Cow, the ‘happiness, anger, sorrow and joy’ that were experienced by humans would be completely incomprehensible to her, not to mention the complex emotions such as love and hate that are intertwined with one another. In her life, she learnt from Red and Duo Duo. Her human evolution might not be as perfect as Red and Duo Duo, but when it comes to learning, her learning speed was astounding… Now, she is not much different from a normal human girl.

Besides having two more beautiful horns, and a height taller than even Yue Yang, everywhere else, she’s even more perfect than a human girl! Everyone is tired, let’s go to that creek over there and take a bath!” Yue Yang picked up Sickly Beauty, he originally wanted to hug Yue Yu, but Yue Yu had refused, she said she would just wash up in the tent and did not want to go to the stream.” I’m first.” Yue Bing didn’t have this feeling of awkwardness at all, in the small garden, there was also a lake, and when they got tired of practicing, she often swam with her brother.

There was no such embarrassing thought going through her head as Yue Yu.

She and Yi Nan both ran to the stream three kilometers away and changed into the cute and tiny swimsuit that Yue Yang had designed.

Leaping headfirst into the cool stream water immediately, by the time Yue Yang arrived holding Sickly Beauty in his arms, they had already been playing with each other for a long time, like two little mermaids in a mountain stream. Yue Yu, who was watching Yue Yang’s back leave from afar, had a slight blush on her jade-like face. And Ah Man finished preparing the water for her, she took off her sweat-soaked clothes and soaked herself in the bathtub….actually she also wanted to go bathe in the stream, but she could not bring herself to do such things in front of Yue Yang.

She was unlike Yue Bing, who had absolutely no weird thoughts in her heart.

If it’s just her and Yue Yang.

Maybe she’ll go soft and let him hug her.

Or, if there was no Yue Bing and Yi Nan, and only Sickly Beauty, it might not be so awkward.

With Yue Bing, it’s easy for her to think of her sister-brother relationship with him, so she did not want to get too close to Yue Yang, as if getting a little closer was a great sin. “You go take a bath too, I’ll be fine alone!” Yue Yu knew that having defeated the Windmen, she had already gained recognition and would not be in any more danger. However, Ah Man listened to Yue Yang’s instructions and stayed true to her duties, not leaving. Although she knew that Yue Yu was Yue Yang’s sister and would have no problem listening to Yue Yu, it was her principle that Yue Yang’s orders were at the absolute top of the list.

Returning from a blissful soaking bath, Yue Bing changed into her pajamas and habitually sought out Yi Nan to sleep with.

Yue Yu hinted at Yue Bing to sleep with her tonight.

But this little girl didn’t understand at all.

She knew her brother would certainly want to do some 18xx stuff with Yi Nan and Wu Heng tonight, so how could this little girl be there? Yue Yu saw that Yue Bing didn’t understand and was dazed in her heart, she finally decided to leave it alone, as long as she wasn’t distrubed by this perverted brother of hers. Yue Yu, on the pretext of being tired, decided to go to bed early. Surprisingly, even though her body was really tired, she couldn’t sleep at all, tossing and turning, always fostering complicated thoughts in her mind and unable to sleep.

Yue Yang unveiled the curtain and came in, startling Yue Yu.” What do you want, I’m already asleep.” Yue Yu blurted out and turned her back at him, not daring to see Yue Yang. “I’ll massage your legs for you, you have overtrained them and you’ll be in pain tomorrow if you don’t recover well.” Yue Yang sat down, and Yue Yu hurriedly shook her head and reached out to shake her hand again, “No, I’m fine, you might as well hurry and go see Bing’er!” “Bing’er and the other girls are already asleep.” Sickly Beauty also came in and laughed, “She had already been coaxed by us earlier at the stream, otherwise, how would Bing’er be willing to go sleep so quickly!” She sat next to Yue Yu and gently pulled up the quilt underneath to reveal Yue Yu’s curled jade feet. “Take it easy!” Yue Yang reached out and gave her hand a light touch, and Yue Yu trembled as if she had been electrocuted. She really wanted to run away, but she felt soft and powerless on the contrary. “……” Yue Yu knew that Sickly Beauty came in so that she wouldn’t be so embarrassed and was comforted in her heart. Her embarrassment started to wane, and in addition Yue Yang ignored her rejection completely, adding to her helplessness in escaping from this naughty brother of hers. Sickly Beauty continued talking to Yue Yu while she also reached out to help massage her and ease her embarrassment.

Yue Yang said it was massaging her feet, but in fact, it was sending Innate Qi into Yue Yu’s body.

To achieve the goal of eliminating the severe physical exhaustion in her body and relaxing the muscles, it is not possible to do without a little physical contact. Yue Yu pretended as if she felt nothing, while Yue Yang’s hot hands gently massaged her legs, she felt her body gradually relax and gradually become more comfortable, the cool energy in her feet started spreading throughout her body, and where they passed, all the exhaustion vanished. By the time the energy had flowed a few rounds through her body, Yue Yu had already started to feel drowsy, unconsciously closing her eyes to sleep … … Her last feeling was somebody flattening her curled up body on the bed and carefully covering her with a quilt, and even did not forget to tuck the quilt into the corner, gentle as water.

Before leaving from her tent, even planted a light kiss on her forehead, the soft energy spread from the kiss, forming a ripple that marked the beginning of a beautiful dream.

Who did this, was it Wu Heng?

Or her own brother?

Unable to think further, Yue Yu fell into a deep sleep.

The next morning, Yue Yu, whose exhaustion had vanished and was full of energy, saw Yue Yang yawning as he came out of the tent, and couldn’t help but glare at him: he deserved it. He must have been doing naughty things with Yi Nan and Wu Heng for the whole of last night.

However, she felt sorry for his body and hurriedly brought him the breakfast she had prepared.

This kid, she can’t even not take care of him, when he’s fighting he’s still ok, but in normal times he’s just like a big baby, he won’t take good care of himself at all. When he reached out his hand to receive it, Yue Yu couldn’t help but give it a light smack in annoyance, “Lazy bum, go wash up first!” After waiting for him to finish washing up and come back, Yue Yu, while handing him food, looked left and right before whispering a warning to him, “Don’t ever enter my tent again, okay?”

Yue Yang hurriedly explained, “No Wu Heng was there last night too!” You, you can’t enter even if she’s present either.” Yue Yu knew that Yue Yang was doing this to ease her heart, but even then, it was still a bit embarrassing.” Then I’ll sneak in and not let others know.” Yue Yang’s words, caused Yue Yu’s face to redden like a tomato, this, this is simply stealing out for a date, furthermore not letting others know, what do you mean? However, she couldn’t refute Yue Yang’s words, there still seemed to be a hint of inexplicable expectation in her heart, it really made her hate herself, in the end, she really had no choice but to bite her lower lip and weakly warn him, “No nonsense!” ” What are you guys talking about?” Sickly Beauty came over and casually asked. “No, I asked him about that training grounds in the Heaven Realm.” Yue Yu was afraid that this kid would reveal her secret as soon as he opened his mouth and hurriedly changed the subject. “Hey right, I think it’s more promising to let the others come here to train as well rather than to train at the Heaven Realm, how about bringing them back!” Yue Yang immediately clapped his hand together when hearing this, he felt that with Fatty Hai and the others strength, staying in the Heaven Realm is truly not the way, in case they were found by the people from the Central Palace Hall, they might even be instant killed, so, it is still safer for them to come back to the Tong Tian Tower to train in this Heaven Staircase. Otherwise, he could also throw them to the old fogeys in the Conquering City and let them be trained there. “They might not necessarily be willing to come train here. One was because of the difference in strength; the second was because it was relatively quiet here, except for the test of the energy shadows on every hundredth platform, there is barely any fighting at all in this Heaven Staircase and this does not fit with their characters at all.” Sickly Beauty did not think that Fatty Hai and the others would like to climb this Heaven Staircase. “It’s not good for them in the Heaven Realm, it’s far too dangerous, this is the best place to be, they can fight and rest.” Yi Nan felt it was most appropriate to cultivate here. “The cultivation method of each person is not the same, each has their benefits.” Yue Yang also felt that Sickly Beauty had a point, and decided to throw Fatty Hai, Ye Kong and the others to the Conquering City when going back to the Heaven Realm, so that they would be safe and could progress under the guidance of those old fogeys, and he could kill two birds with one stone. As for Bao’er, Liu Ye and the other girls it seemed that it would be better for him to bring them back because they were so weak that their lives would be in danger if they were not careful. Furthermore, they were not the main fighter type, and they didn’t need to go to theHeaven Realm to risk their lives, so it was more appropriate to bring them back from the Heaven Realm for their training.

Here on the Heaven Staircase, there may be a reward for every hundred steps.

Putting aside Bao’er who was the beloved of Lady Luck.

If even Liu Ye was able to get a reward here and improve her strength, maybe she could be taken to try that Celestial Grimoire Shield……to contract that Celestial Grimoire, that was something Yue Yang would never forget. If he hadn’t known about it, then so be it, the problem now was that the Celestial Grimoire was simply waiting for him to go contract with it, so of course he would have to act quickly!

chapters.title: Chapter 787.1 - [Predator Catching Prey, But Does It Know It Is Actually The Real Prey?]
chapters.body:
Chapter 787.1 - [Predator Catching Prey, But Does It Know It Is Actually The Real Prey?]

Chapter 787.1 [Predator Catching Prey, But Does It Know It Is Actually The Real Prey?]

Yueyang returned to the Western Heaven Realm.

The original Snowfield Camp has been reduced to ashes. Although the battle was over, the blaze was still roaring, and not only the campsite, but even the surrounding area, had been beaten into ruins. To Yue Yang’s surprise, this time, surprisingly, it was the ‘Eight Desolation’, ‘Snow Plains’, and ‘Battle Song’ three battle groups that had won, at least, the Dark Realm’s Fallen Warriors were temporarily repulsed.

Anticipating that the Dark Realm Fallen Warriors would come in force, the three battle groups had joined forces.

And launched a pre-war counterattack.

After paying a huge price, they finally thwarted the Dark Realm Warriors and knocked them back.

“Third Young Master, if it wasn’t for your secret intelligence, I’m afraid we would have……” towards Yue Yang who had secretly returned, Lord Ling Yun was extremely grateful. Indeed, if it wasn’t for Yue Yang’s warning to Fatty Hai and Ye Kong, not to mention Lord Ling Yun himself, he was afraid that the entire Eight Desolation battle group, or even the entire Snowfield Camp, would have been wiped out.

“So what plans for the future do you guys have in mind? Do you all want to continue and enter the training grounds, or to get out of here?” Yue Yang asked.

“We still decided that we want to go in and have a look.” Lord Ling Yun and Tu Hai, who hadn’t known about it before, but knew that it wasn’t some secret ancient ruin waiting to be dug up by future generations, but rather a training ground of the Heaven Realm that had been hidden from the outside world by the Central Palace Hall and after knowing this, the urge to challenge themselves had risen in their hearts. So be it if there is no treasure there, any treasure would have been difficult to split with so many people in the first place, but the thought of going in to challenge themselves, to see how many stages they could break through was still enticing, they might even be able to break through in the trials and improve themselves! At the same time, they were also concerned that if they chose to leave the battle group and head elsewhere, they would most likely be besieged by the Dark Realm’s warriors, so rather than risk leaving this place, they might as well participate in the trials together with the group.

“That’s fine too!” Yue Yang looked at Fatty Hai, Ye Yong, Xue Tan Lang, Prince Tian Luo, and the Li brothers, all of them had already decided to go in and try it out.

Seeing that Yue Yang still had something to say, Lord Ling Yun and the others excused themselves amiably.

The choice between the Heaven Staircase and the Heaven Realm Training Grounds.

Yue Yang explained the situation to them, and after some discussion, the decision was finally made by Xue Tan Lang on behalf of the few of them to stay and participate in the Heaven Realm Training Grounds.

It wasn’t that the Heaven Staircase was bad, it was mainly because the Heaven Staircase was in the Tong Tian Tower, and they could enter for cultivation at any time and had plenty of opportunities later. However for this Heaven Realm Trial Grounds, they would not have another chance, this opportunity could not be missed. If they missed it this time, there will never be so many people competing together in the future, and there will never be the Dark Realm Fallen Warriors pressuring them with death, forcing them to continuously move forward…..

For such a decision, Yue Yang was not surprised.

Firstly, he instructed Hui Tai Lang to take care to protect everyone’s safety, and then he explained the situation of the First Stage, the Rain Valley, a little bit.

“The first stage is the Rain Valley. In the Rain Valley, there is the Power of Law that forbids flight, war beasts cannot be summoned as well or three clones will come to attack them, and this attack would never stop until all the war beasts summoned were dead. This is the real reason why it was said before that those below Heaven Rank would not be able to survive for more than 10 minutes. In addition to not being able to summon war beasts, they were also unable to fly, and anyone who tried to fly was bound to be subject to the Power of Law, furthermore anyone who left the main path more than a kilometer would be punished by a lightning strike. Also, the Rain Valley is like a maze, there are prescribed routes that must be followed or they would be lost in the maze. It is strictly forbidden to move forward from the prescribed route by jumping through space, or by teleporting across the path, or else you will be severely punished by the law, and those with weaker strength will be turned into flying ashes at one stroke!” Yue Yang wouldn’t tell Lord Ling Yun and the others about this detailed information, but for his own team, he would naturally tell the truth, lest they violate the Power of the Law and die tragically on the spot.

“Horrible!” The moment Fatty Hai heard all this, his face was scared white, he was not afraid of strong enemies, but afraid of the Power of the Law, which was able to pass through all kinds of defences and instantly kill somebody on the spot.

“For the maze of Rain Valley, I can draw you a map, and with the map, if Lord Ling Yun and Tu Hai as well as the rest of them want to pass through the maze, they will have to do their best to ensure your safety.” Yue Yang drew a map with the Heaven Realm runes and pointed the way out again, only stopping until even Hui Tai Lang also nodded in understanding.

“So saying, does Lord Ling Yun and the others not know how to read Heaven Realm Runes?” Prince Tian Luo, immediately noticed this.

“Let’s not talk about them, even the Deputy Palace Lord who came out of the Central Palace Hall didn’t have much mastery over the reading of these runes. The Heaven Realm Runes, although unlike the Ancient Runes and the Sword Runes, were still hard to come by. In the Heaven Realm, it may have been a widely used universal rune before, but now, with the exception of very few old warriors, in most regions, most of the Heaven Realm Warriors have very weak understanding of such runes, much worse than the warriors from our Tong Tian Tower… In other words, in the Heaven Realm, the Heaven Realm Runes are almost lost. In the Rain Valley, there are many places where there are instructions written using the Heaven Realm Runes, so you can take this opportunity to learn them, and some of them are very subtle, if you can learn them in the Rain Valley, then it will definitely be very helpful for the future.” Yue Yang explained.

“Understood.” Ye Kong always believed in Yue Yang without reservation.

“Is there a gatekeeper or something?” Fatty Hai on the other hand, was more concerned about this issue.

“Yes, there is an old man, an old-timer from our Tong Tian Tower, who is estimated to have lived for at least 20,000 years, and I don’t know who he has offended, but he is imprisoned at the Rain Shelter Pavilion in the Rain Valley. AnIf you all see him, you all must be respectful towards him, if you have any good wine, pour some for him and if the old drunkard instructs you, you will all benefit for life. When you get to his place, you don’t have to worry about your lives being in danger, as an elder, he will take care of you, which is the main reason why I let you go in and try to break through. The first stage is already very difficult, if you pass it, then the second stage is the Wind Valley, which is the opposite of the Rain Valley, the Power of Law there forces all who enter to fly through the sky against great pressure, and if they step on the ground, they will be punished… Well, I won’t say anymore, you guys will have to pass the first stage first” Yue Yang chatted with Xue Tan Lang and the rest for a bit more about the current situation in the Heaven Staircase, and when it was said that Yue Bing had obtained the Fantasy Pearl during the test at the Hundredth Step of the Heaven Staircase, everyone felt even more energized and couldn’t stop commenting on her good fortune.

chapters.title: Chapter 787.2 - Predator Catching Prey, But Does It Know It Is Actually The Real Prey?]
chapters.body:
Chapter 787.2 - Predator Catching Prey, But Does It Know It Is Actually The Real Prey?]

Chapter 787.2 [Predator Catching Prey, But Does It Know It Is Actually The Real Prey?]

“When I break through the first three stages of this Training Grounds, I’ll return to the Heaven Staircase and get all the rewards below 10,000 steps.” Instead of being big-hearted, Fatty Hai was more greedy.

“Just continue dreaming!” Ye Kong, who was a natural nemesis for him, grunted coldly.

“If I can’t break through the first three stages, I won’t return to the Tong Tian Tower for now.” Xue Tan Lang had made a decision that even if he went back, he would return to his homeland with honor.

“We are unable to become Supreme Innates for the time being, but to have the power of domains and to become quasi-Heaven Rankers, or even Heaven Rankers, is our goal for now, we must bring this to fruition in the Heaven Realm.” the ambition in Prince Tian Luo’s heart also flared. In terms of cultivation, they had Yue Yang’s help, while in terms of training they had the guidance of seniors, if they don’t work hard enough now, wouldn’t they be wasting their own time? The least they could do was to figure out how to obtain the power of domains and then slowly climb up to the quasi-Heaven Rank, before returning to the Gate of Life and Death or the Heaven Staircase to continue training and finally climb up to the difficult goal of Supreme Innates!

“Don’t be in a hurry, if there’s a situation and I’m not around, then you guys go back to Conquering City first, there are a lot of old men there and it should be safe, it’s good to let them point you in the right direction in your training as well.” Yue Yang also pointed out a way for everyone to cultivate, and that was the Conquering City that Empress Fei Wen Li had built in the Heaven Realm back then.

Lord Ling Yun and Tu Hai, while somewhat regretting that the Third Young Master would not be accompanying them to enter the training grounds, were secretly shocked again.

Yue Yang hadn’t said much, but had already revealed extremely important information.

The information about how to pass the first stage had already been given to Fatty Hai, Ye Kong and the others.

What does that mean? This Third Young Master had actually passed the trials and returned, how long had he left that night……Lord Ling Yun and Tu Hai as well as the rest, could not help but be more respectful of Yue Yang when thinking about this point.

A few of the Eight Desolation’s leaders were surprised, Ling Yun was normally quite arrogant, what had happened to him today?

Is there something wrong with this mysterious young man whose face can’t be seen clearly?

They all wanted to get to know Yue Yang, but didn’t have the chance.

Yue Yang personally escorted Fatty Hai and Ye Kong as a team and entered into the land of trials before drifting off.

Although Lord Ling Yun and Tu Hai did not say it, but they secretly glanced at each other, and decided to follow Fatty Hai and the others closely in their footsteps, one reason was to protect them, because they were the relatives and friends of Third Young Master, if anything were to happen to them, then Third Young Master would no longer be friends with them; and secondly, Fatty Hai and Ye Kong had information about breaking through, most likely they had a map, following them to break through would save time and effort.

When the Eight Wilderness, the Snow Plains, and the Battle Song, the three major battle groups, along with some individuals who had survived, all entered the Land of Trials.

The Dark Realm’s fallen warriors appeared.

They were now, however, a little hesitant.

Should they give chase?

Or wait outside?

They were attacked by a strong counterattack from the camp and suffered heavy casualties and great losses in strength. If they were to blindy give chase, they might even be annihilated.

“What else are you worried about? Two of our Palace Lords, five elders, all have entered and were waiting to ambush them. All you have to do is put pressure on them to keep them from falling apart and retreating, and do you think that we really need your power to make this happen? What a joke. We’re just giving you guys a chance, you know? We could have easily done it without you. Out of mercy and forgiveness, this is to give you sinners an opportunity to redeem your sins…Get in there at once, all of you!” Although his strength was not stronger than that of the Dark Realm Fallen Warriors, but his status was high enough to shout and yell orders at them.

“Very well, I hope that after paying enough sacrifices, we can exchange for our wives and children as well as the old and sickly.” Of the ten chiefs of the Dark Realm, one of them stood forward and made the decision to lead the way into the land of trials.

When they all entered, the elder from the Central Palace Hall started to laugh crazily, “Haha, What a bunch of fools!”

In the ruins of the Snowfield Camp, there are still a large number of logistical servants; at the entrance, there are also part of the soldiers stationed. That elder from the Central Palace Hall coldly and ruthlessly flew high in the sky, condensing several huge energy light balls. The soldiers on the ground, who were paying their respects, and the unwitting logistical servants left behind by the three battle groups, were all blown to pieces.

This kind-hearted elder on the surface, seeing the devastation that had been produced with his own hands, laughed with joy: “Western Heaven Realm, let chaos engulf you, the more chaotic the better! How can the Heaven Realm be without blood and fire, without war, if everything is so peaceful and so settled, can this still be considered the Heaven Realm?”

“Crazy fellow!” A petulant shout rang out in wild laughter, like a lightning bolt cut through the pitch black night.

“Who’s there?” The kind-eyed elder turned around in astonishment.

There was first a man and two women, flying over from a distance, one of the girls was dressed like a swordsman, and was staring at himself angrily with eyes as sharp as a sword.

It seems that she was the one who was talking just now. The kind-eyed elder’s face was difficult to look at, his face was a bit twisted, this quasi-Heaven Rank worm, even dared to shout at him? He was about to make a move and instantly kill his opponent, when he suddenly realized that the sword she was holding was a divine sword, and was suddenly startled: “Divine weapon? Where did you get your sword? How could you possibly have a Divine Sword!”

chapters.title: Chapter 788.1 - [Pain, Chance To Evolve The Six Records Innate Talent]
chapters.body:
Chapter 788.1 - [Pain, Chance To Evolve The Six Records Innate Talent]

Chapter 788.1 [Pain, Chance to Evolve the Six Records Innate Talent]

This elder of the Central Palace Hall who had stayed behind still wanted to show his identity and intimidate the other party.

Little did he know that Princess Qian Qian wouldn’t even give him that chance.

She lifted the Prison Emperor’s Divine Sword above her head, and the power of her domain exploded, darkening the sky in a flash, dark clouds surging, green dragons appearing, and finally, a bolt of lightning tore through the entire sky. High in the sky, multiple bolts of lightning flashed out, striking the ground in many places. Under Princess Qian Qians imagination, the lightning bolts miraculously linked together to form a ‘lightning Chinese knot’ that had been thought out by Yue Yang for her.

This Lightning Chinese Knot.

It’s actually the ‘Unity Knot’ amongst the many Chinese knots.

The lightning bolts which had been formed from the Green Dragon’s holy power, linked together to form a long chain, immediately confining the Central Palace Hall elder inside a circle of electricity.

“Child’s play.” That Central Palace Hall elder had never seen this kind of battle method, much less this kind of lightning diagram array, he was secretly alarmed, but on the surface he arrogantly looked at it and waved his hand, his strength immediately bursting up to the fourth level of the Heaven Rank. If Princess Qian Qian didn’t have a divine sword in her hand, he wouldn’t have done so at all, because in his eyes, Princess Qian Qian was nothing more than a quasi-Heaven Ranker To use the strength of a Heaven Rank 4 to fight a quasi-Heaven Rank warrior, and even more so against a girl, in his heart he felt it would be a disgrace to himself.

The Central Palace Hall Elder first drew six arcs of light, using it to shield his body.

Before coalescing another thunderball.

And crushed it furiously,letting it explode in his hands…..

He was convinced that that complex lightning diagram would completely collapse in the midst of the storm created by the thunderball explosion!

This was the strength of the fourth level of the Heaven Rank, how could it be resisted by the strength of the Quasi Heaven Rank? In the instant the thunderball exploded, the Central Palace Hall Elder quickly coalesced another fire spear and threw it out quickly, intending to kill Princess Qian Qian with the spear before Yue Yang and Xue Wu Xia could come to her rescue.

“Green Dragon Knot.”

Princess Qian Qian shouted.

From the Lightning Chinese Knot, which was condensed from the Holy Power of the Green Dragons, had a silver of lightning attached to the Prison Emperor’s Divine Sword, and when Princess Qian Qian lifted the Divine Sword, the Lightning Chinese Knot immediately tightened.

The Thunderball Explosion was completely ineffective against the Green Dragon Holy Power Lightning Chain, which was of the same element and even more superior!

The six arcs of light drawn by the Central Palace Hall elder also snapped and shattered. Under the stranglehold of the lightning chain coalesced by the Green Dragon Holy Power, even Heaven Rank 4 power was unable to resist, not to mention the Lightning Chinese knot that Yue Yang had designed for Princess Qian Qian and the various Heaven Realm runes hidden on the lightning chain made from the Green Dragons Holy Power. The Central Palace Hall Elder was stunned, by the time he regained his senses and tried to flee, it was already too late… The lightning chain of the Green Dragon’s holy power strangled his body, and a horrible electric current struck his body in a horrible way, and in the moment when the Central Palace Hall Elder was paralyzed, Princess Qian Qian in the sky ignored the nail sized fire spear that was racing towards her and slashed down with her heavy sword.

The Fire Spear was promptly cut in half by the Divine Sword wielded by Princess Qian Qian.

And then it was annihilated by the aura of the Divine Sword.

The Central Palace Hall Elder below watched in horror as Princess Qian Qian swept down her sword!

Blood splattered out and rushed to the sky as Princess Qian Qian swung her sword and sliced the Central Palace Hall Elder in half, perfectly splitting the enemy’s body into two from head to toe.

“Heart.” Yue Yang gave her a heads up.

“Get out of my way!” Princess Qian Qian also knew that it wouldn’t be that easy to kill a Central Palace Hall Elder, the one she had just decapitated was estimated to be just a shadow double, or a war beast that had taken his place. She unleashed her Sixth Sense and spread out her consciousness, the moment she felt a shadow come from behind her, she swung around and swung her sword, slicing that shadow into two once again.

“Such a sharp Divine Sword, it’s really a Divine weapon!”

Thousands of meters away, the Central Palace Hall Elder stood there acting cool, a faint scratch could be seen on his brow, oozing out a drop of blood.

Just now, if it hadn’t been for his war beast that could act as his double and had died in his place, with the combination of the Divine Sword and the Lightning Chinese Knot, he might have been severely injured…. The Central Palace Hall Elder who had escaped death just now was secretly surprised, but he did not show his surprise and instead grunted coldly: “Pui! Don’t think that because you have a Divine Sword you can kill me! With just you three kids, it’s not even nearly enough!”

With a little flick of his finger, another ten shadows appeared and formed a circle around him, enveloping him inside.

With a mental order, all ten of them rushed over to kill Princess Qian Qian at the same time.

As an Elder of the Central Palace Hall, the last thing he was afraid of was fighting one-on-one! If the two others at the other side didn’t come forward to help, then he was confident that he could knock this girl down within a few moves, and possibly even snatch her divine sword.

Are there any people who have more summonable war beasts than an Elder from the Central Palace Hall? Not to mention those below Heaven Rank, even if it were Heaven Rank War Beasts, the elders of the Central Palace Hall were never in short supply of them!

As soon as the ten shadows went on the offensive, he immediately summoned out two Heaven Rank 2 Thunder Rock Giants.

As the Thunder Rock Giants cried out and started to move into defensive stances, three more Heaven Rank 1 Windblade Eagles flew out and shot into the sky, besieging Princess Qian Qian along with the ten body doubles. As for the Quasi Heaven Rank Poisonous Arrow Bees, he even summoned 30 of them at once! The sky was full of war beasts, dazzling the eyes of the onlookers, and just then, the Central Palace Hall Elder extended a finger and pointed it towards Princess Qian Qian. A silver light, ten times faster than lightning, leaving a long trail of flames behind it, shot towards Princess Qian Qian’s heart.

With so many means of attack, the Central Palace Hall Elder didn’t think that a quasi-Heaven Rank would be able to handle it.

Even if they could handle it, he believed they’d still have their hands full.

However, reality told him.

He was wrong!

Princess Qian Qian stretched the Prison Emperor Divine Sword forward, borrowing the spine of the sword and bouncing the silver light bullet away.

The ground shook with a shudder, a huge Black Turtle burrowed out from the ground, frost energy spread out like a sword, towering straight up to the sky, and although the two Thunder Rock Giants did not freeze to a halt, their movements were like slow motion, like snails. The Windblade Eagles in the sky swooped down, but all of them immediately flew back up to the sky in shock.

With a slash of the Prison Emperor’s Divine Sword, the ten Quasi Heaven Rank Shadow Substitutes were all cut off at the waist, just like the one that had secretly attacked Princess Qian Qian earlier.

The Black Turtle Magical Beast Image on the ground leaned up.

A gush of extremely cold white air erupted.

Three Poisonous Arrow Bees who were hit by the white air immediately froze and fell to the ground, those who were not hit immediately scattered and fled.
