chapters.title: Chapter 789.1 - Breakthrough, Six Records Four Mythical Beasts Merged In One
chapters.body:
Chapter 789.1 - Breakthrough, Six Records Four Mythical Beasts Merged In One

Chapter 789.1 [Breakthrough, Six Records Four Mythical Beasts Merged in One]

Without the eyes, there are still the remaining five senses.

As long as one can sublimate the Six Senses, then one does not need their eyes to fight.

Princess Qian Qian forced herself to hold back the pain in her eyes, on one hand, fighting against the injury by mentally repeating “I’m not hurt” in her head, while on the other hand, releasing the rest of her five senses to capture the information of the enemy. The senses of the ear and extrasensory perception were raised to the limit at this moment in the mind of Princess Qian Qian and she could almost “see” the enemy ….

“Chop!”

With a single swing of the Prison Emperor’s Divine Sword, the sword qi once again slashed at the head of that Central Palace Hall Elder with incomparable accuracy.

The guy was stunned, how could she still move to attack without her eyes? How did she manage to capture his position?

Princess Qian Qian knew that now, the situation was unlike before, her frequency of attacks doubled, like a storm, slash after slash, if the enemy made a slight mistake, then he would not be able to get away with it! One sword qi hadn’t disappeared yet, and a second one had arrived, forming a stacked wave-like endless attack.

That Central Palace Hall Elder had a sudden enlightenment while dangerously dodging the wave-like attacks of Princess Qian Qian: this girl swordsman not only had sharp eyes but also a surprisingly keen ear. She must surely be relying on her keen hearing to locate his whereabouts!

When he perceived this, a fierce smile immediately appeared on his face.

While tumbling to dodge the sword qi, he straightened his fingers, and drove his sharp claws brutally into his ears.

As if it wasn’t his own ears that he was injuring, he even tore the two ears apart with his sharp claws drawing them out. Blood spurted out in the sky, and with the hideous cruel smile on his face, the scene was simply eerie and terrifying! Sure enough, with his “poisonous gift”, Princess Qian Qian covered her ears in pain, unable to move to attack!

Yue Yang was furious, he really wanted to go up and smash that damned Central Palace Hall Elder into mud.

But Xue Wu Xia hugged him, not allowing him to rush forward.

She understood Princess Qian Qian’s mind best.

Princess Qian Qian, just wanted to take advantage of this opportunity to break through herself.

In fact, not only Princess Qian Qian, Xue Wu Xia also had the same thing in mind, they all faced the crisis of “now Yueyang is getting stronger” and that he was throwing everyone else further and further behind. Perhaps one day, he will step into a higher world than the Heaven Realm together with Empress Fei Wen Li, Zhi Zun and Night Empress, but they could no longer keep up, they would be forced to stay behind in the Heaven Realm, or wait for him at the Tong Tian Tower…. This was something that all of them could not accept, therefore, no matter Princess Qian Qian or Xue Wu Xia, or even Luo Hua City Mistress or Phoenix Fairy Beauty, all of them train with all their might, hoping to not be left behind by Yue Yang and to catch up to him!

“No eyes, no ears, lets see how you continue to fight!” The Central Palace Hall Elder was now more wary of Yue Yang and Xue Wu Xia, because he felt that both of them were angry, and were giving him a terrifying feeling.

If not that both of them were also only at quasi-Heaven Rank strength then he really dare not be so bold to provoke Princess Qian Qian.

The injuries on his body, due to his superior physique and equipped war beast.

Recovered very quickly.

In less than a minute, his eyes were completely healed, and a new pair of eyes grew back, except that they were completely closed and could not be opened, presumably in connection with Princess Qian Qian’s blindness, and if he was really healed, Princess Qian Qian would recover as well. Therefore, that Central Palace Hall Elder had only regained their form, but not their function, whether his eyes or ears.

He had six eyes and four ears, even if one pair of eyes and one pair of ears were not functional, he is not affected at all.

Princess Qian Qian, however, had no spare eyes or ears.

Because of this.

The Central Palace Hall Elder had no fear of losing.

Cogenesis Innate Talent: The more pain one suffers from a physical injury with an enemy who is fighting and who has severely injured him or herself, the more the enemy is affected. When the body is damaged and the loss of certain functions is incurred,the same functions of the enemy are also affected.

Princess Qian Qian, who had lost her sight and hearing, slowly turned around.

As she shifted her position to be directly opposite the enemy.

She stopped.

Though unable to see or hear, she still had her extrasensory perception.

The enemy was just right ahead…. Princess Qian Qian endured the pain. Wielding the sword, the Holy Power of the Green Dragon once again coalesced into a lightning bolt, like a knot, trapping the enemy in the center of the sword’s attack.

“Without eyes and ears, you’d still be able to find me? Very good!” The Central Palace Hall Elder hardened his heart and swung his fists and smashed in his own nose, tears caused by pain and blood splattered everywhere. He then took out a dagger, while sticking out his forked tongue like that of a snake from his mouth, and directly cut it off without hesitation. As blood gushed from his mouth, he eerily smiled: “Without a nose, I am not affected at all, and I have two tongues. Even if one is damaged, I still have the other one! You fucking kid, trying to fight me?”

“Ah!” Princess Qian Qian’s body shook and the pain from her nose and tongue almost made her almost collapse.

Originally, her six senses were a hundred times sharper than an ordinary person’s, and once her five senses were wounded, her body would suffer far more than an ordinary person would suffer when wounded!

But in the midst of the arrogance and flaunting of the Central Palace Hall Elder, she was still able to shoot out a sword qi, cutting in half the Central Palace Hall Elder trapped in the Lightning Knot, directly forcing him to sacrifice a substitute war beast. The Central Palace Hall Elder escaped from the Lightning Knot, then smugly sneered, “It’s useless, no matter how sharp the sword in your hand, it’s impossible to kill me, because I am immortal! If you’re not holding a divine weapon, I can totally stand still and let you kill!”

chapters.title: Chapter 789.2 - Breakthrough, Six Records Four Mythical Beasts Merged In One
chapters.body:
Chapter 789.2 - Breakthrough, Six Records Four Mythical Beasts Merged In One

Chapter 789.2 [Breakthrough, Six Records Four Mythical Beasts Merged in One]

The Central Palace Hall Elder who had turned into a demon monster waved the dagger in his hand and started to stab and cut randomly at his body.

Another two arms were cut off.

As if Princess Qian Qian was electrocuted, her hands were no longer able to grip the Prison Emperor Divine Sword, and her entire body trembled in pain…….

The arms of that Central Palace Hall Elder were able to grow back, and the stab wounds on his body recovered to heal with eye-popping speed. On the contrary, Princess Qian Qian, who was suffering from numerous trauma, was close to collapsing. Even if her body was not substantially harmed, under the numerous mental trauma and pain, the effects of this [Cogenesis] were also incomparably painful.

“That’s enough, Wu Xia, you take Qian Qian away and I’ll take out this piece of crap!” Yue Yang could not stand by and watch his beloved suffer.

“Remember to slash him an extra couple times for me!” Xue Wu Xia also no longer insisted.

She flew to Princess Qian Qian’s side, ready to lean down and carry the still stubbornly standing sister away.

But after a second, Xue Wu Xia gave up.

Retreating and drifting away, quickly leaving Princess Qian Qian’s side, as if afraid of getting in the way. Yue Yang, who was already close to losing control, also rushed over in surprise and looked at Princess Qian Qian in surprise, his expression was like seeing a miracle being born.

Heaven and earth changed colour.

The Azure Dragon in the sky swooped down and became one with Princess Qian Qian.

The Azure Dragon’s dragon eyes shone.

The Azure Dragon’s eye, which let out bolts of lightning, became her eyes. The frost on the ground surged into the air like a sword, the Black Tortoise burrowed out of the ground, tilted his head and became Princess Qian Qian’s ears, listening to all things in heaven and earth. The Vermillion Bird came from behind Princess Qian Qian, and the Vermilion Bird embraced Princess Qian Qian, its wings became her arms. The strongest White Tiger roared at Princess Qian Qian’s body, and all the negative reactions were instantly cleansed and dispersed by the White Tiger’s Holy Energy, and at the same time, Princess Qian Qians energy skyrocketed by a hundred times. The original Prison Emperor Divine Sword, which was suspended in the sky, flew back under Princess Qian Qian’s intent and returned to her hands.

The Four Mythical Beasts appeared together.

And merged together within Princess Qian Qian’s body.

It turns out that the Central Palace Hall Elder who could not be completely imprisoned by the Lightning Chinese Knot was now caught by Princess Qian Qian from a thousand meters away, and could not move even a single muscle. He was horrified and tried to struggle out of this deadlock but was like an ant trying to move a pillar and was completely ineffective!

“White Tiger Grab!”

The Central Palace Hall Elder, as if summoned by Princess Qian Qian, powerlessly slid towards her palm.

When her left hand could almost physically grip the enemy’s throat, Princess Qian Qian’s right hand that was wielding the Prison Emperor Divine Sword, slashed speedily, sending the Central Palace Hall Elder’s head flying, killing him in one fell swoop!

After disposing off her enemy, Princess Qian Qian, as if taking off her clothes, lost her strength instantaneously, the Four Mythical Beasts disappeared and Princess Qian Qian fell limply. Yue Yang hurriedly went up and hugged her, and upon closer inspection, realised that Princess Qian Qian had fallen asleep due to exhaustion after simultaneously summoning all the Four Mythical Beasts. She broke through the limits of the Six Records, uniting the Six Records with the Four Mythical Beasts, and completely eliminated the enemy’s Innate Talent’s influence with her will, and decapitated the enemy on the spot before she fell to the ground.

If, without the pressure of the enemy’s Cogenesis Innate Talent, and Princess Qian Qian wanted to break through.

Most likely it would have to be on the battlefield sometime later.

Yue Yang was both happy and angry, he was happy that she was so strong and had completed a breakthrough in cultivation in battle despite such adverse circumstances.

But angry that she was too stubborn.

She didn’t need to suffer so much, yet she had pushed herself to the limits.

“Let her rest well, not only did she break through the Six Records, she also seems to have used this to enlighten some kind of skill.” Xue Wu XIa closed the Book of Truth with a sigh of admiration, towards Princess Qian Qian, the outstanding and diligent tigress who had broken through with flying colours, she did not feel any envy but instead felt pressured! It was also because everyone kept improving, one better than the other, that Xue Wu Xia did not want to fall behind and struggled to surge forward!

“The tigress has gone too far this time, when she wakes up, I’ll have to beat her up!” Yue Yang checked Princess Qian Qian and realised that there were no wounds or injuries at all on her body, the White Tiger’s Holy Power had completely dispelled all negative mental injuries and she had fainted purely because she was too tired. His heart filled with joy at this realization.

“Do you think that by cutting off my head, you can let me die?” On the ground, the Central Palace Hall Elder who had been beheaded by Princess Xixi.

Now stood up.

He picked up the head on the ground and repositioned it.

Countless threads burrowed out from his neck and connected to the head, the Central Palace Hall Elder, who had died so tragically earlier now regained his original uninjured appearance.

Xue Wu Xia smiled and gently waved her hand at Yue Yang, indicating that she try first herself, and would pass to him if she really could not handle it.

She once again flipped open the Book of Truth, waiting until the Blizzard Goddess materialized behind her, before slowly raising her eyes that looked like two clear lakes, looking at the smug Central Palace Hall Elder, “Next, let me test out a Central Palace Hall Elder’s ability.” Without even finishing her sentence, she had already appeared behind the Central Palace Hall Elder. Her left hand sheathed in lightning, her right hand encased in ice, she stabbed both hands into the ears of that Central Palace Hall Elder. The Blizzard Goddess followed her master and stabbed into the body of the heavily wounded and howling Central Palace Hall Elder with one hand, pulling out the whole of that Central Palace Hall Elder’s magic heart, pinching and bursting it, scattering it into ice chips that drifted away with the wind. — …

chapters.title: Chapter 790.1 - Giving You A Taste Of Your Own Medicine]
chapters.body:
Chapter 790.1 - Giving You A Taste Of Your Own Medicine]

Chapter 790.1 [Giving You A Taste of Your Own Medicine]

His heart was pulled out and crushed.

The face of the Central Palace Hall elder changed, however, he quickly recovered as before and was even more arrogant.

“Do you think you can kill me just by ripping out my heart and crushing it? With my immortal physique, I don’t need a heart to support my body at all, and besides, what’s the difficulty of growing back a heart? Unless it’s a divine weapon, otherwise there’s no way to actually hurt me!” The Central Palace Hall Elder laughed harshly, pointing at Xue Wu Xia and the Blizzard Goddess guarding behind her, and said grimly, “On the contrary, the one who grievously wounds me shall be bound by the laws of my Cogenesis Innate Talent and will be bound to me, and now, will be the beginning of your misery!”

He did not believe that Xue Wu Xia was also like Princess Qian Qian, who could still continue to fight even after losing her eyesight and her hearing.

She must have been an exception.

It can’t be true for everyone!

Xue Wu Xia didn’t answer and didn’t back off, she just looked coldly at the Central Palace Hall Elder, like a wise man looking down at a barking mad dog.

The Central Palace Hall Elder was extremely displeased with such a look from Xue Wu Xia and a cruel and perverted smile appeared at the corner of his lips as he reached out and first took out that eerie magic mirror and looked at himself narcissistically, then used his sharp claws to bloodily gouge out two of his six eyes, and even shoved the gouged out eyes into his mouth and chewed them up.

At the same time, his other two arms pierced through his ears.

Finally looking smugly at Xue Wu Xia with his remaining four eyes, expecting to see her screaming and writhing in pain due to the effects of his Cogenesis Innate Talent……

However, there was nothing.

Xue Wu Xia stood there silently, a pair of starry eyes staring at him, still cold as ice.

On her face, there was absolutely no pain, as if nothing had happened, or, alternatively, as if the Cogenesis Innate Talent was completely ineffective on her.

“No way, why aren’t you hurt? Why aren’t you blind? How are you okay?” The Central Palace Hall Elder looked incredulously at his own face with the magic mirror, and then took out another two of his own four eyes and pinched them bloodily again… Xue Wu Xia just looked on coldly, as if she was watching a mad dog chasing and biting its own tail… The Central Palace Hall Elder was about to go mad, how could this girl not be harmed by Cogenesis Innate Talent? He thought at first that it was her extremely strong pain tolerance that allowed her to bear the pain and act as if nothing had happened. So he continued and cut off his arms again with a dagger, finally cutting open his belly and pulling out his flowery green intestines and wrapping them around his neck.

“Boring.” Xue Wu Xia gently flipped through her Book of Truth with a jade white finger, while using her other hand to lightly cover her mouth, yawning as if bored out of her mind.

“You have immunity!” The Central Palace Hall Elder sort of got it.

These two girls, each of them was even more abnormal than the previous.

It was already extremely out of the ordinary that the girl just now had continued to fight without using her eyes or ears, and had even severely damaged his arms.

However, compared to this one, this one was even more exaggerated, she was even immune to his Cogenesis Innate Talent that not even the other Palace Lords were capable of avoiding, and it was completely ineffective against her. How old is this girl, is she still even human?

Xue Wu Xia did not explain.

Since she had enlightened Spirit Domain, within her realm, she was the ‘god’ of that realm.

Although it was still unable to affect those who had comprehended the Supreme Will and awakened the Power of Law, for the Central Palace Hall Elder who had not comprehended the Supreme Will and the Power of Law, Xue Wu Xia could at least be considered a ‘Demigod’ when in her own Spirit Domain. First putting aside the mental attacks, just using the Spirit Domain’s power to forcefully suppress the damage caused by the enemies Cogenesis Innate Talent was like child’s play for her.

Not to mention, Xue Wu Xia still had the protection of the Blizzard Goddess.

The Blizzard Goddess, although not yet a god, still possessed the mental power of a Divine Envoy, as long as she was guarding Snow Flawless, it would be impossible for the enemy to even remotely harm Xue Wu Xia mentally!

“A very childish trick, and once the weakness is found, it’s as ridiculous as the trick of jumping the beam!” Xue Wu Xia had the quasi-Divine Book of Truth, although it was not as astute as Yue Yang’s Heaven Eyes Divine Vision, but to see through the malicious tricks of the Central Palace Hall Elder, it was still more than sufficient. Whenever this Central Palace Hall Elder was preparing to activate his Cogenesis Innate Talent, he had to use his body substitution war beast and the magic mirror in his hand as a spirit guide, otherwise the target would not be captured. This seemingly well-hidden approach was nothing short of shit in Xue Wu Xia’s Spirit Realm.

One ability counters another.

Some people, by nature, are the nemesis of some people.

The Central Palace Hall Elder had the Cogenesis Innate Talent, a war beast that was almost immortal with its outstanding regenerative abilities, and a magic mirror with accurate spiritual guidance.

On the surface, he was extremely overbearing, but in front of Xue Wu Xia, who was currently ranked only below the Night Empress and Zhi Zun in terms of mental fortitude, in Yue Yang’s words, he was only a rank 5 bug……

“I’ll kill you!”

The Central Palace Hall Elder was ashamed to have been belittled and was enraged.

As his Cogenesis Innate Talent and his Magic Mirror did not seem to have any effect, he immediately switched over to his most trusted brute force, his aura exploded and raised to Heaven Rank 5, and immediately swung his fist at Xue Wu Xia.

The power of Heaven Rank 5.

Roaring like thunder, it swept through the earth and attacked Xue Wu Xia in an incomparably powerful frenzy.

That Book of Truth turned another page in Xue Wu Xia’s hands, and Xue Wu Xia’s fingers started drawing countless wonderful patterns of Heavenly Realm runes.

Without knowing when, a rune crystal wall had been erected in front of Xue Wu Xia, and the mysteriously powerful Heavenly Rank 5 power of the Central Palace Hall Elder bounced back in full. This was originally the rune crystal wall used by Sickly Beauty to defend against enemy attacks, after Xue Wu Xia’s research and improvement, combined with her Spirit Realm, the ‘Rune Crystal Wall’ that had the greatest defensive capabilities was finally formed.

The powerful strike of the Central Palace Hall Elder only served to numb his own arms from the recoil of the crystal wall.

He started to panic in his heart.

However, when he was in the middle of retreating, he suddenly noticed that the other party’s Rune Crystal Wall had a barely noticeable crack in it from his Heaven Rank 5 smash just now. He immediately regained his confidence, rejoiced, increased his power and attacked again!

“Break!”

No matter what, he himself was also an Elder of the Central Palace Hall and was at the peak of the fifth level of the Heavenly Rank!

For just a quasi-Heaven Ranker.

She wanted to fight against him?

Dream on!

The Central Palace Hall Elder didn’t know that he was already inside Xue Wu Xia’s Spirit Realm, and he would never even suspect that the crack on the Rune Crystal Wall was actually an illusion created by the Spirit Realm. What he did not know actually was that from the moment this attack had been rebounded by the Rune Crystal Wall, everything he saw was an illusion. Thinking that he had the ability to smash the Rune Crystal Wall apart, the Central Palace Hall Elder put his full strength into his blow.

In his hallucinations, the cracks in the Rune Crystal Wall were getting bigger and bigger.

Finally, under his heavy blast of punches, he managed to pierce through the Rune Crystal Wall.

chapters.title: Chapter 790.2 - – Giving You A Taste Of Your Own Medicine
chapters.body:
Chapter 790.2 - – Giving You A Taste Of Your Own Medicine

Chapter 790.2 – Giving You A Taste of Your Own Medicine

The Central Palace Hall Elder swung his fist triumphantly, striking the finishing blow.

Expanded the breach in the Rune Crystal Wall.

He even used his claws to break the Rune Crystal Wall wide open after pounding a sizable hole in it… He then walked through the splintered shards of the Rune Crystal Wall and looked down at the enemy with his head held high….

The Central Palace Hall Elder who was stuck in the illusion thought that he had succeeded in shattering the Rune Crystal Wall of his opponent and could strike the final blow at the enemy at any time, but he did not see that Xue Wu Xia’s real body had closed the Book of Truth and was meditating with her eyes closed.

A Power of Law was slowly being born in between her brows.

The current Xue Wu Xia was still unable to use her mind to completely wield the Power of Law she had comprehended, and being able to create a trace of the Power of Law was already her limit now. She had to give her full attention and use all of her mental power in order to condense this tiny wisp of the Power of Law. But, don’t forget, she also had a completely unified Guardian War Beast, the Blizzard Goddess.

The Blizzard Goddess clenched that wisp of incomparable Power of Law in her fist and sprinted towards the Central Palace Hall Elder.

With a single punch, she pierced the left shoulder of the Central Palace Hall Elder.

There was the Deadly Star Point which contained the true soul of the Central Palace Hall Elder.

He was instantly awakened from his hallucination, the strike that contained the Power of Law which had hit his fatal point that contained his true soul had wounded him grievously, instantly frightening him to death, he started waving his two arms madly, wanting to block any incoming attacks.

The Power of Law quickly disappeared after shattering the Deadly Star Point that housed his true soul, and with Xue Wu Xia’s current strength, it was still impossible for her to sustain it for a long time.

Otherwise the Central Palace Hall Elder would be dead by now!

The Central Palace Hall Elder, whose soul was wounded but not dead, retreated in horror and fled.

Regardless of whether it was cast by a quasi-Heaven Ranker or not, the Power of Law was not something he could take lightly. However, the fleeing Central Palace Hall Elder suddenly slammed into the Rune Crystal Wall… Just now, he hadn’t smashed the Rune Crystal Wall at all, or even hit it at all, it was all just an illusion of his. The Rune Crystal Wall allowed Xue Wu Xia to deftly make her way behind the Central Palace Hall Elder, the wise Xue Wu Xia had already known that this battle would have resulted in this situation.

The only thing that made her regret.

Was that her Power of Law had been maintained for too short a time, less than a second.

If she could have maintained it for more than two seconds, this Central Palace Hall Elder would already have fallen to the ground, never to get up again… The Blizzard Goddess used her Extreme Ice Cold divine power to easily freeze the two arms of the Central Palace Hall Elder.

Xue Wu Xia shot out two streams of wind and those two arms instantly turned into nothingness.

The Central Palace Hall Elder howled miserably.

He had tried to kill his enemies countless times in his life, but the feeling of letting his enemies kill him on the spot, this was really his first time experiencing it.

This icy cold power was not something his ‘Immortal Body’ could resist, and after this freezing, his Immortal Body could not recover!

“I’m a little tired now, it’s your turn!” Xue Wu Xia drifted to Yue Yang’s side, in order to try out the Power of Law, she had also heavily drained mental reserves, and although she was successful, she was unable to kill the Central Palace Hall Elder, leaving her a bit regretful.

“You’ve done a good job, don’t rush.” Yue Yang patted Xue Wu Xia’s hand lightly, was the Power of Law something that everyone could use? Not to mention the fact that her Power of Law had been completely self-comprehended and was not obtained from a treasure or something else, that alone was enough to make Xue Wu Xia proud! The rarest thing of all, was that Xue Wu Xia had been able to gather the Power of Law so effortlessly while fighting against a Central Palace Hall Elder, if not for the fact that her opponent was a demon monster who could not easily be killed, she would have won.

“Next, it’s up to you.” If Xue Wu Xia were to continue fighting against the Central Palace Hall Elder in her current state, she was still not without the possibility of winning, after all, the opponent was restrained by her and the Blizzard Goddess everywhere, even his Cogenesis Innate Talent and his Immortal Body were also ineffective, the only advantage held by the Central Palace Hall Elder was his superior strength of Heaven Rank 5 but even that was offset by the Rune Crystal Wall.

But she still left the final decisive battle to Yue Yang.

He was the one who was most important to her!

Whenever it was, she wanted him to get the most out of it, whether it was combat experience, or a chance to advance!

Yue Yang did not use any treasures, nor did he use the World-Exterminating Wheel nor the Eternity Wheel, but simply rushed to towards the Central Palace Hall Elder, blasting a fist straight at his face, while at the same time reaching out and forcibly snatching the opponent’s ‘Magic Mirror’ that used spiritual power to guide his Cogenesis Innate Talent: “Who asked you to show off in front of me, Who asked you to use such a disgusting Innate Talent to hurt my loved ones…..Die!”

Yue Yang, who had lost control, beat up the opponent while releasing his World Creation Domain.

Gate of Death!

The Central Palace Hall Elder was about to fight back, and a body double of him appeared who was holding a Magic Mirror appeared opposite Yue Yang, and after taking a glance at it, he smiled grimly at him, and then even he gouged out his eyes like he was used to doing, but a burst of pain came from his eyes… The Central Palace Hall Elder hissed madly, “Impossible, how can you also have the Cogenesis Innate Talent? Why, why did I suffer from this mental trauma? My eyes, my ears, my arms…no!” ! ~!

chapters.title: Chapter 791.1 - For Your Own Good
chapters.body:
Chapter 791.1 - For Your Own Good

Chapter 791.1 [For Your Own Good]

Rain Valley.

Fatty Hai madly snarled at the Heaven Realm Warriors of the two major battle groups of Snow Plains and Battle Song, “You’re all crazy, I told you, you must not summon war beasts, how long are you going to be stupid?”

Since entering the Rain Valley, because it was a strange place and they were afraid of being ambushed.

So the warriors of the two battle groups, Snow Plains and Battle Song had summoned their war beasts one after another, and as a result, the sky was filled with shadow clones that were the same as their own war beasts. The warriors of the Eight Desolations battle group, because of the persuasion of Tu Hai and Lord Ling Yun, had put away their defensive war beast, but the warriors of the Snow Plains and Battle Song battle groups, because of the low strength of Fatty Hai who had come to warn them, had not paid attention to him at all, and as a result, they were almost drowned by the flood of shadow clone war beasts…….

Seeing the situation, all the people of the Eight Desolation battle group rushed over to dissuade them.

Lord Ling Yun, even personally vouched for Fatty Hai: “Everyone, what Young Master Hai said is absolutely true, he has the most top secret information, including the news of the Dark Realm’s incoming attack, all of which was learned from his captain.”

When the Heaven Realm warriors of the three major battle groups heard what Lord Ling Yun had said, they realized that it was not Lord Ling Yun who was truly well-informed, but someone else.

At the entrance of the Rain Valley, the Fallen Warriors of the Dark Realm seemed to be a bit more ‘smart’ as they had already put away all their war beasts.

No more shadow clone warbeasts headed their way.

The leaders of the Snow Plains and Battle Song battle groups already had an induction before they came in, plus seeing how Lord Ling Yun was protecting Fatty Hai, they also chose to believe Fatty Hai’s words. In their capacity as Heaven Rank experts or even as lords of a country, they would not apologize to Fatty Hai, an Earth Rank warrior. But they weren’t very rude to him either, perhaps because Fatty Hai had information about the Rain Valley, and they nodded their heads as a sign of affirmation to his words.

“The Dark Realm’s fallen warriors are trailing behind us, let us discuss, what should be done?” The several leaders of the Eight Desolation battle group took the initiative to place themselves by the side of Fatty Hai, Ye Kong and the rest, one was to prevent them from any misfortune; the other was that they were worried the other two battle groups, Snow Plains and Battle Song, would try to draw them into their own groups.

“We haven’t gotten any treasures, yet we must go all out and fight to the death. If we go back empty-handed now, we won’t be satisfied.” Several leaders of both battle groups expressed their unwillingness to go to war with the Dark Realm warriors for the time being.

“How about we all listen to one word of advice from Young Master Hai?” Lord Ling Yun gestured for Fatty Hai and the others to come over.

“Alright let’s hear it!” The leaders of the three teams are holding onto some faint hope, does this fat guy really know the best way to get through this stage?

“Our captain once said that this place is called the Rain Valley, and everywhere there are law restrictions, no flying, no summoning, and those who violate them will be hit hard by the law, and the whole Rain Valley is like a maze, once you get lost, it is extremely difficult to get out. Even when you get out of the Rain Valley maze, there is still the final test… Furthermore, this Rain Valley is just the easiest and simplest first stage of the ten stage test.” Ye Kong stepped forward, and his words that came from the bottom of his heart revealed a secret that secretly shocked the three battle groups.Turns out that in this Earth Rank group, they still have a mysterious captain who seems to be in total control.

On the surface, this team is made up of Earth Rank weaklings.

However, they are all extremely promising young people.

If they were given some time, it was not impossible that they might all one day become lords of their own domain….As for their mysterious captain, based on how respectful Lord Ling Yun was towards him, he must be of extremely honourable background, so how could they doubt the information that had been provided by such an honourable existence?

If what this young man said was true, then they might have some sort of guidance from their captain and hold some sort of secret?

The two major battle groups, Snow Plains and Battle Song, took a look at the several leaders of the Eight Desolations battle group, all standing at the side of that Earth Rank team.

From the surface it might seem as if they were protecting them from danger, but in reality it was as if their stance was one to prevent outsiders from getting too close to them.

Immediately, the leaders of the two battle groups improved their attitudes and gave a slight salute to Ye Kong who was only an Earth Ranker, this was a sign of respect and goodwill to the captain he represented: ”Very well, since this brother and his teammates know the mysteries of Rain Valley well, how about becoming our vanguard and lead us forward? If it goes well, you will be well rewarded.”

If not for the Eight Wilderness leaders full of caution and vigilance, the leaders of the two battle groups would still want to come over and have a chat.

“Let’s go!” Seeing that the Dark Realm Fallen Warriors in the distance were approaching, Xue Tan Lang took the lead and sprinted towards the depths of the Rain Valley.

If under normal circumstances, if he as a puny Earth Ranker dared to take the lead in front of so many experts and Lords, he would definitely be subjected to much criticism, but not now, everyone was willing to let him lead the way. Accompanying Xue Tan Lang was Prince Tian Luo, while following closely behind him were the Li brothers and Fatty Hai as well as Ye Kong and the others.

At almost every intersection, the six would communicate through eye gestures.

Coming to an agreement tacitly.

Although it was the first time they came in, with the instructions of Yue Yang, they were like old horses who knew the way… The three battle group leaders who were following behind them and were secretly watching each other were all in awe. Of course, the object of their amazement was not the weak Earth Rank Xue Tan Lang, Prince Tian Luo, or any of the others but rather that one mysterious captain who provided them with information!

Who was it that knew the secrets of this previously unknown ‘ancient ruins’?

Lord Ling Yun and City Lord Tu Hai were now secretly rejoicing.

It looked like associating themselves with the Third Young Master really brought them a boundless future!

chapters.title: Chapter 791.2 - For Your Own Good
chapters.body:
Chapter 791.2 - For Your Own Good

Chapter 791.2 [For Your Own Good]

In the Tong Tian Tower.

On the tenth floor.

Endless Sea, Falling Star Islands.

Yue Yang returned here, and besides coming to fetch the Ocean Empress, Hai Ying Wu to go to the Heaven Staircase, he also made an appointment to meet with Tian Zhu, Dragon Emperor, the Emperor of the Underworld and Elder Nan Gong who were undergoing harsh training at the Heaven Realm Gate.

“Could it be that there has been another disturbance in the Heaven Realm?” Tian Zhu was a typical warmonger, and fighting and killing were the things closest to his heart.

“Is there something good for us?” What the Dragon Emperor thought of was what Yue Yang had researched something new again and wanted everyone to test it out.

“We are late!” The Great Demon King Baruth, Ha Xin and the others did not receive Yue Yang’s invitation, but they knew that it was better to be thick-skinned and not need Yue Yang to open his mouth, and directly chose to arrive uninvited. Anyway, as long as they were able to make some real contribution, Yue Yang this brat did not like to owe people, and would not shortchange them, and will more or less reward them in return.

“Good, you’re just in time.” Yue Yang hadn’t wanted to call on them, but this next thing he was planning to do would require a lot of people, the more the merrier.

Yue Yang didn’t say anything, he just opened a teleportation gate to the first floor of the Heaven Staircase.

Tian Zhu and the others were puzzled. What’s the point of going to the Heaven Staircase?

In the Water World at the first floor of the Heaven Staircase, a ‘Yong Hui Chief’ was sealed, some time ago, everyone had taken turns to abuse it. However, it wasn’t a good cultivation method to keep abusing Yong Hui, besides that guy also chose to surrender, it was just that without Yue Yang’s final nod, he would still have to continue to sit there in a water prison.

As for Yuehang, who had hidden in the grimoire after being severely injured, he had recently been chased and beaten up by Tian Zhu and the others so much that he could only flee every time he saw them.

It’s just that this guy wasn’t as headstrong as Yong Hui, after being chased for a few days he had then given up all resistance.

And announced his surrender.

He was now recuperating.

Could it be that this excursion to the Heaven Staircase was because some new ancient powerhouse had broken the seal?

All of them were a little surprised when they thought about it this way, who was this expert that even Third Young Master Yue had to gather all the experts in Tong Tian Tower to go against?

“Don’t overthink it, no one is breaking the seal for the time being.” Yue Yang was able to see through the thoughts of the people and waved his hands, not mentioning the real Heaven Staircase, but instead talking about the Training Grounds in the Heaven Realm: “In the Heaven Realm, there is a place where both Empress Fei Wen Li and Prison Emperor had gone in to train, and there are ten stages in total.

“A training ground? Good!” Tian Zhu was only afraid that he would not have the chance to challenge himself, and was most interested in this training grounds where no one had successfully completed yet.

“Inside, the Heaven Realm’s strongest are gathered, and with the strength of our Tong Tian Tower, honestly, it’s still a bit out of our reach.” As soon as Yue Yang said that, the crowd couldn’t help but be a little ashamed.

If it wasn’t for the two girl’s, Zhi Zun and Night Empress, whose strength was still considered passable, otherwise the Tong Tian Tower would have really degenerated.

Since the death of the Prison Emperor, there had been no particularly bullish expert to lead everyone to break through the seal and return to the Heaven Realm, until the appearance of the Third Young Master of the Yue Family. Of course, it was also because of his appearance that the Tower ushered in a new era and a new chance to rise once more, not to mention Innates, people were starting to break through to Supreme Innate one after another. If everyone could improve further, it was estimated that the day would not be far away when the Tong Tian Tower would return to the Heaven Realm.

Yue Yang didn’t say much and threw out a dark shadow.

At a glance, everyone at first thought that it was a mad demon monster.

It had collapsed mentally, but its strength took everyone by surprise, this demon monster that had been turned into a lunatic by Third Young Master Yue actually had the strength of a peak Heaven Rank 5!

“He is an Elder of the Central Palace Hall, for an Elder like this, the Central Palace Hall had countless numbers of them, and above them there are the Deputy Palace Lords and the Palace Lords, and even higher up there is the Grand Palace Lord and the Supreme Palace Lord, and even, I suspect, there is a ‘God’ level existence higher up. Of course, that kind of existence is not something we can deal with right now, so we do not need to think too much about it. Just think about what we should do if we met a Palace Lord in the training grounds who is a hundred times stronger than this Central Palace Hall Elder! I don’t doubt that you’ll be able to challenge a Palace Lord one day, but before that, you’ll have to take this Central Palace Hall Elder who almost has the ‘Immortal Body’ to the ground!” As Yue Yang removed the World Creation Domain, the Central Palace Hall Elder, who had gone completely insane, sensed that there were many hostile experts surrounding him, and immediately shouted in anger, his energy bursting.

As soon as his power of a peak Heaven Rank 5 exploded, even the war maniac Tian Zhu immediately retreated back a hundred meters.

The faces of the people changed greatly.

Just a Central Palace Hall Elder already had such strength, not to mention the Palace Lords who were a hundred times stronger than him…. The most important point was, except for the war beast that had fused with him to become a single entity, Yue Yang had already got rid of all his other war beasts, if the Palace Lord who is a hundred times stronger than him, also had a grimoire, had awakened the Supreme Will and also had defensive war beasts to rely on, how strong will he be?

That’s unthinkable!

“Well, the challenge, the trial, starts with this crazy lunatic!” Tian Zhu understood Yue Yang best, he had brought back this half-crazed lunatic from the Heaven Realm instead of killing it outright was surely meant solely to be used as training material for them. It could be said that Yue Yang had really gone the extra mile for them.

This is to create opportunities for everyone to improve their cultivation!

If there was such a powerful external pressure, everyone’s cultivation would definitely have to speed up.

Tian Zhu, Dragon Emperor, and the Emperor of the Underworld had all improved recently, and they brought out their greatest strength to besiege this Central Palace Hall Elder who had already tormented to madness by the World Creation Domain. Yue Yang, on the other hand, drifted off, taking with him Hai Lan, Xia Yi, and Southern Goblin King Nan Jing as well as Liu Ye and Bao’er who had voluntarily returned with him from the Heaven Realm, heading to the true Heaven Staircase Gate together.

There, they would have a different kind of cultivation ….

chapters.title: Chapter 792.1 - Misunderstanding, A Beautiful Misunderstanding
chapters.body:
Chapter 792.1 - Misunderstanding, A Beautiful Misunderstanding

Chapter 792.1 [Misunderstanding, A Beautiful Misunderstanding]

Is this the Heaven Staircase, the real Heaven Staircase?” The Southern Goblin King was a bit awe-struck, but what shocked her most was not the fact that there were as many as 100 million steps in the sky, but the fact that the entire world was on one tree.

“Is there a reward for every hundred steps on the platform?” Bao’er was interested in the rewards.

Even though she was not expected to climb much with her strength, she still hoped that she could get some rewards.

Liu Ye was completely different from Bao’er, she felt that the reward wasn’t the most important thing, it was just the reward from a senior to the next generation, and the most important thing was how to challenge oneself to a greater extent and to breakthrough in one’s cultivation, faster and to a greater extent in this Heaven Staircase. She was silent and clenched her fists, secretly making a vow to herself, to break through and reach a higher realm in cultivation during this training at this Heaven Staircase.

She knew that Yue Yang had high expectations for her.

That Celestial Grimoire, as well as the Gods’ Ruins, all these hopes rested on her Perforation Deer, and if she could not break through and upgrade this skill of hers, then the exploration of these two places would continue to be delayed…

Xia Yi glanced at Hai Ying Wu, then at Liu Ye, and said to the Southern Goblin King, “The four of us are not strong enough, so you two go up first!”

Hai Ying Wu nodded in agreement.

Indeed, the strength of the Southern Goblin King was far greater than theirs.

If she stayed, then it would only slow down her cultivation, why not let her go up first and cultivate on a higher rank of the Heaven Staircase.

“This…….” the Southern Goblin King looked at Yue Yang, a little embarrassed. She was not shy to be with Yue Yang, on the contrary, she was happy to be alone with him, to be alone with him was precisely what she craved. However, Xia Yi’s tacit understanding of the situation made her feel a bit bad, after all, they were sisters who had joined forces and fought in the face of death and had together overcome many crises, but now she was going to leave them behind.

“It’s fine, we’ll catch up with Sister Yu first, then we’ll catch up with you guys slowly.” Hai Ying Wu smiled reassuringly.

In fact, with their strength, if Yue Yu and the Sickly Beauty didn’t come back down to the lower levels to cultivate, they would not even be able to catch up to Yue Yu and Sickly Beauty, let alone Yue Bing and Yi Nan.

The Southern Goblin King knew that these words were just meant to comfort her.

Her heart was filled with regret but at the same time a little touched, sisters, such a lovely and cute child was indeed her sister!

Although it was not official now, but at a later date, when all of them had been pushed down by Yue Yang, they will definitely live together more intimately and become official sisters. Even if they don’t, she was sure they would always be like Yi Nan, Luo Hua and the others, joining forces to fight against various strong foes….When the Southern Goblin King thought of this, she couldn’t help but reach out and hug the other girls: “Wait for me, once I reach my limits I will come back down, and we will continue to climb together. No matter now or in the future, I will always fight alongside you, side by side!”

What she said about side by side included fighting a certain Third Young Master together in bed.

Of course, for Xia Yi and Liu Ye, they couldn’t understand at all.

Instead, it was Hai Ying Wu, the Ocean Empress who possessed abnormal intelligence and who had experienced love, who seemed to be able to get the underlying meanings of her words, her jade face flushing a shade of crimson.

As the Southern Goblin King embraced her, she also nodded: “Good then, as long as you don’t admit defeat, I will definitely fight to the end!” Hai Ying Wu said this with conviction, she and Yue Yang had experienced many ‘fun times’ and although she could not ‘defeat’ him, if she were able to have some helpers, she would naturally have the courage to challenge him. Besides, even if they lost, it was nothing, they would just be totally exhausted by their beloved ‘naughty fellow’.

How could the pure Liu Ye, Xia Yi and Bao’er understand this ‘agreement of war’ that they had just agreed on.

Instead, they thought that the two of them had a particularly good bond.

Yue Yang smiled.

Pretending not to understand.

Let this life of bliss come more violently! This is the cry of a certain transmigrating man!

After waiting for the Southern Goblin King to finish her goodbyes and come to his side, he gave Liu Ye, Xia Yi, Bao’er and Hai Lan the four girls the detailed information about the various steps from a hundred to a thousand. And appointed Hai Ying Wu as the leader, giving her the task of leading the remaining three girls and making sure that they stuck together, advancing and retreating together. If they reached a level where Bao’er could not manage anymore, she was to let Bao’er into her grimoire and continue.

At the Heaven Staircase, one would surely be unable to climb up without sufficient strength.

But when they get to the resting platform, it’s still possible to let Bao’er out and get together, they must just be careful not to attract the shadows of divine energy left by the previous generation’s experts.

“Understood, we’ll take care, and you too.” Hai Ying Wu’s relationship with Yue Yang had long been public, coupled with her bold attitude, she hugged her lover and gave him a fiery and hot kiss. The Southern Goblin King looked on with a smile, and Bao’er was not afraid, watching the two kiss with interest, but Xia Yi and Liu Ye turned their heads to leave when seeing such a passionate scene. Xia Yi pretended to observe the Heaven Staircase, secretly complaining in her heart how this guy dared to be intimate with other girls in front of her, if he had kissed Bao’er lightly, she would definitely not be so angry, but he was being intimate with this Ocean Empress who had huge beyond comparison boobs that made her feel inferior everytime she looked at them, and she was unable to suppress the sourness that arose in her heart.

“……” Liu Ye lowered her head, her heartbeat accelerated uncontrollably, she yearned for Yue Yang to come and kiss her, even if it was just a light peck on the forehead, but at the same time she was also afraid he would do this, the conflict in her heart raged and fought with each other.

chapters.title: Chapter 793.1 - Five Element Pillar’S Divine Power, Ah Man’S Transformation
chapters.body:
Chapter 793.1 - Five Element Pillar’S Divine Power, Ah Man’S Transformation

Chapter 793.1 [Five Element Pillar’s Divine Power, Ah Man’s Transformation]

Heaven Staircase, the thousandth step.

When Yue Yang and the Southern Goblin King reached the thousandth step, they realised that Ah Man was fighting.

Her enemy was a ten meter tall Golden Earth Bear King. Yue Yang was amazed that the strength of this Golden Earth Bear King was far beyond the realm a shadow beast at the thousandth step should have. In Yue Yang’s Divine Vision, the strength contained in this Golden Earth Bear King was at least of a Heaven Rank 5, and if you compare it with the Central Palace Hall Elder, Yue Yang even had the misconception that this Golden Earth Bear King might even be stronger! Although its wisdom was lacking, it would never die, and it did not have any of the weaknesses commonly found in Heaven Ranked War Bests. As it would not feel pain or fear, if it went all out and fought to the death, the Central Palace Hall Elder that Yue Yang had thrown to Tian Zhu and the others for their cultivation would probably not be its match!

If it was a divine shadow that was found above the ten thousandth step and meant to test the cultivators there, then he could still accept it, but why would such a powerful divine shadow appear here at the thousandth step?

If the Guardian of the thousandth step was this Golden Earth Bear King, how did Yue Bing, Yue Yu, Yi Nan, and Wu Heng pass this level?

Yue Yang pondered seriously.

He and the Southern Goblin King drifted to the ground, but before they had the chance to ask Yue Bing and the others about the current situation, Earthmen who were only of the Innate Rank started to burrow out from the ground and rushed to attack them like blades of wind. Towards these Earthmen who were not even Innate Rank 3, Yue Yang and the Southern Goblin King could easily dispose of them just by raising their hands.

“It turns out that the actual test on this thousandth step are actually these Earthmen, but if so where did this Earth Bear King come from?” Yue Yang was suddenly enlightened, and after smashing the Earthmen to gain their recognition, he floated down to Yue Bing’s side, and wrapped his arms around Yue Bing and Yi Nan, who had rushed over happily, giving them a hug of comfort and encouragement.

“You’re back, good, as long as you are back!” Seeing Yue Yang return, Yue Yu was relieved.

“The thing is like this….”

Sickly Beauty started to narrate to Yue Yang about the happenings that had taken place since he left.

After Yue Yang left, Yue Bing and Yi Nan discussed for a long time, and decided not to rush upwards, instead choosing to lay a good foundation and cultivate solidly.

Therefore, the four girls together with Ah Man, returned to the start of the Heavenly Staircase three times in a row, and each time they climbed to the thousandth step, they went down and climbed up again. As a result, everyone now took much less time to complete the thousand step climb. In the process of climbing again and again, everyone’s cultivation perceptivity grew more and more, their gains became greater and their realm and strength rose rapidly.

Just as the four girls and Ah Man stepped onto the thousandth step for the fourth time, a consciousness inexplicably appeared in their minds to guide them.

With this consciousness’s guidance, they found a place they hadn’t originally noticed.

Perhaps, this place required them to keep re-climbing in order to unlock.

It was a golden platform.

There were five huge golden columns on it.

When the four girls and Ah Man followed the guidance of this mysterious consciousness and touched those five golden pillars in the order of the five elements ‘gold, wood, water, fire and earth’, a ball of light appeared on the central rune diagram, and this Golden Earth Bear King was born from inside that ball of light.

“That consciousness’s guidance says that if we can pass this test, then we will gain the Five Element Pillar’s Divine Power!” Seeing Yue Yang’s unbelievable expression of surprise,Sickly Beauty couldn’t help but be happy, and using her hand which was white like an orchid, she gestured for him to come back to reality: “Although we think this test is not going to be easy, but we don’t want to miss it and just want to have a try, and besides, with Ah Man around, the battle will definitely last until you return!”

“That’s right, Ah Man has been fighting all day and night! It’s a good thing she doesn’t get tired, otherwise she really wouldn’t have lasted until you came back!” What Yue Yu meant was that she wanted Yue Yang to take over and replace Ah Man, defeat the Golden Earth Bear King and gain the Five Element Pillar’s Divine Power.

“Let her fight on!” Yue Yang felt that it would be better if Ah Man could obtain the Five Element Pillar’s Divine Power.

Ah Man was a Guardian Beast.

The more powerful she was, the more strength Yue Yang, who was the master, received.

If she obtained the Five Element Pillar’s Divine Power, she might be able to upgrade to a Holy Beast, if that was the case, it would be more useful than Yue Yang obtaining this Five Element Pillars Divine Power himself.

The Southern Goblin King suddenly made a speculation that made Yue Yang’s heart jump: “If there is a hidden test for the thousandth step, then is there one for the two thousandth step as well? If there is none on the two thousandth step, what about on the five thousandth step? How about the ten thousandth step? I feel that in addition to the thousandth step, there must be a certain range and pattern in which the former warriors of the Heaven Staircase will have left more and stronger hidden tests. We can’t climb the Heaven Staircase and rush upwards in one breath, we should find out the various hidden tests as much as possible, only then can we fully receive the greatest cultivation gift that was left behind by our predecessors!”

Her words not only made Yue Yang’s heart thump when he heard them, but also made the four girls cheer when they heard them.

If, that was really the case.

Yue Yang would have more opportunities to obtain rewards, not only this Five Element Pillar’s Divine Power, but also others… Unlike the test after every hundred steps which happened at the platforms, it was not guaranteed they could obtain the highest recognition every time, and even if they did, the rewards might not be appropriate or might not even appear at all.

However this kind of high difficulty test that was hidden away would surely have a reward, and the rewards should all be top grade rewards of the ‘Divine’ category!

“If this is the case, then we will climb the entire Heaven Staircase again and again, repeatedly recultivating, and take all the rewards.” Who is Yue Yang? He was the unprecedented scrooge among all other transmigrators, who was simply ecstatic when he heard that there were so many top grade rewards waiting for him. Let the rewards such as Divine Power, God’s Blood, Divine weapons, and Divine beasts come at him violently!

chapters.title: Chapter 793.2 - Five Element Pillar’S Divine Power, Ah Man’S Transformation
chapters.body:
Chapter 793.2 - Five Element Pillar’S Divine Power, Ah Man’S Transformation

Chapter 793.2 [Five Element Pillar’s Divine Power, Ah Man’s Transformation]

For the sake of these top grade rewards, Yue Yang didn’t mind being a level grinder.

Besides, he didn’t even know how many times he had grinded similarly on online games before transmigrating over to this world.

For a hidden treasure chest, he had asked all the people he met, walked all over the mazes in the game and even overturned every stone and grass he had seen. For a hidden mission, he had spent two weeks talking to a beggar’s dog, to a point that everyone else in the game had thought he had gone nuts!

Even when uncertain of the existence of any rewards, Yue Yang always had a ‘better safe than sorry’ attitude.

Now that there was a great prize in front of him, how could he miss it?

Yue Yu long knew the personality of this younger brother of hers, and after exchanging glances with Sickly Beauty, covered their mouths to hide their laughter.

Yue Bing, however, did not feel that it was wrong for her brother to do so, instead she felt that it was a sign of him putting in effort to improve, her mother had said that only the most hard working would be rewarded, so her brother’s achievements did not come from laziness, but from diligent cultivation and wise deduction! Regarding this older brother of hers, what Yue Bing worshipped most about him was the fact that this older brother could turn whatever circumstances he was faced with into a chance to cultivate, whenever and wherever he wanted… Whether it was during a hard fight or even during ordinary times, he would never forget to cultivate!

“Boom!”

Seeing Yue Yang’s return, Ah Man’s morale was boosted.

She who had gradually gained the upper hand, now burst out her strongest strength to fight with the Golden Earth Bear King to the end.

Possessing the Heart of the Earth and the Power of the Titans, she was the Goddess of War who would never tire, even though that Golden Earth Bear King was only a divine shadow and would also never tire, its energy reserves however, would be constantly consumed as time passed and the battle dragged on, unlike the Goddess of War that was always able to draw energy from the earth.

When Yue Yang added three Giant Shadows to Ah Man simultaneously, the battle became even more decisive.

The power of Ah Man multiplied several fold, allowing her to knock the Golden Earth Bear King to the ground.

Now, even if the Golden Earth Bear King ran back to the Golden Five Element Pillar Formation to recover, it was no longer an opponent of Ah Man at all… After fiercely battling for another two hours, Ah Man the Goddess of War, finally completely defeated the Golden Earth Bear King.

When she majestically stepped on the Golden Earth Bear King to proclaim her victory, the Golden Earth Bear King did not disappear like the other divine shadows like those of the Watermen, Windmen, and Earthmen before him, but transformed into a burst of dazzling gold light that penetrated into the feet of Ah Man. At the same time, those five gigantic golden pillars were also linked together by a ray of light, forming a wonderful rune diagram array that enveloped Ah Man.

Five giant pillars of gold, spewing out the majestic energy of all five elements.

Five pillars of coloured light, namely gold, green, blue, red and orange, representing the five elements, rushed straight up into the sky, and at the height of their exuberance, they returned in reverse, shooting right into Ah Man’s head.

In a flash, Ah Man was bathed in the light rays and energy of the five elements and she could not help but raise her head and let out a loud cry unto the heavens, the sound shook the heavens and the earth, and a special and wonderful divine power merged with her and propelled her towards the threshold of a Holy Beast!

If she hadn’t obtained this divine power, it would still take a long time for her to advance to the level of a Holy Beast.

After all, she was not like the Golden Crown Thorny Flower Empress Duo Duo who possessed a unique innate talent and could constantly devour the corpses of the strong to evolve; nor was she as lucky as the Hornless Dragon Girl Jiang Ying who had obtained the inheritance of the Dragon God Supreme’s legacy of divine power after Yue Yang had unlocked the seal; she was not even as mentally mature as Red who understood human emotions and used God’s blood and double cultivation to advance to the Holy Beast Realm… She was Ah Man who had transformed and evolved step by step from a Bronze Barbaric Cow, and she had been able to come this far with not wisdom and strength, but serious study and absolute obedience.

No matter what Yue Yang taught her, she studied it meticulously.

No matter what task Yue Yang asked her to perform, she performed it completely without any objection.

Although Duo Duo, Jiang Ying, and Red all had a very upright attitude towards cultivation, it could still be said that Ah Man was definitely the one amongst all the Guardian Beasts of Yue Yang that had the most down to earth attitude when it came to cultivation.

“Ahhhh!”

The Five Element Pillar’s Divine Power was not easily fused together.

If it was another war beast, just a slight mistake could cause the powerful divine power to explode and kill the war beast attempting to fuse with it.

Yue Yang, however, was not at all worried for Ah Man, because, this Barbaric Cow who had already almost perfected her human transformation, while having an endless supply of earth energy to replenish her stamina, also had a body that was formed by fusing his own shadow with a Barbaric Cow and had already undergone many body remodeling. It could be said that amongst Yue Yang’s many war beasts, Ah Man was the one who had undergone the most transformations.

She was the ‘Shadow Barbaric Cow’ that would never burst.

No matter how much her body was shattered by the divine power, his mirage’s remodeling ability would allow her to recover quickly, and with every remodeling she underwent, Ah Man would become even closer to perfecting her human form!

In Ah Man’s body, the body remodeling skill of his mirages could be seen most clearly.

Even Red, who was also fused with one of his mirages, couldn’t compare to her.

“Has Ah Man turned into a Divine Beast?” Yue Yu, Yue Bing and Yi Nan were all so excited that one by one, they peeked over to see the information presented on Yue Yang’s Grimoire. The divine light in the distance had not yet dissipated, and they were unable to make out the changes that had happened to Ah Man, but Yue Yang’s grimoire had just automatically levitated out and a burst of divine light had flashed from it, presumably already revealing new information.

“Let me see!” Yue Yang, who also couldn’t wait, flipped open his grimoire with one hand and nervously looked into the changes in Ah Man’s description.

“Huh?” Everyone took a look and at the same time let out an exclamation of surprise, seemingly unable to believe this fact.

chapters.title: Chapter 794.1 - Earth Divine General, Ah Man’S Tears
chapters.body:
Chapter 794.1 - Earth Divine General, Ah Man’S Tears

Chapter 794.1 [Earth Divine General, Ah Man’s Tears]

The information presented on the grimoire was simply incredible to Yue Yang.

It turned out that Ah Man, who had been unable to promote to a Divine Beast before this, had not only succeeded in doing so, but had also become the first one to possess Godhood.

Even the Golden Crowned Thorny Flower Empress Duo Duo who was ever evolving, the Hornless Dragon Girl Jiang Ying who had inherited the Supreme Divine Power of the Dragon Emperor, Red and Ika who had fused with the God’s Blood, or Hui Tai Lang who was cultivated by Yue Yang himself, or even Xue Wu Xia’s Blizzard Goddess who had been fused with the Book of Truth which was a half-Divine Equipment and even Phoenix Fairy Beauty’s Charm Demon Queen.

All of them had evolved to become Divine Beasts much earlier than Ah Man.

All of them had achieved higher degrees of humanization.

Even Wen Li, who was a Divine Beast from birth or even possibly a Transcending Divine Beast, hadn’t been able to obtain Godhood… Now, who would have thought that the Bronze Barbaric Cow Ah Man, would stand out amongst his many guardian beasts, and become the first to obtain Godhood.

With the fusion of the Five Element Pillar’s Divine Power, she had obtained a unique Godhood: Earth Divine General.

The Earth Divine General was one of the Five Elemental Divine Generals.

With Ah Man’s current strength, not to mention a Divine General, she was not even qualified to become a Divine Envoy.

However, by her immense luck, she met a warrior who had entrusted all her power, knowledge and Godhood to the juniors of the future generations before she died. According to the information presented on the grimoire, Yue Yang could not understand how that predecessor had died, only that this ancient Divine General had left her power and Godhood on the Heaven Staircase before she had fallen.

“‘Child who inherit my power and Godhood, please find the other successors of the Five Elemental Divine Generals, only then can you truly wield the ‘Power of Earth’ in the Five Elements. After awakening the ‘Power of Earth’, please go to the Heaven Realm and reclaim the Earth Palace Hall… Perhaps this is too strict a requirement for you who have just inherited your power and Godhood, however, I no longer have time to climb higher on this Heaven Staircase to find stronger descendants to accomplish this… Moreover, it may be a kind of fate that you are able to inherit my power and Godhood, try your best, my child, the earth will never perish, use your power well! A Divine General is nothing more than the beginning of the ‘Path of Gods’, and above that, there are higher and stronger Godhood’s waiting for you, and I hope that you will carry the power of the earth with you all the way up to become a Divine Minister, a Divine King, and even a Supreme Divine… I wish you luck, my child, may the earth always be with you!”

“My God, there are actually Divine Beings in this world!” The Southern Goblin King gasped with difficulty, almost losing her voice in awe.

“Ah Man is amazing!” Yue Bing was filled with envy.

“But there doesn’t seem to be anything special happening?” Yue Bing turned her head to look at Ah Man who was still bathed in divine light, she felt something was wrong, normally when other war beasts promoted to become Divine Beasts, it would be a spectacular sight to behold, the heavens would shake and the earth would split open, even more so if the beast was promoting to become a Divine Envoy. It would be even more grand and eye-catching, however right now when Ah Man was promoting, nothing was happening at all?

“Maybe she has not fully awakened, or maybe her body is a little different.” Sickly Beauty felt that as Ah Man was originally a fusion between Yue Yang’s Phantom Shadow and a Bronze Barbaric Cow, body remodeling was a piece of cake for her, coupled with the constant supply of earth power, the process of assimilating with the Five Element Pillar’s Divine Power should be different from others.

“……. “Only Yue Yang realized that something was wrong.

Where they were right now, was the sky ladder.

The entire world of the Heaven Staircase was an unimaginable world tree.

Just now, the entire earth faintly trembled as Ah Man fused with the Five Element Pillar’s Divine Power.

The whole earth shook slightly, what did that mean? The entire Heaven Staircase World shook…what kind of power could make the entire Heaven Staircase World shake? Even a battle amongst powerhouses with strength of Heaven Rank 5 could not leave a mark in this Heaven Staircase, not even a single deep pit can be blasted out, under the countless laws and prohibitions of the Supreme Divine Power, the entire Heaven Staircase World is an indestructible existence, especially the steps of the Heaven Staircase, they were even more indestructible!

So to say that even the slightest shudder is an incredibly powerful response.

When Ah Man fused with the Five Element Pillar’s Divine Power, the entire Heaven Staircase trembled with it, and when he thought about it, that power was incredibly powerful!

Only Divine Power can create such an effect!

The divine light slowly faded away.

Ah Man’s figure gradually appeared in front of everyone.

At this moment, she was slightly different from the usual, the horns on her head had become more delicate, shiny like jade, and above her head of jet-black hair, a rainbow-coloured halo could be seen, slightly radiating an aura that was both holy and majestic, making those who look at it be filled with a sense of self-abasement that could not be blasphemed.

Her full body armor shattered and underneath it shone a perfect layer of incomparably beautiful red.

Under her slender feet were a pair of radiant golden rings.

chapters.title: Chapter 794.2 - Earth Divine General, Ah Man’S Tears
chapters.body:
Chapter 794.2 - Earth Divine General, Ah Man’S Tears

Chapter 794.2 [Earth Divine General, Ah Man’s Tears]

The Golden Earth Bear King’s Divine Image turned very attentive at this time, like a bear cub, prostrating itself at her feet and bowing to its new master. It also became the Guardian Beast of Ah Man along with her successful fusion with the Five Element Pillar’s Divine Power. Although it was a phantom, but with the Divine Awareness of the ancient Earth Divine General combined with the life force of the current Earth Divine General Ah Man, this Guardian Beast of Ah Man possessed a half-corporeal body, and and was of an Earth Bear King who had transformed into a Platinum Beast after successfully fussing with the Five Element Pillar’s Divine Power too. After successfully fusing with a small amount of the Five Element Pillar’s Divine Power, not only did it not weaken its original strength, which was equivalent to a Heaven Rank 5, but it had instead given it the potential to continue its evolution.

The ‘Golden Bell’ that was originally hanging from Ah Man’s neck gently floated onto her left wrist at this very moment.

On her right wrist, the Golden Wristband which she had obtained from the Taurus Temple floated instead.

On her waist, the Titan Belt also unbuckled and floated in midair, partially covering and blocking from view Ah Man’s perfected Divine Body….These items which had similarly fused with the Five Element Pillar’s Divine Power had now been completely unsealed and released a radiant and bright aura.

“Ah Man!” Yi Nan was so excited in her heart that she couldn’t help but let out a yelp.

After screaming, she was suddenly a little worried.

The current Ah Man was no longer the Ah Man she had been before, she was now the Earth Divine General that had obtained Godhood and could not be blasphemed against!

Ah Man heard her call and her eyes, which were originally tightly closed, suddenly opened. Torrential Divine Power started to radiate outwards as she opened her eyes and spread around, the entire platform of the thousandth step shuddered. The light from those eyes were so intimidating that even the world around them seemed to want to worship her in order not to compromise the majesty of her Godhood.

First of all, she fastened the Golden Bell, the Golden Bracelet, the Titan’s Belt and other accessories onto her naked body, and summoned her Platinum Grimoire to call back the Earth Bear King who was prostrate at her feet.

Then, with every step that shook the mountains and the valleys, she walked towards the others.

Yue Bing and Yi Nan both panicked.

Their consciousness was overwhelmed by the Divine Power and they waved their hands and cried out, “Don’t, Ah Man, don’t do this…….”

Even though Ah Man had now become an Earth Divine General, and possessed Godhood, even possessing an aura of supreme majesty, they still hoped that Ah Man would be able to live peacefully with everyone as before, and not be ‘intimidating’ like she was now.

Ah Man came over in big strides, her eyes fixed on Yue Yang.

Is she going to leave brother?

After successfully promoting to a Divine General, was she going to betray her brother and cease to be his Guardian Beast?

Thinking of this, Yue Bing was even more panicked in her heart, she rushed out and stood in front of Yue Yang, with tears in her eyes she cried out: ”Ah Man, no, as an Earth Divine General, you can leave, but you must not hurt brother! We didn’t do anything wrong to you, even though you are brother’s Guardian Beast, we have always treated you as a human… You may have obtained Godhood now and want to be free, you can leave, but you are not allowed to hurt Brother!”

No matter how powerful Ah Man had become now, as long as she was going to make a move on her brother, Yue Bing was determined to fight her to the end, and would definitely not let her hurt a single hair on Yue Yang’s body before she herself was pulverized!

As Ah Man stretched out her hand, a divine light flashed.

Yue Bing couldn’t help but drift to the side, completely unable to resist.

In her anger, she leapt back towards Ah Man, preparing to strike her with her strongest attack, only to find that Ah Man had fallen to both knees and had bent over to hug her brother’s legs… Her fist, which carried her full force could not be stopped in time and continued to strike towards Ah Man who was kneeling down, luckily, her fist was gently caught by Yue Yang.

“Master.” Ah Man raised her face, and everyone saw that her eyes were filled with tears: “Ah Man is finally a Divine Beast, finally achieving a perfect humanoid form!”

“You have worked hard!” Yue Yang tenderly reached out his hand and gently stroked away the raging tears in her eyes, over and over again, with great patience, but Ah Man was like a child who had been looked down by the world and had finally seen her parents’ approving smile, clasped his legs with both hands and let out a loud cry. Her cry was like a cuckoo’s cry for blood, like that of a broken man and echoed endlessly throughout the Heaven Staircase World.

Yue Bing was a bit embarrassed and reached out her hand, taking advantage of the fact that everybody else had also rushed forward to comfort Ah Man, she also hugged Ah Man tightly, to apologize for suspecting her earlier.

Only now was she completely at ease.

Ah Man would never betray her brother or leave him.

She was the Guardian Beast of her brother, and would always be, regardless if she evolved to become an Earth Divine General or something else, that would never change!

Of course, there were things she didn’t understand, such as how could Ah Man still cry so tragically even after evolving to become a Divine Beast and obtaining Godhood, was she not happy with what she had obtained? Yue Bing couldn’t empathize with Ah Man, she could never understand the psychological changes that took place in the heart of a brute who originally had an ugly appearance and had worked hard and cultivated even harder, going through countless evolutions, all to obtain a perfect humanoid form… It wasn’t that Ah Man didn’t understand such things before, she just didn’t have enough emotional capacity to express the joy and sorrow in her heart.

She was unlike Duo Duo, who was extremely fast in evolving and had perfected her humanoid transformation within a short period of time.

In comparison to normal war beasts or other guardian beasts, of course the transformation of Ah Man was already considered very fast.

However, among the many Guardian Beasts of Yue Yang, she couldn’t compare with Duo Duo, Jiang Ying, and Red, and even less so with Wen Li, a Snake Demon Loli who was born superior in every aspect.

She had always been an ugly brute and had all this while been unable to step into the realm of Divine Beasts.

How could she not cry out loud when she looked back at all the things she went through, the endless effort she had put in, the relentless support her master had given her, the conflicting emotions that arose in her was a mixture of sadness, bitterness, happiness and joy. A multitude of emotions engulfed her and prevented her from speaking. Besides, she believed that after this time, she would never cry like this again, because she would work hard to fully transform into an Earth Divine General and strive to be the greatest helper of her master, to become his one and only Ah Man……

Everyone was touched when they heard the unbridled sobs of Ah Man.

Yi Nan and Yue Bing embraced each other and secretly wiped their tears.

Yue Yu and Sickly Beauty were also red-eyed, they couldn’t help but softly comfort Ah Man, while the Southern Goblin King secretly clenched her fists, secretly vowing in her heart to work harder, she must work even harder! By his side, not only was he surrounded by geniuses, but even his war beasts were so excellent that if she didn’t redouble her efforts, she was afraid she would only be left far behind!

chapters.title: Chapter 795.1 - Yue Yu’S Puzzlement
chapters.body:
Chapter 795.1 - Yue Yu’S Puzzlement

Chapter 795.1 [Yue Yu’s Puzzlement]

Three days later. When Yue Yang, Xue Wu Xia and Princess Qian Qian climbed up to the ten thousandth step for the third time, the Night Empress had somehow come down and was waiting for him.

“It seems that you guys have already realised the secret of the Heaven Staircase… how was the harvest? Really? Did you all get something different? This is destiny, you can’t force it, as long as you calm your heart and train diligently, there will always be something suitable for you! The rewards we receive now from our predecessors are actually a kind of legacy of the Heaven Staircase, and when we are strong enough, or at some point of time when we bid farewell to this world, we can also leave a shadow of our consciousness here, to give a little guidance to our descendants! Empress Fei Wen Li, the Prison Emperor, as well as other powerful predecessors such as Thousand Leaves, Celestial Wheel and Colorless, had all left their consciousness on this Heaven Staircase in the form of shadows, we just don’t know where they are. What have you all gotten so far? Come share with me your stories to make me happy too!”

“It’s like this, the first one is Bing’er, she obtained the Fantasy Pearl…” Princess Qian Qian started to narrate in detail what each of them had gone through and what rewards they had each gained.

“Ah Man was promoted to a Divine General? She got the ‘Power of Earth ’of the Five Element Pillar’s Divine Power? What a surprise, I thought there wouldn’t be this type of reward until above half a million steps!” Night Empress’s heavenly voice carried a sense of incomparable joy, especially when she heard that Ah Man had been promoted to Earth Divine General, which made her even more pleasantly surprised.

“Unfortunately, with Ah Man’s current strength, she can only wield one percent of the power of the Earth Divine General realm!” Yue Yang sighed with some regret.

“Don’t be ungrateful, fortunately it’s Ah Man, if it were somebody else, they wouldn’t even be able to withstand the Earth Divine General’s divine power! Besides, even if Ah Man could only wield one percent of her divine power right now, that would still be remarkable power!
