This is divine power we are talking about, and divine power is completely different from ordinary power!” Night Empress couldn’t help but smile when she heard Yue Yang complaining, but she still gently comforted Yue Yang.

“What did you and Zhi Zun gain up there?” Xue Wu Xia asked.

“For the 70,000th, 80,000th and 90,000th step, I have received the highest recognition from the consciousness guarding there and obtained a bit of a gain. The highest recognition for the 100,000th and 150,000th step were obtained by Zhi Zun, and now she is rushing towards the 200,000th step. Since the battle with the Navagraha Queen, Zhi Zun had improved by leaps and bounds and her previous goal of the 200,000th step no longer seemed very difficult. Her goal now was to reach the 500,000th step, and with Little Yue Yang’s cooperation, I reckon she could even hit a million steps within a year…provided that both she and Little Yue Yang must possess a Celestial Grimoire and have full control of Divine Equipment!”

Night Empress’s words were a shock to Yue Yang, Xue Wu Xia and Princess Qian Qian.

Everyone knew that Zhi Zun had broken through and improved during the battle against the Navagraha Queen.

But they never expected that.

Her advancement was so huge.

In the past her goal was the 200,00th step, and if it was no longer very difficult like what Night Empress had said, then for the current Zhi Zun, what realm exactly had she reached? Could she climb up to the 300,000th step on her own? Or even the 400,000th step?

When she saw the suspicion in the hearts of the three, the Night Empress giggled, her laughter was as clear as a bell, as if with a bit of mischief, and soft as a gentle breeze: “You brats, are you the only ones allowed to improve, are we not allowed to improve as well? Even with your smart little brains and monstrous talents, aren’t we allowed to move forward by a step in the time it takes for you to move forward ten steps?”

Princess Qian Qian quickly waved her hand, “That’s different, your one step is much greater than our ten steps, in your realm, every step forward is like the distance between the heavens and the earth!”

Night Empress was happy: “Don’t try to flatter me, we know what we are doing.”

As soon as Yue Yang heard that the Night Empress did not want to talk about their cultivation realm too much, he quickly changed the topic and asked, “What does Zhi Zun expect of me now? Am I supposed to rush to the 100,000th step, or the 200,000th step? Do you think the current me can climb up to the 200,000th step? Not to mention the 200,000th step, even to reach the 100,000th step seems beyond my reach currently!”

The Night Empress waited for him to finish, and after a slight pause, she said softly, “We all know you’re anxious, but cultivation mustn’t be rushed!”

Xue Wu Xia’s eyes lit up and she cried out in surprise, “You have a way to help him break through?”

When she cried out, both Yue Yang and Princess Qian Qian immediately reacted.

They both looked at the Night Empress with incomparably expectant eyes.

The Night Empress did not open her mouth, but muttered slightly as if she was organizing her words, and only after a long while did she say softly, “There are many ways to break through. But we mustn’t rush, we have to choose the most suitable method… Little Yue Yang, your breakthrough point is nothing else but through battle! You don’t need to cultivate at the Heaven Staircase yet, but instead you should be fighting intensively against your enemies, first to fully excite your lower potential, and when your potential below the Innate realm has been fully stimulated to reach a complete fusion of perfection, then naturally you will break through and ascend to become a Supreme Innate! Don’t worry, this realm will be a natural breakthrough for you, not requiring too many extra external factors and conditions, but you must always be in battle mode, stay focused and do your best!”

Yue Yang pondered, “Are you asking me to return to the Heaven Realm?”

“Yes, there’s nothing wrong with you practicing here, but because you’re here, the others cannot do their best in cultivation. With you here, people are afraid to challenge themselves to the limit for fear of worrying you! But if you stay and train in the Heaven Realm, break through to Supreme Innate, and then return here to cultivate with me and Zhi Zun, that would be fine, we can try to make it to the 500,000th step… If you can’t even break through Supreme Innate while fighting in the Heaven Realm, then… this, I have another method but I don’t know if it’s a feasible solution… You go back to the Tian Luo Palace and find Ah Xian, ask her if she’s willing, try to bring her to the ‘Divine Grimoire World’, maybe she has a way to make you contract a Divine Grimoire!”

“Ah, Fourth Mother?” Yue Yang was stunned after hearing that.

“I’m just guessing, I’m not 100% sure. Moreover, if you yourself can break through to Supreme Innate, you don’t have to rely on the Divine Grimoire, the Divine Grimoire is not easy to contract, even if you have successfully contracted it, you are still unable to use it now and it will be detrimental to you instead.” The Night Empress paused for a while before giving out a few more words of advice, and finally, without waiting for the shocked Yue Yang and Xue Wu Xia to react, she drifted away in a fragrant breeze.

chapters.title: Chapter 795.2 - Yue Yu’S Puzzlement
chapters.body:
Chapter 795.2 - Yue Yu’S Puzzlement

Chapter 795.2 [Yue Yu’s Puzzlement]

Does Fourth Mother have a way to make Yue Yang contract the Divine Grimoire?

This news was simply even more incredible than Ah Man fusing with the Five Element Pillar’s Divine Power to advance to Earth Divine General!

Exactly what kind of history did Fourth Mother and her sister have, and why did they possess such mysterious powers, yet were so obscure?

Yue Yang was thinking of another possibility, could it be that even now Fourth Mother was still in contact with her sister using some special method? Fourth Mother’s sister, the most mysterious woman in the entire Tong Tian Tower, the only woman who was able to enter the God’s Ruins.

Was she still in the God’s Ruins?

Or, perhaps she was cultivating in the Heaven Staircase itself, maybe she was cultivating above the millionth step or perhaps even the ten millionth step?

Xue Wu Xia was the first to break out of their trance and gently hugged Yue Yang from behind: “Don’t think too much about it, no matter what Fourth Mother does, she will surely have our best interests in mind!”

Princess Qian Qian also nodded, affirming Xue Wu Xia’s statement: “How about this, the two of us will accompany you to the Heaven Realm to cultivate, and when we break through to become Supreme Innates, we will go back to the Tian Luo Palace, find Fourth Mother, and go to the Divine Grimoire World together. If you can’t contract it, then it’s fine, I’m sure your current grimoire will definitely upgrade to become a Divine Grimoire in the future too!”

“Yes!” Yue Yang secretly wiped cold sweat from his brows, he actually already had a Holy Grimoire, he was just unable to use it.

Currently, he already had a Diamond Grimoire and a Holy Grimoire.

Was it possible to contract another Divine Grimoire?

Yue Yang doesn’t dare to think of this answer!

Out of his mentality of ‘good things must not flow out to outsiders’’, Yue Yang secretly made up his mind that even if he could no longer contract a Divine Grimoire in the future, he must not let any outsider contract it either, be it Fourth Mother, Xue Wu Xia or Princess Qian Qian, if any of them could contract with it, then he would let them contract with it! If none of them were capable, he would rather free Empress Fei Wen Li, who was trapped in the black hole seal, and let her contract the Divine Grimoire instead….

One must know, there are only ten Divine Grimoires in total!

In the Heaven Realm, not to mention Holy and Divine Grimoires, even Diamond Grimoires were rare, and even a Heaven Rank warrior who had a Platinum or Gold Grimoire was already considered a powerhouse! So how can you let someone else have such a good thing as a Divine Grimoire?

If Yue Yang was still able to continue contracting with other grimoires, in his mind, he wouldn’t mind it if he could contract with all ten of the Divine Grimoires in the world.

If he really couldn’t contract that many himself, letting those around him contract them would be alright too….

Anyway, all ten of the Divine Grimoires must be obtained by the people around him, he would never let anyone else get it. A Divine Grimoire was without a doubt the most powerful Divine Equipment, and the Guardian Beasts living inside should all be of Divine Rank as well, not to mention possessing Divine Grade Innate Talents, a Divine Grimoire World and also Divine Consciousness. The Divine Grimoire should also have Divine Power and a unique Godhood etc. How could he allow a treasure like this to fall into the hands of the enemy?

After Yue Yang, Xue Wu Xia and Princess Qian Qian decided that they had rested enough, they returned to the Heaven Realm and entered the Training Grounds once again, the time to fight against the enemies of the Central Palace Hall had come!

At the platform on the four hundredth step.

It was the ninth time Yue Yu and Sickly Beauty had climbed up to this point and they were watching over Liu Ye as she challenged the shadow consciousness at the four hundredth step, the Fogmen.

Amidst the white fog engulfing the entire platform was a fogmen wielding a sickle made from fog, for the exhausted Liu Ye who had spent all her energy climbing up to this point, it was an almost impossible feat for the current Liu Ye to defeat this Fogmen. The Fogmen at the four hundredth step was a tough opponent, it did not have an actual body and was just a cloud of fog and could change its shape as it liked within the fog, including transforming any weapon it wanted from the fog and attacking the challenger with it! If it wasn’t for the fact that the teleportation of her Perforation Deer was really too fast, plus the fact that Liu Ye could already synchronise her teleportation and her mind as one, allowing her to narrowly dodge the attacks of the Fogmen every time, otherwise she would long have been sliced apart by the Fogmen’s deadly sickles…

“Come on, I can’t tell you its weaknesses, you must overcome them yourself to get the highest recognition, no one has gotten the reward of the four hundredth step and maybe it’s yours, so go for it!” Yue Yu had gone to a lot of trouble to defeat the Mistmen and she was anxious for Liu Ye, but couldn’t help.

“I know!” Liu Ye was distracted when answering and was almost cut by the sickle of the Fogmen, startling her and causing her to teleport a hundred meters away with her Perforation Deer.

A few strands of silk like hair on her head had been shaved off by the Fogmen’s Sickle.

They drifted into the air.

Yue Yu stomped her feet in frustration when witnessing this close shave, making Liu Ye climb up to the four hundredth step still seemed a little too forced.

This Liu Ye had no attack power at all!

Huh?

Just as Yue Yu’s heart was racing, suddenly, she saw a bit of golden light shining out of the corset that Liu Ye was wearing which had been split open by the Fogmen earlier, that…was that a golden locket? Why did that little thing look so familiar?

chapters.title: Chapter 796.1 - Unsealing, Lightning Vortex
chapters.body:
Chapter 796.1 - Unsealing, Lightning Vortex

Chapter 796.1 [Unsealing, Lightning Vortex]

Yue Yu was bewildered and couldn’t help but touch the Golden Rune Locket around her own neck.

Her own locket was still there!

If these two golden lockets were really a pair, then wouldn’t Liu Ye be… on the other hand should Liu Yue’s be the real one, then she herself might be… Yue Yu’s heart was anxious. She wanted to get a better look, but was worried that Liu Yue would be no match for the Fogmen who was still attacking her with a sickle. However, faced with the pressure of being under the shadow of death stimulated Liu Ye’s potential and finally Lady Luck shone upon her, as she dodged the sweeping sickle again, she extended her right hand.

A holy and flawless light bloomed in the palm of the hand.

The sickle made from fog that was cutting down on her head turned into smoke in an instant as it was dispelled by Liu Ye’s Cleansing Innate Talent.

It disappeared into thin air!

The Fogmen, who was constantly transforming and revealing a fierce appearance, gradually calmed down, his brows gradually relieved and clarity restored in his eyes. The Fogman looked deeply into the eyes of Liu Ye and after one glance, it transformed into a cloud of fog, floating high up into the sky, blending into the clouds and mist, never to be seen again.

The lump of smoke which was originally the Fogmen’s sickle that had been dispelled by Liu Ye’s Cleansing Innate Talent earlier, gradually changed from a black-gray lump to become a milk-white mist that slowly formed into the shape of a ribbon, right now it was as if the ribbon had gained consciousness and came to life. It circled around Liu Ye, making her look as if she was floating on the clouds, like a Goddess who had descended to the world. Previously, no one had ever obtained the highest recognition of the guardian of the 400th step, and now, Liu Ye, who had cleared the test in the best way possible, had obtained the highest recognition of the ancient expert’s consciousness and obtained the reward which had been left behind, the Floating Mist Belt.

Floating Mist Belt: Gold rank treasure, psychic shield, when controlled by the mind, can summon more clouds of mist to enhance the owner’s mentality or shield the owner’s mentality.

“Congratulations!” Yue Yu was genuinely happy for Liu Ye and rushed over to congratulate her.

Of course, she also wanted to take a closer look.

Did Liu Ye also possess a Golden Rune Locket?

But Liu Ye, this little girl was very shy, the first thing she did was to cover up her torn corset, in addition to that, Liu Ye now had the Floating Mist Belt encircling around her body, preventing Yue Yu from seeing clearly if Liu Ye was indeed wearing a golden locket on her neck, at the very least, Yue Yu couldn’t be sure whether or not Liu Ye’s golden locket was identical to hers!

Seemingly sensing that Yue Yu looked a bit off, Liu Ye asked with a bit of confusion, “Sister Yue Yu, what’s wrong?”

“Nothing, I was just thinking that this Floating Mist Belt of yours is quite beautiful and got distracted!” Yue Yu quickly waved her hand to deny that anything was wrong with her, she couldn’t directly ask her about the golden locket. In case she accidentally revealed the secret, it might hurt Liu Ye’s heart, this was not a consequence that she could bear. Yue Yu didn’t dare to track down the truth for now, she just made a secret note in her heart and waited for a future opportunity to have a closer inspection of Liu Ye’s locket. Regarding the mystery of her identity, Yue Yu was conflicted in her heart, she deeply wanted to solve the mystery in her heart, but was also afraid that she would not be able to face Yue Yang after learning the truth.

“It’s a pity that it has fused to become one with me, otherwise I would have given it to you.” Liu Ye smiled with slight bitterness, this treasure wasn’t like the others, it recognized its owner and couldn’t be given to someone else even if she wanted to.

“How can I take it from you, I will get something myself in the future, besides this is the best one for you to use!” Yue Yu lovingly stroked Liu Ye’s little head, ‘Concentrate on your cultivation first, don’t worry about your identity for now, we’ll talk about it later when there’s a chance!’ Yue Yu told herself.

She silently heaved a small sigh of relief as she thought of this.

The mystery of her identity was simply too difficult.

If she knew the truth, it might not be a good thing after all, anyway her current situation was quite good, so why not just keep following him, from the moment that she had made up her mind to look after him for the rest of her life, the truth was not so important anymore…… Yue Yu’s thoughts swirled, and for a moment she regained her confidence, patting Liu Ye’s shoulders: “Let’s go, we’ll take a short break before we get back to work! This is just the beginning!”

Western Heaven Realm. FIrst stage of the training grounds.

Rain Valley.

Yue Yang reached the Wind Valley first, but there were not many Heaven Realm warriors in the Wind Valley. With some confusion, he returned to the Rain Valley, only to realize that Fatty Hai and the others hadn’t managed to clear it yet, and were all still in the Rain Valley catching Lightning Rain Swallows.

Lightning Rain Swallows were like a school of sardines in the sea.

Continuously flying in the sky.

A dozen of the strongest leaders surrounded the swarm of Lightning Rain Swallows with their energy storm. The other Heaven Realm warriors on the ground were like sharks on the hunt, always aiming for the very center of the Lightning Rain Swallow swarm whenever they leapt into the air, hoping to capture their target.

Of course, due to the restriction of the Power of Law which forbade flight, every leap of the Heaven Realm warriors was not easy, and if they accidentally leaped higher than a thousand metres into the sky, they would even be subjected to punishment by lightning strikes.

Below a thousand meters, for every ten meters they leapt, they would have to bear twice as much gravity. For those whose strength was of Heaven Rank 3 or higher, it was still bearable, even if they didn’t manage to capture the Lightning Rain Swallow, they could still land safely…, it was more tragic for the Heaven Ranked warriors who had just entered the Heaven Rank. If they were not careful, they might even succumb to the abnormally high gravity and fall face first into the ground.

And even if they managed to catch a Lightning Rain Swallow, it was not equivalent to successfully completing the task given to them.

According to the Rain Elder’s condition, the Lightning Rain Swallow had to be alive.

The Lightning Rain Swallow was extremely timid.

If they had no special way to capture it, even if it was caught, it would just be frightened to death.

“Is this thing really that hard to catch?” Yue Yang sweated a little as he looked at their antics, he actually didn’t catch a Lightning Rain Swallow the last time because he had managed to capture the crux of the entire matter, at the same time Yue Yang saw that this entire mission was actually a hoax set up by that Rain Elder! That old man had set the conditions when he was bored, so he was able to directly allow Yue Yang to pass the previous time. Yue Yang’s appearance caused Fatty Hai and the others who were struggling to catch a Lightning Rain Bird to feel startled and surprised at the same time.

“How did you get here?” Xue Tang Lang and Prince Tian Luo asked in unison, they never expected Yue Yang to return to the Rain Valley.

“I came back to have a look, are you guys catching or killing these swallows?” Yue Yang sweated violently when he saw the scene in front of him which consisted of a sky full of leaping Heaven Rankers, trying to capture Lightning Rain Swallows, even Lord Ling Yun was not an exception, in fact with their strength, it was quite simple to catch a Lightning Rain Swallow, but it would be difficult to capture it alive. Yue Yang did not know that, in fact, as a Deputy Palace Lord of the Central Palace Hall, Wei Shu had spent three whole hours before painstakingly completing this task.

Yue Yang watched everyone’s efforts and realized that catching a live Lightning Rain Swallow was indeed a bit difficult.

This should be done using techniques.

Brute force?

That definitely wouldn’t do.

By now three days had passed but Lord Ling Yun and the others were still trying to catch them?

chapters.title: Chapter 796.2 - Unsealing, Lightning Vortex
chapters.body:
Chapter 796.2 - Unsealing, Lightning Vortex

Chapter 796.2 [Unsealing, Lightning Vortex]

Perhaps he saw the doubt in Yue Yang’s eyes, but at the same time, he also kind of wanted to prove himself and not let Yue Yang, the esteemed Third Young Master, feel that he was too useless. Lord Ling Yun stepped forward to greet Yue Yang while releasing a Lightning Rain Swallow with a smile on his face, we have completed the clearance requirement, but there are still many people who have not managed to complete the task and need to retest over and over again, so we don’t feel like we’re in a hurry to move to the next stage for now. Besides, it’s an extremely rare benefit to be able to listen to the Rain Elder’s instructions every day!” City Lord Tu Hai also immediately rushed forward to greet Yue Yang, “Capturing Lightning Rain Swallows is a kind of cultivation for us, many of them are showing signs of breakthroughs, and the fastest Young Master Tan Lang has even directly promoted by one level!”

Seeing the two of them so attentive, the leaders of the three battle groups, Eight Desolations, Snow Plain, and Battle Song all came to a sudden realization.

This mysterious young man in front of them was precisely the “Third Young Master” they had been hearing about.

Should they go forward and pay their respects, or just wait and see what happens?

In the absence of a formal introduction, as sovereigns possessing peak strength at the Heaven Rank 5, were they supposed to go forward and pay their respects to this Third Young Master who seemed to only be a quasi-Heaven Rank and looked so young it was almost unbelievable like Lord Ling Yun and City Lord Tu Hai?

While they were still hesitating, suddenly they saw Yue Yang stretch out his hand and the Lightning Rain Swallow that had just been released by Lord Ling Yun and had shot into the skies earlier suddenly turned back. It descended from the sky and circled around him. When Yue Yang pointed his finger at the sky, the Lightning Rain Swallow flew up once again and “disappeared” into the group of Lightning Rain Swallows that were dodging the pursuit of the Heaven Realm warriors. The crowd could not understand, “What does this mean?

Ten seconds later, they suddenly witnessed all the Lightning Rain Swallows all over the sky, one by one, flew down like arrows to densely cover the whole sky.

One by one, they circled around Yue Yang’s side, flying in a big swirling vortex.

Shock!

Everyone in that area was stunned, shocked beyond belief!

Were these the same Lightning Rain Swallows known for her timidity and distrust? Now they were simply more docile than the peaceful doves that normally liked to play with people..Yue Yang clasped his hands together, purple lightning under the effects of a small portion of the Power of Law created millions of spherical lightning bolts. One by one, the spherical lightning bolts enveloped the Lightning Rain Swallows and gradually merged into their bodies.

The destructive purple spherical lightning bolts were now completely harmless.

Instead, there was only a special catalytic and unsealing effect.

The seal inside the Lightning Rain Swallow’s body shattered, and the force of the spherical lightning bolts spewed out, one by one, immediately followed by a bolt of lightning. One by one, the Lightning Rain Swallows who were originally Earth Rank war beasts evolved to become Heaven Rank 1 war beasts.

Each one of them was like a purple lightning bolt.

Or rather, the lightning was their wings and the thunderbolt was their driving force.

The eyes of the crowd of onlookers turned into big round saucers and everyone raised their heads as they watched these little birds flap their flickering wings which were crackling with lightning and flying around Yue Yang all over the sky! They formed a huge vortex of lightning and all who saw it could not help but exclaim inwardly: this must be the true form of the Lightning Rain Swallows!

“Greeting the Third Young Master.” At this time, the leaders of the three major battle groups, Eight Desolations, Snow Plain and Battle Song were already shocked by Yue Yang beyond measure. It was the first time that they had seen someone using the Power of Laws with the strength of a quasi-Heaven Ranker, and apart from that, in full view of hundreds and nearly a thousand people as witness, thousands of living creatures had been unsealed by the Power of Law in an instant and had broken through to the Heaven Rank… It was so spectacular and so shocking that nothing they had ever seen could compare to it, they were palpitating in their hearts!

It’s simply the power of a God!

If it wasn’t for the fact that so many people were present and this scene had been witnessed by only one person, they would probably be so scared that they would kneel right on the spot.

Lord Ling Yun and CIty Lord Tu Hai were so moved that they almost shed tears.

What did it mean to have power?

Only this can be called true power!

This move that the Third Young Master had just made completely shocked those who banked on their miniscule amount of strength and always thought highly of themselves. Seeing the leaders of Eight Desolations, Snow Plain and Battle Song respectfully bowing and paying their respects to Yue Yang, the two of them, Lord Ling Yun and City Lord Tu Hai, looked at each other and secretly nodded their heads.

It was already too late for them to show their respect, it was still the two of us who were the most upstanding.

“Too much time has been delayed in this Rain Valley, although it is good to improve our cultivation, the current situation has prevented us from growing leisurely.” The corner of Yue Yang’s lips revealed a mysterious smile, and then he released a piece of shocking news: “The army of the Central Palace Hall is heading our way in great haste, it would not even take them a day before they start entering this training grounds en masse. If everyone doesn’t leave the Rain Valley, I’m afraid it won’t be as simple as the fight against the Dark Realm’s fallen warriors.

Let’s go, let’s move on, those who have the ability and confidence, step into the Wind Valley with me, we’ll wait for them at the second or third stage!”

“We all have confidence.” Lord Ling Yun was delighted, it was definitely right to follow after the Third Young Master. They had already made an enemy out of the Central Palace Hall and without a strong backer, their future would be miserable.

Yue Yang brought the millions of Lightning Rain Swallows flying around in a swirling vortex of lightning and returned to the Rain Shelter Pavilion with the others.

The fallen warriors of the Dark Realm also followed cautiously from a distance.

They did not want to fight with Yue Yang, but they did not want to disobey the orders given by the Central Palace Hall as well. Right now, they could not offend either side.

Yue Yang looked at them, “Old man, let them pass as well! There are some things that are only fun when there are more people!”

The Rain Elder was not in a good temper when replying to him: “If you yourself want to be an exception I can still accept it, even if you want to bring so many people who can not pass into the Wind Valley, this can also be ignored, but you’ve turned all my Lightning Rain Swallows into your war beasts, where do you want me, an old man, to put my face?”

“You never cared about them, and I’ve helped you out by unsealing them, now not only are you not thanking me but even criticizing me? Besides, I’m only borrowing this, so I’ll return it to you after I pass the Wind Valley! Yue Yang laughed and kicked Fatty Hai, who was saluting Elder Rain, into the portal on top of the pavilion. Together, they disappeared.

The thousands of Lightning Rain Swallows were like a purple lightning vortex, following closely behind.

As for Yue Yang’s act of forcibly commandeering the Lightning Rain Swallows, this unlucky old man, Elder Rain, could only pretend not to see it.

Instead, he nodded to Xue Tan Lang who bowed last before leaving, “Work hard, at least make it through three stages, you have potential, you just lack some time!”

chapters.title: Chapter 797.1 - Ambush
chapters.body:
Chapter 797.1 - Ambush

Chapter 797.1 [Ambush]

“Windy Valley is the exact opposite of Rain Valley.”

Yue Yang’s words were not only spoken to the Heaven Realm warriors of the 3 main battle groups, but also to the Dark Realm fallen warriors, “Here, never land on the ground! If you do, you will be punished by the Power of the Law. Keep your body in the air, the higher the better, and if you have any war beasts that can aid you, just summon them, there is no restriction on summoned beasts here. However, the use of weapons, including treasures, is prohibited…”

Before he could finish his words, he saw a Heaven Realm warrior with a weapon in her hand trembling with sweat, she was holding a golden trident with both hands.

In just a few seconds, the golden trident in her hand had become too heavy or her to hold.

She let go.

It flew straight down to the ground.

Similarly to her, among the Dark Realm warriors on the opposite side, there were several warriors who dropped their weapons successively, and the amount of time they could hold on to their weapon differed based on their strengths, some could hold on for longer while others dropped their weapons almost immediately.

But no matter how long they could hold on, it was meaningless, because the weapons that appeared in the Wind Valley were destined to not return to their owners.

It might not be absolute, but unless one possessed a supreme will that transcended everything, or could wield the Power of Law, otherwise, it would not be easy for a warrior to keep their weapons in this Wind Valley. Fatty Hai and the others had long been warned by Yue Yang and naturally wouldn’t behave in such a disorderly manner. Every one of them stood tall and proud in that group of Heaven Realm powerhouses, and although they were the weakest of all, at the moment, nobody would dare look down on them, not even a single bit… When they summoned their grimoires, it caused an even bigger commotion amongst the Heaven Realm warriors, they were extremely surprised that all the members of Third Young Master’s group possessed summoning grimoires.

“In this Wind Valley, for you who are trying to pass the trials, it is best not to kill your enemies with your own hands, this is the job of your summoned beasts, otherwise you will face ten times the penalty. Also one other thing, the shadow war beasts here only attack their masters, anybody else who kills them will only receive double the punishment, nobody can help you, you can only rely on yourselves.” As Yue Yang spoke, in the sky, there were already multitudes of shadow war beasts flying towards them, they were as numerous as the war beasts summoned by the Heaven Realm experts.

“We’re not even going to do anything?” Lord Ling Yun was shocked.

“There are just too many shadow war beasts!” Tu Hai was shocked to see the endless wave of shadow war beasts advancing upon them, numbering in the tens of thousands, of which the shadow duplicates of the war beasts owned by the experts in the 3 main battle groups were the most powerful. Furthermore, the number of shadow Lightning Rain Swallows that were the duplicates for Yue Yang’s war beasts were the most in number, densely covering the sky.

The leaders of the Heaven Realm warriors with keen senses discovered an incredible fact.

This Third Young master, apart from the shadow Lightning Rain Swallow’s, there were no other shadow war beasts flying to attack him.

Could it be that the shadow war beast limit here was ten thousand? Or was this Third Young Master trying not to reveal his true strength and was trying to instead use these Lightning Rain Swallow’s?

If against all odds and this Third Young Master was not affected by the restrictions in this Wind Valley….

That, that would be terrifying.

Thinking of this, the faces of the dozen or so leaders changed color, and they saw all the shadow versions of their own war beasts, including the ones that hadn’t even been summoned from their grimoires. These war beasts, all of them had been completely replicated by the Power of Law in this Wind Valley. But for this mysterious Third Young Master, there were no other shadow beasts aiming for him other than the Lightning Rain Swallows. What did this mean? The laws of this Wind Valley don’t work on this Third Young Master? Can he stay out of its grasp completely? Could it be that this Third Young Master is really from that race that exists only in legends, is he one of the descendants of that race that came to the Heaven Realm to train, or was he a disciple of some hidden God Realm expert that had come down from the Upper Heaven Realm?

“You can provide support, although you can’t directly take part in the battle, you can still provide buffs to your war beasts” Yue Yang waved his hand. Purple lightning like substance spread across the sky, forming a power grid.

All of his Lightning Rain Swallows instantly received a buff.

On the contrary, those identical Shadow battle beasts did not receive any buff at all.

The Wind Valley was several times more difficult than the Rain Valley. It was not only hard for the ordinary Heaven Realm warriors, but it was also equally stressful for the powerful Country Lord Team Leaders. Fortunately, they were old and wise, and despite fighting against all of their own shadow war beasts, their weaknesses and strengths were all within their grasp, and when it came to a one-on one fight, there was still no problem to secure a comfortable victory.

However for the ordinary Heaven Realm warriors, it was not so simple for them.

Especially for some warriors whose war beasts were far more powerful than their masters, the only thing they could rely on was hope that their own war beasts could perform better.

Shadow war beasts would never cower in fear, would never flee from battle, would never betray their masters on the battlefield, and although there was no master to command them, in a straight up fight, they were actually not much weaker than a real war beast….

Many Heaven Realm warriors’ war beasts chose to betray their masters and flee under the brutal battle and after suffering heavy wounds.

There were also people who couldn’t escape the attacks of the shadow war beasts and died tragically on the spot.

Ten minutes later.

The leaders of the three main battle groups had all won their battles against their respective shadow war beast opponents, one after another. Lord Ling Yun and the others were all exhausted and panting. If there was no warning from Yue Yang, they would have tried to help the others and participated in their battles and received double the punishment from the Power of Law, the consequences would have truly been unimaginable. What made them feel strange was that Ye Kong and the others had already won their battles as well.

The slowest one among them was Fatty Hai.

Because of the Shadow Wind Breath SeaBird’s blows, it had simply exhausted Fatty Hai, but fortunately, he had the help of the real Wind Breath SeaBird, and finally, after paying a hefty price and getting bruised all over, he finally won his battle as well.

chapters.title: Chapter 797.2 - Ambush
chapters.body:
Chapter 797.2 - Ambush

Chapter 797.2 [Ambush]

“Sometimes it’s not a good thing if our war beasts are too smart!” Fatty Hai let out a wretched sigh .

*Poof*

His sigh earned him the irk of his Wind Breath SeaBird, and it rewarded him with a wind-blade, which Fatty Hai dodged. At the same time, the enraged beast furiously flapped its wings, invoking a heavenly thunderbolt and blasted it right on top of Fatty Hai’s head, turning Fatty Hai’s hair into a bird’s nest with smoke coming out from it.

“Baby, when did you learn to use lightning?” Fatty Hai wasn’t angry, but instead was pleased as he asked.

“Hmph!” The Wind Breath SeaBird ignored him, as if it was still angry.

“What an idiotic master!” Ye Kong laughed until there were tears in his eyes, “The master’s intelligence is even lower than that of his war beast, fatty, you have created history in the entire Heaven Realm!”

“It’s still better than you who will never leave a mark in history!” Hearing Ye Kong’s taunt, Fatty Hai fell into a rage and grabbed his collar, like a great ape grabbing a monkey’s neck and prepared to do battle.

“Just by calling you fat and you get all worked?” Ye Kong immediately rewarded him with a punch and gave Fatty Hai a black eye.

“I shall go all out against you!” Fatty Hai started to fight back with both hands and legs.

Even as its master was fighting, the Wind Breath SeaBird did not directly aid its master but had instead magically produced a plate of snacks out of nowhere, while one of its claws was holding a wind blade which was pressed against the back of Ye Kong’s Earthquake Dragon. The Wind Breath SeaBird started to enjoy the snacks while watching its master fight as if watching a performance, the only thing lacking was for it to cheer and whistle in support of its master.

The Earthquake Dragon was obviously not as smart as the Wind Breath SeaBird and it watched it’s master’s fight with a bit of nervousness.

Seeing how smart Fatty Hai’s Wind Breath SeaBird was, Lord Ling Yun and Tu Hai could only drool.

Right now, it was just a Earth Rank war beast, not even Heaven Rank, but it already possessed such intelligence, once it grew up, it would possibly be a perfectly humanized Holy Beast! In the Heaven Realm, even the most powerful war beasts were plentiful, but it was rare to find one as smart as this… They felt that the only thing that could compare to this little thing was Hui Tai Lang that had been lazing around all day.

Lord Ling Yun saw with his own eyes that just a moment ago, when facing a shadow war beast of the same strength, Hui Tai Lang had opened his mouth and swallowed the shadow war beast in one bite.

Less than a second.

The battle had ended.

It was as if the shadow war beast had never existed in the first place.

Yue Yang noticed the Wind Breath SeaBird that was leisurely watching the performance of his master fighting and he felt that this little thing’s growth was indeed too surprising!

Unknowingly, without using its master’s power at all, it had begun to humanize. Perhaps it had evolved smoothly during the battle between Fatty Hai and Shun Tian. If not for the Wind Breath SeaBird, Fatty Hai might have died long ago in Shun Tian’s hands. Although not now, but with a little more time, as long as this little thing is allowed to evolve a few more times, they wouldn’t be addressing the Wind Breath SeaBird as ‘it’ anymore, but rather ‘her’.

By the time Fatty Hai and Ye Kong had fought to the point of exhaustion, the Heaven Realm warriors had all gradually finished their battles.

Those who lost, all fell to the ground.

Even if they weren’t finished off by the shadow war beasts, they would die under the punishment of the Power of Law.

As for the victors, all of them were suspended in the sky, enjoying their hard-earned victory.

And of course, they all knew it.

This was only the beginning test of the Wind Valley.

Same as how the waves filters the sand, the environment of the Heaven Realm’s weak grabbing for food had long made them realize a truth, without sufficient strength, no matter where they went it would only end in tragedy, rather, if they could survive the test, then it would signify the beginning of a new realm, and it would be up to them to fight in order to win a bright future for themselves.

“Unlike Rain Valley, apart from the shadow war beasts, every short distance, there will be war beasts standing guard, especially in treacherous terrain. We can choose to rush forward with guns blazing or to go step by step.” Yue Yang waited for everyone to look over and waved his hand slightly, “Putting aside the punishment from the Power of Law, maybe we’ll even have some surprises waiting for us, such as the scouts sent by the Central Palace Hall, they might leave one or two elders in some treacherous terrain, and I believe that at that time, we will all be extremely ‘moved’ by the presents the Central Palace Hall left for us!”

“What?” Yue Yang’s words caused all who heard him to change face.

“Apart from the elder left outside as a guard, a total of five other elders came in. In my opinion, there must be a ‘surprise’ waiting for us in this Wind Valley! ” After Yue Yang said this, the Heaven Realm warriors were horrified and energized at the same time.

Based on what the Third Young Master said, it seemed that the elder outside had already been slaughtered by him.

All of them looked at Yue Yang gratefully.

Including the Dark Realm’s fallen warriors.

In order to survive, they were the most compelled to take this path.

In the Blade Cutting Valley of the Wind Valley, two elders were hiding in a shady spot, talking quietly: “It’s really good luck for us, drawing this extremely lucky lot. With the success of this battle, we might even be able to go back and challenge the Patriarch or even the Great Reverend, it just so happens that the Great Reverend of our temple has just recently died in battle, and there’s still an empty seat!”

“I don’t want to be a Great Reverend, but I’m not afraid of more credit!” the other elder smiled smugly; “When I save up enough merit, I want to exchange it for a divine sword.”

“A divine sword, gosh, how many merits will that take.”

“At that time, my ideal thought…”

“Unless the three major battle groups, Eight Desolations, Snow Plain and Battle Song are wiped out totally, otherwise I guarantee you won’t be able to exchange even a single bead from a Divine Sword! Total wipeout. My God, how daring of you! But it is indeed possible with this terrain, ha!”

They hadn’t noticed that there was a Golden Puppet Mouse lying quietly in the terrifying place that was Blade Cutting Valley.

No, two of them to be exact.

The other one was a shadow war beast.

Only neither the shadow nor the real Golden Puppet Mouse had any attack power, the two of them, staying quietly together, were like a pair of twin war beasts!

chapters.title: Chapter 798.1 - Palace Hall, Suicide Squad, Emergence Of Strong Foes
chapters.body:
Chapter 798.1 - Palace Hall, Suicide Squad, Emergence Of Strong Foes

Chapter 798.1 – Palace Hall, Suicide Squad, Emergence of Strong Foes

Blade Cutting Valley. This was actually an extremely strange terrain.

It could be said with certainty that the Blade Cutting Valley was not formed naturally, but built by someone, possibly some powerful person with supreme power above the heavens. The highest point of the entire valley was no more than three thousand meters, and further up was a void that swallowed everything. If not for the intervention of the Power of Law in this place, all the Heaven Realm experts flying in the sky right now would have been sucked up by this void and turned into formless cosmic dust.

The space below 3,000 meters was a ravaging canyon.

The winds here were similar to those in the Rain Valley, bursting at irregular intervals, sometimes tranquil for a few minutes, sometimes raging wildly for more than a few hours in a row, making it extremely unpredictable.

The winds were often accompanied by tornadoes, or wind blades that could slice up any living creature to pieces, and they were fast and unpredictable. Of course, these were just the easy obstacles, what was truly dangerous was the entire landscape of the Blade Cutting Valley itself.

As its name implied, the Blade Cutting Valley was made up of countless giant and sharp blades, hundreds of millions of them.

These giant blades with sharp edges were controlled by a variety of mechanisms.

There were also some that were created by the Power of Law and simply could not be destroyed.

At the entrance, there were six hundred giant spinning blades with serrated edges, these six hundred serrated spinning blades had different diameters, the largest being as large as three thousand meters! But some had diameters less than a hundred meters. The rotating speed of each spinning blade was also different, some fast, some slow, once anybody entered into the maze of spinning blades, they would be trapped amongst these serrated giant spinning blades, life and death separated just by a thread…….

Even if one could safely pass through these six hundred serrated giant spinning blades, there were still even more terrifying and unbelievable mechanisms inside.

Waiting for them.

“Oh my god!” Seeing this Blade Cutting Valley, even though he had already heard Yue Yang describe it before, Lord Ling Yun still couldn’t help but let out a surprise gasp. Not to mention the others, even he, a powerful lord with peak Heaven Rank 5 strength, did not dare to say that he was 100% confident to be able to pass this Blade Cutting Valley unscathed. What was even more frightening was that there were still two Central Palace Hall Elders lying in ambush for them in the most dangerous place inside this Blade Cutting Valley.

“What should we do now?” Tu Hai decided that he didn’t need to think about it anymore himself, since the more he thought, the more he would make a fool of himself, so he might as well just listen to Yue Yang’s orders.

“Wait.” Yue Yang’s words were simple.

“Very well, we shall wait.” The leaders of the three major battle groups, Eight Desolations, Snow Plain and Battle Song all gathered to discuss for a bit, feeling that the best thing to do now was to whittle away the enemies strength, since In a place like this, no one was absolutely sure of victory.

Even if the pursuers from the Central Palace Hall caught up. As long as they all rushed into this maze of whirling blades, it would all come down to individual luck, let’s see who would be afraid then!

If the two Central Palace Hall Elders lying in ambush inside were not eliminated first, rushing in directly would be no different from committing suicide.

Looking at Yue Yang who was not the least bit anxious, they subdued their anxiety.

The Third Young Master has a plan!

Then what should they even be afraid of?

Three hours later, the two Central Palace Hall Elders who had been waiting impatiently inside the Blade Cutting Valley in ambush had already started cursing in their hearts. These guys, what kind of cowards are they! They are just standing outside the Blade Cutting Valley and not entering? If they were just a group of Earth Ranked or quasi-Heaven Ranked warriors then it might still be understandable, but those team leaders are all peak Heaven Rank 5 experts, how can they be so fearful and cowering as well… If the three main battle groups did not come in, they could not come out to have a showdown with them either, therefore they have no choice but to be patient and wait!

“War beasts, there are war beasts again.”

The skies of the Blade Cutting Valley were filled with countless fire, wind, electricity, light, dark and other types of war beasts that surged out of it, one by one ignoring the deadly spinning giant blades, they rushed out of the Blade Cutting Valley and pounced on the Heaven Realm warriors who were resting outside.

These war beasts possessed special physiques and were not afraid of having their bodies cut or split apart.

It was precisely because of this anomaly that they were the guardian war beasts here.

They originally lived inside the Blade Cutting Valley.

When the two Central Palace Hall Elders saw that the warriors from the three major battle groups did not plan to come in, they couldn’t help but send war beasts out to lead these beasts out of the valley. Hoping to use them to pressure the warriors outside and force them into chaos….

Once they panicked and fled into the Blade Cutting Valley, the two Central Palace Hall Elders would take advantage of the treacherous terrain and deal them a fatal blow!

If these war beasts had attacked the three major battle groups inside the Blade Cutting Valley, the warriors from the three major battle groups would most definitely have been killed or injured badly.

However, once they left the valley and fought outside, the situation would be reversed.

Losing the restrictions of the traps inside the Blade Cutting Valley and their originally absolute geographical advantage, the combat power of these war beasts was not even comparable to that of the previous shadow war beasts! . If the two Central Palace Hall Elders were more patient and continued to lie in ambush inside, instead of sending out war beasts to lure them in, these war beasts would be many times more deadly when springing a surprise attack on the Heaven Realm warriors as they were bogged down by the traps inside Blade Cutting Valley.

“No one is allowed to enter the Blade Cutting Valley, nobody is allowed to panic, all of you choose a target that suits yourself.”

For this attack, there was no need for Yue Yang to personally give any commands.

The leaders of the three main battle groups were enough to arrange a defensive formation to deal with it. Besides, they also wanted to befriend this mysterious Third Young master who had immense potential, and wanted to take this opportunity to demonstrate a little of their ability, therefore they were much more proactive.

All of the leaders were of a similar mindset, and none of them was not eager to try, hoping to gain the appreciation of this mysterious Third Young Master.

In just a short period of time, Yue Yang’s status in the hearts of these great leaders had risen at an astonishing pace.

No one would be friends with a weakling, and similarly no one would be friends with a coward. When the Heaven Realm warriors saw Yue Yang standing idly by, all of them rushed into the sky, searching for the war beast they were best versed against and started attacking it fiercely. Due to their large numbers, some of the weaker warriors even formed a temporary team to besiege the incoming war beasts. Because of their overly aggressive performance, they had unintentionally broken the dark schemes of the Central Palace Hall Elders… The two Central Palace Hall Elders who had originally wanted to use the war beasts to herd warriors from the three main battle groups, using the chaos of the free for all battle to force the Heaven Realm warriors into the Blade Cutting Valley. However, the warriors from the three major battle groups were eager to make their mark and took the initiative to attack the war beasts instead, foiling the plans of the two Central Palace Hall Elders.

“Damn it, did those idiots see through our plan? How did they know we were ambushing them here?”

“Maybe not, it’s just that these guys are all cowards and want to exterminate the guardian war beasts first to save themselves! It doesn’t matter if these guardian war beasts die, anyway, the most deadly thing about the Blade Cutting Valley is the traps, coupled with our sneak attack, they are nothing but Heaven Rank 5! Other than the leaders, the others should find it very difficult to survive!”

“I want them all destroyed! I can’t exchange for the Divine Sword without totally decimating them!”

“Don’t simply sprout nonsense, total annihilation is difficult, unless the three great armies, Blade of Justice, Hand of Arbitration and Hammer of Judgment can get here in time. With just the two of us, it’s a bit difficult to exterminate them all. By the way, with the arrogant attitude of the three Executors, when they arrive, will they still cooperate with the two of us? They will definitely rob us of our credit, I think it’s better to grab the majority of the credit first and only try to annihilate them if we have the chance!”

“Alright, but I’ll take the credit for these three battle groups anyway!”

The two Central Palace Hall Elders did not stop whispering, repeatedly discussing their plan of attack.

chapters.title: Chapter 798.2 - Palace Hall, Suicide Squad, Emergence Of Strong Foes
chapters.body:
Chapter 798.2 - Palace Hall, Suicide Squad, Emergence Of Strong Foes

Chapter 798.2 [Palace Hall, Suicide Squad, Emergence of Strong Foes]

Outside the Blade Cutting Valley, the three major battle groups were fighting happily.

Another victory.

An easy victory.

It was easier than the battle against the shadow war beasts, and they gained a lot of heaven tiered magic crystals as trophies.

The remaining guardian war beasts all fled back to the Blade Cutting Valley with heavy injuries, and of course, it was the war beasts of the two Central Palace Hall Elders who led them back, in terms of controlling enemies , both of these two Central Palace Hall Elders manifested astonishing abilities… If it wasn’t for Yue Yang’s prior reminder, even an expert at Ling Yun’s level could not tell that this was a led attack either, and they couldn’t even identify which war beasts were controlled by the Central Palace Hall Elders.

Knowing that there was a tiger in the mountain, the crowd naturally wouldn’t march to the mountain with the tiger again.

Some Heaven Realm warriors who had the desire to act, feigned to fly tentatively to the entrance of the Blade Cutting Valley, hovered for a while, and then retreated to show signs of fake caution.

Many of the warriors of the three major battle groups were joyful despite their injuries. Some of the luckier ones had even managed to break through in this battle, such as Xue Tan Lang and Prince Tian Luo. Fighting against these war beasts with unique physiques had been very beneficial to them, seeing countless Heaven Realm experts showcase their skills in battle, the insights they gained were indescribable, how could one normally have the opportunity to see so many powerful Heaven Rank experts, each displaying their prowess in front of them? Plus, with Yue Yang by their side, more or less secretly enlightening and guiding them, it was simply impossible for them not to make a breakthrough.

Fatty Hai and Ye Kong and the others were also at the brink of a breakthrough, but had not been able to grasp the relevant enlightenment yet.

Their current state was like a prologue before their actual breakthrough.

“You guys stay here, those who are interested can come with me for some fun.” After some deliberation, Yue Yang felt that if he didn’t enter the Blade Cutting Valley, the two Central Palace Hall Elders lying in ambush wouldn’t come out, so he made a decision to bring Fatty Hai and the others back to Rain Valley again to see if they could spring a surprise attack at the Central Palace Hall troops that had entered Rain Valley.

“Okay!” Lord Ling Yun, Tu Hai and the others had waited for this opportunity for too long.

Not to mention them, even the leaders of the three major battle groups, Eight Desolations, Snow Plain and Battle Song wanted to show off their battle prowess in front of Yue Yang….

The three leaders that decided to stay behind after some discussion looked towards Yue Yang with a bit of doubt, “Third Young Master, in case they storm out from the Blade Cutting Valley to attack us. I’m afraid we can’t resist them!”

Yue Yang was amused by their concerns and waved his hand, “Don’t worry, the more we stay put, the less they will dare to come out, because they are also worried that we have set an ambush for them! You are to feign ignorance that you already know there are people lying in ambush inside and pretend that you only have suspicions, occasionally you can send some war beasts in to explore the way, acting cautious. As for you two leaders, every once in a while, you should meet to discuss and act as if you’re plotting. Believe me, no fool would abandon the absolutely superior terrain inside and run out to forcefully attack you! But keep in mind that the longer you guys stay out here, the angrier they’ll get, and in time it might be possible they will choose to storm out and attack you!”

Not counting Fatty Hai and the others, there were eleven leaders with at least Heaven Rank 5 strength, including Lord Ling Yun and Tu Hai, who decided to return to Rain Valley together with Yue Yang and attack the Central Palace Hall’s army by surprise.

These actions were the kind of thing that could easily lead to the extermination of the entire family if it was spread out.

But if they could do it covertly, no one would know, there was no way for the dead to speak… On the surface, the lords were all Heaven Rankers of excellent character, but underneath, everyone knew that the road to become a lord was a path that was strewn with bloodshed and bodies! As lords, many of them had also killed people from the Central Palace Hall, but this was the first time a large-scale attack like today’s had happened.

The crazy plan they were about to attempt made their heartbeats race.

Yue Yang swept past them one by one, and one by one, they took off any relevant clothing and accessories on their bodies and disguised themselves as another person.

Many of them possessed Transformation War Beasts and directly changed their looks, while others used Transformation Gems or skills, and then there were the ones who were not good enough and like Yue Yang, opted to wear a mask and not let others see their true faces.

Another thing that they took the effort to conceal was their war beasts, they couldn’t use their Guardian Beasts or any special war beasts they were well-known for. In the unlikely event that anyone escaped, the Central Palace Hall would surely exterminate their entire clan. Except for the powerful Empress Fei Wen Li, no one in the Heaven Realm had dared to openly challenge the Central Palace Hall, and similarly no one had been able to shake their position yet, so everything had to be done in the dark.

“I’m number 1, Lord Ling Yun you are number 2, City Lord Tu Hai you are number 3, and so on, you all have a code name of your own.” Yue Yang explained the plan once more in a secret language, then took the eleven people and drifted away.

Fatty Hai and the others hurriedly entered Xue Tan Lang’s Grimoire World.

Led by him, they would see if there was a suitable opportunity for them.

Of course, they wouldn’t have any impact in a battle amongst the strong, with their current strength, it would be good as long as they could participate in the battle! The ideal battle conditions for them was for the enemy to be routed and when the enemy was almost defeated, they would just come out to join forces to pursue the remnants. Xue Tan Lang put away Fatty Hai and the others into his grimoire and changed his lazy appearance, regaining his fighting spirit and chased after Yue Yang.

Rain Valley, at the entrance.

Numerous Heaven Realm mercenaries died miserably in the Shadow War Beast’s attack, howling in pain.

However, behind these Heaven Realm mercenaries, there were three battle armies brushedly arranged in a straight line, their postures were arranged like straight lines, their eyes cold and ruthless! The soldiers of the three murderous and disciplined armies looked on indifferently at the tragedy unfolding in front of them as they saw thousands of Heaven Realm mercenaries howling to their deaths, they did not even blink their eyes.

All the soldiers of the three armies had at least Heaven Rank 3 strength.

None of the captains had strength less than Heaven Rank 5.

As for the five shadows standing in front of the captains, wearing concealment cloaks, they were even more unfathomable….

“Are you sure that the pirate leader has come in?” The shadow standing in the very middle, his voice colorless with no emotion, asked.

“Yes, Every hundred years, he comes in for a challenge, and this year there will be no exceptions. And my subordinate saw him come in with his own eyes, there will be no mistake in this matter.” The Shadow, who stood on the far left, answered curtly, spitting out his words slowly, letting them sink into the hearts of all who heard him, as if every word he spoke were to be etched on a plate of iron.

“Very well, this year, I will definitely exterminate that pirate leader this time out! The remnants of the Conquering Queen, the remnants of the Tong Tian Tower, all must be wiped out from the Heaven Realm! I don’t care what happened to the Western Heaven Realm afterwards or what the world thinks, the matter of the Three Great Leaders is a matter for the Supreme Palace Lord and the Realm Lord, it has nothing to do with myself! I only know that the Tong Tian Tower will always be the enemy of the Central Palace Hall, and that the Central Palace Hall will not be at peace as long as the Tong Tian Tower exists. If there is the Central Palace Hall, then there will not be a Tong Tian Tower! If we kill the pirate leader this time, I’ll destroy the entire Conquering City and the Tong Tian Tower will be lost. I want to personally sink the Tong Tian Tower into the Dark Realm for eternity…for the honor of the Central Palace Hall, you all shall offer up your lives!”

“The Palace Hall reigns supreme!” The three armies who were decked out in shiny armour and exuding a murderous aura, all raised their armour-plated fists to the air and pounded on the armor covering their heart as a sign of their own determination.

chapters.title: Chapter 799.1 - The Fearsome Suicide Squad]
chapters.body:
Chapter 799.1 - The Fearsome Suicide Squad]

Chapter 799.1 [The Fearsome Suicide Squad]

Two hours later.

The three battle armies of the Central Palace Hall, under the leadership of their respective captains, stepped into the teleportation gate of the Rain Shelter Pavilion in an orderly manner.

The five unfathomable shadows stood in front of the old man Rain Elder.

There was no reaction from the shadow who seemed to be the leader, instead it was the shadow which had a voice which sounded like the grinding of metal plates who gradually loosen his giant palm from Rain Elders throat. As if this decision had been made with great deliberation as well.

The other shadow standing beside the man however, were not as rigid and casually laughed, and as if speaking to an old friend saying: “Old friend, I believe you can see for yourself, the likes of Fei Wen Li and the Prison Emperor are already history, and we’ve regained our full power after thousands of years. You should be able to tell who is the ultimate winner at a glance! The Tong Tian Tower has no more distinguished descendants, not even an Innate Supreme, so don’t expect a second Prison Emperor who will stubbornly resist us. The Tong Tian Tower has reached its final hour of destruction, do you still dream of its revival? Instead of that, it’s better you start hoping that we’ll show you mercy. Haha!”

“We won’t give up.” The old man Rain Elder’s expression was pained, the handprint on his throat was still deep as if it had been branded into his throat with a hot iron, unable to recover.

“Based on what? With Fei Wen Li’s crippled veterans? At that time, you still couldn’t win even with Fei Wen Li around, now that she’s sealed, maybe even annihilated, you want a revival with just the crippled remnants of her army who are already weak and old? That’s totally absurd!”,The shadow mocked sarcastically.

“The Tong Tian Tower will not perish, there will always be good descendants to inherit the power of its predecessors, it cannot be defeated by any force, and since time immemorial, it has been so!” Rain Elder’s pained face suddenly smiled.

“That’s right, it’s been like this since ancient times, but that doesn’t mean it will be the same in the future. Because after the death of the Prison Emperor, there won’t be another Prison Emperor in the whole Tong Tian Tower. How much effort did you put into cultivating just a single Prison Emperor, just in terms of Divine Artifacts, he possessed three of them. With all the combined resources of the Soaring Dragon Continent, the Heaven Staircase and the Demon Abyss, you were able to cultivate a Prison Emperor who was worthy to be called a successor of Fei Wen Li. Indeed I must commend you all on this achievement, but that’s all you have accomplished! Now, with your abilities, can you still cultivate a second Prison Emperor? Do you still have any Divine Artifacts? No more. Do you still have Divine Strength? No more. Do you still have Godhood? You do not either… the Prison Emperor didn’t have enough time to cultivate and was unable to comprehend nor reach the realm of the Divine Innate, he couldn’t form his Godhood, and could only rely on his Divine Artifacts and Divine Strength, yet he was brutally slaughtered in the hands of the Three Great Leaders. And now that the Three Great Leaders, Jiu Xiao, Xu Kong and Ming Yue Guang are all back, we are even more relieved. The Prison Emperor is dead and there are no more experts in the Tong Tian Tower!” The shadow reached out and patted Rain Elder’s shoulder gently, smiling as if meeting an old friend, “Perhaps you have not given up hope, thinking that the pirate leader is still out there, and if he is allowed to obtain the Divine Grimoire reward at the end of the tenth stage, then there is still a possibility of salvation, is that what you think?”

“The Divine Grimoire will never belong to you warriors of the Central Palace Hall, you are all traitors and the Divine Grimoire will not recognize traitors!” , Old Man Rain Elder snorted coldly.

“It’s been tens of thousands of years, what traitor are you talking about, how unbecoming, right now, who knows the truth about the establishment of our Central Palace Hall? In the entire world of today, in the eyes of all warriors, we are the embodiment of righteousness and you, the root of evil.” The shadow laughed and waved his hand, “We don’t need the Divine Grimoire either, not to mention that that thing is hard to contract, it’s also very dangerous, if you’re not careful, you’ll be noticed by those old fogeys in the Beyond Realm, well, I admit that deep down I’ve longed for the Divine Grimoire before, but why long for the things that cannot belong to us, we just have to make sure you guys are unable to get it that’s all.”

“Even the Conquering Queen couldn’t get past the tenth stage, Cook Caribbean won’t succeed either.” The shadow with a voice like grinding iron plates added with extra gravity in his voice.

“That’s right, even if we sit back and do nothing, he will still fail and flee to the Southern Heaven Realm with his tail between his legs and continue to be an idle pirate leader. However, this year is different from previous years, Jiu Xiao, Xu Kong and the others have returned, confirming that the Prison Emperor is dead, plus we have all our battle strength back, and it is not necessary to wait any longer. The destruction of the Tong Tian Tower is at hand!” The shadow who spoke feigning to be approachable but was unusually arrogant on the inside, snorted fiercely.

“If that’s the case, why aren’t you taking action yet?” Rain Elder didn’t even raise an eyebrow, ignoring the other man’s threat.

“We are here not only to eradicate your last hope, but also in hopes that all of you old devils will wisen up and spill out all the secrets you know about the Gods Ruins, tell us all, and do not force us to do anything.” The shadow made his intentions clear.

“The Gods Ruins is a good place, but unfortunately, I’ve never been inside.”, Rain Elder sighed slightly.

“Let’s see how long you can be stubborn, there will come a day when you will beg us with tears streaming down your face. Mark my words, it won’t be long before it comes true. Or perhaps you would like to see with your own eyes the entire Tong Tian Tower sink into the Dark Realm, becoming a dumping ground!” The shadow laughed again, he was so emboldened that he didn’t care how Rain Elder would feel after hearing his words.

“,” Rain Elder coughed, “What do you want me to say, you want me to beg for mercy from you right now? Junior, you’re still too naive if you think you can scare me!”

Piak!

The shadow rewarded Rain Elder with a slap to the face, causing his face to swell up on the spot.

Blood spilled from the corner of Rain Elder’s mouth.

But he just laughed, not caring at all.

When the shadow was ready to continue, the shadow in the middle who had been silent all this while suddenly reached out his hand to stop him: “Enough, there is no need to waste time on useless things! Leave a detachment behind to seal off the first stage. Let’s go, we can be sure that that pirate is not in this first stage, otherwise Rain Elder won’t have spouted so much nonsense with you, he is stalling for time” The five shadows entered the teleportation gate of the Rain Shelter Pavilion.

Under the oppression of their consciousness, even Rain Elder could not conceal the existence of the teleportation gate, and since the beginning, he could not even stop the forces from the Central Palace Hall by a single bit.

chapters.title: Chapter 799.2 - The Fearsome Suicide Squad
chapters.body:
Chapter 799.2 - The Fearsome Suicide Squad

Chapter 799.2  [The Fearsome Suicide Squad]

A squad of ten stayed behind.

After about five minutes or so.

There was an invisible shadow that flickered in the sky and entered the teleportation gate.

If this shadow had not entered the teleportation gate and left the Rainy Valley, then no one would have even realised its existence. After the five shadows left, he didn’t really leave, but concealed himself and after waiting for five minutes, realized that Rain Elder hadn’t reacted at all. Thinking that this could only mean their target had indeed long gone ahead of them, he left to join up with the others. Indeed, who would stay long in front of a large group of pursuers?

Rain Elder shook his head, his expression was a bit scornful.

But in the end, he was silent, ignoring the enemy’s actions.

When the invisible shadow really left, Yue Yang floated towards him, as if he did not see the ten guards from the Central Palace Hall standing guard around the Rain Shelter Pavilion.

After flying into the Rain Shelter Pavilion, Yue Yang leisurely sat down on the stone bench as if entering his own home.

Under the gobsmacked stares of the ten guards from the Central Palace Hall, he stretched out his hand to pour himself a cup of wine, and started to enjoy it slowly.

“Son, give me some too.” the Rain Elder was a hopeless drunkard and couldn’t resist the chance for some wine.

“That group of people from just now were really arrogant, what’s their background?” Yue Yang ignored the surrounding Central Palace Hall guards and inquired about those unfathomable mysterious shadows just now in front of them.

“Die!” The ten Central Palace Hall guards combined to attack Yue Yang.

“It’s really good wine!” Yue Yang didn’t seem to notice that ten weapons were chopping towards him at the same time and was still tilting his head back and drinking the wine.

Boom Boom Boom!

Lord Ling Yun and City Lord Tu Hai, as well as the nine leaders, arrived just in time and attacked the ten Central Palace Hall guards. Just before their weapons touched Yue Yang, they were all thrown out of the Rain Shelter Pavilion. Yue Yang didn’t pay any attention to the surroundings and instead handed a cup of wine to the anxious Rain Elder and asked: “You see, doing too many bad things is not good, old man, you have to like me and be a good boy or else how pitiful it would be to be confined here, to be beaten and scolded and not be able to fight back!” The Rain Elder let out a loud laugh: “It’s too late, if I had known that it’s not good to do too much evil, I would have been a better person from the start, but it’s a pity it’s too late!”

Yue Yang slightly hesitated: “I’m still a bit not used to seeing people like this, especially the kind of people who are even more treacherous than I am. I especially detest people like this. I haven’t had time lately, but I’d better get revenge for you when I see him in the future.”

“Revenge? Ha, brat, it’s not that I’m belittling you, he can crush you with one hand, just now I was really afraid that you would jump out without knowing your place. He is one of the three Great Palace Lords of the Central Palace Hall, a famous expert of the Central Palace Hall in today’s world, and his strength is comparable to the Three Great Leaders. If you want to take action against him, go back and train for two years first. After that, not to mention the Great Palace Lord Ji Wu Ri, even if it were the Fire Palace Hall Master Ran Feng, the Dark Palace Hall Master Wan Mo, or the captains of the three armies, Blade of Justice, Hand of Arbitration and Hammer of Justice, any one of them, you would definitely be more than a match against them!”, Rain Elder drank a glass of wine and his expression showed signs of poisoning again, it took him a long time to recover from the pain, and finally he smiled at Yue Yang: “Son, as long as you have the thought to get revenge for me, I’m already satisfied, back then, the Prison Emperor didn’t even let out a single fart, it is still you who is more righteous!” “Of course, I am the most righteous person in the whole world.” Yue Yang had a smug ‘please continue praising me more’ look on his face.

“Looks like that guy Cook is in trouble, all who have been locked on by Ji Wu Ri will surely meet with trouble, if you do not have a good plan, it is best you return to the Tong Tian Tower now!” Rain Elder paused before sighing, “Looks like the Heaven Realm will be thrown into chaos once again.”

“Don’t be so pessimistic, if the Prison Emperor can do it, so can I!” , Yue Yang confidently patted Rain Elder’s shoulder.

However, when he looked back at the battlefield outside, he could not help but reveal a shocked expression.

At this time, the battle situation showed an abnormal change.

It turned out that when the leaders of the three main battle groups who all possessed strength of Heaven Rank 5, joined forces with Lord Ling Yun and Tu Hai and attacked the ten Central Palace Hall guards who, apart from the captain being a Heaven Rank 5, were all Heaven Rank 3, not only did they not take them down easily, but instead were even beaten back into a pathetic state by the guards.

Why was this happening?

It’s not impossible for a single Heaven Rank 5 to deal with 10 Heaven Rank 3’s.

Right now it was eleven fighting against ten and in addition to that it was eleven Heaven Rank 5’s against 1 Heaven Rank 5 and 9 Heaven Rank 3’s, yet they were still gradually being beaten back, what living hell was this!

City Lord Tu Hai let out a howl, he was hit by a move from the guard captain and was knocked flying out of the battle field while spitting blood. Yue Yang’s body shook slightly, if it wasn’t for Hui Tai Lang’s timely rescue just now, he believed that Tu Hai would have been one-hit ko-ed by that attack just now!

“Son, now you finally know the power of the Central Palace Hall, right? These people are the real temple guards, the ones you encountered before are probably just miscellaneous soldiers from the outer gates!” Rain Elder smiled, hinting to Yue Yang to be more wary when going against the Central Palace Hall, any carelessness was enough to cost him his life!

“Die!” One of the temple guards completely disregarded his own life and opened his arms to embrace the body of Lord Ling Yun as he received a heavy blow from him.

Anothertemple guard, without hesitation, immediately pierced his halberd towards them.

He impaled his companion and Lord Ling Yun together.

The guard who embraced Lord Ling Yun had a crazy look in his eyes, as if death was ‘the highest honor’ for him.

With a loud bang, he hugged Lord Ling Yun and blew himself up…! ~!

chapters.title: Chapter 800.1 - Weakness, A Critical Weakness
chapters.body:
Chapter 800.1 - Weakness, A Critical Weakness

Chapter 800.1 [Weakness, A Critical Weakness]

That Central Palace Hall guard who was pierced by his companion’s halberd, immediately blew himself up.

Blood exploded all over the sky.

The shock wave shook the entire earth… In the area of the blast, Lord Ling Yun, whose body was blown up and bruised all over, escaped from the aftermath of the blast in great pain. He, who was a Heaven Rank 5, surprisingly had trouble resisting the self-destruction of a Heaven Rank 3 guard… These temple guards all had a special ability which was to explosively raise their strength to over a hundred times for a short period of time. Of course, the price for such a forceful boost was death!

The Palace Hall guards whose strength had increased by a hundredfold were not much weaker compared to Lord Ling Yun and the others

A hundredfold increase in battle strength, coupled with the addition of their own special armor and their concentrated cultivation of battle skills, the three factors superimposed on each other and the resulting self-destructing power was already far beyond the maximum tolerance range of an expert at the level of Lord Ling Yun.

The fact that Lord Ling Yun was still able to escape from the center of the explosion was in itself very rare.

As he prepared to flee to his companions, hoping to obtain assistance.

The other Palace Hall guards reacted even faster than the leaders of the three main battle groups… two Palace Hall guards, including the previous one who had pierced the body of Lord Ling Yun with his halberd seemed to have known that Lord Ling Yun would be able to escape, before he had completely burst out of the explosion range, they had already rushed over.

One from the left and one from the right.

Hugging the left and right legs of Lord Ling Yun.

Both of their hands had a special blood dagger with a chain that, once pierced into the enemy’s body, would fasten the enemy and the armor on their bodies together.

Unless one could immediately shatter this special Palace Hall Armor, it would be impossible to break free from this ‘Blood Dagger Chain’.

The eyes of these two Palace Hall guards also flashed with the same madness seen in the previous Palace Hall guard, as if blowing themselves up and dying with their enemy was the most honorable way to end their lives. Lord Ling Yun raised his hands in anger and smashed the heads of the two Palace Hall guards with such force that their helmets and skulls were split apart… The two Palace Hall guards with cracked heads, despite their bloodied faces, opened their mouths and still coldly spat out one word: ” Die!”

Boom!

Two even louder booms of self-destruction, rang out.

“No, no!” City Lord Tu Hai let out a cry of despair, Lord Ling Yun was like his older brother who usually took care of him, and now he was blown up by the enemy who had self-destructed and died in front of him. How could he not be heartbroken?

“He’s alive…” as the shock wave from the self-destructing blasts passed, one of the leaders from Eight Desolations realized that within the thick smoke at the center of the blast, there was still a shadow of a bedraggled figure.

“Die!”

However, before the crowd could rush forward to help.

Two more Palace Hall guards, one from the top and the other from the bottom, forcefully embraced Lord Ling Yun’s shattered body.

Their eyes were terrifyingly mad.

City Lord Tu Hai rushed over to Lord Ling Yun in desperation, wanting to attempt a rescue, even the other Eight Desolation leader couldn’t stop him. A shadow blocked Tu Hai’s path, his crazy eyes reflecting City Lord Tu Hai’s face which was twisted in anger… The other Eight Desolations leader who was trying to retreat suddenly realised that there were three more shadows approaching him silently from behind, and suddenly felt the shadow of death looming upon him…In fact as the other leaders raced to his aid, yet another shadow rushed into their midst and self-destructed.

Even the captain of the Palace Hall guards had arrived in front of Yue Yang, seemingly wanting to die with Yue Yang, the leader of their group.

Boom boom boom boom!
