A series of suicidal shockwaves exploded one after another.

The entire battle field was flattened to the ground, Ling Yun, Tu Hai, and that Eight Desolations leader were nowhere to be seen, and even a few of the other leaders that came to their rescue had been engulfed by the blast and were more or less with a few scars on them.

“You think you can kill me?” Yue Yang looked indifferent as he asked the captain of the Palace Hall guards in front of him.

“No, but as long as I can take one of your hands or break one of your feet, that is enough.” That Palace Hall guard captain wasn’t a fool, he also knew that Yue Yang was the strongest among everyone. He didn’t think that his Heavenly Rank 5 strength could take out Yue Yang, even if he was a hundred times more powerful, and was willing to sacrifice himself in self-destruction. However, he still chose an unkillable Yue Yang over someone else…because, in his eyes, if he could use his life in exchange for one hand or one leg of Yue Yang, that would have been a great gain.

“You can’t even hurt a single hair of mine.” A mocking smile appeared on Yue Yang’s lips.

“No matter what, I have to try.” The captain of the Palace Hall guards did not waver.

“Come.” Yue Yang beckoned with his finger at the Palace Hall guard captain, signaling that he could begin. The moment the Palace Hall guard captain activated his Forbidden Power and prepared to self-destruct, the young man in front of him disappeared.

He turned around and looked back.

Seeing an incredible sight.

Lord Ling Yun, City Lord Tu Hai together with the other Eight Desolations’ leaders who had been blown up together, were all still standing in the field. Even his nine subordinates who had successively blown themselves up, they were all still standing behind him… yet their eyes presented a kind of dead man’s gaze, void of consciousness, their pupils were spread open, their heartbeat had stopped and they seemed to have died for a long time… The captain of the Palace Hall guards swept a glance over the faces of Lord Ling Yun and the others, and realised that on the faces of Lord Ling Yun, City Lord Tu Hai and the other leaders were the same suspicious and baffled expression as was on his. There were no wounds on their bodies, but this was definitely not a resurrection… A thought flashed through the Palace Hall guard captain’s mind: illusion!

This mysterious young man was using an illusion that was so real that it was indistinguishable, and managed to make nine of his subordinates ‘self-destruct’.

In fact, Lord Ling Yun and the others were not even in range of the self-destruction blast from the start.

Even his own subordinates hadn’t really self-destructed at all, they just thought that they had successfully self-destructed and their souls died contentedly… This mysterious young man who had successfully deceived them with his illusion, had successfully kept even himself in the dark, and if he had not voluntarily stopped the illusion, even he himself would have thought he had self-destructed and died happily within the illusion!

He was actually not unjustly defeated.

For the [World Creation] Domain that Yue Yang possessed, except for those who possessed the Supreme Will of an Innate Supreme, others would not be able to see through it, and even if they possessed the Supreme Will, it was still impossible to fully see through this [World Creation] Domain unless one was a God. Moreover, who would dare to say that they could confidently see through Yue Yang who had the [Counterfeit] Innate Talent, the [World Creation] Domain and multiple Guardian Beasts protecting him? Back in the day, even with the Navaragha Queen’s ability, she was still unable to see through Yue Yang, and it was normal for him, a mere Palace Hall guard captain, to be defeated under the [World Creation] Domain!

“Do you still have the confidence to kill me now?” A smile appeared at the corner of Yue Yang’s lips as he asked faintly.

“You are powerful, much more powerful than I imagined, we have no regrets about dying in your hands today… However, the Great Palace Lord will avenge us, he has the Supreme Intellect, your illusion will not be able to deceive him! You may be powerful, but you’re nothing more than an ant in front of the Great Palace Lord!” The captain of the Palace Hall guards saw Lord Ling Yun and the others, slowly closing in, intent on capturing him alive. He roared, and stabbed the top of his forehead with a bloody dagger, before Lord Ling Yun and the others could take out their treasures to capture him alive, and his body activated the Forbidden Power at the same time, blowing himself up.

Yue Yang stretched out his hand.

A bright and shining starry sky was presented in his hand.

There were countless stars twinkling within the starry sky, yet they were stationary and unmoving.

The body of the Palace Hall guard captain which was still in the process of blowing apart, as well as the shock wave of the explosion, were all stilled and suspended in front of Yue Yang’s palm for a moment. A second later, Yue Yang’s palm rotated, and the stars rotated at the same time, forming a beautiful vortex of stars and nebula, forming a black hole that devoured everything, instantly absorbing all the blood and shockwaves of the explosion, three seconds later, the captain of the Palace Hall guards disappeared from the world without leaving behind a single trace, as if his entire being never existed to begin with, almost as if he had never been born into the Heavenly Realm.

“Heavens!” Lord Ling Yun and the others, everyone of them, looked horrified.

What kind of strength did the captain of the Palace Hall guards possess?

After activating his Forbidden Power and boosting his strength, he was currently more powerful than any of them. However, when he decided to self-destruct in front of the Third Young Master, he had not been able to hurt even a single hair on Third Young Master’s head yet he had already completely disappeared from this world.

This kind of starry sky which could even stop time and space, this kind of black hole that could devour all things, what exactly was this ability?

And this was not even the Power of Law!

What if the Third Young Master used the Power of Law, along with the starry sky and black hole, what then would happen? Wouldn’t even the strongest enemy be annihilated without a trace?

“The enemy has countless suicide squads, and there are many experts within them, even the Great Palace Lord’s realm is close to that of a ‘God’, they are not an enemy that we can face just by joining forces, Lord Ling Yun, CIty Lord Tu Hai, you all should leave these training grounds for now!” Yue Yang said this was actually a test, if the Spirit Cloud Country Lord and the others were willing to go, it wasn’t even worth deep.

“Third Young Master, there is one death in life.” The Spirit Cloud Country Lord slightly sank ín and suddenly laughed again, “If you hadn’t saved me with your illusion just now, I would have died in the enemy’s, Under the dead man. If you don’t think I’m useless and can’t get rid of it, you can’t do anything about it. Please allow Ling Yun to accompany you, even if it means being a pawn, it’s better than going back to being a shrinking turtle! Besides, the Central Temple intends to stain the Western Realm, and even if we go back, we won’t be able to survive for long!”

chapters.title: Chapter 800.2 - Weakness, A Critical Weakness
chapters.body:
Chapter 800.2 - Weakness, A Critical Weakness

Chapter 800.2 [Weakness, A Critical Weakness]

“That’s right, it’s better to give it all you’ve got than sit back and wait to die, even if you die, you’ll die with a bang!” The Tu Hai City Lord had just almost had the Temple Guards blown up, his hatred and anger were all over the place, so he would not let up.

He and the two Spirit Cloud Country Lords, Yue Yang wasn’t worried.

Rather, the other nine lords did not necessarily have the same thoughts.

The Central Divine Hall, the terrifying dead men, and the Great Hall Master whose strength was close to that of a god, these were the key elements that made people back off.

After nine people deliberated for a moment, four of them decided to stay, two from the Eight Wastes and the other two from Snow Plain and Battle Song. The five of them decided to leave, but they promised that they would do everything in their power to accept the Lord of Spiritual Cloud if they went to join each other. Yue Yang did not force them to choose. Everyone did not think in the same way, besides, their family was big, so they could fight for their lives. Difficult… Good gathering, Yue Yang and the Lord of Spiritual Cloud, said goodbye to the five, put away the nine temple guards’ armor disguises, and prepared to continue the chase! The Templar Guard brigade, looking for an opportunity to attack the Templar Guard.

The Temple Grand Master and five others, to chase after Captain Cook, couldn’t stay and move forward with the army.

Yue Yang trailed, just in time to disturb all the way and weaken the central temple.

Gray Wolf, on the other hand, brought the letters written by the three major team leaders together, adding forward.

Hopefully, before the temple guards arrived, they would be able to find the three major teams that were waiting in the Blade Cut Valley and let them leave quickly, or else they would The entire army was wiped out.

“All of you put your armor on! Although these armors are not considered to be of the highest quality, they can be considered gold-grade because they are made of special materials, and most importantly, these armors have triple The added effect of the around is very helpful to everyone’s battle strength.” Yue Yang asked Fatty Hai and the others who came out from the Gray Wolf Treasure World to change into this kind of armor of the temple guards.

These armors, not only had a camouflage effect, they could also strongly increase their battle strength.

However, their only drawback was their protection.

There was hardly any very good defense.

Not to mention Heavenly Tier 3, even Heavenly Tier power could possibly break it… The only complete defense could only be from attacks below the Quasi Heavenly Tier.

Apart from having everyone change into the armor of the Temple Guards, Yue Yang also spoke about a weakness that none of them, including the Lord of Spiritual Cloud, knew about: “The Temple Guards are extremely Madness, treating death as the highest honor, once you are defeated, immediately activate the forbidden power in your body, instantly increase your strength a hundred times, and self-destruct with the enemy! On the surface, this combination of self-destructing and insane behavior appears to be invincible, but I can tell you that it has weaknesses! By mastering this weakness, you can easily kill a temple guard, not to mention the Lord of Spiritual Cloud and Tu Hai City, you guys Ye Kong you guys, you can too!”

“What?” The Lord of Spiritual Cloud and the others were shocked at the news, and then they were secretly glad that it was indeed right to stay, and those who left would never know this. The only way to know the weaknesses of this temple guard was to have the self that San Shao considered as his own.

“Can we also kill a Heavenly Tier 3 temple guard?” Fatty Hai was so happy that he danced around, he had never been so bullish in his life, a strong man at the third level of the Heavenly Stage, just standing still and letting him fight, he Neither could kill the other.

“Absolutely can, and it’s a spike!” Yue Yang gave them one more fire to burn up everyone’s morale to the top.

“Good!” Even Snow Covetous Wolf, who clenched his fist, killing the Heaven Tier 3 Temple Guards in seconds was exactly what he craved.

“The reason why the Temple Guards are able to increase their power by a hundred times to self-destruct is because within their bodies, there is a forbidden power. This forbidden power is a restriction that is close to the law. As long as they activate this forbidden power, then their bodies will immediately be unable to withstand the spread of the forbidden power and explode and die, which is why the power of their self-destructs is so powerful!” Yue Yang swept the crowd and said word for word, “Think about it, if you were one step ahead of the enemy in activating the forbidden power in their bodies. What will be the result?”

“They’ll explode until his mother doesn’t recognize him!” Fatty Hai was trembling with excitement.

“That’s right, their weakness, is this… I have a way for you to quickly master this method of activating the forbidden power, even though If you can’t learn it, I can also create a rune crystal stone, and with the help of this rune crystal, I can trigger the forbidden power in their bodies, allowing They’re all blowing up to pieces one by one!” Yue Yang felt that it wasn’t scary to have a forbidden power inside the enemy, it was equivalent to a time bomb. As long as the controller was in his hands, then what purpose do they serve other than to be human u-bombs?

“How do we escape the center of the blast when we’ve activated the contraption’s power?” Prince Tenro was the calmest and asked about the dilemma.

“Very simple.” Yue Yang held up a finger, and he easily gave an answer to the second puzzle that the crowd couldn’t crack: “I also just now showed that the weaknesses, so to speak, are connected and the enemy cannot get rid of either one. The second weakness is that they will have their entire body in a state of loss of control for at least one second after activating their forbidden power, and during that process, they Nothing can be done, eyes can’t see, ears can’t hear, they can’t change anything except to remain as they were before they blew themselves up…maybe Lord Ling Yun and Tu Hai had noticed that they were completely motionless after forcibly embracing their bodies, and to ensure a blockade of the enemy, the To ensure success, the blood dagger chains on your arms are proof of this, they must be used to block the enemy without being able to themselves! Regulation. This means that once the taboo power is activated, you have at least one second to escape the center of the blast, and if combined with the various skills and Treasure, you have plenty of time to evacuate safely!”

“Third Younger, with this important information, I can guarantee that they will die a horrible death!” The Spirit Cloud Country Lord and the others were ecstatic, one second, for a strong man of their level, could easily leave the explosion center.

The difficulty of retreating for one second was not a big problem even for Fatty Hai and Ye Kong and the others.

If one used rune crystals and other things to spacer touch, they could simply easily abuse and kill those bullish temple guards just now!

The Ling Yun Country Lord and the others were delighted, choosing to follow Third Young Master was really the best choice, the guys who left would probably regret it later! Pound your chest! But fate has only one chance to choose, and the wrong choice can only lead to endless regret!

Yue Yang rate brought Ling Yun and the others into Wind Valley.

Stop first.

Using the Heavenly Realm Rune, the technique of activating the Forbidden Power was explained to them.

What made Spirit Cloud Country Lord and the others feel ashamed was that in the process of mastering this new technique, it wasn’t even their six Heavenly Stage powerhouses, but rather That Celestial Luo Prince and Snow Covetous Wolf comprehended first. Five minutes after they had fully comprehended it, then only after the Spiritual Cloud Lord and Ye Kong had fathomed the arcana of the technique together, another three minutes passed, and the sea Fatty, Tu Hai, and the four collars learned techniques together.

The slowest though were the Knight brothers, but their learning time was not more than fifteen minutes.

These young people, although they were only weak Earth Steps, their comprehension and degree of learning was astonishing. If one compared the younger generation in the Heaven Realm, many geniuses who were so good that they could show off everywhere were only worthy of giving shoes to these silent young people.

With such intelligence and talent, it was no wonder that he was looked upon differently by the Third Young Master.

After the Spiritual Cloud Country Lord and the others looked at it, ahh, all had a helpless sigh rise in their hearts.

Perhaps it wouldn’t take long for these young people to catch up to them… Watching them grow rapidly, catching up to them by an astonishing degree, but not by themselves! The feeling of being able to break through, that feeling, was very frustrating. Fortunately, if you choose to follow San Shao now, if you can get a few pointers from him, or bestow some spiritual pills, you might still have hope to continue to advance! …Thinking of this, the Spirit Cloud Country Lord and the others became excited again.

Following Third Younger definitely had a future, just look at the growth of Snow Covetous Wolf and the others .

The Spiritual Cloud Country Lord and Tu Hai looked at each other and nodded their heads in secret.

Confidence was strengthened.

“Out, if there are teams of temple guards, we’ll try the new move, if there are large clusters of troops, we’ll slowly follow them, the trial will be a total of There are as many as ten levels, so let’s take our time with them!” With a wave of Yue Yang’s hand, Ling Yun Country Lord and the others all straightened up and stood solemnly in accordance with the order. In their hearts, although Yue Yang did not give them a positive acceptance reply, they had already consciously treated themselves as Yue Yang’s close followers! .

chapters.title: Chapter 801.1 - The Hidden Struggle
chapters.body:
Chapter 801.1 - The Hidden Struggle

Chapter 801.1 The Hidden Struggle

Blade cut valley

The three remaining leaders, even with the look of indecision, waited for the arrival of Yue Yang. Gray wolf had already brought the letter, although they believed in the authenticity of the letter brought by Gray wolf, they did not choose to leave immediately. As a precaution, most of the members of the three teams went into hiding, but the three leaders stayed behind and watched secretly. The most puzzling thing for Lord Ling Yun was that they haven’t seen anyone since they passed through the blade cut valley.

It would have been fine if there was no sign of the mighty ones such as Captain Cook and Ji Wu Ri, the master of the temple, but it was strange that none of the three temple guards, the Blade of Justice, the hand of Arbitration, and the Hammer of judgment, had come.

“We have been spotted by Ji Wu Ri, or at least, he already knows of our existence.” Yue Yang thought of this as a possibility.

As the master of the temple, Ji Wu Ri can’t be unaware of his subordinates’ weaknesses.

Before, he left a team of temple guards, perhaps, as a kind of trial.

As soon as it was revealed that he could easily kill those Temple guards, Ji Wu Ri immediately hid all the temple guards into the treasure world and hid himself in the dark without a trace. In his plan to kill Captain Cook, Ji Wuri did not immediately attack the eight desolations, the snow plains, and the battle song, but there must be a later move.

Anyway, the warriors of the three teams can’t go far from the place of trial.

When Yue Yang thought about it, an ominous hunch flashed in his heart, and his brow frowned, maybe Ji Wu Ri came here not only to lead his subordinates but also to mislead a large group of treasure hunting mercenaries who did not know the truth! When the warriors of the eight desolations, the snow plains and the battle song would come out of the trial place, those treasure hunting mercenaries would think they had obtained the treasure and would launch a siege

This approach was most in line with the goal of the Central Temple, that is, to stir up the melee in the Western Celestial Realm, and taking advantage of this opportunity to take over the ruling power.

“San Shao, do you mean that Ji Wu Ri hid all the temple guards? He led them quietly through the blade cut valley?” Lord Ling Yun also reflected that although he did not think too far, he still guessed some of Ji Wu Ri’s actions.

“Perhaps he doesn’t care to fight us at all…” both the Prince Tian Luo and Xue Tan Lang were in deep thought

“If that is the case, Ji Wu Ri must have a good strategy.” Ye Kong and the others had been following Yue Yang for a long time and had become accustomed to reasoning about the battlefield.

“That guy, Ji Wu Ri, won’t leave a group of people outside to ambush us, will he? If he did, we will be in danger, and we will have to move forward, but the more we move forward, the more dangerous it will be. We will all die in the place of trial. It will be easy for him to clean us up. ” Hai Pang shouted, and his words made the original ugly faces of Lord Ling Yun and the others more bitter and astringent. If it is really like what Hai Pang said, then the three teams were really in a dilemma. It is very likely that they will not be able to leave the place of trial. If they continue to move forward, they will be eliminated by the law because of their insufficient strength.

With Ji Wu Ri, the terrible master of the temple and nearly a thousand crazy temple guards staring covetously at them from the dark, what should they do now?

Yue Yang did not know what others would do, but he would never let his companions leave his side ever.

To leave means the enemy has succeeded in his plot.

That can only result in death!

“You will enter the treasure first, we will respond to the changes with the same. Gray Wolf, make sure to stay close to my side and don’t leave for a moment.” Yue Yang asked Fatty Hai, Ye Kong and the others to enter Gray Wolf’s treasure world first because, with their strength, if the enemy attacked, the possibility of being spiked was extremely high.

“What about us?” The three leaders who had stayed behind were now aware of the seriousness of the matter. Their faces were very ugly and distorted as they did not know what to do next.

“There are two options, one is to follow us and force your way through this blade cut valley and all the levels behind it, not only through the wind valley, but also through the third level, we will keep moving forward, after the three levels, the trial would be initially completed, I will find a way to get you out of here. The second option, you guys leave now, after you go out, leave the trial place as soon as possible, if you really can’t, hide in Conquest City.” Yue Yang gave them two choices.

“Most of us don’t have enough strength to follow San Shao through the barrier…” A leader shook his head anxiously.

“I can only say that I will try my best to take care of them, but I dare not say that I can guarantee that the personnel will be unharmed, after all, breaking through the barrier is mostly a test of personal laws, and the bystanders can’t help.” Although Yue Yang was capable of bringing everyone away from the trial place, he was not a babysitter for the Heaven Realm martial artists, he wouldn’t do that kind of hard work, besides, even if he brought the martial artists from the three major teams to a safe area at this time, how many people would be grateful to him? Maybe they’ll think Yue Yang cheated them afterward! They were also skeptical when they sent Gray Wolf to deliver the letter just now, and based on that alone, Yue Yang couldn’t fully trust them.

“Why don’t we leave together? Wouldn’t it be safer?” One of the leaders was obviously a little timid and dared not go to war with Ji Wu Ri, one of the three masters of the central temple.

It was even more daunting than the three giants that have been forgotten in the Western Celestial Realm for 6,000 years.

They followed Yue Yang and had the confidence to fight against ordinary temple warriors and even temple elders, but they could not bring up their final courage to fight Ji Wu Ri, the great master of the temple. You know, above the elders of the temple, there are the patriarch and the great lord, and then the master of the temple, and then the master of the Central Hall, whose strength was as abnormal as that of the heavenly giants.

Moreover, Ji Wu Ri, the master of the temple, is also one of the three masters of the Central Hall, a figure close to the gods!

Yue Yang was calm on the surface, but he gave up persuasion in his heart and casually responded, “Maybe Ji Wu Ri has been targeting me, if I go with everyone, then the whole team might be annihilated. If you guys leave, Ji Wu Ri won’t easily leave the pursuit in order to finish his goal of killing Captain Cook, and I would be in the Wind Valley, he will definitely not be able to distract his attention, so it might be safest for you guys to leave now! Lord Ling Yun, now that the situation has changed, you can reconsider as well.”

With his last words, Yue Yang even tested Lord Ling Yun and the others.

After hearing this, Lord Ling Yun was afraid that Yue Yang would doubt his sincerity, so he quickly swore, “San Shao, since I have decided, I will naturally follow you to the death!

Tu Hai and the four leaders who decided to stay also responded, saying that they would never leave and decided to follow Yueyang to the end.

Joking aside, in this situation, it’s the safest to stay with San Shao. When the troops of the central temple came, Ji Wu Ri showed up and then disappeared without trace. All these signs showed the beginning of the great rebellion. In such a period when people’s lives were worth less than cabbage, we can either become a hero and become famous throughout the world in the future, or die quietly and disappear in the ashes.

Following San Shao didn’t necessarily guarantee one’s life, but one could definitely become a hero!

If we leave now, the chances of our ashes disappearing are very high!

Only a fool would be in a hurry to leave!

“In that case, we will be waiting for you in conquest city.” The other three leaders had not seen the real strength of Yue Yang and were unwilling to give their lives to him, so they decided to lead their team and leave. They felt that there were still three major teams of warriors accompanying them, and if the temple did not focus on the siege, they should be safe.

“Take care.” Lord Ling Yun had an impulse to let these friends stay because their departure would very likely result in their death.

“You must be careful and pay more attention!” Tu Hai and the others felt the same way.

However, reason told them.

No matter what they do to persuade them now, those people wouldn’t listen, because things hadn’t reached the worst point yet, and the martial artists of the three major teams still had hope.

Unable to dissuade the team-mates, they watched them walking one by one into the portal opened by the three leaders. Lord Ling Yun sighed and finally couldn’t bear to watch. He doesn’t know whether he was right or wrong, but he knew that the warriors of the three major teams were leaving, which was definitely wrong.

Yueyang asked the names of the four leaders, which made them overjoyed.

This kind of inquiry, in fact, was also a kind of recognition.

chapters.title: Chapter 801.2 - The Hidden Struggle
chapters.body:
Chapter 801.2 - The Hidden Struggle

Chapter 801.2 The Hidden Struggle

“My name is Gui Xin, he is my biological brother, Gui Zhen!” Two men who were somewhat similar in appearance introduced themselves. The strength of the brother of Gui Xin was only slightly inferior to that of Lord Ling Yun. If the two brothers worked together, they can beat Lord Ling Yun and Tu Hai completely. The other two, one called himself ‘Chang Si’ and the other introduced himself as ‘Tian Hui’. They were both friends of attributed brothers, although they came from different places, but they were old friends since a long time ago.

“Lord Ling Yun, before meeting San Shao, was a wandering soldier in the widely heard area of the Heaven Realm.” Ling Yun and the four people were not familiar with each other, so they quickly took the opportunity to introduce themselves to each other.

“I, Tu Hai, was originally a city lord under the throne of Ling Yun kingdom. I was once responsible for guarding the Gate of Heaven for the Central Temple. But because of my strength, I have never had the opportunity to enter the Celestial Realm.” In addition to being open to everyone, Tu Hai also expressed his humble intention to Yue Yang. He hoped that Yue Yang would not abandon him for his low strength that was only at the peak of the fourth level of the Celestial Realm.

“There is still hope in the Heaven Realm, and people should be worthy and self-reliant!” In order to deter people, Yue Yang naturally comforted by saying a few words.

He also took out six of the best martial arts elixir and rewarded each of them one.

When Lord Ling Yun and the others received this kind of ‘Extreme Grade Martial Spirit Pill’ which was extremely rare in the Heaven Realm, they were so shocked that they could not speak at all. Tu Hai, in particular, almost wanted to cry out loudly, with this kind of Martial Spirit Pill/panacea, he would have a chance to break through the peak of the fourth level of the Celestial Tier, which he had been unable to break through for hundreds or thousands of years.

The fifth level of the Heaven level is one of the basic criteria for entering the Heaven Realm.

Now, there was finally hope.

For him who had been longing for a long time and had been unable to gain recognition, the desire that had been tormented for years was so effortless with the help of San Shao.

With a lift of his hand, the dawn of hope was displayed before his eyes!

This is the ability of San Shao. No, this is just the beginning. If we make great achievements, with his guidance and reward, will the Heaven Realm, the place we dream of, still be a problem?

“This is too valuable. We haven’t done anything yet.” All of them expressed their fear and dare not to accept.

“There are plenty of opportunities to establish merit. There is no need to be concerned about the Martial Spirit Pill, pay and gain are proportional to each other, it’s not even a Martial God Pill, I won’t be stingy.” Yue Yang waved his hand and threw out the bait of the Martial Spirit Pill again. If you want a horse to run but you don’t give him grass to eat, that will not work. Similarly, any subordinate would like to have some rewards to get things done, otherwise who would work for you?

“The Martial God Pill?” Yue Yang’s carefree attitude when he spoke about the Martial God Pill completely shocked Lord Ling Yun and the others.

The Martial God Pill was a divine pill that can increase the potential and could only be made by the legendary ‘gods’.

The masters of the Central Temple will fight with each other for this kind of martial pill, regardless of unity.

When the strength reaches a certain level, the most valuable thing is not breakthrough or strength, but potential. Without potential, many Heaven Realm warriors can only stay at a certain level in their life, watching others catch up with themselves and lead their own lives If there is a martial god pill, all this will not appear! This is why a single Martial God Pill could make the strong crazy!

Of course, Yue Yang was just throwing out a bait.

Unless Lord Ling Yun and others can become the faithful subordinates of Captain Cook under the Queen Fay Wen Li, Yue Yang will not reward them no matter how many Martial god pills he has.

No amount of Martial God Pill is too much, even if it is really too much, it is better to let Yue Shuang girl eat them like jelly beans than to give it to outsiders.

“I vow to follow you to death!” Lord Ling Yun and the others were so excited that their hearts almost exploded, of course, they knew that the Martial God Pill was not that easy to obtain, but now that they had the Martial Spirit Pill in their hands, they did not bother not believing Yue Yang’s words. They had secretly made up their minds at this point, that even if it was a thousand times harder, they would still have to earn a Martial God Pill in this lifetime, otherwise, they would die with peace.

If they didn’t cherish such an opportunity, they’re afraid that if outsiders knew about it, they would all die of anger.

Now, Lord Ling Yun and the others felt they were too fortunate.

Fortunately, they had firmly chosen to follow Yue yang, otherwise, how could they have obtained the reward of the Martial Spirit Pill? And how could one hope to obtain the Martial God Pill?

Blade Cut Valley

Six almost transparent shadows appeared on the top of the Five Elements Gold Seeking Mouse.

The two temple elders who had chosen to lurk were ignorant of their arrival.

One of the shadows leaned over to observe the five elements seeking gold mouse, instead of the replica copied by the law, after observing it for a while, he gave a heartfelt admiration, “What an exquisite war puppet, in Heaven Realm, I didn’t expect to have such an ingenious figure. It’s so rare!”

“Shao Feng, can your skilled craftsmen in the Fire Hall make this gold-seeking rat by his hands?” Another shadow asked strangely.

“No way, those guys, they don’t deserve to carry a shoe of the maker of these gold-seeking mice. It’s amazing, it was able to capture and gather information while we are invisible and send it to its master, look at those two elders, still acting like fools… Wan mo, have you seen a war puppet that can hide from the temple elders?” The man named Ran Feng was the Fire Temple Master that Yu Bo had talked about, and he could at least be ranked at the top five or even the top three among all the temple owners.

“Can it be plundered?” Asked the man named Wan Mo.

“Even this seat cannot plunder or even destroy it.” The most mysterious man in the middle opened his mouth and spoke up. He was the closest to the God in the legend, the legendary grand master of the temple, Ji Go Ji Wu Ri.

“What? Can’t destroy it? Even your excellency? “The man named Wan Mo was shocked when he heard the speech.

“These are made from metal xìng. They should be five-in-one, even if they are destroyed, this thing can be restored by itself in the treasure book.” Ran Feng made a judgment.

“I hate good things that I can’t get my hands on and can’t destroy…” The man named Wan Mo was very mad, and he finally said suddenly, “Seeing such an excellent war beast from the enemy. I feel really upset in my heart, so why don’t you let me go and beat those two elders! The better the enemy, the more foolish they are, the exploring rat has never been seen, but they said it’s of an elder. What elder, damn, if I do not take action to vent, I am going to go crazy!”

“They’re from the Light Palace Zhong Hua, if you beat them up, Zhong Hua will definitely accuse you, the Dark Palace Master, of carrying out a personal vendetta.” Ran Feng laughed at his own words.

“…” Wan Mo was speechless.

“There’s no need to do boring things, chase after that pirate leader first, the owner of this war puppet, take your time to observe!” The most mysterious Ji Go Ji Wu Ri who was in the middle waved his hand, and all six of them disappeared without a trace. The two lurking temple elders, however, still knew nothing about it.

Outside the Blade Cut Valley, Yue Yang, who had closed his Summoning Treasure Book, had a slight curve to his lips.

A smile flickered on his face.

chapters.title: Chapter 802.1 - Intrusion, Fog Transformation, Water Illusion
chapters.body:
Chapter 802.1 - Intrusion, Fog Transformation, Water Illusion

Chapter 802.1 Intrusion, Fog Transformation, Water Illusion

Inside the Blade Cut Valley.

The two Temple Elders felt really impatient as the enemy had not entered the trap for a long time, had they seen through the ambush?

The departure of Heaven Realm warriors of the three major teams of Eight wilderness, Snowy plain and Battle Song, almost made them fly out to intercept them. In order to prevent it from being an enemy’s strategy to tempt them, the two decided to continue to lurk. In any case, if the enemy wanted to break through the obstacles, they would have to pass through Blade Cut valley. Here, although waiting for the rabbit was a stupid way, but once trapped, it would be the best place to annihilate someone.

Here, even a single man could kill a thousand men.

By virtue of the location, the two decided to hold on.

Even if they had to wait for a long time, they would never reveal their location, only a patient hunter could get his hand on the prey.

Taking advantage of Blade Cut Valley’s various mechanisms, along with the traps and war Beast abilities, they could definitely make a surprise attack on the enemy and make them pay a heavy price! In the entire wind valley, there was no better place than here for an ambush.

“Oh, here they come, they are finally here.” said the Temple Elder who was on the ambush on the left side after finding some movements on the outer side of the Blade cut valley.

“According to the original plan, when the people outside reach to the edge of the Passage, they will start the mechanism. Even if the people outside have the immortal body, they will miserably die in the blade cut Passage. This mechanism was perhaps built by the gods because no one can escape its power, and nor it could be destroyed…We have to pay attention to whether someone will breakthrough soon, we might have to wait for a little, well, no need, they are coming! ” The Temple Elder on the right was overjoyed, and hid his breath even more deeply along with his companions, but his awareness expanded a hundredfold, he has been keeping a close eye at Yue Yang and the others who had entered the Blade Cut Valley.

As if he didn’t know that there was an ambush planned by the enemy, Yue Yang walked in front of the team, Tu Hai was on his side, while Lord Ling Yun stayed at the end.

In the middle was Gui Xin and Gui Zhen, making them four in total.

Everyone walked at a certain distance from each other.

At this distance, it was possible to look after each other without affecting the space where they could display their skills at best.

In case they encountered a dangerous mechanism or trap in Blade Cut Valley, they would have had more time to deal with it.

Big rims one after another, were constantly rotating, various sharp knives, ground spears, poisonous arrows, broken bones, nail boards, giant boulders and spikes, and other various kinds of incredible mechanisms keep being triggered as Yue Yang and the others passed by. Only those with most agility and quickest reactions would be able to escape them all. Some of the flying arrows seem to leave no room to escape from them.

One had to swim through the arrow while seeking temporary shelter in order to dodge them. When Yue Yang walked through such a place, he couldn’t help but admire the designer’s uniqueness. Only such mechanisms can get the best exercise effect. In comparison, the mechanism in Tong Tian Tower of the Five Elements was simple torture.

If there weren’t two Temple Elders lurking in ambush, Yue Yang would have asked Hui Tai Lang to release Fatty Hai and the others to let them get some practice.

In the mechanism, there were some sharp knives and spears that could run through the entire space. While walking to the top, one would be unable to dodge them. It would be necessary to see the law of its expansion and contraction, so that one could instantly cross before it starts contracting, in order to avoid getting hit.

Yue Yang walked away and secretly wrote down that he would later prepare a similar mechanism in Tong Tian Tower for training.

After walking through dozens of giant boulder-like mechanisms, they had only cleared less than one-fifth of the passage.

But it had already made Lord Ling Yun and the others dizzy and exhausted.

Fortunately, there were no casualties.

Everyone had managed to make it through.

Yue Yang stopped at a hundred meters long passage. The passage was very huge, but inside it, was many rotating serrated blades, tumbling like a wave. Thousands of serrated blades kept spinning. Anyone who would get cut by them will definitely be smashed into minced meat.

The passage was the largest and most difficult to pass through in the entire Blade Cut Valley.

It had no possibility of passing straight through.

Any passer must first pass through the first rotating blade, then wait for the second blade to stop rotating, and similarly wait for the third blade to stop to get a chance to pass through.

There were thousands of such serrated blades.

Once entered, they could only advance, there was no possibility of retreat.

After this passage, there were some other mechanisms that were more complicated but were a little easy, and passing them would not really kill people. Therefore, the hardest part of the entire Blade Cut Valley was this blade cutting Passage.

“What the hell!.”Lord Ling was aware that behind this blade cut passage, there are two Temple Elders lurking in ambush, so he was on guard the entire time. Although he listened to Yue Yang’s various techniques and points to pay attention to, he still had no confidence that this blade cut passage was safe to pass through. Thousands of serrated blades were spinning and as long as a slight mistake was made they would be dead.

On top of it, the most terrible thing was that the two Temple Elders were still eyeing them in the dark, ready to sneak attack at any moment…

If it were not for Third Young Master Yue, he wouldn’t have crossed this blade cutting passage.

This place was simply killing him!

However, he also knew.

If he couldn’t even pass this blade cutting passage, then he should just stop following Third Young Master Yue, and go back, buy a piece of tofu and die.

He and Tu Hai, the two of them set off first.

After stopping and passing from time to time, they passed about 100 serrated blades, then Gui Xin and Gui Zhen also started following them, and after they passed more than 500 serrated blades, Chang Si and Tie Wan also entered the passage. Two Temple Elders were waiting for Chang Si and Tie Wan to enter. According to their prediction, Yue Yang was just a Quasi-Heaven Rank stage and as long as they trapped Lord Ling Yun and the others in the Blade Cut passage, their chance of success would be 90%.

They did not hesitate to launch the mechanism trap and temporarily shut down the Blade Cut passage that Yue Yang was about to enter.

The serrated blades in the Passage immediately increased its rotation by tenfold.

Moreover, there were also many Metal Attribute natured war beasts, that pounced on them from their hidden position in the Passage, attacking the already occupied Lord Ling Yun and the others…Ten minutes later, Lord Ling Yun and Tu Hai were covered in bruises and injuries due to the successive hits from the mechanism, although they had avoided the most deadly cuts from the blades.

Most importantly, both of them were also attacked by the Metal Attributed war beasts.

These war beasts were the descendants of the war beasts that the ancient predecessors deliberately left behind. They all have certain abilities. Once they hit their target, they can block the progress of the trespassers.

Countless Metal Attributes Beast, they formed cumbersome chains or shackles on their bodies, strangling Lord Ling Yun and Tu Hai in the Blade Cut passage, several times placing them in a dangerous situation, nearly causing them to become minced meat by the blades. The Two Temple Elders laughed and laughed, and they were surprised by the success of the plan. However, they were not surprised to be so unwilling to achieve such success. The frustration and displeasure brought about by the ambush over the past few days were not swept away. So, in order to hasten the death of Lord Ling Yun and Tu Hai, and their final victory, and also for the sake of greater merit, they decided to personally enter the Blade Cut passage to deliver a fatal blow to Ling Yun and the others, who were seriously injured.

chapters.title: Chapter 802.2 - Intrusion, Fog Transformation, Water Illusion
chapters.body:
Chapter 802.2 - Intrusion, Fog Transformation, Water Illusion

Chapter 802.2 Intrusion, Fog Transformation, Water Illusion

Although Ling Yun and the others possessed the strength of Level 5 of Heaven Tier, they were confident enough.

In this Blade Cut passage, the strength of the two temple elders did not weaken.

Instead, it had increased several times.

How can they have no confidence when the other party is injured?

“Beautiful Flamingo, it’s your turn!”The Temple Elder on the left summoned a flamingo. The flamingo was gorgeous like a scorching sun, spreading its wings as if it can ignite the whole world. Its strength had reached the astonishing 5th level of Heaven, which was not weaker than the strength of it’s Master, and even exceeded him in some aspects.

“Your flamingo is so beautiful no matter how one looks at it.”The Temple Elder on the right side admired and summoned a mountain-like creature.

It belonged to the giant battle type beast.

Star-shaped.

It was bigger than a mountain, but the appearance was not clumsy/that bad. On the contrary, it looked very light.

The most surprising thing was that this mountain-like and giant star-shaped summoned beast with a Heaven 4 strength could blend into Metal. It blended into metal so naturally, like water blending in the soil, so it blended itself into the blade cut passage, freely moving inside, forming mountain like barrier one after another, like an estuary, and constantly reducing the space, with the intention of matching the serrated blades, and force the six people trapped inside to their deaths.

The Temple Elder on the left side opened the last section of the blade cut passage. Before plunging in, he laughed and said, “My flamingo has been dyed with the blood of countless people, of course, it’s beautiful! With the blood of these six leaders, my flamingo will surely become more beautiful…Old fellow, let’s work according to the original plan, you are responsible for blocking them, and I will give them a fatal blow. Haha, the cautiousness of these guys happens to be their most fatal weakness. If they were not scattered and had advanced forward together, then our attack wouldn’t have gone too smooth. Now, only two people are in the front, and they all have been seriously injured. My beautiful flamingo, and I, both of us can’t wait!”

“There seems to be a gust of wind…” the Temple Elder on the right felt a gust of wind blowing from the inside.

“They were still trapped at a great distance, and it was impossible to come out. Maybe it was just a conviction made due to the difference in temperature!” said the Temple Elder on the left after carefully analyzing and founding no abnormalities/nothing unusual.

“Yes, but we still have to be cautious, there’s no harm in being alert!”Temple Elder on the right nodded, acknowledging that he was also a little cautious of this anomaly.

They didn’t see it, but not far from them, the Invisible Yue Yang was standing above the mechanical trap; looking down on them.

In the end, Yue Yang did not make a move to rescue Lord Ling Yun and the others. They were six people, so he just put away Five-element Seeking Golden Mice and drifted away without a word.

If Lord Ling Yun can’t even pass this test, then they don’t have to mix into the Heaven Realm anymore, or else they wouldn’t be able to keep their lives anywhere. This was the most basic test that they had to pass. What Yue Yang wanted was not some waste, but a follower who has the courage and talent.

Lord Ling Yun and the others also knew, and they felt that they had to show their best performance.

This performance will directly determine the perception of the third Young Master.

Whether they are valuable or not.

It would be reflected in this battle!

The flamingo unfolded the pair of gorgeous wings, and the millions of blazing flames turned into millions of sharp blades under its capability. At the moment when the serrated blades stopped, they were blasted to the extreme that Lord Ling Yun and Tu Hai became battered and exhausted…

“My goodness, it’s a flamingo!”Lord Ling Yun suddenly realized who the person ambushing them is, it’s the very famous flamingo elder of the Divine Central Hall.

“Weaklings, out of painful lamentation, that would be the last sound you will leave in the Heaven Realm!” The Flamingo elder shook his both hands, and then just like a volcanic eruption, jets of endless flames burst out, then all of them were transformed by Beast flamingo, into sharp blades, and flew towards Lord Ling Yun and City Lord Tu Hai. The Flamingo elder had an ‘Invasion Inherent Skill’, any enemy, who was hit by his Flamingo’s flame, the sharp blade transformed by the flamingo would invade the enemy’s body from the blood vessels of the wound, and then turn all the blood of the enemy into a sharp blade. Cutting the internal organs, piercing the skin, and spurting out, the death will be terrible/terrifying.

“This, what is this?”

City Lord Tu Hai found his hands were wet.

Looking closely, he realized that it was not water, nor blood, but liquid metal.

Those liquid metal, as if it was life-like, spread around his body, and in the blink of an eye grew countless long metal spikes, holding Tu Hai’s whole person in the middle of Blade Cut passage…If it’s somewhere else, it might not be a problem, but this was the Blade Cut passage…When he saw spinning serrated blades sweeping over, and he couldn’t struggle at all, Tu Hai sweated profusely.

Lord Ling Yun took a quick look at himself, and also exclaimed, “It is the gold starfish of Chi Feng elder. Hurry, throw away all the metals from your body, it can fuse with the metal attribute, and flee after throwing them!”

Chi Feng Elder laughed, “It’s too late. In this Blade Cut Valley, Flamingo and I are invincible, you can rest in peace!”

Lord Ling Yun has dodged thousands of sharp edges and was about to wipe a cold sweat.

Suddenly, he felt that there was a ‘feather blade’ smaller than the needle under the sole of the foot, gently ‘clinking’ to his ankle.

In shock, Lord Ling Yun raised his foot and jumped up, but did not realize that there was another sharp blade on the top of his head, folded like a paper crane, burrowing down. Lord Ling Yun reached out and stretched out his hand to block it…The blade that was supposed to fall was immediately turned into flames that unstoppably dug into the wound on Lord Ling Yun’s palm, and then turned into a number of sharp blades, that passed through the palm of his hand!

“Ah!”Lord Ling Yun screamed in pain, and he watched the blood of his own palms, unifying into sharp blades, piercing his blood vessels.

“Die, you are destined to die!”The Flamingo elder knew that once an enemy is injured, it is equal to the end of the battle.

“Flamingo elder, you are wrong, this is just the beginning!”Lord Ling Yun’s arm suddenly turned into a mist, and the sharp blade that entered the body, fell with a clank, without blood, it could not continue to invade. On the other hand, City Lord Tu Hai, also turned into a Waterman, splashed out of the armor, and quickly escaped from the little space between the serrated blades. Despite the mess, the confinement that allowed the enemy’s gold starfish to imprison them was relieved.

“Fog Transformation and Water Illusion are their Inherent Skill ability?”The Flamingo elder suddenly understood why these two guys dared to come in first to explore the road, so they still had a life-saving trick.

However, even if they had the abilities, how many times could they perform it?

Innate abilities were not omnipotent.

Especially in this blade cut passage, their Fog Transformation and Water Illusion, once cut by the blades, even if they are not dead on the spot, but after the recovery, their bodies will be separated. Most importantly, both Fog Transformation and Water Illusion were at an absolute disadvantage against the flamingo, which can transform flames, blood, and sharp blades by itself. Even without the Invasion Inherent Skill, they would not be able to take advantage of it.

After seeing the abnormal state of Lord Ling Yun and Tu Hai, the two Temple Elders who were in the battle had long ignored Yue Yang, the Quasi-Heaven Rank.

Even though both Yue Yang and Hui Tai Lang had somehow disappeared into the Blade Cut Valley, they were still unaware of it.

Who will pay attention to a Quasi-Heaven Rank?

Even if they wanted to pay attention, they would be concerned about the strengths of the four reinforcements, Gui Xin, Gui Zhen, Chang Si, and Tie Wan, who were still stuck in the previous segment of the blade cut passage…

“I have enough time to cook you before they arrive.”The Flamingo elder sneered, he decided to use his trump card, a trick that would make the enemy completely desperate!

chapters.title: Chapter 803.1 - Earth Demon Palace
chapters.body:
Chapter 803.1 - Earth Demon Palace

Chapter 803.1 [Earth Demon Palace]

Wind Valley.

When Yue Yang reached the very end of Wind Valley, standstill, he saw God of Rain, the same imprisonment as God of Wind.

Unlike God of Rain, God of Wind hangs upside down, head down and feet up. Likewise, he was also constantly being tortured by the power of punishment. To Yue Yang’s surprise, according to God of Wind, whether it was Captain Cook who passed, or Ji Wu Ri used the same ability they had passed, and went to the third level of Sand Valley without passing him.

“Kid, you have to be careful, Ji Wu Ri is definitely not easy to deal with. Of course, I guess he won’t pay any attention to you guys, you’re no threat to him at all, he’s mainly dealing with that idiot Cook.” Unlike God of Rain who was addicted to wine, God of Wind was disdainful of wine, he was only addicted to food. Yue Yang gave him all kinds of delicacies, using the same bribery strategy as God of Rain. For this kind of old immortal, as a junior, there was no harm in taking out a low stance and being slightly respectful. In order to enhance the effect of flattery, Yue Yang also let Fatty Hai and the others come out to pay their respects to this senior master one by one.

When it comes to licking somebody’s boot, fatty Hai comes into play now.

He’s definitely a good hand.

“Your old man is highly respected, talented, world-famous, and known to everybody ……” Fatty Hai spoke complimenting, and could speak continuously for an hour without repeating.

“Well, well” God of Wind hadn’t heard such a comfortable compliment in a long time, and in delight, he burst a shocking secret to Yue Yang: “Seeing that you juniors are quite sensible, I’ll tell you a secret. That scamp, God of Rain, he definitely wouldn’t tell you something so useful!”

“You are always like this” Fatty Hai quickly gave God of Wind a thumbs up.

“God of Rain naturally isn’t as good as you.” As soon as Yue Yang heard that, he knew that these two old guys were actually deadly rivals, and God of Rain had no kind words for God of Wind before.

“He didn’t even deserve to lift my old man’s shoes, if it wasn’t for the fact that Sha Man Luo was soft and afraid of marrying me, he would have committed ‘suicide’ with a broken heart, I would have been married long ago. That bastard God of Rain screwed up my marriage to Sha Man Luo and made countless enemies, If it wasn’t for that idiot, we wouldn’t even be here? It’s fine that he’s causing me pain about this Wind Valley, but he’s also causing my Sha Man Luo to suffer, and speaking of which, I’d like to kill him! O my Sha Man Luo, I have not heard from her for a long time, let alone seen her, and you, you must greet her for me!” The Sha Man Luo that God of Wind said was the guardian of the third level of Sand Valley, old lady Sha.

“Definitely, definitely.” Yue Yang’s classmate smiled in his heart, what he heard from God of Rain was a completely different version.

However, he had no interest in the feud between the three seniors that had been going on for tens of thousands of years.

If you make good use of this, after the seal is lifted, you can better ‘control’ these old guys, at least you can let them stay in peace at the sky tower and to become a strong arm of the Tower.

God of Wind was more nonsense than God of Rain, and afraid of Yue Yang and others preconceived ideas, they listened to God of Rain’s words and repeated the story of his love affair with old lady Sha.

Xue Tan Lang almost didn’t fall asleep listening.

Prince Ten Luo, on the other hand, kept a polite smile on his face, though it went in the left ear and out the right.

The Li brothers held back from yawning and took out their blades and kept wiping them, over and over again.

Only Ye Kong and Fatty Hai, the more they listened, the more excited they became, especially Fatty Hai, who from time to time applauded or stifled a long sigh for God of Rain ‘touching’ love, as if he felt the same way. The two of them listened, allowing God of Wind to find his confidant to tell his grievances. Finally, after three hours of telling, and also after Yue Yang, who was leaning on Hui Tai Lang, had woken up from his three sleeps, he finally told the secret that was said to be known only to him and old lady Sha in heaven and on earth: “You must have never heard of it, before the Heavenly Realm, there was a super strong man who once swept the entire Heavenly Realm….No, not that little girl Fei Wen Li, that girl is a bit belligerent, but the evil is far from that super strong person before, the Faceless King, no, not the Faceless King either, the Faceless King is nothing evil, I’ve killed no less people than him, the Faceless King is at most a bit stronger than me, yes, just a little bit stronger, mainly because he has the artifact in his hand, and I am not”

Yue Yang quickly corrected God of Wind who was off topic, “let’s go back to that super strong person, what’s his name?”

“This particularly evil fellow, called Open Sky, known as the supreme of all demons, about sixty or seventy thousand years ago, had killed many people, and the entire Heavenly Realm had made him make a mess of things, the people’s lives were in dire straits. Of course, if you do too many bad deeds, you definitely don’t get to eat any good fruit, and this bull-headed guy was no exception, and one day had him sealed without a word.” That’s how God of Wind introduced it.

“Is he sealed in this Winds Valley?” Yue Yang asked.

“No, how could a place like this be able to seal against this Open Sky Demon, that’s impossible! At the sixth level, after the Valley of Desire, Beast Valley and Demon Valley, before leaving the Demon Valley, if you can open an extremely deep hidden ‘Sky Demon Palace’ inside with the Heavenly Demon Order, in there is the sealing place of that Open Sky Demon, if you can defeat him, I’m sure you can get the reward for sealing that strong guy of his! ” God of Wind showed Yue Yang a clear path.

“Sky Demon is here?” Yue Yang asked again.

At the sixth level, after the Valley of Desire, Beast Valley and Demon Valley, before leaving the Demon Valley, if you can open an extremely deep hidden ‘Sky Demon Palace’ inside with the Heavenly Demon Order, in there is the sealing place of that Kai Tian Demon guy, if you can defeat him, I’m sure you can get the reward for sealing that strong guy of his! ” Uncle Wind showed Yue Yang a clear path.

“How is that possible, the Sky Demon is placed inside the ‘Earth Demon Palace’, it’s the key that opens the Sky Demon Palace, can you just give it to anyone? That young lady Fei Wen Li wanted to go over and get it back then, but because of various considerations, she was afraid that her rivals would steal all of it before her, so she didn’t go to kill the Earth Demon of the Earth Demon Palace, and she didn’t go to challenge the Open Sky Demon at the sixth level, and went straight to the back …… Unfortunately, even she couldn’t clear all of it.” God of Wind spoke of the past and was still a little regretful, if Empress Fei Wen Li indeed went to challenge, she might still succeed.

“Where is the Earth Demon Palace? And who is that Earth Demon?” Yue Yang let this guy get confused, wouldn’t it be nice if things were just said straight out.

chapters.title: Chapter 803.2 - Earth Demon Palace
chapters.body:
Chapter 803.2 - Earth Demon Palace

Chapter 803.2 [Earth Demon Palace]

“At the third level, in the Sand Valley, there is an Earth Demon Palace in an extremely secluded place, where the Earth Demon is sealed. The Earth Demon is the accomplice of the Open Sky Demon, the leader of all evil demons in the past, he’s only second to Open Sky Demon. For example, if the Open Sky Demon was an emperor, then the Earth Demon was a marshal. As a punishment, the Earth Demon is also sealed inside the Earth Demon Palace, tortured, although he stayed in the third level, but than we can not compare the suffering, we are considered slightly punished, their kind, is the real punishment, every day shower with lava or molten iron, and then then a hundred thunderbolts a day, that is the most basic generation. Moreover, that’s still the power of the law, it’s impossible to resist with power!” God of Wind was actually a bit scared when he mentioned the Law Punishment, and he was reluctant to talk about it, as if he too would be damned if he did.

“How do you get into this third level of the Earth Demon Palace?” Yue Yang thought to himself, wouldn’t you just say go into the Earth Demon Palace and get the Sky Demon Order? It’s a big turn that almost got you into a ditch.

“Your old man is omnipotent and surely knows best!” Ye Kong was flattering God of Wind against his will.

“Nonsense.” Fatty Hai scolded angrily, “how in the world could it be Senior God of Wind who could know this secret, Senior God of Wind and Old Lady Sha are lovers, shaped like the same person, it must be old lady Sha who knows this secret best.”

“Yes, yes, yes, you’re so right, if Sha Luo Man didn’t know better, would she be guarding inside of Sand Valley? You were supposed to have to pass her test before you could go to the Earth Demon Palace, but she is too good-hearted and definitely won’t agree to you going to the Earth Demon Palace. I can show you the way, but I don’t guarantee that you can win against the Earth Demon, because with your strength, it’s not that I underestimate you, it’s that you’re really out of luck! You guys can write it down for now, wait until you are strong enough to challenge it later, you really can’t stand curiosity, you can go in and take a look, just take a look from afar, it’s probably still not dangerous.” God of Wind, under Fatty Hai and Ye Kong’s ass-kissing prowess, finally couldn’t resist and drew a brief map of the Earth Demon Palace for Yue Yang.

“We’re just going in to take a look, don’t worry, we won’t be reckless. That’s right, if Old Lady Sha asks about it, we won’t say anything, definitely not.” After Yue Yang and Xue Tan Lang and the others became familiar with the map, they immediately destroyed it.

“Remembering such a complicated map so quickly? Not bad, can’t compare to old man, but this memory is barely passable!” God of Wind was a little surprised.

“Yes, yes, how can we juniors compete with you!” Fatty Hai nodded and humped.

Remembering the map was trivial, it’s much easier than remembering the unpredictable and endless array of heavenly runes.

Fatty Hai and the others definitely didn’t have such memory before, but more than Yue Yang, the perverted memory has been exercised, remembering a map is not worth mentioning.

After leaving the second level Wind Valley.

Yue Yang brought everyone to the third level, Sand Valley.

This was a strange world full of yellow sand, all the sand is a life-gobbling whirlpool of quicksand, anyone who fell into it could only be buried inside, and without special abilities, there was absolutely no escape. In the sky, the same winds swirled up the sand, hitting people with more power than a sharp arrow, if it was below innate strength, just a single sand would be fatal enough, not to mention the sky full of sand.

Ye Kong asked Yue Yang with some caution, “Do we really have to go to the Earth Demon Palace?”

Prince Tian Luo also agreed with Ye Kong’s concerns, “God of Rain must have known about this Earth Demon Palace, but the fact that he didn’t say anything proves that this Earth Demon Palace is not something we can challenge with our strength. Back then, neither Empress Fei Wen Li nor the Prison Emperor went to challenge it, which can also reflect on the side that it was hard to chew.”

Fatty Hai quickly denied, “Her Majesty and the two Prison Emperors are afraid of competitors grabbing the clearance, we don’t have a time limit, it should work.”

The Li brothers only listened to Yue Yang and would not disagree with whatever decision he made.

So, don’t take a stand.

Yue Yang swept everyone after some consideration, “I understand that this Earth Demon Palace is definitely not easy to pass, but now is the most important moment for us to improve our strength, if we can’t make rapid progress, I’m afraid that Ji Wu Ri along with the tower will sink to the dark realm. Our time is even tighter than Fei Wen Li Empress’ back then, so I have to fight for it. Another reason, if we advance too fast, we are bound to attract the attention of Ji Wu Ri and the others, and once they notice us, Ji Wu Ri will definitely leave someone strong in front of us to ambush us, and then even if we get through safely, our strength will be exposed. If Ji Wu Ri realizes that there is still a new generation of us rising in the Tong Tian Tower, he will definitely abandon Captain Cook and pursue us with all his might, and with our current strength, seriously, we can’t match that guy yet!”

Everyone fell silent as they listened.

Finally, Yue Yang gave another reason, “Jiu Xiao and Xue, the three giants of the Western Heaven Realm, they are probably regaining their strength, if we don’t hurry up before they regain their peak state, I’m afraid that a new calamity will come to the Tong Tian Tower, and they are equally unwilling for us to rise. In order to increase our strength faster, we need more and stronger challenges, and the Earth Demon Palace is another new beginning!”

Xue Tan Lang nodded solemnly, “Understood, that even if it means death, we will challenge it to the end!”

Fatty Hai, Ye Kong, Prince Tian Luo and Li Brothers, their hands all reaching out to Yue Yang, “And us!”

chapters.title: Chapter 804.1 - The Invisible Enemy, The Snake-Haired Demon
chapters.body:
Chapter 804.1 - The Invisible Enemy, The Snake-Haired Demon

Chapter 804.1 [The Invisible Enemy, The Snake-Haired Demon]

Sand Valley.

Following the route recorded on the map, Yue Yang brought Hui Tai Lang, Fatty Hai and the others to the entrance of the Earth Demon Palace.

Seeing the entrance, Yue Yang couldn’t help but grasp madly and curse that old man God of Wind for being a nitwit.

Old and rusty brand!

The reason was that it was right to follow the route of that map, but there were many paths that were unnecessary and a wasted trip. The map given by God of Rain, just like the way he spoke, took a big turn, until the end, Yue Yang just realized that if he used the best route, he could reduce the process by at least two thirds, and there wouldn’t be so many sandthorn sand spiders and other monsters ambushing him halfway ……

“Forget it, it’s better to have finally reached the destination than a wrong map.” Xue Wu Xia, who was practicing in the Yue Yang Treasure World, also came out, and when she did, not only Xue Tan Lang, but also Fatty Hai and Ye Kong and the others became good babies.

Aside from Zhi Zun, Xue Wu Xia was the most majestic of all the women.

Afraid that she rarely speaks.

And meddle less in affairs.

This had to do with each person’s personality and temperament and had little to do with strength, for example, gentle Yue Yu, even if she was strong, she wouldn’t be able to do what she said and order what she did like Xue Wu Xia.

“This Earth Demon Palace seems a bit odd.” After the improvement from the last battle, Princess Qian Qian’s sixth sense talent had become even sharper.

Of course, her gift of six senses, when it was at its most powerful, had to be in battle.

The six senses and four images are one. That’s the strongest of Princess Qian Qian.

Yue Yang frowned slightly, the entrance of the Earth Demon Palace was surrounded by an incomparably huge vortex of quicksand, and in the middle was a black, bottomless abyss, a terrifying dark force that surged like an ocean current, everyone could clearly sense it, but on the surface, it was incomparably serene and the waves were as flat as a mirror. Within a radius of several dozen kilometers, there was no life. In the end, the sand valley was full of terrifying man-eating monsters such as sand spiders or sand buckthorn worms, they ambushed under the sand in groups, once a creature passed by, they immediately pounced out and dragged their prey into the endless quicksand.

But within tens of kilometers of this quicksand vortex, not a single creature existed.

There was, it seemed, something destructive about it.

Making them have to dodge far away.

Xue Wu Xia gracefully closed the Book of Truth and shook her head slightly, questioning Yue Yang, “The Book of Truth doesn’t have a lot to present, only a darkness. What about you? What did you see?” She knew that Yue Yang’s eyes could see through the truth and see more accurately than her own Book of Truth.

Yue Yang also shook his head, “I can only see that the power of the seal has weakened, I can’t see anything else.”

Princess Qian Qian was slightly shocked at the sound of it, “If that’s the case, then our line will be even more dangerous. The seal is weakened, what does that mean, the enemy may have broken free of the seal, an Earth Demon who has been rampaging in the heavens for tens of thousands of years, it will be very hard if we need to face it head on. Although we haven’t reached the worst-case scenario yet, I have a feeling that the Sky Demon will never be easy to take!”

“Dragon Pond and Tiger’s Den, we all need to enter and break in.” Yue Yang kicked the hesitant Hui Tai Lang down before pulling the two women and jumping down.

“This great youngster’s glorious path to Heavenly Realm fame begins with this battle.” Fatty Hai tried his best to cheer himself up.

“Long-winded.” Ye Kong was behind his back.

It was only when the crowd jumped down into that black, outstretched abyss that they discovered that there was actually another world inside.

The power of the seal makes up all of space, there was no light, the sky and the earth were one color, no clouds or water currents, and both the sky and the earth were filled with endless black stones or black lava. The black lava was hotter than magma, and even the black stones looked like they had been scorched by the heat. Hui Tai Lang was panting with his tongue hanging out, just like Fatty Hai, who was afraid of heat.

Yue Yang hung in the air with Xue Wu Xia, Princess Qian Qian and two women, searching the surroundings carefully with their consciousness.

Huh?

He was startled to find that there were plants here.

A black demonic plant with no branches or leaves at all, only twisted and ugly roots and trunks, on top of which there are pimples like human faces and heads. When Yue Yang approached, those ugly ‘tree men’ would also dance their claw-like branches as if to capture him, and the faces on the trees would even appear with a bloodthirsty and murderous expression. When Yue Yang was discovered by those tree men, the space around him, at some point, still had a kind of ghostly demonic shadow drilled into the stone gap, an ugly one, neither life nor undead, but a kind of delusional monster created because of evil thoughts …… If the consciousness of a super martial power could leave a willed shadow of positive energy on the ladder, then the delusional monster here was the same, only they were completely negative energy.

The evil tree man and delusional monsters are supposed to be generated by the evil consciousness and negative energies of the Earth Demon.

The Earth Demon hadn’t even entered yet, and there were so many monsters.

It seemed that the Earth Demon was really not just scary, she had seen many shadows of consciousness left by her predecessors at the ladder, but the delusion monsters and evil tree man here were no weaker than the energy shadows below a thousand steps.

This, too, was created when the Earth Demon was sealed and even when he was being punished by the Law.

What if the Earth Demon were to regain his freedom? That negative energy is at least 100 times stronger than now, right?

chapters.title: Chapter 804.2 - The Invisible Enemy, The Snake-Haired Demon
chapters.body:
Chapter 804.2 - The Invisible Enemy, The Snake-Haired Demon

Chapter 804.2 [The Invisible Enemy, The Snake-Haired Demon

“You guys stay here and try your best to destroy these tree people and evil shadows, we’ll find the true entrance to the Earth Demon Palace and come back for you.” Yue Yang felt that with Hui Tai Lang here, plus Fatty Hai and the others having some strength, there should be no problem staying here. He took Xue Wu Xia and Princess Qian Qian with him, past the delusional monsters that were gradually gathering around, and flew towards the place where the evil energy was at its peak comparable to its source…..

“Be careful, don’t fall under the rocks, these monsters aren’t afraid of heat, they’ll probably ambush us down there.” Prince Tian Luo found that he exerted the weakest power here, his ability and the war beast Firey Winged Demon did not restrain the enemy, and might even be able to give them a boost. Luckily, Xue Tan Lang was there, his frost was the nemesis of monsters here, the power was simply beyond the limit here, and could make up for the loss in terms of his battle power in a small way. Xue Tan Lang was now cool and silent, summoning the Wind Lightning Beast and turning the surrounding space into a world of frost.

“Cool!” Ye Kong and the others felt their bodies smoothing out, but the monsters, who were seriously uncomfortable, dodged away in disgust.

“Boom!”

Fatty Sea’s Wind Breath Sea bird was the first to attack.

A bolt of lightning struck the nearest evil tree, breaking its limbs, several faces above also showed painful, twisted expressions, just silent and not the sad shrieks one would expect.

The evil tree man who was crippled by lightning didn’t die, it recovered as fast as the eye could see.

The fallen torso, slowly recovered.

Even the branches that had fallen to the ground in molten lava absorbed the heat and grew new branches again, showing no signs of death at all.

As soon as it saw that the attack was ineffective, the Wind Breath Seabird suddenly spewed out a frosty wind blade, hitting the half-mutilated evil tree Man. The evil tree man immediately froze up, and the expression on its face first froze in the frost, and only after a while did it recover, revealing an ugly and terrifying expression, with hot vomit spewing out of its mouth…….

“My dear, when did you realize the frost ability?” Fatty Hai hugged and kissed the Wind Breath Seabird after kissing it, but instead, the Wind Breath Seabird  rolled its eyes in no good mood.

“Who is the master, anyway?” The Li brothers let the question get tangled up, the war beast was smarter than its master, who would believe such a thing if it was told?

“Change ice attribute weapons.” Prince Tian Luo’s words were tantamount to announcing the start of battle.

Yueyang on the other side, however, flew out about fifty kilometers and found a black high cliff.

There is a depression halfway up this high cliff.

Yue Yang and the two girls flew in, only to discover that there was a wide cavern inside.

The Earth Demon Palace, built just inside the cavern, based on the various stone stalactites inside the cavern and the obelisk pillars on the surface of the ground, the sealer created an extremely mysterious sealing formation. This sealing formation was not to seal the Earth Demon, but to seal this Earth Demon Palace, preventing anyone from destroying it easily. Any power that attacked the Earth Demon Palace would bounce back towards the master who launched the attack under the effect of this sealing formation.

If he wasn’t in a hurry and wanted to go in to take a look, Yue Yang would have studied how this huge sealing formation was made first.

With a hundred meters high, the Earth Demon Palace was only a small castle in Yue Yang’s eyes.

With everything that resembles a castle.

But the only difference was that the castle was not built of any stone, but was made of frost, a supreme sealing power, an irreversible force of law that preserved the temperature of the frost at absolute zero for eternity.

When Yue Yang tried to put his feet on the first ice level of the castle, he found that his entire leg was letting the frost freeze over.

“Terrible!” Yue Yang’s face changed, the most frightening thing was not the power of the ice seal, but the degree of control of that law that was just right. Frost power, after sealing Yue Yang’s legs, it would not go up anymore, this kind of law power that was still perfectly controlled after the owner left, it really made Yue Yang marvel, and also opened a door in his perception world, gaining more knowledge and experience in law power.

He reached out and gently lifted up both Princess Qian Qian and Xue Wu Xia, so that they, sitting on his shoulders, relying on their bodies, the trinity walked into this Earth Demon Palace.

This, was the only loophole Yue Yang could get into here.

Without the celestial vision and the legacy of knowledge left to him by Sister Si Niang, it would have been impossible for him to do this.

In this Earth Demon Palace, anyone had to walk in with their feet, which meant that everyone had to freeze their legs in order to enter this castle. Yue Yang held up Princess Qian Qian and Xue Wu Xia, walking in trinity did not violate the law of walking in with both legs, he only slightly exploited a small loophole like ‘trinity’ because the predecessors who made the law did not expect that there were people among the younger generation who could do this.

“Welcome, it’s been years since I’ve had any guests to my castle, but I can’t believe we have four distinguished guests here today, what a wretched sight!” A voice as elegant as that of a noble scholar came from the depths of the castle.

“Four, four?” Yue Yang’s face changed slightly, three people from his own side, who was the fourth person?

“Unexpectedly, even this matter-of-fact little boy and that subaltern artifact book failed to see through my invisibility, yet they let their master see through it with a single glance, truly worthy of being the Earth Demon who roamed the heavens back then!” There was a voice that sounded phantomly less than ten meters behind Yue Yang’s back. In the darkness, there was a shadow, a handsome man who lifted his cape and revealed a head full of snake hair, appeared. He looked back at Yue Yang who was standing on the ice steps and smiled wickedly, in this smile, Yue Yang could clearly see that he had four vampire-like fangs and a viper-like forked tongue.

chapters.title: Chapter 805.1 - A Subtle Hint
chapters.body:
Chapter 805.1 - A Subtle Hint

Chapter 805.1 [A Subtle Hint]

Earth Demon Palace, on the ice steps.

Yue Yang gazed longingly at this snake-haired demon man that suddenly appeared, but he and Xue Wu Xia, Princess Qian Qian and the two girls, did not show any hostility and did not summon the treasures.
