There was also no bad sense of that killing in this snake-haired demon man, only a weirdly mysterious one.

“Excuse me, you are?” Princess Qian Qian sat on Yue Yang’s shoulder, her hands saluting as a junior.

“Not good to worry, I mean no harm and am not a minion of the Central Palace.” Like a polite gentleman, the snake-haired demon man raised his hand slightly in return, “I’m just a little curious, because, in you, the little girl and the boy, I sense a hint of an old friend. Two old friends, to be precise, the Prison Emperor and Wei Wen Li.”

“Do you know the Prisons Emperor and Fei Wen Li Empress?” Xue Wu Xia asked.

“Of course, I once fought against the Prison Emperor, but at that time, although he had gained divine power and possessed a divine weapon, the Prison Emperor’s divine sword that you are wearing, he had not yet comprehended the divine form, and I was not too willing to fight him more, after all, he had many enemies besides me, an outsider, eyeing him.” The snake-haired demon man smiled, his turquoise eyes, revealing a deep recollection: “I also fought against Fei Wen Li once, Fei Wen Li, the queen of conquest was very vicious, I must admit, it wasn’t a match for her at that time…… This snake hair you see is a curse from her. ”

“Empress Fei Wen Li knows how to curse?” Yue Yang was strange.

“She not only knows, but is proficient.” The snake-haired demon man shook his head with a bit of a bitter smile, “If I didn’t possess the mirror of pain and the dispatch talent that can reduce damage through various means, I’m afraid that I would still be a rock right now, and not just as simple as having a head of snake hair to be free. You should be the disciples of the conquering queen, rest assured, although I fought a battle with the queen of conquest, but for you, I will not do anything, on the contrary, seeing you, the descendants of the tower, whose bodies possess half of the Tower’s martial bloodline, I am very happy in my heart.”

“Who says we’re descendants of the Tower?” Yue Yang asked back coldly.

“You’re not?” The snake-haired demon man, however, was not convinced.

“Four distinguished guests have graced my humble abode., how can you stand in front of the door for a long time, this is really against the way I treat my guests, please come in!” Inside, a wise voice just like that of a noble scholar floated out, and then, the giant palace ice gate, sealed by the heavenly rune diagram formation, slowly opened.

An even colder chill poured out of it.

Yue Yang reached out and protected Xue Wu Xia and Princess Qian Qian with pure sun energy.

The two women were safe and sound, but Yue Yang’s outstretched right hand was covered in frost for a moment.

Underfoot, despite Yue Yang’s best efforts to hold on, he still couldn’t help but take three steps backwards, retreating down those ice steps, his legs forced to retreat to the surface of the snow before he could barely stand.

The snake-haired demon man floated by Yue Yang’s side, when he stepped on those ice steps with ease, frost only flooded his feet, not yet knee, completely unlike Yue Yang just now, frost all the way up to the thigh. The cold inside had not yet dissipated, and the snake-haired demon man entered with aplomb, not affected at all, except for those snake hair, spewing red snake letters, emitting a little white mist, the rest of the time, just like being in normal space.

Although Yue Yang didn’t say it on the surface, he had to admit that the snake-haired demon man was stronger than himself.

Apart from the Demon Dragon, Yue Yang hadn’t met another man so powerful for the time being.

Even the Lionheart King, whose strength concealed several levels of emperor, was inferior.

Yue Yang secretly judged that this snake-haired demon man, even though he didn’t say his name or origin, was at least a strong domain emperor level, and might even be a heaven realm giant.

The celestial vision would have been able to see through all the truth, and the Book of Truth of the sublime artifact could also present the truth of things. However, no matter if it was Yue Yang’s celestial vision or Xue Wu Xia’’s Book of Truth, it did not have any information about this snake-haired demon man. This snake-haired demon man was as if he was invisible, completely devoid of any information, his ability to hide was simply at an appalling level.

The only thing we know for sure is that this guy is not killing for now.

When the cold is gone.

Yue Yang took Xue Wu Xia and Princess Qian Qian with him and strode up those ice steps, following closely behind this snake-haired demon man.

After a few dozen steps, enter the main gate, pass through the spacious front hall and the beautiful atrium, turn through the ingenious winding corridor and the ingenious doors of the main hall, and finally enter the magnificent hall of the castle.

Here, it’s more luxurious than any castle in the world.

The snow-white fur of the heavenly steps Land Bear King was spread on the ground, not a trace of color was visible on it, the pure gold cast table and chairs, and the magnificent chandelier set with beautiful diamonds, even the tableware on the table were all made of platinum. On the platinum tableware, which was refined to the limit, there was steaming hot food, evil eye oxtail soup, nine rolls of white jade lettuce, black pearl fish sauce, fried dragon liver, roasted flying dragon wings, pan-fried fairy fish, dream sweet banana boat and titan blood fire wine …… Any of these dishes were the best of the extravagant, not to mention ordinary warriors, even the heavenly realm lord, simply can’t afford to eat.

One had to know that every dish here was refined from the bodies of Heavenly War Beasts, and there was even a fire wine made from the blood of Titans.

This wine would have been a cup for an ordinary heavenly warrior to drink.

It’s expected for them to explode on the spot.

Of course, if it could be absorbed in its entirety, then I believe all martial artists below the third level of the Heavenly Stage would be able to break through and improve!

Sitting at the master’s seat, there was a gorgeously dressed silver-haired old man wearing a gentle single chain lens, and his neatly combed hair as well as lustrous forehead presented an incomparable intelligence. If one were to look at his eyes, then one would find that they were truly as deep as the sea. In terms of knowledge, wisdom, experience and attitude to life, the owner of these eyes has already reached the state of Huarui, who has an open mind for all things ancient and modern.

His hands held a surprisingly large black book with arcane patterns of heavenly runes as complex as a galaxy of stars.

Seeing the snake-haired demon man, Yue Yang and the two women enter, the silver-haired old man gently closed the book.

chapters.title: Chapter 805.2 - A Subtle Hint
chapters.body:
Chapter 805.2 - A Subtle Hint

Chapter 805.2 [A subtle hint]

He did not stand up, but politely extended his hand in greeting, not like a prisoner, but like an aristocratic scholar with a bad manner. He extended a cordial welcome to the snake-haired demon man, Yue Yang and the other four, and warmly invited them to sit down and enjoy the feast together: “Four distinguished guests, regardless of the purpose of your visit, it is destiny that we meet. You should know that I have not had any distinguished guests here for thousands of years, and the years of wasted time have been really lonely, but today, once you have come, you are four distinguished guests, so allow me, the master, to entertain you first, otherwise it is hard to feel at ease.”

“Respected Naxu, there is no need to be polite.” The snake-haired demon man was the first to bow forward, “Chang Feng is here to meet seniors.”

“Is your last name Lie, or like Gu?” The wise silver-haired old man asked.

“No, I have a compound surname, a surname that is rarely used in the heavenly realm, a compound surname of Dugu.” As soon as the snake-haired demon man said that, that silver-haired old man, immediately applauded with a big applause, “It is indeed worthy of being after the famous family of the four families, I have heard a legend that in the long-ago era, there were four outstanding warriors, who were rewarded by the supreme dragon god, and were given four surnames, and after that there were only ‘four families’ in the heavenly realm. In the future, there were ‘four great families’ in the heavenly realm. The Dugu clan was one of them. It is truly an honor to meet the descendants of Dugu today.”

“In front of senior, the battle-less Chang Feng wouldn’t dare to sell the glory of my ancestors, compared to my senior, Chang Feng is just a passing junior, and in terms of potential, he’s not even as good as the genius young man from the Tong Tian Tower and the two Jia hui young ladies beside him.” The snake-haired devil man humbled himself.

“Indeed, although the three of them are young, their intelligence is unparalleled, and it is rare for them to catch up with the innate Supreme at such a young age. What makes me feel most precious is that both my friend’s strength and the two young ladies’ strengths are all profoundly hidden, if we go by their true battle strength, I’m afraid that they are not as good as the Innate Supreme, which is even more precious. When the silver-haired old man gazed at Yue Yang, Yue Yang had an illusion of being seen through by him, so he had to forcefully deter his mind, secretly telling himself to be calm, with his disguise talent, plus the Phoenix Sisters and the Qilin Nui ice recites and their several Immortal Beasts protecting their bodies, even if the opposite was the Earth Demon, it would be impossible to see through his true strength.

If they could really see through it, the other side would never say anything.

It was because of the suspicion in their mind that they could open their mouths to test it like this.

Yue Yang, whose mind was enlightened in the Gate of Life and Death, and who had reached the supreme will, even if the silver-haired old man of the famous Heaven Realm, the ‘Earth Demon’, and the snake-haired demon man, the descendant of the four great families of the Dugu Clan, joined forces to test him, he would not create a ripple, keeping his mind tightly and calmly.

Yue Yang not only kept his mind clear and not fluctuating, he also used his mind along with Xue Wu Xia and Princess Qian Qian to make them appear to be at ease as well.

The ‘unusually’ calm reaction of the three made the eyes behind the silver-haired old man’s monocle to show a hint of appreciation.

“Little friend, do you also inform the family that such an excellent son as yourself, is it not after being nameless that you are willing to report the name of the family of honor to the envious master to know?” The silver-haired old man raised his hand in a kind and friendly manner, asking Yue Yang.

“I’m also from the four great families.” As soon as Yue Yang said that, the snake-haired devil man looked startled and surprised, as if he needed to get to know him again.

“Ah, little friend you are also after the four great families, I wonder which family?” The silver-haired old man asked slightly appalled.

“Yue family.” Yue Yang’s answer made Xue Wu Xia and Princess Qian Qian dizzy. The Yue Family, a family of four, without Yue Yang’s rise, used to not even be considered in Tong Tian Tower, just a name in the Dragon Continent. Now, taking it to the Heavenly Realm and using it to fool old monsters who had lived for tens of thousands of years, it was sweaty as hell!

“My Big four family is a bit different from your one, you are the big four of the Heavenly Realm and mine is the big four of the Tong Tian Tower.” This was how Yue Yang’s classmate replied.

“Didn’t you just deny that you are a descendant of the Tong Tian Tower?” The snake-haired demon man was dizzy again, which is the truth, anyway?

“Very well, to be ranked in the Tong Tian Tower of the four great families, of course they are also famous families, the Tong Tian Tower of the four great families is small, but compared to Heaven, what would be a fraction of the difference? The Tong Tian Tower’s experts are like clouds, the younger generation is endlessly strong, only the Tong Tian Tower’s warriors go to the Heavenly Realm to cultivate themselves, and they are famous, but very few heavenly warriors come to the Tong Tian Tower to show off their power. Little friend as the outstanding junior of the four great families of the Tong Tian Tower, such an outstanding posture, it really makes me breathtaking, I wonder if I can give my name, there are two young ladies as well …… ah, patronizing the introduction, I forgot to ask the distinguished guest to sit, sit, please sit!” The silver-haired old man gestured for Yue Yang and the others to sit down as he enthusiastically asked Yue Yang’s name.

“Very well, to be ranked in the Tower of the Four Great Families, of course they are also famous families, the Tower of the Four Great Families is small, but compared to the Celestial Realm, what would be a fraction of the difference? The first time I was in the Tower, I had to go to the Heavenly Realm to practice, but there were very few warriors from the Heavenly Realm who came to the Tower. As an outstanding junior of the four great families of the Tong Tian Tower, such an outstanding posture really makes me marvel, I wonder if I can give my name, and the same goes for the two young ladies …… ah, I was so concerned about the introduction that I forgot to invite the VIPs to sit down, sit, please sit!” The silver-haired old man gestured for Yue Yang and the others to sit down as he enthusiastically asked Yue Yang’s name.

“Junior Xue Wu Xia, meet senior.” Xue Wu Xia came down on Yue Yang’s shoulders and stood on the golden chair, but found that there was no cold eroding here.

“Junior Jun Yuan, see Senior.” Princess Qian Qian also sat on the other side of Yue Yang.

“Where’s little friend?” The silver-haired old man nodded his head very amiably, as if a kindly grandfather saw his granddaughter, this scene, no one could possibly imagine that perhaps in the near future, a fierce life and death duel would break out between the two sides. Just like the tranquility before the storm, the more harmonious it is now, the more brutal the later battle will be, afraid it will get worse.

“I, on the other hand, surnamed Yue named Titan, originally wanted to go up to the Heavenly Realm with a few friends to take a stroll and gain some insight, you know, compared to a big place like the Heavenly Realm, our Tong Tian Tower is like a small village in the countryside. We country bumpkins can’t enter the city for thousands of years, so we were especially anxious to come up here without any strength at all, making the two seniors laugh.” Yue Yang’s words were slightly suggestive.

“Little Friend is so young and already possesses such strength, I’m sure the elders who have trained little friend and the two young ladies must be amazing!” The silver-haired old man guessed deeper as Yue Yang wanted to hint at the outcome, but didn’t want to think that the Tong Tian Tower actually didn’t have too many cowboys at all.

At least right now, other than Zhi Zun and Night Empress, no one else can get their hands on it.

The snake-haired demon man suddenly thought of something and asked with a bit of shock, “Little friend Yue, from what you’ve said, is it possible that the Heavenly Realm’s rumored deceased Prison Emperor is still alive?

chapters.title: Chapter 806.1 - A Dream? The Law And The Truth
chapters.body:
Chapter 806.1 - A Dream? The Law And The Truth

Chapter 806.1 [A dream? The Law and the Truth]

To the snake-haired demon man and the silver-haired old man who guessed that the Prison Emperor was particularly there, Yue Yang smiled and did not reply.

His unmoving smile.

It’s more of a super persuasive psychological message.

The eyes of the snake-haired demon man and the silver-haired old man changed slightly, their faces both flashing for a moment with an expression of sudden enlightenment. With the strength of Yue Yang, Xue Wu Xia and Princess Qian Qian, it would be impossible for them to break through the completely shattered and sealed passageway to the Heavenly Realm and enter the Heavenly Realm through the heavily guarded and warned gates of the Central Hall Palace.

The three can enter the Heavenly Realm, mostly because there is a super strong Tower warrior leading with a treasure …… That person, ninety percent is the legendary Prison Emperor who has died in battle!

The Prison Emperor isn’t dead, so it looks like there’s chaos in the heavens again.

For the snake-haired demon man, it was none of his business, and for the silver-haired old man, it was even better to hope that the more chaos the better, the better to fight the collapse of the heavenly order.

“Master teacher, master disciple.” The silver-haired old man raised his wine glass, distantly towards the temple, paying a salute to show his attitude towards the Prison Emperor’s especially.

“And to thank our hosts for their hospitality and sumptuous dinner.” The snake-haired demon man also raised his wine glass.

“…… “Yue Yang, however, looked at the wine glass, and for a long time, there was no intention of lifting it up.

Xue Wu Xia and Princess Qian Qian, naturally, were watching Yue Yang.

The silver-haired old man was slightly startled, “Little friend, are you dissatisfied with this humble hospitality?”

The snake-haired demon man, however, laughed, cutting off the hot food with his platinum knife and fork, gorging himself on the deliciousness on his plate: “Perhaps well-bred and cautiously nuanced people will worry, but I don’t care about that at all, in front of the food and fire wine, my reserve and politeness, everything can be thrown to the wind. Look at this tender dragon liver, tsk tsk, I haven’t eaten it in a long time, and the fire wine of Titan’s blood, this thing, even if it’s a poison through the intestines, I’m syrupy.”

Yue Yang looked at the food on the table and at the wine in the cup.

Suddenly, a sigh of relief.

Even Princess Qian Qian was baffled by this sigh, what’s with the good sigh?

Even if we were to start a war later, we would eat our fill first, could someone like Yue Yang still have any guilt after turning the other cheek after eating something?

But Xue Wu Xia smiled and asked, “What’s wrong?”

Yue Yang shook his head: “I’m reminded of a movie, a movie called The Matrix ……”

What’s the movie about?

For Xue Wu Xia and Princess Qian Qian, there were many new terms in Yue Yang’s mouth that were baffling, they were already used to it, and if he didn’t tell them the origin, they wouldn’t ask too many questions. The silver-haired old man and the snake-haired demon man, however, were a little curious, what was the movie? Is it an image interwoven with lightning? Is it some kind of ancient sign?

“Can you tell us more about it, little friend?” The silver-haired old man had a good temper, and if one ignored the fact that his name was called ‘Earth Demon’, then it was believed that the vast majority of people were willing to view this old man as a wise scholar.

“The story goes like this, in a wonderful world, where all the humans were controlled by the intelligent machine puppet, they all slept in the body of the machine puppet, and all the energy emitted by the mind and will was collected by the machine puppet in a special way, and became the energy source of the machine puppet. In that dream, they would feel delicious when they ate, feel hard when they worked, feel comfortable when they slept, in short, no matter what they did, it was exactly the same as reality. An ethereal dream, a dream that provides energy for the machine puppet to operate …… “Yue Yang very vividly described it, when he said this, the silver-haired old man’s eyes began to shine, the original full smile, but also gradually became serious.

“Can’t anyone see the truth?” Xue Wu Xia asked.

“There are very few people who will ever know the truth, and they escape in the body of the machine puppet with the intention of waking more people up. However, when they think into the machine puppet’s body to try to awaken others and tell them that the world is a dream, everyone will not believe them and, instead, will think they are abnormal. An intelligent Machine Doll will also immediately get this information and will send out thought killers to hunt them down, and once they are killed, the body that escaped outside the Machine Doll will also die, unless the will is strong enough to completely ignore this mental death.” Yue Yang smiled and explained.

“These last strong men who tried to awaken the world, did they succeed?” Princess Qian Qian asked again.

“I didn’t see the end, I don’t know if the rescue was successful.” Yue Yang waved his hand, he denied it, but everyone suspected he knew the truth at the end.

“Do you think there’s a possibility that we all live in a dream similar to that world, where we feel beautiful spouts when we eat, hard at work, and restful when we sleep?” Xue Wu Xia asks the question again.

“I don’t know, I’m not a saviour.” Yue Yang couldn’t answer the question.

“How are you not the saviour and how do you know so many secrets?” The snake-haired demon man found he could no longer afford to eat the fragrant dragon’s liver, if he was really living in a dream woven by machine puppets, if the world is really a dream, then what he did, wouldn’t it be ……?

He’s kind of in a cold sweat.

The silver-haired old man suddenly clapped his hands lightly, “Wonderful, what a wonderful comment, seriously, I never tried to doubt that I was living in a dream that was scripted by someone else, little friend, how did you think that reality would be a dream scripted by someone else? A long, long time ago, I heard a legend that was so far out of reach that it was said that the entire Tong Tian Tower was one Divine Grimoire …… Of course, the heavenly realm is no exception, and no matter how much we jump, we can’t jump to a second Divine Grimoire.”

chapters.title: Chapter 806.2 - A Dream? The Law And The Truth
chapters.body:
Chapter 806.2 - A Dream? The Law And The Truth

Chapter 806.2 [A dream? The Law and the Truth]

The snake-haired devil had just forked up a piece of dragon liver and was hesitating whether to bring it into his mouth.

At first hearing, the body shook violently.

The fork in the hand, along with the dragon spiced liver, fell away.

Xue Wu Xia and Princess Qian Qian were also astonished, how could a world as huge as the Tong Tian Tower and the heavens be a Divine Grimoire?

Yue Yang didn’t feel too surprised, after all, crossing all of them, saying that the Tong Tian Tower was a Divine Grimoire, that wasn’t too strange. Whether or not it was the Divine Grimoire, the Heavenly Realm and the Tong Tian Tower are definitely different worlds, at higher levels, perhaps there are more huge and higher worlds, what is the nature of the composition of the Heavenly Realm and the Tong Tian Tower, Yue ** did not go to investigate, and besides, this is not his current strength can be investigated out.

“Gentlemen, here’s to us living in the Divine Grimoire.” The silver-haired old man took another drink and invited them to drink with aplomb and boldness.

“Yeah, although I don’t expect the pack with a Divine Grimoire in this life, it’s good to live in it, fuck.” The snake-haired demon man laughed, leaving behind the out-of-control turbulence in his thoughts, his eyes restored to his confidence and true self.

“…… “Yue Yang was still sitting, unmoving.

“?” This time, even the two, Xue Wu Xia and Princess Qian Qian, felt a bit strange, this kid was really a bit abnormal today!

“Yes. I would like to ask, first of all, regardless of whether we live in the Divine Grimoire or in a dream, is there a law that is the same as the Law of the Underworld in this Earth Demon Palace?” Yue Yang asked thus.

“The Laws of the Underworld?” The silver-haired old man wondered, finding that there were laws he didn’t know about.

“It is said that the god of the underworld, having taken a fancy to a God of beauty, took her captive in his palace. Heaven persuaded him, but the God of beauty never liked him and insisted on leaving. the mother of the goddess, who was responsible for the harvest of the earth, cried to the king of the gods, said that the God of the Underworld had taken her daughter and imprisoned his beloved. Because of the sadness of the God of Harvest, the flowers of the earth no longer bloomed, the grain could not grow, and everything withered…… The king of the gods saw this, and asked the God of the Underworld to return the daughter of the God of Harvest, and the God of the Underworld was compelled to comply, but he exploited a loophole, and when he told the good news to god of beauty, he gave her a table of delicious food …… couldn’t resist the temptation of the food, and thought that the god of the underworld really meant to release her, the God of Beauty happily ate the fruit sent up by the God of the Underworld. As a result, according to the laws of the underworld, although she can leave, but eat the things of the underworld, must remain in the underworld for a few months every year, the God of the Underworld although he can not always have that God of Beauty, but he has at least a few months every year to live with her ……”

When Yue Yang told the time of the story, the fire wine that the snake-haired demon man was holding immediately spilled out.

The other hand, reaching for the heavenly apple, retracted like a snake bite.

He swallowed nervously and looked at the silver-haired old man.

If, in this Earth Demon Palace, which also possesses the same laws of the underworld, you eat the food and have to leave it behind for at least a few months each year, you’re screwed.

The silver-haired old man suddenly quieted down after hearing this.

He flipped through the old book.

One held a monocle of glasses and looked at it carefully, as if trying to find a certain instance on it to corroborate Yue Yang’s statement.

It was a long, long time before he raised his eyes between the words in the ancient book and shook his head, “Little friend, I am unable to find records in this Celestial Classical that corroborate what you said about hacking** and the laws of the underworld, and presumably, this is not a historical record of the Tong Tian Tower either! Where did you learn this?”

“It doesn’t matter which one knows, what matters is whether or not it actually exists.” Yue Yang smiled slightly, his eyes shining with cunning and wise light.

“This ……” the silver-haired old man said affirmatively after a moment’s ‘chanting’, “Yes.”

“What?” The snake-haired demon man snapped, “Where is there such an instance? I thought there was no such record in the heavens?”

“It’s here at the Earth Demon Palace!” The silver-haired old man closed the ancient book and stood up, revealing a smile that terrified the snake-haired demon man: “In the Earth Demon Palace, everything is an illusion, and those who are confused by the illusion, especially those who have my Earth Demon’s blood in their bodies, will join me in endless torture of the laws and hearts. , you are not the only ……”

The snake-haired demon man who had just drunk the Titan’s Blood Fire Wine immediately let absolute zero cold ice all over his body, sealing it up.

Even Yue Yang, who hadn’t made any moves, as well as Xue Wu Xia and Princess Qian Qian, the cold air continued to gather, believing that it was only a matter of time before it would freeze over.

It was then that the snake-haired demon man realized that everything was gone.

The entire Earth Demon Palace, only an empty ice hole was left, the silver-haired old man of wise scholars was now hanging on nine ice chains, the electric mane created by the laws on his body, more powerful than the heavenly execution and heavenly punishment’s lightning, dazzled incessantly on his body, it was estimated that the Earth Demon was in pain and torture all the time. The most frightening thing for the snake-haired demon man was that there were dozens of ‘humanoid ice sculptures’ similar to himself around, apparently the same tricked ex-humans ……

Yue Yang took Xue Wu Xia and Princess Qian Qian and put them back on his shoulders.

Smile unchanged.

It was as if he did not see the cold eating away at his body at all, did not see the freezing seal going up his legs, but went to ask the silver-haired Earth Demon as a student would ask a mentor, “May I ask how we are still subject to the Earth Demon Palace when we have not been bewitched or eaten anything? Can you explain that to us?”

chapters.title: Chapter 807.1 - You’Re The Master Here!
chapters.body:
Chapter 807.1 - You’Re The Master Here!

Chapter 807.1 [You’re the master here!]

Source: http://quanben-xiaoshuo.com/n/zhaohuanwansui/816.html

“There is no need for you to know this, as soon as you become an ice sculpture, you will have an infinite amount of time to think about it, and I can assure you that not a single minute is wasted on sleep, twenty-four hours a day, every second of every day, you are awake.” The silver-haired old man hanging from the ice chains zinged with arcs of electricity, which put a puff of smoke on his skin.

However, the silver-haired old man had a look of enjoyment.

As if it wasn’t pain, but pleasure.

Yue Yang frowned and watched the frost that spread up from his legs. With his hands, he tried to hold Xue Wu Xia and Princess Qian Qian a little higher.

It wouldn’t save the girls from the ice, but it was his wish to be able to slow it down a little.

Xue Wu Xia jade fingers looked through the Book of Truth, intent on finding answers.

Princess Qian Qian, on the other hand, held the Prison Emperor’s divine Sword in her hand as if she was about to launch a thunderbolt at any moment. If she had a target, she would have attacked already, but the current enemy was a sealing power, a law left behind by her predecessor, so there was nothing she could do even if she was holding the divine sword.

“Damn it, this damn power, break it to me!” The snake-haired demon man struggled, and the frost on his body suddenly exploded, splattering debris on the ground.

The snake-haired devil man’s body was now emitting earth-destroying power, shaped like a demon god descending into the world.

He dissipated all the frost from his body one by one.

Another extremely fast transformation of an incomparably gorgeous sub-divine mirror, the ‘Mirror of Pain’, shone its light onto the silver-haired old man. As soon as the silver-haired old man let that Mirror of Pain shine, his body immediately burst into countless wounds and blood splattered on the spot, completely replacing the snake-haired demon man who had suffered the damage from the reversal of the law’s power. The blood, in time to splash to the ground, in mid-air, condensed into ice, and when it fell to the ground, it had already turned into an extremely powerful ice pick …… stabbed straight into the ground.

There were also some ice picks that, under the intentional guidance of the silver-haired old man, he shot radically at the snake-haired demon man.

Mirror of Pain, then turn.

The ice pick that was shot at him fell to the ground without any power, however, at the same spot on the silver-haired old man’s body, there were strange wounds similar to those that the ice pick pierced through, causing the silver-haired old man to wince in pain.

The snake-haired devil man conjured up another holy weapon, which resembled a flying shuttle or a flying disc.

Jump up and skid up into the sky.

Faster than lightning.

Shooting straight out of the main hall …… What surprised Yue Yang and Xue Wu Xia and the others was that the snake-haired demon man who seemed to be able to escape, instantly froze up, and even brought that flying disc with him, frozen in the sky, forming an ice sculpture suspended in the air.

Numerous frosts draped over the flying disc, and all parts of the snake-haired demon man were completely frozen except for one head.

No longer able to struggle, he fought and with the last of his strength and will, he shook the Mirror of Pain in his hand, the sub-divine weapon, off from the ice.

“Hahaha, it’s no use, no matter what you do, you’ll never be able to leave the Earth Demon Palace. The power sealed here has never been allowed to enter or leave, no one can make exceptions, not to mention that you drank the wine made with my blood, according to the law, you are my friend, you will have to suffer at least one tenth of my punishment, and this period is forever!” The old silver haired *** laughed more than a little.

“There’s still a way.” The frost filled throat of the snake-haired demon man, suddenly hissed in pain, “You three, if you don’t want to die, do as I say! Hurry up!”

“How?” Yue Yang asked.

“Pick up the Mirror of Pain and transfer all the ice seals on you to me, or to that old devil, you break him with the Excalibur, only if he dies, the seal will be lifted …… Excalibur can kill him, only the artifact can… … “The snake-haired demon man spat out a mouthful of blood, but it turned into a stream of ice blood, frost began to climb up his neck and spread to his head, the head full of snake hair, unified fearfully upside down to the sky, but their tails were fixed on the head, no matter how much they tried to escape, they could not escape.

“We can’t use your Mirror of Pain, yours is a sub-divine artifact, it’s too advanced.” Yue Yang stated a fact.

“No need for you, I’ll control it, just pick it up.” The snake-haired demon man could still use his mental power to control the Mirror of Pain, but he no longer had his hands, and his entire body turned into an ice sculpture under the power of the law.

“Does it really work?” The cautious Yue Yang also held a hint of hesitation.

“I don’t know, it’s better than doing nothing.” The snake-haired demon spat out painfully cold air, frost had begun to spread to his cheeks, “I don’t have much time, hurry, hurry!”

The silver-haired old man must be bad, so he hurriedly urged millions of frosts with his feet.

Blast away.

Dense as a star, fast as lightning.

His intention was firstly to speed up the freezing of Snake Hair Demon Man, the strongest opponent; and secondly, to obstruct Yue Yang from picking up the Mirror of Pain, he no longer wanted to try again with that pain replacing reflex just now. For the three, Yue Yang, Xue Wu Xia and Princess Qian Qian, although he valued them, he wouldn’t be as scrupulous as Snake Hair Devil Man, after all, Snake Hair Demon Man was a descendant of the real Four Families Dugu Clan, unlike Yue Yang, an impostor.

Princess Qian Qian wielded the Prison Emperor’s divine sword, slicing through the stormy frost attack with precision.

Yue Yang, supported by the absolutely icy cold negative power of Xue Wu Xia, struggled to move his frost-filled legs, walking step by step towards the Mirror of Pain.

Xue Wu Xia opened the Book of Truth, mental energy to also open the ancient book of the silver-haired old man for an invisible confrontation …… then Princess Qian Qian’s defense against the frost attack action. Her mental battle is more dangerous, the slightest carelessness to let the enemy successfully sneak attack, she will be lost in a state of mental collapse, and may even become an idiot under the impact of the enemy’s will energy.

“Come on, hurry up!” The snake-haired demon man’s face was starting to freeze, his mouth and nose could no longer exhale white air, and it probably wouldn’t take another minute for him to completely turn into an ice sculpture.

“Quiet.” Yue Yang was walking extremely hard, in fact, without the absolute cold power of Xue Wu Xia, he would not be able to temporarily break free from the frost power seal with his restrained fire energy alone, let alone take a leg forward. Step after step, footprint after footprint, Yue Yang was walking with extreme difficulty, as if each step took all his strength.

Robotic as he was, he moved at a heavy pace.

After a short distance of ten meters was a rift.

Princess Qian Qian protects herself with the Prison Emperor’s divine sword, while Xue Wu Xia secretly confronts Spirit Shock.

With great difficulty, he arrived before the hanging snake-haired demon man ice sculpture, but Yue Yang found that bending over was a problem. His movements were as slow and jerky as rusty machinery …… At this time, both the silver-haired old man and the snake-haired demon man were in a hurry.

One wants to fight to stop it, the other wants to pick up success.

Of course, because of the sealing power, none of them could directly interfere, everything could only be left to Yue Yang.

Yue Yang extended his right hand, little by little.

Reach for that mirror of pain.

chapters.title: Chapter 807.2 - You’Re The Master Here!
chapters.body:
Chapter 807.2 - You’Re The Master Here!

Chapter 807.2 [You’re the master here!]

It was so close to touching the mirror, so close.

“Hurry up, I can’t hold on much longer.” The snake-haired demon man tried his last mental strength to break through the ice covering on his face, while the silver-haired old man over there went crazy and sprayed frost this way, secretly forming a shockwave with his mental strength, intending to blow away the battle formation of Yue Yang, Xue Wu Xia and Princess Qian Qian as one.

“I’ll let you go, if you don’t touch it!” The silver-haired old man also made a condition.

“Don’t listen to him ……” the snake-haired demon man, on the other hand, urged Yue Yang to pick up the mirror of pain quickly and take the initiative of the battlefield, no matter what, picking up the mirror of pain was the most important move, it was the key to turn the whole battle around. The silver-haired old man was in a hurry, summoning a strange mechanical beast from the ancient book, rushing madly towards this side, its intention was simple, not to attack Yue Yang, but to knock the mirror of pain farther away so that he would not be able to pick it up.

A blind man could see that Yue Yang had reached his limit against the ice power.

If the mirror of pain was knocked far away, then even if it was ten meters, he wouldn’t have enough left over to go on another ‘ten meter expedition’.

Yue Yang’s slow and trembling right hand was competing with that mechanical beast for final speed.

Whoever is faster will then be the key to the whole battle!

The mechanical beast was fast, but Princess Qian Qian’s Prison Emperor’s divine Sword cut out a sword with unusual precision, splitting it in half, its upper body flying over, while the lower body stayed on the frosty ground. If it wasn’t for the fact that Princess Qian Qian’s hand holding the divine sword had frozen, then the mechanical beast would have been annihilated under the sword qi of the divine sword.

With this hindrance.

Yueyang’s hands are faster…

However, the moment his fingers touched the mirror of pain, Yue Yang suddenly paused. Then it effortlessly shrank back, and then slowly straightened up under the baffled gaze of the snake-haired demon man and the silver-haired old man.

“What are you doing?” The snake-haired demon man’s expression was simply about to faint.

“Not doing anything, remember the story I told you about the dream earlier? Remember what I said earlier about the laws of the underworld? It was all a test for me! I’d be a real fool if I picked up this mirror of pain or whatever it is!” Yue Yang ‘revealed’ a kind of smile that made his enemies crazy but helpless, he stood up straight and held the slender waist of Xue Wu Xia and Princess Qian Qian with both hands. The two women also tacitly put away the Book of Truth and the Prison Emperor’s Sword …… Spiritual shockwave, millions of frost attacks the body …… As if the three did not sense anything, the body defenselessly let millions of frost and spiritual shockwave blast, turning into a trinity Unique Ice Sculpture.

Then, the next moment, the whole frosty landscape shattered like glass.

It shattered into millions of pieces of varying sizes.

The ice castle remains, the ice chain remains.

Everything remains the same with the upside-down silver-haired old man and the frozen snake-haired demon man and so on, but there are three people who are completely different.

The trinity ice sculpture in front of the mirror of pain is gone, Yue Yang, Xue Wu Xia and Princess Qian Qian are even still sitting on the golden chairs, as if sitting here without leaving ……

“How is this possible!” The silver-haired old man’s face changed dramatically at the sight of it.

“Haha, of course not.” Yue Yang smiled pleasantly, just like when he met an old friend from another country and suddenly saw an old friend he had not seen for a long time in a strange place, his smile was particularly friendly. With his fingers, he gently tapped the armrest of the golden chair, on which the dull sound of metal also occurred: “How is it, is the illusion we created more real than the one you created? Before I went to the heavenly Realm, Empress Fei Wen Li once told me that I couldn’t trust anyone in the Heavenly Realm, friend or foe alike!”

“Fei Wen Li is alive?” The silver-haired old man and the snake-haired demon man were both slightly shaken by what they heard.

“We won’t discuss that issue. Let’s return to the issue of the current war situation, because of the suspicion that has arisen about anyone, so you, who call yourself a member of the four families, are no exception!” Yue Yang pointed at the snake-haired demon man and smiled as he explained.

“I’m your ally now, and by joining forces, we can only fight against the Earth Demon!” The snake-haired demon man yelled in a rage.

“Yes, I do, I have been trying to find a way to fight against you, because you are the true Earth Demon.” Yue Yang made eye contact with Xue Wu Xia and Princess Qian Qian, and finally came to this answer with great certainty.

“What did you say? Are you crazy?” The snake-haired demon man was furious.

“Saying that you’re an Earth Demon, actually, I have proof.” Yue Yang pointed at the silver-haired old man who was hanging upside down from the nine ice chains all the time, suffering the punishment of the Laws, “He is not the real Earth Demon, but your Life Guardian War Beast, right! You used your natural ability to use your Life Guarding warbeast to take the punishment of the law in your stead, your own true body, but you escaped that punishment, or you may have needed to suffer just as much, but at least you didn’t have to hang on to nine ice chains, at least you regained some of the power of the ability …… seal, you couldn’t fight it and you couldn’t leave , your biggest area of activity is the Earth Demon Palace, that’s why you appeared behind us so coincidentally.” Yue Yang smiled confidently, as bright as the sun, “Let me tell you a secret, to be able to hide the truth from my eyes and her book of truth, at least you have to be a god, not even the legendary closest to a god, the Great Palace Master Ji Wu Ri, you are not a god, you can always hide from my eyes, this can only prove a fact, you.are.the.master.of.this.place! ”

Listening to Yue Yang’s last word of judgment, the snake-haired demon man’s face changed.

The eyes instantly became sharp as blades.

Killing energy, sky-high!

It was only after a long time that the snake-haired demon man moved away from his deadly stare at Yue Yang and looked at the Book of Truth in Xue Wu Xia’ hands again.

Xue Wu Xia flipped through the Book of Truth as if nothing had happened, completely oblivious to the other party’s gaze, as if the snake-haired demon man opposite her was blind. The snake-haired devil man then looked at the Prison Emperor’s Divine Sword behind Princess Qian Qian’s back, and finally nodded heavily: “I was blinded, it’s really unexpected that children nowadays are so smart! Careless, my Honour was a bit careless, I originally thought you guys were young, who didn’t know that …… could possess the Book of Truth of the sub-godly artifacts, and could possess the Prison Emperor’s Sword, you naturally wouldn’t be simple characters! However, what makes me most curious is, what are you, a young boy who can make two female companions with sub-divine artifacts and divine weapons completely obey orders? It can’t be as simple as just making some illusions, can it?”

“Soon, you will know all about my skills! If you think that we don’t have the slightest ability to dare to break into the Earth Demon Palace to challenge you, the Earth Demon, then you are even more mistaken.” Yue Yang smiled again, and this time, instead of giving the snake-haired demon man a sunny feeling, his smile was a bit inexplicably chilly, penetrating straight to the bottom of his heart, as if it was the smile of a death god!

chapters.title: Chapter 808.1 - The Beginning Of Grief
chapters.body:
Chapter 808.1 - The Beginning Of Grief

Chapter 808.1 [ The Beginning of Grief ]

“Is that so?” The snake-haired demon man was dumbfounded at first, but soon, he reacted and mocked with cold pride, “Then let me see it.”

“War!” Yue Yang raised his hands slightly, Xue Wu Xua and Princess Qian Qian immediately jumped up, her slender feet suspended in his palm.

“Wait a minute, can I satisfy my old man’s curiosity before we go to war? May I ask, in what way did you break to see that I am the Life Guarding Warbeast and not the true Earth Demon?” The silver-haired old man suddenly conjured up a pen and paper, as if he wanted to write down the answer, though he might not be able to use it later, but at least he knew where the flaw was.

“It’s actually very simple …… because of the natural ability. If you are the true Earth Demon, then he is the Life Guardian War Beast, and if he is the Life Guardian War Beast, then it is impossible to deceive us with the Dispatch Talent that reduces damage through various means, which is the biggest flaw. Especially in the later stages, after we tested it with dreams and the laws of the underworld, you still created a bitter trick, and the combination of the dispatch talent and the mirror of pain caused us to suspect it. In addition to this biggest flaw, there’s also the fact that if you were a Standing Earth Demon, and you let the laws seal to allow the ice chains to suspend you, there’s no way to leave us behind with just the power of life guarding war beasts, because you know that there are certain laws that can exclude war beasts from participating in war, such as this Earth Demon Shrine. The Earth Demon Palace here is forbidden to war beasts, and even if they could appear, they would have no combat power, so if you didn’t know this secret, how could you be so arrogant as to say that you can definitely leave us behind!” Yue Yang’s words caused the silver-haired old man and the snake-haired devil man’s faces to change dramatically.

“Just now, we hadn’t summoned a war beast in order to force you guys to do something. In order to allay our concerns, you summoned a mechanical war beast to come out and attack, in fact, as soon as it came out, we determined the judgment in our hearts, and it turns out that the laws of this Earth Demon Palace really forbid war beasts from attacking.” Xue Wu Xia opened the Book of Truth and moved with incomparable grace, her voice said flatly, “My Book of Truth is one with my life-guarding war beast, and also connected to my mind, if this mind as one encounters isolation, I can only judge that it is a seal of the law.”

“No wonder, you guys figured out our plan early on.” The silver-haired old man sighed long and hard.

“The four major families Dugu Clan Chang Feng, entering the Demon Palace, and drinking the fire wine in public, as disciples of the four families, can not be so careless.” Princess Qian Qian also said that there are many flaws.

“In the future, we will be sure to pay attention to that detail.” The silver-haired old man finished recording, raised his gaze again, and finally inquired, “Do you have any last words?”

“Mark down this sentence.” Yue Yang sneered, “This is the ninety-ninth time I heard the query.”

“And for the last time.” The silver-haired old man put away his pen and paper with great certainty.

The snake-haired demon man, the true ‘Earth Demon’.

He broke free easily from the frost seal.

With his talent and the treasured mirror of pain, he could always transform the power of the seal onto the silver-haired old man who was also his life-guarding war beast. Although it was impossible for him to actually leave the Earth Demon Palace and be completely free of the seal of the Law, it was easy for him to bring out his full strength to fight.

With a move of the hand, the mirror of pain returned to the right hand of the Earth Demon.

The Earth Demon turned around and put on a ‘Demon Armor’ that was also at the level of a sub-divine artifact, the very best of sub-divine artifacts, just shy of being able to reach a divine artifact.

Of course, this gap would be an eternal gap. It was impossible for a sub-divine artifact to be comparable to a divine artifact, no matter how superb it was, just as no matter how strong a holy beast was, it could not be comparable to a divine beast.

Originating from the Demon Armor bestowed by the supreme being, although it wasn’t a divine weapon, it was already an existence that all heavenly stage powerhouses couldn’t break through the defenses of.

Unless one possesses an artifact, a supreme will, or uses the power of law.

Otherwise, this Demon Armor would be an indestructible treasure.

No matter the helmet, shoulder pads, armor, belt, arms, shin guards and boots, the entire set of demon armor emitted a glow that was only inferior to that of a divine artifact, if it was not in the Earth Demon Palace where all power was sealed, in exchange for outside, when the Demon Armor appeared, the energy shock wave could completely shake the earth and turn night into day. Even though Yue Yang was prepared, he still let the energy shock wave emitted by the demon armor force him to retreat three steps. Without a single move, just the energy diffusion of the armor had already reached this kind of power, if a real battle were to take place, how could it still be fought?

The snake-haired earth demon summoned a magnificent holy book and levitated in front of himself.

Holding the mirror of pain in his right hand, and brushed lightly over the sacred text.

While turning a page, a huge and peerless ‘Demon Axe’ was drawn out.

The Demon Axe, also a sub-divine artifact, but not given by the Opening Sky Demon, was only the Earth Demon’s own famous weapon, comparable in quality to the mirror of pain, and slightly inferior to the super-premium Demon Armor.

The terrifying giant axe that weighed nearly ten thousand pounds was as effortlessly heavy as a water plant in the hands of the Earth Demon.

Light strokes.

A deep and indelible crack was immediately cut between the snake-haired Earth Demon and Yue Yang. The Earth Demon, pointing at the crack with his axe instead of his hand, said confidently “This place will be your burial place. You will never be able to escape, or even cross the border, because the moment you move, the next moment, your bodies will be separated.”

“What’s the point of him saying that?” Yue Yang went to ask Xue Wu Xia.

“It’s useless, but he’s delaying time, because we don’t have his natural ability, and as soon as we use our own power, we’ll have the sealing law see us as a hostile target and sealed together in this Earth Demon Palace.” Without looking up, Xue Wu Xia flipped through the Book of Truth and answered casually.

“If we don’t resist, then that cunning silver-haired old man will take the opportunity to secretly cast Frostbite on us.” Princess Qian Qian snorted in anger.

Indeed, the silver-haired old man had been sealed, and his use of the force to attack would at best be more of a punishment.

But if Yue Yang didn’t resist, he would die a horrible death.

There was the snake-haired earth demon with an axe in front of him, and his humanoid life guardian warbeast, the silver-haired old man, using frost to darken the ice in the back.

chapters.title: Chapter 808.2 - The Beginning Of Grief
chapters.body:
Chapter 808.2 - The Beginning Of Grief

Chapter 808.2 [ The Beginning of Grief ]

Yue Yang felt that it was indeed a bit tricky, the enemy was very cunning, using the laws and sealing power of this Earth Demon Palace, no matter if they did or didn’t do something, they would be dead. Could it be that none of the oxen who broke into the Earth Demon Palace to challenge, had walked out alive. Yue Yang suspected that among that group of unlucky ice sculptors, there was Dugu Changfeng from the four great families of the Heaven Realm, otherwise, how would the Earth Demon dare to pose as a stranger, and the Earth Demon didn’t have information about Dugu Changfeng, how would he know the life and death of the Prison Emperor and Fei Wenli who didn’t come to challenge him?

With a swing of the snake-haired Earth Demon, the black light of the Earth Demon Axe was great, transforming into millions of black blades that shot towards Yue Yang.

However, the most deadly blow came from behind Yue Yang.

The silver-haired old man, that ancient book, jumped out as a phantom shaped like an evil ghost, claws and teeth, tearing towards Yue Yang’s back, intending to gouge out Yue Yang’s heart with one claw.

The remnants of Yue Yang disappeared.

He appeared in front of the Earth Demon, snatched the Demon Axe at the moment it cut his head, swam past all the black blades like a fish swimming in water, snatched the dead corner in front of his enemy with unparalleled skill, and struck the Earth Demon’s jaw with a punch from the sky. In the sky, Princess Qian Qian jumped up and struck down with the Prison Emperor’s divine sword in her hand. Xue Wu Xia landed behind her, with her left hand thundering and her right hand frosty, and struck the right and left ears of the Earth Demon.

Boom!

The three were subjected to a counter-shock force and retreated sharply.

When Yue Yang, Xue Wu Xia and Princess Qian Qian regained the best battle stance of the trinity, they were surprised to find that the heavily attacked Earth Demon was not damaged at all. Apart from the Prison Emperor’s divine sword, which slashed at the shoulder armor of the Demon Armor, leaving a shallow mark to prove the fact that the attack had been made, the rest, like Yue Yang and Xue Wu Xia’s combined attack, was completely ineffective.

“Although you have a divine sword, you are too young to be able to use the power of a divine weapon.” The Earth Demon shook his head, “You guys are really too weak, the weakest group among the dozens of temple breakers. Alright, no more games, let’s send you on your way!”

The mirror of pain in his right hand.

Slightly sideways, the light refracted towards Yue Yang’s side.

An image, like the Prison Emperor’s Divine Sword in Princess Qian Qian’s hand, slashed straight at Yue Yang’s shoulder, with the exact same power as what Princess Qian Qian had just attacked.

Yue Yang did not have time to dodge, behind him, there was another image that flashed, shaped like Xue Wu Xia, the frost and thunder of her hands, blasting at Yue Yang’s ears. In front of him, Yue Yang saw a self, rushing into the dead corner in front of him, a punch to the sky, blasting at his chin.

Completely ineffective despite making maximum dodges.

All three attacks hit.

Yue Yang’s shoulder was splattered with blood, and his entire body was thrown far away like a broken kite…..

The mirror of pain, and the Earth Demon’s gift of dispatch, the perfect combination of the two, can return the vast majority of the power of the attack itself ‘as it was’, and is unavoidable and certain to hit.

Xue Wu Xia and Princess Qian Qian rushed towards the Earth Demon, wanting to kill this guy to avenge Yue Yang, who wouldn’t want to, the Earth Demon took his head off and assumed a defenseless stance: “Do you want to cut off my head? It’s okay, cut off my head with Excalibur! My head was cut off and can be reconnected, I’m a demon, I wonder if you humans have this feature? Hahahaha, O foolish humans, let me tell you a secret, we demons are an immortal race, that even if you cut me to pieces, I can easily recover …… Even the power of law cannot easily annihilate us demons, otherwise, why just seal us instead of destroying us completely? The Earth Demon Palace’s challenge, you are thinking naively, this is a battle that is destined to be unwinnable, if it wasn’t for the sake of amusing myself for an infinite amount of time, I wouldn’t even need to talk, I could just instantly kill you!”

He let go of the Demon Axe and held out his left hand, raised.

Terrifying and irresistible energy shockwaves spewed out in his palm.

Xue Wu Xia and Princess Qian Qian were like driftwood in a torrent, instantly being impacted without a trace …… The two women seemed to let the energy annihilate, the Prison Emperor’s Divine Sword fell in mid-air and was vertically ‘stuck’ in the ice. Then, two loud popping sounds were heard, and two dull bronze treasures fell to the ground in the void, seemingly the relics of the two women.

“Is that how you die? It’s too weak, I would have liked to play a little more.” The Earth Demon shook his head, “It was quite a smart little kid, and I thought it would be a bit of a surprise.”

“I can’t be sure they’re dead, but I can’t kind of see the images of their last death, even though their breath is gone.”

The silver-haired old man, however, suspects that Xue Wu Xia and Princess Qian Qian are not dead.

Upon hearing this, the Earth Demon stretched out his hand and his index finger stirred out a black light, pointing at Yue Yang who was falling in a pool of blood. First, a blood hole shot out in Yue Yang’s heart, then he stretched out his hand, and Yue Yang’s blood that was covered in blood immediately turned into a frost blade and broke out of his body. In less than ten seconds, Yue Yang who let the ice blade penetrate his body, let the frost cover it again, turning it into an ice sculpture that was no different from the surrounding ice sculptures.

Seeing that Yue Yang had been killed on the spot like this, both girls remained motionless, and the silver-haired old man could only believe that they had died in battle before him.

He flipped through the ancient book and recorded: on a certain day of the month, and year in the Heavenly Realms near Yuan Era, three descendants of the Tong Tian Tower entered the palace to challenge…..

The Earth Demon over there, however, had a hint of loneliness in his eyes, “How long will it take, exactly, to get out?”

“The day His Majesty the Heavenly Demon regains his freedom will be the day of your master’s liberation.” The silver-haired old man smiled as he recorded the battle, “Those three little children just now were really good, but unfortunately they were too young, almost still in infant form. If they hadn’t run in here earlier, if it were a few hundred years later, when they had fully grown up, then the fight would have been even more exciting! It’s a pity the apple was not ripe before we screwed it up!”

“Forget it, there are plenty of geniuses like this in the Tong Tian Tower and the Heavenly Realm, and a large number of them are born every now and then. We don’t know how many geniuses like this we’ve killed!” The Earth Demon had begun to forget Yue Yang, the dead, for him, there was no need to remember anything.

“Really, I thought you guys were more or less accomplished by killing me, who knows that you didn’t even stand over my corpse to brag.” Images flickered in mid-air, Yue Yang fell down with a disappointed face, his hands slightly raised, Xue Wu Xia who was holding the Book of Truth and Princess Qian Qian who was holding the Prison Emperor’s Divine Sword in her hands wonderfully floated down his left and right palms, like a first descending fairy in the nine heavens.

On the ground, the two bronze treasures and the Prison Emperor’s Divine Sword, as well as the ice sculpture that appeared to be Yue Yang’s corpse, disappeared without a trace.

Yue Yang smiled brightly, “I thought you guys would be pleasantly surprised, how about it, is the illusion I created more realistic than you guys? I was going to let you have your way for a little while longer, but seeing your smug, hypocritical actions, I had to surprise you even more …… I think there is definitely one thing in this world that you cannot refract with your natural abilities and the mirror of pain.”

The snake-haired earth devil was in complete disbelief: “Very well, what is it?”

Except for the power of the law and the mind.

What else in the world can’t be refracted?

A special trace of flame emerged at the bottom of Yue Yang’s feet, and when it appeared, the frost all over his body quickly faded away like a mouse seeing a cat, completely escaping Yue Yang’s body. The trace of flame, however, burned larger and larger, and finally formed a fire armor that perfectly and incomparably covered Yue Yang’s body.

“The Nirvana Fire? The ability to dictate the fire of Nirvana.

“This is just the beginning, the beginning of grief!” Yue Yang smiled even more mysteriously as he summoned the treasures ……

**********

chapters.title: Chapter 809.1 - What’S True And What’S Fake
chapters.body:
Chapter 809.1 - What’S True And What’S Fake

Chapter 809.1 [ What’s True and What’s Fake ]

After trying again and again, Yue Yang already had an understanding of the laws of the Earth Demon Palace.

Here, it wasn’t completely impossible to summon a war beast, it was just that it couldn’t be summoned and used in battle, otherwise, it would itself be punished by the laws. This should have been a restriction made by the predecessor who sealed the Earth Demon to prevent it from escaping. Without the combat power provided by the war beasts, it would be impossible for an Earth Demon to escape from this Earth Demon Palace.

In addition to not being able to make use of war beasts, the Earth Demon Palace could not gather power to attack at will.

Once the power is gathered to attack, it is extremely easy to trigger the sealing power.

The Earth Demon didn’t dare to make an attack, and all of the law penalties that resulted from his attack were transferred to the silver-haired old man, a humanoid life guardian war beast, through the dispatch talent and the mirror of pain, which itself didn’t dare to accumulate sealing power.

The Earth Demon Beast had thought that it could count on Yue Yang through the laws of the Earth Demon Palace.

Who didn’t want to let Yue Yang see through it on the spot.

What surprised him the most was the appearance of the Nirvana Fire.

“Kill.” The silver-haired old man hanging on the nine ice chains struggled and forcefully dragged the ice chains downwards, his feet on the ground. A terrifying and unparalleled frost power was transmitted at his feet, deep into the ground and straight to Yue Yang’s feet. Even with the Nirvana Fire protecting his body, Yue Yang’s feet were immediately frozen, the power of fire and ice clashing and competing. Although the eternal Nirvana fire was invincible, the silver-haired old man he exerted frost energy, was still able to grab the upper hand for a few seconds for the time being.

“Go to hell!” The Earth Demon didn’t give Yue Yang the possibility of summoning a treasured book, regardless of whether it was useful to summon a war beast or not.

A hundred times faster than lightning.

The Earth Demon’s magic axe slashed down on his head.

Yue Yang clasped his hands together and precisely took the blade of the magic axe and caught it on the top of his forehead.

Princess Qian Qian’s Prison Emperor Divine Sword, slashed but to no avail, as with her power, she was only able to make a shallow mark on the superbDemon Armor, unable to harm the Earth Demon at all. Xue Wu Xia attack, which caused the mirror of pain to refract, was equally futile.

While Yue Yang’s feet were frozen, the Earth Demon took advantage of the fact that his hands were joined by the Demon Axe and lifted his foot to kick Yue Yang’s chest.

Like a thunder hammer’s kick, Yue Yang’s small body simply couldn’t carry it.

His waist, bent backwards.

Curved like an archway.

Yue Yang, who was still holding the Demon Axe in both hands, dodged the huge kick from the Earth Demon. With his arms, chest and abdomen between his legs, he twisted and turned, flipping the entire Earth Demon over. The moment he landed on the ground, the Earth Demon supported with his right hand, which held the mirror of pain, and lent his strength to a roundhouse kick. The leg was like a curved hook, hanging upside down towards Yue Yang’s already twisted body.

The battle situation seemed inescapable, but Yue Yang’s body suddenly reversed and spun from the twisting direction.

Just in time to avoid a spinning back kick from Earth Devil.

Both time and distance were taken with unparalleled precision, not missing a beat.

The Earth Demon kicked in the air and flipped his body to stand upright, while the Nirvana Fire on Yue Yang’s body had completely melted the silver-haired old man’s frost power, and Yue Yang, who had regained his freedom, brought Xue Wu Xia and Princess Qian Qian with him, backed away once again, maintaining his fighting posture as a trinity.

A distinct footprint depression appeared on his chest, and an identical footprint appeared on the ice wall dozens of meters away behind him.

A mere penetrating energy blast.

That’s what caused this horror.

It would be unimaginable if a full force strike from the Earth Demon were to really hit.

A strand of blood slowly seeped out from the corner of Yue Yang’s lips, even if it didn’t hit all of them, but the one who had the Earth Demon kicked him, his internal organs suffered a considerable amount of trauma. Fortunately, Yue Yang’s combat experience and fighting skills were far better than his peers, and withXue Wu Xia and Princess Qian Qian by his side to help hold him back, if it was another person, he would probably have been instantly killed by the Earth Demon.

“You won’t be so lucky if you come again.” The Earth Demon didn’t believe that another wave of attacks would be enough for this kid to dodge.

“Cut, don’t think you can be trollish just because you’ve lived tens of thousands of years!” Yue Yang lightly wiped the blood from the corner of his lips, just now he was the last test, and it turned out that what he guessed was the same as what the Celestial Vision saw, this Earth Demon Palace, there was a law loophole.

The Earth Demon had found the loophole, and he had found it now.

Yue Yang’s treasure trove of glorious work.

He didn’t summon a war beast, however, the ‘world’ that came with the treasury itself was always there, no summoning was needed, even the space where summoning was forbidden couldn’t prevent it from appearing in the chaotic state. Once the world was out, it added gain to Yue Yang, the master, not to mention, for the surrounding space, that even if this was the Earth Demon Palace, it was also like a black hole absorbing energy to grow …… unstoppable, as Yue Yang guessed, it was some kind of special war beast that existed apart from the general laws.

If he failed to judge just now, Yue Yang would be punished by the laws of the Earth Demon Palace.

However, all his previous probes and the existence of the Nirvana Fire made him certain of one thing.

chapters.title: Chapter 809.2 - What'S True And What'S Fake
chapters.body:
Chapter 809.2 - What'S True And What'S Fake

Chapter 809.2 – What’s True and What’s Fake

Chapter 809.2 [ What’s True and What’s Fake ]

There are higher beings above the ordinary laws, just as there are higher beings above the ordinary gods.

The fire of Nirvana, the world these, whatever that is.

There was even the Prison Emperor’s Divine Sword in Princess Qian Qian’s hands, the sub-divine artifact in the hands of the Earth Demon and the Book of Truth in the hands of Xue Wu Xia, all of which provided strong support to Yue Yang’s judgement.

“As long as you do not attack, in a state of counterattack or defense, you will not be punished by the Law.” As Xue Wu Xia turned a page in the Book of Truth, she had obtained an answer within the entire truth. This was the same as what Yue Yang’s celestial vision had observed and judged in her heart. With this affirmative answer, only then could Yue Yang feel at ease to strut his stuff without having to worry about the Earth Demon Palace’s law punishment.

“The white tiger inside me has always existed, too.” Princess Qian Qian also gave an affirmative answer.

“Since that’s the case, we’ll have to start our counterattack.” Yue Yang stretched his hands, the two women hung in the air, a little bit of starlight, radiating out around Yue Yang’s body, radiant, like the milky way.

“Hmph, It’s just a small trick.” Earth Demon was tight in his heart, he just appeared to be fine, but his legs actually made the nirvana fire burn extremely painfully. If he wasn’t protected by the Demon Armor, who was naturally restrained by the fire attribute, he would have died a miserable death under the burning of the nirvana fire. Of course, Yue Yang’s quasi Heavenly Tier strength was his greatest belief in victory, it didn’t matter how powerful or perverted he was, after all a Quasi Heavenly Tier, not even an Innate Supreme, there was absolutely no way he could win this battle.

The Earth Demon was up again, swinging his axe wildly.

In mid-air, suddenly abandoning his axe, the Earth Demon Axe cut down as if it were alive, while his own left hand reached forward, releasing a devastating shockwave of energy.

The silver-haired old man was no longer able to help at this point, and the action of rigidly dragging the ice chain just now was immediately punished a hundredfold by the law. The thunder pillar blasted down from the top of the castle and struck him. However, before suffering the punishment, the silver-haired old man still opened his ancient book and formed an energy shield with the Earth Demon’s domain, enveloping Yue Yang, Xue Wu Xia and the other three, so that the three could not escape from the energy shockwave.

Boom!

Originally thinking that he would be able to hit Yue Yang again, he discovered that the moment he hit his opponent, there was himself in front of Yue Yang, doing the same action.

The same magic axe, the same blast of energy……

The Earth Demon was blown away on the spot.

Even though he was protected by the superb Heavenly Demon Armor and his body was unharmed, he still shouted in surprise, “Impossible, this is not an illusion!”

The dotted stars around Yue Yang’s body wove countless wonderful and endless patterns, the most obvious being the twelve constellations commonly seen in the sky. For some reason, the twelve constellations presented were very similar to the legendary white sheep, golden bull, gemini, etc., as if the historical legends were true.

A white sheep, walking down the sky in the constellation of Aries.

With every step it took, the stars of the entire space would shine one point brighter and double in power.

In a few short steps the power of the twelve zodiac was increased many times over; and after it, there was a golden bull, which, unlike the tame and graceful white sheep, looked like a bull about to fight to the death, with red eyes and a nose of fire smoke and flames, and followed furiously, bowing its head from time to time, as if to pick over the white sheep in front of it with its horns.

With every step the Golden Bull took, the Earth Demon felt the gravitational force increase by one point.

Its body had an unexplainable gravitational force, as if it wanted to suck the entire Earth Demon over.

“These, seemingly illusions and not illusions, what kind of domain power is this, even if the consciousness is embodied, it can’t be so real, who the hell are you?” The Earth Demon reached out, wanting to release an energy shockwave to destroy the white sheep and golden bull in front of him, suddenly, seeing a shadow, slowly coming out in the darkness, this shadow seemed to come out in the dark endless world, walking for a long time in the Earth Demon’s gaze, suddenly, the Earth Demon realized a strange sign again, his energy shockwave hadn’t even fully coalesced, so the shadow appeared It’s actually less than a second ago.

“Which one of us is the shadow?” The shadow walked up to the Earth Demon, and the Earth Demon realized that the shadow was just like his twin brother, exactly like him, more so than his own reflection in the mirror.

“You can still talk?” The Earth Demon could not have imagined that this shadow with the same strength as himself could speak, this mirage was too real, right?

“The gate of life and death!” The silver-haired old man reminded the Earth Devil that this was the dead door in the Tong Tian Tower of life and death, the unreal reality.

“How many special abilities do you have, anyway?” The Earth Demon was shocked, his heart immediately pressed steady, but then looked at Yue Yang and condensed the Black Gui Zhang and Bai Yu Hua, couldn’t help but yell out in a frenzy, “You’ve gone too far, a mere Quasi Heavenly Stage, where did you get so many abnormal special abilities? If this isn’t an illusion, how come your sword energy isn’t limited by the laws and sealing powers? Substantial sword qi, what kind of sword qi do you have?”

“Do I have to tell you even though I practiced Buddha’s Palm?” Yue Yang’s tone was as low-key as Star Chow’s.

Does the law restrict Yue Yang’s innate body breaking invisible sword energy?

Talents, domains, treasures and war beasts were all completely unrestrictive to innate sword qi, it was an existence that transcended all that, Yue Yang already knew that, but he didn’t dare to guarantee that it would be restricted under the laws. Now, secretly coalescing, it was found that at least the laws here at the Earth Demon Palace were completely ignoring the existence of the innate sword qi.

Yue Yang was naturally energetic as he saw that his killer weapon was still useful.

Just as the Earth Demon was secretly chilling at Black Gui Zang and Bai Yu Hua, he suddenly saw Yue Yang’s ten fingers rotate again, as if to draw a thin thread.

The body is surprised to feel as if there is some kind of bondage, a small law force?

And this kid knows how to exert a little law power?

The Earth Devil screamed in alarm.

He tried to flee, but found his body bound at the moment, with no possibility of moving at all.

He watched as Yue Yang floated in with the two suspended women, two deadly substantial swords, piercing through his heart, and the shadow of death struck his heart for the first time in tens of thousands of years, and cried out in fear, “Impossible, you’re hallucinating, the illusory reality of the gate of life and death!”

“Senior, your grief before you die could be a little more poignant!” The Yue Yang student replied thus.

chapters.title: Chapter 810.1 - Sprint, The State Of Supremacy
chapters.body:
Chapter 810.1 - Sprint, The State Of Supremacy

Chapter 810.1 [ Sprint, The State of Supremacy ]

Yue Yang did not attack the Earth Demon with Black Gui Zang and Bai Yu Hua, instead, he reversed his direction and shot two sword nails at the silver-haired old man’s heart and eyebrows.

The silver-haired old man never dreamed that Yue Yang was really attacking him, and his body shook slightly.

It then trembled in pain from the killing of the two swords.

He was a humanoid life guarding war beast and would not truly die, however, if he himself was severely hit or was suffering from the Law’s punishment, it would be impossible for the Earth Demon to use the mirror of pain and dispatch talent to transfer the damage to him. Yue Yang had noticed and seen through this, and before attacking the Earth Demon, he used Black Gui Zang and Bai Yu Hua to nail the silver-haired old man before anyone else ……

The Earth Demon moved extremely slowly, forcing his body to move in his bonds, trying to escape from Yue Yang’s second wave of attack.

He didn’t know what other attacks the kid had, but he knew it would never be easy.

“Snap!”

Yue Yang brushed off the helmet of the Earth Demon with a palm.

This clever sweeping power, with no offensive power to speak of, does not cause the Demon Armor to resist, and it mysteriously deceives the Demon Armor’s own psychic sense, as if the Earth Demon himself had taken off his helmet.

Princess Qian Qian slashed at the head of the Earth Demon with her sword.

The divine sword cut a bloody gash in the head of the Earth Demon, the sword qi penetrating the body and cutting a deep crack in the ground.

A small mechanical beast appeared underneath the feet of the Earth Demon, and the Mirror of Pain in the Earth Demon’s hand was slightly turned to the side, and the damage was transferred to the body of the small mechanical beast, which immediately turned into pieces. It was only after diverting the damage that Earth Demon regained his freedom, and it was only when he dodged the second strike from Xue Wu Xia that he realized that behind him, there was an additional snake demon, little Luo Li at some point.

“Not only is it a natural ability, but also a domain, a supreme realm idea that can lock onto a target and divert damage.” Xue Wu Xia had already made a more detailed observation of the Earth Demon’s abilities.

“There’s the weakness!” Yue Yang was responsible for gaining insight into the opponent’s weaknesses in battle.

When Princess Qian Qian spun the divine Sword and cut into the neck of the Earth Demon again, a second small mechanical beast appeared, but it allowed Yue Yang to grab a foot ahead and crush it.

The Earth Demon sneered, and a small mechanical beast appeared behind him, taking the Divine Sword’s attack on his behalf.

He swung his giant axe to force Princess Qian Qian to fly away, and then picked up the axe abstruse and struck at little Wen Li.

Little Wen Li’s eyes widened in anger.

The binding talent erupted violently, and the axe-wielding Earth Demon kept his swinging motion, stalled, and even the swinging axe abstruse, also fixed in mid-air. The power of the beast’s will, at this moment, surpassed the combination of talent, treasure, domain, and idea of the Earth Demon. Yue Yang and little Wen Li cooperate tacitly, the stars beneath their feet, at some point, have coalesced into the wheel of eternity…. Little Wen Li lifted the binding talent, leapt up, and picked both blades to cut on the blade of the Earth Demon’s Axe, the Earth Demon Axe trembled for a while, and under little Wen Li’s clever rotation, strangely detached from the Earth Demon’s palm and threw it into the air.

In the sky, Princess Qian Qian, who had gathered the power of the Green Dragon, was waiting for her turn.

Xue Wu Xia was ten times faster than the earlier attack, and fell down from the roof of the palace, and her hands came down from above, and thunder and frost struck left and right in the ears of the Earth Demon.

Yue Yang pressed one hand on the face of the Demon Earth, and the fire of Nirvana, like the spray of a volcano, penetrated the mouth and nose of the Earth Demon.

“Send you on your way!” With maximum power, Princess Qian Qian swung the Prison Emperor King’s divine sword and cut off the head of the Earth Demon with a single blow. Yue Yang, who had just dodged the divine sword, chased after her with a tiger shot and kicked the head of the Earth Demon out of the Demon Temple.

“…… “The silver-haired old man who was suffering from the black Gui Zhang and Bai Yu Hua looked at all this with incomprehension.
