It would be impossible to kill him by cutting off the head of Earth Demon.

What’s the point?

Moreover, even if they kicked and flew outside of the main palace, because of the seal of the law, the Earth Demon could not break away from the power of the law and would automatically bounce back into the Palace, not affected by space and distance at all.

Neither the damage to the life guarding war beast with the sword qi nor the severing of the head of the Earth Demon is fatal.

Why do Yue Yang and the two women still insist on doing this?

The silver-haired old man couldn’t figure it out at all.

The human head that flew to the ground outside had a pained expression. This was not only the result of the damage caused by the Prison Emperor’s Sword in Princess Qian Qian’s hand, but also the punishment of the Law. For every meter away from the Earth Demon Palace, the punishment of the law would double, and when it reached its limit, it would burst into pieces. The head of the Earth Demon spews out a blast of energy that hits the ground and bounces back to the main hall by the pull of the law.

The body that had lost its head, too, immediately after the eternal wheel faded away, swung its arms to shake off the obstruction of Xue Wu Xia and Princess Qian Qian, and rushed to meet its own head.

Even for immortal demons, the feeling of having their heads chopped off is not pleasant!

The moment she entered the palace door, she suddenly extended her hand.

A light grip.

The thunder and frost energy that had been poured into both ears, erupted …… the right ear of Earth Demon exploded, while the left ear spewed out a stream of frost, staining the skull with ice on the palace door. The head of the headless Earth Demon’s feet and knees were blocked by frost, and the more difficult it was to walk, the slower it was to walk…. Little Wen Li slid in and danced with both blades, slashing wildly at the headless body, even though it couldn’t seriously hurt the headless Earth Demon who was wearing the demon armor, but with each slash, the headless body of the headless demon froze one point.

“What are you doing? Do you think you can kill me with this? Impossible, I am an immortal demon!” The Earth Demon was angry, and his head was in a rage.

“The fire of Nirvana can purify everything.” Princess Qian Qian spoke of a possibility.

“But the laws of the Earth Demon Palace are sealing me and making me suffer infinitely in punishment, the fire of Nirvana can kill demons, but I will eventually escape under the protection of the laws, and as long as the Earth Demon Palace exists, then I will exist, and whatever you do will only be in vain!” The most unrestrained asset he has is the infinitely punishable law seal, but he has life guarding war beasts instead, and this weakness has become the ultimate guarantee of his immortality.

chapters.title: Chapter 810.2 - Sprint, The State Of Supremacy
chapters.body:
Chapter 810.2 - Sprint, The State Of Supremacy

Chapter 810.2 [ Sprint, The State of Supremacy ]

“So we have to destroy the Earth Demon Palace ……” Yue Yang stated his true purpose for coming to the Earth Demon Temple: “Senior, killing you is just a side mission for me, my real goal is to absorb the power of the laws here.

“What did you say?” The Earth Demon can’t believe his ears, a guy who is not even an innate supreme dares to say that he absorbed the power of god’s laws?

“By standing here, we are yielding to the law, and if we go further and assimilate the law, then we are free from the law, and if we go further and transcend the law, then we can jump out of the law. Finally, the ultimate step, if I can absorb the power of the laws of this Earth Demon Palace, wouldn’t I be able to have the entire Earth Demon Palace in my hands?” Yue Yang presented a fantastic idea.

“You’re crazy!” The Earth Demon has seen all kinds of people in his life, but he has never seen such a crazy person.

“Let me open your eyes …… The power of the laws here is just the best nourishment for my promotion to the supreme innate. What do you think I came here to fight with you in a meaningless fight for? It’s really to kill you, wrong, you should be punished infinitely, I just need the power to improve myself, that’s why I came here to absorb the power of the law, and by the way mercifully kill you and end your sinful and unforgivable life.” Yue Yang stretched his arms, small law power slowly appeared on his body, just like the starry field after night shining into a bright star.

The white sheep, the golden bull, and Gemini are presented one by one.

The ‘world’ of the Book of Summoning received the greatest blessing, frantically absorbing the power of the surrounding space, whether it was frost, flame or lightning, any element, any energy, all of them would be absorbed and become nutrients for evolution.

The laws of the Earth Demon Palace were challenged by the power of Yue Yang’s laws and immediately changed dramatically, no longer as deeply hidden as before.

It’s like a god coming down.

An unimaginably majestic power, in the Earth Demon God Temple*** appeared, pressure towards Yue Yang, the intention is to challenge the law of his entire consciousness to defeat, annihilate and erase, and then turn him into a corpse under the law of submission. At the same time, there are ninety-nine ice chains, such as the sky white snakes, automatically extended to Yue Yang, with the law to challenge the enemy sealed imprisoned …… to create the Earth Demon Temple’s predecessors, set this law, no matter who wants to shake the Earth Demon Temple to challenge their own law, will be ten times the power of the law backfired.

The Earth Demon was first shocked, then rejoiced: “You’re finished, from now on, you’ll all stay with me as companions.

His laugh, in less than two seconds, made Princess Qian Qian cut out his tongue with a swing of her Excalibur.

The headless body arm, still holding the Mirror of Pain, squirmed slightly, and the Mirror of Pain turned slightly sideways, refracting its light onto a mechanical beast not far in front of it, the mechanical beast shattered, and the Earth Demon with a broken tongue, immediately healed, his tongue and severed lips returning to their original state: “It’s no use, no matter what power you use to hurt me, it’s no use at all! Besides, I’m perfectly willing to send you out of the Demon Palace because this kid tried to challenge the law and the whole Demon Palace will be resealed, so I’ll see you in a thousand years, guys, I hope you can think of your last words to say goodbye to your lover in three seconds ……”.

Two apertures of light appeared around the bodies of Xue Wu Xia and Princess Qian Qian.

The mirror of pain, reflecting the light over.

The Earth Demon looked at the two women and mocked them mercilessly, “See you again, goodbye!”

The two women let the light hit them and immediately disappeared without a trace, and at the same second, little Wen Li, who was trying to dodge, also let the Earth Demon to send the gift of sending out of the Earth Demon Palace. The headless body, walked to the palace door, both hands to remove the head, rested on the neck, wait until the flesh and blood joint no gap, then shake the head, found no discomfort, only to Yue Yang who is struggling with the power of the law, is using the fire of Nirvana to resist the 99 laws of the ice chain, opened his mouth and laughed: “What a fool, call you crazy is not enough, I dare say, never as arrogant as you! With the power of an inborn supreme being who is insufficient to challenge a god who can seal me, the Earth Demon, with the power of law? Geez, I never dreamed that there was a person like you in the world! All right, wretch, stop struggling and try to defeat the dragon with the strength of a mole? You have the courage to be so silly!”

“Because, I am me, and because you are not me, you will never be able to understand my realm.” Yue Yang laughed instead of being angry.

“Let’s see how long you can keep your mouth shut and hold on a little longer, okay? I really don’t want this pleasure to disappear from my body so quickly!” The Earth Demon laughed uproariously.

Xue Wu Xia, Princess Qian Qian, and little Wen Li are escaping quickly outside the cave.

It seems to know that something horrible is going to happen.

They had just escaped from the hole.

Behind them, an unspeakable power came out, directly pressing their bodies to the bottom of the cliff, making it impossible to raise their heads or even blink their eyes.

In the Earth Demon Palace, learned that Xue Wu Xia and the others have safely left, Yue Yang exploded the fate of the card in his body inspired by the power of the law, a kind of law power that is usually completely out of his control …… can not estimate how tall the golden giant, rising above Yue Yang’s head, even if a toe, but also far more than Yue Yang’s Ten times taller. In front of this golden giant, everything is insignificant, the arrogant Earth Demon fell to his knees on the ground in laughter, hands on the ground, even the heartbeat was so oppressed to stop, it was impossible to even breathe, let alone struggle …… Perhaps it was the ‘gods’ who created the Earth Demon Temple with a terrible cracking sound, and the power of the laws that sealed the Earth Demon was not even comparable to the Golden Giant, and in an instant the Golden Giant burst, the dome pierced, and the entire Earth Demon Palace could not accommodate a single foot of the Golden Giant!

Ninety-nine ice chains, shattered.

The ice chain that forced its way into Yue Yang’s body in the Nirvana fire just now burst into pieces like powder, turning into a completely unconscious energy for the world and Yue Yang to wildly absorb.

The god-like energy source that existed in the Earth Demon Palace was also dwarfed by the comparison of the golden giant.

A mere two to three hundred meters high, that god-like majestic image of the energy source of the law is not even close to the golden giant’s legs and knees, and the golden giant’s head and chest are completely invisible, towering over the sky. Dozens of kilometers away, Fatty Hai, Ye Kong and the others were in the midst of a battle, and once the golden giant appeared, they were all too powerful to move, while the evil tree people and delusion monsters around them all fell to the ground at this moment, many of them turning into black fog and dissipating into the clouds. ……

The majestic image of the gods was silently shattered.

Perhaps it was crushed by a golden giant, or perhaps it lost the support of the will of the mind.

Those energies, completely transformed into attributeless and unconscious free energy, together with the power that constituted the seal, flowed towards Yue Yang and the summoning book like a river of stars.

The Golden Giant disappears.

Yue Yang’s body glowed even brighter, ten million times more intense than before, and had the power of a legendary ‘god’.

At this moment, he had truly reached the final realm of sprinting to break through the innate supremacy.

chapters.title: Chapter 811.1 - The Goddess Of Storm Will Be Born
chapters.body:
Chapter 811.1 - The Goddess Of Storm Will Be Born

Chapter 811.1 [ The Goddess Of Storm Will Be Born ]

The vastness of the energy stream is like a river of stars, slowly flowing toward Yue yang.

With him and the summoned book as the center area, a huge star nucleus was formed. The energy colored light shone brightly, illuminating the whole broken Earth Demon Palace as bright as day. Yue Yang’s bold challenge was now officially successful, the entire Earth Demon Palace’s law energy, after allowing the Golden Giant to destroy the consciousness, it was transformed into mindless control of attributeless law power, which became the best nourishment for Yue Yang’s promotion.

This law energy is huge.

Yue Yang wants to completely absorb, absolutely not overnight can be completed, however, he does not need to completely absorb this law power, as long as the law energy breakthrough innate supreme realm, and then slowly form their own unique nature of ‘divine sense’ is not too late.

With the world of Summoning Treasures to be absorbed together, his pressure was diverted and alleviated a lot.

“Ah ……”

The Earth Demon came to his senses, and he felt his body’s hundred bones wanting to split.

In just now, he almost thought he would be killed in seconds.

In just a few seconds, he felt a trauma to his body and soul that would be difficult to recover from in a thousand years.

The unbeatable golden giant, the power of the law is even more terrifying than the ‘gods’ that sealed him, there is no possibility of resistance. In fact, the Earth Demon Palace also let the golden giant burst, even the sealed divine consciousness, have been destroyed into an attributeless and unconscious energy source. This kind of power, even the Earth Demon has not imagined, in his entire life, never encountered this kind of power of the enemy. A thought flashed in the heart of the Earth Demon, perhaps the legendary Dragon God Supreme, only to have this invincible power!

With great difficulty, he raised his head from the ground and saw Yue Yang, who was levitating in the air and absorbing law energy.

He couldn’t help but shiver.

It’s horrible!

This young man is not an existence he can imagine.

The best way is not to attack him while he is still here, but to escape as fast as possible, before he has the means to split out, to escape from here and hide forever, and never let this kid find it again.

“Freedom, freedom, unexpectedly, I still have the day of freedom!” The silver-haired old man also crawled out in the ice shavings, and he, who was also quite injured, raised his hands in surprise and murmured excitedly, and in his eyes, two streams of tears rolled down. Becoming his master’s double, he had been suffering the punishment of the law, and had been letting the nine ice chains hang upside down in the Earth Demon Palace, he had never thought that there would be a day when he would regain his freedom. Even if his majesty the Sky Open Demon breaks through the seal, he will only be able to take away his master, and should not consume huge power and risk another seal to save him, a life guardian war beast who was punished for his master.

“Go, go, it is dangerous here.” The Earth Demon at this time but did not care about freedom, it is still a little early to talk about freedom. Once that boy absorbs the law power, rebuild the Earth Demon Palace, and most likely re-sealing it.

“Yes, I’ll open the way.” The silver-haired old man always remembered his duty as a life-guarding war beast and summoned the huge ancient book out.

Just as he and the Earth Demon were preparing to flee the shattered Earth Demon Palace. Suddenly, three images appeared in front of them.

The passage at some point, coalescing thick ice walls.

These ice walls are made from a combination of extremely cold energy and the spiritual power of Xue Wu Xia’s divine mind field, and no one will be able to get through the ice walls embodied in this field without knocking Xue Wu Xia down. For Xue Wu Xia, who shares the Heart mirror talent with Yue Yang, every time Yue Yang is in a battle to improve, if she is in close proximity, will also benefit a lot because of the relationship between the heart mirror, at least the realm of perception, can be integrated as one, the shape of one person.

Yue Yang impacted the realm of innate supremacy, he also opened a window in the spiritual realm that was not available before.

Although the level is not upgraded.

But her strength and spirit are silently producing radical changes.

Xue Wu Xia raised her hand, the distant source of law energy seemed to have a sense as if a strand, spread and flowed to her palm.

Little Wen Li and Princess Qian Qian stand to her left and right, guarding, so that she can absorb the fusion of those who have no attributes and no intention to control the power of the law as soon as possible.

“Kill!” The silver-haired old man secretly screamed bad, in addition to that perverted kid, the little girl over here who loves to read books can also absorb the law energy, once she succeeds, he and his master will not only not be unable to leave, but will continue to be sealed in the miserable days of this Earth Demon Palace.

With a murderous heart, he flipped open the ancient book.

Despite letting the golden giant’s mighty pressure hit hard, the silver-haired old man still has superior strength.

Endless black energy like a tsunami erupted, the entire rocky ground was like a shocking wave of tumbling, earth, sand and mud, like the devil descended on the three women.

chapters.title: Chapter 811.2 - The Goddess Of Storm Will Be Born
chapters.body:
Chapter 811.2 - The Goddess Of Storm Will Be Born

Chapter 811.2 – The Goddess Of Storm Will Be Born

Chapter 811.2 [ The Goddess Of Storm Will Be Born ]

Faster than the silver-haired old man, was the snake-haired man, the Earth Demon.

The Earth Demon’s axe in a flash, has cut to the face of Princess Qian Qian. In the absence of the law seal of the Earth Demon Palace, even if the body is heavily traumatized, even if it can only play a tenth of its peak power, it is still enough to kill all strong people below the fifth level of the heavenly rank. The Earth Demon is chopping Qian Qian at the same time, there is still time to take out the mirror of pain, shining sideways to the small Wen Li, refracting her binding talent energy to the silver-haired old man’s body …… located in the rear of the attack of the silver-haired old man, even if his body is bound and stiffened on the spot, but also completely unhindered.

A close call, Princess Qian Qian bent backwards.

The Prison Emperor divine sword blocked in front of it.

Blocked the chopping of the magic axe, but with a wave of the hand of the Earth Demon, the magic axe was born a super strong shock.

Just fell off the ground Princess Qian Qian, the whole person arrow shot out backwards, body in the frosty rock surface hit a deep crater, there was a boom sound from the head hitting the ice wall.

“When this demon regains his freedom, can just you few stop this demon?” The Standing Earth Demon Dignitary was deeply affected by the laws in the Earth Demon Divine Hall, and everywhere he needed the Mirror of Pain and the Dispatch Talent to get rid of the sealing power, and could not bring out his true strength at all. Now once he regained his freedom, even if he was seriously injured and could only bring out a tenth of his strength, it was still far stronger than his not being able to bring out a hundredth of his strength in the seal.

“Ding ding ding ding!”

Little Wen Li hundreds of chopping strikes, it lets Earth Demon be handy to resolve.

Wearing the Heavenly Demon Armor and regaining his freedom, he was not afraid of Little Wen Li’s attack at all, whether it was a skillful dissolve or a hard carry, it was more than enough.

In addition to divine weapons, divine ideas and the power of the law, other attacks, the earth demon is completely out of sight.

The black energy frenzy, after the stiffness of the silver-haired old man’s restraint, resumed and swept towards the two women, Little Wen Li and Xue Wu Xia. Little Wen Li grabbed in front of Xue Wu Xia, summoned the Diamond Treasure Code, and raised the shield. Only to prevent two seconds, the Earth Demon’s actually strong brutal hand, broke into the shield, grabbed the little Wen Li one of the two blades, even the blade with a person, a fling thrown to the ice wall.

Unluckily Little Wen Li in the process of flying and falling, six small hands, with two of which have an extra bow.

But she did not have time to open the bow and arrow, the Earth Demon chased to the front.

Not blasting her in the face just because she’s Xia Luo Li.

Princess Qian Qian grabbed in the hand of Little Wen Li’s snake tail, an emergency jerk and pull, pulling her out of danger, standing on the ground the demon’s fist blasted on the ice wall, the entire divine idea and frost condensed into the ice wall, immediately cracked.

“Poof!” The spirit of Xue Wu Xia, who was absorbing the power of the law, was damaged and her body shook slightly, spitting out a mouthful of blood.

Black energy frenzy, with her as the center, spinning out millions of black demon blades, crazy rotation.

Xue Wu Xia’s Book of Truth, a storm goddess ambassador viciously drilled out, and she struck a fist angrily at the ground, freezing the entire vortex of black energy frenzy. Ten million black demon blades, frozen together, were so close to strangling Xue Wu Xia into pieces, but they will never be able to achieve this wish.

Spurting out a mouthful of blood, Xue Wu Xia’s left hand continued to channel the law energy.

Right hand, jade fingers trembling lightly.

Gently turn a page in the Book of Truth.

An ice chain, appearing on the ice wall, extended as if it had life, automatically tracked and chased after the Earth Demon dweller who was preparing to attack Princess Qian Qian.

The afterglow in the eyes of the Earth Demon glanced, like seeing a ghost, in the moment of striking a blast Princess Qian Qian, wretchedly rolled over to avoid. This is the kind of law sealing the ice chain of the Earth Demon Palace, exactly the same, only the number of different, if you let it lock, the end will be very tragic.

The silver-haired old man couldn’t be bothered to continue his long-range attack, closed the ancient book and blasted a flying kick at Xue Wu Xia’s face.

The Earth Demon also realized that Xue Wu Xia was the second greatest enemy, more terrifying than Princess Qian Qian, who was holding the Prison Emperor divine sword, and the silver-haired old man, one after the other, blasted with heavy fists.

On the ground, Princess Qian Qian flung the little Wen Li in her arms out of the way.

Like a furious vector chasing towards the little Wen Li, the speed is of course no faster than the Earth Demon, however, under her divine beast’s incomparable will and binding talent, the Earth Demon and the silver-haired old man were shocked to find that the speed of the two was getting slower and slower, and finally almost stagnant. All three of them slow will be ‘swimming’ in mid-air, compared to the little Wen Li who let Princess Qian Qian fling out to be a line faster.

“Late, too late!” What kind of person is the Earth Demon, he calculated the distance and estimated that it was still a short distance until Little Wen Li caught up with him, and, even if he caught up with himself, there was still an attack ahead, so he could not stop the wave of attack at all.

“Joke!” Princess Qian Qian’s back bore wings and the Vermilion Bird blaze filled the entire ruins of the Earth Demon Palace.

She was still as fast as a shooting star even under the pressure of the divine beast’s will.

In the blink of an eye, it overtook Little Wen Li.

Caught up with the Earth Demon.

Princess Qian Qian did not immediately attack the enemy, but rushed to the front of the Xue Wu Xia, only to raise the prison emperor divine sword, with the blue dragon, white tiger, vermilion bird, xuanwu four saint power combined with six sense talent, a sword cut on the silver-haired old man’s hand that ancient book. The earth devil and the silver-haired old man face a stunned, do not understand so, the prison emperor divine sword will be the ancient book everything in half.

Xue Wu Xia, who hadn’t been moving halfway, was ten times faster than Princess Qian Qian.

Her left and right hands each pressed on top of the ancient book, while the Book of Truth shone with a thousand times more light behind her …… The Storm Goddess screamed as she rapidly faded and evolved, and with the perfect combination of the Heart Mirror Sense, Law Power, and Ancient Book Knowledge provided by Xue Wu Fei, she advanced to the next level. The divine light is like a pillar, pointing straight to the sky, although not yet a full-fledged god, but promoted to become a god general, but has already begun to take on divine power. Although she has just stepped into the peak of the divine General realm, control of power and realm wisdom is not yet as unique as the inheritance of Barbara at that time, but this self-evolution is more powerful, more potential.

When the standing earth demon daddy a fist blast in the snow flawless undershirt, intended to kill her in one punch the moment.

When the Earth Demon fist blast in the Xue Wu Xia undershirt, intended to kill her in one punch the moment.

The Storm Goddess, still in the process of being promoted to Storm Goddess General, exploded in anger.

Protector.

Her empty hand reaching out to grab the Earth Demon in her hands, and viciously thrown out, the Earth Demon will be heavily smashed in the ice wall ……

Her empty hand to explore a grasp, the Earth Demon to grab backwards in the hand, and viciously thrown out, the Earth Demon is heavily smashed in the ice wall …… ice wall pierced a hundred meters, the Earth too painful to moan, that just picked up the mirror of pain ready to transfer the master damage to silver-haired old man, and let the goddess of the storm will be a slap smashed flat, into the ground a hundred meters.

The Mirror of Pain spun in mid-air, shining a light on Princess Qian Qian, and then the light was refracted onto an ice sculpture.

The ice sculpture jumped up with an ‘ow’ of pain.

Covering his head, he groaned in frustration, “This young master was shot even while lying down!”

Princess Qian Qian found her previous injuries, but really let the mirror of pain transfer, slightly surprised, they can not have the gift of repatriation aye? And then look at that ice sculpture awakened man, more dumbfounded, because she saw a second snake-haired demon man …… with the exact same snake-haired demon man, could it be, there are two demon men on the ground?

chapters.title: Chapter 812.1 - Mirror Of Pain And Soul Fixing Nail
chapters.body:
Chapter 812.1 - Mirror Of Pain And Soul Fixing Nail

Chapter 812.1 [ Mirror of Pain and Soul Fixing Nail ]

Princess Qian Qian’s hand and sword fell and cut down this snake-haired demon man who looked exactly like the Earth Demon.

She doesn’t care at all who this guy is, there is a kill or no kill.

Without waiting for her second sword to swing up, the snake-haired demon man somehow conjured up a tiny white flag and held it high: “Surrender, I surrender!”

The result …… is not what he thought, Princess Qian Qian even white flag with people, hand up sword, and then a sword cut over …… let the prison emperor divine sword even two sword slashes did not die the snake hair demon man trembling to get up, Princess Qian Qian erupted the power of the four saints:. “You really are a real earth devil!”

This sentence simply scared the guy’s soul.

Quickly shook his head and waved his hand: “No, I’m not, that Earth Demon is stealing my look, I’m the long wind of the four great families of the Heavenly Realm Dugu family, don’t do it first, okay? I can prove my identity, by the way, there is also that mirror of pain it is also what the Earth Demon robbed from me. He only has a dispatch talent, without my mirror of pain, in the Earth Demon Palace’s seal he is not even slag.”

He did not say okay.

After that, Princess Qian Qian immediately picked up the Mirror of Pain.

“Thank you, it’s finally returned to its rightful owner.” The snake-haired demon man was moved to reach out and try to claim back the Mirror of Pain.

“You’re welcome.” Princess Qian Qian directly put away the Mirror of Pain into the storage ring.

If before that, the mirror of pain still has the consciousness of the Earth Demon, it is impossible to put away. Just now the goddess of storms will strike, the original Earth Demon did not have 100% domination of the consciousness of the mirror of pain crushed, just in time Princess Qian Qian. As the saying goes, marry a chicken follow the chicken, marry a dog follow the dog, marry a monkey full of mountains, Princess Qian Qian with Yue Yang, her concept of treasures is very different from before, now see the ground treasures, will not be as polite as before. Even if she is not suitable to use, there are so many sisters at home, like heavenly Tian Fa, Luo Hua, Yi Nan, and Bing’er which of them need a treasure like the mirror of pain so powerful.

The snake-haired demon man fell head over heels, finished, the treasure was once again robbed.

Moreover, this time the chance of returning things to their rightful owners is equal to zero.

He struggled to prove: “That was mine, only that the Earth Demon had snatched it away!”

Princess Qian Qian nodded: “Understood, it’s mine now. If you’re not happy, you can ask the Earth Demon for it, he’s the one who robbed you, it has nothing to do with me.”

The snake-haired man let out a miserable scream, and fell headlong to the ground, beaming from the inside, he now understands one truth: reasoning with women is simply nonsense!

Even worse than the snake-haired devil man was the Earth Demon who had been tugging just a moment ago. Every second that passed, the Storm Goddess would evolve more perfectly, and every second that passed evolved more perfectly. Yue Yang, who was still indulging in his senses in the Mirror of the Innate Supreme, willed to automatically part with a strand of law energy to allow the Goddess of Storms to continue to grow. Xue Wu Xia and Yue Yang mind to mind, sense and law energy, in this thousand-year opportunity, continue to nourish the storm goddess will double the growth and evolution …… Earth Demon and silver-haired old man, in order to stop the increasingly impossible to defeat opponents, desperately attack.

Yet such an attack only allowed the Storm Goddess to send one after another flying.

They can foresee one thing, if the goddess of the storm will be the end of evolution, it will be their real death.

It is necessary to kill Xue Wu Xia, the master, before her evolution is completed.

Rush the attack.

The goal must be reached in the shortest possible time.

“Howl!” The Earth Demon pounced madly, halfway, lifting the protection of the Heavenly Demon Armor, his arm splitting into a thousand spear-like ferocious weapons, each swimming as if it had life, lengthening, nailing and shooting at Xue Wu Xia’s vest.

Now do not seek self-preservation, only to kill the enemy.

As long as Xue Wu Xia, the master, is killed, the Goddess of Storms will be even more powerful and will perish with her.

The four saints’ power and the six sense talent are united, the divine sword of the prison emperor is raised high, and the image of the white tiger, the life guardian war beast, appears above the head as real. The silver-haired old man was tied up in the center of a grid of electricity, and the vermilion bird flames surrounded him, preventing him from having the chance to escape. She discovered his weakness with her Six Sense Talent …… that he was afraid of fire!

Little Wen Li held out a treasure light, and the light of the treasure shone throughout the ruins of the Earth Demon Palace.

The will of the divine beast, exploded.

Millions of light slowly recycled to the palm of Little Wen Li, the silver-haired old man’s body seems to have signs of cracking, gradually, unable to retain its human form.

He turned into an ugly-looking demon humanoid, with a hideous face and sharp claws twisting out of control. It wailed long and hard, and under the might of Little Wen Li, a super divine beast that surpassed ordinary divine beasts, it was not quite perfect, even though it was stronger, and its might and will were dwarfed. It stumbled under the pressure of the might and rushed towards Little Wen Li, its steps getting slower and slower under Little Wen Li’s binding talent, but kept moving strongly and brutally, vowing to kill Little Wen Li who had not yet fully grown up with its sharp claws.

Little Wen Li, instead of retreating, advances.

Welcome to that silver-haired old man turned into a terrifying demon.

When Princess Qian Qian saw this, she withdrew her sword to the side and changed her aim to slash at the Earth Demon, instead of attacking the terrifying demon transformed by the silver-haired old man.

The Earth Demon to the other arm of the heavenly demon armor to forcefully block, feet kicked away in the hands of the magic axe, let the magic axe rotate away, with the chopping of death, axe blade spin chopping to the Little Wen Li …… a small odd-shaped war beast in the bottom of Princess Qian Qian feet slipped out, chattering a piece of broken ice, flying to the path of the magic axe rotation, up a light throw, the piece of broken ice and the magic axe slightly touched, into ice flakes splashed, however, the magic axe was slightly impacted, but the trajectory has changed bizarrely, waiting to rotate to the small of Wen Li’s back, has exceeded her height, in the top of her head an inch spin chopping away.

The Earth Demon hated the little thing that sabotaged his killing move.

But there was nothing to be done for a while, as the Goddess of Storms would once again send him flying.

Sacred with a little reward to run to the master, Princess Qian Qian took the tiger eyes a glare, scared it hurriedly, played nice, hid to the side, no longer dared to pamper.

chapters.title: Chapter 812.2 - Mirror Of Pain And Soul Fixing Nail
chapters.body:
Chapter 812.2 - Mirror Of Pain And Soul Fixing Nail

Chapter 812.2 [ Mirror of Pain and Soul Fixing Nail ]

The silver-haired old man turned into a terrifying demon, and the Little Wen Li battled together, a million pieces of muscle let the Little Wen Li double blade cutting fly, double claw attack but let the Little Wen Li other two hands of the treasure bow repeatedly block, not at all effective. When the former combat skills awakened in the body of Little Wen Li, for a ‘captain of the personal guard’ who once accompanied Empress Fei Wen Li in the battle of the entire heavenly realm, her fighting skills, compared to the scary demon more than a chip.

Most importantly, Little Wen Li’s divine beast will repeatedly soar.

It completely overwhelmed the terrifying demon.

Terrifying demon found that every piece of flesh and blood he chipped away, will be transformed into energy, sealed into that snake demon Little Luolo other two hands of the treasure light, can not help but big fear …… this battle absolutely no possibility of victory, the result, will only be another seal!

“Master, go, go!”

The horrible demon passed through Little Wen Li’s millions of blades without defense, and broke through Princess Qian Qian’s sword net again.

Scaled and badly wounded near death, it roared to the Earth Demon: “I will not really die, the most is sealed, the master recovered full strength, then come back to save me not too late, if not go, we both have to be sealed here!”

The Earth Demon closed his eyes helplessly and gritted his teeth.

Turn around and flee towards the ice wall.

Hundreds of punches, heavy bombardment to the ice wall, intent on hard to open up an escape route.

Behind him, the terrifying demon transformed by the silver-haired old man opened its hands, forcibly resisting the attacks of Little Wen Li and Princess Qian Qian, and even the Goddess of Storms would strike three heavy blows in a row, resisting them stiffly without moving half a step. Princess Qian Qian’s full strength cut, half of the terrifying demon’s body cut off, but it still grabbed the entrance to the ice cave hole with both hands, insisting that the Earth Demon escape.

Just when the last punch of the earth’s demon struck through the ice wall, it was too late to breathe a breath of free air.

Xue Wu Xia turned over a page of the book of truth.

Three ice chains formed by the laws extended out between her fingers, lengthening at great speed, catching up with Earth Demon, locking them on the arms of the Earth Demon who had lifted the shoulder protector of the Heavenly Demon Armor.

The terrifying demon with only half of its body left lunged madly at Xue Wu Xia, intending to explode itself and die with its enemy.

Little Wen Li nailed it to the ice wall with an arrow.

The Earth Demon cut his arm off directly, at the time of the ice chain automatically locked, the body reversed backwards, completely disregarding the double pinch of Princess Qian Qian and the Storm Goddess General, using all his strength, single palm, pressed to the face of Xue Wu Xia …… that even if it is death, but also to finish off this hateful enemy. It is because of her existence that the battle is made so miserable.

Everything, everything is under her calculations.

Including taking off the arm guard just now turned out to be a tactical setup as well.

If such a clever enemy does not die, even with the greatest advantage, it is impossible to win!

“I’m a bit overwhelmed, what kind of skill is a big lord bullying a woman!” The snake-haired devil man rushed up to try to relieve the situation.

“Roll!” The Earth Demon side face sprayed a mouthful of shock wave, put just in the seal out of the strength of only one percent recovery of the snake-haired devil man was sprayed away on the spot.

“You also roll!” Xue Wu Xia sneered, she pressed one hand on the Book of Truth, one hand filled with absolute ice cold energy, this is the ice cold energy that can freeze even Yue Yang’s Heavenly Wrath Red Chain, it is her natural unique energy, except for the Nirvana Fire, there is nothing in the world that it cannot freeze.

She swung the ball of energy at Earth Demon, and her right foot kicked up a ball of thunder at the same time.

Speaking of close quarters combat.

In addition to Yue Yang, she has no more opponents, even Princess Qian Qian, also has to join forces with Yue Bing and the girls to fight with one.

Just when Xue Wu Xia thought that the Earth Demon dweller was all ice, then on the thunder blast fly, and then die in the storm goddess will be the full force of the strike …… on the Earth Demon dweller defeat has been determined a moment, suddenly, the Earth Demon dweller in the throat spit out a strange ‘black nail’. This black nail out, Xue Wu Xia soul shock, the whole person in a dull state.

Frost and thunder, both out of control.

A cruel bloodthirsty color flashed in the eyes of the Earth Demon.

This black nail, it is said that the former is a divine weapon ‘fixed soul nail’, even the gods also nailed, but also irresistible, only to be bound to die. Although too much killing lets the unknown gods seal, quality fades down to subdivine weapons, but used to deal with a human woman with insufficient innate supremacy, that is easy. Just now has not been used, is not controlled to the best time.

Now, it is the best time to kill this woman!

Die, die!

The huge palm of the Earth Demon turned into claws and pressed towards the jade face of Xue Wu Xia, he not only wanted to kill this clever human woman, but also to peel off her face and become a bloodied trophy of honor in his collection!

“Dare to hit my girl?” An angry voice appeared at the back of the Earth Demon. The Earth Demon found an irrepressible force, erupted in the back of the neck, then the sky spun, the whole head and feet let people thrown into the ground, straight to hundreds of meters deep. In his dizzy moment, a certain just promoted to the innate supremacy of the crossing male, one hand rose up the steaming nirvana fire, burning purification of the black nails; one hand to hold Xue Wu Xia, bending head, right on the battlefield, and deeply kissed his beloved woman.

chapters.title: Chapter 813.1 - Extinction, Instant Kill, Tribute
chapters.body:
Chapter 813.1 - Extinction, Instant Kill, Tribute

Chapter 813.1 [ Extinction, Instant Kill, Tribute ]

It’s not for nothing that Yue Yang forcefully kissed Xue Niu as soon as she came out.

After all, there is a snake-haired devil man here, not to declare sovereign belonging to the issue, in case people look at her it will be very troublesome. We will know by looking at the celestial dynasty, the East China Sea and South China Sea problems constantly, if the year is understood a little, more than a billion people can make a small fishing Islands difficult to live in? Of course the two examples are not quite the same, Xue Wu Xia and Princess Qian Qian they will never look at others except Yue Yang, but Yue Yang thinks it is better to make their couple relationship clear some good, then, many troubles will go with the wind.

After kissing Xue Wu Xia, he wrapped his arms around Princess Qian Qian again and gave the tigress a breathless kiss.

Sure enough, one look at the happy life of Yue Yang’s left and right, the snake-haired demon man who called himself Chang Feng was so jealous that he slammed his head into the rock.

“So easy to meet a girl with character, who did not know that a famous flower has a master, I do not want to live anymore.” The self-proclaimed eldest young master of the four great families of the heavenly realm, Chang Feng, crying with a handful of tears and a snotty nose, looking at that sad look, and the possibility of slitting his wrists to commit suicide.

“If you hang yourself, you will die very slowly, it is better to use a knife to be more profitable.” Yue Yang enthusiastically handed him a knife.

“I, I do not want to die ……” the young master Chang Feng is not stupid, he has not yet enjoyed life properly, where is he willing to die so early.

“It’s okay, if you can’t think, you can come to me at any time, I have dozens of ways to make people hang without pain, as long as you pay a small consultation fee, I can also order a coffin for you on west street in White Rock City. I am familiar with that boss, if you are a major holiday death, the coffin can also buy one get one free.” Yue Yang did not finish, that young master Chang Feng has been scared his face like dirt, frantically fleeing, head did not dare to return, as if to stay one more second, will let Yue Yang convince hm to suicide.

“Domineering!” Princess Qian QIan knew that Yue Yang, a guy with a strong desire for exclusivity, did not allow others to look at her more than once, she raised her pink fist and gave him a blow, although the surface was pouting, but the force of that could not kill a mosquito.

“I am not worried that you are too charming, Tigress!” Yue Yang patted Princess Qian Qian’s and flatters her, making her heart sweet to hear.

She knew full well that he was jealous.

But always tighten their own, so the heart is not annoyed but happy.

Because of the appearance of this snake-haired devil man Chang Feng, and also because of the attack on Xue Wu Xia by the Earth Demon, Yue Yang was forced to interrupt his perception of the innate supreme realm. Originally, he could have used the law energy of this Earth Demon divine hall to advance to the perfect innate supreme realm, and could even reach above the second level of innate supreme, but now that it was interrupted, he could only raise his perception again in his future cultivation.

In the world, there is no absolute perfection.

To be able to risk the challenge of absorbing the law energy to advance to the realm of innate supremacy, is already a great success that Yue Yang is extremely grateful for in his heart!

What’s more, during this extreme challenge, Xue Wu Xia’ Storm Goddess also evolved into a Storm Goddess General because of the karmic combination of ancient books, perceptions and laws, and her strength has progressed a long way.

“Who the hell are you?” The Earth Demon venerable roared low in anger, he felt that Yue Yang was definitely not an ordinary descendant of the Tong Tian Tower, it was possible that he came from that legendary place. How could an ordinary human have his kind of enlightenment? How could he have everything he had? This is not a few Tong Tian Tower strong cultivation can be reached …… If it really comes from that legendary place, then this battle defeat has long been doomed …… even the Heavenly Demon Majesty, but also can not fight against the strongest person in that place, let alone himself!

“Dead people have no need to know secrets!” Although Yue Yang was promoted to the realm of Innate Supreme and had a brand new advancement in strength, he actually did not dare to take his enemies lightly.

This Earth Demon, really is not a simple opponent.

Only because of the law seal, so he lost a lot of power, less than a tenth of his peak, if the Earth Demon were to meet the battle his peak power.

The aftermath, let’s not say who wins and who loses, at least the Earth Demon to leave less, Yue Yang and Xue Wu Xia when they join forces can not stop the …… nirvana fire, into a pillar of fire, and bear up.

Yue Yang lightly leaped up, riding on the fire phoenix transformed by the Nirvana fire, and dived towards the Earth Demon at great speed. As the Demon Lord roared like thunder and swung his fist to meet the attack, a slowly expanding eternal wheel appeared in his right hand. Within ten meters, everything returned to eternity, the heavily wounded Earth Demon can no longer struggle and squirm like before.

chapters.title: Chapter 813.2 - Extinction, Instant Kill, Tribute
chapters.body:
Chapter 813.2 - Extinction, Instant Kill, Tribute

Chapter 813.2 [ Extinction, Instant Kill, Tribute ]

Yue Yang, who’s left hand probed the chest of the Earth Demon, pressed slightly.

After the innate supreme enlightenment and the power of the wheel of extinction has been transformed, spinning pole and turn.

The ancient runes are no longer hidden as before, but fully present at the moment of birth, displaying its world-destroying power.

Stronger and deeper ancient runes appeared on Yue Yang’s brow, his left hand and the core of the wheel of extinction. With Yue Yang’s innate supreme divine sense, the power of the minor laws and the exterminating might of the wheel of extinction, the three were united and cut into the chest of the Earth Demon.

This chop does not cut the enemy’s body in half, as it did before.

Rather, it includes soul, will, and energy.

Uniformly cuts open.

Finally, give a blow as powerful as the one that extinguished the world!

Yue Yang has only just stepped into the realm of the Heavenly Supreme, the power of the enlightenment, not enough to truly play the power of the wheel of extinction, if Yue Yang reaches the tenth level of the Heavenly Supreme, into the sacred supreme, then the power emitted, is the real ‘divine power’, a strike, will really cause the destruction of the world, and not just kill an enemy so simply!

The wheel of extinction, which cut through the front chest of the Earth Demon, pierced out from the back.

The huge incomparable image will stand the earth devil all for open, but the strange thing is, the Earth Demon’s body did not split into two, the original nothing can not defend the heavenly devil divine armor, for the cut of the wheel of destruction also did not have any obstacle, as if do not know that the wheel of destruction break through the body.

After Yue Yang had finished casting this wheel of extinction, which had regained its true strength after the enlightenment of the realm of the ascended supreme, his entire body felt extremely tired.

Sweating and panting like a bull.

It was more tiring than the usual three hours of continuous combat.

Princess Qian Qian with a little shock went up to hold Yue Yang’s arm …… just now the flash of the ancient Rune, not only Yue Yang’s power drained, she and Xue Wu Xia also felt a burst of powerlessness, with slight dizziness.

The entire Earth Demon Palace ruins also had an irreversible impact.

The debris frost, rock steps ground, all turned into a vortex of destruction form, the surrounding space of any life destroyed.

Not in the awakening of the group of ice sculptures, because the seal time is too long, there are not many left alive, they first in the golden giant’s pressure annihilated a few, only two left, and because Yue Yang full force to perform the wheel of extinction presented by the ancient runes, instantly flying ashes and smoke away. Ice sculptures scattered, their bodies all let the wheel of extinction into nothingness, except for a few faded treasure books, nothing left.

“The wheel of extinction can be so strong!” Even though Xue Wu Xia had the Book of Truth, she did not know that the wheel of extinction cast by Yue Yang after reaching the Ascended Supreme was so terrifying.

“……” Yue Yang breathed heavily, not bothering to answer, in fact, he couldn’t think of it.

The Earth Demon, who was hit by the wheel of extinction, is not yet dead.

It’s just that life is cut off.

The Heavenly Demon Armor on his body came off automatically.

A storage ring, followed by an earth magic axe fell, snake hair pattern also can not be maintained, he reverted to a hideous-looking demon, and that let the little Wen Li nailed to the ice wall also under the wheel of the extinction life guardian war beast demon somewhat similar.

The earth demon seems to want to walk towards his life guardian war beast, but just after taking a step, his body produces a slight tremor.

An uncontrollable stagger, the earth demon under control.

The second step, the life guardian war beast in front of the Earth Demon, that by the silver-haired old man transformed into a hideous demon then into a stream of light, in mid-air in all directions, but not like the death of other life guardian war beasts and then back to the body of the master of the Earth Demon …… snapped, the Earth Demon’s summoning treasure code fell to the ground, quickly fell out of order, the color dull, a ray of energy light gradually weak, as the life of the master.

The Earth Demon almost kneeled on the ground when his knees went weak, but he struggled and steadily stood.

“You are very strong, if not sealed for tens of thousands of years, the current me is not a match for you. If I had great strength, I would have challenged you in your strongest state, but because of the situation outside, I no longer have time to wait, I desperately need to become stronger. Earth Demon Dweller, you are not defeated by my hands, but by fate.” Yue Yang paid a slight tribute to the Earth Demon venerable.

“My fate was sealed tens of thousands of years ago, and it is better to die like this than to continue to live! Young man, thank you, if you see His Majesty the Heavenly Demon, please tell him that I am relieved.”

The Earth Demon bent down and reached out to take out the piece set inside the chest armor of the Heavenly Demon God.

Swipe it lightly.

It was then tossed to Yue Yang.

Finally, stand strong and straight again.

He just kept a javelin-like straight body, has been standing, even if the pupils spread, life all cut off, but also die and not fall …… that even if Yue Yang decapitated him with the wheel of extinction, he is also the year arrogantly across the entire heavenly realm of the Earth Demon.

Yue Yang looked at the exquisite ‘Heavenly Devil Order’ in his hand, silently put it into his bosom, and then gave a salute to the Earth Demon.

He waved his hand and sprinkled a ball of nirvana fire.

Burning up the corpse of the Earth Demon.

This is the first time, Yue Yang after killing a powerful opponent, not to collect the corpse as flower fertilizer or dog food, the first time to sincerely respect the enemy’s corpse. If the Earth Demon was at its peak, Yue Yang would not necessarily be able to hit this powerful enemy even if he used the wheel of extinction. Before the wheel of extinction killed in seconds, the Earth Demon had let the law seal weaken and was heavily damaged by the golden giant’s might, and even let Xue Wu Xia, Princess Qian Qian, Little Wen Li and the Storm Goddess strike them repeatedly.

Such an enemy deserves Yue Yang’s respect …… he is not the first to fall in time long eliminator, and will not be the last, but he definitely deserves to be recorded in Yue Yang’s growth history.

chapters.title: Chapter 814.1 - The Tough Life Does Not Need To Explain
chapters.body:
Chapter 814.1 - The Tough Life Does Not Need To Explain

Chapter 814.1 [ The Tough Life Does Not Need To Explain ]

“You don’t seem too happy? What?” Princess Qian QIan handed the Mirror of Pain to Yue Yang, she originally thought that this kid would jump up with joy. Who could know that once he received it, he looked at it dumbfounded, as if the whole person was suddenly dumbfounded.

“I can’t tell, but there is an indefinable feeling, in short, it seems ……”

Yue Yang can’t say why.

But he had an inner sense that this ‘mirror of pain’ was not a good thing. It was more like a divine incantation, or someone had cast some kind of brand in it, except for the owner who created it, no one could really become the owner, if purified with the Nirvana fire, it would only destroy it. Anyway, once Yue Yang got it, he had a very dangerous feeling in his heart. If not for Princess Qian Qian’s rare grab, he would have thrown it on the ground like a hot potato and discarded it as soon as possible to avoid getting into trouble.

The snake-haired demon man Chang Feng, obviously human, but became that way, Yue Yang guessed that it was actually not related to Queen Vivienne’s curse, but most likely the curse of the Mirror of Pain. If Queen Vivienne were to curse the snake-haired demon man Chang Feng, he would have died long ago, it is impossible for him to continue to survive.

What’s more, Yue Yang suspects that the Earth Demon who used the mirror of pain, even if he himself broke free from the seal, his strength has not been able to recover, is also the result of the mirror of pain.

There is no direct evidence of these speculations, but Yue Yang cannot say no.

What happens when you use the mirror of pain yourself?

Princess Qian Qian is how smart, a look at Yue Yang looking at it wrong, it dawned on her, she picked up a life-threatening thing, hurriedly grabbed it.

Throw it far away.

Although she wished to help Yue Yang to the greatest extent possible, she definitely did not want him to be affected in some way as a result.

There are many treasures in the world, not suitable for use, that is not to be forced. For example, the ‘Earth Demon Axe’ and the ‘Heavenly Demon Armor’ of the Earth Demon, these two sub-divine weapons are not for everyone to be able to use, especially the Heavenly Demon Armor, which must be full of evil drenched in demonic energy to be able to wear, otherwise, a normal person wearing it, will let it contaminated into a ‘demon’.

However, Earth Demon axe and demon armor are okay, Yue Yang can not use, but also can be given to the Hui Tai Lang to fuse, for it, the more evil the more devilish treasures, the easier to fuse, but also the more you can increase the strength!

It was originally the demon wolf that represents destruction!

In the battle of the Earth Demon Palace, besides everyone’s improvement, the real treasure that was harvested was the Soul Fixing Nail that still needs to continue to be purified with the Nirvana Fire.

The fixed soul nail, now still in the seal.

If Yue Yang can unseal it and obtain its recognition, then he will harvest a super powerful ‘divine weapon’.

With this treasure, Yue Yang was more or less comforted.

Of course, the artifact is not a cabbage, not wanting to use it, Yue Yang to get the approval of the fixed soul nail, still needs a lot of effort.

“Although it can’t be used, we might be able to take it out and find the Night Queen and the supreme to take a look at it, or maybe seal it in a special place, we can’t let it stay in this Earth Demon God Palace ruins, otherwise, if someone picks it up, I’m afraid it will be a disaster.” Snowless thought for a while, let the Storm Goddess pick up the Mirror of Pain, handed it to Yue Yang, and put it into the Demon subduing tower to seal it temporarily.

“It seems that sometimes the little cheap is not to be had.” Princess Qian Qian adorably spit out the pink tongue, her rare and naive attitude, let Yue Yang look wolf heart, must taste the taste of the tigress small fragrant tongue, but this time …… get is Princess Qian Qian head-on punch.

The Earth Demon Palace turned into ruins, Yue Yang, Xue Wu Xia and Qian Qian made a slight rest.

Waiting to recover most of the time, the storm goddess will and heard the arrival of Hui Tai Lang, early to clean up the battlefield, anything with order value is not spared.

Heavenly demon armor and Earth Demon axe to Hui Tai Lang left fusion.

Keep the good stuff for your own faithful watchdog.

Although Yue Yang often punched and kicked the Hui Tai Lang and called him, but occasionally he was good to him, at least he always left a copy of good things for him, he, the master, was barely qualified. Hui Tai Lang was so happy, sub-divine weapon, this thing is absolutely rare, especially the heavenly demon armor. A super extreme sub-divine weapon, infinitely close to the existence of the divine weapon, if let the magic abyss of the Barut Yong Tian Tower, Hashin and other great demon lords know that Yue Yang gave Hui Tai Lang fusion, those guys will definitely be full of cattle inside.

Hui Tai Lang is smart, he understands what is meant by a long night and a long dream.

Also do not go, directly in the ruins of this Earth Demon Palace, directly began to devour the Earth Demon axe and heavenly demon armor fusion.

Let the strongest people in the Demon’s abyss cry themselves to death!

If it had not gone through the golden giant law power intimidation that Yue Yang had just raised, this human-faced evil ancient tree could have defeated Fatty Hai and the others without much effort. Although it can’t move, its strength is as high as Heavenly Rank 5, and in this place where evil energy is pervasive, it is simply an invincible existence.

Unfortunately, the golden giant’s mighty pressure damaged it greatly, and the evil energy around it weakened massively.

chapters.title: Chapter 814.2 - The Tough Life Does Not Need To Explain
chapters.body:
Chapter 814.2 - The Tough Life Does Not Need To Explain

Chapter 814.2 [ The Tough Life Does Not Need To Explain ]

The most important thing is Fatty Hai and their method of warfare is shameless.

Xue Tan Lang, the iceman, was the main attacker, Prince Tian Luo, Ye Kong and the others were holding back, Fatty Hai’s wind-breathing sea birds were responsible for long-range strikes, and the Li brothers were cleaning up the surrounding evil tree people and delusional monsters that were surviving behind the mighty pressure. All of them divided the work, slow and methodical for a big BOSS that can not move, they seemed very patient, prepared a kind of small knife saw big tree ‘kite tactics’.

Heavenly rank 5 is very resistant to fight, but again can resist, be hit more will also be injured.

As long as the speed of recovery is not as fast as the speed of attack, then it will be strong enough to fall one day.

“Not bad.” Yue Yang watched for a while and praised in a very rare way. He opened his mouth to speak, and only when Xue Tan Lang who was concentrating on fighting realized that Yue Yang had come out, they were overjoyed, and their morale was even higher and their battle spirit was boundless.

“Pay attention to the pressure, as long as you enter within a hundred meters of it, its domain ability can crush you so much that you can’t move and kill you in seconds, is possible at any time, must pay attention to control the distance, it is best to use this to enlighten the supreme will of the supreme realm. As long as your will is strong enough, its pressure will weaken a lot. There is one more thing, and that is rebirth. Under its root system, there is no less than the above tree face so huge core, even if the above tree face let you blast down, there is enough energy to re-grow a new tree face …… “Xue Wu Xia open the book of truth, pointing down everyone, especially as the main attacker’s brother Xue Tan Lang, but also focus Warning, so that everyone do not take the enemy lightly, after all, the heavenly rank five is not an existence that they can easily take down.

“Understood.” Xue Tan Lang nodded with a solemn expression.

“If you guys can beat down this ugly tree man, upgrading is for sure, how to comprehend more in battle is very important, cherish this rare enemy!” Princess Qian Qian is usually very stern, but today is more forgiving.

The main thing is that this tree man is a bit special, and its roots are rooted here.

The inability to move is its fatal point.

If it could dart like Yue Bing’s Titan Tree Man, Fatty Hai and the others would have been seconds away.

Yue Yang before leaving, also said: “It seems that this tree face inside the evil core is not bad, remember to take back, he is useful!” Fatty Hai listened to head on the rocks, this is all what the boss ah, the little brothers worked hard to hit the baby, but also in the contribution to go …… not right, in the end who is the boss ah, as if they are the honorary boss, right?

He was just about to open his mouth to bargain and exchange some treasures out at Yue Yang, but Yue Yang didn’t give him this opportunity and took the two women with him, floating away.

Ye Kong kicked Fatty Hai away and cursed, “Are you a pig?”

Fatty Hai was about to shoot back, and suddenly saw a life-threatening root rising from where he was standing just now, and suddenly shivered with fear. In the battlefield distraction is tantamount to suicide, fortunately this monkey still have some righteousness.

“Brother Monkey, you’re a good man!” Fatty Hai enthusiastically gave Ye Kong a good man card.

“You want to disgust me to death?” When Ye Kong heard this, his whole face twisted and contorted, and he almost didn’t vomit on the spot.

Sand Valley, Quiet Sand Promenade.

Yue Yang, Xue Wu Xia, and Princess Qian Qian two women after the previous guidance of the two god of Rain and god of Wind, according to the map to find the sand granny trapped in the quiet sand promenade. The original Yue Yang thought that this let the wind called Sha Luo Man granny, is a kindly old lady, who did not know, simply a big fall. This Sha Granny, not at all old, looks estimated at most only forty, is a mature and stable virtuous and wise middle-aged woman. She is slightly more mature than the Si Niang, while lacking a little gentle water maternal glow.

This Sha Granny stood in the middle of a clear pond with water on all sides, dressed in a beautiful costume.

Both feet, however, are firmly nailed to the ground, completely unable to move.

Sand Valley way of punishment to her by not being able to take a bath.

That even if there is crystal clear pool water everywhere around her, but she can only keep looking like this, can not bring up a drop of water below to clean themselves, that even if Xue Wu Xia and Princess Qian Qian with the fastest speed, set off a large wave, before pouring to her body, but also all turned into white mist disappeared.

This punishment makes Yue Yang very speechless …… but it is Xue Wu Xia and Princess Qian Qian, these two on this punishment are more resonant, feel it’s very cruel.

They feel that a woman with a serious cleanliness fetish extremely happy to take a bath for tens of thousands of years standing at the water’s edge can not take a bath.

Such punishment can no longer be described as cruel!

What makes Yue Yang curious is, what bad things did this sand woman named Sha Luo Man do back then to have someone sealed here to receive tens of thousands of years of punishment?

“The past, do not mention it again, how old you are, there are some things, you can not figure out at this age of children!” Sha Granny saw a descendant of the Tong Tian Tower come, and see Yue Yang and the two girls are excellent beyond compare, but even more happy, full of smiles waved his hand, and did not pursue Yue Yang gossip of the offense: “You do not need to pay attention to those two guys, they are pig-headed, and still the world’s most stupid pig-headed, if I were not afraid of their sadness and suicide, I would have cut off relations with them, you do not know, with their names together, that is the greatest misfortune of my life! Well, not to talk about me, talk about you guys, I am curious about you guys …… little boy, let’s start with you first!”

“My life can be described in two words.” Yue Yang said his life is very simple.

Which two words?” Sha Granny is puzzled, two words can describe the whole life?

“Pugilistic!” Yue Yang replied in a serious manner.

chapters.title: Chapter 815.1 - Head-Scratching Intel
chapters.body:
Chapter 815.1 - Head-Scratching Intel

Chapter 815.1 [ Head-Scratching Intel ]

“Interesting little boy, quite a sharp tongue, no wonder he can coax both little girls to follow with all their hearts.” Sha Granny was happy.

“Thank you senior for your compliment.” Yue Yang curtly saluted.

“Sand Valley, with your strength, it’s no problem at all to go over, but the two little girls are a bit troublesome.” Sha Granny knitted her brows slightly: “You know, the first three valleys are just trials, almost no difficulty, the real test is the back of the level. The first three levels are orderly, that is, no matter how it changes, it is within the control of one’s own body, but not in the later levels, that is completely disorderly, even if the most powerful people, if they violate some laws, will certainly 0die. For example, in the fourth level of the valley of desire, that is a test of the heart of the desire level, if you can not grasp, you will fall forever in it to become a part of, or soul annihilation, disappear forever. There, one must conform to the laws of that level in order to pass, and without reaching the will of the Supreme Realm, I do not recommend that the two young girls experience the fourth level with you, let alone the more difficult levels that follow.”

“Thank you very much, senior, your mention is a blessing for us juniors.” Princess Qian Qian hurriedly thanked her with a salute.

“Can you tell us more about the future levels, that even if we are not qualified to break the levels for the time being, we would like to know more about it so that we can prepare in advance when we break the levels someday in the future.” Xue Wu Xia also asked for advice with an open mind.

“Sand Valley is as I just said, very difficult, where any desire of anyone will be doubly magnified. Of course the environment and the law will also affect, in short, a very difficult level, only a handful of martial artists can pass. After the fourth level, the most frightening is that in the back there will no longer exist like us town guards, completely cruel and merciless law role, once offended, enter the martial artist will be completely finished, no one can save …… little boy, you have to seriously think clearly, whether the challenge, whether you can control their desires, if you do not have absolute certainty, then it is a road of no return!” Sha granny seriously warned to Yue Yang.

“Thank you, I will think about it.” For such a cruel break-in, Yue Yang certainly would not be rash and careless.

Now he is no longer alone.

Behind, there are Si Niang, Bing Er, Yinan, Luo Hua, Tian Luo …… , and even, also carries the hope of the dragon continent and the Tong Tian Tower.

Yue Yang also knew that he absolutely could not afford to make any mistakes, so he had to make careful consideration instead of recklessly challenging in the face of a super difficult challenge. If he hadn’t elevated to the realm of Innate Supreme, Yue Yang wouldn’t necessarily go to challenge the Lust Valley that Sha Granny had solemnly warned him about, but now he was more certain than before.

He made a secret decision to return to the heavenly staircase first.

After discussing with everyone, he would return alone and take on the challenge alone.

Sha Granny did not have more persuasion, and then the information behind it: “more difficult than the Lust Valley, is the fifth level of the Valley of the Beasts, where any martial artist in the case of not being able to use their own power, must cultivate a primitive war beast, from weak to strong, if the cultivated war beast dies, then the challenger will be punished by the law, the war beast died more than three times, the challenger Will be punished by the law, directly into a war beast …… If the transformation of this war beast is still dead, then the challenger will be annihilated forever. It is worth noting that if not enough war beasts are cultivated to leave the Valley of Beasts, then the challenger will also be trapped inside the Valley of Beasts for life and become a part of it.”

“The sixth level is the extremely difficult Demon Valley, the challenger can choose to be the light camp that subdues all demons, or the dark camp that slaughters angels, both sides must complete different camp goals within a fixed period of time. The most frightening thing about the Magic Valley is that no matter how many challengers enter, whether they survive at the end or not, only the challengers from the victor’s side of the camp can pass, and the losers, will stay in the Magic Valley forever and never escape.” When Sha Granny spoke of the Demon’s Valley, her expression all revealed a kind of fear, obviously leaving an indelible psychological shadow from the challenges she had once faced.

“In that case, won’t there be many failed challengers left in the Demon Valley?” Xue Wu Xia suddenly thought of this point.

“That’s right.” Granny Sha held up one finger: “Inside the Demon Valley, more than one tenth of them are challengers.”

“Scared?” Yue Yang’s classmates were stunned.

Feel a tingling in your scalp.

Surprisingly, there are so many challengers trapped in the Demon’s Valley, not to mention the strength of the challengers who can pass the fourth level of the Lust Valley and and the fifth level of the Beast Valley, only one tenth of the total number of challengers that huge number, you can know how perverse the difficulty of this sixth level.

Princess Qian Qian suppressed her shock and asked after her, “Senior, can you tell us more about the information after the seventh level?”

chapters.title: Chapter 815.2 - Head-Scratching Intel
chapters.body:
Chapter 815.2 - Head-Scratching Intel

Chapter 815.2 [ Head-Scratching Intel ]

Sha Granny shook her head: “I also have not entered the seventh level ‘valley of life’, it is said that there than the sixth level ‘magic valley’ is countless times more difficult, I really do not have the confidence to challenge. There, the fastest person to pass is Fei Wen Li, that little girl, it seems to take half a year to fully pass there…. Many successfully passed the seventh level of strong people, a lifetime trapped in the seventh level of the Valley of Life, never getting out. Little boy, you have to think clearly, even if you pass the seventh level, it is not possible to leave smoothly, in the seventh level to the ninth level, there are too many restrictions…. I’m sorry, in addition to a small amount of information on the seventh level, there is no more useful information to you, because I know nothing about the eighth and ninth levels of intelligence. Of course, after the seventh level, for you now, or quite a distant thing, you guys first think about how to pass the Lust Valley and the Beast Valley!”

Yue Yang nodded and gave his thanks again.

For the information of the eighth and ninth levels, Yue Yang also does not expect that Granny Sha can have a lot of good news.

With Her Majesty Queen Fei Wen Li who had passed the ninth level, Yue Yang believed that what she knew. She would definitely know better than Granny Sha, moreover, with her perspective and methods, she might be able to enlighten Yue Yang in a different way.

When we return to the ladder, we must find a way to find time to meet Empress Fei Wen Li.

She is the one who knows the most secrets.

To say goodbye to the Sha granny, Yue Yang suddenly remembered the mirror of pain.

He turned it out and asked Granny Sha for help to see the origin of this thing. Who did not know that the knowledgeable Granny Sha looked at it and also shook her head, indicating that she could not see the secret of this thing. However, for Yue Yang this move caused her amazement, with a little tentative question: “You went to the Earth Demon Palace? I remember this mirror of pain, is that four big clans of the Dugu Chang Feng’s treasure, right …… back then, Dugu Chang Feng that child insisted on going to challenge the Earth Demon, and later never returned, he has died?”

Yue Yang shook his head: “He did not die, turned into an ice sculpture, this thing I picked up in the Earth Demon Palace.”

This kid found out that Granny Sha didn’t know that he had finished off the Earth Demon, so he casually told a lie. This is good, to save wasting breath explaining how the power to kill the Earth Demon dweller came about, in case she sees something broken, it would be bad.

The Sha granny also did not think that Yue Yang, a little guy who had just climbed to the Supreme Ascendant, would be able to finish off a big bull like the Earth Demon.

In her eyes, this kid is already perverted enough, or a small bean sprouts like age already an Innate Supreme, and far better than other Innate Supremes, a kind of divine consciousness first divine personality gradually appears in the perfect supreme realm. Although Yue Yang’s current rank is not high, as a senior, she really does not dare to take it lightly. According to this potential, Yue Yang’s future to reach above the divine supreme is an ironclad thing, unless it dies halfway…. She did not expect Yue Yang has taken out the Earth Demon dweller, but it is estimated that he retreated with his whole body under the attack of the Earth Demon dweller, and may also take some small advantage, such as this mirror of pain is his trophy.

“The four great clans of the heavenly realm, and our Tong Tian Tower still have some relations, forget it, since he is not dead, you do not need to bother to save him, let that proud child suffer a little more lesson is good. I can’t see the thing, I just feel a bit odd, better not to use it.” As expected of an old demon who has lived for tens of thousands of years, Sha Granny could see at a glance that something was wrong.

“We will be careful.” Yue Yang resealed the mirror of pain into the Demon Subduing Tower and was about to leave when suddenly Granny Sha called out to the trio.

“You guys seem to be pretty strong, can you help me get a ‘mermaid’s tear’? With it, I may be able to conceal the punishment of the law for a very short time and can take a painful bath. At least, I can soak my feet, wash my hands, wipe my face, and so on.” Sha Granny made this request.

“Do your best.” Yue Yang looks quite poor, just standing at the water’s edge for 10,000 years without bathing, which is also hard to bear.

But he didn’t dare to finish his words.

Mermaid tears are not easy to find, otherwise Sha Granny also does not have to stand here for a million years to look forward to!

Granny Sha doesn’t know the secret of the Mirror of Pain, maybe Empress Fei Wen Li does.

Yue Yang at this time more eager to see Empress Fei Wen Li’s mind.

Before taking the two women, Xue Wu Xia and Princess Qian Qian, out of the trial place and using the three realms compass, to return to the heavenly staircase, Yue Yang first teleported back to the second level of Wind Valley. The battle between Lord Ling Yun, Tu Hai and the others had already ended.

A tough win.

Tu Hai’s right arm was broken, and his right leg was lost at the knee, leaving only ‘half a man’.

Lord Ling Yun and others were all wounded, seeing Yue Yang’s return, Lord Ling Yun secretly covered the chest …… there is a front and back through the blood hole, if Lord Ling Yun was not strong enough, it was tough to survive, he would have died.

Yue Yang could understand them, even with the strength of six people, it was not an easy task to defeat the two divine temple elders in that kind of disadvantageous environment of location.

However, what surprised Yue Yang was that Lord Ling Yun and the six of them, did not choose to kill.

Instead, the two elders, Red Crane and Red Peak, were forcibly captured.

Because of this, the six of them paid such a heavy price

Seeing the painful appearance of Red Crane and Red Peak who were dying of wounds, Yue Yang could imagine how intense the previous battle was. Yue Yang threw the two pantheon elders into the Demon Tower and sealed them, and then gave each of the Lord Ling Yun a top grade Martial Spirit Pill: “Well done! However, this is just the beginning, to shake the Central Palace Hall, these two divine Hall Elders are just the tip of the iceberg. By the way, you guys don’t go out for now, there are no dead soldiers from the divine Hall entering the third level at all, I guess they have all left and are waiting outside!”

Lord Ling Yun they listened, face slightly gloomy: “Eight Desolations, Snow Plan and Battle Song three major teams seem to be fierce ……”

This possibility, they have long guessed, just before the ears do not want to think more.

Now hear Yue Yang’s warning.

The heart is quite sad.

“If you are worried about the reprisals of the dead soldiers of the divine Hall, you can go to the Earth Demon Palace, the map is here, they should not think where you will go!” Before Yue Yang had finished speaking, Lord Ling Yun and the others had already shaken and shrieked, “In that case, you have **panned the Earth Demon Palace?”

“You guys will know when you go and see!” Yue Yang smiled daintily and turned around to leave, leaving behind the shocked jaw-dropping like puppets, such as Lord Ling Yun and six others.

chapters.title: Chapter 816.1 - The Perfect Realm Of Innate Supremacy
chapters.body:
Chapter 816.1 - The Perfect Realm Of Innate Supremacy

Chapter 816.1 [ The Perfect Realm of Innate Supremacy ]

The fifth floor of the sky ladder.

Even the strongest can not stand the heavenly punishment, exhausted leaning against the stone and sitting.

A hundred meters around him, Dragon Emperor, Hades Emperor, Balut, Hashin and other Tongtian Tower powerhouses lay sprawled on the ground, no longer caring about their image under fatigue. In Demonic Palace Sky Wrath, Sky Crime, Sky Fury, Sky Assassinate, Sky Sword and others also tired like a dog lying on the ground, painting uncertainty, only Sky Calamity that Little Ni is smart enough, early on begged Yue Yang to take her into the heavenly staircase inside to find Sky Crime together to cultivate, did not participate in this battle. Although her strength, to catch up with the sudden progress of the Phoenix Fairy beauty have enough difficulties, however, her own self-cultivation in the following five thousand steps should not be a big problem.

Dragon Turtle Elder and Nangong Elder also came, if not for the two of them to help, heavenly punishment they want to kill the temple elders estimated that it will take some effort.

In this over-ranking challenge, no one can remember how much time was spent in this battle.

The entire super power of the Tongtian Tower came out in unison.

Battle to the sun and moon.

Exhausted from the battle.

This, only just to take out a heavenly level five of the temple elders …… if this temple elders a little stronger, or before that, no Yue Yang heavy setback his morale, it is estimated that the results will be completely different.

“It’s too terrifying, so there is no law restriction, the heavenly rank 5 is surprisingly powerful to that extent!” Barut Demon King was still scared to death.

“How did that kid capture the divine hall elder all by himself?” The Dragon Emperor could no longer imagine Yue Yang’s strength.

“He’s a pervert himself!” The Underworld Emperor could not explain.
