Regardless of the price value of the Tears of the Mermaid, Yue Yang first set a price of 100,000 gold, hoping that any insiders would be moved by the gesture and let him know of some information.

“Dear son-in-law, are you looking for the Tears of the Mermaid?” Eastern Sky King suddenly ran over to Yue Yang.

“Ah? Do you have any?” Yue Yang was overjoyed when he heard it.

“I don’t have it; that thing is worn by women. How could a Master such as me want that kind of object!” The Eastern Sky King denied.

“The problem is that I need this treasure that the ladies like to get on with a business exchange.” Yue Yang saw that the Eastern Sky King did not have it and planned to find an excuse to dismiss him, so as to not to be dragged along for a drink. Now Yue Yang is not in the mood to drink; on one hand he was thinking about the Godly Grimoire and on the other hand, he was conserving energy and was about to visit Empress Fei Wen Li. Now he was worried about the Tears of the Mermaid so he didn’t have time to pay attention to the Eastern Sky King.

“You can’t solve the problem by keeping a straight face all day!” The Eastern Sky King realised that Yue Yang was not in a good mood, so he did not force him to drink. But before leaving, he leaned close to Yue Yang’s ear and said something secretly, “You can try asking His Majesty, but you must never say that I was the one who told you about this.”

“Of course.” Yue Yang was happy.

He patted his chest to make a promise for the Eastern Sky King.

In fact, if Yue Yang really had to be criticized by Tian Luo Emperor Hua Xu Ri for this matter, it would be strange if he wouldn’t expose him. As the saying goes, a dead fellow does not die in a poor way[1]. Besides, it wouldn’t be the first time the Eastern Sky King was punished for making mistakes. Anyway, he was rather incapable of shame and couldn’t care less. The Eastern Sky King was shameless to the point that even the poor mercenaries who drink bad wine and brag in the Tavern of the Soaring Dragon Continent know about him.

TL Note [1]: It is a commonly used Chinese idiom. It means that you can sacrifice someone or sell out someone just to save yourself.

The Eastern Sky King patted Yue Yang on the shoulder and took the ‘Martial Pill’ that Yue Yang quietly handed over.

The informant had a Martial Pill to take, there was no reason not to accept it.

“My good son-in-law, I’m leaving now. As for whatever you want to find, don’t post tasks— it’s too troublesome, just ask me directly. Who am I? I was the secret excavator whose name roared throughout the entire Tong Tian Tower back then!” The Eastern Sky King felt that he could completely ace his role of being a ‘private detective’.

“…” Yue Yang was embarrassed.

Fortunately, the guy’s daughter was nothing like him!

Having said that, if Tian Luo Emperor Hua Xu Ri was really a man, then how could he have the Tears of the Mermaid?

And hypothetically if there were the Tears of the Mermaid, how could it be kept such a discreet secret? To the point where even the Eastern Sky King would remain secretive?

Student Yue Yang felt that this curiosity could simply kill the cat. The Dream Jade last time, the Tears of the Mermaid this time; how many unknown treasures are there in the Tian Luo Treasury?

As soon as the Eastern Sky King left, Yue Yang immediately went to see His Majesty, the Tian Luo Emperor Hua Xu Ri.

The reason was the same as last time. His Majesty was slightly ill and unable to meet guests.

The court lady carefully asked Yue Yang’s intentions, expressing that she would be the one transferring them to meet His Majesty. As for the outcome of the matter, His Majesty would decide.

His visit this time was not the same as last. Previously, Drunken Cat Big Sis brought her Dream Jade, but this time he was summoned. Although separated by the palace gates, Yue Yang somehow approached within ten meters of His Majesty this time and there was still the kind of majestic aura that signified him being at the top for a long time. Even if Yue Yang already possessed the Supreme Will, he could clearly sense it. Since Yue Yang was a junior himself, coupled with the fact that His Majesty had been taking care of Si-niang and Shuang Er, and was also considered an elder to Luo Hua and the other women. Student Yue Yang naturally and obediently bowed down, pretending to put on the act of being a good boy.

Tian Luo Emperor Hua Xu Ri’s voice was very angry: “Who told you that?!”

Student Yue Yang didn’t even hesitate for a second and just sold out the old man, “Your Majesty, it was the Eastern Sky King.”

“That fellow must be a busybody. If he was neither drunk or dying, he’d be spewing nonsense to the juniors!” Tian Luo Emperor Hua Xu Ri was very angry. He cursed and his raging attitude was so severe that even Yue Yang was startled. He estimated that the Eastern Sky King’s life in the next few days would be less than comfortable. However, the moment the Eastern Sky King informed him, he must have also known about the consequences. Perhaps he had already escaped and will definitely not come back until His Majesty calmed down his anger. At any rate, it wouldn’t be good news for the Eastern Sky King to run to Jun Wu You for a drink and some food.

“He was very wrong, I also criticized him just now.” Yue Yang tried hard to portray that he was a good boy.

“Spare me your tricks!” It was a pity that His Majesty could see through who he was.

“Yes, I am also very wrong!” Student Yue Yang was as shameless as the Eastern Sky King.

“The Tears of the Mermaid was not a rare thing either; it would be fine to just give it to you. It’s just your sneaky little actions that really infuriates me!” Although His Majesty Tian Luo Emperor Hua Xu Ri said so, it seems that he felt distressed to give out the Tears of the Mermaid. Before handing over his beloved treasure, he fervently scolded Yue Yang. After a small pause, he said, “For some reason, if you may need to do something for me in the future…”

“This child is at your beck and call.” Yue Yang patted his chest, expressing his 24-hour service.

“Stop smiling cheekily, that is a very serious matter. From now on, you are forbidden to be disrespectful in front of the Emperor!” His Majesty seemed to be very angry with Yue Yang’s current attitude, especially expressing a severe criticism towards his smile.

“Yes, may I know what Your Majesty would like me to do?” Student Yue Yang secretly guessed maliciously. It couldn’t be that as there was no one in his harem and he felt lonely, he needs me to warm his bed? Of course, he only dared to think of this kind of obscenity in his heart and he dared not show even a trace of it on the surface. Otherwise, it would be quite possible for His Majesty to tear him up. In any case, the dignity of His Majesty must be maintained.

“I’ll talk about it later; you are forbidden to mention it to anyone. This matter has not been decided yet, and it is an extremely troubling issue… Forget it, just go back first. As for the Tears of the Mermaid, I will have someone bring it to you!” Before Yue Yang left, His Majesty also warned, “You should stop your cranky thoughts, and it is even more forbidden to have a third party know about the conversation we had today. If you let Wu Xia and the others know, this Emperor will cut off your tongue!”

“Don’t worry, this child is always secretive and I hardly talk amidst my dreams. Even if I do sleep talk, it is all nothing but beautiful women. The secret discussion today is absolutely safe with me!” Student Yue Yang was going to set himself up with the title of being the most secretive person in the Tong Tian Tower.

“Who doesn’t know about your behaviour, just get out!” His Majesty demanded.

Yue Yang smiled and left according to the Emperor’s wishes.

Although he was only across the palace gates, he didn’t see His Majesty’s true face nor did he smell any special fragrance.

However, after being promoted to the Innate Supreme and experiencing Zhi Zun’s Divine Realm, his insight skills were completely different from before. For the things that he needed to see previously, he could now feel more clearly than simply ‘looking’. Although the current Divine Vision had not yet reached the highest level, it was already very close to the peak level of the “God Eye Realm”. His Majesty’s appearance could not be seen clearly at the gate of the palace, but at the very least, Yue Yang could ‘see’ a bit.

Of course, the clever student Yue Yang pretended that he couldn’t see it. It was very important to maintain the dignity of His Majesty.

It wasn’t the Night Empress… Yue Yang came to a conclusion.

He had been skeptical, but now he finally denied the speculation. The Night Empress was the Night Empress; and His Majesty was His Majesty, although some aspects were similar…At night, the court lady sent a brocade box. He opened it and it was filled with the colorful glitter of the Tears of the Mermaid. Yue Yang’s nose twitched slightly, and he seemed to be able to smell a long-lasting fragrance in the air that was connected to the treasure. After thanking the court lady, Yue Yang hurriedly caught up to the Land of Trials in the Western Heaven Realm, sneaking through the encirclement of the dead warriors in the Central Palace. He re-entered the Land of Trials, moving forward to the third trial in Sha Valley, to find Grandmother Sha and fulfilled her wish.

Grandmother Sha wore the pearl, the Tears of the Mermaid flashed with brilliance on her body.

Although she still couldn’t leave the pool water, it was not a problem to wash her face, hands and feet by condensing water of her own.

This was just the beginning. With Grandmother Sha’s proficient use of energy and the ability of the Tears of the Mermaid, her wish to take a bath was estimated to be realized in a short time.

Grandmother Sha wept with joy.

Although she didn’t give a reward to student Yue Yang, she tried to remember and pointed out the location of an ancient rune to Yue Yang, “If no one had destroyed it, it should still be there. The ancient rune will not disappear with the passage of time— it has existed for an unimaginably long time. By the way, I remembered one thing. Back then, when Fairy Qi Luo fought against True Lord Blazing Fire, the two fell and were buried in Sword Valley. Since then, there was no more news, it should be because they had returned to the afterlife… You can try searching, maybe you can find something of theirs that they left behind… I’m sorry, Little Yue Yang. Because I’m too old and I’m just too happy today, I can’t remember more of the past at the moment. Perhaps if you come again next time, I’ll see what other memories could be useful to you!”

“Thank you, Grandmother Sha Luo Man. The news of ancient runes had already been the biggest guide and for that, this child is grateful.” Yue Yang’s words were sincere. The value of ancient runes was indeed an existence whose value cannot be matched by any other treasure. Especially for the current Yue Yang, what he needed most was to integrate more ancient runes.

chapters.title: Chapter 823 - Southern Heaven Realm, Yue Yang’S Aspirations
chapters.body:
Chapter 823 - Southern Heaven Realm, Yue Yang’S Aspirations

Chapter 823: Southern Heaven Realm, Yue Yang’s Aspirations

Yue Yang returned to the Soaring Dragon Continent and rushed to the place specified by Grandmother Sha in a dazed state.

The vicissitudes of life.

With the passing of tens of thousands of years, the place where the ancient runes once stood was now completely different from Grandmother Sha’s memory. There, it used to be a valley full of birds and flowers. Now, not only was the valley buried under a layer of dust as it becomes history, but on the top of the landform, there was also a mountain that was two-kilometers high. After careful inspection, Yue Yang came to the simple and final conclusion: the location of the ancient runes was at the very least under a thousand meters of thick soil.

Without making a passage through the layer of a thousand-meter thick soil, it doesn’t no matter how strong Yue Yang’s induction was, it would be of no help.

He returned to Da Xia to find Jun Wu You, asking him for help.

“This is a trivial matter. Our Soaring Dragon Continent has a scarcity for everything, but the one thing we have no shortage of is manpower!” Jun Wu You was ecstatic when he heard the news, and waved at Yue Yang to not worry: “Even if you don’t want to trouble others, I know a few old guys whose strength are not ranked, but they all have special skills. For example, one of them has a beast which is a mountain earthworm. It will not be a big problem to create a passage of several kilometers in the area you specified. At most, it will only take more time. According to the speed of its tunnel-digging process for our palace last time, it will be over within a month.”

“This is great. If it only takes one month, then I will be able to merge in time and then go to the Land of Trials to break through.” Yue Yang knew that Jun Wu You would have his ways.

“How is Qian Qian?” Jun Wu You pretended to ask..

“Recently, she has made great progress. She has broken through the limit and is ready to fully integrate with the Prison Emperor Divine Sword… Recently, she has devoted herself to cultivating and even my very existence was ignored.” Yue Yang quickly placed himself in the same perspective with him, lest this old man felt jealous and formed an opinion that women are hard to keep inside the house [1].

TL note: [1] this phrase is used normally by parents to describe the inevitable fate of their daughters growing up and marrying off, becoming not easy to ‘keep her at home’. It’s used in a sort of somewhat sarcastically insulting manner by the elderly towards women, so yea, don’t use it.

“Good!” When Jun Wu You heard this, he felt much more relieved.

He also knew that the Prison Emperor Divine Sword actually recognized Yue Yang, but the blood bond of the Prison Emperor was held by his daughter.

If his daughter could eliminate the Prison Emperor’s remaining consciousness of protection, take over and integrate the sword of the Prison Emperor in an all-rounded way to turn this artifact into hers and hers only, it will undoubtedly be an immeasurable achievement for her cultivation. In a short time, that girl had already gained such strength and realm; it would have been strange if Jun Wu You was not proud of her. Among the descendants of the entire Tong Tian Tower, Yue Yang was too odd so he doesn’t give comments about him. But apart from the child Xue Wu Xia, who else could be compared with his precious daughter?

As he was leaving the Da Xia Palace, someone appeared.

Yue Yang smiled.

It was the Eastern Sky King who fled to the Da Xia Palace to take refuge!

The Eastern Sky King first looked around. Finding out there was no one, he grabbed Yue Yang by the collar of his shirt: “You brat, you dare to expose this old man? You really don’t aspire to live any longer, do you?”

Yue Yang looked helpless: “It’s not like you’re unaware of who His Majesty is. If I didn’t say it at the time, I might have not been able to keep my life. Besides, His Majesty was not really angry. If you go back and apologize in a few days, His Majesty will definitely forgive you.”

When the Eastern Sky King heard this, his large head looked like a rattle drum: “I won’t go back. I won’t go back for half a year at the very least.”

After that, he patted Yue Yang on the shoulder again: “I know you must be unable to stand it before speaking out. It’s no fault of yours— no one can resist that thunderous anger. By the way, you have been walking around lately, why don’t you bring Xiao Luo Hua? Cultivating is important, but it’s not good for young couples to stray too much from each other, which can affect the relationship between husband and wife. If you have nothing particularly important to attend to, just take her along with you! Besides, with her skills, she won’t cause any trouble for you. In fact, she can definitely help you out slightly… Both of you should work hard, and it would be for the best to have a fair and plump little grandson for me next year so that Jun Wu You can die from jealousy!”

Having said so much, he mainly wanted to suppress Jun Wu You.

Yue Yang couldn’t help but laugh secretly.

Of course, the Eastern Sky King’s heart of protecting his own children was no less than Jun Wu You, perhaps even worse. After seeing Jun Wu You meet up with Yue Yang, he feared that Yue Yang would accompany Princess Qian Qian and neglect his own darling daughter. Hence, he rushed over to knock some sense into student Yue Yang.

After responding one by one, Yue Yang in fact did not make empty promises; he really returned to the Heaven Stairway World Tree and brought out City Mistress Luo Hua.

City Mistress Luo Hua was very surprised, but on the surface she declined: “Treasure hunting? But I still have to practice cultivating, otherwise I will be left behind. You should find Yi Nan, Bing Er and the others to go with you!”

Yue Yang embraced the scented beauty in the brocade and was going to plant a kiss on her plump, red lips: “A certain city lord has performed well recently, wouldn’t that be worth rewarding?”

When Luo Hua saw that Yue Yu was not far away, she quickly avoided his kiss.

She used her hands to obscure the frivolity of her flushed face.

No matter how boldly she could serve this bad man at night, during broad daylight in front of others, she still had a small part of her reputation she needed to maintain.

It wasn’t until she waved her hand to bid farewell to Yue Yu and the Sickly Beauty, leaving the Heaven Stairway World Tree that she regained her lively personality. Suddenly she jumped on the back of Yue Yang, her arms embracing his neck affectionately. First, she gave him a sweet kiss and then whispered words with a breath of fragrance by his ear: “No, why are you so kind to this city lord suddenly. You did something wrong, didn’t you? Admit it truthfully and I’ll be lenient with it!”

Yue Yang held her small, fragrant butt with both hands, lifting her up a bit, trying to make her lay more comfortably.

Being the indecent man he is, he responded with a smile: “The beautiful and suspicious city lord, if this continues, this Captain of the Guard will have to resign.”

“Resigning is not an option, you must repent with death!” Luo Hua City Lord made him amused. In their world with only the two of them, she was completely restored to her true colors— unrestrained, smiling boldly and freely. She shrugged her fragrant-scented shoulders and was especially happy.

“Can I die from exhaustion then? The Captain of the Guard is willing to do his best!” Student Yue Yang clawed as he kept making small movements.

“You meanie, all you know is how to bully people all day…” City Master Luo Hua didn’t stop her lover’s movements, but closed her starry eyes with a slight intoxication. Her long nose exhaled gently and when Yue Yang turned his face, she offered herself to him. Her sweetly scented lips kissed him under the setting sun. The sunlight stretched out the two shadows of their frames into one silhouette as they kissed each other for a long time.

Buried Sword Valley was not a valley.

The original site was a city built under the Iron Summit Mountains of the Soaring Dragon Continent. It was named Buried Sword Valley, or also Buried Sword Village, because the first generation rulers were extremely skilled in forging magic weapons. Throughout its glorious history in ancient times, Buried Sword Valley was much larger than the capital.

However, it has long since become an abandoned area of history.

Yue Yang learned a little bit of its historical truth based on incomplete historical records and Grandmother Sha’s narration.

After being passed on for more than 180 generations, the forces of the Buried Sword Valley split. They fought each other, battling against brothers and sisters and fought for hundreds of years. In the end, Fairy Qi Luo’s husband died in battle, and at the price of a tragic victory, the Buried Sword Valley expelled the traitorous clan that was led by True Lord Raging Flame. However, when True Lord Raging Flame regained his strength, he immediately broke his oath of the promise that he swore not to consider the Buried Sword Valley an enemy, forgetting his vows. Using the reason that women should not be allowed to rule the Buried Sword Valley, and even using his identity as a true, pureblood successor of the ancestral bloodline, he led many masters to attack the Buried Sword Valley.

The final result was the confrontation between Fairy Qi Luo and the True Lord Raging Flame, which triggered a Heavenly Tribulation and the entire Buried Sword Village was destroyed. The two fell at the same time, no longer heard of again.

The Iron Summit Mountains then became a place of destruction for a while and no one dared to approach it.

Thousands of years have passed. When the forest trees regenerate, the monsters and beasts will too; Buried Sword Valley had long ceased to exist in this world… “The monsters here are different. Although they are not considered powerful, they are strange and eccentric, as if they were influenced by some unknown force. Also, the plants are the same. I saw dozens of flowers on the road, but none of them were normal.” City Lord Luo Hua and Yue Yang searched the Iron Summit Mountains for a long time, and after doing so carefully, she found many suspicious places.

“They were probably affected by the power of the tribulation. Maybe, there was also some secret energy in the Buried Sword Valley itself!” Yue Yang had the same discovery— the monsters here were not very strong, but they were very different from those in the outside world. Plus, their vitalities were far higher compared to other monsters of the same level.

“Is it possible to use this kind of energy?” City Mistress Luo Hua thought of a question.

“If it works… then the warriors below the Innate level and the war beasts will get a greater elevation; and as for those above the Innate level, that would be hard to say.” Yue Yang felt that he seemed to be catching on to some kind of discovery, but he was still missing something.

“Maybe you can use the plants here to feed the vegetarian war beasts first.” City Mistress Luo Hua proposed a possibility.

“That probably wouldn’t work.” Yue Yang vetoed the suggestion.

“You should have someone dig this place— I always feel that this place was similar to Hai Lan’s Starfall Sea, but the power of its influence is different.” Luo Hua’s unintentional sentence instantly enlightened Yue Yang’s intensely sought-after answer and he understood everything at once. That’s right, this place was very similar to the Starfall Sea. The only difference is that there was not too strong of a negative influence here… Which meant some of the energy in the Buried Sword Valley was still working, not letting the power of Heavenly Tribulation destroy everything as whatever was eliminated was only on the surface.

“No wonder you are the City Lord, you are indeed very smart!” Yue Yang showered praises for the beauty.

“Hmph!” Luo Hua raised her chin triumphantly.

Seeing the prideful expression of the beauty was tempting, a certain transmigrated man couldn’t help it. He grabbed the beauty and tipped her tender body. Bowing down, he gave her a long, suffocating kiss.

Yue Yang didn’t want to tell anyone about the secret of Buried Sword Valley.

Perhaps, once they dug out the Buried Sword Villa from under the ground, there could be incredible treasures…He left the Quintet Seeking Golden Mice there and focused on searching for the information. Yue Yang took Luo Hua and headed to the long-awaited Southern Heaven Realm, Nightless City. Chaos will commence in the Western Heaven Realm, so if the Southern Heaven Realm doesn’t cause any trouble and the Central Palace only needs to fight alone, it would be too easy for them.

Student Yue Yang decided to do something about the Southern Heaven Realm. Even if they couldn’t commence multi-frontal battles, how could he let the Central Palace fight in only two-frontal assaults. If they didn’t make them utterly exhausted, he wouldn’t be able to live up to the name of the transmigrated man.

There was a trio of surrenderers in the Nightless City, as well as Heaven Rankers such as Flying Locusts and Hua Ban. The Emerald Lord was frightened by the forces behind and dared not go forward to provoke, staying seemingly safe.

Within this timeframe, things have been calm.

There was no tax exemption and no wars of all kinds.

Business was booming at its peak.

The duo Bao Gu and Niu Gen were in a high position. All those who came across them would utter the words ‘Master’ in response.

Especially Bao Gu, who used to be a hawker and traveler, was now even more respected by everyone in the city. Even strange merchants who come from other places will admire him when they learn about that day. Of course, whether it is Bao Gu or Niu Gen, they both have their own self-awareness. Once they saw Yue Yang approaching, they immediately flew forward and respectfully greeted him. Their positions and mentality were all righteous and they don’t really think that they have become masters. They felt that it was already an extremely rare chance to be under the wing of the Third Young Master. One should know, the surrender trio, the Flying Locusts , Hua Ban and the others who have the strength of the Heavenly Rank, don’t even have the qualifications to be his slaves!

“I’m very relieved about the way you two handle things, so you don’t need to report to me any longer. When Master Hai is free to come up here, you can report to him again!” Yue Yang gave them a task, which is to contact Bi Lu as soon as possible.

With Yue Yang’s current strength, it was no longer necessary to kill the Emerald Lord.

It’s just that there was King Tuo Ye behind him and King Lionheart. If he could get more information, they might be able to kill the enemy in one go. In this way, he believed that the Southern Heaven Realm will definitely stir some trouble no matter what. As long as Yue Yang continues to fuel the flames and expand the impact of the whole incident, the Central Palace will not be able to ignore it… After all, Yue Yang’s greedy aspirations could only be sated by the Emerald Shire!

chapters.title: Chapter 824 - A Love Letter
chapters.body:
Chapter 824 - A Love Letter

Chapter 824: A Love Letter

Three days later, there was finally news of Bi Lu.

She was not in the Emerald Shire at the moment, but it was said that she had gone to a place called Tai Lun Continent. The secret report mentioned that because of collusion with evil forces, the King of Tai Lun was arrested by the Blood Red Prison Warden Tantai Tu Mie of the Central Palace, where he was then escorted to the Divine Punishment Platform to be executed. Along with King Tai Lun’s nine relatives and friends, they were all brought to the Resentment Prison of the Central Palace and made atonement with torturous penance.

“He was wronged. In the Southern Heaven Realm, even a three-year-old child knows that King Tai Lun is a good person.” Bao Gu sighed.

“Is that so?” Luo Hua’s interest was suddenly piqued.

“Mistress Luo Hua, Bao Gu is indeed correct. I dare not say anything about other kings, but King Tai Lun was definitely a good man. Under King Tai Lun’s sovereign, the people lived and worked in peace and contentment, void of the presence of thieves and burglary. The phenomenon of the weak and the strong— which could be seen everywhere in the Heaven Realm, rarely ever occurred there. Even those powerful beasts who occupied a portion of the continent have signed agreements with King Tai Lun to obey the King to not easily disturb the people…Tai Lun Continent, in the minds of many, simply existed like a dream… The only drawback was that most of the places were located in plateau areas above tens of thousands of meters, where the force of gravity was at the very least ten times stronger than normal. Hence, it was not a place where ordinary people could adapt to. In addition, it was relatively cold. Otherwise, there would have been so many people who would have moved to the land of Tai Lun!” Niu Gen explained in detail.

“So, the fact about King Tai Lun colluding with evil forces and was arrested by the Central Palace— it was wrongfully accused?” Luo Hua asked.

“It must have been an unjust accusation!” Bao Gu and Niu Gen nodded incomparably.

“Then why does the Central Palace want to publicly exterminate such a king who had won the hearts of the people?” Yue Yang felt that things were not that simple. The people in the Central Palace were not fools— without evidence, it would definitely not work to execute King Tai Lun in public.

If there was no evidence, they could have handled it secretly. So why was it an open execution, where people were even invited to spectate?

Since they had the confidence to make it public, it must’ve meant they had some form of evidence in their hands.

Regardless of whether or not the evidence was real.

However, at least one thing was certain. The evidence was definitely more than sufficient to ‘pin’ King Tai Lun as colluding with the evil forces.

Bao Gu and Niu Gen couldn’t answer Yue Yang’s question. They owned smaller positions and had only the most basic judgement abilities. It was too difficult for them to deduce the inner plot of the story like their superior.

Yue Yang waited for a long while before he received another piece of information, which was personally collected by Yue Yang’s number one secret agent, Yan Zao.

Yan Zao had another task. He had no time to rush back to Nightless City to present his reports, but with the help of their unique underground thieves organization, they brought back the information that Yue Yang needed. According to Yan Zao’s intelligence report, King of Tuoye Mo Ye Changqing, the pseudo-Jade Lord Pang Pei along with his strongest underling, Yu Qian Jun, have already traveled to the Tai Lun Continent. The most important thing was that Yan Zao heard the Clown had already taken the Clown Mercenary Group and they were advancing towards the Tai Lun Continent… At present, among the current surrounding ruling monarchs, or the more well-known forces, only the Lionheart King remained at a standstill.

A man’s wealth is his own ruin by causing the greed of others [1].

TL note: [1] Its general meaning is something along the lines of someone seemingly innocent could get in trouble by others’ actions or desires. The actual translation was vague but pretty to the point, ‘The people were not guilty, their fault was from hiding the jade’ etc.

Regarding King Tai Lun’s conviction, Yue Yang guessed that King Tai Lun had some treasures or had discovered some secrets. Therefore the warden of Central Palace had wanted to acquire whatever it was. Since he had refused, this had led to the said outcome..

Or, this secret was always desired by the Central Palace, but for some reason King Tai Lun refused to offer it.

If the Clown, King Tuoye, and the pseudo-Jade Lord did not actively ‘spectate’ the execution of King Tai Lun, then Yue Yang would not be too sure. Looking at the current situation, he felt that there was at least a small possibility of it occurring. Moreover, Yue Yang also speculated that this might involve a treasure which could not be found by only one person. Otherwise, the Central Palace wouldn’t publicly execute King Tai Lun as they would have secretly killed him long ago.

“Let’s take a look as well!” City Mistress Luo Hua felt that whether or not there was treasure involved, this was the best opportunity to stir up trouble in the Southern Heaven Realm.

“If a warden in the Central Palace dies…” Yue Yang’s thoughts were now all over the place. If he could kill the warden named Tantai Tu Mie, then the Central Palace would most definitely be furious. This would probably cause the Southern Heaven Realm to plummet into chaos.

“Third Young Master, it would be a bit difficult to kill Tantai Tu Mie.” Niu Gen was afraid of Yue Yang’s anger so he weakly explained, “The power of Tantai Tu Mie was even known to us and other lower ranks. That Blood Red Prison Warden in particular, was a High Ranker only under the ranks of the three main Palace Masters in the entire Central Palace. He was as famous as the Light Palace Master Zhong Hua. It was said that he possessed an immortal body, and at the same time he owned the sacred weapon, the ‘God-Slaying Blade’. In his hands, King-level Heaven Rankers could be eliminated in a matter of seconds. It would not be the first time he executed a King-level Heaven Rank in the Southern Heaven Realm, and I have never heard of anyone who could escape from his grasp. The two chief executives under his rank, Heavenly Ghost and Heavenly Demon, even possessed strengths as high as Level 6 of the Heaven Rank.”

“How did you know?” Yue Yang asked strangely.

“Once, Captain Wild Bull managed to snatch a rare treasure and was about to take us to celebrate. Who knew that in the middle of the night, the pseudo-lord Pang Pei of the Emerald Shire would quickly grab it and order Captain Wild Bull to return the treasure immediately. It was said that the treasure belonged to a relative of the Heavenly Ghost. The Heavenly Ghost then went to find the Lionheart King, and the king couldn’t reject him. In addition to personally compensating the Heavenly Ghost with a large heap of treasured items, he even had Pang Pei immediately return the treasure stolen by Wild Bull. Later, I heard Captain Wild Bull speak of it once more with a lingering fear. Because we lost our fortune that time, it left a deep impression and remained engraved in my heart.” Niu Gen’s memory was very good and he usually paid attention to collecting important information.

“This is good news.” Yue Yang patted Niu Gen on the shoulder to convey his praise.

Actually, Yue Yang didn’t completely believe this information.

If the Heavenly Ghost and the Heavenly Demon truly only had the strength of the Level 6 Heaven Rank, the Lionheart King would definitely not bow his head.

Except for the possibility of the Lionheart King hiding his strength, there was another possibility— that is, the Heavenly Demon and the Heavenly Ghost were stronger than the rumoured Level 6 Heaven Rank

As for the prison warden Tantai Tu Mie, there was nothing more to say. He ranked only under the three great Palace Masters, he was as famous as the Palace Master Zhong Hua, and in his hands was a sacred artifact—how awesome!

The Heaven Realm was big, yet how many among them had artifacts?

Palace of Light Master Zhong Hua; Yue Yang suspected that it was this person who drove tens of thousands of fallen warriors into the dark world.

Except for Ji Wu Ri, the strongest among the Rankers Yue Yang had seen in the Heaven Realm was Zhong Hua, who was ‘Godlike’ and basking in surging brilliance!

If Tantai Tu Mie was equally as powerful as Zhong Hua, Yue Yang predicted that it would be a bit difficult to handle the Blood Red Prison Warden on his own… However, a living person can’t be killed in one breath [2]; If Yue Yang couldn’t win it alone, he could use the help of others. He could ask for Zhi Zun and the Night Empress’s help when deemed necessary. There was even a chance he could ask help from Ming Yue Guang.

TL note: [2] It means consistency is key or in this case, there is strength in numbers. One doesn’t accomplish a large feat overnight.

At least, it wouldn’t be bad to write a letter to convey his feelings in the relationship.

“I miss you, my beautiful Yue Guang. It is said that the warden of the Central Palace has an artifact, and I am going to use it as one of the betrothal gifts. I wonder if Yue Guang Beauty is willing to help this kid realize his wish? Tai Lun Continent, I’ll be waiting for you. It’s a date!”

Student Yue Yang wrote a love letter in heavenly runes, specially packed it inside a brocade box, went to the Mercenary Guild in person, and sent it to Ming Yue Guang, one of the 3 leaders in the Western Heaven Realm.

He’s written a few letters before, but this time it was a bit different.

This time Yue Yang made it clear that he wanted to cooperate.

For this important letter, he believed that the Mercenary Guild will do their utmost best to deliver the brocade box as soon as possible.

Whether or not Ming Yue Guang will appear in the Tai Lun Continent and work with Yue Yang to kill Tantai Tu Mie, it was not the result that Yue Yang wanted. Moreover, Yue Yang also had a feeling that it would be somewhat impossible to kill Tantai Tu Mie in the Tai Lun Continent. It was absolutely necessary to wait for that guy to completely let down his guard before it would be possible to achieve this.

There was no rush to join forces this time. As long as Ming Yue Guang agrees, they can join forces anytime.

Besides, Yue Yang was unsure of how much power Ming Yue Guang had recovered. How much power could she exert without regaining her peak strength?

“Are you sure she will agree?” Luo Hua City Mistress felt that the boy’s love letter was too short. She doesn’t mention whether there was any actual sincerity in it, yet there were only a few lines. No matter what, shouldn’t there be at least a few cheesy pages, densely packed with tens of thousands of words? Otherwise, how could it move Ming Yue Guang’s heart?

“She is alone and helpless now, without anyone to join forces with. I am giving her charcoal in the snow [3]!” Student Yue Yang claimed that he was a great person.

TL note: [3] pretty straightforward, this phrase means ‘offering help when one needs it the most or when they’re in trouble’.

“I’m not feeling optimistic about this at all!” The words of City Mistress Luo Hua were straightforward and she was not afraid of hurting Yue Yang’s heart.

“If a letter doesn’t do the trick, I’ll write a few more letters. Perseverance is key, I will surely succeed.” Student Yue Yang was deeply impressed by the true meaning of picking up girls, exerting his skills of being absolutely shameless in every way.

“I think that this will only have a counterproductive effect…” City Mistress Luo Hua laughed. If a few letters could get the help of a Heaven Realm Leader, why did the Prison Emperor fight so hard back then? Of course, Yue Yang also had his reasons, how would he know if he didn’t try? He felt that the biggest difference between himself and the Prison Emperor was that he was smarter than the Prison Emperor. Well, technically, he was more shameless!

After obtaining various pieces of information, Yue Yang and City Mistress Luo Hua analyzed the situation.

They thought it was not a trap.

In the end, they decided to go to Tai Lun immediately, reuniting with Bi Lu and Yan Zao, who was inquiring about the news on the Tai Lun Continent to determine the situation, before taking further action.

It was not possible to go directly to the Tai Lun Continent, where the guards of the Central Palace had taken over those. Only those who have a title are deemed worthy of entering Tai Lun Continent. Otherwise if it was researched, the outpost of the Tong Tian Tower, the Nightless City, would easily be found and destroyed by the Central Palace.

One day later.

Before the Teleportation Array formed to the Tai Lun Continent, a luxurious airship came.

The airship was written with ” Raging Flame”, indicating that it was a special vessel for the Raging Flame Bandit Group.

The leader of the Flames who was still cultivating in the Stairway had Yue Yang capture the man, and with the identity of the Bandit Group’s Leader, they showed the soldiers guarding the teleportation array an ‘invitation’. In fact, it was only something they snatched from the hands of a leader halfway on the journey. There was no name on it, only the unique symbol of the Central Palace. The head of the Flames used it as an impersonation and there was no flaw.

Student Yue Yang stood behind Lie Yan, and when she accompanied him, her disguised strength was Level 3 of the Heaven Rank, where she was barely qualified to participate in the Great Slashing Ceremony.

“Hadn’t the Flame Bandit Group disbanded?” A guard murmured a little strangely.

“Forget it, as long as the leader is not dead, it can be rebuilt anytime!” The leader snorted, bored. In the Heaven Realm, there were many bandit groups, but generally only the leader has the actual strength. If the leader does not die and loses all subordinates, it was not a big deal, he just needed to call for more people to join. Not only was the Flame alive, but she also seemed to have had an adventure as her strength was greatly improved. It would take only a word to rebuild the Raging Flame Bandit Group!

“The warden has an order. No one is allowed to carry weapons in front of the torture stage. May the leader pay attention to that.” The guard who was inspecting hurriedly reminded Lie Yan, and at the same time skillfully took the money bag and bribery that Yue Yang handed over. After checking their identities, Lie Yan and Yue Yang left in the airship. Then, he opened the heavy money bag and found that besides the gold coins, there was a gem on the top of the pile. He couldn’t help but rush towards the captain excitedly and cheered: “Captain, the Raging Flame Bandit Group must have made a fortune recently. Do you know how much tip that kid gave us? A whole thousand gold, and even an opal worth three thousand gold!”

“Then what are you waiting for, you don’t need to be on duty anymore. Immediately go find my cousin— have him arrange a good place for the Raging Flame Group. We mustn’t miss the chance for friendship with the strong who are generous!” As soon as the captain heard those words, his entire being immediately energetically stood up.

chapters.title: Chapter 825 - The Worst Fellow
chapters.body:
Chapter 825 - The Worst Fellow

Chapter 825: The Worst Fellow

King Tai Lun was destined to be beheaded at the Divine Punishment Platform ten days later, when the sun would be in the middle of the sky at noon.

Yue Yang learned of the news halfway on his journey towards the continent..

In the Central Palace, prisoners with the most serious crimes would usually be executed at noon.

Because there was a rumor in the Heaven Realm: the souls of those executed at noon could wash their crimes more thoroughly under the fiercely blazing sunlight, which was the best way of atonement.

On the contrary, the Tong Tian Tower had a completely different interpretation regarding that rumour.

The predecessors of the Tong Tian Tower believed that being beheaded at noon was a very cruel form of punishment. This was because the intense sunlight would double the damage to the fragile souls that have just left the body. The souls of ordinary people could easily dissipate and be annihilated when encountering sunlight. Even for the strong, once they are killed, their newly detached souls being exposed to the violent sunlight would cause them harm…The predecessors of the Tong Tian Tower believed that killing at noon was a vicious way of being punished and it shouldn’t be taken lightly unless the offender really deserved it.

After 30 minutes of flying through the skies, the airship of the Raging Flame Bandit Group finally saw their destination.

They arrived at the City of Redemption.

The City of Redemption was located at the bottom of the Soul Recalling Ridge. On the ridge, it was the ‘Divine Punishment Platform’ where King Tai Lun would be executed this time.

In addition to the Raging Flame Bandits, there are at least a dozen other various airships or shuttles outside the city where they remained suspended, waiting for their turn to be dispatched.

“How about we go for a walk!” Luo Hua City Mistress was a little bored and she stretched her seductive waist: “These past few days, we either stayed in the city or remained bored in the airship; it’s too monotonous. Maybe there might be unique flowers and weeds from the Heaven Realm in the City of Redemption. Come on, let’s go down and have a look!”

“Your wish is my command, my City Lord.” Classmate Yue Yang was already being dragged by her, so there was no possibility of rejecting her. Besides, staying in the airship every day was really getting a bit depressing.

“If the Clown Mercenary Group finds out…” Raging Flame was most worried about this problem.

“He won’t do anything, at least not here.” Yue Yang wasn’t so worried about the Clown now. Unless the supporter behind the Clown was the Central Palace, he wouldn’t be able to turn the tides with his strength alone. The scary thing about the Clown was that he knew all sorts of secrets in the Tong Tian Tower and was extremely cunning. In case anyone in the Tong Tian Tower comes in contact with him, things would get a bit tricky.

“Hey, wasn’t it okay to kill casually? Anyway, this is the Heaven Realm. Everything depends on strength here, so we don’t need to be concerned about the Clown. Instead, worrying about the Lionheart King would make more sense.” The City Mistress Luo Hua was now stronger and she had a desire to test her new abilities, eager to challenge the stronger Rankers in the Heaven Realm to see where she currently stood.

“Let’s go!” Lie Yan no longer insisted. Since Yue Yang was here, she would listen to him. Even if Yue Yang was not present, she would also listen to Luo Hua.

She used to think she was pretty smart and could decide everything by herself.

But after she got along with Xue Wu Xia, Princess Qian Qian and the others, she realised that she should just go with the others’ decisions…

After walking for a few hours, City Mistress Luo Hua had obtained a few pots of wonderful flowers from the Heaven Realm. She was so happy and her steps became lively as well.

Yue Yang and Lie Yan, who had been reduced to working hard pitifully, held two potted flowers each and followed behind her… Only now did Yue Yang discover why the Young Master was always followed by servants to run his errands. It turned out that it was really a disadvantage when there was no one to serve you.

Fortunately, a message was released in the Mercenary Guild, and Yan Zao who had arrived in the City of Redemption rushed over.

Seeing Yue Yang holding the flowers, he quickly stepped forward to help him: “I’ll take it, I’ll take it.”

Yue Yang asked for news about Bi Lu, and when he heard that Yan Zao hadn’t found her, he hurriedly sent him to continue searching, the messy pile of information he collected temporarily suppressed. Matters always had to be sorted in order of importance after all. Yan Zao handed back the flowerpot again, rushing towards the Mercenary Guild with a whiff of smoke as Yue Yang estimated that Bi Lu would send someone there to wait. Yue Yang and City Mistress Luo Hua strolled for another half an hour. A riot seemed to be happening in front. They couldn’t help but feel slightly curious.

Jumping into the air, he looked down at the crowd in front.

Ahead of him, the fellow Black Skeleton Group Leader Lei Qie was also there, the only ‘acquaintance’ that Yue Yang recognized.

However, it was not him who was involved in the conflict, but the friend of the skeleton man. That vampire-like fellow also had a pretty good strength, as he was at the Level 3 of the Heaven Rank. He wore a blood-red robe with a special emblem embroidered on it, seeming to come from a big family or a big sect.

The person who was opposing the vampire, was a tauren [1].

TL note: [1] a term in the fantasy world to describe a human with the body of a man and the head of a bull, usually with horns as well. Often can be called a ‘Minotaur’, according to Greek mythology.

With a strength that was similar to that of the vampire.

**His muscles puffed and decorated his upper body, whereas his chest and back were painted with scary tattoos. His nose, ears and lips were pierced with gold rings and nails of different sizes, which made him look terrifying. With such an ugly appearance, if he was placed in the Soaring Dragon Continent, no matter how strong he was, the beauties of the continent probably wouldn’t admire him. That was because the bull’s head was very unattractive, to the point where it could stop children from crying! Even classmate Yue Yang, who was used to seeing the world, was startled when he saw him. He sighed secretly: to have the courage of living like this, his heart was very strong indeed!

The part that made Yue Yang most confused was that beside the tauren stood a fascinating beauty, uncertain if she was from a snake clan or some other race. Her skin had faint traces of scales and was especially slippery. Looking at the opening between her red lips, as if she was hunting , there lingered a particularly cold and weird feeling.

This fascinating snake girl not only used her slender arms to hold the tauren’s stout ones, her long snake tail also curled around the tauren’s thighs with a bit of a seductive vibe.

Yue Yang noticed one thing.

The tip of this coquettish snake girl’s tail resembled the tail of a bee.

“You motherfucker[2], immediately apologise to my girl, otherwise this motherfucker will definitely kill you!” The tauren cursed at the vampire in a dialect.

TL note: [2] The original word is pronounced as ‘Lima’ in the Wuhan dialect, but it doesn’t make sense in English, so I used the closest word to replace it. It literally means “Your mother” but when used, it’s more accurate to perceive it as referring to someone in a downright insulting manner.

P.S Later on ‘Lima’ can also be used as the tauren’s alias, as he probably used that word way too many times, so people just refer to him as that.

“It seems that this guy is a wandering bandit from the Southern Heaven Realm, ‘Lima’. I’ve heard of this name. He is a cruel guy, but I didn’t know he was a tauren.” Lie Yan explained to Yue Yang. Besides the bandit group , there were many other robbers. There are those who didn’t want to manage a large group of people and preferred to do things alone would usually sneak attacks on small vendors for profit. They are known as ‘Wandering Bandits’. Of course, most of them were self-proclaimed ‘Wanderers’, and only a handful of vicious guys who were truly evil with notoriety will claim to be Wandering Bandits, such as the tauren ‘Lima’.

“Hahaha, and here I thought it was someone important, yet it just turned out to be ‘Lima’, the brainless bug.” The vampire laughed loudly.

“I am not ‘Lima’, I am the famous Wandering Bandit Hei Yan.” ‘Lima’ was just a nickname given to the tauren from the outside world, because there were so many people he addressed as ‘Lima’, yet no one knew his real name.

“Let’s duel, we’ll bet your girl!” The vampire stretched out his pale hand and put it under the tip of his nose, sniffing it lightly: “When I touched it just now, I found that it felt pretty good. There was also a tinge of pungency, it seems that her skills in bed must be very good… ‘Lima’, I want your girl. If you don’t want me to make you find your teeth on the floor, just get out of here. Don’t bother having such beauty to yourself if you don’t have the ability to.”

“You’re asking for death! I’ll fucking beat you up!” The tauren was furious. Waving his palms like an axe, it caused a strong shock wave to form and he slammed the force at the vampire.

“Small tricks of a bug.” The vampire dodged easily, sneering amusedly.

Yue Yang was bored. This kind of battle of comparably equal strength, he predicted that there will be no sign of victory or defeat for a few days and nights. The tauren was slightly stronger, whereas the vampire was a bit faster; it would be really difficult to determine who is stronger among the two.

Especially in this City of Redemption, if one dared not use destructive attacks and make small moves only, it was even more improbable to tell who would be the victor at once.

City Mistress Luo Hua didn’t think the match was worth watching either and it was probably better to continue looking for the unique flowers and weeds in the Heaven Realm so she turned to leave with Yue Yang. Lie Yan wanted to watch the decisive battle, but when Yue Yang was leaving, she immediately followed. After walking around the flower market for half an hour in the neighboring street, Yue Yang and Lie Yan had a few more pots to add to the collection. Even City Mistress Luo Hua helped them hold one pot when she saw their hard work.

The three then strolled back happily.

Suddenly, there was a loud boom.

A shadow flew over from a distance like a shooting star.

It was the tauren who fell heavily in front of Yue Yang and Luo Hua. In the sky, Lei Che and the glamorous snake girl have already fought each other. The vampire with a blinded eye fell angrily from the sky, pointing at the tauren grimly: “You dared to sneak an attack on my eye? ‘Lima’, you have really succeeded in angering me. Today will be the day of your death!”

“You can barely protect yourself, yet you still want to talk that much?” The tauren stood up, vomiting blood and sneered again.

“What?” The vampire was stunned.

“From your out-of-control heavy attack just now, the shock wave’s afterglow had hit someone, you know? The redeemed concubine of the City Lord, she was standing upstairs at the time, watching us fight… Do you know why I had to endure your attacks and blinded your eyes? I know that you have a way to recover and I have also heard of your name as a blood-sucking evil demon… The reason I did so was because when you got angry and lost control, you would accidentally injure people who shouldn’t be harmed. Do you know why I stood in that direction? It was to deliberately trick you! Among so many onlookers, only the concubine of the Redemption City Lord was not of Heaven Ranked and only she can be hurt by mistake. Haha, you motherfucker will be wanted by the City Lord now, are you sure you still want to fight with me? Besides, this fellow’s strength is not inferior to you at all. If I wasn’t trying to purposely fool you, what made you think that I would take a heavy blow from you and fly a kilometer away?” The tauren said, making the people around him listen with cold sweat trailing down their backs.

Whoever says that this bull has no brains would be the real idiot.

On the surface, the vampire looked to be full of bad intentions, but who knew that the real cunning one was instead the tauren who looked like he was mentally challenged?

When Lei Qie and the vampire heard it, they fled the scene quickly. Hurting the concubine of the City Lord, the matter could be both big or small. They flew away, deciding to flee as far as possible before any incidents occurred, and did not dare to stay for another second.

A few words scared Lei Qie and the vampire away.

Lie Yan was speechless.

No wonder the tauren Lima, a lone Wandering Bandit, could be in the Southern Heaven Realm. Everyone who saw him was deceived by his appearance.

The tauren looks like a fool, a very stupid one. Who would have thought that his mind was more cunning than anyone else’s.

Yue Yang, Luo Hua and Lie Yan saw the fight had ceased, they were about to leave.

Who knew, the tauren stretched out his hand and stopped them: “Head of Flames, if I remember correctly, you are the wanted Raging Flame Bandit Leader? I wasn’t looking carefully during the quarrel just now, and you left in such a hurry, I almost thought I would never meet you again. Fortunately, you still had the leisure to go shopping, otherwise, I couldn’t have found out that you were still here…Although it hurt to get a punch from that guy in vain, I can take this opportunity to catch up with the largely wanted Head of the Flames. This business exchange was not that bad of a loss either!”

Lie Yan’s expression was dark and angry: “Only with your abilities, you want to restrain me?”

The tauren shook his head and waved his hand, the bull’s eyes full of cunning looks: “Of course not. Before I came, I asked my companion to report to the City Lord. If one kills a concubine, the City Lord may not care because he has more than a hundred of them. But if one can catch you, who made the Central Palace declare you a wanted criminal, it would be a great contribution from me to offer you as a gift to Lord Heavenly Ghost and the warden of Tantai before executing the prisoners! I think the City Lord will definitely be moved!”

Yue Yang couldn’t help but stretched out a thumb to the tauren and praised him: “Not bad. Among all the taurens I have ever seen, you are indeed the smartest! And also the worst!”

chapters.title: Chapter 826 - Do You Plead Guilty? The Black Trial
chapters.body:
Chapter 826 - Do You Plead Guilty? The Black Trial

Chapter 826: Do You Plead Guilty? The Black Trial

The tauren was startled by Yue Yang’s words.

But he reacted almost instantly: “You said I am the smartest, and I agree with that, but what is your explanation for saying that I am the worst?”

Yue Yang spread out his hands in a flamboyant manner: “If you weren’t terrible enough, you wouldn’t have taken the initiative to have me knock you out! What else is there if you aren’t the worst?” Before he even finished speaking, he sped over in a flash, slapping the tauren with movements as quick as lightning. As soon as the tauren was about to get angry and prepared to fight back, Yue Yang had already slid back in mysterious steps. When the tauren lowered his fist and was going to swear at him, Yue Yang went face-to-face with the tauren again. This time, he used his backhand to slap the tauren’s other cheek.

He did it so well that it seems he was born just to beat people up.

Pa pa pa[1]… the tauren couldn’t speak at all.

TL note:[1] slapping noises.

As soon as he opened his mouth, Yue Yang would slap him back.

If he attacks, Yue Yang will just retreat back to Lie Yan’s side. The tauren was not a fool. He understood that it was impossible to single handedly fight Lie Yan with just his own strength, let alone a super fast kid who was holding him back.He knew he would die a painful death if he tried to go against the pair.

With no way to speak, the tauren suddenly stretched out a thumb to Yue Yang.

What was going on?

Yue Yang was puzzled.

Was this guy a masochist who derived pleasure from being slapped? When Yue Yang thought about it this way, he felt goosebumps all over his body. How abhorrently cold!

“Your speed is very commendable, it was much faster than the vampire just now. Your strength for the slap in the face was also strong, very good.” The tauren praised Yue Yang sincerely, as if he wasn’t the one who was enduring the attacks, but instead as a commentating bystander. After the tauren finished speaking, he paid a deep tribute to the sky as he turned to the side: “Master City Lord and Master Yu Mu, in order to buy time to prevent the criminals from escaping, this face of ‘Lima’ has been brutally attacked. I plead the Master City Lord and Master Yu Mu to seek justice for this ‘Lima!’ “

“A well-deserved beating!” There was a majestic-looking middle-aged man who wore a gorgeous brocade robe. He floated down from the sky, expression furiously enraged: “ ‘Lima’, you sickeningly sinister excuse of a tauren, you deliberately used the concubine of mine as bait and even ignored whether or not she would die. Even this City Lord can’t help but want to beat you up, let alone outsiders!”

Judging from his appearance, he was about to tear apart the tauren.

Fortunately, there was the presence of a Captain of the Guard and a steward. Both of them restraining the City Lord.

Besides, there was also the wanted criminal, the leader of the Raging Flames. The tauren did not want the City Lord to immediately attack him to prevent Lie Yan from taking the opportunity to escape.

The tauren smiled slyly: “Actually the City Lord is not short of women, hence it does not matter if there is one more or one less. Besides, even one can get tired of having the best delicacy if you have it too much [2]. Sometimes, it’s good to have a change of taste. If you don’t blatantly favour only one and treat everyone equally, there will be no need for anger or resentment, hence the City Lord will definitely have a harmonious home. This action of killing several birds with one stone is clearly a blessing for the City Lord, so why bother to be angry.”

TL note: [2] Also pretty direct, it means ‘too much of one thing can make you get sick of it’.

“This seems to make some sense…”

The City Lord was short-tempered, yet his anger dimmed faster than it came. He immediately stopped being angry ,no longer appearing fierce and infuriated.

Yue Yang watched coldly, not expressing any of his opinions.

City Mistress Luo Hua ordered the onlookers to help move the flowers into a shop, as the fight would ruin her treasure collection. Those powerhouses of the Heaven Ranks were actually rather well-known figures in the Southern Heaven Realm, but it seems that Luo Hua had a noble temperament and was full of prestige. She had the unceremonious ability to command others to work as if they were her subordinates, which caused the people to presume she was definitely a High Ranker from the Heaven Realm. In addition, Yue Yang and Lie Yan were both carrying flowers for her, trailing behind her like hard workers, so it was even more daunting and they dared not refuse.

“You guys are idiots. You can’t even move potted plants properly, yet you claim to be some kind of Heaven Ranker!”

“Put it down slowly. If any of you damage my flowers, I will cut off your hands!”

“Is it that difficult to handle them with care?”

City Mistress Luo Hua ordered those hapless guys to work endlessly and even criticized them severely. This made them panic, lest they offend this arrogant girl of the Heaven Rank.

The onlookers, including the Redemption City Lord who had the strength of the peak Level 5 Heaven Rank, did not dare to go against Luo Hua, let alone the workers.

Beside the Redemption City Lord, there was another person who was deathly pale and his whole being was thin as if he was machinery.

In his hand, he held a black scale that was enveloped in weird energy.

While Luo Hua ordered the people to move the flowering pots, Lie Yan and Yue Yang confronted the Redemption City Lord and the tauren. The robot-like guy raised the black scale and pointed it at the tauren. Then, he placed a silver feather on the scale on the left and asked: “Tauren ‘Lima’, do you admit to your actions of fraudery?”

“I plead guilty.” The tauren replied respectfully.

Under the command of the Heavenly Ghost execution officer were the two punishment elders, Yu Mu and Nan Xuan.

Yu Mu was in charge of tracking and capturing the offenders, whereas the other was in charge of interrogations.

Upon that black scale, it was useless for anyone to deny their crimes. This is because according to the Laws of the Underworld, all beings in the Heaven Realm except the Gods were all guilty of something, as what differed was only the magnitude of the crime. Moreover, once denied, the questioned individual would be severely punished. The suspect can only hope that their crime was very minor. If that was the case, then the side of the black scale representing fairness will cause the silver feather to fall, proving that the questioned individual’s ‘goodness’ was more than the ‘sins’. Hence, the suspect can be forgiven and redeem themselves.

The tauren answered honestly, acknowledging the fact that he had indeed tricked the vampire into hurting the City Lord’s concubine.

A burst of energy emanated from his body, floating to the right of the black scale.

The brilliance flickered, and the black scale shook slightly. Eventually, the side with the silver feather representing kindness fell down on the left, while the right side, which represented crime, rose up.

Yu Mu nodded without any expression, “Tauren ‘Lima’, you can be forgiven for your crimes. Your nature is kind!”

The tauren was overjoyed and bowed repeatedly.

Yue Yang was dumbfounded.

This guy was even shadier than Judge Wang of the Heaven Court who used common sense to make a verdict on Peng Yu’s case… Is this OK?

The indifferently robot-like Yu Mu then pointed the black scale at the City Mistress Luo Hua: “You are associated with the wanted criminal. Do you admit that you are guilty of being accomplices?”

City Mistress Luo Hua’s beautiful eyes became cold: “So what if I’m guilty?”

She hadn’t finished speaking, but the energy floated up again, descending onto the black scale.

The side with the silver feather representing kindness fell quickly, while the right side representing crime soared high.

Watching this scene unfold, the onlookers and the Redemption City Lord breathed a sigh of relief. Fortunately, things were okay. If she was caught by Yu Mu, that would probably stir up a big commotion!

Yu Mu still remained expressionless with dead eyes and monotonously said, “Although you have the crime of being accomplices, you are extremely kind by nature. You were just being tricked by the wanted criminal hence your soul is just confused. You who have such a light sin, can be forgiven!” The onlookers applauded enthusiastically. If one doesn’t mention crimes or evil deeds, a beauty like this should not be arrested!

Then, Yu Mu asked the leader of Raging Flames: “As a wanted criminal in the Palace, you have committed a heinous crime. Are you now conscious of that and willing to confess to your sin?”

Puh!

This was Lie Yan’s answer.

The energy floated up, and the right side of the scale representing crime fell rapidly, while the left side of the silver feather representing kindness rose high in the air.

It was confirmed; Lie Yan was guilty! She should be arrested… Yu Mu didn’t speak those words aloud, but everyone knew the result.

Yue Yang suddenly raised his hand.

“I also want to participate in this good and evil test.” If student Yue Yang hadn’t raised his hand, everyone would have almost forgotten about him. Yet, there he was, offering himself to be judged.

“You are an accomplice of the wanted criminal, acting as a ghost for a tiger [3]. Do you know that you are guilty?” Yu Mu asked.

TL note: [3] Metaphor for being an accomplice for someone with wicked or evil intentions.

“I don’t know.” Yue Yang shook his head.

“Your sins are serious. You are lost and you don’t know how to return.” After Yu Mu finished speaking, the right side of the black scale in his hand that represented his sin sinks, while the silver feather on the other side representing goodness was lifted high. This proved that Yue Yang was guilty, and he appeared to be in a more serious situation than Lie Yan! The onlookers were a little eager to see how this would play out. No one was unfamiliar with the name of Leader Lie Yan— she was definitely a hard bone to chew, but the strength of this kid is not too high, only at Level 3 of the Heaven Rank. If everyone joins forces to attack, they believe they could capture them in one fell swoop. Of course, to claim the reward from the Lord Yu Mu would still be a secondary priority. The most important thing was to set up a good relationship with the people of the Central Palace like ‘Lima’, the Tauren.

Lie Yan clenched her fists, blatantly showing her attitude.

She would show no mercy to whomever who dared to approach them!

She will definitely resist to the end…The onlookers believed that with the strength of the peak level 5 Heaven Rank of the Leader of Raging Flames combined with the ancient dragon power, except for the Redemption City Lord and the Yu Mu execution elder, everyone else had to stand aside. So, this battle would still be a little more relaxed as to not provoke her easily.

Of course, no one here knew that the Lie Yan had gone to the Tong Tian Tower to cultivate. She had learned to conceal her aura by lowering her realm, otherwise they would have fled in fright long ago. With her arduous cultivation between life and death and the Heaven Stairway, she had already broken through the fifth level of the Heaven Rank, where she was elevated to the sixth level of the Heaven Rank and entered the state of Quasi-innate Supremacy. Later, she made a breakthrough in Yue Yang’s energy field and fully realized the Supreme Realm. Although she has just recently been promoted to a Supreme Innate, the current leader was not a force that a few Heaven Ranked powerhouses could compete with.

She didn’t want to ruin this trip, but how could she allow such a stubborn guy like the tauren to show off in front of her, who had the staunch temperament of flames?

“It looks like a good scale, let me have some fun with it!” Yue Yang’s figure flashed and turned into a stream of light.

He hadn’t finished his sentence yet, but the black scale had already reached his hands.

Everyone was shocked.

Even Yu Mu’s eyes widened.

He hadn’t felt anything at all and he couldn’t understand why the treasure would fall into the opponent’s hands. This treasure was obviously controlled by his own will, so how could it be possible?

Yue Yang deliberately imitated the expression and tone of the elder Yu Mu, raising the black Libra scale in his hand: “Yu Mu, you pretended to be the incarnation of justice, but your intelligence is severely insufficient. You have drunk San Lu[4] too much since you were young, and it caused your brain to become damaged, facial paralysis, and severely affected your appearance. Do you plead guilty?”

TL note: [4] The brand ‘San Lu’ was a famous company that produced baby-formula milk powder. It was found to be contaminated with melamine (a type of chemical to form plastic) which caused a scandal in 2008, and resulted in kidney failures of infants, a few died afterwards but most babies were hospitalised.

The people on the sidelines had their mouths open wide, as if they could stuff a hippopotamus into it.

They’ve seen prideful people before, but this? They’ve never seen anyone like him!

They’ve seen arrogant people as well, but never have they ever seen such arrogance!

This kid…he really was looking to die. Whether he was truly guilty or not, the execution elder Yu Mu will not let him go!

When Luo Hua saw that Yue Yang was being cheeky, she couldn’t help but laugh. She shrugged her shoulders and smiled as if no one else was around, unscrupulously and unusually bold. Unlike ordinary women, her unique hearty laugh did not affect her perception and noble temperament at all, but it made people feel that she had the aura of a real superior. The entire crowd was speechless, only Luo Hua’s light laughter echoing throughout the street for a long time.

Lie Yan originally wanted to make herself appear slightly fierce but she couldn’t do it.

Her lips pressed hard, making an arc.

Had it not been for the imminent war which required her to endure forcefully, she would have probably laughed uncontrollably like Luo Hua.

“You, you are asking for death!” Elder Yu Mu’s expression trembled slightly, but he didn’t have much feeling. He was as still as a rigid rock, and his eyes that were like robots had no emotional fluctuations—they just stared at Yue Yang firmly.

“Wrong answer.” Student Yue Yang didn’t absorb energy to judge crimes like Yu Mu did, but directly pressed down the right side of the black scale with his fingers. This caused the side of the silver feather that was representing kindness to elevate. Student Yue Yang pressed the right side, motioning for everyone to look as he stopped smiling and mimicked the tone of Yu Mu: “This treasure has made the best explanation. Not only do you have a brain disability and facial paralysis, you also have extremely serious crimes, which are extremely heinous. Your sin deserves ten thousand deaths and is unforgivable… As I am very kind and just, I have made a difficult decision. In addition to confiscating your tools of crime, I will also help you cleanse your sins and send you on the road to clarity. In conclusion, you will die early and be reborn!”

Yue Yang had just finished speaking, but the pointer and middle fingers of Yu Mu’s right hand had already pierced his eyelids.

Yu Mu’s attack speed was fast.

None of the onlookers could react.

Even Lie Yan, who has the strength of a Level 6 Heaven Rank and the comprehension of the Supreme Realm, had only managed to turn her head just in time to see the phantom of a shadow.

chapters.title: Chapter 827 - Unimaginable Speed And Identity
chapters.body:
Chapter 827 - Unimaginable Speed And Identity

Chapter 827: Unimaginable Speed and Identity

The figure flashed.

Elder Yu Mu had returned to his original position. His right hand was covered in blood, holding onto two eyeballs.

A smile formed on the corners of the Redemption City Lord’s lips. He knew that Elder Yu Mu had a move called ‘Eye-Catching’. Taking advantage of his super acceleration, the ‘Eye-Catching’ ability could instantly remove the enemy’s eyeballs. The most ingenious part was that the removal was not destructively fatal as its accuracy was a hundred times better than digging the eyeballs out with a knife. A medical Master once said that if the Elder Yu Mu returned the removed eyeballs, there would be a way to reconnect them to the eye sockets of the blinded as if it was never removed in the first place l. But…this kind of occurrence had never happened before.

Because the Elder Yu Mu had never returned the eyeballs.

His crystal eyes remained expressionless as he squeezed the eyeballs until they exploded!

The onlookers took a deep breath. This Yu Mu Execution Elder was indeed very cruel!

“Ah ah ah……” A voice filled with agony and pain resounded throughout the street.

The person crying out was not Yue Yang, but a guard standing next to the Elder Yu Mu. He turned out to be the guard of the City Lord of Redemption, standing on the sidelines with the Captain of the Guard and the steward. At the moment, for some reason, both of his eyeballs were dug out and revealed two blood-filled black holes… The guard suddenly reacted from the shock, unable to bear the excruciating pain as he hid his face with both hands and howled wildly.

When Elder Yu Mu saw it, his pupils quickly dilated.

The Redemption City Lord and the crowd around them portrayed frightened expressions of horror and disbelief as if they had seen the existence of ghosts [1]!

TL note:[1] a metaphor for seeing something unbelievable. But I guess if you live in a wuxia world, there are more unbelievable things than ghosts, so imagine that it is just something that causes you to doubt your eyes.

Student Yue Yang clapped his hands— a rather lonely applause that broke out amidst the painful and miserable howls. It was a particularly ear-piercing sound as every time he clapped, it was as if a hammer had pounded itself onto the people’s hearts.

“If you think that you can dig out my eyes with the speed of a crawling tortoise, then you are sorely mistaken!” Before Yue Yang finished speaking, the pointer and middle fingers of Elder Yu Mu pierced Yue Yang’s eyelids once more. This time, everyone clearly saw that it had pierced the kid’s eyes. The shadow of Elder Yu Mu was too fast to catch onto, but the people could still see his attack clearly.

“!” As soon as Elder Yu Mu returned to his position, he immediately crushed the eyeballs in his hand, not allowing the enemy to feel a trace of regret.

“It hurts, it hurts!” Student Yue Yang hid his face and shouted.

“Hmph.” The City Lord of Redemption City snorted mentally.

If the kid hadn’t been so careless, Elder Yu Mu might not have succeeded in his second attempt of ‘Eye-Catching’.

The previous damage transfer— that should be because this kid had a certain skill that enabled him to transfer his own damage onto others. But what about the second time? Can he still avoid it?

The Redemption City Lord glanced around and found that there were no guards around who had their eyes injured, and the person who hid his face and yelled was none other than the hateful human kid who stood in front of him. He was about to speak, planning to taunt the other party that he deserved it. He hadn’t spoken a word when unexpectedly, there was a guard behind him who screamed frantically: “No, it’s my eyes, those are my eyes! I can’t see, I can’t see!”

The onlookers all looked behind the Redemption City Lord.

There was another guard among the crowd who shook his head in pain. Two terrifyingly bloody holes were left where his eyes should have been.

At this moment, the crowd of onlookers immediately backed several tens of meters away, for fear of becoming the target of Yue Yang’s injury transfer.

Now they understood why this kid was not afraid of attacks.

The reason was that he had a way to transfer the damage to another party, so he dared to challenge the Elder Yu Mu!

“Obliterate.” Elder Yu Mu’s right hand condensed a lump of terrifying energy. Once it was used, even half of the Redemption City was estimated to collapse, let alone the Heaven Rank level 3 users. The onlookers were now beyond terrified; they thought they were going to die. And just when Elder Yu Mu was about to go ballistic… “Wait!” At this moment, the only person who dared to stand up and stop the elder was the tauren, ‘Lima’.

The tauren rushed towards the Redemption City Lord, waving his hands anxiously: “That was not a transfer of damage— the other party uses a faster acceleration. It would be useless to attack with Extermination Power as it would only destroy the city!” With that statement, everyone, including Elder Yu Mu, turned around with puzzled expressions. The tauren swallowed a mouthful of saliva, his fingers trembling slightly as he pointed to Yue Yang: “His ability is not to transfer damage, but to accelerate! I didn’t see it clearly the first time, but I saw it well enough during the second time. Before Elder Yu Mu gouged out his eyes, he flew behind the City Lord and grabbed the guard to act as a shield in front of him. Then, he waited for the Elder Yu Mu to gouge out his eyeballs before putting him back. His speed is beyond imagination!”

The Redemption City Lord was shocked,a chill shot up his body: “What?”

The tauren swallowed vigorously: “ I am definitely correct. Although the speed of Elder Yu Mu is the fastest in the entire Southern Heaven Realm, the speed of the opponent is certainly even faster!”

Elder Yu Mu suddenly turned his face and stared at Yue Yang, looking at him seriously for the first time.

So this kid first flew towards the side, grabbed a guard, then waited for me to dig out his eyeballs, before finally putting the guard back. A series of actions that even deceived my own eyes? How fast did he need to be to complete all this? Elder Yu Mu couldn’t imagine it, and for the first time ever, he found a weak opponent that was very hard to deal with.

The Redemption City Lord was still in denial and he asked the tauren forcefully: “How did you see it?”

The tauren smiled bitterly: “ ‘Lima’ can sense a special shockwave that ordinary human ears cannot hear. Just like the soundwave of a bat, it can spread throughout the entire space and only I can hear it. In this field of area, the echoing waves will tell me what happened as if they were my eyes. But even though I can ‘see’ it, I have no way to stop it. In comparison, I am like a pitiful snail!”

For the third time, the Elder Yu Mu made a move.

This time, he used his fastest speed and threw out a clump of strange, slime-like energy in advance, trapping Yue Yang.
