The pointer and middle fingers of his right hand pointed directly at Yue Yang’s eyes…The people within vicinity watched as they felt like their bodies were being enshrouded with some form of slimy energy, which made them resemble a group of ants that fell into a pool of water— no matter how much they struggled, it remained hopeless as their movements slowed, as if being in slow motion.

In the core area of the slimy energy, the crowd saw Elder Yu Mu, who resembled a swimming fish, moving as fast as lightning.

He appeared in front of Yue Yang as he tried to scoop his eyes with two fingers.

But an odd miracle occurred. The moment he tried to take his eyes, everyone saw the human kid moving faster than Elder Yu Mu.

Compared to him, the lightning fast Elder Yu Mu seemed to be stagnant. Yue Yang moved backwards, avoiding the Eye-Catching technique’s fingers and flew towards the Redemption City Lord. Beside him, he grabbed a guard at will before returning and placing him in front of Elder Yu Mu. Elder Yu Mu saw him too, but he couldn’t stop the inertia of the movement from his hands.

And as the Elder watched himself gouge out the guard’s eyes,he retreated back to his place.The heavily injured guard had already been put back in position before him.

The most terrifying part was because things had occurred too fast, the guard hadn’t realized that his eyes had been gouged out.

Until the Elder Yu Mu grasped the two eyeballs with his fingers.

Only then did the guard realize that he was blind. He groaned in pain and knelt on the ground weakly…If it wasn’t for the energy that could restrict their speed and actions, no one would have seen Yue Yang’s movements or even Elder Yu Mu’s attack clearly.

But now, everyone could see with clarity. Elder Yu Mu’s speed was very fast— comparing ordinary people’s speed with his would make them seem like a crawling snail. But his speed, compared with the opponent, was simply not on the same level. If Elder Yu Mu’s speed was like a swimming fish, then the kid’s speed was similar to a flying eagle, or an even faster flash of lightning. No one would have ever thought the speed of a human could reach that level. Even under the restraint of the slimy energy, he could still grab a guard who was more than ten meters away to replace himself at the exact moment the fingers pierced his eyelids and still be able to put him back along the way of his retreat.

That was too terrifying!

The shock of his speed brought to people not awe, but horror instead.

The kind of horror that made others feel a chill run up their spines… Faced with this speed, anyone would feel very small and helpless.

“Today’s affairs are just the beginning.” The Elder Yu Mu squeezed the eyeballs in his hands and made a declaration to Yue Yang, leaving with no expression on his face as he disappeared instantly.

“I’ll be waiting for you, you slow, green-headed tortoise!” Yue Yang waved in the direction where Elder Yu Mu disappeared, as if he was seeing off an old friend.

The City Lord of Redemption now felt awkward.

If Elder Yu Mu couldn’t even hold this kid down with his attacks, how could he do it?

The problem was the previous boasts and slanders have already been said. Plus, three other guards were blinded. If he didn’t do something, wouldn’t his position as the Redemption City Lord be in vain?

He thought for a while before he finally clapped his hands vigorously: “Good! That was such speed and such brilliant technique! Actually, there was just a small misunderstanding between us. If we can just make it clear, everything will be fine. Like the Leader of the Raging Flames— this Lord of the city had always admired you. As for this young man, the Elder Yu Mu is a generous and empathetic man, he wouldn’t mind giving away his beloved Libra Scale of Good and Evil. I have always been very happy to make friends with such heroic young people like you! And as for this person…”

The words of Redemption City Lord made the crowd of onlookers almost choke out of embarrassment.

‘The Head of Flames had a chivalrous heart’, why didn’t he admire it just now, then?

The black scale of good and evil was taken! Elder Yu Mu certainly didn’t give it voluntarily. If the kid’s speed was not faster than himt, Elder Yu Mu would have dug out both eyes of the kid long ago; how could it be an easy grudge to let go! The City Lord who said this could no longer be accurately described as shameless! How thick-skinned[2] was he to speak of such nonsense?

TL note: [2] A Chinese saying that one has ‘thick skin’ means one is very, very incapable of feeling shame.

It really fits the name of the Redemption City Lord who is famous in the Southern Heaven Realm for being shameless and cunning!

The Redemption City Lord originally wanted to compliment the beauty Luo Hua, but she didn’t give him such opportunity.

She didn’t even look at him, treating the Redemption City Lord as an invisible being. She ordered several Heaven Rankers around her to help her lift the flower pots, waving to Yue Yang and Lie Yan: “Let’s go, it’s not fun at all. A so-called ‘Palace Elder’ behaved more like a lion that was prancing around, how immensely boring! Now, my Captain of the Guard, why haven’t you blinded him?”

“Because I’m waiting for your order?” Student Yue Yang stated that he didn’t receive an order. Being a very obedient and tentative Captain of the Guard, he couldn’t kill others casually.

“Then make him blind next time, I hate guys who bite off more than they can chew in front of you!” Luo Hua said lightly.

“As you wish.” The Captain of the Guard Yue Yang’s performance obtained full marks!

“Bring me the scale… Well, it’s not that much of a good thing nor is it very beautiful. I want this Silver Feather, so this black scale will be yours!” Luo Hua grabbed the black scale and took a look before throwing it back to Yue Yang. And the student Yue Yang cooperated with a tacit understanding as he showed a very grateful expression on his face: “Mistress City Lord, you are the most generous Lord in the entire Heaven Realm!”

“Stop flattering me. Next time, don’t bring shame to my name as the City Lord again. Otherwise, you will no longer be the Captain of the Guard. Whoever provokes us, just kill them immediately. I despise these kinds of flea-like Palace Elders the most! Forget it, let’s go back!” Luo Hua, the beauty, handed the Silver Feather to Lie Yan. The Head of Flames also cooperated with her, bending down to accept them respectfully.

The people around them were completely shocked by City Mistress Luo Hua’s words!

The Elder of the Central Palace, a noble existence, was not worth mentioning in front of her. So, what was the identity of this beauty? Could it be that she is the legendary… The Redemption City Lord was sweating profusely, but he did not dare to wipe it, so he quickly lowered his head ,showing his utmost humble appearance. He was really afraid that the beauty Luo Hua would exterminate him with a random command.

As for the previously ill-intentioned tauren ‘Lima’, he frightenedly fell to his knees.

Now, even if the beauty Luo Hua was going to cut off his head, he dared not resist.

It was no wonder that the young man who could defeat Elder Yu Mu at an electrifying speed, and the Head of Flames with the peak Level 5 strength of the Heaven Rank, accompanied her and followed her orders. It was no wonder she ordered strangers to do things as casually as she ordered her servants… The few Heaven Ranked users who were moving her flower pots were now very proud. Before, they expressed their dissatisfaction on their faces, but now they were energetically vigorous. One by one, with their heads and chests held high, they tightly trailed behind… The Heaven Rankers who have not obtained this qualification hated themselves secretly as they stood too far just now. If they had stood behind that noble beauty, they believed that the opportunity to befriend a very noble superior might not have been missed!

Accompanied by Lie Yan and Yue Yang, the beauty Luo Hua floated away.

The people on the streets leaned over and bowed deeply,sending her away in the most pious manner as if they were a tidal wave. No one dared to despise her anymore.

The Lord of Redemption City was soaked and drenched, his whole being looked like he was fished out of the water. Fortunately, Elder Yu Mu was the one who attacked. Otherwise, he predicted that even if he didn’t let the beauty cut off his head, he would have at least been blinded, just like his three other pitiful subordinates.

“Quickly, send my treasured pearl to that noble Mistress. In addition, try to collect all the information you can find about them— I must be the first to know the identity of this Mistress. If I neglect the Mistress and make her wait, I will behead all of you! Wait! Remember, when you go, you mustn’t lose your composure, let alone be rude!” The Redemption City Lord’s heart itched, as if there were thousands of kittens scratching and clawing onto it.

He knew that because of the execution of King Tai Lun, an extremely noble high-ranking Master[3] had come to his city.

TL note: [3] Before all this, he only knew a Master in general was coming but didn’t know if it was a male or female, so I’ll use back the general term instead of the specified gender since he’s under the impression that Luo Hua might be/ is the Master.

What kind of presence did that Mistress have in the Heaven Realm?

He couldn’t imagine!

But she was definitely a higher ranked noble of the Heaven Realm.

It was impossible to be referred to as he didn’t have any relations with the Mistress, so his original plan of wanting to meet in person would not work either! A High Ranker was not someone that anybody could demand an entrance with.

If he could get acquainted with such a superior person, who didn’t even spare a glance at the Elders of the Central Palace and see them as ants, then…he will probably laugh even in his dreams!

chapters.title: Chapter 828 - Fairy Sacred Fruit
chapters.body:
Chapter 828 - Fairy Sacred Fruit

Chapter 828: Fairy Sacred Fruit

When they returned to the luxurious airship marked with the Raging Flame symbol, Yan Zao was already waiting respectfully below.

He reported to Yue Yang in secret.

Yue Yang pondered for a moment before sending Yan Zao away to investigate the information again.

Yue Yang completely ignored the many Heaven Rank powerhouses who were eager to please them. He even turned away the steward sent by the Redemption City Lord, whose intentions were to use the Pearl as a chance to be granted an audience. Was it that easy to be granted a meeting with the superior High Rankers? The steward was not surprised when he was rejected. Even as he knelt down and begged to be granted an audience, he wasn’t able to meet the ‘Master’, the beautiful Luo Hua. He also begged and hoped that Yue Yang would accept the priceless pearl.

As long as they were willing to accept gifts, it would mean that there was still hope.

Yue Yang, as the Captain of the personal guard, had no choice but to deal with him. Otherwise, he wasn’t sure how long the steward was planning to kneel here.

“We don’t want too many people to know our whereabouts. After we spectate the execution of the King on the Divine Punishment Platform, we will leave. With that being said, we hope that the Lord of the Redemption City will pay attention to control the number of people who will approach us. It’s best if you all pretend not to know of our existence here. Although it was just the Mistress’s spontaneity that made her come here on a whim, for her noble and honorable identity to show up in the lower realm would make her seem like she is a bad influence… Today, the Mistress is in a bad mood and she does not want to see any guests. If things get better, this captain will try to change her impression of the Redemption City Lord. As for whether or not the Mistress is willing to meet him, the decision does not lie with me. So let’s just see how things go!” Captain Yue Yang’s position as the Captain of the Guard was well-deserved. With just a few words, he was able to render the steward dumbfounded.

“The City Lord Qian Hu will definitely follow the Mistress’s orders and ensure that no one will disturb her rest.” The steward respectfully saluted towards the sky, showing his sign of worship.

Subsequently, a Top Grade Dragon Blood Stone was secretly placed into the palm of Yue Yang’s hand.

The steward repeatedly apologized.

He claimed that he did not intend to offend them. Instead, he only asked Yue Yang for help to reveal the slightest information about them. This was required for him to be able to give an explanation to the Redemption City Lord.

His attitude was very satisfying. The only missing sign of determination was that he hadn’t committed suicide in front of Yue Yang to show his will. Yue Yang secretly labelled him as a good fox [1] and couldn’t help but portray a troubled expression. Finally, under the other party’s repetitive pleading, he gritted his teeth and made up his mind to reveal some information about them. He dangled his fingers and the steward hurriedly stretched out his palm to make contact. Yue Yang however, did not care for the steward’s outstretched hand as he slowly drew an incomparably mysterious rune pattern in the air.

TL note: [1] means someone is being very obedient, willing to do another’s bidding.

Words were whispered through a secret language into the ears of the steward: “Let’s put it this way. Not long ago, Du Gu Chang Feng of the Four Major Houses met her by chance and addressed the Mistress as the princess. He gifted her the Demonic Mirror upon greeting her, initially wanting to accompany the Mistress on her journey to make sure she was unharmed and safe. But the Demonic Mirror wasn’t very auspicious, so the Mistress gave it to me. This led to Young Master Chang Feng being ashamed of this and no longer dared to accompany her anymore.”

Student Yue Yang released the Mirror of Pain that was sealed in the Demon Suppression Tower.

Their surroundings lit up.

If the steward had the slightest trace of doubt before, it was now all gone. By listening to Yue Yang’s explanation, his soul was scared out of his body [2]. Sweating profusely, both of his hands started to tremble uncontrollably.

TL note: [2] a metaphor to say someone was really terrified. It sounds nicer in Chinese, I swear.

No one would be surprised if one didn’t know about some random emperor of the Heaven Realm. After all, the Heaven Realm was too big, and there were certainly many other experts and High Rankers that were not widely known. However, it would be ridiculous to say that a Heaven Ranker did not know of the Four Major Houses.

Even the most honourable Central Palace must show a bit of respect towards the Four Major Houses, let alone an average Heaven Ranker.

The steward was familiar with the names of all the elites in the Heaven Realm, hence it was natural that he knew the Young Master Chang Feng from the Du Gu family. The Redemption City Lord had repeatedly bribed the expatriate disciple from the Gu Du family with a lot of money just to be well acquainted with the unruly and secretive Young Master Chang Feng through a third party. The steward had a certain understanding of Young Master Chang Feng’s temperament, appearance, and unique skills. As for the Mirror of Pain, he had never seen it before but had heard of it many times. Now that he had suddenly seen it appear in Yue Yang’s hands, why wouldn’t he be surprised? That was the most beloved treasure of Young Master Chang Feng. If he was not willing to give it, who could have taken it away from his grasp? How high ranking does the status of a person have to be in order to make him give away his beloved treasure to someone that didn’t even like it?

For the time being, let’s not mention the Four Great Families, Young Master Chang Feng or the unimaginably high status of said Mistress. Even though Yue Yang was a Captain of the Guard who was only at Level 3 of the Heaven Rank, he was not an unfathomable figure.

And yet, the measly Captain of the Guard actually possessed an infinitely powerful Sealing Treasure.

It could even be used so easily.

He wasn’t all that excited to see the offerings of gems and pearls. But if it wasn’t considered ‘common’ to him, how could his expression have been as plain as water?

Lastly, his strength. With the power of the Level 3 Heaven Rank on the surface, he was completely fearless of the Yu Mu execution Elder, who had reached the peak of the Level 5 Heaven Rank. Even with the knowledge that the opponent was from the Central Palace, he didn’t hesitate to ridicule him and even relentlessly counterattacked, almost making the elder capsize in the gutter [3]… With such outstanding abilities and arrogance, if he didn’t have his strength and a large influential backing behind him, it would have been impossible for him to provoke the elder! Even a fool would not attempt to challenge a Central Palace’s elder as it would definitely turn out to be a catastrophe. Yet, not only did this young man indeed provoke the elder, his attitude was also extremely arrogant!

TL note: [3] an allegorical saying that ‘something went wrong in a certain place’.

Based on the various guesses from the information he got, there was only one possibility— this ‘Master’ is indeed the legendary… The steward dared not think about it anymore as he feared that he would faint!

Before he knew it, his fear had caused a pool of sweat to heavily drench his clothes, and his entire being looked like he had been submerged in water.

Upon seeing Yue Yang’s forced smile, he was terrified. He hurriedly crawled onto the ground ,bowing to the luxurious airship in the sky with the most pious heart. He also apologised to Yue Yang, repeatedly clarifying that he did not intend to pry into the Mistress’s personal matters, but just like the City Lord Qian Hu, he respected them with a heart of admiration and longed for their pity… “Just go back. When there is good news, I will send Yan Zao to inform you.” Yue Yang finally sent the man away. He predicted that if he tried to scare him once more, this man might just commit suicide.

“Yes. Along with City Lord Qian Hu, this humble servant will await your jade calling[4] at any time.”

TL note: [4] since jade symbolises prosperity, success, sometimes even immortality and longevity, the term ‘jade calling’ is kind of translated to ‘the command/ order from someone highly ranked and respected’.

Seeing that Yue Yang’s attitude had improved for the better, the steward couldn’t help but be enthused as he quickly bowed and said goodbye.

He knew that he was not yet qualified to have a good friendship with the Mistress’s Guard Captain, hence being on equal terms with the errand runner “Yan Zao” was already the greatest success for him. During this trip, he had inquired about some secret information that was revealed by the other party, so he could guarantee that City Lord Qianhu would be super satisfied with his performance. As for how to get the noble Mistress to be willing to meet them, it was no longer his problem; let the City Lord Qian Hu fret about it himself!

Yue Yang returned to the luxury airship. He turned towards the side corridor and walked into the main hall.

He found that the sexy and enchanting beauty Bi Lu was waving at him with a smile on her face. Even if he had attained the Supreme Will, he couldn’t help but tremble.

The beauty Luo Hua was nowhere to be seen. She was a clean freak by nature so after shopping for a long time, she probably went to take a bath. Lie Yan had also just finished preparing the controls for the Heaven Realm Drakaina[5] Aircraft to take off as she walked in from the other side. Yue Yang pretended not to see Bi Lu and took out the Top Grade Dragon Blood Stone, purifying it with the fire of Nirvana, before he threw it to the Head of the Flames: “Next time, let Wuhen attach the Heavenly Rune onto you. It doesn’t matter whether it is embedded in your weapon or on your armor, it has a pretty good support effect.”

TL note: [5] Drakaina is a female dragon. (Couldn’t find the ship’s name for hours I swear, so I just came up with the closest translation)

Lie Yan nodded.

She had become accustomed to Yue Yang’s gifts and offerings so she no longer resisted like before.

Especially after the spiritual fusion in the energy field, she had learned a lot about Yue Yang. Her thoughts had gradually assimilated with his, hence she no longer insisted on her chivalrous personality like before.

“It’s so beautiful, give me one too!” Bi Lu snatched it from Lie Yan’s hands and observed it for a long time, as if she couldn’t bear to put it down. Lie Yan originally wanted to give it to her, but Bi Lu smiled and declined, returning the purified Dragon Stone. The Blood Stone was returned to Lieyan, but she sat beside Yue Yang, spreading out her small white and slender palm, pleading with him for it.

“There is none left. Did you think there was a basket of those; that guy just handed me one!” Yue Yang initially ignored her, but he really couldn’t stand to see her hand dangling in front of him, let alone the innocent fragrance of her charming gestures.

This girl was already very sexy and charming from the start. From what Yue Yang saw, this girl was the sexiest besides the Phoenix Beauty and Humanoid Beast Jiang Ying.

After revealing her true colours, he felt that a special and fascinating magic power was radiating from her body.

Yue Yang took out the priceless pearl.

He didn’t let it go, but deliberately tossed it in the palm of her hand to portray his unwillingness.

No matter what Yue Yang expressed, as the pearl fell into her hands, Bi Lu smiled widely: “Wasn’t this pearl for sister Luo Hua? Are you sure it’s okay for me to have it? You’d have to be careful of sister Luo Hua pinching your ears. It’s better that I don’t take it., I’ll give it back to you!” Although she returned it to him, it was probably just a figure of speech. But Yue Yang estimated that even if he tried snatching it back from her, he wouldn’t be able to get it back.

Yue Yang sweated profusely in secret when she called Luo Hua as her sister. Since when were they so affectionate?

They started to call each other sisters!

The girl Bi Lu sat too close to him. Besides her enchanting fragrance, she also laughed brightly, which made student Yue Yang who possessed the Supreme Will sway a little. He quickly got up and ran to find the beauty of Luo Hua to take a mixed-gender bath together to cool down his burning heart.

Unexpectedly, Luo Hua had come out wearing a bath towel, andrejected student Yue Yang’s proposal to go back and take a bath together.

After Yue Yang took a cold bath, he found that the three women were talking about the current situation, seemingly serious.

“Are you sure it’s an ancient rune?” Beauty Luo Hua asked.

“I’m ninety percent confident, but I don’t know what the characteristics of this Ancient Rune is. According to a secret information source, for the Ancient Rune to exist, at least the life and blood of ten thousand Heaven Rankers must be sacrificed because of the seal. Moreover, you would need a hundred Emperor ranked Heaven Rankers. The execution of King Tai Lun is just an excuse; the purpose was to attract the attention of Heaven Rankers. Of course, there would be some of the king’s friends who would come to attempt mediation or rescues. In short, the Scarlet Warden of the Central Palace, Tantai Tu Mie will not stop at all costs in order to obtain this Ancient Rune.” Bi Lu also put away the charming manner she had previously joked around with Yue Yang as she explained with a serious expression.

“Is the information source of yours reliable?” As Yue Yang had gone to take a bath just now, he didn’t listen carefully so he hurriedly asked.

“This top-secret information was discovered through a secret channel by the wife of King Tai Lun. The source of the news came from the Central Palace. It should be that someone in the Central Palace was worried that the Tantai Tu Mie would obtain the Ancient Rune, greatly improving his strength, and hence becoming a threat to them. Therefore, the information was passed to King Tai Lun’s wife through a secret channel. A line was also drawn to allow King Tai Lun’s wife to contact certain forces in the Four Major Houses with the purpose of sabotaging this ritual sacrifice. This time, not only was it a disaster in the Tai Lun Continent, but it was also an internal battle in the Central Palace. But as for us, it’s just a gathering!” Bilu solemnly nodded to Yue Yang, indicating that the news was absolutely reliable.

“If this was the case, it would be way too shocking!” Lie Yan couldn’t imagine what would happen in the end if the sacrificial ritual became successful.

“Instead of coming early, it’s better to come by coincidence.” Yue Yang smiled: “Let’s sit on the sidelines and watch them fight. If the internal fight of the Central Palace will hurt both sides, then we can profit from being the fisherman.”

“Hardly!” Bi Lu shook her head and said, “Although you have made rapid progress, you are still far from the level of Tantai Tu Mie.”

“If this big bad guy hadn’t broken through the Innate Supreme, then I would have not been optimistic; but as for now… I’m still supporting my bad guy!” City Mistress Luo Hua stood up and sat in Yue Yang’s arms in front of the two women, unscrupulously hugging his head and neck with a slenderly fair arm as she kissed his cheek affectionately: “Student Yue Yang, this city lord supports you so much, don’t disappoint me!”

“My Mistress City Lord, please rest assured, your subordinate will do his best to not bring you shame!” Yue Yang was amused by the actions of City Mistress Luo Hua and could no longer help it. He immediately picked up the beauty before rushing into the bedroom.

Bi Lu was surprised at the attitude of City Mistress Luo Hua. So what even if he had obtained the enlightenment of the Innate Supreme?

The opponent is going to be Tantai Tu Mie!

But immediately, she realized again. This is what a wife should do; trust her husband without reservation and support him wholeheartedly!

After she figured it out, she turned her head to look at the Head of the Flames, asking with a smile: “Do you also believe that he will succeed?”

Head of the Flames frowned: “Tantai Tu Mie is indeed very powerful, but Yue Yang is someone who could achieve anything. He had already created many impossible miracles! Besides, he does not necessarily have to fight hard. Maybe, the Ancient Rune would identify Yue Yang as its master and not Tantai Tu Mie! You don’t know much about him— I have practiced in the Tong Tian Tower with him for a long time and I have never seen anything stump him, especially with the support of so many people… you don’t know how amazing that person is… In short, he will succeed. Maybe not in a day, but I believe in him; he will succeed in the end!”

Bi Lu was slightly stunned as she didn’t expect the Head of the Flames to give her an answer like this.

Finally, she laughed.

She understood Lie Yan’s answer was meant to comfort her.

But Bi Lu didn’t need Lie Yan’s comfort. In fact, even though she said so, she still supported the kid in her heart. Otherwise, how could she have told him such a shocking secret! Or, even if she had told him, Bi Lu would have persuaded him to leave instead of letting him come to Tai Lun Continent!

In fact, the person who believed and hoped for his success the most was herself!

Although the door of the bedroom was soundproofed well, with the sensitive hearing of Bi Lu and Lie Yan, they could hear the sounds that were similar to fighting exclamations.

The expressions of the two changed at the same time.

Bilu was shy. Her face flushed and her legs close together subconsciously, fingers trembling as she pretended to be holding a glass of water. Lie Yan felt even more awkward. She had actually heard of it many times, and she had long been familiar with Yue Yang’s skills in the bedroom. But this was not the Heaven Stairway, and Bi Lu was not Sickly Beauty, so she felt a tiny bit awkward… “Does he and Sister Luo Hua often do this?” Bi Lu didn’t know that she actually had her own responsibility. If she hadn’t deliberately teased her and unintentionally showed her attractive posture, student Yue Yang wouldn’t have been aroused that easily.

“Get used to it.” The Leader of the Flames didn’t want to talk about this topic with Bi Lu anymore. She stood up and prepared to return to her room to rest.

“Do you sometimes have some ideas of your own?” Bi Lu asked, breaking the question as she was eager to know the full truth.

“I’m a giantess!” Lie Yan turned around and quickly denied: “Stop guessing, I’m not involved in his aesthetics at all. I have absolutely nothing to do with him!”

“Well, I believe it is likely as such…” When the Leader of the Flames was about to enter the room, Bi Lu suddenly put down her cup and said to the flames in a secret language: “Have you ever heard of something called ‘Fairy Sacred Fruit’. Even an ordinary-looking woman will turn into a big beauty… and even have the ability to deform the body at will. Maybe you can try it.”

“Thank you, but I won’t pursue something that exists in the ethereal legends. It’s fine how we are now as I don’t have too many ideas. My relationship with him is really just being a buddy of sorts, but it’s definitely not what you think.” Lie Yan shook her head, grabbing the doorknob in her hand as she prepared to close the door.

“But what if I said I have one?” Bi Lu’s words made Lie Yan freeze.

chapters.title: Chapter 829 - The Truth? Who Knows About The Secrets Of Eternity?
chapters.body:
Chapter 829 - The Truth? Who Knows About The Secrets Of Eternity?

Chapter 829: The Truth? Who Knows About The Secrets of Eternity?

The steward stood in front of the Redemption City Lord and reported everything respectfully.

Although the Redemption City Lord had long been mentally prepared, he was still surprised when he heard of the intelligence report that the steward had inquired into. Fortunately, his standing at the time had changed quickly. Otherwise, his entire household would have died without having a proper burial space because they offended some kind of ‘Master’ who should not ever be provoked. Even if he was the Redemption City Lord who was specially appointed to guard the Divine Punishment Platform in the Outer Hall of the Central Palace, that ‘Master’ was not someone he could kill just by pointing a finger[1] at her.

TL Note: [1] pointing a finger refers to someone who can make things happen just by demanding or wanting so. Usually someone highly ranked would use this as it is sort of a brag of authority.

It would be an easy task to replace a City Lord. In the Central Palace, many aspiring individuals set their sights on the glamorous position.

If you were found guilty of a crime, you will most definitely be dead!

“Tell me, I want to know one thing. Let me know of your thoughts on this matter as it would be better if you can explain in detail.” In addition to being absolutely shameless, the Redemption City Lord also had a talent in which he excelled at— which was being very good at using other people as his own mirror. Just by looking into the eyes of others, he was able to promptly correct his mishaps in time.

“My Lord, please forgive this impudent one for speaking out.” Of course, the steward understood the temperament of the Redemption City Lord. Since both their interests intertwined together, it was natural that he was willing to give some advice to the Redemption City Lord: “In fact, it would be rather unlikely for My Lord to climb up the ranks and approach the ‘Noble Guest’ merely with your identity as a City Lord. After all, your rankings are too far apart. If we come across as being too eager, it would be easy for them to find us annoying. Let’s use an analogy— the most precious pearl in mind. It is a priceless treasure indeed, but in the eyes of the other party which comprise of people who were accustomed to eating luxurious feasts, they would only see it as a plain bowl of brown rice…Our pearl, compared to the Mirror of Pain from Young Master Chang Feng, would be an old linen cloth that wasn’t even worth mentioning in front of a luxurious silk garment! The most important part was even the Young Master Chang Feng’s Mirror of Pain couldn’t satisfy the preferences of that ‘Noble Guest’, so Master Chang Feng had no choice but to leave in shame. What we have to do now is to just follow the other party’s instructions, control the situation and wait for an opportunity. Once the ‘Noble Guest’ is happy and sated, it would be possible for us to be granted an audience with her.”

“Well said!’ The Redemption City Lord nodded with satisfaction: “Of course this City Lord Qian Hu has his own self-awareness. As long as I don’t provoke the ‘Noble Guest”, I would consider it a great success. I will still leave this matter into your hands. No matter what method you use, no one is allowed to go over to disturb them. As for ‘Lima’, the tauren, let him stay in the mansion for the time being. If necessary, we might be able to even use him for merit purposes. Then, let’s not bother with Elder Yu Mu as his affairs and ours are not related. Yan Zao however, is the one we must establish a good relationship with. Through him, we can open up a chance to get closer to the Captain of the Guard. That young man must not be an ordinary person so we should stabilize the situation first… The situation that occurred was not necessarily a bad thing; I even have a feeling that our luck would turn for the better very soon!”

“Congratulations, My Lord!” The steward also knew that this was a good opportunity. If the City Lord succeeded, entering the upper circle of the Heaven Realm would no longer remain a dream.

“If there ever comes a day where this City Lord reaches his peak, you will definitely not be forgotten. If you handle things well, we can enjoy the Heaven Realm together in the future!” The Redemption City Lord patted the steward’s shoulder earnestly, causing him to become moved by the gesture which resulted in a few tears flowing from his moistened eyes.

In the luxury airship.

City Mistress Luo Hua was arranging her precious flowers, whereas the Giantess Lie Yan insisted on continuing the training she habitually committed to at the Heaven Stairway, working hard with every passing day.

Bi Lu searched everywhere, but she wasn’t able to find Yue Yang. At first, she thought he had gone out and so, she waited patiently. Unexpectedly, she didn’t see him return at all. After a long time, she finally couldn’t help it. She sat next to City Lord Luo Hua and asked softly: “Sister Luo Hua, where is your Captain of the Guard?”

Luo Hua smiled, stopping all activity on hand: “I thought you would be able to bear not asking for a day! He is not here, but don’t worry, he will be back later!”

In fact, Yue Yang had entered the sealed Black Hole Dimension to find Her Majesty, Empress Fei Wen Li.

However, Luo Hua didn’t want to mention too much to Bi Lu as she was too lazy to explain.

With Yue Yang absent, Bi Lu seemed to be unable to boost her energy no matter what she did. She hummed lazily, lying down and reading a book. But then she put the book down for a moment,sighing: “This damn heavenly rune is way too complicated and difficult. It’s really hard to imagine how you guys are able to understand this!” In fact, she was not surprised that City Lord Luo Hua was good at comprehending heavenly runes; it was Lie Yan’s higher mastery than her own that truly frustrated Bi Lu.

Lie Yan was undergoing strength training. She wiped her sweat and waved her hand: “I’m nothing compared to them; I don’t even have a ten-thousandth of the knowledge Luo Hua has. However, the ones who are most proficient in runes are most definitely Wuhen and Mistress Wu Xia!”

With that being said, Bi Lu just stuck out her tongue.

In the sealed Black Hole Dimension.

Empress Fei Wen Li’s jovial laughter resounded endlessly while being absorbed by the surrounding black holes.

She was surprised by Yue Yang’s arrival which far exceeded her expectations and predictions. Yue Yang had resonated with Zhi Zun, the Night Empress and other women in their souls in the energy field. They exchanged their fusion realms collectively and helped him realize his breakthrough, which enabled him to reach the unprecedented and most perfect Innate Supreme realm. In this perfect enlightenment, things were also extremely beneficial even for Empress Fei Wen Li who almost swept the entire Heaven Realm back in the day.

When she absorbed Yue Yang’s pure Innate True Qi, she had also used her realm to connect with him.

Yue Yang then achieved a breakthrough in a higher realm.

Fei Wen Li, on the other hand, was strengthened in the realm of her Innate Supremacy.

“How long have I slept?” Yue Yang fell into a deep sleep again under the impact of the new realm brought by Empress Fei Wen Li. Only now did he discover how terrifying Empress Fei Wen Li’s true realm was.

“Less than a day. I thought you were going to sleep for a few days, but the potential of your body is far beyond my imagination.” Empress Fei Wen Li lightly kissed his face.

With Yue Yang’s current strength and realm, it was impossible to completely assimilate the realm of Empress Fei Wen Li. But he cleverly sealed Fei Wen Li’s extremely potent realm, like Si-niang’s knowledge inheritance, in his mind. Then, he slowly realised it, assimilating it layer by layer. Without the knowledge inheritance of Si-niang, and the adaptation of the perfect Innate Realm, Yue Yang would definitely not have woken up so easily. Even an estimation of ten to fifteen days of sleep would be a rather small number.

Yue Yang merged with the realm of Empress Fei Wen Li. This time, not only did he bring the sublimation of the Supreme Innate Realm, but his Invisible Sword Qi had also obtained a similar breakthrough.

If he wasn’t in the sealed Black Hole Dimension, he would have been anxious to find the Heavenly Sword Goddess.

Now, for the first time, Yue Yang felt like an absolute High Ranker.

Finally, he had a sword in hand that was paired with an invincible surge of confidence… just like the inner thoughts of the Heavenly Sword Goddess in the dream world that day.

Splitting dimensions, destroying the world; things that were previously impossible to achieve were no longer just illusions. Although Yue Yang was in the Black Hole, even if 90 percent of his body’s vitality was taken by Fei Wen Li, he still had the feeling that he could pierce the sealed Black Hole Dimension with his sword! The pressure that the Black Hole Dimension brought to him before no longer felt impossible to sustain! Could it be that this was the legendary ‘Divine Consciousness’ that could easily understand everything in the world? This was the legendary ‘Divine Sense’ that ignored everything that was unmatched?

Empress Fei Wen Li put her arms around Yue Yang’s head and neck, smiling widely: “Now you finally seem to have a bit of holiness and supremity!”

Yue Yang didn’t have time to feel her intimacy. Instead, he put his hands in front of his eyes in disbelief, observing them for a long time: “Is this really the power I have?”

“Yah!”

Someone shouted behind him.

Xiao Wen Li, who had also benefited from the fusion of realms, did not realise that at some point, a golden snake demon with a height of 100 meters had formed above her head, its gaze solemn and intimidating. Mimicking Xiao Wen Li’s actions, the golden snake demon raised a giant golden blade and slashed fiercely towards the sealed Black Hole Dimension, as if to bombard a path to rescue her mother, the Empress Fei Wen Li.

Thousands of light rays flashed forward amidst the endless darkness like a divine pillar hitting the sea.

This was the energy column blasted by the golden snake demon.

Even the Black Hole that sealed space itself couldn’t withstand it.

Split.

In the extremely distant sky, a ray of star-like light appeared.

But on Fei Wen Li’s side, an indescribably strong force emerged in an instant, suppressing her firmly. It was impossible for the Empress Fei Wen Li to even blink her eyes. The fissures in the direct Black Hole Dimension had disappeared, and the hidden law force dissipated completely, disappearing without a trace. Everything seemed to revert back to normal in the Black Hole Dimension, as if no crevice was ever formed.

Xiao Wen Li was stunned.

She thought with the power of her new enlightenment, guided by the Innate Supreme Realm, she could successfully save her ‘mother’.

Who would have thought that the power of the Black Hole Dimension’s seal would far exceeded her imagination.

In fact, Yue Yang even knew before she had made a move that it wasn’t enough to merely penetrate the Black Hole Dimension. As early as the first time he entered this dimension, Empress Fei Wen Li had to use her remaining strength to open the dimension and send him out. Besides, this will always be the case every time. If Fei Wen Li could have gotten out just by opening a hole through the Black Hole Dimension, she would have broken the seal and left long ago. The real power of the seal was binded by the Law of Nirvana. One must have the ability to exceed the sealer, or completely deceive and crack the law of opening the seal in order to rescue the Empress Fei Wen Li!

Black Hole Seal.

It would not be easy to escape from it.

Empress Fei Wen Li used her hand to gently stroke the face of the tear-stained Xiao Wen Li who turned her head back. Her soft, maternal glow was radiant at this very moment.

“My dear, I am already overjoyed that you wished to help me. But don’t be too anxious about this; let Mum and Dad solve it. Your dad will definitely save me. His future Godhead is the ‘World’, and the Black Hole Dimension is also just a part of the world…”

“Cough!” When student Yue Yang heard the word ‘Dad’, he was slightly embarrassed, especially when his entire frame was bare naked.

“Yeah.” Xiao Wen Li had no embarrassment about her ‘dad’ and ‘mum’s’ state of nudity. On the contrary, she liked to be intimate in such a situation and felt that it was natural. She hugged Empress Fei Wen Li with one arm and Yue Yang with another, not wanting to let go of either side. Until the end, after consuming a lot of energy and feeling a bit fatigued, paired with the fact that she had stayed in the Black Hole Dimension for too long, she kissed Empress Fei Wen Li reluctantly and returned to Yue Yang’s body to sleep.

Empress Fei Wen Li waited for Xiao Wen Li to fall into a deep slumber before changing from a mother to a queen of conquest.

Even as she laid on Yue Yang’s chest while embracing him intimately.

She could also maintain her most sensibly rasional thinking.

After a long time, Fei Wen Li said with a serious expression: “For you, Tantai Tu Mie is a strong enemy, but that’s all he is. His wisdom, strategy and abilities were not destined to be a top competitor. Instead, it is Ji Wu Ri who would be a big threat to you! I don’t know who King Tai Lun is, but the Divine Punishment Platform has been there since ancient times. The older generation of warriors are also aware that there are three ancient runes under the Divine Punishment Platform— ordinary powers will not be able to move those seals at all!”

Yue Yang was startled but he soon became ecstatic: “There are three ancient runes?”

Empress Fei Wen Li pressed her hand on Yue Yang’s lips, signalling him to not be too excited: “These three ancient runes are extremely difficult to obtain, I failed too back then. No matter how many people Tantai Tu Mie had planned to kill, no matter how many blood sacrifices were going to be made, it was doomed to be a waste of effort. You don’t need to spend too much time on the Divine Punishment Platform; instead, you should focus on the Land of Trials…”

Yue Yang knew that this was the most important news. He tried to tone down his own excitement as he listened carefully.

“The trial of the Land of Trials… is actually the entire process of cultivating a descendant of ‘God’ by an ancient High Ranker!”

chapters.title: Chapter 830 - A God’S Descent?
chapters.body:
Chapter 830 - A God’S Descent?

Chapter 830: A God’s Descent?

Yue Yang returned from the Black Hole Dimension and cultivated for another day.

In the World of Dreams.

“These are the three swords that I have newly enlightened.”

During Yue Yang’s enlightenment in the dream world, he showed the Heavenly Sword Goddess the three swords: Black Hidden Return, White Splendid Frost and Red Perfect Night.

The sword energy that was condensed by Yue Yang had already begun to show its power. Although it was still nowhere near the level of the Heavenly Sword Goddess, he had made great progress compared to his previous attempts. The swords could completely divide the world with their boundless power.

The Heavenly Sword Goddess observed them, but quietly disappeared without making any comment.

She acquiesced in her heart that maybe ‘Ruzi can be taught’[1]; or perhaps Yue Yang’s insights still did not meet her requirements, at least not to the level where he could start learning the following swords. Yue Yang’s mentality was very stable— he showed no ecstasy nor discouragement. In fact, the more Yue Yang possessed abilities that were as powerful as a God, the more he realized that he still had a long way to go…Si-niang’s knowledge inheritance stated that if one had the ability, it wouldn’t be impossible to create a world from one single thought. The current Yue Yang, paired with the descriptions of Si-niang’s knowledge inheritance, were still far from the absolute realm left by the predecessors of the World Tree. The most obvious example was that even the realms of Empress Fei Wen Li and Zhi Zun were far from the desired realm. This left him with no other choice but to look up[2].

TL Note:

[1] It means ‘children can be taught’ but the Chinese idiom can be used to describe a youngster with potential.

[2] ‘To look up’ here means to achieve a higher level of growth or improvement, like advancing levels.

“You seem to be a bit different?” Yue Yang found that his training partner, the big loli[3], looked a little frustrated. This was the first time that she had not been ahead of Yue Yang.

TL Note: [3] ‘Loli/ lolita’ was derived from Japanese. It’s used to describe ‘sweet and adorable girls’. Please don’t confuse it with the English meaning of Lolita; the meanings can get really different.

“…” The big lolita adorably played with her index finger and the stray hair on the top of her head fell forward.

“The bag around your waist looks a bit familiar.” Yue Yang suddenly saw a strange bag that was hung around the big lolita’s waist. She gave him a flustered glare, putting the bag in her arms. This made Yue Yang, who wanted to grab it to have a closer look, stop his piqued curiosity awkwardly. Forget it, what’s hers is technically mine anyways; it’s alright for her to keep it.

Previously, Yue Yang always had an unfulfilled wish. It was to harshly give the big lolita a good beating on the day he could finally win her as an act of revenge .

Finally, he was catching up with her.

He was on the same level as her, but he found himself unable to raise his own energy.

He sat down next to the big lolita. Observing her carefully, he found that she had actually changed a lot at some point without him noticing. The change wasn’t related to her appearance nor her body; it was her spirituality. Now she had become rather different from the Sword Qi that was initially created by the Heavenly Sword Goddess, and was now far more lovely than before.

Unless she wasn’t a Sword Qi, but an Immortal Spirit Body from that little Universe Bag?

In the beginning, she was slightly violent and was not very cute.

But now?

Her cuteness could kill any man directly!

The big lolita had long known what kind of person Yue Yang was and remained on guard, so Yue Yang couldn’t get any information out of her despite teasing her for a long time. But when Yue Yang said something funny, she would wrinkle her cute little nose, narrow her eyes into crescent moons and become silently amused; but if Yue Yang spoke of nonsense and provoked her, she would immediately punch him with no hesitation as she had a rather violent nature.

It was also from this day that the way of cultivation had realised new skills.

The big lolita made a method of ‘topping’ the energy transfer which Yue Yang had never seen before.

She put her hand on top of Yue Yang’s head and infused all the energy into his body. Yue Yang was about to return the energy to her body through Double Cultivation but she refused. A flash of light emanated from her arms and her energy was completely restored in an instant. When Yue Yang was unable to assimilate her huge energy, the big loli placed some sort of ‘energy source’ that Yue Yang could not understand into his heart. It was the kind of energy source that seemed very weak yet was endlessly unlimited…this energy source was similar to the seed of the World Tree.

Although it was currently weak, he felt like he could enrich the entire world once it grew up!

When Yue Yang exited his dreams and returned to the Grimoire World, he found that the space inside had become completely different. A form of ‘vitality’ was born, and now the Grimoire World could finally be called a ‘world’!

His halo-like Guardian Beast, World[4] had also begun to change. It was no longer a two-dimensional spread of the four basic directions; instead, there were eight main directions and ten other forms of extensions.

TL Note: [4] Idk why the author used such confusing names, but this ‘World’ here is the name of his Guardian Beast. I’ll link a reference to it below on Wiki Fandom.

It was now shrunk into a very small size, but its energy rose instead of being diminished.

Yue Yang supported it with his palm.

He felt as if he could control the whole world.

Perhaps when World (the beast) becomes fully formed, the legendary Godhead would also be born… “The higher realm is still very far ahead. I will work harder, so my growth and improvements can be faster!” If he wasn’t entangled in so many situations and problems, he really wanted to return to the Heaven Stairway to practice cultivating with Xue Wu Xia and Princess Qian Qian for a few more years.

Through this retreat, Yue Yang deeply understood the sublimation of thoughts brought about by Empress Fei Wen Li in the integration of the Divine Innate Realm.

Although there was still a long way to go to completely integrate with the realm of Empress Fei Wen Li, Yue Yang had already taken a big step. At the very least, he had surpassed the limitations and the largely unimaginable advancements in his Innate Supreme Realm. No one was able to do this before, not even Empress Fei Wen Li, let alone the Prison Emperor! It can be said that Yue Yang, who was currently only at the Innate Supreme level, had half of his foot stepped into the threshold of the Divine Innate level. This is the ‘advanced growth’ that no other Innate Supreme user in this world would ever achieve.

The previous collective breakthrough under the Heaven Stairway World Tree was equivalent to basically skyrocketing Yue Yang to the top of the world.

It enabled him to set foot on the peak without getting lost midway.

So he climbed to the top and looked into the distance.

As long as Yue Yang’s own strength could continuously improve, everything else would come to him naturally as there was no need to use an extensively long period of time to fumble around like other cultivators. Now, as long as he opened his eyes, he could overlook the world; as long as he opened his arms, he could soar into the sky.

Yue Yang didn’t say anything about it, but he knew that it was entirely due to the foundation that Heavenly Sword Goddess had laid for him early on.

There was also the inheritance of Si-niang’s knowledge.

Although Yue Yang would be able to succeed even without them, it would definitely not be as fast as he was now!

Part of the reason was due to Yue Yang’s own efforts. Xue Wuxia and the others’ support and training had also contributed greatly. But it was the Heavenly Sword Goddess, who was always hidden in an unknown place yet continued to silently protect him, who was of the greatest help to Yue Yang. It was her who bestowed Yue Yang’s Innate Invisible Sword Qi; it was her who laid the strongest and most ambitious foundation for him. It was also her who acted as the most important juncture to help Zhi Zun and the Night Empress. She penetrated and connected the Heaven Stairway World Tree, allowing various realms and various energy laws of the countless predecessors to flow into his body, which created the existence of a unique and perfect Innate Supreme cultivator like no other!

“ I won’t let you down.” Yue Yang clenched his fists, raised his head to the sky as he muttered in his heart.

“…”

It felt like an illusion. But for a brief moment, Yue Yang seemed to be able to feel the presence of the Heavenly Sword Goddess from above, who looked back and smiled.

When Yue Yang opened the bedroom door and walked out into the hall, it had already been three days since he went in to meet Empress Fei Wen Li.

Luo Hua, Lie Yan and Bi Lu saw Yue Yang who came out.

His eyes changed drastically.

They all portrayed an expression of shock and disbelief!

The moment he opened the door, It was as if a God had appeared. If it weren’t for the familiar aura of Yue Yang, they would have been frightened!

The guards of the Heaven Realm Drakaina Airship who sensed the presence of Yue Yang’s aura have all flown to the front of the hall, kneeling down with tears streaming down their faces. They felt that the legendary figure their ancestors spoke of endlessly and passed down from generation to generation, the ‘Lord Heavenly Dragon Emperor’, had returned right in front of them.

“Are you really Yue Yang?” Bi Lu was still in disbelief.

“Hey, what kind of expression is that!” Yue Yang realized that he had forgotten to hide his aura because he was too excited before. And after he had assimilated it when fusing his realm with Empress Fei Wen Li, it appeared just as shocking even though he didn’t intentionally exert his threatening aura. Due to his ability in creating disguises and feints, he quickly concealed his aura as he could achieve control in a short time compared to the others. He instantly reverted back to his original state, where he disguised himself as a Level 3 Ranker without fail.

“Ah, that scared me to death, you really did.” Luo Hua threw herself into her lover’s arms with surprise and joy, rewarding him with a few punches.

“You’ve improved again.” Lie Yan sat on the ground, slumped.

Some people were definitely more infuriating than others.

This kid had once again improved just by disappearing for three days, and he even advanced by leaps and bounds.

It was already impossible to look up to him, let alone catch up with him. A blow like this was really unacceptable.

Holding Luo Hua, Yue Yang walked to the sofa and sat down. He motioned for the other two women, Lie Yan and Bi Lu to come over: “Because things have changed, I have a new plan. You guys should take a look at them.”

Once Lie Yan heard his words, she quickly stopped her wandering mind.

In fact, this kid is an unprecedented, extremely abnormal genius in the history of the Tong Tian Tower. Why would I ever want to compete with him… After thinking about it this way, Lie Yan instantaneously felt better, hurriedly sitting across from Yue Yang and listening carefully to his new plan. There were bright colors reflected in the eyes of Bi Lu who remained her gaze on Yue Yang, almost reluctant to look away.

The beauty Luo Hua could see it, but she was not jealous.

He is her husband!

The stronger and the faster he progressed, the prouder she was in her heart.

What Yue Yang and the three women didn’t know was that in a secret room in the far distance below the luxurious airship, Yan Zao was having a conversation with the steward. The cup in the steward’s hand had mysteriously fallen to the ground at some point. His entire frame was soaked with wine and yet he seemed not to notice it.

“Mr. Tan?” Yan Zao had actually also just recovered from the shock, but he immediately pretended to be accustomed to it and signaled the steward not to be too gaffe.

“Ah, I’m so embarrassed!” The steward still asked in disbelief even at this moment: “I think I sensed a God’s Descent just now.”

“For my Master, this occurrence is common.” Yan Zao was also extremely excited at this time. I have such an awesome master. It was definitely a God’s Descent just now, but it was so vast and mighty. I believe it was not solely felt around us, but even the entire Redemption City must have felt the different degrees of induction. He didn’t dare to think about the Master’s affairs. What he had to do was follow the Master’s order and fool this trickster of a steward sent by the Redemption City Lord!

“Really? I’m such an impudent being! Even when the God descended, how rude of me to not kneel down!” The steward hurriedly knelt down and respectfully prostrated himself repeatedly.

“Please don’t mention too much about this; it would be against the wishes of my Master.” Yan Zao warned.

“Even if this servant dies a thousand deaths, I wouldn’t dare to forget the divinity of the jade decree!” The steward respectfully saluted the servant who he formerly thought of as scum and apologized: “Please forgive me and reply to the City Lord. If Your Honour will agree to it, I am willing to be your bull and horse[5], till death will I serve you.”

TL Note: [5] A saying that’ one will be at your beck and call and will do literally everything for you’.

“Mr. Tan and the Redemption City Lord Qian Cheng certainly have sincere goodwill; Master will definitely be willing to look the other way.” Yan Zao naturally gave the other party a little bit of hope. Since it was them who initiated contact, paired with the fact that they didn’t need to exert effort to use the opponent, he believed that his Master would also not be polite when dealing with people like them. However, he didn’t know of the Master’s plan, so he couldn’t express too much either. Otherwise, he guessed that the steward and the Redemption City Lord would be overjoyed to the point where they would hold celebrations in the entire city for three days.

When the steward rushed back to the City Lord’s mansion, for the first time ever, the Redemption City Lord was already as anxious as an ant in a hot pot.

He rubbed his hands, pacing around.

He wanted to see the luxury airship, but he was afraid of offending the Gods.

Once the steward returned, he was already calling out of joy before he was even summoned. This made the Redemption City Lord suddenly see a ray of light amidst the dark night. The entire frame of the elated steward seemed to have become lighter. The City Lord hurried forward to greet him and asked with a trembling voice:”Quickly, tell me, is there a divine decree for us?”

If you let him know the actual truth, he would probably have a cerebral hemorrhage and fall straight to the ground.

However, he was currently very ecstatic and willing to be a bull and a horse for the ‘God’, student Yue Yang.

chapters.title: Chapter 831 - Good Birds Would Choose Greener Woods
chapters.body:
Chapter 831 - Good Birds Would Choose Greener Woods

Chapter 831: Good Birds Would Choose Greener Woods

When the steward and the Redemption City Lord were brimming with expectation, Yan Zao, who had never attracted their attention before, now brought them exciting news.

The Lord was willing to see them.

The Redemption City Lord hurriedly put on his most luxurious outfit. He brought along his wife and were both accompanied by the steward and the Captain of the Guard.

They entered secretly, thanking the Gods when they were in the lobby of the luxurious airship. Although it was only a meeting behind curtains, they were honoured enough to offer prayers and acts of piety towards the Gods for such a blessing. As for the steward and the Captain of the Guard, they dared not raise their heads at all, for fear that they would be disrespectful and as a result, would anger the gods. After receiving permission to be seated, the Lord of Redemption City repeatedly expressed his gratitude, before finally sitting down on the brocade chair with excitement. However, he only dared to sit on half of his seat as his body was straightened erectly like a gun, afraid that he might lose his composure.

Even the steward and the Captain of the Guard who stood behind the City Lord with lowered hands trembled with nervousness, let alone the City Lord himself.

If it weren’t for his fair ability of control, he would have embarrassed himself on the spot.

“The virtuous Madam who assisted the City Lord in maintaining order, please have a seat!” Luo Hua was full of charisma. Her naturally noble elegance was unique and no one could ever imitate it. It was like the sound of nature— with just a casual word, it brought upon the refreshing breeze of spring.

“This humble maidservant expresses her gratitude.” The wife of the City Lord hurriedly wiped her tears. After thanking her, she sat next to the City Lord, but positioned herself slightly behind him to show her respect.

“Today, I have invited the City Lord and his wife to come just for a stroll, with no other deliberate reason. It would be best if the City Lord and his wife know of it, as there is no need to disturb the people.” The beauty Luo Hua asked casually about the situation of the city and its surroundings before she offered them a glass of wine. It was Qilan Wine, paired with the rune wine cup that was refined by student Yue Yang. The proclaimed ‘Grape Wine Moonlight Cup’ needed a good match and its pairing was none other than the top quality Qilan Wine. Along with the Heaven Realm runes that decorated the exquisite wine glass, it became even more stunning, as if it was something extraordinary that fell out of the sky.

“This, this…” The Redemption City Lord had never seen such a beautiful rune wine glass in his life. He held the glass, hands trembling, and dared not bow his head to take a sip for fear that he would show improper mannerisms.

“Since the City Lord likes this cup, I shall give it to the Lord as a wine vessel!” The beauty Luo Hua toasted her glass, dipping her lips to have a drink.

Redemption City Lord quickly thanked her.

When he looked up, she had already faded away and disappeared without a trace.

The Redemption City Lord and the others were not surprised at her departure at all and even felt that it was reasonable. With such a noble status, being able to have a seat and a drink with them was already a huge way of showing them respect. To have any other high-ranking body to entertain a mere ant was absolutely impossible!

The only thing that made Redemption City Lord Qianhu slightly disappointed was that the gracious ‘Master’ had not assigned him any tasks.

It seems that she still doesn’t believe in his allegiance.

And she had yet to value his ability.

After Luo Hua returned to the Grimoire World to take a long rest, the Redemption City Lord stood up with the help of student Yue Yang. Otherwise, he didn’t intend to stand up yet, but he wanted to continue showing his eagerness to be allies. Student Yue Yang asked the Redemption City Lord to try the wine, but the Redemption City Lord dared not finish it and just took a sip or two. In addition to secretly noting that it was the best wine he had ever tasted before, he also said to Yue Yang in tears that this was the most honored he had ever felt in his life. He was moved with emotions.

Student Yue Yang was not a good person in the first place. However, after learning a lot of detrimental tricks from Jun Wu You and the old fox, he was able to fool the Redemption City Lord to do his bidding without him exerting any effort himself.

Yue Yang would not consider it as a skill unless he could use the City Lord fully!

After some cordial conversations, the City Lord Redemption couldn’t help but be impatient. He asked if there were any aspects where he could be of use to Yue Yang.

Yue Yang pondered.

This action caused the hearts of the Redemption City Lord and the others to hang in the sky dangerously.

It’s over, there’s no chance at all! It seems that they have unlimited strength and would simply look down on a city lord. The most important thing is that the title of the Redemption City Lord was designated by the Central Palace in name only but in reality, it didn’t have any connections to the Central Palace itself. Even if they wanted to use me, they would think of that problem first and have second thoughts.

Just as he wanted to express thoughts to the other party, a golden scale suddenly appeared in front of everyone.

The Redemption City Lord had seen the Black Scale and knew that it could determine good and evil.

But he wondered what use was there for this golden scale that had a difference in power and appearance from the Black Scale.

Of course, this was not something that the Redemption City Lord could inquire about. All he could do was maintain a respectful posture and wait quietly. He then saw student Yue Yang take out the Black Scale of Good and Evil again, placing it on the side of the golden scale. Then, he leaned downwards and slightly swayed the golden scale. The golden scale remained steadily balanced and had no changes whatsoever.

However, the atmosphere of the surroundings was tense.

The steward’s back was drenched in sweat.

The Captain of the Guard noticed there was a big drop of sweat quickly dripping off from his hair… The Redemption City Lord had not tried this hard to control himself in his life, repeatedly meditating between loyalty and death, fearing that this mysterious golden balance was a treasure that could measure other people’s hearts.

“Please forgive me, City Lord, as the Central Palace has its own system. If there were any imperial personnel, it would be a bit inconvenient for me to entrust you with the task.” When Yue Yang explained, the Redemption City Lord had a sudden epiphany. This golden balance was a treasure that had the ability to detect the objects of spies from the Central Palace among his people. It seems that this balance was proof that they were not completely linked to the Central Palace. On one side of the scale was the treasure used by the personnel of the Central Palace, and on the other side was his own group. The two were in a state of separation, clearly distinguished under the left and right sides of the golden balance.

If the balance breaks, I guess I would never have a second chance in my life.

With that in mind, the Redemption City Lord was nearly scared to death.

If Yue Yang detected that there was a spy of the Central Palace on his side, the City Lord would have to worry about going back in one piece!

“If you have any orders, Qian Hu will follow it and offer to die without hesitation!” The Redemption City Lord wiped his cold sweat and quickly expressed his will to serve as the timing was at its best. He would be a fool if he hadn’t taken the opportunity to show his loyalty to the task!

“To be honest, perhaps you have also come to know of some hidden information about the Divine Punishment Platform. Various channels are circulating some top-secret information— some are true and some are false, but those are not important. What we need to do, is to maintain the existence of the Divine Punishment Platform, to make sure its ancient existence does not suffer any form of destruction. This is also your responsibility as a guardian of the Divine Punishment Platform.” Yue Yang explained a little bit. His clever mind immediately understood the hidden meaning: his mission was to protect the Divine Punishment Platform and prevent the execution from proceeding.

“Qian Hu accepts the order.” The Redemption City Lord immediately knelt down.

He had to agree, regardless of whether or not the task could be successfully completed.

The words of the superior being could not be refuted nor disagreed with even if the people he was talking to were Heavenly Ghost and Heavenly Demon, let alone Tanta Tu Mie or himself. Naturally, someone would stand up and have that right.

What he had to do was to provide aid in small aspects. Although he didn’t know what he was going to do, the Lord of the Redemption City felt that as long as he stood up and did it himself, he would soon prosper in the future.

As he was named the City Lord, he knew that there were ancient runes under the Divine Punishment Platform.

He also understood that King Tai Lun’s execution was a blood sacrifice unsealing ceremony.

It’s just that he pretended not to know.

Now there is a ‘God’ coming to stop this. No matter who was right or wrong, no matter which side won or lost, as long as he could join any party, it would be the greatest success!

On the contrary, if he had not joined any side, he would die a pitiful death if he was caught in the middle! He wanted to join the Central Palace’s side before, but Yu Mu obviously did not have the idea of advancing himself to the top. In addition, seeing Yu Mu being ridiculed by others in person would definitely cause his reputation to be greatly damaged, which led the City Lord to believe that currently, there must be hatred secretly piled up in his heart. If he didn’t invest in the side of the divine ‘God’ early, he, the City Lord, would probably end up becoming a sacrificial pawn.

A designated candidate sacrificed at will by the Central Palace.

A pitiful worm who’s sacrifice would calm the anger of the public!

In view of this, how could the Redemption City Lord not fight for his wealth, life and bright future?

Good birds would choose greener woods[1].

TL note: [1] Literal meaning is that good poultry birds would choose the best places to live, so in contrast, it means ‘those with great talents should find a place/person who could lead them to let their abilities flourish in good conditions’.

If he didn’t put on his best performance now, he would definitely regret it for life if this once-in-a-lifetime opportunity passed by!

Yue Yang first motioned for the Redemption City Lord and everyone else to sit down before he smiled: “City Lord, don’t be anxious. Actually, even if I don’t do anything, it would be impossible for the warden Tantai to open the Divine Punishment Platform and explore the secrets of ancient runes. Because, as long as we know the truth that the three ancient runes would form a whole under the tutelage of a ‘God’, it would be impossible to even move it by exhausting the power of the warden Tantai.”

The Redemption City Lord then felt odd.

If that was the case, what would I do then?

But the steward reacted at once, and immediately brought out his strength as an actor, bowing with his face full of tears: “The divine ‘God’ loves the world and sympathises with the people of Redemption City. The ‘God’ is unable to watch the warden open the Divine Punishment Platform with blood sacrifices and soul elimination. This humble servant is really dense…”

Qian Hu’s head buzzed.

I am a fool even when I am the lord of the city!

I can’t even compare with a steward!

This matter was not a simple question of obtaining the Ancient Runes. It was definitely impossible for Tantai Tu Mie to take it, but why was it necessary to stop it?

Obviously, they don’t want Tantai Tu Mie, or rather the people in the Central Palace to know that there were three ancient runes under the Divine Punishment Platform and their ancient secrets! Therefore, the ‘God’ has descended here to stop them and let the truth remain buried under the ground. The Central Palace should know a little bit of the news as Tantai Tu Mie used the execution of King Tai Lun to test it out. But the Gods didn’t want the truth to be leaked, as it would cause pandemonium in the entire Southern Heaven Realm, resulting in cultivators of all walks of life to swarm the platform with endless chaos.

“City Lord Qian Hu, I want to see the wife of King Tai Lun. Find a way to arrange it.” Student Yue Yang ordered.

“Order received!” When the Redemption City Lord heard this, he immediately responded with a solemn expression.

Although he was not personally called by his name, he has already taken a big step forward— he was already called ‘City Lord Qian Hu’. Compared with the politeness of ‘City Lord’ and ‘Lord’ before, he had gotten closer in their relationship. He would have really made it in their alliance if Yue Yang removed the two words of ‘City Lord’. With such a task and such an opportunity, even if Qian Hu was a fool, he would know how to climb up, let alone an old experienced lord who was proficient in the matters of the world.

Yue Yang patted the Redemption City Lord’s shoulder to show his praise: “The job should be done and it must be done well. In fact, it is not only my Mistress, but also behind us, there are many eyes watching this matter. It only takes one word to promote a lower ranker, so just let yourself go and do it!”

Qian Hu was really moved this time.

With so many authority figures backing him up, what else was there to be afraid of. He suddenly burst into tears: “Qian Hu will not be able to repay your benevolence even with death!”

After a day, Qian Hu used countless secret connections to find Queen Tai Lun in hiding. However, he heard Yue Yang say something that shocked him: “Queen, I have seen King Tai Lun, but he is desperately stubborn and refuses to come with me. Do you have a way to persuade His Highness?”

Can King Tai Lun be rescued at any time?

Was the rigorous security of the Central Palace just in vain? The one on patrol duty was the ‘Heavenly Ghost’, the number one subordinate of the TantaiTu Mie!

Forget it, don’t think too much about the things that are beyond your imagination; you’re best suited to be a side character. If you think too much about those things, you will definitely go crazy!

But having said that, isn’t King Tai Lun being immensely tortured in jail?

Someone had already offered to save him, so why did he not take the chance to flee?

The Redemption City Lord Qian Hu remained puzzled…

chapters.title: Chapter 832 - Hope, The Hope Of Decem-Millennial Perseverance
chapters.body:
Chapter 832 - Hope, The Hope Of Decem-Millennial Perseverance

Chapter 832: Hope, The Hope of Decem-Millennial Perseverance

“He’s just tired.” The Queen of King Tai Lun sighed softly.

“What?” City Lord Qian Hu was stunned.

“Actually, both of us escaped from the Resentment Cleansing Prison. Unlike me, who was known as the ‘Wild Flower’ back then, Tai Lun came from the Dark Realm.” The Queen said. Yue Yang was still calm and composed, but Lord Qian Hu was shocked. Wild Flower? Ten thousand years ago, she was the most insane female bandit in the Southern Heaven Realm! The current Head of the Flames is completely incomparable to her! Wild Flower was known to have seized the existence of several emperor-level Heaven Realm territories. The most powerful subordinates of the Warden of Tantai, Heavenly Ghost and Heavenly Demon, have joined forces for three days and three nights before they could successfully arrest her, bringing her to justice.

Wild Flower was not very well-known in the early days and was peaceful by nature. She didn’t like to fight; she was just a female mercenary wandering around.

Later, no one knew what happened, but she became a female bandit.

Looting everywhere she went.

At that time, as the Empress Fei Wen Li wanted to conquer the entire Heaven Realm, she was threatened by the Central Palace and hence, invited heroes from all over to join the fight. The Heaven Realm Kings and the domain emperors all gathered in the Western Heaven Realm to face off with the hero army that was led by the conquering Queen. As a result, the leading forces in most places were eliminated and many powerhouses took the opportunity to rise in their ranks. This was especially seen in areas under the rule of the emperors who had passed in battle, where countless people competed for the reigning position.

The Wild Flower bandit group was the kind of looting-style bandit group where the thought of specialising in a specific trait had never crossed their minds.

They conquered cities everywhere and plundered various resources, and even the Emperor level Heaven Rankers couldn’t hold them back.

In the end, when Empress Fei Wen Li was sealed, the Heaven Realm Kings returned to their districts. The emperors once again ruled the areas that were under their jurisdiction and the Central Palace also finished off the remaining warriors, extinguishing the beacon of flame that would spark wars between the people in the Heaven Realm.

As for King Tai Lun, if he came from the Dark Realm…City Lord Qian Hu shuddered secretly, feeling that there were some things that he just couldn’t know about. After all, ignorance is bliss.

He excused himself from Yue Yang’s side hurriedly. For secrets that should not be uncovered, the lesser he knew, the better.

“Tai Lun was not called ‘Tai Lun’ before as he was a fugitive from the Dark Realm. Only after he fled to the Tai Lun Continent and had met me did he claim to be Tai Lun. Me and him, it was love at first sight, where the binds of race and philosophy were unable to stop the fire of love between us. However, he and I were both outcasts of fate…I am the daughter of a death row prisoner in Resentment Cleansing Prison. Due to the protection of my relatives, I managed to escape before the total annihilation of my family. As for Tai Lun, he had it worse. He was a fallen cultivator, a martial artist destined to be a prisoner since birth. Even if he successfully escaped the Dark Realm, he will forever remain as a field mouse who will never see the light of day.” The Queen reminisced, her eyes flashing with nostalgia.

“So you formed the Wild Flower Bandit Group?” the Head of the Flames asked.

“No. For people like us, our biggest wish is for others to not pay attention to us, let alone form a band of thieves. That was just done under the request of Tantai Tu Mie, or in other words, the request of the Central Palace.” Shaking her head, the Queen’s answer surprised both Lie Yan and Bi Lu.

“When did Tantai Tu Mie capture you both?” Bi Lu was curious. Why did Tantai Tu Mie want the duo to form the Wild Flower Bandit Group?

“We were already in love for about a year when we encountered him. I was pregnant with a baby when Tantai Tu Mie appeared in front of us with Heavenly Ghost and Heavenly Demon. Against them, there was no possibility of resisting arrest as we were completely helpless. He imprisoned us in the Resentment Cleansing Prison, and after the child was born, he took the child away. We had no choice but to follow his orders to form the Wild Flower Bandit Group, hence we looted everywhere and gave him the plundered resources… In fact, this has always been the case. We were not the first victims to be threatened, nor would we be the last. In order to obtain more resources, to better control the Heaven Realm, and to maintain their picture-perfect image, the Central Palace used various means to form a myriad of bandit groups. Countless cities and territories were seized in various areas of the Heaven Realm. Almost all of the territories that were not attacked were areas that were controlled by the Central Palace…excluding the domain emperors and the leaders’ territories such as Emperor-level Heaven Realm districts.
