Various energies, blessings and influences were created… Lionheart King and the Heavenly Ghost brothers thought that Yue Yang’s domain was the Starry Sky Domain, but only Sky Execution and Dragon Emperor knew that Yue Yang’s field was actually ‘Creation’. He was just simulating the Night Empress’s Starry Sky, using his creation field to form a domain of the starry sky.

Wow!

The respect of the Lionheart King, who received many of the created blessings, increased. The longer time they spent in the Starry Sky Domain of the Third Young Master, the greater the blessings became. With such a backer, did he really need to be afraid of the Heavenly Ghost?

The Heavenly Ghost brothers, who felt that their own realms were suppressed and weakened, secretly realised that they were on thin ice.

The fight should be ended quickly, otherwise it would be dangerous for them if things were prolonged.

Both sides unreservedly launched an attack on each other, with bombardments of fists blasting against the vital points of their respective opponent’s body.

Due to the frantic attacks of five powerhouses, the Star-gazing Fortress burst into an unprecedented explosion. Four suns, two thunderballs and a dragon fireball hit eight blood-colored energy balls resulting in a simultaneous wave of explosions that ruined the sky and the Earth. City Lord Qian Hu came to his senses from shock and found that he was not dead yet, but fell on a burning battleship ten kilometers away from the Star-gazing Fortress. The steward, whose life force was more tenacious than a cockroach, also remained alive as he was stuck on the deck. He seemed to be in much better shape than Lima as the tauren hung upside down on the mast with blood dripping profusely. At least that guy was still snoring; Lima appeared to be breathing very lightly as the force of that shockwave probably caused Lima to lose at least half of his life.

He sat up strenuously and ignored his bloodshed, opening his eyes to look at the Star-gazing Fortress.

The Star-gazing Fortress no longer existed.

In its place was a huge pit that was five kilometers in size.

Queen Tai Lun and the others, all of whom had landed seven or eight kilometers away, were recklessly scattered all over the place.

There were only three people who were still standing.

One was Yue Yang.

The other two were the Heavenly Ghost and the Heavenly Demon brothers.

Heavenly Ghost was injured, but he appeared to be in a much better state than Lionheart King and Sky Execution.

The Lionheart King resembled a peacock who had shed its feathers, his wings now in a bald appearance. He tried to stand up, but the pain in the ribs of his chest and the shock of his mind made him weak and dizzy, making him unable to rise. Not far from his feet, Sky Execution sat on the ground who was still trying to recover as if he had another battle to fight. The Dragon Emperor held on with his shield, expression darkening as he wiped the blood on the corners of his lips…

Yue Yang was still levitating in the air, holding a nauseated Bi Lu in his arms. She was still tightly grabbing onto a shiny box even though she seemed to be dizzy, not forgetting Yue Yang’s instructions.

From the extremely high sky, a person who resembled the stature of a fairy descended.

It was the beauty Luo Hua.

As soon as she appeared, the surroundings burst into a waft of fragrance, as if flower petals had fallen from the sky like snow.

With her appearance, the entirely fierce battlefield seemed to immediately turn into a flowery garden.

“Fortunately I was fast enough, that was so dangerous!” Luo Hua patted her chest with joy. The veil on her face was surprisingly intact and was not blown off. In fact, she didn’t even have a speck of dust on her body. After her previous successful attempt at merging the Swift Finger Light Fang, Light Dragon Spirit and the Light Spirit Aurora, paired with her breakthrough with Yue Yang, she was able to get a glimpse of the ‘Divine Realm’ and her strength subsequently advanced by leaps and bounds.

“Die!” The once proud but now currently bloody Heavenly Ghost raised his finger, which made the blood-colored beam of light quickly fly straight past the center of Luo Hua’s eyebrows.

“Too slow.” The beauty Luo Hua raised her hand.

The eight dragon-headed Aurora spiralled into a curved ring, enveloping the largest dragon head Aurora.

She fought back thousands of times faster than the blood-colored light beam. After swallowing the blood-colored light beam, the Aurora kept attacking the Heavenly Ghost with an unpredictable speed and power that made Lionheart King’s eyes twitch subconsciously. This was because as soon as the beauty Luo Hua lifted her hand, the ‘Death Aurora’ was sent out directly, blasting back the Heavenly Ghost by about 10,000 meters.

For the first time, Heavenly Ghost screamed in pain. Even when Sky Execution bombarded his left ear and pain thundered through his brain, it did not cause him to exclaim at all.

The Dragon Emperor smiled, “It turns out that the Supreme Will can still be used in this way.”

The Lionheart King asked in surprise, “What?”

After asking, he suddenly realized that the attacking power of this masked beauty was not as powerful as his own ‘sun’, and yet, why was she able to injure the Heavenly Ghost? The reason was because her energy beam was filled with her intent to kill. In other words, her will and her attacking energy were together as one. The Heavenly Ghost’s Ripple Talent was unable to eliminate this damaging effect and bore the full force of the attack, which was why it seemed to be so painful. After the Lionheart King understood the technique, it seemed as if a larger window had opened before him and he felt a sudden sense of lightness in his heart.

It turns out that the true unshakable Supreme Will was omnipresent. It didn’t matter whether one was maintaining the state of mind or attacking— it would always remain as one.

I have only just touched the entrance of the door to enlightenment!

The Heavenly Demon appeared behind Luo Hua. This sneak attack of his was the same one that caused the Lionheart King to be attacked consecutively and it was impossible to dodge it.

The beauty Luo Hua did not look back as her body suddenly became richly scented. A snow fox girl appeared and waved a scented energy vortex, enveloping the Heavenly Demon before the vortex flashed and disappeared. After three seconds, the mighty Heavenly Demon was teleported 10,000 meters away and his whole body fell to the ground in embarrassment.

“An attack that doesn’t require power?” Lionheart King looked dumbfounded. This kind of special battle had completely subverted his previous understanding of battles.

“The combination of the unique Will of the Beast and the teleportation ability.” The Dragon Emperor smiled.

“But it was just a Holy Beast. If it was a Divine Beast, wouldn’t it be…” The Lionheart King felt that he really needed to update his way of thinking.

“The Will of the Beast. When it forms, there will only be death.”

The Dragon Emperor said with certainty.

As if confirming his words, the Heavenly Ghost condensed two blood-red energy balls, ready to remotely blast with the intention of killing the beauty Luo Hua.

He realised that this opponent was not very strong, but had a high realm and a fast attack speed. In other words, she hasn’t grown at all, just like the Third Young Master! No matter how fast the speed was, even a 6th Level Heaven Rank will be annihilated directly by the energy shockwave that would erupt with full force, let alone a mere 3rd Level Heaven Ranker.

The moment the Heavenly Ghost threw the energy ball.

A crack suddenly formed in the sky.

Like a knife that had traveled through time and space, the sky was split in half… The Heavenly Demon was screaming frantically whereas the Heavenly Ghost turned around in amazement. A golden snake demon that was 100 meters high appeared behind him, wielding a giant golden blade that tore apart the sky.

This scene felt so familiar.

Time seemed to have reversed back to ten thousand years ago, where the same slash was swiped over the battlefield.

After transcending through time and space, it seemed to be present again.

Under the gaze of the Lionheart King, Dragon Emperor, City Lord Qian Hu and the others, a small snake demon Loli appeared out of nowhere.

She waved the war blade in her hand. It was unstoppable as she struck the body of the Heavenly Ghost in half. From his shoulders, slashing diagonally downwards all the way to his waist, any talents, field domains, beasts or treasures, were all useless… Just like back then, an image of a six-armed snake demon appeared. With a slash of her blade, the sky and earth was split in half.

The only difference was that the bloodied, War God Snake Demon became exhausted. Although she killed dozens of his companions in a split second, her strength had been reduced to the point of not being able to kill the Heavenly Ghost, allowing the heavily wounded man to escape from death once again.

With her reappearance today that landed a full blow of her true powers, she recreated the scenario of that year with her being in her peak state.

This time, it was absolutely impossible for him to be as lucky as last time.

The eyes of the red-haired Heavenly Ghost revealed an endless pit of despair and fear— It’s over!

chapters.title: Chapter 838: Then I Won’T Grow Up!
chapters.body:
Chapter 838: Then I Won’T Grow Up!

Chapter 838: Then I Won’t Grow Up!

The Heavenly Demon stood up.

He blankly stared at the red-haired Heavenly Ghost, whose body split into two as he fell from the air and landed in the ruins of the Star-gazing Fortress. He didn’t need to look closer to confirm his suspicions— using the telepathic sense between the brothers, he knew that the Heavenly Ghost was dead once the blade had struck. It had nothing to do with his body being cut in half; instead, it was because the opponent had slashed the soul of the Heavenly Ghost.

The moment the sky was torn apart, this doomed resolution was fated to come true.

As Xiao Wen Li started to fly towards him, he got out of his trance immediately.

With speed that he had never possessed before.

He turned around and ran away.

The Heavenly Demon could be a worthy enemy against anyone else in the world, but like the Heavenly Ghost, he genuinely feared this ‘little snake demon Loli’. Back then, the image of the Snake Demon War God had been imprinted as an indelible scar on his soul. Even if ten thousand years had passed, his fear of her never decreased.

Nan Bei, who appeared out of nowhere, rushed towards Xiao Wen Li frantically.

He was a loyal soldier, using his own life in exchange for the Heavenly Demon’s chance to escape!

Whip!

Nan Bei was suspended in the sky as Xiao Wen Li pointed at him with her blade.

Under the gaze of the Lionheart King, he shook his head and sighed— the little snake demon Lolita had used one of the simplest techniques to kill Nan Bei, who was full of tricks and underhanded ploys. In the face of absolute strength, any scheming and conspiracy were plain and powerless. After countless periods of growth, Xiao Wen Li, who could penetrate the seal in an attempt to rescue Empress Fei Wen Li in the Black Hole Dimension, was no longer something that a mere fly like Nan Bei could stop. Her current abilities were still far from the invincible Snake Demon Princess who crossed the boundaries of the Heavens before. But although there was still a gap compared to her original powers, there was not much of a difference.

What shocked Lionheart King the most wasn’t the fact that this little snake demon Lolita had killed the Heavenly Ghost in a matter of seconds as soon as she was summoned.

It was the fact that the Third Young Master hadn’t done anything.

Lionheart King knew that the Third Young Master was definitely the strongest out of all of them, but because he hadn’t taken any form of action, he couldn’t gauge the true strength of the Third Young Master.

In the sky, the Gemini constellation shone brilliantly. And a cluster of stars seemed to answer someone’s call as they crowded together, forming a vast starry maze.

In the eyes of the bystanders, although the Heavenly Demon was escaping at super speed, he had never flown out of the starry maze.

No matter how the Heavenly Demon insisted on flying in a straight line.

He was just pointlessly running circles inside the maze.

Even when the Heavenly Demon stopped, the Lionheart King found that he was ironically standing at the starting point where he originally started to run from. In other words, although the Heavenly Demon ran aimlessly for a long time, he had never left his initial position. Xiao Wen Li did not pursue him again as she returned to Yue Yang’s side. Accompanied by the beauty Luo Hua and Xiao Wen Li, Yue Yang grabbed a handful of ‘stars’ from the sky under the astonished gaze of Lionheart King.

Nonchalantly, he catapulted the stars from his hands.

It was an action that was more casual than a child’s game of throwing marbles.

However, after leaving Yue Yang’s palm, those flying ‘stars’ immediately accelerated tens of thousands of times faster. The cluster shot into the starry sky maze, dispersing towards the Heavenly Demon faster than they already were. From the original starlight, the stars turned into a long starlight beam, reaching an immensely high speed that made Lionheart unable to see things clearly.

No matter how many times the Heavenly Demon tried to dodge and escape, the stars were able to easily hit his body with infinite accuracy.

The Heavenly Demon roared.

Desperately forced to empower himself, he surpassed the initial stage of the 7th level Heaven Rank and reached the peak of that same rank. With an increase in power that he had never used before and creating the Ripple Talent to protect his body, he was set to directly endure the full force of the ‘stars’ by Yue Yang.

The Lionheart King was surprised to see that all of his last-minute efforts were completely useless. The Heavenly Demon’s body looked as if it was as fragile as a piece of cardboard, whereas the stars were powerful arrows that pierced through his body with ease. The stars were densely embedded on every part of the Heavenly Demon’s body, making a chain of muffled stab sounds. Looking at the expression of the Heavenly Demon, it was clear to everyone that he was in denial. Even as his body and arms were pierced with the myriad of stars, he still portrayed a horrified expression, as if he meant the words ”this can’t be true”.

Yue Yang raised his hand,condensing a galaxy-like, star vortex.

He threw it aside casually.

The vast vortex that had once submerged hundreds of millions of stars was thrown over, and landed above the head of the Heavenly Demon. The vortex of stars spun, which caused the body of the Heavenly Demon to be crushed into pieces. Even as his energy and soul continued to pointlessly struggle, after repetitive churns, the black hole formed by the vortex had entirely swallowed up everything in sight.

Upon watching this scene, the Lionheart King couldn’t help but shiver.

God!

The noun that flashed in Lionheart’s mind was this supreme existence.

Seeing Yue Yang who quickly killed the Heavenly Demon with nothing but a gesture of his hand, the Lionheart King suddenly understood how large of a gap was between him and the other party.

That was the difference between humans and Gods. It was a realm that could never be approached and was even more impossible to transcend! Although the Lionheart King was informed that before he had killed the Heavenly Demon, Yue Yang had taken many other preparatory steps to achieve that result, such as seeing through the opponent’s schemes. He also broke through the weaknesses of the domains and the beasts whilst figuring out the ways to suppress them. Also, it took a long time for him to condense the Starry Sky Domain and whatnot as he waited for the perfect timing before he killed the Heavenly Demon in one fell swoop.

However, that alone was scary enough!

The Lionheart King admitted that even if he tried his best, he would not be able to defeat Heavenly Ghost or Heavenly Demon. Without breaking the Shockwave Domain, it would have been impossible to even achieve a tie. But the broken Shockwave Domain, the Ripple Talent that did not assist in the enemy’s attack and the weakness of the beasts were all seen through by the Third Young Master. Even the beast of the little snake demon Lolita, who killed the Heavenly Ghost with her last slash, was also summoned thanks to him. If the Third Young Master had not been present in today’s battle at the Star-gazing Fortress, everyone here might have been brutally exterminated under the Shockwave Domain of the Heavenly Ghost and Heavenly Demon.

“Third Young Master, Qian Hu is willing to be your bull and horse[1] to follow all of your orders irrefutably.” City Lord Qian Hu flew over and expressed his attitude anxiously as he was afraid that the Lionheart King would approach him first.

TL Note: [1] In case anyone forgot from chp 830, it means ‘one will be at your beck and call and will do literally everything for you’.

“…” The Lionheart King glanced at him contemptuously.

Do I have to be so humble?

I know a slave will always be a slave, but a friend will also always be a friend! The status between us will never change!

However, the Lionheart King also understood the actions of Lord Qian Hu. Upon sight of such a great backer, he must take the initiative. With Qian Hu’s strength merely at the 5th Level of the Heaven Rank, he was unfortunately not qualified to be friends with the Third Young Master.

The Lionheart King actually felt that he himself wasn’t qualified to be friends with the Third Young Master, let alone the City Lord Qian Hu. Heck, he was not even qualified to be friends with Sky Execution who fought like a madman and the Dragon Emperor who was calm and collected. At best, they were at the same level with Yong Hui, Hua Ban and the Flying Locusts. But because they took refuge late, they might not even be as favored as the others.

The Underworld Emperor flew back and descended from the sky, along with several great Demon Kings who returned from all directions.

They nodded to Yue Yang.

It meant that all the fleeing enemies had been eliminated.

Yue Yang waved his hand and signaled for them to clean up the battlefield. If there were any good items, they should not be wasted. Then, he smiled at the Lionheart King, “There are still many opportunities for cooperation in the future. I hope that the Lionheart King will continue to cooperate sincerely and fight side by side, just like how we did tonight.”

The Lionheart King was overjoyed when he heard this— the questions in his heart were finally answered.

He was really concerned that Yue Yang might backstab him.

He knew that if Yue Yang really turned his back on him, he didn’t have the confidence in escaping the starry maze of the Third Young Master, nor did he have the confidence to avoid the ‘stars’ that soared at incredibly high speeds.

Not to mention, he was still in the middle stage of his realm. Even if he was at the peak stage, the Lionheart King also felt that it was impossible to defeat this incredible young man. Let’s not talk about the speed of improvement, he was already from the ‘God Clan’. Even if the opponents had the ability to win, how could they dare to attack this kid? Forget about the Supreme Dragon God; even if Mo Long knew of it, it would be impossible to escape the pursuits of that man. Mo Long, the same legendary figure that even the Central Palace deemed as a pain!

Seeing that Yue Yang intended to join forces with him to fight against the Central Palace, the Lionheart King hurriedly endured his injuries and gave a grand bow. “Definitely, the Lionheart’s wish is to have the Third Young Master direct the horse’s head[2].”

T/L note: [2] means to let someone command/ take control of you, like how a rider directs the way horses would run by reigning them.

After he finished speaking, he took another fascinated glance at Qian Hu.

See for yourself, I am his trusted friend, and you are just a slave!

The City Lord Qian Hu pretended to be confused as he knew his own weight. The Lionheart King would naturally be a friend to Yue Yang. To simply serve him to the best of his abilities was already the greatest blessing from the Heavens. How could he dare to compete in standings with the Southern Heaven Realm’s strongest Heaven Ranker, Lionheart King?

Queen Tai Lun came over to thank him.

Along with her, trailed King Tai Lun who was seriously injured.

Although King Tai Lun was eager to die before, it was in the past. Now that the Heavenly Ghost and Heavenly Demon who held him in custody were killed by Yue Yang, there was no need to continue being imprisoned!

After a small conversation, Yue Yang learned from King Tai Lun that there was a certain possibility of successfully entering the Rift of Space and Time in the Dark Realm. He temporarily entrusted King Tai Lun and his wife with the Lionheart King to conceal and protect them before giving another task to the City Lord Qian Hu. Finally, along with Sky Execution and the others, they drifted away. When the Lionheart King and the others soared into the sky and prepared to leave, they found that the starlight rune pattern on the ground of the Star-gazing Harbor was still there, faintly flashing. As more and more dazzling flashes occurred with an extremely unstable force of energy, everyone suddenly sweated profusely.

They flew wildly with all their strength and escaped, a distance of a dozen kilometers between them and the harbor.

A loud noise was heard from behind.

The huge and incomparable Star-gazing Harbor had somehow collapsed. The explosion disintegrated the harbor into countless pieces and crashed to the ground, resulting in the devastating shockwave that pulsed towards them. Although they were tens of kilometers apart, it still made the Lionheart King and the others feel a bit panicked.

“Third Young Master is just incredible.” King Tai Lun, who had been tortured by the Heavenly Ghost, sighed loudly.

“…” The Lionheart King said nothing.

He wanted to tell King Tai Lun very much that if he had seen the Heavenly Demon still remaining in place after a long time in the starry maze, or the Third Young Master easily killing the Heavenly Demon by shooting some ‘stars’ , he would be even more amazed! To disintegrate the Star-gazing Harbor was just a small fry to him; the truly terrifying strength of the Third Young master was probably not even revealed!

How can the descendant of the Supreme Dragon God be such an indescribable being!

The Lionheart King did not say this out aloud. No matter what, he still thinks it’s better if less people know of this secret.

After returning to the Tong Tian Tower, the joy of killing the Heavenly Ghost and the Heavenly Demon made the people like Sky Execution, Dragon Emperor and the others who have been suppressing themselves scream loudly. The arduous practice with the elders of the Central Palace has finally paid off. Although they did not kill the Heavenly Ghost and Heavenly Demon alone, nor did they fight alone, but to be able to battle against the Heavenly Ghost who was a powerhouse of the Central Palace and even appeared victorious, to say there were no sense of accomplishments would be a false claim!

Even the Underworld Emperor and the Great Demon King Baruth, who were responsible for hunting down the guards of the Central Palace, cheered.

In the carnival atmosphere, the old man Nan Gong smiled.

Secretly, he wrote the new legend of Tong Tian Tower…With Yue Yang’s growth rate, more and more brilliant records that were once impossible to achieve were put to words with his pen. These were not only the honors that could never be erased, but they were also a gift left to the future generations. With the guidance of the predecessors, the future generations will definitely be more determined to move forward. The rise of Tongtian Tower will be unstoppable under the influence of Yue Yang!

Tian Luo Palace.

“Really? You defeated the Heavenly Ghost and Heavenly Demon? That’s pretty good! Xiao Wen Li has grown up, I am so happy!” Only Si-niang* was able to caress Xiao Wen Li’s head and make the little girl become a bundle of joy with showered praises.

*small reminder: Si-niang is just the way he calls her. It means ‘Fourth mother’, but she is his adoptive mother.

“What about me?” Shuang Er was also eager for some praise.

“You? I’ll consider you grown up when you no longer keep leaning on your brother,” Si-niang smiled and rewarded the little girl with a playfully light slap.

“Then I won’t grow up!” The little girl felt most comfortable when she laid on her elder brother, so it didn’t matter to her if she would never grow up.

“Haha!” The beauty Luo Hua couldn’t help laughing when she heard it.

“I want to go to the Dark Realm, but I also want to check out the Divine Grimoire first.” Yue Yang mentioned the Divine Grimoire to Si-niang again.

“Going to the Dark Realm first would be better. You would have to pay attention to the fluctuations in the Rift of Space and Time as sometimes it can get very unstable, so be especially careful. Then again, I am not very clear about these details either. As for the Divine Grimoire, it is not that easy to contract with it. Xiao[3] Luo Hua, come and help me chop the meat. I will make a good meal tonight to reward your efforts!” Si-niang still avoided the topic of the Divine Grimoire, but she actually supported Yue Yang to go to the Dark Realm.

T/L note: [3] Xiao is directly said as ‘little’ but in Chinese culture, those who are older can add the prefix ‘Xiao’ in front of the names of those younger than them as a term of endearment.

She also knows about the Dark Realm?

And it seems like she was really familiar with it too, damn it!

However, Yue Yang was no longer surprised at this point. He didn’t know why Si-niang wanted to conceal her identity and her past, but he knew that she must have a good reason behind it. But if Si-niang wouldn’t say it, he wouldn’t pry either.

He believed that Si-niang would tell him the truth one day.

Actually, it doesn’t matter to him even if he would never know the truth, as long as his family could live together happily.

chapters.title: Chapter 839: I Was Never A Traitor
chapters.body:
Chapter 839: I Was Never A Traitor

Chapter 839: I Was Never A Traitor

Yue Yang took some time off to go to the Dark Realm.

Although it was a bit difficult to enter, that small obstacle didn’t stop Yue Yang, who possessed the Three Realm Compass. Through his field observation of the Dark Realm, he understood a few things.

The people who lived there had not completely changed for the better nor did they take a turn for the worse.

It was the harsh living environment that forced them to become even more united.

Forcing them to hold on to hope.

If they hadn’t come together as one and were unable to hold on to the tiniest sliver of hope in their hearts, they wouldn’t have been able to live this long in that kind of hopeless environment of the Dark Realm.

What made Yue Yang the most speechless was the fact that in that extremely harsh world, the exiled race had been closely connected with everything around them, forming a link of connections biologically and naturally after tens of thousands of years of relentless adaptation.

If it was simply interrupted, the consequences would be disastrous.

In other words, even if Yue Yang had the ability to take the people of the exiled race that he encountered out of the Dark Realm, he couldn’t do that nonchalantly.

Otherwise, the Dark Realm would be in danger of collapse. Moreover, student Yue Yang was not as benevolent to the point where he would be kind to all of the exiled in the Dark Realm and rescue them at all costs. He was not a savior! For strangers, he would not do favours without payments or rewards. But to do things that weren’t provided compensation for and were even at the expense of risking his precious life was out of the question!

If something happened to him, what would become of Si-niang, Bing Er and the others?

What about Wu Xia and Tigress (Princess Qian Qian)?

Student Yue Yang had never considered himself a ‘Virgin Mary’. Naturally, he would not do anything that was absolute and righteous.

Just like the characters in the novels Yue Yang had read before, they claim to not need a woman or have any relations with their relatives for a lifetime. In order to prioritise cultivation, they cut off every connection they had with the world, only focusing on cultivating for their entire lifetime. In the end, thousands of years would have passed in the blink of an eye. The strongest enemy could be killed in mere seconds, the planet could be destroyed with one punch, and they would have reached the most invincible realm the universe had to offer. In the end, everyone that had ever lived in the world would be dead, leaving behind a lonely and immortal virgin soul. For God’s sake, that wasn’t being the best ranker in the world, that was being the densest person in the world!

If you were going to do that, you might as well be a monk.

The monks in the Celestial Heavens have wages, work uniforms, Ipad 3’s, Mercedes-Benz’s and BMW’s. They could have a lover, occasionally have some fun, and make things exciting for some prostitutes— now that is life!

So, now that he really transversed into another world, Yue Yang will definitely not be that kind of invincible, lonely and self-propelling peerless master.

After all, it was the legendary harem life that was his favorite!

After going to the Dark Realm, Yue Yang had thought of an idea. Since it was a prison created by a great man in ancient times, naturally, it would still play its role as a prison. Sometimes, committing too many murders would become rather boring, so finding a place where you wouldn’t be able to die instantly would probably give some form of relocation towards life. So after Yue Yang discussed with Xue Wu Xia, Tigress and the others, they decided that the exiled race in the Dark Realm would not need immediate rescuing. If the opportunity arose, they would take the chance to rescue a few of them. Using the replacement method, they could later catch some guys who required long hours of gruesome torture to calm their waves of hatred and send them into solitary confinement. With that, they would be able to replace some of the original civilians of the Dark Realm.

“This approach is very appropriate.” Even Si-niang, who had never questioned Yue Yang’s decisions, gave him a rare praise after hearing this idea.

“In the Western Heaven Realm, there was a middle-aged woman who asked me to find two people.” Yue Yang remembered something, cocking his head to the side as he tried to get some ‘internal information’ from Si-niang.

“I don’t know about that, how could I know anyone from the Western Heaven Realm.” After hearing this, Si-niang gave him a beautifully innocent gaze.

“…” Classmate Yue Yang almost blurted out his inner thoughts.

Yet you know so much of the Dark Realm?

Forget it, she didn’t have to talk about it!

There was also someone who may know a little bit of internal information.

And the person was none other than the similarly mysterious Emperor. Student Yue Yang had pretended to be a good boy to see him.

Student Yue Yang was rejected initially, but he was absolutely incapable of shame. His Majesty couldn’t stand that kid’s rogue behaviour. Hence, he was summoned, despite their meeting being separated by a hall door.

Speaking of the middle-aged woman from the Heaven Realm who had asked for his help, His Majesty groaned for a long time, before he finally got angry and blasted Yue Yang out, “For this kind of thing, you should ask Nan Gong and stop coming here to act like a fool. Next time, be more serious and don’t try to laugh sinisterly either!”

After hearing this criticism, Yue Yang remembered that his smile also had another skill, which had a charming effect on the opposite sex.

Nauseating.

His Majesty discovered the smug smile just now.

As for the Divine Grimoire, Yue Yang tried to calm down his anxiously beating heart. After listening to Si-niang’s words, he didn’t plan to argue with her for the time being. Rather than expecting the Divine Grimoire to recognize who he was now, it was better to use his own strength and summon it. Or, he could try to pass all ten levels in the Land of Trials of the Heaven Realm, where even Empress Fei Wen Li suspected that there was a Divine Grimoire waiting for its new owner.Although Yue Yang didn’t know if he could get the Divine Grimoire’s recognition as he had already owned two grimoires himself, at least there was a small chance. He would be too sorry for himself if he didn’t make an attempt to try.

Tong Tian Tower was serenely calm.

As they basked in the sweetness of the victory brought about by the siege of the Heavenly Ghost Brothers, Sky Execution and the others were still on the fifth floor of the Heaven Stairway, continuing their fight against the two palace elders.

The two elders, Red Crane and Chi Feng, had long wanted to surrender like Yong Hui and Yue Su. However, with their prideful ego, they were reluctant to. Now that Sky Execution and the others needed training targets, the two palace elders knew that this would be a very depressing task but they had to grit their teeth and endure them. They still clung on to the hopes in their hearts that one day, the superiors of the Central Palace will return to the Tong Tian Tower and save them from this scenario.

Well, everyone needed to hold on to a little bit of hope.

No matter how naive it was or how vague the possibility could be.

Otherwise, one wouldn’t be able to handle the pressure of life!

Compared to Red Crane and Chi Feng, Pang Pei, the fake Emerald Lord, was in an even more tragic situation, because he finally made Yue Yang ‘remember’.

It turned out that he also planned to make great efforts to make some connections and draw in a few firm allies in the process of observing and cutting off the Tai Lun Continent to stabilize his increasingly dangerous status. Especially with regard to the Central Palace, he had the will to absolutely establish a good relationship with them.

Who would have thought, not just the elder Yu Mu, but even the arrogant Heavenly Ghost died without much of a fight.

Which led to him being mentally unprepared.

As he watched all his plans fall through.

King Tai Lun was rescued, and the entire Central Palace’s residence in the Star-gazing Fortress and its surrounding forces were all annihilated. If the Emerald Lord hadn’t escaped fast enough, he would have been the target of this cleansing. The Clown Mercenary Group was disbanded, and the last news from the Clown was ‘to follow the destiny of fate’. In fact, the Clown was wanted by the Head of the Flames for a bounty of one billion, and he was tempted to report it himself and receive a reward of 100 million. However, in the end Pang Pei gave up this tempting idea. If the Clown didn’t meet his end after he made the report, then he would be a goner. That guy was definitely someone who would go through Heaven and Hell to exact his revenge.

On the Lionheart King’s side, he couldn’t make sense of how he got out of trouble early.

The only person who was most likely to have a relationship with him was probably King Tuo Ye, Mo Ye Chang Qing. As long as he fully supported him, then the Emerald Lord could continue to survive.

The physically and mentally exhausted Emerald Lord Pang Pei took a long journey back on the airship to return to the Emerald Castle. Before entering, he ordered his powerful soldier, Yu Qian Jun, “Give the shining gems that I obtained with a lot of money to King Tuo Ye. If he is willing to support me by sending troops to suppress a few rebelling cities, then I will grant him 15 cities in the South.”

King Tuo Ye wanted the specialty ore from those 15 cities, but because he had just exchanged those sites with the Lionheart King, it was not easy to start immediately.

However, in order to get support, Pang Pei reluctantly gave it up.

Sometimes, the act of offering it in person was no different from the act of forcefully being taken away!

It doesn’t matter if his territory was small, all that matters was that it was peaceful as the rebels were being too much of an annoyance. Fortunately, they have been greatly weakened with no further development or progress. Otherwise, there would really be no form of peace at home. Pang Pei flew down to the gates of the mansion and prepared to take a comfortable hot bath while enjoying the services of handsome men. What could be more important than having fun?

With the thought of the position of having beautifully chiselled men opening up themselves and letting him thrust into them, City Lord Pang Pei couldn’t help but feel his heartbeat accelerate as he became hard on the spot.

But, there was a strange smell of blood that wafted through.

How strange, normally there would be no such smell… When Pang Pei saw that the shadow welcoming him was the Wild Bull who carried the head of his most beloved handsome man, he was shocked, “Wild Bull, is that you?”

“Are you surprised? Unexpectedly, I came back to life to obtain revenge, right?” Wild Bull was drenched with blood all over his face as he grinned.

“What the hell are you talking about?” Pang Pei cursed secretly. This guy was usually not that jealous.

“Don’t pretend to be confused, I came back today to die with you!” Wild Bull hated Pang Pei who relentlessly betrayed him. He didn’t know that everything was controlled in Yue Yang’s hands and had never thought that he was able to create a realm to simulate everything in the Gates of Life and Death. Wild Bull only believed what he saw with his eyes and what he heard with his ears. For Pang Pei, his former lover and for the betrayal he experienced that day, he gritted his teeth and planned to die with him!

Pang Pei was shocked and fled back 10,000 meters away.

However, Wild Bull quickly caught up.

At the moment when Pang Pei bombarded his body with all his strength, Wild Bull smiled terribly, “As expected, you will definitely try to kill me. Die, you liar!”

The body of the Wild Bull exploded!

If it were not for Pang Pei’s full power, Wild Bull would not have exploded, but he had already summoned an extremely unstable volcanic beast in his body before he died.

When Pang Pei saw the angry eyes of the Wild Bull before his death, he felt regretful in his heart.

I should have talked to him. After all, he was my former lover… but now, everything was already too late.

Boom!

The sky was decorated with remnants of flesh and splatters of blood.

The huge shockwave blew up the vestibule of the lord’s mansion into a mess. The beautiful garden turned into a heap of smoke, the mocked hills and pavement turned into powder, the pond evaporated, and the ground had deeply sunken into a huge pothole.

At the bottom of the pit, Pang Pei, who was covered in cuts and wounds, roared like thunder, “You deserve to die, damn it! Wild Bull, you destroyed me, you deserve nothing but a million deaths!”

Pang Pei’s lower body was bloody and bruised, and he knew that he would never be able to enjoy the services of a beautiful boy anymore as he could barely change his style of intercourse.

He would be the ‘bottom’ instead.

The detonation of the Wild Bull that destroyed his dominant role of assertiveness made Pang Pei extremely angry.

Suddenly, he felt unsafe as he was severely injured and rushed to the airship that was still parked in the sky. Before entering the inside, he immediately shouted, “Qian Jun, hurry up and protect me as I need to heal my injuries. Order someone to find the best healer to come here and make it quick!”

Yu Qian Jun bowed respectfully and obeyed as usual, “As you command.”

At the same time, a sword pierced Pang Pei’s severely injured lower body.

“Even you betrayed me?” Pang Pei was stunned.

“Qian Jun did not betray the Emerald Lord.” Yu Qian Jun replied with a stoic face as usual, “In fact, I was never a traitor!”

“Pang Pei, you cunning jerk, who would have thought you had a downfall like today!” The Black Wind City Lord, who had been missing for a long time, walked around from the side of the airship and hit Pang Pei’s chest with a heavy fist, which caused a storm-like attack to burst out as if he was a lunatic, “You took everything from me and I admit that, but don’t think that you would get away easily!”

“Listen to me, Black Wind, this is all but a misunderstanding.” Pang Pei was terrified. He usually couldn’t care less when Black Wind joined forces with Yu Qian Jun, but now it was very dangerous for him!

“If I still had the stupidity to believe another word you say, then I’m the number one fool in the entire Heaven Realm!” Black Wind sneered.

He was the same as the Leader Wild Bull, only believing in what he saw.

Flying Locust, Hua Ban, Yan Zao, the cheeky but newly joined Tauren Lima, and the City Lord Qian Hu appeared around the airship.

Upon seeing a traitor like this Emerald Lord who ended up in the worst possible state, they couldn’t help but think that he only had himself to blame! Finally, there was a chance for them to do some meritorious services for Yue Yang, so who wouldn’t want to make things perfect. What’s more, student Yue Yang had also moved a lounge chair out to the wide balcony of the lord’s mansion. As he sipped on some Qi Lan wine and watched the ‘game’ leisurely under the gentle massage of Bi Lu, how could they not do their best to let him enjoy a grand performance?

chapters.title: Chapter 840: Two Cunning Girls Hidden Amidst The Dark
chapters.body:
Chapter 840: Two Cunning Girls Hidden Amidst The Dark

Chapter 840: Two Cunning Girls Hidden Amidst The Dark

Yue Yang didn’t care much about the Emerald Territory afterwards.

Bi Lu did not officially announce the successor to the Emerald Lord. Instead, she only disclosed that the fake Emerald Lord was annihilated and the position will be restored.

Yu Qian Jun, who has always been acting as a spy in enemy territory and never actually betrayed his true leaders, and instead was appointed by Bi Lu as a ‘General’ to handle political affairs. The other subordinates who were loyal and persistent in the fight also held important positions of ruling the Emerald Territory. Even the Black Wind City Lord, who had been beaten up previously by Yue Yang, was invited back to the territory by Bi Lu. Regardless of his previous schemes, he became the ‘Lieutenant General’, assisting Yu Qian Jun in handling political matters.

After all, Black Wind was more experienced.

Moreover, he had several good connections.

Tauren Lima has become the Captain of the Guard due to his formidable strength, cunning brain, coupled with his inability to feel shame.

With the Emerald Territory now restored into its former prosperity, besides the City Lord Qian Hu, both King Lionheart and King Tuo Ye took the initiative to send envoys to congratulate them.

In the Heaven Realm, everything revolved around strength.

As long as you possess great power, everything will become much more simple. No one could bother to determine the rights or wrongs of the losing party, let alone care about what would happen to Pang Pei, the traitor with a bad reputation.

Blue Waves Sky Lake.

About fifteen kilometers from the Emerald Territory, there was an extinct volcano.

On the volcano, a Sky Lake was formed over the course of a few thousand years. It was warm in the winter and cool in the summer.It was also Bi Lu’s favorite place to swim when she was younger. While the others were still washing away the stench of blood in the Lord’s mansion, she suggested paying a visit to the Sky Lake. Yue Yang originally wanted to refuse. It was good to swim with a beautiful lady at night, but accidents could occur very easily. One has to know that his self-control was not very good. However, Lie Yan was also spying on them by the sidelines, and when she saw Yue Yang turn his head to look over, she quickly looked away and pretended to be nonchalant, confusing him once again.

What’s going on with this giantess today?

I didn’t see her this enthusiastic when I was swimming in the Heaven Stairway’s hot springs!

Isn’t it just swimming? Forget it, I’m a man, there’s nothing for me to lose. Besides, Bi Lu has a super attractive body, so swimming together would be a great sight to see… Student Yue Yang nodded in agreement.

He swam for a few rounds inside the Sky Lake, before returning to the previously prepared recliner to rest.

He vaguely glanced around and found that Lie Yan hadn’t gone into the lake yet as she was just immersing her feet in the water. He curiously asked, “You can’t swim?”

Lie Yan lowered her head, not opting to speak.

After a while, she answered seriously, “I’m thinking about something.”

Yue Yang wanted to tell her that with her barely existent intelligence, it was best if she didn’t think about overcomplicated questions because she definitely won’t be able to find the answers. Those words were about to gush out of his lips, but he held back. After Yue Yang had finished eating, Lie Yan was still deep in thought. He asked her again, “What is the problem? How about you tell me and I’ll see if I can help you out with it?”

Lie Yan the giantess hesitated for a long time, “It is a very complicated issue. I have been thinking about it these days, but I can’t seem to make up my mind.”

Yue Yang laughed, “Putting it that way, I’m slightly intrigued. How complicated is it?”

Lie Yan didn’t answer. Instead, she tentatively asked, “Do you think Bi Lu is good-looking?”

“Yes,” It wasn’t just Yue Yang. He believed that as long as the questioned person was not blind, they would answer with affirmation.

“Then do you like her figure?” Lie Yan asked again.

“Good-looking and liking are actually two different things. Forget it, I like it too, but this ‘liking’ of mine refers to the appreciation of seeing beautiful things! There are many kinds of beautiful figures and she is just one of them. Ahem, well, in fact, your figure is not bad either. With long hair that resembles fire itself, ordinary women wouldn’t be able to have that beautiful trait of yours! As for others…It’s alright, but it’s not in line with my aesthetic point of view, because I am the standard human aesthetic. The ancient dragon bloodline that you inherited needs to undergo a process of perfect integration. It may take a long time, but after the purification by the Nirvana Flame, it will gradually evolve into a more beautiful aspect— that’s how it turned out for Ah Man,” Yue Yang momentarily forgot that Lie Yan was a female giantess, so he misspoken accidentally. Upon realising it, he quickly comforted Lie Yan and also cited Ah Man’s successful evolution as a perfect example to encourage her.

“Okay, I understand,” Lie Yan nodded.

“That’s good. Now, let’s talk about your complicated problem!” Yue Yang was very curious— what was it that troubled this giantess for a long time?

“About that, it’s not important anymore,” Lie Yan stood up and slowly submerged herself into the water before she swam away.

“Huh?” Yue Yang sweated profusely.

“Come down and swim with me!” Bi Lu emerged from the water like a mermaid, raising her pale white hand.

Are you sure? If I catch up to you, your punishment will be spanking! Yue Yang thought to himself. Getting into the water was always more than just swimming. Swimming with a beautiful lady, of course he would opt to wipe some oil[1].

T/L Note: [1] This term is used as ‘taking advantage of others, usually girls’. Yes, you’d have to know by now that your main character is this kind of person.

Before Bi Lu could react, he dove into the water elegantly.

She saw him approaching her and she screamed, immediately turning around to flee as she showed a beautiful and fast-paced swimming style.

Student Yue Yang was greatly aroused by the sight.

This little lamb was delivered to his door. Even if it can’t be eaten, touching it is probably okay, right?

After swimming for a long time, student Yue Yang, who touched and fondled the beauties countless times, saw Bi Lu’s playfulness fade away as her expression became a little tired. And so he pulled her ashore together with him. Lie Yan ignited a bonfire, grilled a whole sheep, spreaded some blankets and filled their cups with wine, making it seem like they were ready to camp out in the wild. Yue Yang usually rests in the Grimoire World and rarely spends the night outside. But seeing the two women excitedly anticipating, he had to follow along.

After a hearty meal, he competed with Lie Yan by drinking several dozen cups of wine.

Although the wine was not intoxicating, it was enough for him to be satisfied.

Student Yue Yang put his hands on his pillow and looked up at the starry sky. He felt that it would be nice to enjoy this kind of life occasionally. He should be persistent in his cultivation, but occasionally he should relax his body and mind. Training on one hand and resting on the other, that would be the perfect way for his cultivation to improve.

Bi Lu and Lie Yan both assumed that Yue Yang had already fallen asleep as they were talking in hushed tones.

Yue Yang didn’t listen in on their conversation and fell into a state of rest, both physically and mentally. Occasionally, he heard one or two words such as “face”, “body”, “change” and also Bi Lu’s laughter. Among women, the discussion of appearances was always indispensable, even if Lie Yan was a female giantess, she was no exception. Before Yue Yang fell asleep, he heard Bi Lu whispering words of encouragement, “Just eat it. This was something my father painstakingly searched for my mother, whose appearance was ruined. It’s just a pity that my mother had an unfortunate life, as she had already left before getting to use it… It is completely useless to me now, so just eat it. Nothing else in this world can compare to…”

Before he fell into a deep sleep completely, he seemed to hear Lie Yan saying, “Is it alright even if I stay exactly the same?”

Afterwards, he didn’t know how long he had slept.

Yue Yang thought he had slept for an entire century. When he was opening his eyes, he realised that something was different.

His eyes seemed to be covered by something. Just as he stretched out his hand to uncover the said object, he found two warm, soft bodies laid on both of his sides that rested against his arms respectively. When Yue Yang moved, the two bodies reacted. The figure on the left jerked, but the body on the right was the complete opposite. She courageously kissed Yue Yang’s lips while grabbing Yue Yang’s hand to prevent him from uncovering the black scarf that was wrapped around his eyes. At the same time, she slid her warm and soft tongue into the depths of his mouth. With these bold actions in mind, Yue Yang laughed dumbfoundedly.

With his Divine Vision, how can a mere black scarf obstruct his sight?

However, since the other party wanted to remain a secret, he did not ‘see’ the truth either, so as to not embarrass her.

What made him wonder was that if a certain beauty who did not refuse his touch while they were swimming dared to dedicate herself so boldly, then who was the other one? The trembling one on the left seems to be exactly the same? How can there be two? If the beauty could indeed clone herself, then what about a certain woman who has been annoyed for a few days because of some complicated problem? Where did she go?

The other party seemed to be afraid that Yue Yang would second-guess himself or change his mind.

So she became more proactive.

Grabbing his large hand and gently placing it on her slender waist, Yue Yang felt that the skin was smoother than silk and more delicate than an ontama[2] as she fit in the palm of his hand perfectly. Without waiting for him to speak, the cunning girl on the right pressed her fragrant breasts onto his face like a heap of snow.

T/L Note: [2] It’s a type of boiled egg that is typically served in Japanese hot springs. It’s really, really soft and most similar to a poached egg but perhaps even softer than that.

The one on the left has been trembling the whole time.

However, when the bold fairy on the right placed Yue Yang’s other large palm up on the other girl’s chest, she did not resist the sensation but trembled even harder.

Yue Yang lightly stroked the girl on the left. He didn’t know if she was nervous or shy, but he found that her long, soft hair seemed to hang down on her shoulders. With pure thoughts, he stroked it smoothly, trying to feel her soft locks with his fingers to guess who it belonged to. The trembling girl on the left immediately realized Yue Yang’s actions and she instantaneously pulled down his big hand, not letting him touch her hair and pressing his hand over her large breast.

Who on Earth is this?

This question confused student Yue Yang.

Moreover, the bold girl on the right made his mind fuzzy. When he was about to rationalize his thinking, she actually leaned down and discarded Yue Yang’s clothes before she swallowed brazenly. And when she needed a rest, she pressed the head of the nervous girl on the left downwards, forcing her to open her mouth and swallow. Under such a stimulus, student Yue Yang decided that no longer cared about the truth.

After all, isn’t it better for temptation to play out in the dark?

Under the movements of the two cunning beauties, he had an impulse that he had never felt before. No matter what the truth was, he grabbed one of them and pressed her underneath him.

It was as if a war had broken out!

Relentless and unforgiving!

Yue Yang didn’t remember how many times he had actually thrusted. Either way, the two beauties seemed to know that his fighting power was strong and cooperated very well. When things got too unbearable for him, they also took turns to serve him with the newly learned sloppy mouthwork. He didn’t know how long it took, but in the end, Yue Yang released everything he had to offer into the bold beauty’s mouth.

The next day, he opened his eyes and found that the black scarf that blindfolded him was long gone.

The giantess Lie Yan was grilling meat in front of the fire.

Bi Lu sat next to her, whispering and looking at Yue Yang from time to time. The two whispered and laughed loudly, an untold secret kept between them.

It was as if nothing had happened last night, and the only difference was that the night sky had turned into broad daylight.

Yue Yang scratched his head, what should I say?

Ask about it, or just get straight to it and express it through actions?

But the two didn’t seem to have any intention in revealing last night’s secret. Would they be embarrassed if I said things directly?

“Good morning!” Yue Yang thought about it, and in the end he decided that he wouldn’t inquire about it. Some things that are meant to be kept a secret. This would make it a more exciting and tempting sensation!

“Morning!” Bi Lu smiled happily.

For some reason, Yue Yang suddenly remembered the bold fairy last night, and even remembered that he had released it in her mouth in the end.

Bi Lu acted as if nothing had happened before. She just carefully lowered herself into the water and then waved to Yue Yang. She invited him again just like yesterday, her voice light and brought the sensation of flowers blooming in spring, “Hey, do you want to come over and swim together?”

Yue Yang laughed when he heard it.

His smile was brighter than that of the sun, “Are you sure? If I catch up to you, your punishment will be spanking!”

chapters.title: Chapter 841: Ignite, Little Sister With Vitality!
chapters.body:
Chapter 841: Ignite, Little Sister With Vitality!

Chapter 841: Ignite, Little Sister with Vitality!

A few days later.

Yi Nan and Yue Bing, who missed her elder brother, accompanied Yue Yang to visit the newly restored Emerald Lord’s Mansion.

As the host, Bi Lu naturally took good care of them. After touring around, Yue Bing saw Lie Yan of the ancient dragon bloodline undergoing cultivation diligently. She sighed, “Sister Lie Yan’s progress is too fast. She just broke through from the 5th Level of the Heaven Rank to the 6th Level recently. Yet it has only been less than a month and she has already progressed to the 7th Level of the Heaven Rank…”

Lie Yan heard her words and for some reason, she became embarrassed as her face flushed with a shade of red.

Yi Nan naturally understood what was going on.

In fact, it wasn’t just Lie Yan who had achieved a breakthrough. Bi Lu, who sat beside her, used to only have the cultivation of the peak 3rd Level of the Heaven Rank. But now, she has improved by two levels and reached the 5th Level of the Heaven Rank!

Yue Bing didn’t know what the secret was. She thought that Lie Yan had really improved through hard training as she envied her, “Can you tell me what techniques you used? I practice every day as well, but my progress has not been fast. “

Lie Yan waved her hands in panic and embarrassment, “I didn’t use any special techniques, so don’t ask me!”

Yue Yang had just returned from hearing Yan Zao’s report. Lie Yan suddenly rushed out upon seeing him, knocking a large part of the doorway without even noticing it.

Yue Bing was clueless, what’s the matter?

Yi Nan chuckled secretly.

However, despite them being close, Yi Nan was not going to explain that sort of thing to Yue Bing.

Lie Yan refused to return to the Tong Tian Tower with Yue Yang. Instead, Bi Lu was the one who expressed her desire to meet Si-niang and Yue Yang’s elders sometime. Finally, under Yi Nan’s persuasion, the Emerald Mansion was to be temporarily managed by Yu Qian Jun and the others as they returned to the Heaven Stairway World Tree. After all, the affairs of the Southern Heaven Realm can be put aside for a while. Besides, Yue Yang has set his sights on attacking the Land of Trials of the Western Heaven Realm as his next target, so there was no need for them to remain here.

Back under the Heaven Stairway World Tree, Yue Bing once again talked to Yue Yu. She questioned if the problem lies with her stupidity as to why her cultivation speed was far inferior to Lie Yan even though the Head of Flames had joined the gang later.

Yue Yu really didn’t know how to comfort her.

But the beauty Luo Hua who was passing by gave her an idea to let her rest with Yi Nan in the future. She said that this would make them improve together, resulting in Yue Bing happily going back to move the pillows and quilts. Because of Yue Yu’s advice, Yue Bing, who was actually living in the same place with Yinan, moved out of the room a while ago. However, since she moved out, she felt that her cultivation speed has become slower than before. It seems that the little sister-in-law, Yi Nan, really helped improve the speed of her cultivation. Having figured this out, the little girl Yue Bing was very happy.

“That was not good!” Of course, Yue Yu knew the actual reason.

“It’s nothing, it’s better than a certain brother going into my sister’s room in the middle of the night and instilling her with a strong energy! Those in the know would understand that he is a good brother who loves his sister, but for those who don’t might misunderstand his intentions and accuse him of doing something else!” Luo Hua asked with a smile, “Or, you can come to my room tonight, I have a lot to say to you.”

“No, no,” Yue Yu was taken aback, waving her hand as she declined, “If you have something to say, just say it here.”

“I really have something to tell you, and it’s not what you think,” Beauty Luo Hua’s expression was serious.

“Let’s not mention this topic,” Yue Yu’s cheeks were blushing red. She made sure no one was within hearing proximity before whispering, “What do you want to tell me? I-I may not be able to help you. So actually, you should ask Tian Fa (Sky Law) or Wu Hen instead!”

“I already did, but everyone’s situation is different. I think you are closer to me, so I came to ask you,” Beauty Luo Hua passed her words using a secret language.

“I don’t understand anything at all… figure it out yourself!” When Yue Yu heard this, she was embarrassed and waved her hand to deny any possibility of having further discussions with Luo Hua regarding this matter. However, beauty Luo Hua felt that Yue Yu knew a thing or two that she wasn’t revealing. If they could communicate secretly, the two parties would make progress. But Yue Yu refused to make the connection due to her secrecy of her identity, making her sigh helplessly, “Okay, you don’t have to be like this. I won’t talk about this topic anymore so you can continue to work. I will ask Qian Qian and Wu Xia, maybe they can help me.”

“They wouldn’t know. No matter how much of a genius they are, there are some things that they know nothing of.” Yue Yu shyly made a suggestion, “You might as well go to Yi Nan, she should know a few things.”

“Yi Nan is too young. I feel like there’s a generation gap between us so I am a little embarrassed to tell her this,” Beauty Luo Hua’s face was slightly reddened.

“You are capable of embarrassment? Then, why did you still come to me?” Yue Yu was speechless.

“Haha!” The beauty Luo Hua shrugged her shoulders in flamboyance. Although she didn’t reply, her expression implied that she was most comfortable with her. Hence, she would naturally go to her when she needed help, which slightly annoyed Yue Yu.

That night, the Phoenix Fairy Beauty seemed to have caught wind of a secret as she proposed an idea. Yue Bing didn’t understand, but when she offered to participate, Yue Yu stopped her, making her feel that she must have insufficient abilities to participate in this suggestion. In the end, under the repetitive “coercion” of the Phoenix Fairy Beauty, Luo Hua, Red and the others reluctantly expressed their willingness to participate.

Could it be that sister-in-law Tian Fa’s proposal was related to my brother?

With that train of thought, Yue Bing fell asleep, but when she opened her eyes, she found that her brother and his clothes were lying on the edge of the bed. His arms were outstretched, acting as pillows for Yi Nan and herself, which made her instantaneously happy.

It turns out that my brother didn’t participate in the proposal at all. Like usual, he came to rest with me after he finished handling his own matters.

“Shhh!”

Yue Bing put up her slenderly pale fingers, signalling for Yue Yang to continue accompanying Yi Nan and not to wake her up as she herself got up quietly and for practice. She tiptoed over from Yi Nan’s side and proceeded to take the quilt to gently cover Yue Yang. Although she knows that her brother was not afraid of the cold, it would still be uncomfortable to sleep out of the covers. Mother was not around, so she wanted to take care of her brother on her behalf. After washing up, Yue Bing slipped in quietly, asking her brother to see if she looked presentable. When Yue Yang gave her a thumbs up and even made a cheering gesture, she happily closed the door and went out to practice energetically.

Today, with the encouragement of her brother and the good influence of resting with Yi Nan, Yue Bing felt that her mood and energy had improved a lot.

As a result, she strengthened her confidence as she started a new day of cultivation.

Speaking of hard work.

She would never be inferior to anyone!

Yue Yu saw this scene from a distance and smiled wryly.

This young lady’s heart was too pure.

Moreover, the more purification and guidance she got from Yue Yang, the purer her mind, body, and energy became. Under this kind of peaceful and independently dynamic cultivation, it would be difficult for Yue Bing to not have any improvements!

Yue Yu changed her thought process. In fact, this was something positive. Having the purity of mind was not a bad thing, and rapid progress in cultivation would be even more of a good thing!

If no one said anything, how would outsiders ever know?

Think about yourself, you are… Yue Yu’s face was feverish. She quickly glimpsed at some scenes that flashed through her mind, before she recollected herself back to her serious persona.

Three days later.

Yue Bing returned to Tian Luo Palace with her brother to meet Si-niang and proudly reported to her mother, “Mom, I have advanced to another level. I thought it would take a long time to break through, but my brother is a lucky star. Once he came back, I succeeded! Also, my brother personally helped me with this hairstyle. He said it looks good leaving a strand of stray hair on top! Mom, what do you think?”

The young lady’s face was shining, her bright smile capable of making flowers to hang their petals lowly in shame.

On the top of the head, a strand of hair was left out purposely.

Soaring proudly into the sky.

It seems that she was extremely energetic and lively

Si-niang smiled and gently touched the top of her head: “You’re already about to grow up, why do you need your brother to help style your hair? But leaving one strand of hair curled up is indeed very different from your usual look. It looks pretty funny, but nothing matters as long as you like it.”

The girl Shuang Er pouted, “What’s so great about having just one strand? I have a lot of curled up hair!”

Yue Bing glared at her, “That is called shrivelled. You don’t comb your hair in the morning, and yet you have the means to complain? Come here, I will help you tidy it…”

Shuang Er found it troublesome, so she ran away and hid behind Yue Yang, “Don’t!”

After Yue Yang and Si-niang reunited briefly, he went to see His Majesty again, and asked whether his Majesty had collected any news about the Buried Sword Valley. Who knew that His Majesty really got angry the last time and refused to see him. However, when Yue Yang was about to go to see Jun Wu You, His Majesty sent someone to give him a book. It had ancient characters on its cover, and despite Yue Yang mastering most of the reading ability of the inheritance of knowledge, he wasn’t even able to recognize it and sweated profusely.

Jun Wu You was much easier to talk to.

Moreover, it was also easy for him to handle things. When Yue Yang came back from handling the matters in the Southern Heaven Realm, he said that he had already sent someone to pass through the hill where the ancient runes were located.

“The ancient runes are definitely available, but they are not necessarily suitable for you,” The old fox snickered gleefully, “You have always been very lucky, kid. This time, I guess you really won’t have your share. I went to see it and even talked to Nan Gong. They have studied it and they think it should be an ancient rune that was suitable for women’s fusion.”

“Even if I can’t use it, I still have a younger sister!” Student Yue Yang was a typical character who doesn’t offer good things to outsiders.

“Hey, you not only have a younger sister, but also a fiance. Take my precious daughter to have a look. Perhaps the rune may be suitable for my family’s Qian Qian to fuse with!” Jun Wu You was a father that treated his daughter like a beloved baby. Of course, he was not the only one with such qualities as there was also the Eastern Sky King. The Eastern Sky King is a person who would never accept unfavoured situations— if Yue Yang didn’t bring Luo Hua along with him, he was sure to fight to the death with him.

“Can you both just calm down a little?” The cunning boy hid his face and couldn’t bear to watch the performance of Jun Wu You and the Eastern Sky King. For goodness sake, one of them is an emperor and the other is a prince!

In fact, the Eastern Sky King had done his research about it.

He felt that his daughter was unlikely to integrate the ancient rune, hence, his calm demeanour. Otherwise, he would have continuously pestered Yue Yang long ago.

Yue Yang asked about the Buried Sword valley, but Jun Wu You said that it would be determined later. After all, mountain earthworms were not omnipotent.

Back at the Heaven Stairway, the beauty Luo Hua and the others have already known of the inside information, and they were too lazy to see the ancient runes that wouldn’t ever belong to them. Princess Qian Qian and Xue Wuxia also felt that they were unlikely to contract with it because the attributes of the ancient runes had already deemed them incompatible. It’s just that they want to have their own chance one day to experience some form of fusion… but Yue Bing, who didn’t know anything about it, shot up to the sky with her lovely locks of hair flowing behind her as she happily followed her brother, expression energetic and luminent.

She was so happy and was in a state of excitement about taking adventures with her brother, to the point where she barely even acknowledged the discreet sarcasm that the Sickly Beauty expressed.

“This young lady is so lucky to have such a brother and to experience such a fortunate event,” The beauty Luo Hua said with a smile.

“Bing Er has worked very hard as well!” Yue Yu felt that this was the most important reason.

chapters.title: Chapter 842: I Never Knew You Were This Magnanimous?
chapters.body:
Chapter 842: I Never Knew You Were This Magnanimous?

Chapter 842: I Never Knew You Were This Magnanimous?

When they came to the place where the ancient runes were, Yue Yang entered a small underground space along the tunnel opened by the mountain earthworms.

The ancient rune inscription was carved onto the obelisk that stood in the center of a large rune pattern.

Energy overflowing.

Luminously shining.

The sight was beyond belief.

The surrounding underground space had been opened up by the mountain earthworms, leaving only the columnar rocks that were protected by the rune’s energy and the sole rune obelisk. Yue Yang had seen this kind of rune obelisk in the Heaven Realm. Most of them had several brocade patterns on it, some even maintaining a certain amount of energy, but they wouldn’t normally have ancient runes.

However, Yue Yang could see the type of attributes and compatibility of this ancient rune at a glance.

If he was forced to merge with the ancient rune, he could actually do so

But as someone who possessed the World Creation Jewel and ‘World’, he did not have to integrate all the ancient runes into himself. As he improved, Yue Yang hoped that the people around him would also become stronger, as only then can they stay with him forever. Moreover, even if this ancient rune was integrated, it will not achieve the maximum potential effect on Yue Yang. It was better to leave it to a more suitable person, such as this lovely sister of his, who was full of vitality and undying energy.

The attributes of this ancient rune originated from the Ancient Forest. If it was fused with the girl who possessed the Ancient Titan Tree, Green Light Tree Demoness and Intense Poison, he didn’t know what the outcome would be either. Just thinking about it had already made him brimming with anticipation!

However, her strength was still slightly insufficient.

It’s still too early to have her undergo the fusion now.

We’ll wait a little while longer, to the stage where she advances her cultivation to a higher level. She can do it, for sure.

“It’s a very good ancient rune, isn’t it?” Yue Bing saw that Yue Yang was silent and assumed that this ancient rune was extremely difficult to cast fusion on. She thought that even her brother could not successfully do so for the time being, making her slightly excited and regretful. The regretful feeling was because she wouldn’t be able to see her brother fusing this ancient rune with her own eyes, whereas the excitement was because she assumed if this rune was so hard to fuse with, it would definitely bring huge improvements for her brother’s cultivation.

“Of course,” Yue Yang patted her small head lightly.

I want to practice hard to help you, brother. Yue Bing clenched her small fist and secretly made up her mind.

“These runes seem to be a little different,” Xue Wu Xia jotted down a draft of the complicated rune patterns, before going back to study it with the Sickly Beauty. In the process of their transcription, she found a difference.

“Yes, the usage of these ancient runes is different from how we use them now. Besides, it seems to have some sort of profound meaning,” Princess Qian Qian was also interested as she was recently comprehending how to completely transform the Prison Emperor’s Divine Sword into her own divine weapon. Yue Yang wanted to help her but as she was very competitive by nature, she refused. However, she did not refuse Yue Yang’s suggestion to name it the “Tiger Prison Divine Sword” in the future when she would successfully transform the sword into her one and only divine weapon. Upon seeing the very ingenious, profound and fascinating combination of these ancient rune patterns, it seemed to spark a new inspiration from her heart as she was enthusiastic about giving her own opinions towards the transcription.

“Brother, what can I do to help?” Yue Bing hoped that she could be of use, even if it was a trivial matter.

“Keep your mind ethereal and in peace, I will try to record part of the ancient rune patterns in your small head,” Of course, Yue Yang would not tell her that this was, in fact, the beginning of her fusion with the rune, just like the inheritance of his knowledge.

Although Yue Yang wasn’t able to perform that kind of knowledge inheritance, it wasn’t impossible to inscribe a group of ancient rune patterns into her mind.

Yue Bing’s complete cooperation, unreserved trust and void of distracting thoughts have also contributed as the keys to the successful fusion.

Nevertheless.

It also took a full two days to entirely complete the initial inscription.

As for the most important ancient rune, ‘Ancient Forest’, Yue Yang will not move it for the time being, as it will not be too late to wait for Yue Bing’s strength and cultivation to improve.

In the past two days, Xue Wu Xia and Princess Qian Qian have both harvested their results respectively. What made student Yue Yang happy was that they all got along— the two would hang out during the daylight and when Yue Bing fell asleep at night, they didn’t reject the idea of undergoing Body Fusion cultivation with him, despite not really wanting to do so in front of Yue Bing. Perhaps because they were afraid of waking Yue Bing up, both parties gave up persisting after they practiced a little. Even after the cultivation, student Yue Yang’s hand had sneakily caressed them a few times and he even fervently planted a few kisses, only to have a few intimidating, yet not truly angry glances directed back at him..

It was normally impossible for them to act like this, so consider it a small reward on this journey!

Yue Yang was very satisfied with the progressive communication between the three of them.

If there is a first, there is always a second time as well.

Now that he had a successful start, Yue Yang believed that things will get better and better in the future. As he would invite them along to practice their cultivation, it would slowly become a habit for them and things would work out naturally in the future.

Returning to the Heaven Stairway, after Yue Yang had a discussion with the Night Empress and the others, he decided to go to the Western Heaven Realm alone to break into the Land of Trials. With the experience of Empress Fei Wen Li, he was confident that he could clear the 4th Level Desire Valley, the 5th Level Beast Valley and the 6th Level Demon Valley without assistance. If these three stages were all cleared, he would return to the stairway and lend everybody’s strength to attack the 7th Level, ‘Life Valley’.

Using the Three Realms Compass, Yue Yang returned to Conqueror City.

It was discovered that Fatty Hai, Ye Kong and others were making the veterans in the city practice hard.

Seeing that these guys looked even more fatigued than a bunch of dogs, student Yue Yang slightly expressed his deep sympathy and condolences, before going to the ancient Land of Trials without looking back.

On the outskirts of the Land of Trials, he met an ‘acquaintance’.

The snake-haired demon man.

Young Master Chang Feng from the Four Great Families.

The current Young Master Chang Feng was even more embarrassed than he was when he saw them in the Earth Demon Palace as he was surrounded by groups of soldiers of the Central Palace, but that was not the worst part. There was a high Ranker at the level of a Deputy Palace Master, who was suppressing the violent snake-haired demon man. Farther in the outer circle, there was a group of fallen warriors from the Dark Realm, standing like slaves on the outermost periphery. Although they had large numbers, their status was as low as ants. In front of the Central Palace’s army, they were not even qualified to raise their heads. Every single one of them bowed their heads and obeyed given orders, not daring to make any sudden movements.

In the most conspicuous place in the Land of Trials, there were rows of wooden pilings.

A chain was hanging from above.

On the chain, a row of decapitated heads hung and dangled densely. These were either mercenaries who tried to enter or those who had escaped from the inside and failed to break through.

Like the friends of Lord Ling Yun, the three teams Eight Desolations, Warsong and Snow Field, they were almost completely wiped out as their heads were covered with iron ropes. Even the powerful leaders were no exception to this brutality.

If it were not for the gruesome killing being on such an arrogant display, it would not have flamed a fuming rage of anger in Yue Yang’s heart.

These people barely had any relations with Yue Yang.

However, the arrogant slaughter of the dead in the Central Palace made Yue Yang extremely resentful.

Because of this, Yue Yang decided to take action and be a busybody. He wanted to let the soldiers of the Central Palace have a taste of their own medicine. “How lively,” Student Yue Yang floated down from the sky, and everyone, including the aggressively screaming Deputy Palace Master and the gradually retreating snake-haired demon man, didn’t notice his arrival.

“It’s you?” The snake-haired demon man finally recognized student Yue Yang.

“Huh?” On the contrary, the Deputy Palace Master who looked fierce and vicious, didn’t know Yue Yang at all. As long as he was concerned, there was no such person as Yue Yang that existed in his information report.

“How did you become like this? Did you change your job to be a beggar?” Yue Yang descended next to the snake-haired demon man and scanned his figure thoroughly. He saw that the snake-haired demon man had the attire of a beggar[1] and he instantly knew that he had been miserably beaten up. If the Young Master of the Dugu Family, Chang Feng, was in his prime and had the Mirror of Pain in his hands, it shouldn’t be difficult for him to fight. But for now…how ironic this is!

T/L note: [1] Means that your outfit was in shambles, tattered and resembled the clothing of a beggar.

“It’s hard to explain it in words!” The snake-haired demon man sighed emotionally. He suddenly remembered something and grabbed Yue Yang’s hand, “Is the Mirror of Pain with you?”

“You want it back?” Student Yue Yang forgot to tell this guy that once any treasure gets into his hands, it will be difficult to take it back from him again.

“No, it’s not like that,” The reaction of the snake-haired demon man was unexpected by Yue Yang.

He shook his hands repetitively, “In fact, I always thought it was the curse that year that turned me into a serpent man.
