However, when I lost the Mirror of Pain, I found out that the power of the curse was gradually losing its hold on my body. Although my appearance cannot be restored for the time being, the power of the curse is indeed weakening. I can tell you with absolute certainty that the abnormal changes in my body were caused by the Mirror of Pain. In this way, you may not believe it, but I am here to say very sincerely, that the Mirror of Pain should not be used anymore. Otherwise, you will definitely become like me. The sub-divine artifact looks harmless on the surface, but there must be some unknown cursing power hidden in it. If you use it too much, the curse will accumulate, don’t be fooled by its appearance as a sub-artifact. By the way, to the young lady who had picked it up, please clarify this to her properly! I definitely don’t want to get the Mirror of Pain back, but tell her to discard it as soon as possible. It must not be used at all!”

Yue Yang glanced at him strangely, “Was it because of this that you came back? You were that magnanimous?”

The snake-haired demon man said in an angry voice, “If I wasn’t worried that the epic young lady would become a snake-haired beauty, I wouldn’t come back here just to suffer. Didn’t you see it? Just now, I was almost killed by that guy!”

Yue Yang couldn’t help being a little touched. This guy was rather worthy to be friends with.

At the very least, once he knew that the treasure was harmful, he didn’t hesitate to come back to inform him. Had it been someone else who had their treasure robbed but knew of its curse afterwards, they would have been celebrating in glee long ago.

Of course, student Yue Yang looked nonchalant on the surface.

Waving his hand, “I will tell her what you have said, so what other good news do you have?”

The snake-haired demon man was exasperated and he rolled his eyes, “I’m being serious, so be serious as well. You really have to make it clear to her, otherwise it will be too late when she becomes a snake-haired beauty. If she likes the type of mirror-like treasures, I can figure out a way to find something elsewhere and give her another one, but the Mirror of Pain really can’t be used anymore!”

Yue Yang dozed off as he heard his words, “You’re so noisy.”

With that casual attitude of his, the snake-haired demon man was fuming and almost jumped in a rage, “I have already told you the truth, it’s your choice if you want to believe it! I’m going to take my leave, so don’t regret it!”

Yue Yang smiled and waved, “Have a safe trip back, I won’t be sending you off!”

The snake-haired demon man was so angry to the point where he felt as if his lungs were going to explode, “I have never seen someone like you in my life. It’s not like I like that young lady, so why are you getting jealous? I just think she resembles my sister!”

As soon as Yue Yang heard this, his attitude improved immediately and he held his hand, “Why didn’t you say so?”

The snake-haired demon man became even more angry and forced his hands free, “Get the Hell away from me, you bastard!”

The fierce-looking Deputy Palace Master, who was ignored as he stood opposite of the two, suddenly stepped forward and sneered wildly, “Have you two finished talking? If it’s enough, it’s about time to send you guys on the road to the afterlife!

“Shut up!” Yue Yang and the snake-haired demon man yelled back in unison, “Nothing here concerns you, so just scram[2] aside!”

T/L Note: [2] an English slang for ‘leave or get out’.

chapters.title: Chapter 843: Fourth Level, The Fall Of A Chess Piece
chapters.body:
Chapter 843: Fourth Level, The Fall Of A Chess Piece

Chapter 843: Fourth Level, The Fall of A Chess Piece

The Deputy Palace Master didn’t waste any efforts on making a retort as his reply was clear when he condensed a flying energy wheel and sent it towards both Yue Yang and Chang Feng.

The ground burst at the impact.

The peak of the mountain was also divided into two.

The snake-haired demon man finally remembered the tragic way he was beaten up and hurriedly shooed Yue Yang away with his palm before conveying his words in a secret language, “This guy is a Deputy Palace Master and his strength should not be underestimated. Let’s retreat separately. Meet me at the White River City in the Heavenly Splendour Territory, I still have something to ask you to help me with. I’ll treat you to supper after that!”

Yue Yang thought, if that guy really waited for me to show up, he would probably have to linger till he was covered in spiderwebs [1].

T/L Note: [1] Pretty self-explanatory. It means waiting for a long time, because it takes a while for spiderwebs to form. Also similarly applied as the below with the term, ‘mushrooms’.

However, he didn’t reveal that he was trying to go in and break through the levels.

Instead, he smiled and nodded, indicating that he would definitely go to the appointment.

Hahaha, I’ll let him wait for me until he is covered in mushrooms from head to toe. At any rate, I probably won’t be going to the White River City for a few months… The snake-haired demon man was originally going to be the ‘boss’[2] as he stepped in front of the Deputy Palace Master to stop him, eager to let Yue Yang escape the scene first. Who would have thought that Yue Yang would lift his leg and kick the snake-haired demon man in his backside, sending him hurdling away from the scene.

T/L Note: [2] Calling someone boss can also be used for gang leaders. And as loyalty was a big deal back then in China, the leaders would usually stall time with the opponent to let his/her subordinates flee. Very noble.

Not everyone was capable of being the boss!

The snake-haired demon man who was kicked did not become angry. In retrospects, he was even slightly moved by the gesture.

He didn’t think there was a big problem to leave Yue Yang behind with the enemy. Although the snake-haired demon man was not optimistic that student Yue Yang could win the Deputy Palace Master, it should be no problem to stall him for a few minutes. The most important thing was that he took the initiative to stay and block the enemy, which meant that he was confident in his abilities as well!

“Remember to meet me, I really have a very important matter to discuss. I wouldn’t mind it ,even if you bring that cool young lady either!” The snake-haired demon man fled as he reminded student Yue Yang to not forget about the appointment they made.

‘You’re really noisy!’ was the answer of student Yue Yang.

The gallant guards of the Central Palace and the fallen warriors of the Dark Realm all flew up.

They wanted to stop him from escaping, but to no avail. Even if the Young master of the Dugu Family, Chang Feng, was in a state of shambles, they weren’t his opponent either.

In the end, everyone’s anger focused on Yue Yang alone. Had it not been for his arrival, even if they could not capture the Young Master Chang Feng, they probably could have beaten him up to the point where he could no longer resist. Now that the Young Master Chang Feng ran away, this kid had to stay no matter what. With him as a hostage, Young Master Chang Feng who ran would have to come back for negotiations sooner or later.

Boom boom boom! The Deputy Palace Master made several heavy moves in a row, but his attacks couldn’t even reach a strand of Yue Yang’s hair.

Even if Yue Yang doesn’t use his real strength, his fast-paced speed alone was not something that they could catch up with. He wore the ‘Acceleration Gloves’ on both hands and the ‘Winged Wind Silver Boots’ over his feet that were both taken from Elder Yu Mu, and the platinum-level ‘Flying Eagle Helmet’ that student Yue Yang casually made to deceive the warriors of the Heaven Realm.

No need to mention the ‘Speed’ sub-divine artifact ring, the Mysterious Three Styles, his teleportation skills or his ability of World Creation Domain.

Just an accelerating piece of equipment presented.

It was more than enough for the opponent to chase him with heavily breathing lungs!

Chasing chasing~

Student Yue Yang teased his opponent for a few minutes before he grew a little annoyed. In the process of intensive blocking attacks, he secretly condensed a beam of super concentrated comet energy.

Boom!

A mushroom cloud rose rapidly from the ground and the shockwaves generated by the flaming explosion reverberated throughout the entire space.

The interceptors in the center, which were the Central Palace guards and Dark Realm’s fallen warriors who were below the 3rd Level Heaven Rank, were directly annihilated and evaporated into smoke, not even leaving a scrap of remnants behind. Even the Squad Captains above the 3rd Level Heaven Rank were also severely injured, dwelling in the state of near-death. The fierce and vicious Deputy Palace Master was so angry that he couldn’t wait to tear Yue Yang into pieces. Unexpectedly, he had caused the ‘little mouse’ to transform, threatening the life of the ‘cat’ that he was. When he saw Yue Yang rushing into the central area, teleporting into the Rain Valley, the 1st Level of the Land of Trials, he became even more angry.

In his life, he had never seen such an infuriating human!

Surrounded by thousands of people, killing and wounding hundreds of the Central Palace guards in one blow, and yet he dared to rush into the Land of Trials that was forbidden entry by the Central Palace— he was really seeking death!

“If I, Shen Du, don’t hang your head on this iron rope, I will apologize to Master Ji Wu Ri and resign from my position!”

The Deputy Palace Master raised his head and roared wildly.

He handpicked fifty elites of the Palace forces, using them for searching and communication purposes as he prepared himself. Then, he suppressed the anger in his chest as he followed in pursuit into the Land of Trials. If he didn’t kill this human kid, the anger in his heart would be hard to quell. At the same time, he would not be able to escape from the blame when the Central Palace launches an investigation.

Whether in public or in private, he must take this kid’s head and hang it on the chains.

Only then can he wash away the shame of today.

“Ah!”

As soon as he entered the Rain Valley, the self-proclaimed Deputy Palace Master Shen Du realised that this kid had not escaped, but instead was waiting for an ambush at the entrance. As soon as they entered, he killed an elite guard of the Palace almost instantaneously.

As the Deputy Palace Master let out a string of curses and an unwilling roar, student Yue Yang, who was super fast and familiar with the paths of the land, kept widening the distance between them.

The more you chase, the farther you end up.

A few minutes later, under the helpless gaze of the Central Palace guards, he disappeared like the receding sight of wafting smoke.

Except for gritting his teeth and glaring at him, the Deputy Palace Master Shen Du couldn’t do much of anything else.

Times of games and fun will always pass quickly. When student Yue Yang set foot in the 2nd Level Wind Valley, there were only thirty people left besides the Deputy Palace Master. Twenty people were sneakily assassinated by Yue Yang, becoming one of the tragically sacrificed souls on the sidelines of the Rain Valley; when Yue Yang entered the 3rd Level Sand Valley, there were only ten people left excluding the Deputy Palace Master. Yue Yang entered the fourth level of the Desire Valley, and except for Shen Du, the remaining fifty elite guards of the Palace were all buried during the pursuit, becoming the human targets for Yue Yang to stimulate the Deputy Palace Master’s anger. If Shen Du knew that there was a garrison of troops up ahead that had no choice but to surrender their forces in front of Yue Yang when he used the World Creation Domain, he probably wouldn’t be as persistent in chasing Yue Yang as he was now.

In fact, Shen Du’s parents and teachers, who gave him the name “Shen Du”, wanted him to be a man who was rasional and not impulsive; to be a man who is humble and cautious at all times. To be a man who is not stubborn and childish, and not arbitrarily evil.

It is a pity that Deputy Palace Master Shen Du couldn’t understand the profound meaning of the name granted by his parents and teachers.

As he had already made all the mistakes that shouldn’t be made.

The 4th Level, Desire Valley.

Upon entering this level, no one could leave before completing the clearance test.

It was also a specific world with various special laws and restrictions. Once violated, anyone will become one of the people here and would never be able to leave.

“You finally let me catch up to you!”

“Kill, kill and kill!”

“I finally got your head! Weren’t you all high and mighty just now? Boast again for me to see! Hahahaha!”

In Yue Yang’s Creation Domain, the Deputy Palace Master Shen Du didn’t realize that he was just a complacent pawn that Yue Yang deliberately led. He thought that Yue Yang was exhausted and launched a crazy attack on the illusionary man. After the phantom reflection of the “Life Gate” in his Creation Domain, paired with Yue Yang’s deliberate misleading, Shen Du had successfully killed the fatigued ‘Yue Yang’.

He looked up to the sky and laughed, feeling very proud.

But he didn’t know that the real enemy was behind him, using him as a pawn to explore the way.

With Yue Yang’s strength and wisdom, it would be no problem to break through the Desire Valley even without Empress Fei Wen Li’s guidance in the form of her experience. But he liked things that are simple and labor-saving. If he could use Deputy Palace Master Shen Du as a pawn to open the way, he could move forward calmly afterwards. With such a great pawn, what reason did he have not to use it?

The invisible student Yue Yang quietly watched Shen Du’s performance in the Desire Valley.

After a triumphant laugh that vented all the pent up frustration in his heart, the Deputy Palace Master Shen Du only began to formally look at the Desire Valley.

At the entrance, there are two huge stone statues with severed heads. It seemed to be a pair of men and women embracing, but their heads were chopped off by an unknown person.

The two huge stone statues with severed heads were filled with a terrifying energy of resentment, which were integrated with the Power of Law from the surrounding space.

Looking around, except for the two stone statues with broken heads at the entrance that had some indications of carvings on them, everywhere else he set his sights on were practically naked. Countless giant stone statues like humanoids, orcs, and all kinds of bizarre biological forms, were all in various copulating positions.

Even the trees seem to be trimmed into this form.

Everywhere, everything was in this naked form of intercourse.

What irked the Deputy Palace Master Shen Du even more was that the space here, whether it was the wind blowing, the scent of flowers, or the invisible fluctuating energy— every single thing strongly appeared appealing to him, even in an aroused way. He became impatient and wanted to find someone to vent his frustration at.

“Damn it! This is Desire Valley, a very dangerous place. It seems that I have to be very careful!” Deputy Palace Master Shen Du had heeded the warning from his superiors.

“Ah, help!”

In the woods not far ahead, a panicked cry came from far away.

Student Yue Yang, who was fighting against the certain Power of Law, remained motionless. In the experience of the Empress Fei Wen Li, he knew what was about to happen. It was precisely because of this, that in order to save him from some troubles, he had deliberately attracted such a chess piece as Deputy Palace Master Shen Du over. And Shen Du, who had no consciousness of being a chess piece, immediately flew towards the source of the sound.

He found that several ugly centaurs [3]were surrounding a beautiful girl with the intent to rape this poor woman.

T/L Note: [3] Centaurs are humans with the body of a horse although it didn’t specify which half, but I pray that it’s not humans with the head of a horse because that would be slightly disturbing.

Shen Du did not immediately step forward. Instead, he evaluated the strength of both sides and scanned the surrounding environment.

He found that the centaurs on the opposite side didn’t even have the strength of Heaven Rankers.

There were no enemies around either.

So with a loud shout, as if the Gods have descended, he landed in front of the disheveled girl, waved, and killed the ugly centaurs in seconds.

What happened next, of course, was that the beauty fell in love with him at first sight and immediately embraced him, staging a different kind of battle that was unsuitable for children.

Afterwards.

The girl begged Shen Du to rescue her sister.

Out of contempt for the power of the ugly centaurs, and secretly coveting the girl’s sister, the Deputy Palace Master Shen Du, attacked the centaur camp situated tens of kilometers away like a God descending once again. He rescued ten people with different appearances, but all of them were hot and beautiful women. Similarly, there was another ‘war of attrition’ that happened. For the Deputy Palace Master Shen Du, he lasted three days and three nights. After lasting so long to the point where his legs became weak, waist and knees turned numb, he finally took down eleven women and earned their praises.

However, in Yue Yang’s point of view, this guy hadn’t left a kilometer at all, and the passed time didn’t even account for ten minutes.

There were no women— everything was an illusion caused by the Law.

The only thing in common with his illusion was that his legs became weak.

chapters.title: Chapter 844: I Predict, That You Will Die Today
chapters.body:
Chapter 844: I Predict, That You Will Die Today

Chapter 844: I Predict, That You Will Die Today

This kind of illusionary frustration was rather similar to the Gate of Life and Death’s illusion. Once the consciousness was confirmed to fall under the spell, the body would soon be damaged accordingly.

Not only that, but this form of dwelling into the illusion would make him trapped deeper inside the Power of the Law.

In the end, the deeper he sinks into the pitfall, the harder it will be for him to wake up.

Although the Deputy Palace Master Shen Du has a formidable strength, the outcome remains clear that he won’t be able to extricate himself from the endless nightmare!

The illusion continues.

In order to get more women to enjoy more pleasure, and to obtain the qualifications of having countless women by his side when he leaves as a victor, the Deputy Palace Master Shen Du fought day and night.

During the day, this ‘God of War’ generally conquered the enemies and plundered more beauties.

At night, a different kind of battle was lit up.

Despite this kind of never-ending battle that went on in broad daylight and abyss nights, Deputy Palace Master Shen Du did not feel a trace of fatigue. On the contrary, he felt extremely satisfied and proud of himself. If it weren’t for a sliver and faint thought of leaving that remained deep in his heart, he would even be willing to live here forever. Here, almost all the enemies were weak. Even if there were a few strong enemies, neither of them posed any threat to his life. At most, he was only worried if the women behind him that made him happy beyond comparison, would ever be injured or killed. More and more subordinates surrendered to him in admiration, and more and more women flocked over to him in order to obtain a share of his excellent seeds.

Outside in the real world, Shen Du was but a Deputy Palace Master.

But here, he was the Emperor!

An unmatched Emperor.

There were more than a thousand concubines in the palace, but no woman bored him as all of them could make him feel extremely happy. Deputy Palace Master Shen Du enjoyed this kind of life. Although he still had to leave in the end, he decided to become the owner of the entire Desire Valley. Once he obtained that title, he would take all of the women here and leave for good. Until then, he would not consider anything else.

The Deputy Palace Master Shen Du didn’t know that behind him, there was a person watching all this quietly.

He didn’t know that Yue Yang was using him as a mirror, constantly trying to break through the Laws of the Desire Valley.

He only lives in his world of imaginary illusions.

In this phantom world, he exterminated countless non-existent centaurs, slaughtered powerful black dragons, and even defeated rather formidable opponents.

Ten years have already passed in Yu Shen Du’s world.

There were more than 100,000 subordinates who pledged their unyielding loyalty to him and more than 10,000 women in the harem.

Every single one of them was beautiful and charming.

They all had respectively proficient abilities to please him as every passing night, they were able to bring him supreme happiness.

However, in Yue Yang’s world, only two days and a bit more had passed according to the real time in the Desire Valley, not even surpassing three days… The only thing in common was that Deputy Palace Master Shen Du had already spewed his body in frenzied fun.

Under the Law of Desire, Deputy Palace Master Shen Du was draining his body’s energy at an astonishing rate.

This kind of drainage, paired with the intensifying and exhilarating sensation of his fantasies, misled Shen Du into thinking that he was advancing into a higher state of strength instead of realising that his energy was gradually depleting.

“Your Most Honorable and Admired Majesty, we are now only two steps away from the final summit,” The first girl that Shen Du rescued had become his favorite concubine as she was his source of happiness. Almost every night, she would come up with all kinds of fancy tricks and tactics to make him happy. The words she said just now referred to the last two strongest high rankers. They were Shen Du’s competitors, the Palace Elders who joined earlier than Shen Du himself, ‘An Sheng’ and ‘Yan Huo’.

“Yes, although they were once companions of this Great Emperor, they have been very dishonest regarding the alliance. They were dishonest and even caused quite a hurdle of troubles behind the scenes and even backstabbed us. This time, this Great Emperor will not condone their irking behaviours. The covenant is inevitable, there can only be one final winner, which is this Emperor! They disregarded the friendship as a fellow palace member, so don’t blame this Emperor’s cruel heart— history and honor will always be written by the victor!” Deputy Palace Master Shen Du had worked with the two palace elders and formed an alliance with them, which resulted in them defeating many enemies. Now, when it was time to turn his back on them, as the Emperor, he did not hesitate to make a decision that was impossible to do before, solidifying his eagerness to kill his former companions.

“Your Majesty is wise, and your concubines will always follow your Majesty,” The girl showed her loyalty and she was somewhat worried, “Your Majesty is invincible, but once war starts, your opponents are two people. If Your Majesty can absorb more energy, the odds of winning would be 100%…”

“Understood, I will use that secret power,”

The secret power that Deputy Hall Master Shen Du referred to was to accept the offerings of the Desire Altar. There, he would ‘connect’ with the God of Desire and gain divine power.

All he needed to do was to use his certain ‘weapon’ to triumph over the God of Desire who had descended.

T/L Note: I’m trying to keep this as literature-like as I can, the author seriously be giving words like **之神, **祭坛 and stuff. There’s literally no indication of what ** is, but it’s censored for a reason so I used the best describing word I could think of.

Everything happened as he wanted.

From Yue Yang’s distanced observance, everything was non-existent.

Even the two palace elders, An Sheng and Yan Huo, have been dead for a long time, and their souls were trapped in the Desire Valley, becoming one of the Curses of Resentment.

In the phantom world of the Deputy Palace Master Shen Du, the bare naked Goddess of Desire descended, and she was so beautiful that he simply could not describe her beauty in words. He, who had won over an unknown number of women, was very excited. Hence, when the Goddess asked him if he was willing to dedicate everything to God, Deputy Palace Master Shen Du agreed without any sign of consideration at all.

A brutal war broke out.

Deputy Palace Master Shen Du was in a bliss as his soul fluttered out of his body. Together with the souls of countless failed warriors, his spiritual wisdom was annihilated forever, leaving only the instincts of desire and the pain of being immersed in resentment.

After failing to pass the level, the Power of the Law took effect immediately.

As a punishment, the body of the Deputy Palace Master Shen Du turned into a huge rock composed of a stone statue made by his thoughts and hallucinations before he died, forming thousands of intercoursal stone statues or wooden sculptures. Beside him, stood the statues of Yan Huo and An Sheng who have entered the Desire Valley before. The three were exactly the same— they all died of this illusion, endless greed and perishability that they would never awaken from!

If Shen Du, the Deputy Palace Master, had a trace of sobriety, a sliver of introspection and a hint of restraint during the entire process of being infatuated, he who had great strength, might not have necessarily met this end.

Unfortunately, his name was Shen Du, but his behavior was completely different.

Yue Yang watched the whole process.

He stood up slowly only after he saw the Deputy Palace Master Shen Du completely turned into a boulder.

He has never been confused with illusionary fantasies, nor does he struggle with the temptation of ecstasy. As long as he walked over the boulders formed by these fallen warriors and reached the end of the Desire Valley, he was sure to successfully pass the level and leave the Valley.

However, Yue Yang, who had enlightened the World Creation Domain in the Gates of Life and Death, was unwilling to leave like this. In the Desire Valley, he felt that in addition to the temptation of the Law of Desire, there was also a strong force of resentment. This was something that even the Empress Fei Wen Li, could not understand. Empress Fei Wen Li was in a hurry and didn’t have any more thoughts, so she went straight to the finishing line and passed this chaotic Desire Valley.

She told him that as long as he shed a drop of virgin tears or a drop of virgin blood at the final destination, he could successfully pass the 3th Level Desire Valley.

Yue Yang knew the answer to clear the Level.

But he was not satisfied.

He had hoped to observe with his own eyes and used the chess pieces as a mirror to find the truth about the Power of Resentment in the Desire Valley.

“At the end, there are two kneeling stone statues with severed heads in the Desire Valley. They are exactly the same as the two stone statues with severed heads at the entrance, both headless men and women. The blood should be dropped on the palms of the men’s hands, whereas the teardrop should drip onto the palm of the woman’s hand, and the effect of the two seems to be the same. I was eager to pass through the Desire Valley, but I did not study it carefully as I just let a tear fall and passed. If you didn’t prepare in advance, on the way to the Desire Valley, there will be a good amount of women on your way. They are the half-conscious and half-sinking fallen ones that have been reincarnated. It is said that as long as you get the love of those beauties, you will pass through, but there is no guarantee at all, so it would be best if you prepared yourself early!” Empress Fei Wen Li shared her experience of clearing the Desire Valley.

“I have the tears and blood of a virgin,” Yue Yang opened his hand with a little puzzled expression, muttering to himself, “But what is this Power of Resentment?”

“Are you able to feel the Power of Resentment?”

There was a female voice that was as clear as the heavens, and it resounded from behind Yue Yang.

It was as if Yue Yang’s soul was struck by thunder as his body was shaken.

He did not sense that there was a woman behind him.

This, this is simply impossible…Under the protection of the World Creation Domain and paired with his Heaven Eyes Transverse ability, even a God wouldn’t be able to sneak their way through! What’s more was that around his body, there were still small circles of the Powers of the Law that surrounded him. That’s why it should be impossible for any other being to enter his space within a hundred meters.

Why?

Who was it exactly that could pull off such a task?

Yue Yang burst into the Supreme Will in an instant and recovered into his calm demeanour. He turned around in serenity, turning back to look at the person.

It was an indescribably beautiful woman. Comparing the Goddess who tempted Shen Du with her was equivalent to comparing a firefly with the moon[1].

T/L Note:[1] Comparing two things that had a striking difference and shouldn’t be compared. It literally meant that the brightness of a firefly couldn’t be compared with that of the moon.

Unfortunately, this woman only had a head.

The parts below the neck were chopped off by an unknown person.

Even so, her face was suffocatingly beautiful, and even the student Yue Yang who was accustomed to beauties and possessed the Supreme Will could not help but form small ripples in the tranquil lake of his mind. Had it not been for the realm guidance of Zhi Zun, Empress Fei Wen Li, and many ancient powerhouses in the World Tree that let Yue Yang have a glimpse of the Divine Innate Realm and reach the perfect Supreme Realm, he would have been unable to resist the temptation of the other party.

This was just the power of a head.

If she had a body, Yue Yang felt that his Supreme Will might not be able to resist it!

How frightening!

Yue Yang never thought that a woman would be beautiful to a terrifying state! This kind of overwhelming facial feature was the deadliest poison for any man! If this woman says she wants to fall in love with him, he genuinely believed that any man would give up everything in the world and dump themselves willingly under her pomegranate skirt[2].

T/L Note: [2] This means the act of a man being subdued by the charm/ beauty/ actions of a woman, falling into her control.

“Are you afraid of me?” The beautiful woman smiled slightly as her smile instantly eclipsed heaven and earth.

“Ah, you are the source of that Resentment!” Yue Yang felt the unbelievable existence of the other party in his heart, and the Supreme Will was immediately shaken and shocked, “No, you are the source of energy for the entire Desire Valley. No wonder I couldn’t sense your presence before— your existence is basically the Law of the Desire Valley. No, actually, the Law of the Desire Valley is not the Law of Desire; iit exists to seal you, but in turn, you assimilated it into the Law of Desire. My Goodness, who exactly are you?”

“My name is Pandora, and I am someone who has been dead for a hundred thousand years. I don’t remember the past at all; what’s left with me is only endless resentment,” The beautiful woman laughed and asked, “Are you satisfied with this answer? By the way, I was born with an ability to predict death. Do you want to know that the date of your death, hmm, seems to be today?”

chapters.title: Chapter 845: Can You Give Me One More Chance At Love?
chapters.body:
Chapter 845: Can You Give Me One More Chance At Love?

Chapter 845: Can You Give Me One More Chance At Love?

“Is that so?” Student Yue Yang behaved very calmly.

“You will die today, and yet you aren’t afraid?” the beautiful woman who claimed to be Pandora asked strangely.

“It’s not true, after all…” Yue Yang smiled. How could he die if he was in excellent condition. Even a normal human being wouldn’t die abruptly without reason, let alone himself.

“You don’t believe it? In fact, my predictions are fairly accurate. For 100,000 years, it seems that there have been no exceptions. I don’t really know why I have such a predictive ability either, but once I say so, it will become an undisputed fact. A lot of my previous victims didn’t believe my words, but they all died without exception. Not too long ago, there was also a human man who showed up, and he was much stronger than you. I told him that he would die within a year…” Pandora gave Yue Yang an example.

“He died within that year?” Yue Yang asked.

“I don’t know,” Pandora shook her head,”According to the people who came in three years later, there was indeed a very powerful man who had died. I didn’t ask whether it was within the year I had predicted though, so I’m not very sure about that either.”

“What is the name of that very powerful human man?” Yue Yang asked again.

“He seems to be called Zhan Feng,” Pandora said as Yue Yang sweated profusely. Who was Zhan Feng? It was none other than the famous Prison Emperor!

“What did you suspect to be his cause of his death?” Yue Yang somewhat believed in the opponent’s prediction ability, but the fact remains that he was slightly curious.

“I think it was a self-induced explosion!” Pandora implied that she was not sure.

“Then how will I die today?” Yue Yang asked again.

“About this, you probably will die from the Power of Resentment here in the Desire Valley!” Pandora was relatively certain about Yue Yang’s cause of death.

“Why will I die of Resentment?” Yue Yang’s curiosity was piqued.

“You are a little different from others. Your body seems to be automatically absorbing the Power of Resentment… This power has existed since ancient times. There were countless people who failed to break through the levels, and they induced an endless supply of resentment right before their deaths, which is not something that your body can withstand. Coupled with the fusion of the Resentment Power and the Law that exists here, if you absorb the power, it is equivalent to practically engulfing the Law, and that Law which sustains the existence of the Desire Valley will naturally produce backlash. You won’t need to wait long before your body will explode and die,” Pandora gave Yue Yang a detailed analysis of the cause of his death.

“I see,” Yue Yang was not surprised by this answer. He felt that there was indeed a ‘black hole’ in his body that would swallow inconspicuous amounts of energy. Besides, there was also ‘World’ that absorbed energy endlessly all the time.

“If the cause of death has been found, what are you going to do about it?” Pandora was surprised that Yue Yang was calm.

“What do you mean ‘what am i going to do’ ?” Yue Yang was puzzled.

“Aren’t you afraid?” Pandora felt that this kid didn’t look like someone who had already known the exact time of his death. According to reason, his brain should be able to process the news by now? Or was ignorant of death ever since he was born?

“Do I really have to be afraid of this?” Yue Yang asked with some uncertainty latched in his voice.

“Of course! It’s death!” Pandora’s head was almost spinning.

“You are dead too, so are you scared of it?” Yue Yang retorted.

“I’ve been dead for a hundred thousand years, so what is there to be afraid of!” Pandora said that she was used to it a long time ago.

“Well, I’m not dead yet, what is there for me to be afraid of!” Student Yue Yang shrugged nonchalantly and spreaded his hands. Not only was he calm but he was also optimistic, ” Aren’t I still alive right now?”

“…” Pandora was speechless.

Yue Yang walked forward all the way along the various giant stone statues of copulation that lined on both of his sides.

Gradually, there was a line of trees.

But these trees were very strange as they were all shaped like humans. The trees on Yue Yang’s left resembled women, whereas the ones on the right looked like men.

The further he advanced, the more similarly the trees looked like humans. Towards the end, the trees that Yue Yang saw were no longer trees and became Treants[1] instead. Females remained on the left and males occupied the right. All of them were naked without a single piece of clothing. Looking at them, they subtly caused the temptation to rile up. These Treants of both genders, screamed with tears streaming down their faces when they saw Yue Yang coming over, some even calling out ‘help’.

T/L Note: [1] treants are creatures (normally humans) that look like a tree. Think of it as a human with vines and branches and leaves around them to make this scene more believable

Yue Yang, who remained invisible, looked back at Pandora strangely, “Can these Treants see me?”

Pandora has been floating behind Yue Yang and she said with a smile, “Any trespasser who enters the Desire Valley, it will be of no avail no matter what treasures and skills you use to cloak yourself with. As long as it is under the Law, everything will be visible and you’d have nowhere to hide.”

Yue Yang asked again, “Can these Treants see you?”

Pandora denied, “I’m an exception to the Law. Besides you, there were very few rankers who could sense the Power of Resentment. Most of them don’t even know that I exist!”

“Please, save me! Take me out of here! I can give you everything!” Next to Yue Yang, there was a Treant girl. Of course, there was more than one woman on this tree, but they looked like they were melting into a tree pole. Although their bodies could move to a certain extent, it could not leave the whole trunk. Another girl who was able to speak begged Yue Yang bitterly. She stretched out her slender arm to him, trying her best to grab a hold of him. But as soon as her arm was stretched out of the tree and the sunlight shone, her arm caught fire, and the pain caused the Treant girl to scream.

“If you are willing to save me, I can be your slave. I can even offer you my chrysanthemum[2]!” The Treant man on the other side also pleaded with Yue Yang.

T/L note: [2] At this point, I’m not sure if I explained this before but this flower means, ‘anus’. Literally.

“Sorry, I am not interested in your chrysanthemum,” Student Yue Yang added, “Besides, I will die today.”

“Have you violated the law?” The Treant girl expressed her dissatisfaction on her face.

“Although it was unintentional…” Yue Yang nodded and admitted.

“Scram! What a waste of my time!” When the Treant man on the other side heard that Yue Yang had violated the law, his expression immediately changed.

“Why are you angry with a dead person? While we wait for the next passerby, let’s have some fun first,” The Treant man and another, who wasn’t far from him, slowly crept towards each other, one of them descended on top of the other’s frame. After coming down, their skin squirmed on the now slimy branches, looking absolutely disgusting. When the two bodies were put together, the two Treants ignored Yue Yang’s dumbfounded gaze as they hugged each other straightforwardly, rocking back and forth in a sensational manner.

For a time, the two tree men screamed loudly and wheezed, but the surrounding tree men turned a blind eye, as if it was a normal occurrence.

Many Treants evoked the action and also followed suit.

Soon, the trees on both sides trembled.

Student Yue Yang was sweating madly.

Only the Treant girl, who had the sun burn her arm, looked at Yue Yang with tears, “You will die today, so can you give me one more chance at love? As long as I can get your love, I can leave here! Before you die, I will accompany you for a day, so that you can relish in your fullest happiness before death! And you can also leave your seeds with me and I can give birth to a son of yours in the future! Since you are going to die, don’t you want to leave something to this world? At the last moment, do you still want to have regrets? I can satisfy you and let you pass in bliss…I will love you, remember you forever, and take your son to live a good life in the future and teach him how to behave. I will have him become the best fighter in the Heaven Realm, and we will come here to worship again in the future!”

Student Yue Yang seemed to be very kind today. He moved closer and asked, “What should I do to save you?”

Pandora let out a dissatisfied snort behind him, beckoning him to not be so stupid.

In the Desire Valley, no one can be trusted.

Yue Yang didn’t show any particular expression. His face resembled the portrayal of the expression, ‘I am your saviour and I will save you’.

The Treant girl was moved to the point where she shed tears and kept sobbing. Finally, she suppressed her excitement and tremblingly said, “As long as you- as long as you kiss me, I can be free again. Once I am free, I can give you all the joy you want. We can cultivate love in one day. If it weren’t for your lack of time, I could stay with you for several years, or even a lifetime— you don’t know how touched I am! I love you and I will continue to love you forever. As long as you give me freedom, I will love you with all my life!”

“Kiss? Where do I kiss you?” Yue Yang moved closer, his eyes sweeping over the Treant girl’s snow-white breasts and her widely opened legs, revealing a certain private area.

“It’s okay to touch it too!” The tree girl seemed to be shy. She lowered her head and dared not look at Yue Yang, her voice trembling a little.

As soon as student Yue Yang heard it, he thought, It was just as simple as touching?

He pretended to cough seriously as he smoothened out the clothes on his body and combed his hair. He even nearly forgot to take out the mirror to see if he became handsome.

Finally, he brought out the noble demeanour of a gentleman giving his life to save others and touched the Treant girl’s crisp chest.

When Yue Yang still withdrew his big hand reluctantly, the Treant girl suddenly smiled.

Her body was struggling fiercely on the tree.

With a snap, she fell to the ground.

Waiting for her to get up amidst the green slimy sap, Yue Yang himself suddenly flew over to the tree and was stuck. The more he struggled, the more he was trapped in the holds of the tree. Student Yue Yang exclaimed, “What’s going on?”

The girl who fell under the tree chuckled and said, “Of course it is to take my place! Naturally, you wouldn’t know but here, anyone’s freedom must be exchanged for another person’s freedom. Maybe in the future, you will be free when another idiot is fooled. Before that, I will go ahead. My dear foolish lover, I will teach you something good— never trust strangers easily and do not easily promise something to a stranger. In this Land of Trials, there is no one who could die faster than a good old Samaritan!”

Student Yue Yang looked terrified, and suddenly he remembered something, “Didn’t you say that you were going to love me forever? And you were going to give birth to my children!”

After the girl stood up, she turned into a middle-aged man.

He laughed loudly,”Fool! Here in Desire Valley, men become women in singularity, and women become men exactly the same way— which means the men and women you see now constantly changes every day! You idiot, you were deceived already and yet, you put your trust in me? Besides, if it weren’t for this, would you believe me? I waited for so long and finally got a stand-in. Hahaha, wait in line slowly then. It will be your turn to seduce passerbys once a few thousand others get their turn. Actually, there is nothing wrong with enjoying the days of becoming male-to-female here, at least you would have fun every day. If you’re sick of men, you can play with women; when you’re done with women, you can have others play you. As long as there are people on the tree, and you’re also no longer satisfied with a one-on-one, you can play along together. After all, you won’t be too bored here, hahaha!”

Student Yue Yang became Wife Xianglin[3], “I’m so stupid. I knew it was fake yet I still believed in others…”

T/L Note:[3] It’s a fictional character in a short story. She was forced into working, was always tired, a series of tragedies fell upon her and she died in a windy snowy night. Basically saying you have suffered.

The middle-aged man laughed wildly, “Slowly repent, I got here in the same way. Just get used to it. My dear brothers and sisters, I will bait in more fools to come here to replace you, so just wait patiently. I’m leaving!”

Ignoring the words of the Treants around, the middle-aged man flew out impatiently.

Before leaving, he used his heel to lift up the bag Yue Yang had just placed on the ground.

Not only did he want Yue Yang’s ‘love’, but he wanted to receive his baggage as well.

He flew smoothly for a hundred meters.

Suddenly, everything was shattered.

All the sights, like a shattered mirror in space, completely disappeared.

It turned out that the middle-aged man who flew 100 meters away was still the Treant girl on the tree, and the tears on her face hadn’t dried yet.

But student Yue Yang, who was stuck on the tree pole, still stood in the center of the line of trees with a smile, as if he hadn’t moved a step. The small bag that was put down before remained on his back.

“An illusion?” The Treant girl’s face changed.

“Wrong. To be precise, it is the reality of an illusion. This stuff is a high-end product, and it’s normal if you don’t know it!” Student Yue Yang opened his bag and took out a lot of red phosphorite crystals, throwing them out one by one. He threw them on both sides of the line of trees. Between every Tree, there was one in place. In fact, this was not taken from his bag. It was from the storage ring of Deputy Palace Master Shen Du. Originally, Yue Yang thought it was some sort of treasure, who knew it only turned out to be some high-purity red phosphorite crystals, which disappointed student Yue Yang.

“What do you want to do?” Not only the girl, but all the other Treants panicked.

“It’s easy— barbecue!”

Student Yue Yang smiled, his smile resembled a God descending into the mortal realm under the sunlight, “The weather is so cold. If I don’t start a fire,I’m afraid you will catch a cold,” Before his words were over, the sky was raining in a hail of storms. Every piece of snow was as sharp as a blade, and this kind of frosty atmosphere was close to being zero degrees, which was not something the Treants could withstand.

The red phosphorite crystals on the ground were just the opposite.

Under the fluttering snow, the blossoming red lotuses of anger ignited, and the stored fire erupted, ejecting raging flames all around.

Dual Heavens of Ice and Fire!

The entire Treant colony screamed in agony… Student Yue Yang smiled, as if he heard the most touching music in the world, “You can actually scream louder!”

“I beg for your forgiveness. Please forgive us, forgive us!” Countless wailing sounds burst out amongst the flames and frost, “We were wrong, please forgive us. Please be merciful and forgive us who are depraved and deceitful!”

“This little punishment is nothing. Continue to say that you love me, continue to deceive me! Even if you tricked me, I will still put my trust in you; I am very good!” Student Yue Yang raised his hand, and thousands of lightning bolts appeared in the sky. They fell like raindrops, and those Treants were instantly incinerated into ashes. But under the confinement of the Power of the Law, they will not really die, as their skin will grow again on the tree poles. However, the pain was unavoidable, making these Treants rather pray for death instead.

“You really are a pushover. It’s fine if you weren’t fooled, why should you punish them like this?” Pandora was originally angry at the deceit, but she couldn’t bear it when he saw that the Treants were in too much misery.

“I have time to kill after all.. Besides, wasn’t I going to die today? I’m about to die and I must be upset. It’s reasonable to torture them, right?” Yue Yang said that he had a reason for doing this.

“And yet I think you are in a good mood?” Pandora was puzzled.

“Because, I verified one thing,” Yue Yang smiled. This time it was a real smile and he smiled very proudly.

“What did you verify?” Pandora asked.

“These failures do have resentment. When I tortured them, they did radiate a lot of Power of Resentment, but even their power accumulated over 100,000 years was less than one percent of the Desire Valley’s. The real source of Resentment Power is you, the beautiful Pandora!” Yue Yang spoke like he was having a friendly discussion: “Do you remember who cut off your beautiful head?”

“No, I don’t remember at all,” Pandora thought hard, before she finally shook his head, “my mind is completely blank.”

“Forget it, that’s not important, I don’t have time to be nosy,” Yue Yang gave up looking for an answer.

“Don’t you have one day left?” Pandora comforted, “You were very optimistic just now.”

“That was just now,” Yue Yang indicated that people’s mood would change.

“…” Pandora was speechless. Even if it does change, wasn’t that way too fast?

To the end, he saw the pair of headless stone statues of a man and a woman. It was just as Empress Fei Wen Li had said: this is the exit to leave.

Yue Yang did not drop his blood. He realised that he was still in the Law of the Desire Valley and his entire being was trapped in the Power of Resentment. The black hole and World in his body were consuming this energy frantically, which made him unsure whether or not he would end up exploding. He knew one thing though, and it was that he did not really succeed in clearing the Level. Empress Fei Wen Li and the Prison Emperor could easily meet the conditions, but he could not pass the same way.

This may also be the unique trait of his as an annoying person.

Pandora watched the boy lay out a sumptuous meal and asked strangely, “What are you doing?”

Yue Yang didn’t turn his head back, “I’m going to eat. If I don’t have a good meal now, you can expect me to be a starving ghost in the future!”

Pandora was absolutely speechless, “…”

Finally, seeing that this kid finished his feast and laying on the grass leisurely basking in the sun, he held a chicken leg in his hand and gnawed repeatedly. Then, she had a sudden thought, “Anyway, since you are going to die, can you give me one more chance at love? I have never liked men, but you seem to be a little different from other men. You seem interesting. It would be a pity for you to die like this. Can you let me remember you for the rest of my life?”

The chicken leg that student Yue Yang was gnawing onto dropped to the ground. He said as he sweated profusely, “I’ll say, Pandora, the Treant guy just now said the same thing to me…”

chapters.title: Chapter 846: Hundred Thousand Years Of Resentmen
chapters.body:
Chapter 846: Hundred Thousand Years Of Resentmen

Chapter 846: Hundred Thousand Years of Resentmen

t

Seeing Yue Yang doubting himself, Pandora became angry, “I’m serious!”

Yue Yang pretended that he couldn’t hear anything, so he poured some water to wash his hands and patted his wet hands on his body casually, before he turned back to her without looking up, “Didn’t you say that I shouldn’t trust anyone in the Desire Valley?”

Pandora really wanted to just bite this kid in frustration, “I’m an exception, okay?”

Yue Yang was rather worried that she would really go to such lengths and bite him, so he raised his hands in an act of surrender. However, his personal opinion was still reserved, “Why did you suddenly have such boring thoughts?”

“What part of falling in love seems boring to you?” A certain beauty who had been dead for a hundred thousand years was going crazy.

“It’s not boring, it’s just stupid!” The transmigrated man commented.

“…” A certain beauty was completely speechless.

While Pandora was angry, Yue Yang began to try and save himself.

After all, he couldn’t just watch himself die without doing anything. Even if his attempts were useless, he was still dedicated to try.

Yue Yang summoned the Grimoire, manipulating the little World in his hands and transforming all the Resentment that it had absorbed. The Nirvana Flame rose, and the Resentment Power in World would automatically be transformed into Chaotic Power. But as that process was too slow, Yue Yang took the initiative to purify it with Nirvana Flame, which intensified this process.

The negative energy, under Yue Yang’s Nirvana Flame, dissolved like snow into a hot soup.

Especially when Yue Yang tortured those filthy Treants before, the Resentment Power absorbed was even more easily purified, turning into a trivial stream of pure Chaotic Power without any form of impurity.

The new ‘World’ absorbed all of the energy.

However, even if it was Elemental Energy, all of it could still be transformed. Besides the Chaotic Power, no other energy can exist forever.

Yue Yang felt that it had a certain similarity with the Divine Equipment World Creation Jewel that he could not actively control. But both the Night Empress and Zhi Zun have mentioned that only when the World Creation Jewel is used to open up the Heavens and give life, only then can the World be considered truly completed. It will continue to rise like the Summoning Grimoires evolving from the initial Bronze to a higher level of Silver and Gold. The world in the Summoning Grimoire can provide for the owner to live and stay, but the rules were not set by the owner. Instead, it was the owner who must comply with its rules of existence. And Yue Yang’s ‘World’ was different from the Creation Treasures. If he could really create a world, Yue Yang would be the ‘God’ in that world, the only sovereign.

The Flame of Nirvana was raging.

The Resentment Power emitted by the Treants quickly transformed Yue Yang.

However, their Resentment, compared with the Resentment in the Desire Valley, was like comparing the differences between an ant and the sea.

The Resentment that these Treants formed when they were tortured and the Resentment in the Desire valley was a comparison between a tree and a forest despite being accumulated by the fallen over the past 100,000 years. Yue Yang could purify their hatred in one minute, but it would take at least one month to purify the Resentment accumulated.

And to purify the entire Power of Resentment in the Desire Valley, not including the backlash or the law and only accounting the factor of time, he estimated that it will take a year, perhaps even more.

Now all the time that was left for Yue Yang was only one day!

What can he do in one day?

Can he purify the Resentment Power that was as endless as a sea of water?

The fool also knew that this was impossible… but Yue Yang did not stop, and the Flame of Nirvana continued to burn, concentrating on purifying the body’s Resentment Power.

“Why are you so stubborn?” Pandora asked curiously.

“Because you are not me, so you can’t understand me,” Yue Yang answered with a smile.

Pandora saw his smile. She was shocked for a moment, as if she was thinking about something, before she finally frowned, “Your smile looks a little like mine!”

Student Yue Yang’s chin dropped in surprise, “I am a man. No matter how much I smile, I won’t look like you!”

Pandora gave him a sullen look, “I meant your charm. You usually keep a really sturdy poker face, but when you smile, you will exude some unknown energy that attracts others, just like me. Of course, I am better than you as I am equally attractive no matter if I am laughing or crying, angry or happy. Although I don’t remember who said that, I’m pretty sure that someone has complimented me in this way and said that my charm was absolute!”

Yue Yang scratched the top of his head, “According to your words, am I supposed to feel happy?”

Pandora asked strangely, “Are you unhappy?”

Yue Yang shook his head, spreading his hands, “There is only half a day left for me to live and there are no beauties around; what’s the use of smiling beautifully?”

“Even if there is no one else around, can’t you smile for me?”

“It’s tiring to smile a lot. Besides, my face cramps pretty easily!”

“You…”

She vowed to ignore this kid again, but ten minutes later, Pandora realized that she was still making futile efforts.

There was no other way, so she had no choice but to throw away her persistence just now.

Upon meeting this dumbfounding guy, Pandora found that she was rather soft hearted— no matter if he was wrong or right, she couldn’t refute or do anything about it. Pandora floated closer and looked at the Nirvana Flame in his arms before she stepped back with a little fear, “I didn’t think you would have the Flame of Nirvana! But even if you have this flame that purifies everything, you should know that it will take at least a few months to purify the Resentment Power of Desire Valley…”

Yue Yang denied, “A few months will not work— at the very least, it will take a few years, and it has to be under the condition that the Power of the Law does not back down.”

Pandora felt strange, “Yet, you are still doing such useless things?”

Yue Yang was amused when he heard the words, “I do have to do something, don’t I? There is still a long time before my death. Isn’t it too boring not to do anything when I am waiting for death?”

Pandora was speechless

After another half an hour, Pandora couldn’t help it anymore, “You’re waiting to die anyway, it’s better to chat with me. Although you have something to do, it’s boring for me to just be watching!” Before Yue Yang refused, she asked again, “Tell me about you— I’m really curious about what kind of place and what kind of parents could give birth to a little monster like you because you are completely different from others!”

Yueyang sweated profusely, “Actually I am not a wild Altman, so don’t look at me in that way.”

“What is Altman?”

“It is one who likes small creatures.Usually they’d carry out gaoji[[1] in front of others, putting on a show.”

T/L Note: [1] A term for homosexual intimacy/ intercourse.

“Then what is gaoji?”

“This question is more profound. I have only heard of it. It has something to do with back mountains[2] and chrysanthemums, but the specific truth is not clear to me.”

T/L Note: [2] It is a phrase to call gay men. Chrysanthemum, if you forgot, is referred to anus.

“Then let’s not talk about this topic. By the way, do you have a woman you like?”

“There are many.”

“A lot? You have a lot of women? I didn’t pin you as that kind of man. Didn’t you even resist my charm?”

“The problem is that the charm of some women makes me not want to resist, and there’s also the charm of some women that makes me afraid to resist; it’s hard to explain this quickly. Love is a very complicated thing. Some experts who appear to have a brain disorder claim that it is a chemical reaction, whereas some people say that it’s an arrangement made in your past life. Anyway, everything is muddled. The only one thing that can be clearly affirmed is that I like her, and she likes me too!” A certain transmigrated man rarely spoke honestly about the truth— could it be ‘If a person is about to die, his words would also be good’?

“Is that so? I seem to understand a little bit too!” A big beauty who hadn’t had a chance to fall in love for 100,000 years frowned.

“As if you understand!” The transmigrated man directly classified the woman into the category of being stupid when it came to love.

“If you wouldn’t die, would you fall in love with me?”

“It’s boring to fall in love with you, but it’s okay to think about ‘pushing you over’ [3].”

T/L Note: [3] Intercourse. That’s it.

“What do you mean by ‘pushing me over’ ?”

“Men and women do that…”

“That?”

“You are not a natural idiot, you are naturally blind!” A transmigrated man was angry.

“Oh, I understand, male and female copulation right? That’s really filthy. The valley is filled with that kind of stuff and it’s really disgusting. I don’t know why I have to be imprisoned here, but the things here make me despise them— I hate everything here!” When Pandora became angry, her Resentment Power immediately affected the Power of the Law. Yue Yang was surprised to feel that every time she got angry, a large amount of negative Resentment Power would be generated and it would perfectly integrate with the Power of the Law. His own thoughts were extremely pure, but the negative energy permeated the entire Desire Valley, making the Desire Valley edge more and more towards being an indescribable ‘destruction’.

Pandora was terrifying when she was angry, but she recovered quickly.

In an instant, the original natural state was restored.

She murmured in a low mood, “My head was chopped off and I have no body to call my own anymore.”

Yue Yang felt that Pandora’s body seemed to carry a special kind of destruction energy. Unlike his direct destruction ability like the World Exterminating Wheel, it was an invisible and subtle destruction.

It was this kind of destructive energy that she unconsciously radiated that turns into Resentment, which then merges with the Power of the Law of Desire Valley.

Finally, through her will, she clung tightly to herself.

In other words, the reason why she couldn’t leave was completely because she didn’t want to leave by herself. The power of this Valley of Desire was all under her unconscious control as everything worked according to her will, but she had never used this power. Until he appeared and attracted her attention, wanting to make him stay. This kind of invisible destructive energy also continuously flooded in through the channels of its own energy absorption. Pandora’s destructive energy radiated from her own world where it absorbed energy, like a magnet of Yin and Yang, firmly ‘attracting’ them together.

If the two of them were not so special, then she might not have had her head cut off, and she probably wouldn’t ever die at all.

“Do you remember who cut off your head?” Yue Yang asked.

“I don’t remember,” Pandora’s mood became more and more depressed.

“It’s okay without a body!” Yue Yang comforted her, “I have a friend who has no body. In the end, I resurrected her with the Nirvana Flame. She became a flame and there were no traces of her memories— you’re a lot stronger than her though.”

“I didn’t feel very troubled before. In the time span of a hundred thousand years, I constantly slept but occasionally thought about things in my dreams. Usually , I was asleep so I was fine, but when I met you, I suddenly felt very reluctant—you are about to die, and I would be alone again… You are completely different from others. There are many people who have broken through the Levels and can find me. Some people will talk to me, and some people will just pass by. Everyone seems to not care as they come and go, and I don’t feel anything either. But you are different… If you die, there will be no one to speak with me. Besides, this is the first time I’ve been so happy. Can you not die?” Pandora became more and more choked with emotion with every word and two streams of tears rolled down.

“Well, isn’t there still half a day?” Yue Yang was sweaty. He wanted to say that it was because she subconsciously wanted to keep him here that made things turn out like this.

“But I don’t want to have you for half a day, I want you to stay forever,” Pandora cried in a mess.

“There are some things that you don’t want to own,” Yue Yang sighed slightly.

“I don’t care! Why can’t I get what I want? Why am I the Goddess of Doom that everyone avoids, and not the Goddess of Luck that everyone likes! Why? Why was my head cut off? Why am I trapped in this dirty Desire Valley? I hate this, and I hate all of you!” Pandora lost her mind, and the memories stored in the depths of her mind burst out, driving her crazy. An angry scream resounded through the clouds, and the Law of the entire Desire Valley fluctuated with an endless destruction energy that swept the world invisibly.

Yue Yang found that the ‘World’ in front of him was soaring at a frantic speed, and the Power of Resentment was poured into him like a flood. He became the target of the attack and the target of the irrational Pandora.

The Goddess of Doom had accumulated a hundred thousand years worth of Resentment Power and his own Nirvana Flame’s purifying ability lacked in comparison.

At this rate, he would die within half a day.

The prophecy that he had joked about earlier, was indeed true, after all.

chapters.title: Chapter 847: I-Is This Love?
chapters.body:
Chapter 847: I-Is This Love?

Chapter 847: I-Is This Love?

a pillar of Nirvana Flame that was hundreds of meters high rose above Yue Yang’s head.

The Fire Phoenix that burns everything.

Flew around the pillar.

It paused as it reached the top, and then it zoomed downwards.

It turned out that the surging Power of Resentment was mostly eliminated.

Pandora, who had lost all reason, had restored her supreme and majestic divinity, and felt furious when she sensed that someone was going to contend against her. The divine light in both of her eyes shone in anger, and the divine power that was capable of destroying the sky and the earth swept towards Yue Yang. The Nirvana Pillar of Fire that stood hundreds of meters high was almost like a mere needle, which was rather insignificant in comparison.

Yue Yang retreated thousands of meters away, his body shape remaining unchanged.

The Pillar of Fire formed by the Nirvana Flame however, did not diminish due to the divine power of the other party. After all, it is the Nirvana Flame that will never go out. Even if it was up against a God, it cannot be destroyed.

“Are you going to oppose me too?” Pandora floated to Yue Yang angrily. Her endless destructive calamity of her divine power and her 100,000 years accumulated Resentment Power combined to form an irresistible torrent, rushing towards Yue Yang.

“Create!”

Yue Yang’s Creation Domain expanded rapidly, and the Eternal Wheel formed under his feet.

The disastrous divine power and Resentment Power that could very well destroy the entire Desire Valley slowed down its advancement abruptly.

It was like a flood had encountered a giant steel gate and was blocked. Although the peak had not really been reached, more destructive forces were being formed. Yet, the momentum of the impact has been temporarily slowed. The more it advanced, the slower its speed, and finally, it stopped less than one meter in front of Yue Yang. Yue Yang, however, was not optimistic as he knew that this state would not last long. Besides his soul being impacted by Divine Consciousness, the accumulation of divine power outside was extremely fast. Once the Eternal Wheel disappears, the result will be a disaster!

So he persevered hard for ten minutes.

The Eternal Wheel under Yue Yang’s feet dissipated.

The Divine Power of Calamity and the Resentment of one hundred thousand years gushed over. Yue Yang made a gesture of condensing the ‘World-Exterminating Wheel‘ with both hands, but even so, he was unable to stop the force.

If he uses the World-Exterminating Whee, he can definitely split the calamity power and hit Pandora.

But even if he did, he probably wouldn’t be able to save himself.

Maybe, he needed to have a trip to Nirvana[1]!

T/L Note: [1] Some people would use it for the final stage of Buddhism, some think it’s another wall of saying the afterlife. In here, you can refer to the afterlife or a double meaning as his Nirvana Flame.

I’ll just die then!

Isn’t death another form of rebirth?

If I can’t even comprehend the obstacle of death, how can I understand the Higher Innate Invisible Sword Qi? Talking about how to enlighten the Divine Innate Realm? God is an immortal existence, only weak human beings are afraid of death! If I want to reach that state, I must go out in the realm of being ‘human’ and reach the realm of being a ‘god’. Although it is a bit early, is this not an opportunity to climb up the ways of cultivation?

If I don’t succeed, I will become benevolent.

Whether I can transcend myself, to transcend my original realm and to jump into the Divine Realm, depends on this very moment!

Yue Yang slowly closed his eyes. At this moment, he chose to believe his epiphany.

He also believed in the unique and special physique that the Phoenix Sisters had brought him.

The phoenixes can undergo Nirvana Reincarnation.

As the lucky one who has the guardianship of the Phoenix Sisters, can I also achieve Nirvana Reincarnation?

Let go of the thoughts, give up lust, put aside all distracting thoughts and escape the shackles of the human realm. Surpass yourself and leap to the Divine Innate Realm that you saw before…just when Yue Yang was ready to meet death and use this to surpass his own inherent realm, all of the energy disappeared abruptly. The divine power of calamity and the terrifying 100,000 years Power of Resentment disappeared.

He opened his eyes and saw that Pandora had regained her senses.

She was looking at him in tears.

“I-I almost killed you! Why is this happening? Am I the murderer, for your prediction of death?” Pandora burst into tears, “I can’t bear to let you go, but it was the reason that killed you. The first time I ever wanted something, I ended up killing with my own two hands… Now, I understand. I finally understand why they call me Calamity— it turns out I am really unlucky!”

“It’s not that serious!” Student Yue Yang smiled slightly, which was as bright as the sun, “I’m still alive now, aren’t I?”

“If I came back to my senses a second later, you would have been dead,” Pandora’s face was a sobbing mess.

“In fact, you are now awake, and maybe I will use this chance to surpass myself. Who knows what can happen!” Yue Yang had a little regret in his heart, but it was overshadowed by fortune. Facing death, it seemed very peaceful back then, but in retrospect, it was a lie to say that there was no fear at all. The devastating divine power of calamity—that was definitely not a joke. Except for the sword styles used by the Heavenly Sword Goddess herself, it was greater than all the powers that Yue Yang has seen in his life. After seeing the Divine Power of Calamity, he realized the huge gap between man and God.

“I almost killed you, and yet here you are, comforting me!” Pandora cried even harder.

“You don’t want me to cry with you, do you?” Yue Yang implied that it was impossible.

“You are always like this… The better you are to me, the less I will be willing to let you leave here, and the less likely you will be to live… Now, what are we going to do?” Pandora was amused by Yue Yang’s odd expression. Now, she cried and laughed, getting so emotional to the point where she couldn’t calm down at all.

“Let me think about it,” Yue Yang felt that he needed a bit of time.

“There is no time— there is only half a day left. My death prediction is still in effect, and that means you will most definitely die!” Pandora screamed as her emotions fluctuated.

“Please, you just need to say it once; repeating it has no use at all,” Yue Yang smiled calmly: “You should be optimistic and think like this: there is still half a day. It’s not one minute, so what was there to be afraid of? There is plenty of time to think of an alternative route. Besides, even if there is only one minute left, that is still one minute to live, isn’t it?”

“I can’t be optimistic!” Pandora tried to be more serious, but in the end she just burst into laughter.

“The way you are crying is not pretty at all…” Student Yue Yang took out a tissue and gently wiped away the tears for her.

“Hurry, we have to think of a way!” Pandora felt very much comforted, but she wanted to lose her temper on him. This kind of inexplicable emotion made her feel strange. What’s the matter with me?

“All right!”

Yue Yang thought for a while.

Pandora waited, every passing second felt like years to her, and more than once she wanted to urge him to be faster.

But she was afraid that it would interfere with his thinking, so she had to wait anxiously on the sidelines.

Finally, Yue Yang finally spoke and asked tentatively, “Do you already remember the past? Your past? Just the things from before when you had a body? It doesn’t necessarily have to be a lot, even some memory fragments are fine!”

Pandora shook her head, “No. I might have remembered something when I lost control, but I can’t remember anything now that I’m sane.”

Yue Yang somewhat guessed that she would answer like this.

As long as she is angry, Pandora will restore the memory of the Goddess of Doom. But usually, she was just a natural airhead whose memory has been sealed.

Seeing Yue Yang remain silent, a trace of sadness flashed in Pandora’s eyes.

She was sad.

She couldn’t help him with such a small task.

She couldn’t do anything but watch him walk on the path of his death. What’s even more terrifying was that in the end, she was the one who killed him with her own hands. A hundred thousand years’ that passed was spent remaining in a deep sleep before she finally met an eccentric man. For the first time, someone could make her heart beat, someone could make herself feel a comfortable happiness; for the first time, someone could make her feel sad, and someone made her feel unwilling to give up… For the first time, someone made her capable of laughing and crying; for the first time, someone could make her feel hatred and regret… Is- is this love?

Is this the kind of love he was talking about? It was muddled and indescribable but seemed to be very clear in his heart?

What should I do? What can I do to keep him alive? According to the prophecy, he still has half a day to live, which is certainly not wrong. He is a powerful existence in the entire Desire Valley and no one can kill him except me.

In this case.

Pandora secretly made a decision.

She stopped crying, but showed a smile that could pale even the Heavens and the Earth, “Yes, there is still half a day, so we should cherish it. Let us have a relationship for the rest of the time! Tell me, what do couples do? I don’t have a body, so I can’t achieve your goal of pushing me over[1], like you said. It’s a shame, but it’s okay, maybe we can do something else.”

T/L Note: [1] In case anyone forgot, this means intercourse.

“Who said that you can be pushed over when you just fell in love? Girls have to love themselves!” Student Yue Yang taught Pandora, “When you first fall in love, you can only hold hands at most.”

“But I don’t have hands!” Pandora sighed.

“…” Yue Yang forgot about this.

“Then let’s talk about some other things that couples can do!” Pandora put aside her sadness. She became happy, and her beautiful eyes were full of longing.

“It’s boring, really, and I don’t know much about those. Generally, couples usually go to a place for a date, a park or some quieter place with few people. They also go to a western restaurant to have some steak or a coffee shop for a drink. After a few dates, they would go out to play, have a barbecue or watch a movie. The ones who go for karaoke, dance, eat supper and then open the room when they just meet; that’s not really true love. At best, it can be regarded as a solution for the physical needs of both parties! Girls must love themselves— indulging in sex, it is easy for flowers to become wilting flowers, and those wilting flowers will become fallen flowers. You see, the failed here in Desire Valley are all indulgences of sex!” Student Yue Yang made a gesture, “You and I are not a couple, you can only say that we are friends who have much in common, so of course it doesn’t count. I’m giving you a lesson, although there is no tuition fee!”

“What do you usually do with those women you like?” Pandora was a little curious.

“Cough!” Student Yue Yang almost said something unsuitable for children, before he finally coughed, “There are many things to do, such as studying runes together, practicing together, planting flowers together, reading books together, experimenting together, swimming together, etc…”

“Let’s do it once, then!” Pandora straightened her eyes and flashed brightly, eager to try.

“Hey, we are not lovers,” Yue Yang refused.

“It doesn’t matter now, well, maybe in the future. Let’s just give it a go, there is no time left after all,” Pandora felt that the remaining half of the day should be cherished.

“Leave some time for me to write a few wills! Maybe, I will be like you when I die, and I won’t mind no matter what you want at that time,” Student Yue Yang didn’t bother to accompany her to go crazy. Although he might transcend through death, there was also a chance for him to achieve Nirvana Reincarnation. But in any case, it was necessary to write a few letters to Wu Xia, Tigress and the others. Plus, An An and the others as well! What Yue Yang worried the most was not death, but being sealed in this Desire Valley, just like this Pandora.

He summoned the little half-elven slave who had been living in the Grimoire World to take care of her own life and explained the matter briefly regardless of her wailing.

He placed the Three Realm Compass in the hands of the slave, “Go back and find Wu Xia. Let her find a way to find the Night Empress, Zhi Zun and the others. Don’t cry, I won’t die, maybe I might just be sealed in this place. Until I find out how Pandora died and solve her Resentment, then separate the Resentment Power from the Law Power, perhaps I could leave by then. Will you not listen to me anymore? You have to complete the task, do you understand? Your task is very important to me!”

The little half-elven slave resolutely refused to obey his orders. She desperately cried in Yue Yang’s arms, “Let this little slave die for you! The master must not stay here and this little slave will never leave the master! If the master dies, this little slave will stay here and stay with you forever!”

Even if Yue Yang glared at her, the little slave looked at him bravely.

With tears flowing down her face, the ever-obedient girl clenched her small fists, resolutely refusing to listen to his persuasion to leave and showed an unprecedented stubbornness.

“I said, I will be fine. I just want you to bring over a letter!!”

“Little slave will never leave!”

“You idiot, how many times do you want me to say…”

“If the little slave says she won’t leave, then she won’t leave. Wahh, don’t drive the little slave away, please? Master will be fine and the little slave won’t leave— will always be together!”

Pandora was dumbfounded. For a long time, she muttered to herself, “I-Is this love?”

chapters.title: Chapter 848: Goodbye, My Happiness!
chapters.body:
Chapter 848: Goodbye, My Happiness!

Chapter 848: Goodbye, My Happiness!

At any rate, it was impossible to get the little half-elven slave to leave.

Yue Yang had to change his mind.

Since she wouldn’t leave, he would let her stay. Making her leave was like compromising his own resolution to walk the road of death. The Supreme Will should be fearless of everything— if he wanted to leave the Desire Valley, he must first overcome both life and death. He had already made up his own mind to become stronger than Empress Fei Wen Li, so what was the 4th Level to him? Only by overcoming this level, will he finally be able to admit truly triumphing over the Desire Valley!

Not mentioning the protection of the Phoenix Sisters nor the Nirvana Reincarnation.

His own state of mind should take a big leap.

Was it really impossible to overcome the Divine Power of Calamity, the Resentment Power of a hundred thousand years and the Law of Desire?

There must be a reason why Pandora was sealed here— there must have been a deep meaning behind their actions of sealing her here. As long as she can realize that, not only will he be able to leave the Desire Valley, but he would be able to free Pandora from her curse, freeing this natural airhead who had suffered enough.
