“Fine, it doesn’t matter even if you stay!” Yue Yang agreed and the little slave cheered. Her beautiful face expressed her contentment with smiles and tears, similar to the formation of a rainbow after the rain. She embraced him with emotion and kissed his face passionately. As long as he was willing to let her stay by his side, she couldn’t care less even if she died the next second. If leaving his side was done in exchange to keep her life, she would rather die instead.

“Master is the best, woo!” Before the half-elven slave finished her words, Yue Yang had her pressed onto his lap and slapped her fragrant buttocks fiercely.

“It’s forbidden for you to violate my orders any more. This isn’t over— I’ll be sure to settle this with you when we get out of here!” Yue Yang tried hard to pretend to be a vicious slave owner.

“And this little slave is aware!” The half-elven slave was not afraid at all as she stretched out her little pink tongue cutely.

“…” Yue Yang was speechless.

He really couldn’t do anything about this obedient, cat-like little slave.

As long as she wasn’t driven away, she could become more obedient than anyone else.

In retrospect, she was more stubborn than anyone else as well!

Yue Yang completely put aside his happy memory and entered his ever-expanding world. He meditated amidst the endless Resentment, hoping to find a key to the solution. As long as he could successfully unveil the truth, he would be able to survive. Otherwise, he would have to take the risk of attempting to survive death to enter the Divine Realm. Now, as there was still half a day, Yue Yang hoped that he could turn his passiveness into an active force.

Only by coming out of the Desire Valley through his own efforts would he consider himself to have successfully passed the 4th Level.

Otherwise, how can he be acknowledged in the next few levels?

In the world, Yue Yang fell into a deep contemplation. He put away the Nirvana Flame that purified Resentment and merged his aura with it. He did not resist it at all; in fact, he allowed more Resentment Power to enter the world before he searched for the truth within.

Pandora and the little slave saw that Yue Yang had launched into a self-rescuing measure, so they naturally didn’t dare to bother him and watched quietly.

After a while, Pandora looked away, gazing at the half-elven slave

Looking up and down, lamenting the amazing figure of the other party, she couldn’t help but ask, “What did you eat growing up? How are your breasts so huge?”

The little slave lowered her head as soon as she heard her words, shaking her head in embarrassment, “I don’t know, perhaps I was just born like this! In fact, being too large is not a good thing either— walking is fine, but it sways a lot when I’m running… Being like Mistress Wu Xia is the best; she’s perfect! Of course, Mistress Qian Qian looks great too. Just about everyone else looks good, so you don’t necessarily need them to be big to consider yourself good-looking. Xia Yi’s chest is not big, but she’s also beautiful as well!”

Pandora felt that if she still had a body, she would certainly not lose to the other. But now that her figure was entirely gone, she was still envious as she asked, “Does he always hit you?”

The slave was now even more embarrassed.

After stretching out her hand, she secretly rubbed her buttock. Yue Yang did quite a number on her just now as she felt that the impact remained tingling and burning on her skin.

If it hadn’t been for Pandora’s question, she didn’t care too much about it, as she was still

“No, this is the first time he punished me! The master has always been very gentle, never scolding or hitting people, but this slave was not obedient this time and that made him angry,” The slave felt this way. The punishment was nothing at all and it was not very painful either. It just felt slightly hot and weird.

“He’s pretty terrifying when he gets angry!” Pandora recalled the situation at the time, blurting out, “I was really worried that he would even hit me!”

“No, no he wouldn’t!” The slave comforted her in turn.

“Sigh, it’s impossible for me to be beaten anyways…Because my body is gone,” Pandora sighed sadly.

“Your head was cut off, so what happened to your body?” The little slave felt that things were a bit odd. Wasn’t a divine body indestructible? Even if her head was cut off, her body should still remain.

“My body might have become a part of the Divine Power of Calamity. Ah, by the way, I remembered something, it seems like the reason my head was decapitated was precisely because my Divine Power of Calamity was too strong!” Pandora exclaimed.

“Isn’t it a good thing to be powerful?” The little slave was even more confused.

“I don’t know either. Just now, a fragment of memory just flashed through my mind. Forget it, I don’t want to think about it any longer. One hundred thousand years have passed and I have become accustomed to life without a body. Hey, you have a body, so why don’t you lend it to me? How about it? I just want to borrow your body and hold hands with him. Just now, he said that couples that were falling in love started off by holding hands!” Pandora thought suddenly.

“But, this slave hasn’t held hands with the master before either. Can you wait for this slave to hold it first?” The little slave thought it was easier said than done, but she felt in her heart that some things must be done by herself.

“Huh? Haven’t you been holding hands with him for so long? I thought you even had him ‘pushed over’!” Pandora was surprised.

“No, no, I’m just a small slave next to the master. I’m mainly responsible for taking care of the master’s life.”

The little slave shook her hands with shame.

In fact, she had also wanted to serve Yue Yang more comprehensively, but she never had a chance.

The two saw that Yue Yang was still meditating in the world and so, they continued to chat. This was also probably how the two natural airheads got closer to each other rapidly. Pandora asked about Yue Yang, to which the little slave answered what she knew. Pandora was very interested in hearing it, and from time to time, she recalled bits of memory fragments thanks to the little slave’s current topic of conversation.

From the words of the little slave, Pandora knew about Xue Wu Xia, Princess Qian Qian and City Lord Luohua. She even knew Yue Bing and Yue Yu and learned about Yue Yang’s life.

Suddenly, she felt rather emotional and sighed, “Actually, living like you guys is already a lot happier than my life here. I remember a long time ago, when I still had a body, whoever approached me would become rather unlucky and they tend to stay far away from me because I was constantly exuding the Divine Power of Calamity. Not even once was there anyone who stood in front of me like you and him. Everyone hoped that I would fall, that my Divine Power would become nonexistent…Although I am not sure whether this has anything to do with my beheading,I do know that I am a person who brings misfortune!”

The slave waved her hand, “It doesn’t matter. This little slave is also nothing more than a female slave. It is my honour to be able to talk to someone as worthy as you.”

Pandora looked at her, “Is it alright for you to know that I’m the one who will kill your master?”

The little slave was silent at first, but after a while, she shook her head and said, “That’s not what you want to do… Besides, it didn’t happen. The little slave believes in the master; he is the best and most unique in the world as there is nothing that can stump him— this time he will definitely be able to break through as well. I believe in miracles, and the master is the one who creates the miracles. I have witnessed them countless times before, so I believe him. No matter if we were in the past, the present or the future, I will believe in him forever!”

Now, it was Pandora’s turn to be silent

Time passed with every minute and every second.

The day was about to end.

The dark night gradually descended.

Yue Yang, who had been thinking about searching for the truth, has now begun to move.

He slowly moved his arms in the ‘World’ bit by bit, an act to separate the Power of Resentment from the original Law of Desire.

Although this speed is slow, the fact that it was a successful separation meant that Yue Yang had found the right way. As long as enough time is given, he will be able to break through the limits of the Desire Valley and the death threat of Resentment Power… But even the little slave could tell that it was too late.

Only ten minutes later, the death predicted by Pandora will come!

It’s too late!

The little slave did not cry or shed tears, but showed a bright smile to Pandora, “I’m leaving now. Nice to meet you, Pandora. Goodbye!”

There was a silver dagger in her little hand. This turned out to be the dagger that Yue Yang gave to Xia Yi. When Xia Yi was returning to the Gu Feng Continent, he wanted her to use it to protect her chastity. She was afraid of being arrested and humiliated when spying for the intelligence report, so she asked Yue Yang for this dagger. Later, Xia Yi returned safely and returned the silver dagger to Yue Yang. Today, the slave took it out.

As a quick tool to accompany her master on the road to their deaths.

“For him, is it alright if you die?” Pandora understood what the slave wanted to do. She must have wanted to die together with her master who she loves.

“Yeah!” The slave nodded with a smile and shook his head: “I still believe in the master. However, I want to prepare first. When the master is gone, his personal slave girl will naturally accompany him. No matter where he goes, I will serve him by his side. Although the problem between our statuses makes me a little embarrassed to say it, I do like the master. He-he is my life! With the master, this slave has the entire world. Without the master, even if I was truly granted the entire world, this little slave won’t feel happy. Death is nothing to me. Even if everyone fears death, the happiness in my heart is something not even death can take away!”

“Happiness? Happiness that even death can’t take away?” Pandora’s expression changed, and in an instant, she seemed to have a complete epiphany.

A supreme Divine Power emerged.

The entire Valley of Desire was once again filled with terrifying Divine Power of Calamity and 100,000 years of Resentment, resembling the churning sea amidst strong storms. However, Pandora was weeping with joy instead of irrational loss of reason as she awakened.

She let out a sigh of relief, letting her gentle energy envelop the half-elven slave, so that she can be safe and sound in the violent Resentment Power.

She showed the young slave the brightest and most moving smile in the world, “Thank you. You let me understand what love is!”

“One hundred thousand years ago, I made an extremely vicious oath. I cursed those who rejected me in the Heavenly Realm. In order to complete the disaster, I was angry at that time and cut off my head and refined my body into the most difficult Power of Calamity to comprehend in the world. Through the Battle of the Gods, dozens of Gods were eliminated in one fell swoop. But the ancient Gods told me that when I encounter true love, I will understand what is hatred and what It is love; what is sacrifice, and what is eternal life!”

“Now, I am beginning to understand a little bit.”

“I, who used to be the Goddess of Doom, lacked true love!”

“You can love others, ignore death, and protect your own happiness. And if you can do it as a human… then I can too!”

“When he wakes up, please tell him that I have awoken and I experienced love! In his life, I was just a passing traveler and an idiot who didn’t even understand the meaning of love. But even if I’m an idiot, I was just like you, falling in love with him so incurably and willing to give up everything for him!”

“Happiness, happiness that even death can’t take away… it won’t slip away from my fingers!”

“Don’t forget me. Even if it’s just occasionally, please think of me!”

“Goodbye! My happiness!”

chapters.title: Chapter 849: Happiness Not Even Death Could Take Away
chapters.body:
Chapter 849: Happiness Not Even Death Could Take Away

Chapter 849: Happiness Not Even Death Could Take Away

The little half-elven slave saw Pandora dissipate along with her supernatural power bit by bit, disappearing in front of her.

She was heartbroken.

She wanted to stop Pandora from leaving, but her struggles were proven useless.

No matter what she did, she couldn’t break through the protection circle Pandora placed on her. Faced with the little slave’s dissuasion, Pandora, who braved her death, responded with a small smile.

The immeasurable Divine Power of Calamity dissipated, but Yue Yang’s ‘World’ had now expanded to a huge range of 10,000 meters, frantically swallowing the Divine Power of Calamity before it disappeared. Normally, it would have been an impossible feat, but with Pandora’s divine personality disbanded, her power was constantly turning into a turbulent flow of unowned energy, which was engulfed by his World without resistance.

In response to Pandora’s unusual action, Yue Yang, who was originally dedicated to dividing the Power of Resentment and the Law of Desire, had also immediately noticed the oddity.

Slightly startled before he reacted.

He was furious!

Even if you want to sacrifice for me, you still have to ask for my permission. When was it your turn to make that claim? Do I need someone to sacrifice their life in exchange for mine?

No!

No way!

“Stop. Without my consent, don’t try to make your own claim! When did I allow you to kill yourself? I didn’t, so you are not allowed to die!” Yue Yang became extremely angry, rushing as he gave up on separating the Resentment Power and the Law of Desire and ran towards Pandora.

“Goodbye, I have realized the meaning of death and sacrifice. Goodbye, you must be happy…”

Pandora’s voice and smile dissipated in the divine light.

Even at the last second, she still maintained her most beautiful state.

She didn’t want him to feel that her departure was flawed— she must be in her most perfect state. To bid farewell to him, she must leave at the most beautiful time and give him an eternally tranquil memory.

Yue Yang rushed over frantically.

Rushing into the divine light, he stretched out his arms hard, an action that was almost like he was embracing the dissipated Pandora.

When he realized that his movements would only accelerate the dissipation of her consciousness, he immediately raised his sword to the sky in anger.

Red Perfect Night.

Yue Yang had never used such a mighty force of the Red Perfect Night before. With his sword pointed straight to the sky that tore the world apart, it separated the Law of the Desire Valley from his own World in an instant, intentionally ridding Pandora of the seal of the Desire Valley. Yue Yang, who had spared no effort to maintain Pandora’s residual spiritual consciousness, forgot about his own well-being. The Resentment Power that Pandora had accumulated for a hundred thousand years, like an endless torrent, impacted onto Yue Yang’s body. Yue Yang felt his soul go into shock, his internal organs churning and could almost explode. A mouthful of blood spurted out, forming patterns of splattered blood.

Seeing Yue Yang struggling to take care of himself as he was hit strongly by the Resentment Power, Pandora, who was dissipating, could no longer keep smiling as a divine tear slipped from her face silently.

I sacrificed myself for him, and he’s now fighting for me… Was this the true love that the ancient Gods spoke of?

Black Hidden Return!

In disregard to his heavily damaged body, Yue Yang raised the Black Hidden Return.

The sword was plunged into the ground, letting the Sword Qi penetrate even into the deepest parts of the Earth, completely separating his ‘World’ from the Desire Valley.

If Yue Yang chose not to save Pandora and used the Three Realms Compass at this moment, he was very likely to escape the rules of the Law of Desire. With two of his swords drawn out, he successfully placed himself in a special space entirely of his own mind, in his own world.

Escaping the Desire Valley and the death prophecy didn’t seem improbable.

But Yue Yang did not do that.

He did not leave. Instead, he tried his best to send out his third sword, White Splendid Frost.

Countless clear and brilliant lights flashed in his hands. The White Splendid Frost did not do any harm to the dissipated Pandora’s spirit. Instead, it wrapped the divine light that was constantly dissipating as Yue Yang’s body ignited the Nirvana Flame. He didn’t know whether he could use the Nirvana Flame to ‘resurrect Pandora’ like he did with the Spirit of Fire and Smoke, but he had to give it a try.

Even if there is only one in 10 000, or even one in a billion chance of success, he would not watch Pandora die in front of him.

“Come alive!”

Yue Yang roared wildly.

In order to keep Pandora, Yue Yang has forgotten about everything else.

However, the torrent of resentment energy of 100,000 years completely drowned him and knocked him down.

The blood spurted wildly in his mouth. When he passed out, Yue Yang roared in his heart, instinctively summoning the Divine Grimoire that had never been successfully summoned. He didn’t know why he could summon the Grimoire moments before his death when it was impossible to even do so in his most optimal state. This has nothing to do with reason— it was completely based on instinct, his instinct to hold on to hope!

Hope!

It will be successful!

It was impossible for humans to be without hope. As long as there is still hope, he will succeed!

Let her stay alive, live… Yue Yang fell to the ground, his consciousness entering a dark and deep abyss.

The entire Desire Valley changed, and there was an unspeakably luminent light shining down like a God’s Descent.

It was far more coercive and dreadful than Pandora, the Goddess of Doom. Every single creature in the Desire Valley instantly fainted, and some particularly corrupt and sinful Treants were directly annihilated under this divine might, where even their souls were wiped out. The Law of the Desire Valley collided with this divine power, producing a ripple that was invisible to the naked eye. The two sides were inextricably entangled in ripples. For a time, neither side could overwhelm the other and there was no form of superiority. The divine light bloomed and shone on Yue Yang’s body, illuminating a hundred times brighter than the sun, making it practically impossible to see whether there was a Divine Grimoire hidden amidst the light.

The clear call of a Phoenix resounded throughout the world.

The two forms of Nirvana Flame pierced through the divine light, submerging into Yue Yang’s body and quickly recovered his severely injured body.

The torrent of Pandora’s 100,000-year Resentment Power burst out. Together with the ‘World’ that engulfed the Divine Power of Calamity, they formed a heterogeneous energy that was capable of destroying the entire world! Immediately afterwards, the power of Desire Valley’s law also triggered the greatest backlash.

If these three energies were to explode, even the entire Desire Valley will be destroyed, let alone the residual spiritual consciousness of Yue Yang, the little slave and Pandora,.

A sword appeared.

It was extremely long, dyed in black and had a sharp edge on the tip of the sword, not reflecting an ounce of light.

Standing up between Heaven and the Earth, it can absorb thousands of species as nothing is impossible for it. When it rotated, it could reverse the Laws of both the Heavens and the Earth, as everything in the world was invulnerable to it. This is the real Hidden Return sword! Yue Yang’s Black Hidden Return sword was also quite powerful, but compared with this sword, it was like comparing the differences between a mountain rock and the pinnacle. If Yue Yang’s Hidden Return sword was a river, then this sword was not just a mere river— instead, it was a vast ocean!

One sword was all it took to stop the Divine Power of Calamity, 100,000 years of Resentment Power, and the operational Law of the Desire Valley.

One sword could completely separate the three energies.

The profoundly mysterious and wonderful sword separated the three powers that were starting to explode. The hard task that Yue Yang might have needed a year to complete was completely achieved with this sword instantaneously.

While the Hidden Return sword was still operating, the Splendid Frost appeared.

Compared with Yue Yang’s White Splendid Frost Sword, its brilliance was millions times more dazzling. The clearest and coldest energy in the world appeared in the form of the Splendid Frost Sword.

Pandora’s 100,000-year Resentment Power was like soil cattle[1] entering the sea. It melted in the clear brilliance and gradually transformed into chaotic energy without attributes. The Frost Flower Sword, which expelled all evil, was wielded in the air, dissolving the Resentment Power of one hundred thousand years, and pierced again towards Pandora’s divine consciousness that was dissipating. With this sword hovering along the way, it merged the blood spurted by Yue Yang in mid-air, before gently piercing the eyebrows of the little slave who looked stagnant. The little half-elven slave’s body shook slightly along with the masterpiece of the divine light.

T/L Note: [1] Shapes of cows made from clay.

The Splendid Frost Sword disappeared.

What was a hundred thousand years of Resentment now remained as a cloud of chaos.

And the Hidden Return Sword disappeared between the Heavens and the Earth at the moment the Divine Power of Calamity was completely transformed. After the first chaotic energy, the second larger chaotic energy rushed into Yue Yang’s body. The ‘world’ outside Yue Yang’s body was rapidly diminishing— it shrank from the range of 10,000 meters to 100 meters, blending in with the scope of the field.

The World Creation Jewel did not need Yue Yang’s consciousness to take action and it flew out automatically.

It absorbed the two groups of chaotic energy and compressed them to an infinitely small force, like the source of the universe.

It turned out that the power of the Law of Desire Valley, which was backlashed by the collision, completely occupied the entire world. There was no hostility to it— it was as if there had never been a collision, as if it had never been combined with Resentment, nor had it quickly been affected by Pandora’s fluctuations of her will. Things return to calm, restoring the state of the beginning of the creation of the Desire Valley.

“My head hurts!”

When Yue Yang woke up, he found that he had returned to the Grimoire World.

The little slave was lying on his chest and remained in a deep dream. The corners of her lips curled up with a smile, as if she had dreamt of something happy.

I’m not dead, and I even returned to the Grimoire World? I remember before fainting that I summoned the Divine Grimoire with my own abilities? Could it be that the Phoenix Sisters came out to save me?

Yue Yang sensed something again, and almost dropped his chin in surprise— The World Creation Jewel was shining brightly. He didn’t know that it gained dozens of chaotic energies that were hundreds of times stronger than Yue Yang himself, and even shrank it into an infinitely small source point! The ‘World’ has also shrunk, but it was very different from before. At some point, it merged with the Creation Domain. All this time it never really obeyed orders, yet now as it shared a frame with its master, he felt as if it was willing to be controlled.

Now, Yue Yang couldn’t figure out whether it was a beast or a domain. Maybe, this is the beginning of a personal talent godhead!

What shocked Yue Yang most was not the change in himself.

It was the slave.

She now possessed a divine power that was unable to be comprehended by Yue Yang. It was a lot more pure than the divine powers of Divine Envoys and Divine Generals. She also possessed a certain divine nature which was extremely incomparable, but it did not seem to be a fighting type at all.

What the heck is going on?

Did Pandora resurrect within the slave?

So how about the little slave? Her body and soul are both so fragile; how can she accept Pandora’s godhead? Was she already annihilated?

“Wow, master is awake! This little slave was really worried, but now it’s all right!” As Yue Yang moved, the little slave who was lying on his chest seemed to wake up in response. She first rubbed her big eyes adorably and appeared to be a little lazy. But when she saw Yue Yang, her spirits were immediately lifted as she laughed and screamed with joy, patting her chest to express her fear. Yue Yang was relieved when he saw that this little girl had not changed a bit from who she was before, as she was still his own lovely little slave.

“What’s the matter with your forehead?” Yue Yang deliberately didn’t mention Pandora, only mentioning the divine sign on the center of the little slave’s eyebrows.

“Eh?”

The little slave ran over to look in the mirror and exclaimed in surprise, “I hurt my forehead? Ah, it doesn’t seem to be a scar. Oh, I can’t wipe it off!”

Yue Yang didn’t have the strength to explain.

That was the special mark of ‘God’, the unique mark of the Godhead and divinity. Ordinary people desired to have it, yet they couldn’t, of course! During the time when the slave was asleep, a wave of consciousness that seemed to steep into her soul was transmitted to Yue Yang’s mind. From there, he immediately understood that it was Pandora and she was not dead! She didn’t have her body and spirit, but at the very least she still had her spiritual sense stored in the body of the little slave.

What happened?

Yue Yang asked with his consciousness, but Pandora herself was not quite clear, “I don’t know. I thought I was dead, but after waking up, I found that I was integrated with the slave. Maybe this is what the ancient Gods meant by ‘Eternal Life’!”

With Pandora’s consciousness fluctuating, Yue Yang sweated slightly, “Does it matter if you merge with the little slave? Do you want a way to come out?”

Pandora was happy, “It’s okay. I’m afraid of loneliness, so being with the little slave is the best result. Besides, the Goddess of Doom no longer exists within this world— there is only Pandora who was a fool about love. When the little slave’s body adapts to the divine power, I will come out again to speak with you! When I wake up, if you don’t mind that I’m a fool, then teach me what love is!”

She fell into a deep sleep incredibly sweetly.

Yue Yang could feel that even as she fell asleep, her heart was filled with happiness.

Perhaps, for one hundred thousand years, this is what she has been pursuing endlessly but couldn’t afford. She had been lost and crazy; yet, she had also been sad and resentful. However, after understanding life and death, she finally got what she had always longed for— happiness that not even death could take away!

chapters.title: Chapter 850: The 5Th Level, Beast Valley
chapters.body:
Chapter 850: The 5Th Level, Beast Valley

Chapter 850: The 5th Level, Beast Valley

They passed the 4th Level of the Desire Valley.

Yue Yang took a short rest before he set foot into the 5th Level, Beast Valley.

Regarding the Beast Valley, Grandmother Sha had once described it as follows: any warrior must cultivate a primitive Battle-type Beast from a weak rank to a strong rank to break through the level while in the state of being unable to use their own power. Should the cultivated beast be weaker than the wanted requirements, the Level challenger will stay in the Beast Valley forever, becoming a part of it eternally.

In addition to being unable to use the challenger’s own power to cultivate the Battle-type Beasts, the Beast Valley also has a penalty based off of its Law of Death.

If the beast died more than three times.

The challenger would be punished by the Law and become a beast directly.

And if the challenger who turned into a Battle-type Beast dies, then the soul of the challenger will be annihilated forever.

“What?”

The information from Granny Sha, Fei Wen Li’s custom clearance-know-how, and even the information that Yue Yang had the old man Nan Gong investigate into, made him aware that the Battle-type Beast the Prison Emperor had cultivated in the valley was none other than the ‘Raging Flame War Spirit’. Having repeatedly discussed the pros and cons with everyone, Yue Yang, who had made all the preparations beforehand, came to the Beast Valley with the initial mindset that he would be able to pass through the Levels smoothly. Yet, upon his arrival, things didn’t go to plan all that well.

The reason was that the Spirit of Fire and Smoke that Yue Yang intended using to break through the Level had fallen into a deep sleep unexpectedly after she absorbed the tremendous amounts of the Divine Power of Calamity and the mixture of energies.

She evolved automatically without Yue Yang knowing.

So it was impossible for her to wake up for the time being.

Fortunately, Xue Wu Xia was careful enough and had especially reminded Yue Yang to have a backup plan, which was using the Reaper Mantis, who was cultivating extremely slowly on the Heaven Stairway as a backup for unforeseen circumstances.

If not, then Yue Yang would have to accept a random Battle-type Beast egg of an unknown potential just like most of the other unprepared passers-by.

In that case, everything would be out of his control.

“Now, I’ll need to rely on you to work hard!” Yue Yang stood at the Beast Valley Fortress, reaching out and stroking the wings of the Reaper Mantis. There were two options for cultivating Battle-type Beasts in Beast Valley. One was to use your own beasts directly like Empress Fei Wen Li and let the beasts enter the ‘Gates of Reincarnation’, which allowed you to go back in time and turn it back into a beast of its initial stage. The advantage of this was that they were familiar with the growth characteristics of their own Battle-type Beasts and can be trained correctly. Fei Wen Li used this method to cultivate an extremely cold ice monster, sweeping through the Beast Valley before she was finally able to successfully break through the Level. Another way was to choose a Battle-type Beast egg in the Beast Valley at random, like the Prison Emperor. One would let the Battle-type Beast egg hatch in the ‘Birth Pool’, and then cultivate the beast in accordance with their aptitude. If luck was on your side, you would be able to nurture a beast like the Prison Emperor’s ‘Raging Flame War Spirit’ and successfully clear the Beast Valley.

Both methods have their own advantages and disadvantages.

The method chosen by Empress Fei Wen Li had the advantage of knowing her own beasts rather than relying on luck.

Although the method chosen by the Prison Emperor had luck as a determining factor, it was still more likely to find a beast with good potential among the countless beast eggs in the Fortress of the Beast Valley. Moreover, the choice of the Prison Emperor was successful, and had directly added a powerful beast to provide him assistance.

On the contrary, the method of Empress Fei Wen Li must take a powerful beast that has even reached its peak, and let it start all over while taking risks again.

“Kacha, kacha…”

The Reaper Mantis took the Dragon Crystal thrown by Yue Yang, chewing deliciously for the last time.

She had no objections to any arrangements made by her master. Although she was not the smartest and also not the one who could evolve the fastest, as it has not even evolved to the Holy Beast state, she could instinctively understand that her master not only never ignored her, but even gave her an extra amount of doting.

With the twin sickles that killed countless enemies, she gently hugged Yue Yang.

The Reaper Mantis flew resolutely into the Gates of Reincarnation.

A burst of Divine Light flashed.

The power of the Law that worked in the Beast Valley immediately activated the Gates of Reincarnation, turning back time and allowing the beast that entered to undergo the process of ‘rebirth’. The body of the Reaper Mantis shrank rapidly, and the powerful energy contained inside her was completely transformed into potential. After her body was refined with Yue Yang’s Innate True Qi and the Nirvana Flame numerous times, it also used the Law of Reincarnation to be reborn in a new form. When the Reaper Mantis passed through the Gates of Reincarnation again, she flew through the U-shaped passages, turned around the corridor and returned to Yue Yang.

She had become almost the same as the size of a finger.

Moreover, she had become a special species from her original Battle-type Beast form.

Her grade had also changed from the original Gold Rank into a Diamond Rank.

The ‘her’ now, is as small as ‘Thumbelina’. After being reborn, the Reaper Mantis broke through the long-lasted stalemate and some parts of her body have evolved as well.

Falling in Yue Yang’s palm, her entire small and exquisite form had evolved a human head and had also possessed higher wisdom.

Her body hadn’t evolved completely, so she didn’t really look like a human being yet. In addition to arms that looked slightly similar to humans, she also kept a few thin legs of a praying mantis, and the golden wings on the back were still there. However, what made Yue Yang oddly moved was that she actually split the pair of her most powerful sickle arms, as if to turn the sickles of her arms that were capable of slaughtering into a weapon. She separated the sickle arms from those that remained mostly in their original forms and placed them on her back, just like a human warrior carrying two large sickles on his back.

Rip!

Yue Yang tore a piece of clothing on his body and gently wrapped it around hers, which was meant to act as her clothes.

The Reaper Mantis, which was the size of Thumbelina, turned around.

There was a look on her face that expressed her satisfaction with her new body. Finally evolving into a Holy Beast, she was naturally extremely excited— this was the greatest desire in the hearts of all battle-type Beasts, after all!

Outside the fortress.

There were dozens of fierce-looking monsters lurking around the door, and their eyes portrayed bloodthirsty gazes.

They raised their guard while patiently waiting. According to the energy fluctuations of the fortress, they already knew that a new challenger had arrived. It didn’t matter to them whether or not the new challenger was strong, their goal was just to kill the fragile, newborn beast three times in a row. Then, the new challenger would be punished by the Law and become one of their kind.

They know that they have failed and their bodies have become beasts, so they were destined to never leave this damned Beast Valley.

However, they don’t want newcomers to pass under their noses.

No matter who it is, drag them into the water[1].

T/L Note: [1] A saying to pull someone into trouble with you whether or not they were involved in your matters.

Let the newcomer become a beast, stay in Beast Valley forever and become their own companion! For unfortunate matters, they couldn’t just suffer alone; there must be more people who would fall into this pit of despair, descending eternally!

Except for these failed challengers who turned into beasts themselves lurking outside the fortress and eyeing each other, there were also three Heaven Ranked warriors riding powerful beasts side by side as they discussed battle plans. These were the failures who broke through the level, but unlike the others who were reduced to beasts, they were lucky as their beasts have not died more than three times. As the masters, they need not be punished by the Law and could still maintain their original appearances. However, due to various reasons, their beasts were cultivated incorrectly, and the abilities that the beasts owned after they grew up had shortcomings. For example, they were severely lacking in wisdom, which made them unable to successfully pass the Level, and in turn, weren’t able to leave the Beast Valley.

Without a Battle-type Beast with sufficient intelligence, no matter how strong it became, it was impossible to pass the beast valley.

Yue Yang had known this secret a long time ago.

In addition to Grandmother Sha’s vague information, Fei Wen Li clearly pointed out the location. In the Beast Valley, there were three ‘Fruits of Wisdom’ that could provide the intelligence growth of the beasts. As long as they were obtained, the beasts would not only clear the customs, but also grow into a great help for its master.

Of course, there were super powerful Battle-type Beasts that acted as guardians for the Fruit of Wisdom, which made things extremely difficult. If one rushed over in the beginning, that was basically asking to die!

Many challengers who have remained in the Beast Valley for a long time also knew that there was the existence of the Fruit of Wisdom treasures. However, they did not dare to attempt moving forward as that was simply an impossible challenge— there was only one result to come from that adventure, and that would be the beast being killed in a flash as its main body becomes reduced to a Demonic Beast. Sometimes, the beast couldn’t even become a Demonic Beast as its soul would be annihilated.

“This newcomer hasn’t come out for so long, the time is almost up!” The Heaven Ranked warrior said strangely as he rode a deer-shaped beast on the left side of the row.

“Newcomers are usually like this. They would be cautious and weren’t aware that there was a time limit, hence, missing the opportunity to leave the fortress. Weren’t there a large number of newcomers throughout the years who directly let their beasts die once in order to leave the fortress?” The Heaven Ranker on the right side of the row remained perched on a winged unicorn beast and hummed disdainfully.

“Everyone, be serious, I hope that there will be no more mistakes this time. Before this newcomer, several people have already broken out of our encirclement, where even three challengers amongst them have successfully cleared the level and it was literally a shameful slap for all of us who remained here. At any rate, we mustn’t fail again this time! Once the newcomer comes out of the fortress, the beast will be at its most vulnerable stage. If it is not possible for us to intercept them successfully now, it will be more difficult in the future! So let’s be serious— we must kill the beast of this newcomer!” The Heaven Ranked warrior riding the Fire Griffin in the middle should be the leader of the trio. He let out an exclamation with a bit of anger, making the other Heaven Ranked warriors on both sides bow their heads quickly.

Inside the Beast Valley Fortress, there was a Three-hour Protection Law.

In other words, there was at least three hours that acted as the safe growth period of the newborn Battle-type Beast.

If you didn’t leave or walk out of the door to enter the real Beast Valley, the Laws of the Beast Valley would directly kill the beast in the fortress.

This was a form of protection, as it was also a form of pressure. Newborn Battle-type Beasts must adapt to the harsh environment around them as quickly as possible and face many death threats that follow. Otherwise, they will be eliminated. It was the same for any newcomer— no matter who it was, no matter what status the owner had, no matter how powerful the owner was, the rules remained the same.

Three hours were about to pass. As the last minute had entered the countdown, the beasts lurking outside the door were ready to jump out and cheer.

A shadow appeared.

Student Yue Yang, whose actions remained unknown to every other being in the room, finally walked out.

The difference between him and other newcomers was that there are no newly born cubs following him…except for a small box in his hand. Otherwise, there was nothing else.

Could it be that the newborn beast was stored in this box?

Even if it was a mountain, the lurking beasts would do anything to trample it, let alone a box. They couldn’t attack Yue Yang. However, if the box in Yue Yang’s hand contains a newborn Battle-type Beast, it will most definitely die once they attack!

All just to swallow the newborn Battle-type Beast, to make themselves stronger and live a bit longer.

Dozens of monsters that became Demonic Beasts after failing to pass the level roared like thunder and rushed forward. Their goal was the box in Yue Yang’s hands!

chapters.title: Chapter 851: Calamity, Pandora’S Box
chapters.body:
Chapter 851: Calamity, Pandora’S Box

Chapter 851: Calamity, Pandora’s Box

The two cheetah-shaped beasts were the fastest as they pounced like lightning.

Their sharp claws grabbed the small box held in Yue Yang’s hands. However, dozens of meters away, there was another beast with a green coat of greasy skin that was similar to a chameleon as it slipped his tongue out.

The blood-red tongue elongated extremely fast.

At the moment when the two cheetah Demonic Beasts competed for the box, its long and sticky tongue hit the box, sticking it onto the target.

Ten times faster than its speed when it flew out, the tongue retracted.

The chameleon beast, without waiting for any of its comrades to react, immediately bit the box in its mouth into pieces and chewed it triumphantly. It could even speak while doing so, “Hehehe, it’s still this lady who has a faster speed. I have already won the first kill of the newcomer; you guys can fight for the second and third kills!”

The dozens of monsters in the surrounding area wore different expressions— some were angry, some appeared disgusted, whereas others had cold expressions and some looked disdainful.

The two cheetahs who rushed the fastest were furious, “Pi Yi, you long-tongued woman!”

The female chameleon beast gulped the fragments of the box into her stomach, and used her slender claws to pick her teeth. Among the densely packed teeth, she picked out a small piece of box fragments and spit it out. She sighed inadequately, “This kid’s newborn beast is really too weak as there is almost no feeling of energy. I’ve absorbed all of it, but it only increased my potential, so you two don’t need to be too envious! At most, this lady will reluctantly accompany you to play for a few days. If you are willing to cooperate, we can go over there and talk about it now. One against two is no problem at all!”

“Scram, who would ever like someone like you, greasy reptile!” The two cheetahs were even more infuriated when they heard it, as if they were about to vomit out of disgust.

“This old lady[1] doesn’t admire your rotten hair yet, so go ahead and play with the eggs!” The female chameleon sneered, and then spit out a lump of green sputum on the ground.

T/L Note: [1] When one refers to themselves like that (an old lady/man), it implies that they should be respected. Because in most Asian cultures, they respect seniors a lot. Saying that she’s a senior means she demands the other two to respect her as she’s in a ‘higher hierarchy’.

Just as the argument was still going on, the monsters on the sidelines could see something was amiss.

This kid’s newborn beast was killed, so why was he still smiling?

Is he stupid?

At this time, Yue Yang did have a smile on his face, and his smile showed off his red lips and white teeth. His expression was sunny, which made those who looked at him felt like there was a spring breeze.

He slowly retracted his right hand that was holding the box, and took another box out of his pocket. The appearance of this box was exactly the same as the box that was swallowed by the female chameleon beast just now, except for the fact that it has a different texture. The box just now was made of bronze and this one was silver.

Why does this kid still have the box?

If it was not in the box just now, then, the newborn beast should be stored in this one?

The female chameleon wanted to spit out her tongue to fight again, but this time, the left one of the two cheetahs grabbed her tongue.

The cheetah on the right wanted to grab the silver box in Yue Yang’s hand anxiously. Because of the limitations of the Laws in the Beast Valley, Yue Yang could not take action to protect the newborn beast, but likewise, no creature could harm him. No matter who wanted to compete for the newborn beast, they cannot threaten the owner and must aim at the target. Otherwise, they would only waste time. At the moment when the cheetah’s paws on the right caught the silver box, a giant bear hit it directly from behind.

When the giant bear opened its mouth to bite into the silver box, a thick, elephant trunk flew over, causing the giant bear to stagger back.

A flying eagle descended from the sky.

But before catching the box, there was a rhinoceros with sharp horns. Before the eagle claws could catch it, it cleverly picked up the silver box in Yue Yang’s hands. At some point in the ground, an ugly marsh crocodile appeared and proceeded to grab the fallen box as it opened its hugely muddy mouth.

A shadow flashed by sharply.

A long-armed ape grabbed the elephant’s trunk and swayed over, jumping swiftly. Then, it grabbed the rhino’s small tail, leaped up with strength and avoided the beak of the flying eagle.

In mid-air, it turned over and sneered, tapping on the rhinoceros’s head and neck while ignoring the angry mob chasing behind the rhino. It passed directly through the crocodile’s huge mouth, grabbing the crocodile’s fangs with one hand, swinging its body while stretching out its arm to catch the silver box that fell from the sky. Before all the beasts could react, it opened the box quickly, took out the contents of the silver box with one hand, stuffed it into its mouth, and swallowed it into its stomach without chewing.

“Hahahahaha, when it comes to agility, my evolved ape race is more agile,” The ape laughed triumphantly. In a flash, it calmly escaped the elephant’s angry trampling.

“It’s you again, Samson. I really doubt that when you were training your beast, you knew that it was impossible to pass the level successfully. Hence, you deliberately cultivated the newborn beast into a monkey!”

“Everyone kill this damned monkey!”

“The monkey skin is itchy[2], right?”

T/L Note: [2] When one says, ‘your skin is itchy’, it means you’re looking for trouble, itching to cause problems.

“This smelly monkey is as annoying as Pi Yi’s shameless ass!”

Because the second robbery had also failed, many beasts were angry and cursed loudly.

Although they have become beasts, they weren’t like that before. Every single beast here was originally a powerful and intelligent Heaven Ranked warrior.

Even if it weren’t for this, they wouldn’t be able to pass the 5th Level of the Beast Valley either. In Beast Valley, many of the desolate ‘residents’ who became beasts were actually once friends with one another, some even relatives from the same family. But in order to survive and become stronger, they had to use every means they had to attack the newcomer and swallow the newborn beast. They would also often fight each other, swallowing the opponent’s magic core and absorbing the opponent’s energy.

Of course, because the battle between the Demonic Beasts was usually between the snipe and the clam, the fisherman gained profit from it[3].

T/L Note:[3] This means while two sides are fighting, a third-party would gain the benefits

If there was no absolute certainty, those who cherish their lives will not easily break out into battle, especially a battle of life and death. After all, there was no chance of a second attempt in life for anyone who was dead!

“Good skills!”

Student Yue Yang clapped his hands and praised repeatedly.

It wasn’t until he spoke that the beasts realized this kid was different from the others as he was all smiles even when his silver box containing the newborn beast was robbed and killed twice in a row.

The elephant asked, “Good brat, you’re really crazy. With only the strength of a 3rd Level Heaven Rank, yet you can be so arrogant and proud. Wh- what exactly is your purpose in being here?”

Student Yue Yang conjured a bottle of soy sauce casually and said with a smile, “Would you believe it if I said I was passing by with soy sauce[4]?”

T/L Note: [4] This term soy sauce means, ‘this has nothing to do with me, but I’m just here as a passerby’

“Do you take me for a fool?” The rhino roared angrily.

“It’s up to you if you believe it or not, I believe it anyways,” Student Yue Yang shook his head repetitively, acting as arrogant as a certain official from the Heaven Dynasty.

“My stomach feels a bit odd, it seems like what I swallowed just now was not a newborn beast,” The ape found that there was no energy absorption in its belly and lowered his heart rate. It squeezed its throat with its paw, and barfed out a pool of acidic reflux. It took a closer look and found that there was not the trace of a newborn beast corpse in the pool of acidic water that was spat out, leaving only a black stone in the lump of liquid. This kind of stone could be picked up on the side of the road, anytime and anywhere.

“What a surprise, forget a treasure, it just turned out to be a mere stone!” The alpha cheetah laughed when he saw the sight.

“Congratulations, Samson, you were played once again,” The second cheetah gloated. The other monsters also secretly praised their luck in their hearts, let alone the cheetah brothers. They were a mere sliver away from being the ones who would have been fooled by the newcomer;s unlucky tricks.

“Brat, hand over the newborn beast,” The ape stared at Yue Yang angrily.

“I’m an obedient person,” Student Yue Yang took out an identical box in his pocket again. But this one had a slight difference— it was a golden box.

Now, even if there were dozens of monsters surrounding Yue Yang, no one attempted a robbery as even fools would be aware that there was something wrong. This kid first took out a copper box, then a silver box, and finally a gold box… Why did he take out the box so calmly and generously? There must be a problem! No matter who it was, no one dared to immediately rob him. If they were teased again by this infuriating brat who laughed like a Demonic Beast, it would be a big loss for their pride.

The numerous beasts looked at each other.

Finally, the elephant asked, “Brat, what do you mean by holding this box?”

Student Yue Yang listened.

And he laughed.

He smiled cordially, just like the leaders of the Heaven Dynasty as they consolored the poor peasants, but that same smile frightened the surrounding beasts. Their hearts hung in the air, and they couldn’t help but quietly move back by a small step. In case something goes wrong, they would have the chance to immediately run away.

Although newcomers were easy to bully, there were exceptions.

Some newcomers were very odd. The beasts couldn’t hurt them, but it was rather easy for the beasts to be hurt instead. Was this brat the same as those kinds of people then?

Student Yue Yang stretched out his hand as he patted the elephant’s thigh in a very friendly manner, making the elephant tremble all over in shock. Like a meeting between old friends, Yue Yang enthusiastically introduced the golden box in his hand, “In fact, this box is nothing remarkable, but it’s called Pandora’s Box.”

“Pandora’s Box?”

They knew instinctively that just by the name, it was something they shouldn’t provoke.

But it did not make sense if they thought about it. The Law of Beast Valley was, not only was the masters unable to use their abilities, but their treasures couldn’t be used either.

Student Yue Yang seemed to see everyone’s confusion before he nodded and explained, “You guys misunderstood, this Pandora’s Box is not my natural ability, nor is it a treasure. Instead, it is a kind of Divine Compensation. It would take three days and three nights to finish explaining the story, so I’ll just pick out the important parts. Let me tell you, there was a Goddess of Doom called Pandora who had killed many Gods. After she was awakened, her divinity naturally conjured a type of compensation, and that was to give those living beings who were in danger of losing their lives a ‘hope’ of sorts.”

The beasts became dizzy after listening to his talk and couldn’t understand what Yue Yang had just said.

Yue Yang nodded in understanding, “It’s not surprising that you guys don’t understand. With your wisdom, it would be really difficult to explain things clearly! However, it doesn’t matter whether you can understand those; what you just need to know is that this box carries bad luck. There is a mixture of Chaotic Power in it as it was the last form of hope she left behind before she passed, which could greatly increase the power of the one who opened the box with their own hands. The method of increase was not necessarily set— some may be to increase the potential, some may be to increase the level, and some may be to improve combat power. Honestly, anything can happen!”

After listening to his words, the beasts collectively felt that it was great news.

The ape who opened the silver box and the female chameleon beast who opened the copper box were now secretly proud and happy.

The Cheetah brothers asked a question, “What is the difference between the three gold, silver and copper boxes then?”

Student Yue Yang praised them, “This question is a good question! In fact, these three types of boxes are very different. The power of chaos is stored in the three types of gold, silver and copper boxes. Each storage of power is different, with the most power stored in gold boxes and the least in copper boxes, whereas the silver box had a moderate amount between the two. Of course, in addition to the Chaos Power that gave people hope, it also brought upon the Divine Power of Calamity. After all, this was something that the Goddess of Doom created subconsciously; it would be impossible for there to be no trace of Divine Power of Calamity!”

If Yue Yang hadn’t said the last sentence, everyone would have been cheering.

But when he said so, everyone was stunned.

The ape ‘Samson’ trembled frightfully, like an injured patient thrown into a pool of ice [5] as it stuttered, “Divine- Divine Power of Calamity?”

T/L Note: [5] It means someone is already in a terrible situation, and they’re even more helpless when they get involved in a worse situation where they feel useless.

Yue Yang patted its shoulder lightly and comforted it,”Don’t worry, although Pandora’s Box contains the Divine Power of Calamity, it is all but a problem of probability. The chances of the silver box triggering the Calamity is only 9,999 times stronger; there is still a one in a thousandth chance that you can get the good Chaotic Power of hope. If you had gotten the gold box, the chances of triggering it would have been 99,999 times stronger— those chances would most definitely be a lot stronger than that of your silver box!”

chapters.title: Chapter 852 Actually, I Can Be More Of A Drag
chapters.body:
Chapter 852 Actually, I Can Be More Of A Drag

As soon as Yue Yang finished speaking, the Chameleon Pi Yi who was in the audience, moved back by three large strides in fear.

She didn't know what were the chances of her bronze box obtaining the Divine Power of Calamity, but the percentages were definitely not small as it was most likely 999 times! However, no matter if it was the gold, silver or bronze box they opened, it would most definitely be a dead end for them!

Even with the chances being only 999 times stronger, how could anyone be spared?

The Chameleon Pi Yi noticed that her body gradually started to change. Her green skin, which was always moistened and greasy, had dried up at some point.

And now, it was none other than a hue of grayish-white.

Her scales itched, as if they were dried in the hot desert.

What kind of curse was this? One should know that her moistened and slippery green skin was the evolutionary direction she chose when she was cultivating Battle-type Beasts. It was the most important disguise for her— it could change color, stick to the enemy, and could also be used to fight; it was the most important, life-saving trait that would never dry out, so how could this be?

She couldn't help but scratch, sending countless thin scales floating in the sky as an aftereffect of the motion.

The crowd of beasts panicked and jumped away.

Straying away from the chameleon Piyi and the ape Samson, for fear of them being infectious.

s

"She's dehydrated!"

The elephant made an authoritative judgment, "Pi Yi has been hit by the Calamity, and it has a curse on her body that keeps dehydrating her body. If this goes on, it will not take ten minutes before she becomes a corpse!"

The chameleon screamed, "No, no I won't! I won't become a corpse. I am a chameleon with dual attributes of water and poison. Even if it is a curse, I won't let myself become a corpse! My stunts and abilities, except for Discoloration Camouflage and Long-tongued Hunt, I can still use the Secretion of Venom and Escaping Peeling! Even if it is a curse, only a few layers of skin will be removed at most, but I will not become a corpse!"

With her own strength at the 4th Level of the Heaven Rank, coupled with such special abilities, no one would have thought that she would die, at least it would not by dehydration.

But seeing is believing.

Layer by layer, her scales peeled off and her skin was torn.

Not only was her body getting drier, Pi Yi's strength was also plummeting. When more or less ten layers of her skin started to fall off, she had already fallen below the strength of her Heaven Rank and turned into a weakly-tiered beast.

After another three minutes, the female chameleon beast Pi Yi couldn't even keep the strength of a weak tier, plummeting directly below the level of the weak.

Even if she does not die, she has no chance of living anymore.

She lacked the strength of even being at the bare minimum level. Any beast could blow a breath of an attack, and she would be gone in seconds. Pi Yi fell onto the ground, reaching out to the other beasts as she stretched her hand, dying. Her dry mouth made her cries silent as she was unable to make a sound. The Cheetah brothers trembled with fright whereas the elephant was slightly more compassionate. He sprayed a burst of rain with his long trunk nose, and stepped on the puddle he formed on the ground to let Pi Yi soak in, hoping that her pain could be lessened before she died.

However, all the beasts watched dumbfoundedly, and the chameleon Pi Yi who was immersed in the water died out of dehydration, just under the watchful eyes of the crowd.

Her body quickly dried up and shrank.

Finally, it floated on the water like a piece of dry wood.

It turned out that the chameleon Pi Yi, who had a height of 3 meters and a tail that was 6 meters long, shrank into a pitch-black corpse that became less than half a meter.

Witnessing such a horrible situation unfold before the other beasts' eyes started to numb their scalps, but it was not them who were the most terrified. The ape Samson who grabbed the silver box with its agility, had almost collapsed to the ground.

"Help me, help me, help me!" The monkey stretched out its hand to its former friend.

But its friends wanted nothing more than to stay away from him.

Seeing Samson the ape, they were absolutely terrified, so how could they reach out to rescue him! Moreover, even if they were willing to help it, they didn't know where to start. If the chameleon Pi Yi who was immersed in a pool of water died out of dehydration, skin tearing apart layer by layer, what else could be done to save the same, hapless Samson? Among them, Samson had a better baboon friend who said while trembling, "Samson, if you can't help it, I can end it for you, but that is all I can do. I'm sorry, I can't do anything. I- I really don't have any other way!"

The elephant saw that the skin of the ape Samson was not dry and was definitely not dehydrated. It quickly offered comfort, "Samson, maybe you are not cursed."

Yue Yang nodded and agreed, "It does take a certain chance to trigger the Divine Power of Calamity. If you are lucky, you might also gain the Power of Chaos, that's for sure!"

Samson was like a drowning man who found a life-saving straw and held onto it tightly. It asked in surprise, "I don't have the curse of the Divine Power of Calamity. My body is not dehydrated, so I won't die, right? "

Yue Yang shook his head, "Maybe, but I think it's more necessary to wait patiently. You know, the later the curse of the Divine Power of Calamity takes effect, the greater the power, even though I am not sure how the results would turn out. In addition, I am sure that there is more than one type of curse. There are countless of them, and dehydration is only one type."

"What? Waaaa…"

The ape Samson suddenly vomited, and a large amount of clear water spouted from its throat.

Its belly quickly swelled up, and its entire being looked like it had fallen into the sea and was submerged for two hours before being picked back up. In less than a minute, even its hands and feet were swollen.

Samson was pinching its neck, eyes protruding, and it was similar to a suffocation of pain.

But all the beasts onlookers could see that there was not a drop of water around, including the spit out of Samson's mouth— all the water had been evaporated with fire by the baboon. Even so, having no water around does not mean that Samson's life could be saved. Under the gaze of all eyes, Samson struggled painfully, and finally suffocated to death slowly. In extreme pain, its claws ripped off its face, and a terrifyingly bloody hole was dug in its throat. What made the situation even more horrifying was that the liquid flowing out of the hole was not blood. Instead, it was a pool of clear water from an unknown source.

The baboon closed its eyes helplessly. It was a friend of Samson the ape, but it could only watch him die and couldn't help at all.

Both the elephant and rhino were also shaking their heads and sighing.

No one could save them from the curse of the Divine Power of Calamity!

With the powerful strength of the ape Samson, who was at the peak of the 4th Level Heaven Rank, even if it was thrown into the ocean floor and immersed for two or three months, they believed that it would not drown. But right in front of them, in less than ten minutes, it had already drowned. It was to the point where even its body was swollen.

What was the curse?

Drowning!

Its method of death was the complete opposite of the chameleon’s Pi Yi. One died of dehydration and the other died of drowning. "Please take a look. Here, there is a golden box. I don’t know which friend would like to open it and take a look. Actually, the newborn beast is placed in this golden box. There are both the newborn beast as an appetizer and the Power of Chaos for your main course. What are you all waiting for? Come on, boss [1] , would you like to take a look? The odds are very high, and it’s much better than the kind of foolish stuff like **, but this is a 100% win. If you win, you'll get the prize; but if you fail, there will be a consolation prize of Calamity!" Yue Yang was holding the golden box and swayed it flamboyantly in front of the other beasts. They were frightened abruptly before they yelled and fled one by one.

T/L Note: [1] In Chinese culture, people would sometimes use the term ‘boss' to address customers because it kind of persuades them and reel them in. It's also nice to hear yourself being called that (I mean, how often is someone an actual boss?)

Fleeing as far as they could go.

No one wanted to take another look at this weird newcomer.

It would be life-threatening to stay with this kid for another second.

Yue Yang waited for the beasts lying in ambush at the entrance of the fortress to escape before he shook his head boredly and opened the golden box casually.

Sure enough, there was a Reaper Mantis the size of Thumbelina quietly staying inside. She began to have cute eyes of wisdom and blinked at her master.

"This is the first lesson I teach you: there is no problem that cannot be solved with your mind. No matter how difficult your problem seems, there are ways to solve it, it just depends on how you use your strengths. When facing difficulties, you must learn to think and use your wisdom to solve the enemy. Even if you have more power than the enemy, you should do the same, because using wisdom to solve problems is much better than using brute force as you get twice the reward with half the effort!" Yue Yang smiled and used this process to teach the Reaper Mantis who was just reborn.

"Mhmm!" The Reaper Mantis nodded excitedly.

"Strategy is an important manifestation of wisdom. If I don't use two real boxes to deceive them to scare a bunch of useless idiots, how can I trick them with a fake golden box? So, you have to learn to use them. Also, make sure to keep calm at all times. Don't panic just because you're in an unfavorable situation, because that is the worst reaction," Yue Yang walked while teaching the Reaper Mantis who was still in the golden box.

Before he knew it, he had walked more than a kilometer away.

Yue Yang didn't stop until he almost hit the invisible Deer-riding Heaven Ranked warrior.

Seeing the fierce and vicious Heaven Ranker in front of him, Yue Yang was the first to react. He closed the golden box, covering up the Reaper Mantis and quietly wanted to put it into his pocket.

The Heaven Ranked warrior riding the Deer-shaped Battle-type Beast laughed and pointed at Yue Yang with his halberd, "You don’t need to put it away, I saw it. I'll say, boy, you killed two beasts as soon as you left the door, and you still have the guts to educate your beast with that opportunity? Did you seriously think that all the humans were dead in the entire Beast Valley? Who would have thought that with an age as young as yours, you are such a drag [2] ! Now what kind of shitty wisdom would you like to conspire? Let me see it then, how are you going to ‘keep calm'?"

T/L Note: [2] this term is something like calling someone ‘arrogant and not knowing their place, perhaps too proud for their own good'.

Yue Yang turned around and wanted to run.

But it was too late.

The halberd of the Heaven Ranked warrior who rode the Deer-shaped Battle-type Beast flashed extremely fast, and a terrifying cone-shaped shockwave emitted from the halberd.

In an instant, the gold box in Yue Yang's hand disintegrated into powder.

If his body wasn’t being protected by the law, he might have let the opponent kill him in seconds.

"…" After only a second, the golden box containing the Reaper Mantis disappeared without a trace. Yue Yang looked at his empty right hand for a long time and couldn't say a word.

"Hahahahaha, kid, show me again! What kind of attitude of ‘keeping calm' did you use to educate your garbage beasts! In the Beast Valley, there will always be only the weak and the strong; the capable ones are the ones who are absolute, whereas the weak can just discuss wisdom that is even worse than shit. Pui! Your brain is still stunned and you haven't got a grip, right? I don't know how many weak people I've seen that were like you, who proclaim themselves about their so-called intelligence. Amongst all of them, there was no exception to either becoming a beast themselves or having their souls eliminated. Come on then, you drag! Be a little bit more ‘draggy' with me then!" The Heaven Ranked warrior who was riding the Deer-shaped Beast sneered at what Yue Yang said to theReaper Mantis just now.

"Actually, I can be a bit more of a drag. Do you really want to see it?" Yue Yang, who had lowered his head, suddenly raised it as he showed a sunny smile.

He took out a gold box from his pocket.

Gently opening.

The Reaper Mantis with the size of Thumbelina was smiling and staying inside.

Yue Yang ignored the dumbfounded opponent and continued to educate the Reaper Mantis, "The second lesson I want you to understand is a concept, that is to never solely trust your eyes. The eyes are easily deceived by phantoms, so they will deceive you! You must learn to sense with your heart, because your heart is not as easily deceived! Also, in the future, you have to pay attention to a problem. Never underestimate the enemy. No matter the environment, no matter how much of an advantage you had in that situation, you must maintain your original fighting mentality. Being proud and complacent would only be the starting point of your failure."

The Reaper Mantis listened very carefully and nodded obediently, "Mhmm!"

s

The Heaven Ranker who rode the Fire Griffin suddenly appeared behind Yue Yang and sighed, "What a terrible newcomer… For many years, I haven't seen such a newcomer, how interesting. This lifeless Beast Valley could finally bear a little bit of fun!"

The Heaven Ranked warrior who appeared seated on the Winged Unicorn appeared to be accompanying his friends and his face was full of sweat.

If it wasn't my partner who was eager to obtain the credit and took the initiative to fight, I'm afraid the person who would have broken the golden box would have been me, right?

The consequences of smashing the golden box. He didn't dare to think about it anymore! Looking at the young man with a handsome smile on his face, he felt that this kid was ten thousand times more terrifying than the devil!

Going to war with this kid? No. Even if you have a hundred lives, it wouldn't be enough deaths for him to fight this kid!

chapters.title: Chapter 853 Once Is Enough To Make Stupid Mistakes
chapters.body:
Chapter 853 Once Is Enough To Make Stupid Mistakes

"Are the two of you here to kill my newborn beast?" Yue Yang closed the gold box again.

On the back of the Fire Griffon, the first Heaven Ranker laughed but did not answer.

The Heaven Ranked warrior riding a Winged Unicorn secretly swore in his heart. No matter what, even if it was under the command of his leader, he will never break the damned golden box. Even if it did contain a newborn beast, he wasn't going to take this risk. Just now, he saw with his own eyes that his companion Bai Lu made an unchangeable mistake even if he regretted it— it was an irrevocably grave mistake!

He looked at his companion, his eyes reflecting a gaze that was befitting when one sees a dead person.

In the sky, the Power of the Law was condensing.

This was a sign of the impending punishment after the challenger's failure. If remembered correctly, Bai Lu's beast, the ‘Giant-Antler Deer' had already died twice. If it dies again this time, then Bai Lu himself will become a beast!

"Boss, help me!" Bai Lu yelled in a panic and asked for help from the Heaven Ranker who was his leader.

"You can no longer be saved," The leader rode away with the Fire Griffin ruthlessly, and before he soared into the sky, he turned his head and delivered a sentence to Yue Yang, "I like interesting newcomers, but this is just the beginning. I look forward to your more exciting performances. By the way, I forgot to tell you that before your arrival, you had more than a dozen companions who came to the Beast Valley. In fact, three have already left, and the rest are still looking for the possibility of clearing the Level. Perhaps they will be happy to see you, too. Do you need me to bring them the news of your arrival?"

"Is that so? Thank you for your kindness, but I think it's better for me to go by myself and give them a surprise," Yue Yang understood what this guy meant. He tried using a confident tone to test if Yue Yang knew the people that were ahead.

"Although they are not very friendly to me as they remain very wary and refuse to make new friends, please let them know that I am very sincere and friendly. I am at least the friendliest of the Three Chiefs of the remaining residents in the Beast Valley, haha!" The self-proclaimed friendly leader that rode on the Fire Griffin soared into the sky, completely ignoring Bai Lu's call for help.

s

"Ryoma, for the sake of our friendship, help me…" Bai Lu asked for help from the Heaven Ranker who rode on the Winged Unicorn.

"I'm sorry, I can't do anything," He said,backing a hundred meters away.

Bai Lu, who usually had a very arrogant attitude, was now shaking all over out of fear.

He didn't know when it started to happen, but a cloud of black mist filled his body. Because of the protection of the Law, the black mist could not cause any damage to Bai Lu's body, but the Heaven Ranked Giant-Antler Deer under Bai Lu wailed in pain. Surrounded by the black mist, its body swelled like a big balloon. Its bulging belly was rounder than an angry capybara ball, eyes and tongue forced to protrude out of its own body.

Bai Lu felt that things were bad, but he could no longer care about the beast. He was so scared to the point where he ‘swished’ and jumped into the air.

Boom!

At the same second.

Bai Lu's hard-trained Heaven Ranked Battle-type Beast, the Giant-Antler Deer's whole body exploded into pieces, spewing flesh and blood flew all around. The curse activated, and it took less than ten seconds for the beast to expand and explode.

What made Bai Lu even more terrified was that the Power of the Law that quietly gathered in the sky had now reacted immediately.

His body was no longer protected.

The punishment of the Law acted as scheduled, and there was no room for escape.

A flash of thunder blasted Bai Lu's head, scorching him directly as he fell to the ground.

"Help me!" Bai Lu stretched out his hand to his companion for the last time. However, he could clearly see his hand gradually transforming into a deer's hoof in the clump of black mist.

"No, no! Oh my God, this is terrible!" The Heaven Ranker who rode the Winged Unicorn became frightened and fled hundreds of meters away from his companion, lest he would also be contaminated by the contaginity of the black mist. After the beast died three times, the challenger would no longer be protected by the Law. This meant that they would directly transform into the beast he previously cultivated under the influence of the Law.

In front of Yue Yang, the arrogant Bai Lu writhed on the ground.

While his mouth wailed, his body slowly started to deform. Huge antlers grew on the top of his head whereas his hands and feet turned into four hooves. His head and body quickly transformed into the appearance of his original mount. Besides having the original memory of his mind, the current Bai Lu was no different from his previous mount, and that included the strengths that were exactly the same as the Deer Beast he cultivated.

If he still had his original strength, his leader would not have turned a blind eye.

Only after Bai Lu's failure ended up turning him into a beast did the leader no longer treat him as a person. The worst part was that this kind of occurrence was considered the norm. In the Beast Valley, it was very common for such things to happen!

"Protect me. If you protect me in my time of weakness, I will divide half of all the treasures I got. Half of the portions will be yours," Bai Lu struggled painfully. Facing this cruel reality, he had no choice but to accept the facts.

"I want your ‘Deer-Fetching Treasure Sabre'," Ryoma, the Winged Unicorn beast rider, was no longer polite with him as he dared to demand the treasure.

"T-that… Fine!" Bai Lu, who had become a Giant-Antler Deer, agreed in humiliation.

Unexpectedly.

Things have changed.

When Bai Lu conjured the Deer's Sabre from his storage ring, he threw it to the Heaven Ranker Ryoma who rode his own Winged Unicorn. However, the man retreated as soon as he took it. Bai Lu tried to pursue him just two steps behind, but he immediately realized that he was still very weak and it was impossible to keep up with Ryoma. For a moment, he was desperate, and his knees weakened before he fell to the ground, wanting to cry but unable to do so. It turned out that all it took was for the proud and aloft ‘him' to smash a golden box to be abandoned. Not only did the leader ruthlessly leave him, but even Ryoma, who usually feared him, had taken the opportunity to bite.

H-how am I supposed to put up with this?

A shadow draped over Bai Lu's eyes.

He looked up and found Yue Yang, who was still holding the golden box, looking down at him.

"A-are you going to kill me?" Bai Lu was surprised at first before he reacted. His opponent only possessed a mere newborn beast that had no ability to kill him. His thoughts flashed—if he could get the energy of the newborn beast, he would be able to quickly recover from his weak state. Although he couldn't change back into a human form anymore, he could become a beast that also possessed great strength.

Live on, I have to live on.

How can I make sure that I can survive though?

Maybe… Bai Lu's eyes rolled and he made up his mind. Getting up, he bowed his head to Yue Yang, "As long as you don't kill me, I am willing to be your mount!"

Yue Yang was thinking. He seemed to think that it was a pretty good idea to have a Giant-Antler Deer Beast as a mount.

Bai Lu was very afraid that he would refuse, so he showered him with praise. He flattered that student Yue Yang was the best master in the world, and it was a blessing to be able to serve him for three lives as a mount. He was willing to be a life-long mount to make up for his previous offenses. In short, all the flatteringly revolting words were spoken. As Bai Lu was talking, he didn't fail to secretly look at the golden box.

Student Yue Yang gently opened the golden box, letting the Thumbelina-like Reaper Mantis come out again to get some fresh air, "Getting a mount, huh? What do you think? Although this guy looks a bit disgusting, it doesn't matter if he's stuck in the Beast Valley. If we get him, we don’t have to bother to find a mount. Besides, you will also have a helper in your early stages of growth."

The Reaper Mantis nodded in agreement, "Mhmm."

The moment she nodded, Bai Lu seized the opportunity, bursting out with energy emanating from all over his body.

Although he had just been punished by the Law to turn into a beast and had yet to fully adapt to his new body, it was fair to say that eliminating a newborn beast with his own giant antlers was not a problem at all.

The giant antlers were like the power of a group of mammoths. Under the impact of the cone-shaped shockwave, even the fake, golden box that once contained the Reaper Mantis disintegrated into a pile of dust, let alone the Reaper Mantis herself. Yue Yang looked in front of him with a little bit of astonishment as a pit of more than 800 meters appeared.

On both sides of the pit, the trees were broken, overturning on both sides of the ditch.

The ground trembled in panic.

This was the power of a blow that broke out from Bai Lu's sneak attack.

"Hahahahaha! I'll say, kid, you really are a newcomer— you really don’t know anything about Beast Valley! Naive one, let me teach you a lesson: never trust the enemy and never reduce your cautiousness. In the Beast Valley, no one can be trusted. Did you really think that I, Bai Lu, will be made into a mount that bows down and obeys orders? Pui! I am the king of the prairie, the capable who dominates the strong; so how can I let a newcomer boss me around? You really are so, so naive!" Bailu laughed loudly, "In addition, I will let you in on one more truth for free. In the Beast Valley, when a beast kills the opponent, it will gain the energy of the opponent. So if you don’t kill your opponent, you will never be able to improve! I hope you, naive fool, can strive to live for a few more days.
