It's really unfortunate that your second kill, third kill and the final kill wouldn’t fall into my hands, but do take your time to find your Battle-type Beast that is now in another world. This is the Beast Valley, not Heaven, hahaha!"

"I think he made it clear enough, so I probably don't need to repeat it anymore?" Yue Yang took out a gold box again. As soon as he opened it, the Reaper Mantis came out from inside.

"Mmhm!" The Reaper Mantis nodded obediently.

Bai Lu's laughter was cut off like a knife's slash, and he looked at the golden box in Yue Yang's hand innocently.

He froze.

He couldn't think at all.

Hidden in the small woods a few kilometers away, Ryoma, the Winged Unicorn Heaven Ranked rider, was peeking with a held breath. When he saw this scene, he started to perspire in fear.

How many golden boxes were there on this kid? How did he switch them? No, those are not important… The important thing is that it wasn't me who did it. Fortunately, I didn't start a sneak attack and wasn't as desperate to steal the energy of the newborn beast. Otherwise, I would have been a goner.

"Ah, y-you lied to me? You knew I would launch a sneak attack, so you deliberately tricked me, right?" Bai Lu understood a little now.

"You are so smart!" Yue Yang stretched out his thumb and praised him vigorously.

"Y-You, I-I, I'm going to kill you!" Bai Lu was now fully aware that this kid had deliberately opened the golden box and tempted him to be fooled. As long as he dies, the fragile newborn beast will be considered his first win. By then, he would be able to obtain a growth in energy!

Bai Lu didn't know when he would die, but he knew that he didn't have much time.

The shadow of death struck his heart.

The crimson-eyed Bai Lu rushed towards Yue Yang and the giant antlers once again picked up the Reaper Mantis. Even if death was inevitable for him, he would at least have someone to massage his back!

The Reaper Mantis jumped out of the golden box and her small body faced Bai Lu who had attacked with all his strength. The Reaper Mantis spun like the wind, gently hitting Bai Lu's body. This kind of slight blow did no harm to the Bai Lu, who was in the form of a Heaven Ranked beast, but the Law of the Beast Valley determined that the two were fighting.

If one party dies, then the energy of that party will become the other party's spoils!

Bai Lu rushed over and was about to kill the Reaper Mantis with its huge horns.

Suddenly, he stopped.

His whole body contracted painfully and he curled into a ball.

Like the original Giant-Antler Deer, his belly bulged, and the energy of his entire body was automatically concentrated within his abdomen, no longer controlled by his own will.

"I'll tell you the truth. If the Divine Power of Calamity fails to curse the target, it will not disappear. It will only lie in search of opportunities. It can even remain dormant for a lifetime until there comes a chance to curse the target. Please don’t underestimate the Divine Power— it is the power of the Law governed by its Master’s will; it’s just that the Divine Power differs and the intensity would also be varied, so don’t think that the Divine Power will disappear that easily. Finally, I'll give you a piece of advice, along with the other people like you who prey on me like you're a predator: once is enough to make stupid mistakes. Do not repeat them over and over again while continuing to remain dense!" Yue Yang turned and left.

When he turned around, Bai Lu's body exploded with a bang.

Flesh and blood splattered everywhere.

A huge head had also exploded from it, and a white magic crystal was thrown into the sky amidst the bloodstains. The Reaper Mantis caught it in her small hand with a soft ‘huh' as she spread her wings and flew around the splashing blood, floating back into the golden box.

Although she was a newborn, under Yue Yang's plan, she succeeded in making her first kill.

Whether she killed it personally or not was not of importance at all— the most important thing was that it had been approved by the Law of the Beast Valley.

"How terrifying!" In the distance, the Heaven Ranker who rode on the Winged Unicorn was hidden in the small woods as he peeked at the sight, wiping a handful of cold sweat from his forehead with a trembling hand.

s

He had seen a lot of newcomers.

But he really hasn't seen anyone who was as genuinely terrifying as this kid!

The powerful and arrogant Bai Lu had simply been toyed to death by this kid. Even until his last breath, he was played by the hands of the other party.

This kid is just too scary! Forget it, I won't provoke this kind of guy; I'll just have him harm those guys behind the gates.

What will happen to those guys who are behind when they meet this scart kid? I guess if so, an entire wave of misfortune will probably spread throughout the whole valley, right? If this is the case, it might be a good thing for me to have such an odd newcomer arrive!

chapters.title: Chapter 854 There'S Wind And Rain So Collect Your Laundry
chapters.body:
Chapter 854 There'S Wind And Rain So Collect Your Laundry

The news of an amazing newcomer's arrival in the Beast Valley quickly spread to the ears of several big leaders.

Here, in addition to the challengers who failed to leave and had to stay in the Beast Valley, namely the ‘Residents’, the Beast Valley were mostly composed of the ‘Demonic Beasts' who have failed to break through the Level. Naturally, the Residents were stronger and still have a faint hope of leaving. Therefore, they claim to be residents, not failures. According to different ideas, these residents formed three major forces.

However, in the Beast Valley, there were more failures who have become Demonic Beasts.

In order to survive, they were forced to join five Beast Regiments that had relatively lax management but closely integrated internal interests.

At the prairie, East area of the Beast Valley.

This was the main management area of the ‘Lion King' group among the five. The elephant, rhino, baboon, plus the dead ape and the chameleon that were ambushed outside the Fortress, were all under the Lion King's group.

Because they had directly faced Yue Yang, the Lion King was the fastest to learn of the news.

The Lion King failed to break through the Level 20,000 years ago. After hopelessly admitting that he would no longer be able to leave the Beast Valley, he spent most of his time improving his strength in order to live longer. Now, he is a 7th Level Heaven Ranked ‘Diamond Lion'. Although his shapeshifting and skill controls were not the best among the leaders of the five Beast Regiments, and it was even more improbable to enlighten the Supreme Realm, his strength was undoubtedly the strongest. Apart from him, there was no one else who could reach the unprecedented 7th Level of the Heaven Rank among the pure beasts. Even if the remaining four Beast Regiment leaders were not as strong as the Lion King, they have also evolved certain human-like forms, such as hands and feet, or even the slightest bit of enlightenment in the Supreme Realm. However, there has never been a Beast Regiment leader who could reach the 7th Level of the Heaven Rank in the state of being a pure beast.

Because of his veteran qualifications and good strength, the Eastern prairie area occupied by the Lion King had always been a place secretly envied by the leaders of the other Beast Regiments.

This regiment had the largest number and the most diverse beasts that turned to the Lion King after failing to pass the Level.

s

The elephant, rhino and the ape that died were all a part of the diversity.

"Both Pi Yi and Samson died of curses? Are you sure that was not the ability of the newborn beast?" The Lion King was a little skeptical. In the Beast Valley, the challenger's body enhancements, skills and treasures would not be working. So how could it be possible for the newcomer to kill Pi Yi and Samson with a silver box and a copper box? Could this be the ability of that little newborn beast?

"It is indeed a bit suspicious," The Lion King's brainiac, ‘Long Hair’, who was an elderly mandrill, nodded his head.

"But how can the newborn beast have such a powerful force to kill Samson and Pi Yi?" A large crow questioned.

"Maybe the new born beast entered the Gates of Reincarnation and retained its original unique talents unchanged. It is worth noting that the newborn beast always stayed in the box and had never gotten out. Maybe, she just wanted to cast the curse inside of the box." A bobcat who didn't participate in the battle guessed.

"It is very suspicious!" the old mandrill Long Hair nodded in agreement.

"It was not like that at all…" the elephant said, "No matter what sort of powerful ability the newborn beast had, it had nothing to do with the deaths of Samson and Pi Yi."

"The newborn beast had only improved its wisdom, okay?!" Rhino felt that having a discussion with these guys was a waste of saliva.

"Then how do you explain the curse inside the box?" The bobcat asked rhetorically.

"Yes, treasures cannot be used in Beast Valley. They can only be used if the cultivated beasts evolve into Holy Beasts. Do you mean to tell me that the newborn beast became a Holy Beast right after it was born?" Another vulture flapped its wings before questioning the rhino.

"I don't know!" The rhino was speechless. If he knew the reason, he wouldn't have come back to have a pointless discussion. If so, wouldn't it be better to kill the newborn beast directly?

"I know that Samson and Pi Yi were scared to death by the other party, haha!" The four coyote brothers laughed together.

"You're farting [1] !" The baboon who was friends with Samson was furious.

T/L Note: [1] In Chinese, they use the term to express disbelief or blasphemy, something like ‘you're speaking nonsense'. Had to clarify this because of the next paragraph.

"Since you want to smell it, then I will fulfill your wish, puff!" A coyote turned his butt around and let out a loud fart at the baboon, causing the beasts to scatter. The baboon was even more furious, and it immediately rushed to beat up this vulgar guy. However, the opponent was four brothers. Even if the baboon's strength was even better, it couldn't win against these opponents who originally already had thick skin and strong vitality.

"Maybe it has something to do with the Divine Power of Calamity— the Divine Power may be beyond the Law," The elephant raised a possibility.

"That is extremely suspicious!" The old mandrill nodded repetitively after hearing it.

"Old ghost, what else do you have to say besides it being suspicious?" As another brainiac, the crow was most uncomfortable with the old mandrill Long Hair's mixed behavior.

"If you're the smartest, how about you come and solve this mystery!" Long Hair spreaded his hands and directly put the weight of the pressure on him.

"You…" The crow was also speechless now.

"Let this King say a few words," The Lion King was really uncomfortable with the scene unfolding before him, so he decided to stand up to make a concluding remark. Although the beasts were not united internally, they still had to maintain the reputation of their King when he was speaking. Everyone left aside their grudges and rage, collectively facing forward to listen to their King's words. The Lion King glanced at the beasts with a mighty aura, and when he saw the beasts bow their heads, he nodded in satisfaction, "After a lot of information, only the person who broke the box will be cursed. On the contrary, if the box is not opened, then it is safe. Here, I will point out a key point— how many boxes are there? With such a horrible curse box, the number was unlikely to be large. It is very likely that there were only three: gold, silver and bronze."

"It makes sense. The number of magic boxes is extremely suspicious!" The old mandrill Long Hair applauded vigorously and flattered the Lion King.

"Even if there are only three, there is still a golden box," The rhino snorted coldly.

"No, the third golden box had already killed Bai Lu of the Residents," A flying eagle descended from the sky, indicating that this was what it had seen with its own eyes.

"That's great. Let's hunt down that arrogant newcomer immediately and kill the newborn beast!" The coyote brothers slobbered out. Their teeth and claws flared as they wanted to set out to devour the newborn beast. If it weren’t for the Lion King’s speech, they would have started a lot earlier than the beasts.

"Go, we won't be going anyway," The cheetah brothers held the opposite attitude and refused to meet Yue Yang again. Not only the brothers, the elephant and the rhino who had ambushed Yue Yang, refused to go to war. Even the crow and bobcat, who had not participated in the ambush out of intelligence, found things to appear strange.

Divine Power— that wasn't something ordinary people could have.

Against such an opponent, they cannot afford to be careless.

The Lion King gave it some thought. Killing such an arrogant newcomer would undoubtedly be more beneficial to his prestige and reign.

It’s just that it was rather risky to do so personally. If things go wrong, he would be the one to face the Divine Power of Calamity, so he would rather let his subordinates go ahead. After all, their matters of life and death had nothing to do with him.

As a result, the Lion King portrayed an aura of impressive leadership, praising the coyote brothers who were extremely greedy and eager to gain credit. He also comforted the frustrated elephant and other subordinates, asking them to rest well. Even. He even had the two brainiacs, the old mandrill Long Hair and the crow to come up with a thorough combat plan to ensure the coyote brothers, the vulture, the bobcat and other subordinates who were willing to devour the newborn beasts attack the newborn beast one by one. He added that he would give a reward of ten Heaven Ranked Magic Crystals to the beast that managed to kill the arrogant newcomer, whereas those who would bravely compete for the first place will also have a Magic Crystal reward each.

With the additional rewards, the already excited coyote brothers were more than happy to hunt as they became even more ecstatic.

Immediately, they scampered away.

"Asking for death!" The baboon snorted disdainfully.

"Oh, forget it," the rhino comforted the baboon, "We lack many things in the Beast Valley, but we definitely don't have a lack of fools!"

The Lion King pretended not to hear this complaint. The King needed fools to rule over, indeed. Otherwise, how could he be the boss of them if they were all wise men? The Lion King left awe-inspiringly and headed to the Seven Star Crag, preparing to participate in the ‘Gathering of Kings'. The Lion King believes the information wasn't only limited to him, but other leaders should have also caught wind that an arrogant newcomer had arrived, which they will most definitely discuss it together. Most importantly, there were more than a dozen powerful challengers in the rear section of the Beast Valley who were trying to clear the Level, but almost all of these challengers were not easy to deal with. If they don't try to turn the challengers into their own nutrition, then wouldn't it be pointless to name them the King even after so many years of veterancy?

One hour later.

Yue Yang had just walked out of a forest with the Reaper Mantis. They were no more than 100 meters out of the forest when he realized there were thousands of red-eyed wild buffaloes galloping towards them.

The earth-shattering, rumbling iron hooves had the ability to crush everything into pieces.

What's more terrifying was that these buffaloes that were automatically born in the Beast Valley have the ability to wield the ‘Barbaric Savagery', which was capable of crushing everything in front of them. Thousands of buffaloes brought the shockwave of the Barbaric Savagery resounded even throughout the skies as they advanced. This kind of scene definitely seemed like an apocalyptic destruction.

The coyote brothers were hidden behind in the dark, chasing away the wild cattle, and using their Barbaric Savagery ability to kill the newborn beasts. However, they were the ones who came up with their own plan.

They were just acting stupid, but they were not truly dense!

Using large-scale mass killings to destroy the newborn beast, no magic box nor any type of Divine Power of Calamity can win the coyote brothers who remained hidden.

The strange thing was, in less than ten seconds after the buffaloes passed by, there was another sensation.

The ground trembled.

The violent earthquake shook the ground, twisting and deforming like a lunatic's mouth.

From the ground, blood red hues of hot magma gushed out.

The ground has become the epitome of Hell.

The coyote brothers glanced at each other as they realized that something was wrong. It seemed that in addition to their four brothers, there were others who were set on ambushing the newborn beast and used the brothers' plan to give them a head start.

If it weren't for the Beast Valley's Law protecting Yue Yang, the earth cracking and magma spurting all over the sky, he would have died long ago, a stark contrast to him currently taking out some chicken wings leisurely for a barbecue. Yue Yang, who was applying honey onto the chicken wings, realized that the sky was dark. When he finally looked up, the sky was already dense with dark clouds. A flash of lightning blasted, and it was not raindrops that descended, but a flurry of meteorites.

The rain-like meteorites carried a raging fire and slammed into the ground, rumbling.

Student Yue Yang looked stunned.

This was the legendary Meteor Shower?

s

While he chewed on the chicken wings, Yue Yang put his hands together and closed his eyes religiously to make a wish: While the meteors are falling from the sky, please make another beautiful girl descend!

A beautiful girl didn't descend, but not far in front of Yue Yang, hundreds of large tornadoes with wind blades had somehow formed as they flew all over the sky.

No matter if it was rocks or trees, the places where those big tornadoes passed were all disintegrated.

Student Yue Yang looked at this scene. How could this be? He thought before he immediately shouted, "There's wind and rain so collect your laundry!"

The enemies who came to ambush him from a few places in the distance all fell to the ground upon hearing Yue Yang's words. White foam formed in their mouths and their calves twitched.

chapters.title: Chapter 855 Secretly Mastered
chapters.body:
Chapter 855 Secretly Mastered

Originally, the coyote brothers complained about the shameless behavior of their many colleagues who didn't hesitate to take advantage of their plans.

But as they took a closer look, they found that the little Reaper Mantis seemed to resemble a fish swimming in the sea. She happily flew up and down among the cyclones, meteors, and magma as if it was nothing but a fun game, which soured their moods.

Damn it, so much for taking the advantage— she was a freaking Elemental.

Using the method of mass-produced Elemental Energy against this newcomer's Elemental newborn beast was simply spitting into the sky and insulting themselves.

A sickle weasel [1] not far away glared unceremoniously towards the coyote brothers' contempt, "Even if this lord's whirlwind didn't work, it was a hundred times better than your method, using buffaloes to trample over them. What a depressing state of IQ for you four to have, driving thousands of buffaloes to barbarically run over a newborn beast that was the size of a thumb. I'll say, your talents are getting progressively brain-damaged. Even if one intentionally learns on how to become even more dense,it would be impossible for them to turn out this stupid. Look! If you didn't expose your plans early, would we have to take action in this empty space? God damn it, scram! All of you!"

T/L Note: [1] A creature in Japanese mythology, namely Kamaitachi.

This sickle weasel was not the Lion King's subordinate. Instead, it was the capable subordinate of another Beast Regiment, the "Human-faced Tiger".

Its strength was far above the four coyote brothers.

As soon as it spoke, although the four coyote brothers were infuriated, they didn't dare refute. They stepped back and pretended not to hear what it said as they were indeed anxious just now. Had they waited for Yue Yang to walk into the valley, the effect of their attack would have been much better. Even if the little newborn beast could not be killed, it could still be trapped inside.

"Fire!"

s

A porcupine with needles all over its body rushed out and shouted loudly.

The porcupine's body tensed and shook. Soon, there were nearly a hundred needles on its head and neck that shot out, raining towards the Reaper Mantis.

No matter how the Reaper Mantis flew around, she wouldn't be able to avoid it. This was because the stingers fired by the porcupine had the ‘Tracking By Will' ability. Coupled with its unique skills, its power was very impressive.

A stinger was about to hit the Reaper Mantis when a meteorite suddenly accelerated and fell. At the same time, it deviated from the original trajectory while the meteorite happened to be in front of her. The stinging needles plunged deeply into the meteorite, one by one penetrating into it with only a few thorny ends exposed. The porcupine cursed, damn it, who ruined my great plans? Suddenly, he found that the Reaper Mantis was flying to its side in a panic. Overjoyed in its heart, it opened its huge mouth and swallowed the little thing in one bite.

Snap!

The porcupine felt something shatter in its mouth.

It was chewing until it felt something was wrong.

After it reacted, the porcupine realized that there was a huge meteorite in his mouth, and there were also countless stingers on the meteorite.

To make matters worse, the Reaper Mantis led those automatically tracking giant tornadoes towards it, and the porcupine was caught drifting in the air before he could scream. Unable to kill the newborn beast, the sickle weasel thought that it seemed good to kill a porcupine. It just soared into the sky, flew into the whirlwind, and swung its sickle towards the porcupine.

With a lightning fast slash of a cross, the porcupine's head and neck had two more blood stains.

The porcupine was also a rather tough guy with a strong vitality. Although it wasn't an equal opponent to the sickle weasel, it could somewhat protect itself.

It rushed out of the tornado like a shooting star.

Regardless of the counterattack, it immediately dug wildly with his fangs. Because in an instant, it dug a hundred meters underground and disappeared.

The Reaper Mantis was happy when she saw the other side killing each other and clapped her little hands. Behind her, a toad appeared and as it opened its terrifying mouth, a thick wave of smoke was emitted.

It was absolutely impossible for the poisonous smoke to open Pandora's Box, but it was more than capable enough to poison a newborn beast.

Upon seeing the toad and the poisonous smoke that was emitted, not just the newborn beast, but even the four coyote brothers and the sickle weasel also panicked as they evaded.

This toad is one of the leaders of the five Beast Regiments, the ‘Toad King'. Although its level was not as good as the Lion King, its overall strength was not below the Lion King either. Especially in terms of poison, in which one would die with just a simple touch. The coyote brothers never thought that it would personally take action just to kill a newborn beast. With the status of the Toad King, killing a newborn beast in person would be a bit of an overkill, wouldn't it?

"Huhu!"

Although the Reaper Mantis had high intelligence, her figure of speech was not very standardised.

She named the whirlwind as Huhu.

The two sickle arms of hers turned around her body, and a strange sight appeared.

All the jetted dark green smoke was compiled into a ball, instantly forming a storm. She drew it towards the sky and turned it into a large tornado of poisonous smoke.

The Reaper Mantis that stayed in the tornado was leisurely contented, completely unaffected by any of the poisonous smoke. The sickle weasel looked dumbfounded and couldn't help but grab one of the coyote brothers. He yelled in disbelief, "That's my unique skill ‘Madman Sickle Tornado’. This is impossible! How could she have my unique skill? "

The coyote was out of breath, wondering how the heck would it know why this happened.

Maybe someone secretly learnt it!

Of course, it dared not say such unpredictable words.

After the sneak attack by the sickle weasel, just by looking at it once, she learnt it secretly and used it against him. Just thinking of these words, the coyote itself felt that it would be impossible and was absolutely dumbfounded.

The high-status Toad King forcibly broke into the big tornado of poisonous smoke. With a long tongue sticking out and a dark mouth full of sharp teeth, it ate the Reaper Mantis frantically. Its body was so huge to the point where it could completely swallow the large tornado of poisonous smoke into its abdomen with its own pitch black mouth. Both the sickle weasel and the coyote thought this guy was too shameless— it was a dignified leader, yet it just jumped out to kill a mere newborn beast with his subordinates in seconds. This lack of pride was absolutely indescribable, and was also absolutely revolting!

Qiang! The sickle weasel heard a familiar sound again.

From the sky, two intersecting lightning bolts suddenly appeared, slashing across the Toad King's plump lips.

Toad King's thick lips, which could not be injured even by a sword, had a cross-shaped mark carved onto it discreetly, whereas its ugly and sticky tongue had also been cut off.

"My ultimate skill! That was my Cross Lightning Kill!" The sickle weasel shook the coyote enraged again as the coyote's neckbone was almost broken.

"Hmph, little bugs."

The Toad King's injuries recovered instantly.

Its short and awkward forelimbs suddenly transformed into the shape of an adult's hand and it drew out a shimmering sword.

With a wave of its hand, the entire ground was frozen, including the areas that were still gushing out magma as well as the burning meteorites. Its Freezing Energy even turned the licks of flames into a frosty state. The Reaper Mantis suspended in the sky was immediately frozen into an ice sphere. Even the sickle weasel and the coyote brothers, who were thousands of meters away, were covered with frost from head to toe.

The bobcat that was very far away had also been draped in a layer of frost, its whiskers and fur having turned white.

It sneezed sharply.

As a result, all the frozen things in a radius of 100 meters like the small trees, grass, insects, and injured buffaloes, had all shattered into dust and scattered.

"What's the big deal of being an Elemental? As long as there is absolute power, there is nothing that can't be killed! It's nothing but a newborn beast, so don't make a fuss!" The Toad King was now ecstatic and rolled its tongue, letting the ice sphere roll into its mouth, grumbling and swallowing it into its belly. He then patted his belly with two arms of different lengths, one long and the other one short, before he made a dull laughter proudly.

Rumble!

It didn't get the best of its laugh when suddenly, a big explosion occurred in its stomach.

The Toad King opened its mouth uncomfortably, spitting out a lot of magma and meteorites. Shaking off the frost on its body, the sickle weasel found that the Reaper Mantis that was suspended in the sky still remained there, but the magma and meteorites on the ground were probably dug up by someone. Judging from the magma spit out by the Toad King, it was probably the toad who should have swallowed it. But, just now I saw clearly that it swallowed frost and ice, so why did it spit out magma?

The sickle weasel was confused, "Whose skill did this belong to? With this kind of psychedelic energy and this kind of space transfer ability, it was definitely not my skill."

Seeing that it had stopped shaking it, the coyote's body trembled a little strangely, "It's not mine either!"

The sickle weasel was furious, "Shut up, there is no place for you to speak here!"

With a fierce attack, it grabbed the coyote's neck and shook it desperately until the coyote's bones creaked. The coyote was full of emotions and wanted to reach out to its brothers for help, but the three hopeless brothers shrank like quails, no one daring to come over to stop the abuse.

"I'll say, toad, looking at your silly appearance and knowing that you are listed as the leader of one of the five Beast Regiments really embarrasses me," A shadow of a being with butterfly wings and a human head on the body of a bee appeared quietly. With its arms raised, the huge hill-sized King Toad flew into the sky, then fell down at the 10,000 metre-level above the ground and smashed into the ground. The shadow didn't stop, and he lifted a boulder with his will and smashed it into Toad's eyes.

"Your lame excuse of a Poison Bee is not anything good either!" The King Toad puffed up his belly angrily and shot up. Although he was hit repeatedly, he was still intact, making him truly rather worthy of being one of the five Beast Regiment Kings.

"No matter how bad I am, I'm not like you, who is dense to the point where you didn't even know that someone was toying with you," The shadow snorted.

"What? Huh?" The Toad King slashed its sword towards the Reaper Mantis in the sky, which turned into an afterimage and disappeared amidst the sword attack. It’s real body has long since disappeared. He glanced at the direction where Yue Yang was supposedly cooking some chicken wings leisurely, but he was nowhere to be found. The Toad King reacted immediately— he was tricked by them! With its power as a Beast King, where it was used to ambushing its enemies first and killing them by force later, it was absolutely embarrassed by not even being able to conquer a mere newborn beast.

"Not just that… The reason why they actually bothered to fight you was to learn of your skills secretly. When the newborn beast grows up, hehehe, I hope she only cares about clearing the Level. Otherwise, there will only be four Beast Kings in the Beast Valley, and one more useless and dead toad!" The butterfly-winged shadow flapped its wings, rising up into the sky before turning into a flicker of light that quickly disappeared.

"You want to escape? It's not that easy," The Toad King sniffed through his nostrils, following its movements by jumping in one direction.

"You guys can't kill even a newborn beast; you're all such a waste!" The sickle weasel threw the coyote, who had almost broken its entire neck bone, onto the ground. It harrumphed in disdain before it turned and left.

"…" The four coyote brothers looked at each other.

In fact, they really wanted to say, could you kill that newborn beast, then? Besides, the one who failed in the highest stage was the leader-level Toad King, wasn't it?

Of course, these words that might incur more wrath, could not be said.

The bobcat, porcupine, meteor bats, rock earthworms and others, plus several batches of beasts that were meant to perform a sneak attack, left this messy battlefield one after another. If they knew that the newborn beast of the arrogant newcomer was an Elemental and could master a new skill upon sight instantly, they definitely would not have come to ambush their enemies. In this battle, not only did they not take advantage of the situation, but they had also offended a powerful opponent in the future.

It would be better if that kid clears the Level early.

What if he was a narrow-minded person? He would remember today's attack, wouldn't he? If he waited for that little pipsqueak to grow up and come back again to slaughter all of us, then we are all doomed.

s

Half an hour later.

The vulture in the sky hidden amidst the clouds had gone away for real now. After it left, student Yue Yang walked out under an iced layer. He held a fork in his hand with two cooked chicken wings on the fork and a glass of frozen Qilan Wine in his other hand. The Reaper Mantis followed behind him as she belched with her face flushed as she seemed to be drunk.

"It seems that you couldn't trick that poisonous bee, your Cloaking ability still has a long way to go! For your first counterattack, I'll judge you as being barely qualified!" Student Yue Yang bit on the honeyed chicken wings as he taught her the lesson.

"Mhmm!" The Reaper Mantis nodded very cleverly and flew to Yue Yang's shoulder again. She held out her small fists, lightly pounding him to massage and please him.

"You idiot, hurry up and practice; don't learn this sort of flattering from Hu Tai Lang!" Student Yue Yang was not going to fall for it.

chapters.title: Chapter 856 The Fool Will Die Very Soon
chapters.body:
Chapter 856 The Fool Will Die Very Soon

Three days.

It took the Sickle Weasel three whole days before making up its mind, which was to follow that newcomer and his newborn beast.

This was an extremely dangerous plan and it could threaten its life at any time. Like the character of a Sickle Weasel, it usually wouldn't choose to take its chances. However, curiosity finally overwhelmed fear— even if it was afraid of death, it wanted to figure out how. How exactly did that newborn beast learn its own Madman Sickle Tornado and Cross Lightning Kill? These were skills that used an entire span of a thousand years for it to study and understand. Even the Sickle Weasel itself, who created the techniques itself, had spent a thousand years to research them; yet, no matter how intelligent that newborn beast was, she managed to learn it in one glance?

When this terrible curiosity arose in its heart, the threat of death has also diminished a lot.

After three days of mental torture, the Sickle Weasel set off.

Tiptoeing, it returned to the battlefield of that day.

From the battlefield as the starting point, it treaded towards the direction of the prediction of its heart, following it all the way. To be honest, this chase surprised it a lot. Not far from the battlefield, it could see some other wild beasts lying on the ground. They were not strong, all vegetarian beasts of the Earth Rank. They were also the most basic source of meat for the entire Beast Valley.

Many yellow goats, gazelles and even the beasts below the Earth Rank scattered all over the ground.

They died in different states, most of them having been hit by the Cross Lightning Kill.

The Sickle Weasel was certain that this kind of Cross Lightning Kill was not very powerful as the power could only kill the Earth Ranked beasts. If it was used against the Toad King at the peak of the 6th Level Heaven Rank, it would not be able to even hurt the toad's skin. But three days ago, it saw with its own eyes that the newborn beast made a cross slash, slitting the Toad King’s lips and cutting off the most powerful tongue of the toad. The Sickle Weasel was sure that even if it had taken action itself, it probably couldn't do better. However, it was stumped by that exact reason.

s

The problem was that the Cross Lightning Kill that it saw now was not as powerful as the one three days ago.

Even the skill itself was far behind.

Although this technique has been displayed, it knew at first glance that this was done by a novice.

There were unstable energy ripples in the place where the damage was lost in different depths. The heads of the beasts were not cut cleanly as well since there were still some strands connected.

Who did this?

That arrogant newcomer did it? Impossible, he was the main body, it would be impossible for him to attack… Of course, there was another possibility— the human and the beast were one. If so, then it would also be possible to launch an attack with the master's hand. But that couldn't exceed the range of the beast's ability, and the master would basically just be assisting the will of the beast. This is weird, if this newbie technique was done by the newborn beast, then who was it that killed the Toad King before?

It went a little further.

The Sickle Weasel found out about some new discoveries. The ones that fell dead in the front seemed to consist more of carnivorous beasts.

It didn't pay much attention to it at first, but after seeing too much, it immediately realized something. Observing carefully and collecting all the traces of the carcasses for reference, the Sickle Weasel was surprised to find that the newborn beast had improved.

Moreover, it was a really huge improvement.

The previously unskilled Lightning Cross Kill, with a training distance of just over ten kilometers, had improved the skill's proficiency level and wielding freedom.

Among the ten monsters killed, only one or two still had a slight flaw.

But among the hundreds of beasts killed, even one or two cases of perfect slashes were done.

More importantly, most of the monsters killed were carnivorous beasts, which were more powerful and harder to kill than the vegetarian monsters before.

After walking for about fifty kilometers along the way, the Sickle Weasel looked at the dead beast's body on the ground and was shocked. Now, only a few of them had slight flaws, whereas the rest were all perfect kills. It thought of its own state— it could improve its strength, but the speed and skills could no longer be any better. In a short distance of cultivation, this originally awkward novice actually caught up with the owner who created this trick. What level of intelligence must a beast have to be able to reach this state?

One hundred kilometers later.

The Sickle Weasel found that there were fewer and fewer beasts that laid on the ground.

The ‘newbie’ who has made great progress seems to be comprehending along the way, and has not practiced killing beasts anymore.

However, after careful observation, the Sickle Weasel still found several targets. The beasts that were killed were no longer Earth Ranked beasts but mighty Heaven Ranked beasts.

And this technique of killing was none other than the ultra-perfect Instantaneous Kill.

The Sickle Weasel could certainly perform the ultra-perfect Instantaneous Kill technique. In fact, this was also the secret trick it had studied for three thousand years. In the entire Beast Valley, no one knew of this kind of ultra-perfect ‘Instantaneous Kill' except for the dead. As a secret life-saving trick and a trump card, the Sickle Weasel had never used it in front of others. How did that ‘newbie’ learn the skill when it didn't showcase the ability?

The Sickle Weasel felt dizzy.

If the Lightning Cross Kill was not created by itself, then it could be said that she had learned it elsewhere, and certainly not at the moment.

In the entire Beast Valley, and even the entire Heaven Realm, it was the only one who would know of that attack.

Then, there was the ultra-perfect Cross Lightning Instantaneous Kill that has never been casted before.

So how did the other party steal its skills?

With this kind of question that would cause a headache when thinking about it, the Sickle Weasel chased the tracks to a lakeside about two hundred kilometers away from the original battlefield.

It found that the newcomer and the newborn beast were up ahead, practicing.

This kind of exercise is no longer aimed at the beast, but at the lake.

The newborn beast, which seemed to have grown up a little bit, flew down from the sky with two of her sickle arms.

A Cross Lightning Instantaneous Kill appeared in the sky, which made the Sickle Weasel sigh out of plain admiration. Then, the attack plastered itself upside down towards the lake, silently splitting the lake with a cross-shaped crack. The Sickle Weasel realized that even if he had made his own shots, he couldn't do better. This kind of ultra-perfect Instantaneous Kill was not something that he could do at any time of the day.

"You are an idiot! You can't learn this kind of tattered technique for so long. What did I say before? It's not meant to split the surface of the lake! The lake surface doesn't move and there can be no ripples at all, let alone the whole division of the water—that's not what I want. I want you to split the sky! To split the sky! Do you know what it means to split the sky? You're just a fool. Don't cry and start practicing immediately; if you can't complete the task today, you are not allowed to eat!" Student Yue Yang's angry reprimandations caused the Sickle Weasel to feel conflicted.

The Reaper Mantis wiped a tear off her face and continued to practice, one after another ultra-perfect Instantaneous Kills appeared on the lake's surface. However, Yue Yang's request of separating the sky while not wavering the lake's surface had not been fulfilled.

The sickle was speechless.

If it weren't for the rainstorm, it really wanted to jump out and grab the boy's neck, then shake it repetitively to warn him not to be too strict.

Just being like this, he had already hurt the beast very much. If she could practice some sort of skill that splits the sky yet does not waver the lake, then she might as well commit suicide!

She practiced over and over, hours passing by after the other.

Until the night fell.

The exhausted Reaper Mantis finally managed to let out a Cross Lightning Instantaneous Kill that split the sky, but because her strength was exhausted, her stamina could not be controlled. The lake's surface did not waver at the beginning, but it went out of control and immediately cut into four pieces. For more than ten seconds, the lake water could not converge. The sickle ferret hiding in the woods peeked at the sight, his chin snapping and falling to the ground [1] .

T/L Note: [1] Saying someone is really astonished, shocked.

She really managed to cut the sky and not waver the lake?

"This, I can barely qualify as a pass. You practiced for so long just for such a simple move like this and in the end, it wasn't well controlled either. Have you tried your best to comprehend it? Forget it, just rest up today, tomorrow you no longer need to practice this useless skill. We need to set higher standards as our time is very limited. Tomorrow’s goal is to draw two roses in the sky and cross them. Each petal requires nine spaces to be separated before the whole thing is added, so use that to replace the simple cross. If that can be achieved, it might be able to play a role in battle… Okay, you're just crying and laughing at the same time. You're the one who loves to cry the most, so why don't you hurry up and go eat!" Yue Yang was still not satisfied. After a harsh lecture, he finally lowered his voice, coaxing the Reaper Mantis.

After hearing this, the Sickle Weasel was about to drown in its own tears.

Hugging the tree pole with both hands and smashing it with its head desperately, it really wanted to die like this.

Although it knew the truth of the quote, ‘there is a sky outside and there are people outside’ [2] , letting a newborn beast catch up to its own thousand-year-cultivation in a few days, and even surpassing it in the blink of an eye, the blow toward it was undoubtedly heavy.

That wasn't the most important thing; what made it really want to kill itself was Yue Yang's words.

It spent millenia creating this ultimate skill, yet, in someone else's eyes, it was nothing more than a ‘useless skill'. Does Yue Yang really want him to die?

Who the hell is this kid?

Even if you are abnormal, you can't be this abnormal, right?

"Shhh!"

Not far behind the Sickle Weasel, a shadow riding a Winged Unicorn whispered to the one who was hitting its head against the tree, "Don’t be like this, it will startle him. That guy is a murderous demon who doesn’t bat an eyelash before killing someone. If he finds out that we are here, we will die miserably!"

The Sickle Weasel was startled when he heard him, and when he looked back, he found that it was the resident, Ryoma.

It asked strangely, "What are you doing here?"

Ryoma, who rode his Winged Unicorn, put his index finger to his lips again and whispered, "I'm doing what you're doing."

The Sickle Weasel understood now that Ryoma was also tracking the weird kid like itself, but another question arose again. The newborn beast learned its skill in secret, so it came over out of curiosity. But what about Ryoma?

Ryoma didn't fail to see the questioning eyes of the Sickle Weasel and a bitter smile appeared on his face, "She stole my Transcending Flight skill earlier than she did yours!"

With that said, the Sickle Weasel realised instantly.

It was no wonder that the thundering strikes from the thousands of buffaloes, the earthquake bursts, meteor showers, spiral hurricanes, and even the successive attacks of the porcupine and the Toad King, were easily evaded by the newborn beast. It turned out that she had learned Ryoma's proud skill, ‘Dance of the Trailing Light’! No wonder her movements had been so familiar at that moment. It's just that the two forms were too different as when it was coupled with the rapid changes that occurred throughout the war, the Sickle Weasel didn't think about that possibility. It turned out that the little bug had learned the flying skills of the Ryoma a long time ago.

Looking at the Reaper Mantis flying around happily in the sky, it can be seen that she has improved again, her movements being more mysterious than Ryoma's Dance of the Trailing Light.

Just like her own trick Cross Lightning Kill, she completely surpassed the original after a few days of practice.

For a time, the Sickle Weasel really wanted to cry with Ryoma.

We are all beasts, yet why was the gap between us so large?

The Sickle Weasel was very emotional and was about to speak, but Ryoma made a silent gesture as if he was facing an enemy.

After the two hidden auras had calmed down, within ten seconds, a huge black shadow appeared in the sky, covering the light of the sky and the sun. Both the Sickle Weasel and Ryoma recognized that this was the powerful general of the Toad KIng, the Scarlet-Eyed Bat Beast.

s

Besides itself, it had also used its super fertile ability to produce nearly a thousand children with the beasts of ghost bats, vampire bats, and monster-eared bats in the Beast Valley. The overwhelming numbers formed an entire bat army. Although its strength itself was not very strong, as there were so many children, the group's advantage was often used to exert pressure before they went in for the kill, so they were also regarded as tyrants in the Beast Valley.

"What?" It was strange. Although the Scarlet-Eyed Beast had an army and was powerful, the Sickle Weasel was not afraid of it. So how could Ryoma, a resident, be that afraid?

"I'm not afraid of the Scarlet-Eyed Beast, but I'm afraid of the young man. You came here only for a short while, so you wouldn't know, but I have been with him for three days. The number of beasts and residents that have died in his hands have already exceeded twenty. As long as you are alone, you'd have no chance of survival. You don’t know this, but he is a murderous demon who uses our energy to upgrade that little beast. He is the God of Death sent by the Heavens to impend judgement on us!" Ryoma looked at Yue Yang as his eyes showed incomparable fear.

"How is it possible, he can't kill us himself!" The Sickle Weasel was completely confused.

"I can't explain it either, but just look; that fool, the Scarlet-Eyed Beast, will die very soon!" Ryoma said so before he swallowed a mouthful of saliva in terror.

chapters.title: Chapter 857 Don'T Say That I Didn'T Warn You
chapters.body:
Chapter 857 Don'T Say That I Didn'T Warn You

The Sickle Weasel couldn't understand.

How could a person kill an enemy when under the restriction of the Law?

Even if he had Pandora's box, one has to open it manually. If one doesn't open the box, then the curse wouldn't occur. In other words, the Pandora's Box that stored the Divine Power of Calamity was not invincible, was it? So how can he kill more than 20 beasts and residents by himself?

Ryoma, who rode his Winged Unicorn, looked at the Sickle Weasel very seriously.

He seemed to be observing whether it was worthy of his trust.

His gaze was very serious.

And he could see through all the emotions hidden in the Sickle Weasel's heart.

In the end, Ryoma made a difficult decision, "Listen, if you don't want to be an enemy to him and you just want to watch from the sidelines, just remember my advice."

Seeing his solemn appearance, the Sickle Weasel couldn't help its speeding heartbeat as it gulped a mouthful of saliva secretly.

It nodded, letting him know that it was willing to listen to his advice and cooperate.

s

Ryoma pondered slightly before he looked at the Scarlet-Eyed Beast again. Then, he finally whispered into the ears of the Sickle Weasel, "You must remember one thing, regardless of whether or not the Pandora's Box had been opened, or even if it appears in your hands, that doesn't matter. But as long as that person says ‘don’t say I didn't warn you', you must not laugh, oppose, ridicule, or have any other negative reactions in your heart. If you even scorn your lips in disdain, you will die! After that sentence was spoken, unless someone dies, you must not have any thoughts… I suspect that it is a revelation, a signal to activate the curse. Anyone who responds to it will die, and not even the Law of the Beast Valley will save you!"

The Sickle Weasel's scalp was numb.

I'll be damned. I would die if he said one sentence? What kind of attack is this?

But the Sickle Weasel did not doubt the authenticity of Ryoma's words. The curse of Divine Power was already a supernatural force to begin with. If it was similar to an ordinary attack, why would it be considered Divine Power anyway?

Now, let's take a look at how this Scarlet-Eyed Bat Beast died.

The sky full of bats descended in a densely packed manner. They stopped around the entire lake, each equipped with the strength of a Heaven Rank.

Although they were just at the 1st and 2nd Levels of the Heaven Rank, the number of nearly a thousand was enough to make up for everything. The Scarlet-Eyed Beast's power was at the 4th level of the Heaven Rank, which was far more powerful than ordinary beasts and only slightly inferior to a small number of residents and the Sickle Weasel itself. With the strength of the initial 5th Level Heaven Rank, the Sickle Weasel really didn't want to provoke this Scarlet-Eyed Beast—after all, its large group of children was way too annoying.

In the Beast Valley, only a few failed challengers like the Scarlet-Eyed Beast will copulate and breed with other wild beasts, living happily in the Beast Valley as if it was its home.

Although Sickle Weasel had become a beast, its heart was still of a human. It was like an irreversible concept. Leaving out having offspring with wild beasts, it already despised its own beast form. There was really no other choice for it but to be a sickle weasel. If it could be a normal human for a year, it didn't care if it would die in the future.

Of course, that was impossible.

For the failed challengers of the Beast Valley, the consequences were irreversible.

Either they succeed or fail.

There was no third possibility, no third option.

"You're that arrogant newcomer, aren't you? You seem to be asking for a punch in the face! Regardless, your arrogance will end here. When you encounter this Scarlet-Eyed Lord who always has the time to deal with affairs like this, that is the beginning of your tragedy!" Scarlet-Eyed Bat Beast saw that Yue Yang wanted to speak, so it immediately stretched out its hand to signal him, "Don't speak of nonsense, I know what you're trying to say, kid. If you weren't going to brag about your strength, you were probably going to use some rotten box to scare me, aren't you? How many boxes do you have? I have hundreds of children, and all of them are not afraid of death. You can take them out because I will open them all! Besides, how many boxes can you have? Just because you killed a few fools before, you think that you could run wild in the Beast Valley? Let me tell you, that was only because you hadn't met this Scarlet-Eyed Lord! Otherwise, your arrogance will end here!"

"I promise I won't use the box," Yue Yang smiled and shook his head.

"You son of a b****! If you don't use the box, do you think that this Scarlet-Eyed Lord doesn't know what you really wanted to do? You met with the other guy before, didn't you? What if Pandora's Box was left by him? What are you pretending to be? Do you think that this Scarlet-Eyed Lord is stupid? Did you think that a mere bean sprout like you can have a magical box? If it was not for the box that Ji Wu Ri left you, you wouldn't think of yourself as some invincible God! If you were not the disciple of Ji Wu Ri, or a disciple of that bastard Fan Zhong Hua, then you're a disciple of that sly and cunning Cook. Other than the three of them, no one else would have the ability to back you up! Do you think that this Scarlet-Eyed Lord came here with an empty-handed investigation? Hmph, this Scarlet-Eyed Lord is intelligent beyond comparison, so why would I be afraid of your little tricks!"

"How admirable. I have nothing to express besides admiration," Yue Yang clapped his hands and praised it.

"…" The Sickle Weasel and Ryoma glanced at each other. They didn't expect this Scarlet-Eyed Beast, who was a scumbag by appearance, to have such caution before it approached an enemy. At least it had done some investigation before it came. However, this attitude of it was a bit too self-righteous, right?

The truth was not accurately confirmed, yet it had been assumed as such very quickly.

At this moment, looking at the Scarlet-Eyed Beast again, both of the onlookers' gaze were as shocked as seeing a dead corpse.

The Scarlet-Eyed Beast and Yue Yang— one had an arrogant attitude, boasting and thinking highly of itself; whereas the other was calm and collected. Just based on their appearances, even the blind would be able to know who would emerge victorious!

For Yue Yang, although the Scarlet-Eyed Bat Beast was kind of a drag on the surface, it did not rush forward recklessly. After all, it still had some scruples. The fact that Pandora's Box managed to kill Pi Yi, Samson, and Bai Lu remained real. He first rolled his eyes, then raised his voice and sneered, "I saw you guys a long time ago, just come out!"

The Sickle Weasel and Ryoma looked at each other again.

No way?

These two had always felt that their concealing ability was their proudest achievement.

Regardless of whether it was the Tricking Wind technique that the Sickle Weasel was good at, or the Light-Stepping technique that Ryoma was proficient in, both were certified as first-class Cloaking Abilities.

They were already hiding here so much longer in advance, how could the Scarlet-Eyed Beast who had just arrived discover their presence? The two of them felt discouraged and were about to reveal themselves when they suddenly heard a burst of laughter from the opposite side.

Two shadows of different sizes flashed by the lake.

The Sickle Weasel and Ryoma both knew who these shadows were. One of them was the deadly enemy of the Scarlet-Eyed Beast, the Flying Dragon Lizard.

The other was the Big-Eared Mouse, a partner in crime with the Scarlet-Eyed Beast at usual times. Of course, because of the appearance of the Flying Dragon Lizard, the Sickle Weasel and Ryoma also found out that there was a shadow sliding into the bottom of the lake. Looking at the figure, it should be the Flying Dragon Lizard's friend, the Flower-Bellied Python.

"Scarlet-Eyed brother, there are no traces of outsiders, this kid's helper probably isn't here," The Big-Eared Mouse approached the Scarlet-Eyed Beast and whispered.

"You want to grab the first kill, yet you're afraid of death. How about you simply hide in your mother's crotch and wait until she dies before you come back out," The Flying Dragon Lizard sneered. It had a private grudge with the Scarlet-Eyed Demon. Considering that it hadn't attacked its sworn enemy, things could have been a lot worse.

"Just with your own rotten lizard power, and you want to fight with this Lord for the kill? Let me tell you, we have already surrounded this kid's newborn beast. The Toad King gave an order, we will turn against the ones who interfere with our plans. Weren't you quite a drag, Flying bug? Come on, try me, I'll see if you have the guts! Did you think that just because you're with the Flower belly guy in hiding that this Scarlet-Eyed Lord will be afraid of you? Just ask around, among the five forces , your side is the weakest. If it wasn't for your boss that often respected the Lion King and my boss, he would have been wiped out," The Scarlet-Eyed Beast waved its hand, and the sky full of bat children flew up, screaming and screeching. The sound of wings flapping resounded throughout the lake and the momentum was very shocking.

"What other abilities do you have besides constantly mentioning the name of your King? You and I were sorting out our personal issues, and yet you bring the Toad King into this, what a silly species!" The Flying Dragon Lizard was not afraid of the Scarlet-Eyed Beast, but against the Toad King however, it was slightly wary.

"Let's go ahead then, did you think that this Scarlet-Eyed Lord will be afraid of you? I'll put you down first and then take the first kill. Big Ears, you can watch over him for me. Don't let anyone take the chance to kill him."

"Yes, Brother Scarlet-Eye, don't worry about me handling this!"

Just as the two sides were arguing and were about to fight, Yue Yang was so bored that he was sitting under the tree, almost falling asleep.

After a long yawn, he said casually, "You two can fight all you want, but don't interrupt my sleep. Don't say that I didn't warn you later on!"

The Sickle Weasel never would have thought that this odd kid would say this sentence with such a careless attitude at this moment.

Its heart stiffened as it heard those words, and it immediately turned its head to look at Ryoma.

Unexpectedly, it found that Ryoma was trembling all over. His face was pale and there was a chill in his heart. Was it possible to take effect without any rituals or specific words? Was there no limitation to this power? Even if he had said those words nonchalantly, would the curse of the Divine Power of Calamity still activate? If that was really the case, then there would be more people who would die under the hands of that kid!

The Sickle Weasel didn't want to think about what could happen to the Scarlet-Eyed Beast and the Flying Dragon Lizard, remaining an empty heart.

Forcing itself to go into a serene state immediately.

Suppress any negative emotions, keep it neutral. It could hear bursts of laughter near its ears. The laughter included that of the Scarlet-Eyed Beast, the Flying Dragon Lizard, and even Big-Eared Mouse and the Flower-Bellied Python who floated on the water surface.

"Hahahaha, I'm really going to laugh to death. What did you just say? Don't say what?" Flying Dragon Lizard laughed and burst into tears due to the intense irony.

"It's ‘don’t say that I didn't warn you'," Student Yue Yang explained patiently.

"Haha, what? Can you explain to me more clearly?" The Flying Dragon Lizard understood it, but it deliberately pretended not to hear clearly.

"Don't say that I didn't warn you," Student Yue Yang said again.

"I still can't hear clearly, please speak a little louder." The Scarlet-Eyed Beast didn't want the Flying Dragon Lizards to take full advantage of the prestige, and deliberately opened his mouth to tease Yue Yang. Surprisingly, Yue Yang was not angry at all, but he smiled and said again: "I'm going to warn you for the final time…"

"Do you want me to die laughing? ‘Don't say that I didn't warn you', who do you think you are? Continue to try scaring this Scarlet-Eyed Lord!" The Scarlet-Eyed Beast laughed loudly.

Hearing Yue Yang saying it four times, the Sickle Weasel and Ryoma opened their eyes at the same time.

And they subconsciously wiped off a layer of cold sweat by coincidence.

While suppressing their heartbeats and fear, the two glanced at the lakeside to watch the incident occur,

The miraculous Divine Power of Calamity must have already occurred. The young man had already said, ‘don’t say that I didn't warn you’. It should be the signal to open Pandora’s Box, and the Scarlet-Eyed Beast's ridicule was the ‘key' to open the box. These guys thought that they could use their words to show off their prestige and tease each other, but they didn't know that such behavior would be self-defeating!

How can the Scarlet-Eyed Beast, the Big-eared Mouse, the Flying Dragon Lizard and the Flower-Bellied Python die?

Was it dehydration, drowning or exploding?

Both the Sickle Weasel and Ryoma stared at the field without blinking, for fear of missing the most exciting sight of their lives.

The four beasts still laughed wildly.

There was nothing unusual at all.

A gust of wind blew.

Numerous hairs were blown out into the air. The Sickle Weasel and Ryoma immediately stared at a target, the Big-Eared Mouse. This fool was dying without it itself knowing as it laughed wildy, its entire being becoming old rapidly. Its whole body's hair turned visibly white to the naked eye. Its skin wrinkled, beginning to shrink and shrivel. The most exaggerated thing was that when the Big-Eared Mouse laughed crazily, its teeth had loosened. Based on its health and strength, it hadn't realised its deteriorating self and had started to sing at some point.

s

"Haha, I'm laughing to the point where my teeth have fallen out. Brother Scarlet-Eye, look, my teeth are falling off. Cough cough, how ridiculous! Cough cough, cough cough, I'm delirious!" The Big-Eared Mouse had found out that it had a tooth fallen on the ground. It thought that it fell off because of his laughter, so it became even more crazy, picking up that tooth and showing it off to the Scarlet-Eyed Beast.

The Flower-Bellied Python that was dipping in the lake had been petrified at some point.

It sank to the bottom of the lake.

Only the Scarlet-Eyed Beast and the Flying Dragon Lizard were left, still laughing wildly and indifferently.

These ridiculous laughters came from the lakeside, echoing throughout the forest and resounding throughout the sky. It sounded… extremely sarcastic.

chapters.title: Chapter 858 Nurturing A High Speed Cultivation
chapters.body:
Chapter 858 Nurturing A High Speed Cultivation

"You lost a tooth from laughing? Hahaha, you actually lost a tooth? You're really making this Scarlet-Eyed Lord die out of laughter, hahaha. Huh? No wait, your face. Haha, how did your face become an old man!" The Scarlet-Eyed Beast was still laughing, but it thought something was wrong. The Big-Eared Mouse was now a declining old man, the type that would die in the blink of an eye.

"Cough, cough!" The Big-Eared Mouse could no longer laugh and it fell to the ground.

At this moment, the Flying Dragon Lizard's laughter had abruptly stopped.

Like a clean swing of a blade.

Its entire being was frightened, expression cold as if it fell into an ice cellar.

Something must have happened for this Big-Eared Mouse to regress into this state so suddenly.

According to the tragic deaths of Pi Yi, Samson, and the resident Bai Lu, the Big-Eared Mouse must be cursed by the Divine Power of Calamity.

Thinking of this, the Flying Dragon Lizard suddenly burst into cold sweat. In a hurry, it didn't care about wanting to get the first kill and roared, "Flower Belly, something is wrong, let's withdraw!"

But the entire lake was empty, not a trace of a reply. The Flying Dragon Lizard quickly searched for a while with its eyes. Apart from the rippling surface of the lake and the Reaper Mantis, who's movements were as dainty as a dragonfly, there were no traces of its allies, and not even a single breath of life.

Could it be… At the moment, even if the Flying Dragon Lizard was a fool, he knew that the situation was not good.

s

It looked not far to the side— the Scarlet-Eyed Beast continued to laugh, exasperations becoming wilder the longer he basked in laughter. Even the Scarlet-Eyed Beast itself realized that something was wrong, unable to control itself either. Its lonely laughter reverberated throughout the dead silent surroundings, spreading out towards the far, far distance. The laughter at this time no longer contained sarcasm, but anxiety, anger, and panic. This kind of uncontrollable laughter was a hundred times worse than crying! The Scarlet-Eyed Beast squeezed its throat hard. But even so, it couldn't stop the laughter from coming out, and if it didn't seem to laugh forcibly, its laughter would blow off the lobes of the lungs and directly open a hole in its chest.

The Reaper Mantis flew over the head of the dying Big-Eared Mouse.

Although the Big-Eared Mouse knew that it was as good as dead, its murderous intentions were still there.

Before dying, it intentionally raised its paws and hit the Reaper Mantis with a strong force, planning to take her along with it to have someone massage its back in the afterlife.

This attack had exhausted the last of its energy, and the Big-Eared Mouse patted weakly on the pair of sickle arms of the Reaper Mantis's rotating body, before dying stiffly.

The body quickly withered and dissipated with the wind.

The breeze blew past from the surface of the lake. In less than half a minute, there was only one remaining part of the Big-Eared Mouse that remained.

The Reaper Mantis gently waved her arms, levitating a green magic crystal which she happily caught.

The Flying Dragon Lizard was trembling all over when he saw the Reaper Mantis rushing towards him, which led to him emanating a large shockwave uncontrollably.

In the eyes of the two bystanders, Sickle Weasel and Ryoma, an ultra-perfect Cross-shaped Lightning appeared in front of the Reaper Mantis.

Then, space was split!

The shockwave of the Flying Dragon Lizard was perfectly cut into four halves.

The lightning had split the shockwave backwards, but ingeniously, it managed to avoid conflicting damage to the skin of the Flying Dragon Lizard. All the attack power dissipated right in front of the Flying Dragon Lizard. The Scarlet-Eyed Beast who was still laughing wildly had already ordered its thousands of children to attack the Reaper Mantis. Its body was still struggling in an attempt to escape the fit of laughter.

The body of the Reaper Mantis was faster than the speed of light, cleverly passing through the sky full of bats.

She avoided each of the attacks one by one.

Incomparably, she lightly stopped in front of the Scarlet-Eyed Beast.

Seeing this, the Sickle Weasel and Ryoma suddenly smiled bitterly at each other.

The ultra-perfect Cross Lightning Kill and the Dance of the Trailing Lights were originally the proud skills of the Sickle Weasel and Ryoma respectively. Now, these skills were compatible in someone else's body. The beast had even completely made the skills her own, completely outperforming the original creators.

Upon seeing this scene, it would be weird if both the Sickle Weasel and Ryoma didn't feel bitter.

The Reaper Mantis didn't want to kill the Flying Dragon Lizard and the Scarlet-Eyed monster, she just wanted to let the Law of the Beast Valley recognise the battle between her and the two, just like how it played out with the case of Bai Lu and the Big-Eared Mouse. In this way, when the Flying Dragon Lizard and the Scarlet-Eyed Beast died, the Reaper Mantis could gain the energy of the other parties under the Law of the Beast Valley to improve at a faster rate. Besides the Reaper Mantis's first kill, Bai Lu, and more than twenty monsters after that, there were the double kills of the Flower-Bellied Python and the Big-Eared mouse just now. All of those have become the energy source for her improvement. And her current list will continue to add the Flying Dragon Lizard and Scarlet-Eyed Beast!

Everything was laid out perfectly by Yue Yang.

"Go away, hahaha. It's still, haha, too early for you to kill this Scarlet-Eyed Lord, haha…" Although the Scarlet-Eyed Beast's tone was fierce, its heart was very disturbed.

It attacked frantically.

All kinds of ultimate skills— Sonic Attacks, Sweeping Slashes, Whirling Blows, Scarlet-Eyed Rays, Bat Smoke, Flying Formations— these various attacks emerged in an endless stream. But, it was useless as it was basically accelerating the rate of its own struggling death. Looking at its panicked attacks, it couldn't exert its usual amount of power at all. If it weren't for the resistance of the Reaper Mantis, it would have escaped like the Flying Dragon Lizard.

Hahahahaha!

The bat children in the sky were killed by the Reaper Mantis one by one, but the Scarlet-Eyed Beast, whose speed was getting slower and weaker, could no longer control them.

It fell to the edge of the lake, supporting its own frame using both arms with difficulty.

It kept on immersing its head in the water, hoping to hold back a smile in some way.

Gurgle, gurgle, bubbles started to form. The Scarlet-Eyed Demon couldn't help but laugh wildly even when it dipped its head inside the lake. It sealed its eyes and nose with mud and sand, but the laughter was still trembling in its lungs. When the accumulation reached a certain level, it would break through the mud and sand, laughing a lot more frantically. The Scarlet-Eyed Beast almost suffocated with a straight smile and twitched all over, still unable to stop.

It was in a rage, stuffing a bunch of rag-like material into its throat with force.

Plugging its mouth and nose completely and tightly.

Its body had finally stopped jerking from its uncontrollable fit; its sound of laughter had finally stopped for one brief moment.

Student Yue Yang whistled, grilling a fish from the lake happily. He added seasonings to it from time to time, not even recognising the Scarlet-Eyed Beast in his eyes. In the sky, hundreds of bats fell like raindrops, and finally, death defeated fanaticism. It turns out that there were only a few children of the bat that remained alive, the rest who would rather die in battle were brutally murdered by the Reaper Mantis. The survivors left their father, the Scarlet-Eyed Beast, and fled to the outskirts. The Scarlet-Eyed Beast on the ground too, wanted to stand up and run away.

T/L Note: The author finally clarified the gender, so I'll change the Scarlet-Eyed Beast into a ‘he' prefix instead of an ‘it'.

However, as soon as he moved, his entire chest exploded.

The force was so powerful that it blasted a huge hole in his chest.

It seemed that this pain had to be expressed in the form of screams and hollers to be free from it. The Scarlet Eyed Demon frantically dug out the rags in his throat, intending to vent the unbearable wound with a scream of pain.

However, when he opened his mouth, it was nothing but a creepy cry of laughter, "Hahahaha… ah, please forgive me, hahaha…"

"Scarlet-Eyed Lord, what did you say?" Yue Yang pretended to not be able to hear him clearly.

"Spare me, hahahaha, hahaha…" The Scarlet-Eyed Beast smiled with blood splashing in his mouth and nose.

He had already exploded the lobe of its lung so it was impossible to laugh again.

The fact remains that it won't stop until his death.

Student Yue Yang used the attitude of the Scarlet-Eyed Beast when he teased him before, and opened his hand to his ear to listen, "What did you say? Speak louder!"

How could the Scarlet-Eyed Beast still have the strength to speak. He twitched whilst laughing and countless internal organs exploded. Because of his hysterical laughter, blood kept splashing out of the hole, making the Scarlet-Eyed beast shed tears. At this moment, he just wanted to die quickly. However, the only thing he could do was to continue to laugh in an undying state. During the ten-minute wait for death, his heart popped out of its body as he was still ‘laughing’ in pain.

Tears of regret and blood mixed together.

If the Scarlet-Eyed Beast could turn back time and have a choice, he would definitely rather commit suicide than have Yue Yang as an enemy.

It's just that there was no chance for a retry in his life. At least, a guy like him, who was extremely sinful, rampant and cruel, will not have another chance in life.

At the same time over at the Seven Star Crag, where only Kings were usually allowed to assemble, nearly a hundred beasts were surrounding the dying Flying Dragon Lizard. At this time, the Flying Dragon Lizard's skin and muscles were peeled off as if it was done by a knife, separating that layer from its skeleton. Except for the head, its whole body was exposed in dense bones.

"What kind of curse did that newcomer say?" The Lion King, Toad King, and Human-Faced Tiger were all present, questioning the Flying Dragon Lizard who had escaped.

"No…curse…" The pupils in the eyes of the Flying Dragon Lizard began to dilate and lose its light.

"Wh-what happened? How did it happen? Who did it, Dragon Lizard, what do you want to say? Who is the enemy?" Under such a miserable situation, the Flying Dragon Lizard's Leader, the Eagle King, couldn't help but rush for an answer after seeing the state that its subordinate was in.

Maybe because its leader had arrived, the Flying Dragon Lizard's eyes moved. Its eyes shimmered with a sliver of light and it said weakly, "Don't say that…"

Before it was finished, the skeleton of the Flying Dragon Lizard hollowed, and the skin of the skull seemed to be peeled off by the work of a blade.

A gush of blood poured out.

The Flying Dragon Lizard with only its head, turned into a pale skeleton in full view.

The look of horror made all the beasts onlookers retreat a few steps away, fearing that they would also be contaminated with this curse of disaster.

The Lion King advised the Eagle King to calm down, "When you were fighting at the rear, another newcomer came to the fortress. He should be a disciple of Ji Wu Ri or Zhong Hua. Before the Dragon Lizard died, it had said that the Scarlet-Eyed Beast had investigated the background of the newcomer who just came into the Beast Valley. Brother Toad also confirmed that this news was real. I don’t know if the newcomer acquired Ji Wu Ri or Zhong Hua’s treasure. It was a trigger curse treasure called ‘Pandora's Box'. There were three types of boxes— one of gold, silver, and bronze each. It wouldn't be lethal if he was the one who opened them himself, but once triggered, the one who opened it would be cursed by various divine powers. Pi Yi died of dehydration, Samson died of drowning, Bai Lu exploded, whereas the Dragon Lizard had also said that the curse of the Big-Eared Mouse was aging…"

The Human-Faced Butterfly Wing Poisonous Bee King also came. Seeing such a miserable situation, it shook its head and sighed, "I don't know why you must provoke him; that young man gives me bad feelings. He and Ji Wu Ri and Zhong Hua were the same, they're not people who we can provoke. Not to mention the high-ranking ones in the Central Palace, the Magic Doctor Wei Jinglue, the Ghost-Eye King, and the 6th Pan King, who also humiliated us. I don’t understand why we are going against them; they just wanted to clear the Level, having no intention whatsoever to start a feud with us. Now things are great, you attacked baselessly and killed their beasts, forcing them to form a group to defend themselves and declare war on us. Even if we win this battle in the end, it would only be a miserable victory!"

"The problem now is that even if we wanted to stop the war, I don't think the opposite party would agree to this," The Human-Faced Tiger also felt that this was not the way to go.

"Ghost-Eye King and its beasts have not been cultivated yet, we still have a chance," The Toad King was the most greedy among all the beasts.

"If it hadn’t been for the two failed challengers from the Central Palace and ten thousand beasts, they would have counterattacked long ago. What they were really afraid of was the two Palace Masters second only to Ji Wu Ri! Besides, the newcomer is also dangerous. The Three Chiefs of residents have already stated that they won't care about him. If you all continue to die pointlessly, there would be no second option besides becoming the nutrition for the growth of his newborn beast," The Poisonous Bee King declared that it did not want to provoke Yue Yang again. It also ordered its subordinates to not offend this future rival.

"This newcomer, don’t irk him for the time being. At the very least, don’t mess around before figuring out Pandora's Box. But as for the Magic Doctor and the Ghost-Eye King, we must keep them here and we must grow stronger. The residents are getting stronger and stronger each day, so if we don't fight hard, it will only lead to the clan's fall," The Human-Faced Tiger said worryingly.

"If only you weren't stupid enough to provoke Ji Wu Ri and ZHong Hua. Otherwise, the attacks wouldn't be this heavy," The Poisonous Bee King was angry when he said it.

"Don't argue, we still have a certain advantage," The Lion King hurriedly suppressed the scene.

"Right. If the residents die again, they will just become our subordinates obediently! The Magic Doctor, the Ghost-Eye King and the others already have their beasts face death twice. If we just work harder, they will completely lose the qualifications to pass the Level and become our subordinates. If you miss such an opportunity and don't pounce on it, wouldn't you be sorry for yourself?" The Toad King tried its best to persuade all the other beasts to participate in its combat plan.

"Don't worry, we still have enough time. Those guys' Battle-type Beasts have not really grown yet. Even if they had grown, it was not that easy to pass through the Beast Valley. They are not like Ji Wu Ri and Zhong Hua, whose strength were close to the existence of the Gods, " The Lion King comforted the leaders and reluctantly gathered the beasts with different opinions on the same front.

After the beasts dispersed, the Lion King was thinking about another question.

What was the ‘don't say that' that the Dragon Lizard said? Was this sentence a curse, or did it not say the whole sentence?

If I can clarify the truth of this curse and kill that annoying newcomer, my prestige for domination will undoubtedly be greatly enhanced! Of course, it would be very dangerous. In the Beast Valley, there have been many powerful challengers. The strength of those people were terrifying as once they were provoked, it was practiaclly tantamount to suicide.

Since there was no hope anymore,I better just settle for the status quo and don't think too much.

So as not to cause a ‘murder’.

In the Beast Valley, because of the terrifying curse caused by Pandora's Box, there was a wave of panic about the Divine Power of Calamity's curse everywhere. Within a hundred miles, except for the wild beasts without intelligence, no one dared to provoke Yue Yang. Even the Sickle Weasel and Ryoma who were tracking him all the way resorted to just stalking him from far away, not daring to walk within ten kilometers of the Yue Yang's center of activity.

Time passed, day by day.

The Reaper Mantis also grew day by day. Now, if they considered the wings on her back, she had grown to the size of a palm.

The energy cultivation of the resident Bai Lu, the Scarlet-Eyed Beast, the Big-Eared Mouse, the Flower-Bellied Python, and the Flying Dragon Lizard helped immensely. Especially the first four, and more than 20 beasts killed in between, the Reaper Mantis obtained Fighting Energy.
