chapters.title: Chapter 864 Battle-Beast Shells
chapters.body:
Chapter 864 Battle-Beast Shells

Chapter 864: Battle-Beast Shells

The Toad King, who was enjoying the feeling of being massaged by a few female beasts, was met with bad news.

The Lightning Lizard arrived quickly.

It reported, “The newcomer’s beast had exited from the Spirit Beast Great Hall.”

Upon hearing the news, theToad King was furious, “Damn, a dozen guys who boast of being the best killers in the Beast Valley, can’t kill even a small thing despite being given the best timing and place? Incompetent, they are all incompetent fools! I knew that I shouldn’t have believed this group of proud guys, but I had even given them a chance rather kindly. Unexpectedly, they completely disappointed all of my expectations of them! I will hang each and every single one of them onto gallows and we’ll see which idiot dares to continue boasting!”

The Lightning Lizard was spat on by the King Toad’s spurs of saliva, but it didn’t dare to wipe it off. Proceeding to only reply weakly, “My King, I’m afraid those guys won’t come out from the Spirit Beast Great Hall, because… They are all dead!”

The Toad King was taken aback, “They are all dead?”

The Lightning Lizard was so frightened that it didn’t dare to lift his head, “There should be no one left. That little thing that came out of the Spirit Beast Great Hall had not only gotten the golden token [1] that is only available on the third floor, but she had also raised it by one level. If she hadn’t killed more than a dozen assassins who attacked her, how could she possibly raise its level?”

T/L Note: [1] It looks like a rectangular name plate made of gold, usually chinese characters would be engraved on it as a symbol of status.

The Toad King became even more furious and he continued to curse, “Those imbeciles deserved to die. Not only were they unable to kill her, but they even became her energy nourishment. Gods, is there anything in the world that could possibly be worse than this?”

“My King…” The Lightning Lizard didn’t dare to report further.

“Is there anything worse than this damned news? Did more creepy, useless and disgusting things happen? Speak, I don’t care if I hear bad news anymore; what could be worse than her killing off a dozen killers? Tell me. I’m listening, so just spill all the bad news all at once!” The Toad King was trembling with anger, and it took the utmost will to not throw the currently reporting Lightning Lizard into its mouth and eat it.

“Because they are worried that the other parties will blame each other, both the Human-Faced Tiger and the Eagle King have sent their subordinates to clarify their innocence. The Poisonous Queen Bee and the Lion King’s subordinates have directly proclaimed that it was your order… My King, in my opinion, the Lion King and the Poisonous Queen Bee have the intention of joining forces with this superb newcomer,” The Lightning Lizard immediately ran away as soon as it finished speaking.

It was really afraid that the Toad King would swallow it in a rage.

After hearing this, it was not angry, quite surprisingly .

On the contrary, it let out a laugh that was worse than crying, “This is normal because that newcomer has risen in the ranks way too fast. It would be strange if they didn’t take a few actions! But then, it won’t be so lucky for them from now as this King wants to deal with them in person. To hell with Pandora’s Box, that kid will definitely not be able to enter the 3rd level Rolling Stone test site— what’s the big deal if he has that Divine Power of Calamity? If they think that this King is just a person, then they are sorely mistaken… After so many years, it’s about time for the five Beast Kings to swap positions, hahahahaha!”

As soon as this kind of laughter came out from its throat, the female beasts who were massaging the Toad King shivered with fright.

Usually, when the Toad King laughs, someone would be met with misfortune.

Perhaps the Beast Valley would flow into a river of blood…

Student Yue Yang was looking at the golden token in his hand repeatedly. It was obtained by the Reaper Mantis in the extremely dangerous area in the lowest level of the Spirit Beast Great Hall. Because of this, she had been too close to danger several times. Fortunately, with her own high wisdom and Yue Yang’s teachings, she survived without any problems.

With the golden token, the Reaper Mantis could finally get rid of the identity of her newborn beast status and become a high-leveled Elite Battle-type Beast of the Beast Valley.

Getting the token was just the first task.

The second was to test the impromptu reaction of the beast.

There were three options for this task— ‘easy’, ‘normal’ and ‘difficult’.

The easiest way was to shoot arrows. As long as you could hit an apple with three consecutive arrows within 100 meters, you will pass if the piglet on the top of the apple remains undamaged as well.

The medium challenge was to throw spears quickly. After the test starts, ten different powerful bouncing mushroom balls will be thrown into the sky each time, five times altogether. If all targets were hit, or if none of the mushrooms and spear misses, it would be considered a pass. Because the mushroom balls are powerfully bouncing and colliding with each other in mid-air, they are very likely to change their own flight trajectories, which is why only a few beasts have had the capability to complete this ‘ordinary’ challenge.

The ‘difficult’ level of challenge was one of the most insane tests in the Beast Valley.

Since history, there has never been a person who has completely succeeded in challenging the difficult level in the Beast Valley!

Not even once!

Even if everyone knew that there was a Wisdom Fruit reward after this test was completed, very few people actually dared to try.

Because this test was too difficult.

The challengers usually wouldn’t even have the courage to try!

This challenge goes like this— it requires the cooperation between the owner and the beast. The owner must use a slingshot, or a slingshot-shaped launcher, to launch their beast, and the beast would play the role of a cannonball. Under the restrictions of the Law, no skills and power can be used. The only exception would be if someone successfully passes a test, then the Law would temporarily reward them with the possibility of passing down techniques to help the beast hit the target.

If you make a mistake, fail, or project the shot at the wrong place, then the Battle-type Beast that acted as a cannonball will most definitely die ugly as things will be progressively harder. Only when the team was guaranteed to succeed ten times can the level be cleared, which would in turn earn a reward of a Fruit of Wisdom.

Back then, the Prison Emperor had tried this difficult level test.

But after launching three times, even if all three levels were successfully maintained, he was frightened to the point where he had broken out in a cold sweat and he didn’t dare to continue.

Empress Fei Wen Li’s performance was better as she tried it six times.

They all succeeded too.

But on the seventh time, even her enemies advised her not to try again, lest this historic record be destroyed. She was the first to complete the act of launching six times successfully in tens of thousands of years. Of course, she was not actually the highest record holder in the history of the Beast Valley. It has been said that one hundred thousand years ago, there was a predecessor with insane intelligence who had fired the Battle-type Beast nine times, all of which were successful.

At that time, the companion of that intellectual demon had also advised him not to take up the last challenge should he fall short.

After a day of thinking, the intellectual demon took a risk, but unfortunately he failed. He couldn’t get the reward of the well-known Wisdom Fruit and caused the Battle-type Beast to die a tragic death.

“What? That kid is going to try the Battle-Beast Shells test? Did he go crazy?” When the Toad King heard of the news, it was stunned and couldn’t believe it.

“Is this true?” The Lion King, Eagle King and Human-Faced Tiger were also in disbelief.

“Does he have what it takes to challenge the level of the Battle-Beast Shells? That thing is impossible to succeed at!” On the surface, the Poisonous Queen Bee wanted to express her congratulations, but she kept on secretly discouraging it in her heart. As for the Sickle Weasel and Ryoma who were staying nearby, they couldn’t help but rush to persuade Yue Yang. They have never seen anyone who tried and succeeded. Even that God-like Ji Wu Ri had tried it out twice, before he eventually gave up.

Attempting the Battle-Beast Shells was no different from sending the beasts to their deaths.

In the test site, there were ice pools on one side and fire pools on the other. There were even sharp-edged walls, poison wells and even quicksand vortexes.

In short, as long as the beast shells made a mistake and fell outside the test area, then it would be as good as dead.

No matter how powerful the beast is, the Law of the Beast Valley will deprive it of all abilities as soon as it enters the test field. As long as it fails, it would be equivalent to watching the beast die!

For this difficult test, even the success rate of one out of ten was considered very hard.

When separated by a tall tower, the beast must be fired out and hit itself against the tower made of wood, stones, and pointed spears like a cannonball. There is a pig in the tower, and the challenger has only one launching opportunity to kill the pig protected inside. If the tower does not fall, or if the pig remains undead, it would be considered a failure.

In other words, it must succeed as there is no possibility of failure and trying again!

“Can you guys just calm down? Is this that difficult? I think it’s easy. Step aside, don’t get in my way!” Yue Yang kicked the Sickle Weasel and Ryoma unceremoniously.

“Are you really going to make Battle-type Beast shells?” The Poisonous Queen Bee asked the Reaper Mantis quietly in a secret language.

“Mhmm,” the Reaper Mantis nodded cutely.

She had absolute confidence in the owner.

Even in death, her trust in him will not be shaken.

Student Yue Yang didn’t offer her a lot of comfort, encouragement, or anything like others would normally do. He directly picked up the Reaper Mantis and placed her on the launcher of the slingshot. The body of the Reaper Mantis was surrounded by a gleaming spherical light shell by the power of Law, which made her look like a small cannonball. In fact, regardless of whether the beast was big or small, the launching power would be exactly the same, and any innate ability and power of the beast during the launching process would be rendered useless. Besides becoming a Battle-Beast Shell, the beast would have no use at this moment.

Perhaps, maintaining their trust towards their owners and cooperating with the launch tacitly would be the greatest performance of the beast.

The Toad King and Lion King have not rushed over yet as they were still a bit far away.

But both the Eagle King and the Poisonous Queen Bee were here.

There were other monsters and more than a dozen residents, all of whom looked at Yue Yang like he was a lunatic.

In the Beast Valley, there hasn’t been a challenger who would take on the Beast Shells test for a hundred years. This kid is really crazy enough. I hope he will not fail too fast. Otherwise, there would be nothing to look forward to.

Except for a limited number of people, namely the Poisonous Bee Queen, the Sickle Weasel and Ryoma, every other beast or resident felt that Yue Yang would fail with one shot.

In the history of Beast Valley, there have been more than a few fools who failed at the first shot.

Some extremely stupid and self-righteous guys chose one of the most difficult tests. As a result, as soon as the shot was fired, they found that they themselves had a hand in killing their beasts, even making it go through a painfully excruciating death!

“Are you not going to calculate it?” The Sickle Weasel didn’t care about itself being exposed. It wiped its sweat profusely and persuaded, “In fact, there is no time limit, you can calculate it slowly!”

“Yes, it’s not bad to launch after the calculation is clear. The strength, angle, and direction, etc…. all of that must be calculated carefully!” Ryoma was also trying to persuade him.

“For such a simple thing, do you still need to use calculations?” Yue Yang was full of disdain.

“What a fool!”

“The beast is dead for sure…”

Seeing that Yue Yang was so arrogant, everyone knew that there would not be much of a show. Guys with arrogant attitudes like Yue Yang were usually the densest scumbags. Wanting to succeed without rigorous calculations was harder than waiting for pies to fall from the sky! Even if it was calculated, it would not necessarily be successful. Three thousand years ago, there was a wise old man who made calculations for three days and three nights. Then, he experimented for one day and one night to make sure that he did not miss anything. But when he finally launched the beast out, he failed. There would never be success without calculating, as that was absolutely impossible.

Even the easiest level of shooting an apple required a good amount of calculation of the angle, strength, and wind direction.

The Sickle Weasel and Ryoma tried to persuade him again.

Unexpectedly, Yue Yang was very fast. He stretched his slingshot and in a blink of an eye, he launched the Reaper Mantis with a ‘swish’. The Reaper Mantis, wrapped in the light of the Law, drew a parabola from a distance as she crossed the first tower and smashed halfway through the second tower. The entire tower shook before it collapsed with a rumble.

The piglet inside was as ‘dead’ as it could get as its ashes were blown by the wind.

The Reaper Mantis, who was wrapped in the light of the Law, teleported back in an instant and landed back in Yue Yang’s palm.

W-was that a success?

Was it that simple?

Everyone’s eyes fell out of their sockets [2].

T/L Note: [2] Extreme shock. Your eyes become really WIDELY OPENED.

========================================================================

========================================================================

[TL note]:

It’s been a month since I’ve started tl-ing LLS, so it’s not unfamiliar territory (not much anyway, still some confusion though) but please do let me know if there were terms that I have used incorrectly like the names etc. Thanks and look forward to the release!

-Sterling

chapters.title: Chapter 865 Luck, Insanity Or Confidence?
chapters.body:
Chapter 865 Luck, Insanity Or Confidence?

Chapter 865: Luck, Insanity Or Confidence?

“That was some serious luck?”

“Impossible! there must be something wrong with my eyes!”

“It must have happened by chance, this is definitely not his own strength. He will not succeed if he does it again, I guarantee it!”

“That was absolutely unbelievable, I can’t think straight. How did that happen?”

“Oh my God!”

“My eyes aren’t tricking me, right? Did you see him succeed? Is this true? Seriously? Hey, I think my brain is slightly malfunctioning. That success was too sudden, and I didn’t have any mental preparation beforehand! Did he really succeed?”

“I was going to say that he would fail. The word ‘failure’ was already lodged in my throat, but hell, he succeeded!”

When the onlookers and the beasts reacted, they all jumped frantically as if they were the ones who were launched as cannons. The atmosphere was rather chaotic with their exclamations

Their expressions were full of amazement.

Only the Eagle King and the Poisonous Bee Queen looked at Yue Yang in horror.

The two leaders with King-level strength have enough visionary abilities to see that this was not a coincidence at all,— it was all completely from his own source of strength. The reason why this young man succeeded was because he had enough confidence. Otherwise, he would not be able to casually launch his beast that was trained into a Holy Beast at will. He must be certain, although they didn’t know where this certainty of his came from!

Could it be that the wisdom of this young man could not be stumped even in the second task, which was actually commonly acknowledged as the most difficult test to go through?

The Sickle Weasel and Ryoma looked at Yue Yang blankly at first.

Both were in a state of disbelief for a moment.

But after getting the absolute affirmation of his success, the two couldn’t help but embrace each other and let out a few cheers as tears of excitement gushed out. Now, they have truly made up their minds— no matter what, they must follow this young man. He can definitely create miracles and can definitely bring towards their freedom!

The choice of the Poisonous Queen Bee was not wrong either. This young man with such outstanding wisdom was indeed the most trustworthy.

When everyone thought he would fail, he could easily achieve it.

In the blink of an eye, everyone was figuratively slapped on the face by his achievement!

Boom!

In the test field, the power of the Law has reset the field. There were now three high towers protruding from the ground. Among them, the piglet to be killed was in the middle tower. In addition, there were four huge rocks uplifted in all four directions to ensure that there would be no way to make a straight-lined shot against the tower. The worst part was that all three towers were supported by tree stumps around them. Even if the shot managed to hit the tower, it would be unlikely for them to fall. And if the tower does not fall, the piglet hiding in the middle tower would not die.

Student Yue Yang took a look before he placed the Reaper Mantis on the slingshot launcher.

“Wait, it’s different from what it was just now, so think about it first,” The Sickle Weasel hurried up to stop Yue Yang. Even the blind could also see that these three towers were much more difficult to hit compared to what it was before.

“There’s no time limit, so you can take however long you want. If you need it, we can be the examples to simulate it for you,” Ryoma was even willing to simulate itself into a Battle-Beast shell for Yue Yang to practice his skills and gain experience before attempting the actual thing.

“For such a simple thing, there is no need to go through all that trouble,” Yue Yang pulled the slingshot launcher and let it go.

Whoosh!

The Reaper Mantis wrapped in the light of the Law was once again launched like a cannonball.

The onlookers were dumbfounded again— was this kid really stupid or is he just messing around? He didn’t even think of anything and made the shot just like that; did he think that he was a God?

No one would fail this test if it was that easy to succeed. If that was truly the case, why would there be so many losers in the Beast Valley? If so, could the unprecedented record of the Beast Valley remain the same and unbroken?

From this point of view, if this kid was not naturally born as an idiot, then he might have a few screws loose.

Doesn’t he know what failure is?

Without letting the onlookers ponder too much, the ball of light that was enveloping the Reaper Mantis had already drawn a beautiful arc and landed far at the base of the last high tower. The ones with particularly sharp eyesight like the King-level leaders Eagle King and the Poisonous Bee Queen, or the residents and beasts with special sensory abilities, figured that the light ball where the Reaper Mantis was located had accelerated slightly before hitting the foundation of the tower.

The well-informed senior monsters or senior residents have heard of the second Battle-Beast Shell test.

In the second test, the beast that was wrapped in the Law would temporarily gain the ‘Flying Collision’ skills, which would aid in accelerating movement and aggravating the impact.

It’s just that no one knew why this ability was acquired and why it wasn’t any other ability. If the mystery of the Flying Collision could be solved, then they believed that many intelligent people were very likely to calculate the greatest success rate.

Rumble!

The Reaper Mantis first broke a supporting log like a cannonball.

Then, she was slammed into the base of the third tall tower, smashing a deep hole in it as the third tall tower shook. “Ah, this is bad!” The oldest beast exclaimed, “The shaking angle is not enough and the force of the impact is not strong enough either. Last time, Lord Hong Lie failed just like this.”

“So it was a coincidence just now!” the Toad King’s men could not wait to exclaim in pride.

“Go on, keep moving!” The two expressions of the Sickle Weasel and Ryoma were tense as they held their breath. They were both rubbing their hands vigorously, as if doing so would help shake the tower. The Poisonous Queen Bee no longer looked at the swaying tower, and instead, diverted her gaze at Yue Yang. She found that student Yue Yang was smiling, his confident expression making the Poisonous Queen Bee stunned and relieved at the same time. How could he just casually launch his beast to death? Sure enough, he had absolute confidence that it would succeed, so why am I still worried about him? This is so stupid!

The third tower has been shaking.

The Toad King’s men kept yelling for it to stop, but there were other beasts that yelled for it to keep shaking.

They felt that it was a pity should he just fail like this. It’s better to let this kid succeed again, and then look at his painful expression when he fails a harder test later on.

It’s too early for this kid to lose now; it’s better to lose at the fourth or the fifth times. When that happens, the look of the bitter and saddened expression of that kid would be the most satisfying thing to watch. So, they would rather let this kid remain proud for a while! The beasts were making a ruckus, jumping and screaming about, whereas some of them were nice enough to give the tower a blow to add some force. Although all of these were useless, they had a lot of fun.

The tower gradually tilted, and finally, it hit the middle tower.

However, the strength was insufficient. The tall tower in the middle shook for a while, but it did not collapse.

Did he fail?

All the onlookers began to express looks of despair as the subordinates of the Toad King screamed wildly. What does it mean if the middle tower did not topple? It means that the little piglet will not die. Hence, the challenge was a failure!

Just when everyone thought the failure was affirmative, suddenly, the third collapsed tower slipped down a bit. Although it was not enough to collapse the middle tower, it successfully smashed the spire of the middle tower. The spire fell down, stumbling, before it finally hit half of the first tower. With a bang, several long spears were smashed from their midsection.

The broken spears broke off and turned into flying arrows.

Surging.

One of them cleverly passed through the window of the tall tower in the middle, impaling the piglet inside.

The piglet hit the spear and exploded immediately.

And the Death Praying Mantis, which was floating under the base of the third tower was instantly teleported back to Yue Yang’s hands. The people watching on the sidelines of the test site were flabbergasted once again. This kid is way too lucky, right? From the original doomed failure, it changed time and time again, to the point where there was even something as futile as a broken spear that was the killing blow of the little piglet. If it hadn’t been for such a shot, this kid would have failed!

Needless to say, this was definitely luck!

No matter how smart anyone could be, it would be impossible to calculate this.

None of the spectators had any objections when they arrived at this conclusion. Everyone thought that Yue Yang made random explosions of luck, and even the frightened Sickle Weasel and Ryoma didn’t dare to guess that this was calculated long ago.

Only the Eagle King and the Poisonous Queen Bee shook their heads, sighing.

In the eyes of the two King-level leaders, if this was not calculated early, then there would be no such thing as a calculated plan in the world.

Not only was it calculated early on, but he had also taken the acceleration point and the aggravated falling points into consideration. If it weren’t for the shot hitting the log and breaking it, the third tower would not have collapsed toward the middle tower. If the shot had hit at a spot just slightly above the base, then the third tower would not have hit the spire of the middle tall tower. If it didn’t hit the spire, then it would not have fallen onto those few spears that were meant as obstacles for the Battle-Beast Shells.

If it hadn’t hit the spears that blocked the tower, there would have been no such result!

This was most definitely not a coincidence.

They were both 100% sure— the young man had calculated all these in advance for sure. It’s just that his calculation speed was too overwhelming, not even showing the others the methods of his calculations. The accuracy of launching his beast was much greater than other challengers who calculated for days and nights!

Faced with such an insanely talented newcomer, the Eagle King and the Poisonous Queen Bee have nothing to say.

When everyone thought that those sharp spears were used to stop Battle-Beast shells, this young man flipped the thought and used them to succeed.

And he did it with such ease.

He achieved results that others couldn’t despite all their hard work!

“Y-you, do you still want to launch more?” The spectator beasts and residents were shocked when they discovered that student Yue Yang was ready to launch again.

“I’m dizzy!” Some beasts couldn’t bear the powerful anxiousness with their hearts.

“Can’t you let us catch our breath?” Some residents felt that their nerves were almost snapped.

“Take a rest, time is really not a problem!” Even the Eagle King couldn’t watch any longer before it spoke to persuade him.

The test field on the opposite side has been reset. Eight towers, five of which were on the ground, and three small towers, which were supported by rocks. This time, there were as many as three piglets that had to be killed instead of one.

A Battle-Beast shell had to cross four rock walls, blast through five tall towers, collapse three small towers and kill three piglets.

Is this possible?

I believe that even the craziest lunatic in the world will shake his head when he sees it, thinking that it would simply be impossible!

Student Yue Yang stroked the small forehead of the Reaper Mantis. He locked her lips with his own into a light kiss through the light of the Law before he put her on the slingshot launcher. What others saw was a kiss of encouragement, but only the Poisonous Queen Bee remained the most focused as she watched them carefully. In fact, Yue Yang had said something to the little one, so there must be some tactic in play.

To complete the second test, the beast must cooperate tacitly. However, as the third test is now more difficult, cooperation between the two would be more than essential.

The Poisonous Queen Bee didn’t know what Yue Yang had said to the Reaper Mantis.

However, the small face of Reaper Mantis still portrayed a smile, obviously confident in her owner. When he was putting her on the slingshot launcher, she still clenched her small fists amidst the light of the Law, seeming to cheer for herself.

Whoosh!

Yue Yang ignored the expressions of the people around him and directly fired at the Battle-Beast shell of the Reaper Mantis.

Unlike the previous times, he took one brief second to aim his shot.

The Reaper Mantis that was wrapped in the light of the Law had once again drawn a perfect parabola as she flew towards the target of the test field. All the while, the onlookers looked at student Yue Yang’s gaze.

There was the same expression on everyone’s faces.

Shit, this kid is an actual lunatic!

chapters.title: Chapter 866 Destined To Never Be Yours...
chapters.body:
Chapter 866 Destined To Never Be Yours...

Chapter 866: Destined To Never Be Yours…

When the Toad King rushed to the test site, he found that there were a thousand onlookers in the audience.

Yue Yang and the Reaper Mantis, however, were nowhere to be found.

It felt strange to the Toad King. Did that kid fail? Had he left to find his resurrected beast? That kid was crazy enough to challenge these difficult-level tests casually; it would be strange if he didn’t fail! Thinking of this, the large stone that was dangling in its heart had finally been set down. If that kid succeeded, there was no need to mention the Lion King, the ruler of the Beast Valley that had a habit of making sure it would be protected, the Eagle King and the Human-Faced Tiger, or even the Poisonous Queen Bee who never believed in anyone but herself. It would remain a fact that these four would flock over to his good side and treat the Toad King badly should the kid succeed.

“In which level did the kid fail?” The Toad King found its subordinate, Lightning Lizard, and pretended to ask it. “Ten levels…” The Lightning Lizard’s voice trembled.

“What are you talking about? He failed at the tenth Level? Hahaha, I already said that he would fail. No one has ever passed the most difficult level. In the history of the Beast Valley, there has not been a challenger to successfully pass all the levels, and the scum of a brat thinks he can do it? How arrogant of him!” King Toad sneered on the surface, but it was quite a shock internally.

“No, that’s not it, it’s not like that,” The Lightning Lizard swallowed hard and secretly looked up at the Toad King, weakly muttering, “I mean, that person has passed all ten Levels.”

“All ten Levels? How can this be possible?!” The Toad King was shocked to the point where it couldn’t believe its ears.

“That is an irrefutable fact that this subordinate has seen with my own eyes. I would never dare to deceive you, my King, as everyone had bore witness to it as well,” The Lightning Lizard was ready to escape immediately.

“Besides, that kid only took an hour,” Bobcat, the Lion King’s subordinate, also added.

“If I knew that the reward of completing all ten levels was the high-level ‘Holy Fruit of Wisdom’, I would have tried it even if it would cost my life,” the old mandrill Long Hair murmured and sighed. Now even if it wanted to take the test, it has already lost its qualifications.

Only new challengers were eligible for the test.

Another category of people who qualified to take the test were none other than the residents who stayed behind after failing.

As for the challengers who have died and turned into beasts, they felt nothing but jealousy. Once they became beasts, they were not eligible to take the test ever again.

The Toad King heard that something was amiss.

Holy Fruit of Wisdom?

What is this stuff, why haven’t I heard of it?

The old mandrill Long Hair immediately assumed the stance of ‘I am the wise sage of the legendary seas’, stroking its beard and then using a walking stick to tap the ground. The old mandrill walked a few steps and let out a cough. It was a pity that no one cooperated with it to offer a cup of tea, wine or something of all sorts. Otherwise, its aura would be even greater. The Toad King was so angry that he felt smoke emanating from his being. What are you pretending to be in front of me? If it wasn’t to give the Lion King a bit of respect, I would have killed you with one slap or swallowed you whole! Under the gaze of nearly a thousand beasts and residents, the old mandrill began to explain to everyone, “The Holy Fruit of Wisdom— this is an extremely rare thing to obtain in the Upper Heaven Realm as the Lower Heaven Realm has none. This kind of treasure can only be found in the Blessed Earth Sky Cave, where the superiors that had levels close to the Gods live.”

As soon as it said, the beasts and the residents showed worshipful gazes.

A few guys cheered on the spot.

That was the Holy Fruit of Wisdom just now?

No wonder it looked different from ordinary wisdom fruit.

Someone asked in a low voice, “How useful is this Holy Fruit of Wisdom that was labelled as such an awesome treasure?”

Although the onlookers saw that Yue Yang had just received this reward, the Lion King, Eagle King, Human-Faced Tiger and the Poisonous Queen Bee were all interested in befriending him. Hence, they did not dare to step forward and rob him of the Holy Fruit. Of course, the most important reason behind their reluctant actions was because they were afraid of student Yue Yang’s Pandora’s Box. They knew that box was not something to mess with lightly.

The old mandrill showed off like a persecutor before it looked at the audience at last, saying, “The Holy Fruit of Wisdom, as the name suggests, is a treasure of the Holy Rank. Its power is more than a hundred times the ordinary Fruit of Wisdom. Its power will not only be 100 times stronger than that of an ordinary fruit. Should it be ingested by beasts of elementary intelligence, their level of wisdom would be raised exponentially and immediately; should it be taken by higher wisdom beasts, their ranks would gradually improve to become a Quasi-Holy Beast. It is said that in the Heaven Realm, there are some Quasi-Holy Beasts that could no longer improve their wisdom by any means. When they cannot grow into Holy Beasts, they would search for this kind of Holy Fruit of Wisdom at all costs. The promoted Quasi-Holy Beast would also be very likely to break through the spiritual barrier, unlock its great wisdom, and become a Holy Beast!”

Hiss!

All of the onlookers slurped a gulp of saliva as soon as they heard those words.

Towards such a treasure, it would be a lie if they didn’t feel jealous. Even the most purest of hearts would salivate at the thought when faced with the precious Holy Fruit of Wisdom.

The mouth of the Toad King became a waterfall of saliva.

Dripping.

It flowed all over the place!

“If you are already a Holy Beast, what will happen if you eat the Holy Fruit of Wisdom?” Someone asked this question.

“Hmph!” The old mandrill basked in its adamantly confident aura, “If a Holy Beast eats it, it will be even more remarkable. This is because the higher level of intelligence the beast has, the more it would benefit from ingesting the Fruit. This concept is entirely opposite to the ordinary Fruit of Wisdom!”

“Are you saying that, if the Holy Beast eats the Holy Fruit of Wisdom, it has a chance to become a Divine Beast?” The questioner’s voice kept trembling with excitement.

“Hehe, the chances… are pretty big!” When the old mandrill said so, the audience was in an uproar.

If the little thing who was already a Holy Beast really ate the Holy Fruit of Wisdom, wouldn’t the Beast Valley produce a Divine Beast? If a Divine Beast comes to this world, will the Beast Valley be the same as it was now? The same people who offended the insane newcomer before would probably have to pay the price for upsetting him, right?

Now, the onlookers looked at the Toad King.

Its expression was like seeing a misfortunate plague.

All of them couldn’t help but retreat farther from the Toad King, lest they would be involved in the feud of the two.

Even the Lightning Lizard of the Toad King dare not get too close to its leader. One of the reasons was because when the Toad King becomes angry, it likes to eat people; the other reason is because misfortune incidences like these were really contagious. Believe it or not, that insane newcomer worked best with curses and his best skill was to use the Divine Power of Calamity to toruture others. Perhaps the Toad King had already been cursed by him. The Toad King’s face was now ugly, looking as if it had been constipated for a month.

It glanced around.

Everyone was cautiously guarding themselves against it, fearing that it would break out if it was hit hard.

However, the Toad King suddenly laughed, and the terrible laughter made the surrounding beasts and residents retreat further.

“Pui! A mere 2nd-Level Heaven Ranked beast wants to frighten me? So what if it is a Holy Beast? Did I not own a Holy Beast in my time here as a challenger? Would this Lord become a toad had it not been a Fire Fighting Spirit that killed my Sky Frog Demon, which resulted in me becoming like this? And although I have turned into this form, I can still look down on you weak imbeciles! Besides the Lion King and the Leader of the Three Chiefs and the residents, Darius, which one amongst you can say that you are my opponent?” The Toad King laughed wildly as its belly trembled, “Look, you poor beasts, I will show you. To hell with your Holy Beasts, future Divine Beasts; they will become lowly scum that would be at the same standing as my faeces! If there really is any sort of Divine Beast in the Beast Valley, that would be me!”

“Ah, my king…you have already become a beast!” The Lightning Lizard weakly reminded its boss that the time for daydreaming had passed as the beasts were not eligible to participate in the test, let alone obtain the Holy Fruit of Wisdom.

“Everyone thinks so, don’t they?” The Toad King laughed wildly.

Its ugly body shuddered suddenly.

A foul-smelling mucus oozes out of its densely uneven skin warts.

Immediately afterwards, from the poison sac behind its eyes, a naked man emerged from the white venom as he grinned evilly as he looked down at the stunned beasts around him.

T/L Note: I can finally label him as a ‘He’ now, yayyyyy.

P/F Note: Finally lmaoo

Unbelievably, the Toad King is still a resident and not a beast.

For thousands of years, he has fooled everyone.

It turns out that he was a resident who could fight alongside the beasts!

The Lightning Lizard was trembling with excitement, “My king, are you really a resident? Then why didn’t you become the leader of the residents, but chose to fight to be the king of the beasts?”

The evil man sneered, “Nonsense. My Battle Beast has actually only died once, so how can I not be a resident? As for why I should be the King of Beasts and not the leader of the residents, the reason is actually very simple. One is that there are too few residents and they have already become devout followers; I wouldn’t be able to hire large numbers. The second reason is that the Eagle King and the Human-Faced Tiger were struggling against the Lion King. Hence, my appearance seemed to coincide with that and so I joined them as a beast king.”

The old mandrill stood out, “Even if you are a resident, what about it? Even if you can fight with your beast as one, it would also be a command of consciousness. Your toad can’t improve in wisdom, so no matter how strong it is, it would be useless. And even if it was powerful, is it as strong as the Lion King? Without wisdom, you would never get out of the Beast Valley!”

After hearing this, the evil man looked up to the sky and laughed like a maniac.

He pointed to the old mandrill Long Hair and yelled coldly, “Scram, old man, I will show you what my great plan is!”

An eagle-headed beast rushed to the front of the evil man and knelt down respectfully.

Under the gaze of everyone, the Eagle Head dug out one of its own eyes as it resisted the pain and handed it to the evil man.

The evil man asked, “Are you sure you have completely copied that kid’s actions with the ‘Eagle Eye’?”

The Eagle Head replied respectfully,”It’s absolutely the same.”

The man laughed before he punched a hole and embedded the eyeball in his forehead. Countless white mucus and tentacle-like granulation exuded from the bloody hole. It glued the wound and the granulation penetrated into the eyeball, perfectly connecting it within a few seconds. As the evil man laughed triumphantly, “After waiting for thousands of years, I finally got what I wanted. Whether it is the Fruit of Wisdom or the Holy Fruit of Wisdom, I don’t care because I want them both!”

Now, the onlookers understood.

This Toad King had planned it for a long time.

Regardless of whether the opponent succeeded in the challenge, he had all the benefits.

If Yue Yang had failed, then the opponent’s strength would be greatly damaged and the Toad King no longer had to remain afraid. He probably would use all the means he had to make sure Yue Yang wouldn’t escape from his grasp anyways. But even if he succeeded, the Toad King would not lose anything. On the contrary, because the eagle head beast’s secret technique, ‘Eagle Eye’ has copied the opponent’s successful technique, he too, will soon obtain the Holy Fruit of Wisdom.

If the Toad King obtains the Holy Fruit of Wisdom, the Beast Valley will be a goner. Blood will flow and become a river whereas corpses will be littered all over the field.

The evil man waved his hand.

After the huge toad jumped onto the slingshot launcher, it immediately shrank under the energy of the Law, forming a Battle-Beast Shell.

According to the ‘Eagle Eye’ who copied Yue Yang’s firing angle and skills, the evil man fired smartly, perfectly launching the toad shells.

Rumble!

The first hit was successful— a great success!

It was exactly the same as Yue Yang’s previous launch, which was not bad at all.

It took less than a minute for the toad beast to teleport back to the palm of the evil man.

The beasts and residents on the sidelines cursed silently. Could this ‘Eagle Eye’ really copy the techniques perfectly?

“With a successful precedent, Holy Fruit of Wisdom, just wait for me to eat you! Ahahaha!” The evil man laughed arrogantly and the Lightning Lizard wanted to remind him that no matter how precious the Holy Fruit of Wisdom was, it could only be eaten by beasts. Humans will definitely become idiots after eating that fruit. However, it dared not step forward to correct the language of the sentence as it proceeded to shrink in the corner and quietly wait for the result.

Whoosh!

The second toad shell continued to fly out, the angle and technique exactly the same as when Yue Yang launched the Reaper Mantis before.

Rumble!

Just when everyone was discouraged, downcast, ready to leave, and couldn’t bear to look at the scene again, the Bobcat suddenly screamed, “This isn’t right. Although the supporting log broke, the base fell on the wrong point, and the angle of inclination of the third tower is also a little different. However, the most important thing is that the tip of the middle tower fell down but the short spear of the tallest tower didn’t break. Wow, wow, that piglet is still alive. He failed! The foolproof copy has failed!”

Everyone looked up and was surprised to find out.

The short spear didn’t break entirely, but it stuck to the tip of the tower in the slightest bit.

The falling direction of the center spire changed. It hit the ground and the rubble crashed. One of the large boulders even hit the toad that was in the light ball of the Law.

The toad in the ball of light immediately rolled up slowly towards the edge of the lava pool. “No, no, don’t!” The evil man was going crazy and he desperately wanted it to stop, but the cruel reality made him want to fly into the test field and personally rescue the dying toad. He couldn’t figure it out—it’s obviously the exact same action, so why did he fail? And why did that kid succeed! He has now accepted the failure, but hopes that the toad will not fall into the pool and die. Once he falls into the pool and dies, the toad will have only one last chance.

If the Lion King, Eagle King, Human-Faces Tiger and Poisonous Queen Bee swarm to attack him, then he will truly become a beast.

Then, he will never be able to leave the Beast Valley.

There would even be a risk of death!

“No, no, no!” The evil man yelled frantically.Should it be luck or some other reason, the toad in the ball of light only rolled to the edge of the lava pool before it stopped.

At an extremely dangerous point.

But in the end, it didn’t fall into the lava pool. This made the beast onlookers sigh one by one. What a pity, it was just a bit more!

The sharp-eyed Bobcat still hadn’t given up, pointing to the test site and shouting, “Look, the spire is shattered and the cobblestone is still rolling. It’s rolling towards the toad…”

“Come on, go and knock off that dirty toad!” Normally the beasts would never dare to shout like this, but they were so excited that they had completely forgotten that the Toad King was by their side. One by one, as if they were injected with some sort of dosage, they jumped up and down with excitement. They wanted to rush in and give it a kick to speed up the cobblestone over to the toad on the edge. They wanted the toad to fall into the lava pool and die instantly.

“No, no, it’s dangerous, it’s dangerous!” The evil man noticed that the boulder was getting slower and slower. It rolled to the side of the toad ball and stopped, not hitting it at all. He was ecstatic internally as he wiped the cold sweat from his forehead with his hands.

“Boom!”

The third tower, which fell against the middle tower, stumbled a little more.

Several short spears that blocked the artillery shells of the beasts broke off, and one of them happened to fly towards the edge of the cobblestone. Upon collision, the cobblestone rolled up quickly and rolled over the toad ball. Under the gazes of the onlookers, the light ball of the toad shook a few times. Finally, it slowly tilted little by little, diagonally edging towards the boiling lava pool. Even if the toad struggled crazily in it, even if the desperate evil man punched and kicked the slingshot, it was of no avail as he could not save the fate of the toad’s failure and death.

All the beasts cheered, happier than winning a big victory.

The Bobcat instantly shook its butt happily.

“Congratulations, congratulations..”. All the beasts sang the hymn of the Beast King when it ascended the throne. Listening to the tune now sounded very ironic though.

The old mandrill Long Hair stroked its beard in one hand, and at the same time portrayed a serious tone of teaching the younger generation, “Even though it is the same method, not everyone can succeed! The other one succeeded because there was a holy beast, and as for you, there is nothing else but a toad! The Holy Beast of the other party knows how to cooperate, but your toad is a complete idiot! So, some things are destined to never be yours. Even if you want it so desperately, you are unable to obtain it! Haha!”

The Toad King was trembling with anger, almost vomiting three liters worth of blood.

At this moment, he really wanted to find a piece of tofu and then smash himself to death! [1]

T/L Note: [1] Not sure if this was intentional, but since tofu is one of the softest foods out there, author-san might just be implying sarcasm or irony of the evil man.

chapters.title: Chapter 867 This Was Simply Demonic!
chapters.body:
Chapter 867 This Was Simply Demonic!

Chapter 867: This Was Simply Demonic!

At the moment, Yue Yang was the focus of all the watchful eyes.

Those who eyed him were none other than the four chiefs— the Lion King, the Eagle King, the Human-Faced Tiger and the Poisonous Bee Queen— as well as the Sickle Weasel, Ryoma, the Crow and the Cheetah brothers.

Amongst the gazes, there were reflections of serene expressions like envy and jealousy, but there were also looks of shock, silent hatred, respect, and even worship. No matter what the mentality of the others were, the four chiefs were all committed to cooperating with this abnormal newcomer. At the very least, they aspired to live peacefully with him. It would be unwise to provoke a strong man who possessed a Holy Beast that is very likely to evolve into a Divine Beast in the future.

They had no intentions of becoming like the Toad King, who was impatient and made his move early against Yue Yang, which led to his awkward downfall.

The sharp contrast created by Yue Yang was no small deterrent to the Lion King and the Eagle King, who had intended to join forces with the Toad King.

As for the Human-Faced Tiger who wanted to maintain neutrality and accumulate its own strength, it secretly let out a sigh of relief. Regardless of whether it was due to public or private matters, it was impossible to cooperate with the Toad King. However, it was the one who mostly observed the attempts of success and failures of the toad.

The success of the Toad King meant that its strength would rise.

In the case of failure, the Toad King would very likely retreat from the second place among the top five leaders, squeezed out of place by the Human-Faced Tiger who was originally ranked third in strength.

Needless to say, there was no need to mention the Poisonous Queen Bee who had negotiated a secret agreement with Yue Yang long ago. The stronger he became and the stronger his will was to fight back against the Toad King, the more she could prove that her standing was correct. In turn, this would greaten the chance of her successfully leaving the Beast Valley to gain a higher possibility of finally gaining freedom. The Poisonous Queen Bee was definitely the happiest one of course, despite her not showing her joy through her expressions

That was because on the surface, the Poisonous Queen Bee was the same with the Human-Faced Tiger, as they both claimed a neutral stance.

“How did you clear the difficult test? How did you do it?” Even when the Sickle Weasel had seen the Reaper Mantis eating the Holy Fruit of Wisdom gracefully, it still felt rather unbelievable.

A difficult test that no one has ever successfully passed.

Has been cleared by him just like that?

It’s incredible… Even if it saw it unfold personally, the Sickle Weasel couldn’t believe its own eyes completely.

“Fortunately, this challenge was not the most difficult one,” Yue Yang smiled slightly, expressing his confidence.

In actual fact however, the contents of these difficult tests and challenges must be strictly calculated. Compared with some games that Yue Yang had played before traversing worlds, there were also certain similarities to a certain extent. The only difference was that if he failed to play the game in the other world, he could restart it; but if this test failed, his beast would die, as there was only one chance for each level.

The reason why Yue Yang was confident to challenge this test was because he had now acquired the great wisdom of Knowledge Inheritance and had integrated countless realms under the World Tree, which made him different compared to what he was before.

Coupled with having the Heavens Eyes Transverse, the ability to see through the ‘truth’, Yue Yang, who has reached the ultimately perfect Supreme Realm, he could sense where the fatal point of each Level was.

Moreover, Yue Yang has been integrated with the wisdom of Empress Fei Wen Li in the first six levels. Even if he did not have the Heavens Eyes Transverse ability, the Knowledge Inheritance or the great wisdom of the integration of countless realms under the World Tree, he would still be able to easily pass the Level. The first six successful clearance processes of Empress Fei Wen Li were basically a ‘Book of Clearance Secrets’ for him. Of course, the next four Levels would be the result of the tacit cooperation between Yue Yang’s wisdom and the Reaper Mantis. Even in the first six times, Yue Yang, who had obtained the experiences of Empress Fei Wen Li, had completed the tests more perfectly. Without everyone’s knowledge, he tacitly cooperated with the Reaper Mantis to set up three traps for the sinister trickster.

At that time, there was an Eagle Head Beast that used a special ability to replicate his actions.

Although Yue Yang didn’t know who sent it, that did not prevent him from making calculations.

Yue Yang, the Lion King, the Eagle King, the Human-Faced Tiger and the others were still currently unaware that the self-proclaimed genius Toad King had gotten himself involved in a deep pit of misfortune.

Wow!

The Four Kings and their group of beasts couldn’t help but feel an uproar when they heard Yue Yang’s answer.

This kid is really a drag, but they didn’t know how to say it out aloud. He had the ability to be a drag because he had passed the insanely difficult level that no one had ever completed successfully before.

“I can promise that no matter what, my subordinates and I will not hinder the strong from breaking through the Level. Young man, although I no longer have the opportunity to leave the Beast Valley, I admire outstanding juniors very much as it has been in my nature. I wish you success and hope that you can continue to make great strides!” The Lion King made a speech as a senior very sincerely.

“…” The Poisonous Queen Bee secretly despised the lion in her heart. If it weren’t for Yue Yang and the little beast to be the main attraction, would you say the same things, I wonder?

“Like the Lion King, we all have good intentions,” The Eagle King didn’t mention the grudges and grievances of its previous men. Moreover, as it paid attention to Yue Yang’s clearance throughout the whole process, it had a special admiration for the kid. He felt that this young man was incredible. If he challenged it, the Eagle King would most definitely not be able to win.

“Young man, we don’t doubt that you and your Battle Beast can complete the third ‘Stone Pushing Field’ mission, but you have to pay a bit of attention to the Toad King. That filthy guy enjoyed pulling evil tricks on challengers in the Stone Pushing Field the most. The Stone Pushing Field is a place related to calculations, reasoning, solving mysteries and even patience. As the Master of the beast, you can only wait outside, actually unable to enter to help your beast pass the test. Both I and the Poisonous Bee Queen are willing to go to the Stone Pushing Field to intercept the Toad King, but we are very sorry. I am afraid that we cannot provide more help to your beast. In many places, she can only rely on herself. Of course, with the super wisdom of the Holy Beast, passing should only be a matter of time,” The Human-Faced TIger handed a piece of parchment to the Sickle Weasel, who then passed it on to Yue Yang. On it, it recorded various information about the Stone Pushing Field that it had collected.

Towards everyone, that piece of parchment was undoubtedly extremely precious.

But the Sickle Weasel knew that the Poisonous Queen Bee, who was truly allied with Yue Yang, would probably provide him more accurate information.

The Human-Faced Tiger was still a step too late. It seemed that the one with the best insight and determination in the Beast Valley was not the Human-Faced Tiger who had a glorious reputation, but the Poisonous Queen Bee who had never believed in anyone else. Yue Yang expressed his gratitude towards them. And after a moment, they verbally made an agreement for future cooperation.

The four chiefs of the Beast Valley needed Yue Yang to suppress both the Magic Doctor Wei Jing Lue, the Ghost-Eye King and the others who had not left the valley in front. This was especially the case towards the Central Palace Fire Palace Master Nan Feng, the Dark Palace Master Wan Mo, the Deputy Palace Master’s Garrison and the three Palace Elders have become the invading force that the King were afraid of. Regarding these two powerful forces, the Kings dared not make any wrong moves. They were afraid that these people would slaughter the vigorous powers of the Beast Valley in large quantities to cultivate their own Battle Beasts.

Fortunately, Ji Wu Ri and Zhong Hua had chased Captain Cook away.

Otherwise, the Beast Valley would have become a patch of scorched earth.

“I know the Magic Doctor and the Ghost-Eyed King, but I only know the names of the 6th Pan King, the Heavenly Water King, and the Sea Swallowing King. As for the people of the Central Temple, I don’t want to explain too much, but just bear in mind that they are all my targets,” Yue Yang said, which made the Lion King breathe out a sigh of relief.

They were really afraid that Yue Yang was a member of the Central Temple.

But seeing Yue Yang coming in for more than half a month without looking for the two, Ran Feng and Wan Mo who were quick to leave the valley, only then did they secretly guess that he might not be from the Central Temple.

The Lion King gave the other three kings an expression.

If he was not from the Central Temple, then this young man may be from Captain Cook’s side.

He may also be on the Magic Doctor’s side. Anyway, no matter what, there would be no problem with the cooperation between the two sides. If he was from the Central Temple, they were really concerned that he would in turn, wipe out the older forces in the Beast Valley.

“It’s getting late, so why don’t you finish the task of the Stone Pushing Field tomorrow. The Tiger and the Bee should also have a good rest. Tomorrow, they will accompany the Holy Beast into the Stone Pushing Field, whereas the Eagle and I will stay outside and prevent the stinky toad from pulling any pranks,” The Lion King persuaded Yue Yang to rest as it gave the other three a look, indicating that the Eagle King, the Human-Faced Tiger and the Poisonous Queen Bee should all have a talk secretly. It might be necessary to strengthen cooperation, at least in all sorts of details, as soon as possible.

“Okay then, see you tomorrow!” Yue Yang did not summon his Grimoire. Instead, he allowed the Reaper Mantis to guide him back into the Grimoire World.

In the Beast Valley, because of the restrictions of ancient Laws, it was impossible to summon the treasure.

However, if the Battle Beast had enough ability to guide the owner back to the world in the Grimoire, there would be no problem at all. Similarly, if the Battle Beast did not have enough ability and wisdom to lead the owner to return to the real world, then there would be no use even if the master owned a Grimoire. There were quite a few residents who obviously owned a Grimoire, but they couldn’t use it either. So, seeing Yue Yang instantly return to the Grimoire World made the Lion King and everyone else rather surprised

This was definitely not as simple as merely being guided by the Holy Beast!

The Lion King looked at the Human-Faced Tiger.

The Human-Faced Tiger pretended that it didn’t see it before it shook its head and sighed, “At the very least, that would be a Gold Rank Grimoire, maybe even a Platinum Ranked one. He deserves to be the most abnormal newcomer indeed!”

The Eagle King blurted out more straightforwardly, “I dare to confirm with the Eye of the Eagle that it is a Diamond Grimoire. Also, it is insanely close to the level of a Divine Grimoire. The faint traces of energy and will that was emanated is more than enough to shock the soul.”

He is still so young, yet he already owned a Diamond Ranked Grimoire that was close to the Divine Rank . The Lion King’s mind flashed with this thought, and it couldn’t help but see Yue Yang in a new light again.

While they waited for Yue Yang to return to the Grimoire World.

The four kings rediscussed their plans, each offering their own thoughts, but they all collectively agreed to further strengthen their cooperation with Yue Yang.

After half an hour, the old Mandrill, the Bobcat, and the crowd of beasts who had observed the Toad King’s failed conspiracy came over, beamingly reporting this great news to the four kings.

The Lion King and the others were shocked when they heard the news.

They couldn’t utter a single word for a long time.

“Could it be?” The Human-Faced Tiger looked at the Eagle King in disbelief.

“I’m not sure, but it’s very possible!” The Eagle King pondered for a long time, “At that time, the Eagle Head Beast was indeed a traitor, but I didn’t pay attention to it, because it sided with the Toad King for a long time and it has always disgusted me to no end. But I didn’t expect it to make a copy of the Eagle Eye. If the failure of King Toad was really set up to fail by the young man, then that would be absolutely terrifying!”

“Hiss!” The crowd followed his words as they thought about the possibility and they couldn’t help but take a deep breath.

That wouldn’t just be terrifying.

This would be simply demonic!

The Toad King was definitely not stupid, but letting the other party toy with it and still being this defeated on the spot— what is this if it wasn’t described as demonic?

The Poisonous Queen Bee was shocked and there was another burst of ecstasy, but she snorted coldly on the surface, “There is nothing surprising about that. True success requires the dual cooperation of the owner and the beast. Although the Toad King concealed his past as a resident, once he broke away from the Beasts, that toad is nothing. How can a dense Battle Beast understand the meaning behind true cooperation? The failure of the Toad King was doomed to happen a long time ago! And I guess others wouldn’t necessarily mess with the Toad King yet, but they just know that someone with a special ability was on its side. However, they might just plan ahead and lure it into a trap. The Toad King is just an impatient victim— if it isn’t able to jump out of the traps, perhaps the other residents or even the three chiefs of the residents, might be the unlucky ones!”

The Lion King was very happy, “Anyway, the Toad King’s true colours have finally been figured out and its strength has been greatly lost— our opportunity is here. Eagle, Tiger, and Bees, don’t you think the five kings are a little bit extra? I am a conservative being. You know, if that stinky toad falls, the site and subordinates will be divided amongst you three as I only need the sword of the Toad King as a souvenir of honor!”

The Poisonous Queen Bee snorted in her heart. Asking for a sword? Aren’t you just afraid that should someone else take it, their strength would be doubled, which would threaten your current status?

Freedom is the ultimate goal. You guys can fight for your authorities in the Beast Valley.

The Poisonous Queen Bee, with the hope of freedom, had no objections at all.

The Eagle King and Human-Faced Tiger also nodded one after another, agreeing to this sharing plan.

Yue Yang, who had returned to the Grimoire World, was comfortably soaking in the steaming bathtub and enjoying the massage of the Young Half-Elven slave. In his mind, there was also the mental communication transmitted by Pandora’s thoughts. She had just awakened a little from her deep sleep, and when she woke up, she had instantly started to chat with him.

“There is no longer any sort of Goddess of Doom in this world. I’m now your lover Pandora, so you will call me Pandora from now on!” Pandora was very happy now.

After being purified by the Frost Sword used by heavenly Sword Goddess, she had completely abandoned her previous grievances.

To be a powerful yet unfortunate goddess was not her desire.

Instead, all she wanted to be was a happy lover.

It was the ultimate dream that she had been searching for for 100,000 years but she didn’t understand it. It wasn’t until she met Yue Yang that she understood what she needed and the meaning of life.

chapters.title: Chapter 868 Two Becoming One
chapters.body:
Chapter 868 Two Becoming One

Chapter 868: Two Becoming One

In the Grimoire World.

Yue Yang, who had been leisurely idling for half a day, had put aside the issues in the Beast Valley. He quietly enjoyed the massage of the Young Half-Elven slave while he mentally teased a curious Pandora.

There was no need to think about how to break through the difficult test and there was also no need to face various enemies. In the world of his own Grimoire, it would always remain a home for his peace of mind. Whenever he goes back, he would be greeted by the smile of an adorable Young Half-Elven slave. Her cheerful little face would always be shining with happiness. In addition to preparing fragrant meals and steaming hot water for Yue Yang at any time, there was no need for him to relay an order to enjoy a comfortable and intimate massage. Her fingers were soft, adequately using the right amount of force to relieve the tension in his muscles.

Normally, she would always be accompanied by a vigorous younger sister, a considerate older sister, and a gentle wife of his.

Yue Yang suddenly missed them a little after not seeing them for a while.

After passing the Beast Valley, I must go back.

At the very least, I should get together with them.

Yue Yang’s thoughts gradually dimmed as his peaceful mind was restored in the exchange of words with Pandora.

Pandora knew as well that he was tired from the outside affairs and tried not to bother him anymore. However, she hoped to find a time and opportunity to talk about her own affairs with the slave.

When she made up her mind, the slave had just gently covered Yue Yang with a quilt. Every time the master gets tired, the little slave will see Mistress Wu Hen, or Mistress Luo Hua accompany the master to rest together. They would link their arms over his waist to make sure that even in his sleep, he would not be alone.

Unlike his conscious state that was arrogant, proud and confident, Yue Yang would reveal a hidden essence of his traits that usually wouldn’t be shown until he completely relaxes into a deep slumber.

A kind of loneliness that no one could understand.

Only in this state will the deepest pits of his heart let go of the reins completely.

Even in his sleep, he curled his body like a lonely and helpless child. It was also at this time that his face would lightly reveal some sort of innocence that never existed when he was awake.

Seeing the ‘him’ now, anyone wouldn’t doubt an irrefutable fact.

On the contrary, they would understand that in fact, he was not born to enjoy the lengths of war, nor was he someone who prioritised profits and benefits.

During the day, every action he did was just a mental iron gate that was used for his self-protection, a kind of naturally vigilant mental defense. If he wasn’t with the people who he trusted the most, he would never be able to sleep peacefully, nor would he reveal his most vulnerable aspect. The Young Half-Elven slave gently kissed Yue Yang’s forehead, following the example of the Sickly Beauty.

“Being such an arrogant and prideful person, I didn’t expect him to look like a child when he sleeps!” Pandora couldn’t help exclaiming.

“Huh?” The Young Half-Elven slave realised that there was another voice in her mind.

“I have awoken. I’m not dead, I just sort of fell into slumber before,” Pandora explained quickly.

“Huh?” The little slave reacted and exclaimed happily, “Pandora, you’re not dead— that’s great! I thought you died and I even cried secretly! Do you want to tell the master immediately? He would be overjoyed if he knew!!”

“No, just let him rest!” Pandora realised that she was very happy to see Yue Yang’s sleeping form, almost as if they were two different people.

“What’s going on? Tell this slave!” The little slave was surprised and wiped away her tears.

“Thank you…”

Pandora was very moved.

Even when she was deep into slumber, she could empathise with the slave’s secretive weeping and the surprised feeling of knowing that she was alive— all because she had become one with the slave. The pure heart of the slave made her, the originally resentful Goddess of Doom, touched beyond comparison. No one had ever treated her like this besides the adorably obedient little slave in front of her.

She explained the entire matter in detail.

Although she was not very sure who had rescued her, she guessed that it was the ‘guardian deity’ behind Yue Yang.

Pandora didn’t say much about some secrets that the little slave didn’t need to know, and she was only rescued one second before her Divine Consciousness disappeared. Hence, she didn’t know much about it. If she hadn’t been a Goddess of Doom and was just an ordinary person, she would have been puzzled and likely incoherent.

Sitting on the edge of the bed, the little slave mimicked the actions of how Yue Yu would usually comfort Yue Yang. She would hold Yue Yang’s big hand and stay by his side.

And the little slave did the same while listening to Pandora’s narration.

Finally, when she heard that Pandora was willing to become one with herself, she agreed without giving it any thought, “It doesn’t matter. This slave is usually alone if the master is not around, so I get rather lonely. That’s why, if Pandora can be together with me, then this slave will no longer be alone. If Pandora is us, this slave will not have to worry about providing subpar services for the master. The power of two people would definitely be better than the lone effort of this slave. The most important thing is that this slave is very weak, so I can’t offer the master any more help. If there’s Pandora’s power, then this slave doesn’t have to worry about not being able to accompany the master in the future…”

Pandora heard the voice of the slave. Even if she was nothing but a spiritual body, she couldn’t help but shed tears.

She was really touched.

At this moment, it was the little Half-Elven slave who tried to comfort her, the Goddess of Doom.

The two women communicated happily in their minds, each talking about their own various things as they tried to reconcile their spirits together.

“When your body can fully adapt to the Divine Power, we will be able to truly fuse together completely. Of course, although we share the same body, there will still be two souls. We all have our own identifications, so this would be more similar to a pair of twins being fused together. Perhaps, this is what the ancient Gods said about eternal life— I will never be separated from you. Of course, there was also him who will be by my side in the future. No matter what, I will no longer be alone and I will always obtain immortality in this way,” Pandora said with strong emotions.

“Then let’s start quickly. When the master wakes up, we should give him a surprise!” In the heart of the little slave, Yue Yang will always be the first priority in her life.

“Is there really no need to think about it anymore?” Pandora asked.

“What else is there to think about?” The slave asked adorably.

“Thank you… Little slave, I’m really happy to get to know someone like you!” Pandora’s heartstrings throbbed as if they were tugged by God’s hands, shaking with emotion.

“We will be one in the future, so there’s no need to be polite. Let’s work hard together to make the master the happiest person in the world!” The little slave’s words made Pandora turn to Yue Yang involuntarily. In his sleep, he kept holding the little slave’s hand, as if he was afraid that she would leave his side. Seeing Yue Yang’s peaceful state of sleep, Pandora felt a gentle and warm emotion surface from within.

Indeed, no matter when, I must let the man in my heart stay happy forever.

“Then, shall we get started?” Pandora was a little excited. She thought it would take a long time for the slave to accept her, but she didn’t expect it to go so smoothly.

“Yeah!” The little slave didn’t know when it happened, but her body had fully adapted to the Divine Power.

It was also because of her pure heart, Yue Yang’s unyieldingly honest love which was in tune with Pandora’s mind and the purification of the Frost Sword over the force of the Divine Power of Calamity— these were the things that made the Divine Power of hers to be easily accepted without troubles.

Unlike Red, Jiang Ying and the others, the little slave, who was a non-combat-type individual and had no mental obscurities, could completely assimilate the Divine Power during her normal days of life.

This was something that even Yue Yang hadn’t expected.

As long as she merges with Pandora’s soul and the spirit, the two will become one.

They would be one body, striving for the happiness of the Goddess of Doom.

Maybe there would no longer be the kind of terrifying combat power that could curse even the Gods, but they would have a Divine Power of Calamity that would not be inferior to anyone and would not be a problem for self-protection.

The Divine Light illuminated the entire Grimoire World.

The vast Divine Power could easily move mountains and seas.

But it can also be that quiet and gentle, to the point where even Yue Yang had not been alarmed from his sleep. When Yue Yang woke up, he realised that there was a fragrant and fair-skinned girl in his arms. She was not like Luo Hua or little Yi Nan, who both liked to hold his arm, but was more similar to the Phoenix Fairy Beauty who relished in having her arm act as his own pillow as she turned around. She would let the fair curves of her chest pile against his lips because at any moment, she would never forget to seduce him. But even if Yue Yang didn’t open his eyes, he knew that the person with that brandished the similar shocking weapon was not the naughty Phoenix Fairy Beauty.

She was very gentle and had a special peaceful aura, just like a petite mother.

And it was completely different compared with the Phoenix Fairy Beauty; instead, she was more similar to Wu Hen.

Or maybe even Yue Yu… However, they definitely don’t have such a weapon!

Yue Yang rubbed it lightly with his hand. He was slightly awake, but upon contact, he was confused again. The texture and feel of the hand is pretty good, but she’s a bit unfamiliar— who is this?

Who owned such a distinct but indescribably beautiful touch?

Student Yue Yang, who was already rather dishonest when he slept, couldn’t help touching her all over before opening his eyes. He wasn’t completely motivated by sex. At first it was just curiosity that sparked from the bottom of his heart, but the more he touched, the more he fell in love with this warm and supple body. When Yue Yang opened his eyes, he found out that it was none other than the little slave who was flushed, weakly gasping and had an entirely different appearance.

“Master!” The fair face of the little slave burned with redness. Because of Yue Yang’s caressing, her entire figure was dyed with a very attractive hue of crimson. She was embarrassed and it got a bit unbearable, but she couldn’t bear to let Yue Yang go, so she just buried her head desperately on his chest. In his arms, she hoped to dodge his gaze as she was utterly powerless against the naughty hand that was all over her frame.

“You seem a little different?” Yue Yang found that something was wrong.

“Kiss…” Suddenly, the little slave kissed Yue Yang excitedly. In the spiritual world, Pandora and the little slave’s merged consciousness embraced Yue Yang tightly.

So that’s how it is.

Yue Yang suddenly realized that Pandora and the little slave had already merged into one. No wonder the little slave was so active; it turns out that Pandora’s consciousness was at work. The same being with two consciousnesses— one was active, one was passive; one longed for curiosity as she was brave and ignorant, yet the other one was shy in answering and would be eager to refuse. Due to the distinctly contradictory reactions of the two consciousnesses being displayed together, it caused the feeling of temptation to grow stronger than usual and it made the blood of the ‘wolf’ Yue Yang boil!

Originally, there was no such plan, but Yue Yang hoped to give the little slave a wonderful and special first experience.

With how things were now, why shouldn’t she have a special first experience? With the two of them in one body to experience it, there wouldn’t be such an occurrence even in the past, would there?

Yue Yang couldn’t think about it anymore.

He no longer wanted to ponder as he desired to eat up the little lamb!

He rolled over and pressed the little slave down. He pressed kisses over her frame, igniting the flames of love like a volcanic eruption. The stimulus of having the two souls was a wonderful sensation that even Yue Yang hadn’t thought would have been possible. The two completely different conscious reactions made him conquer her repetitively. The sublimation of the blissful tolerance and the spiritual resonance made him reluctant to let go, asking for it over and over again, completely forgetting that they were their first experiences!

By the time Yue Yang woke up, it had been the second day after their blissful night.

He jumped out of bed and found that the original traces of pleasure on his body had already been washed clean. There were pyjamas that were put on over his lower body, and even the snow-white bed sheets that had been blooming with little red flowers had been replaced with brand new ones.

Where is the cute and well-behaved slave? What about the love idiot Pandora who kept sighing ‘Is this what love feels like?’ during the battle?

Striding across the hall, he found a little darling working in the kitchen.

Yue Yang didn’t see her come out for a long time, so he couldn’t help but look inside. Upon sight, he almost let out a wolf-like howl.

The cute little slave wore only a pink apron, but her back was completely bare and entirely naked for all eyes to see. The incomparably beautiful curve and the suffocating scene of her figure appeared before Yue Yang’s eyes.

“You woke up. It was Pandora’s idea to show you this, but I feel so shy dressed like this!” The little slave looked back and lowered her head shyly.

“It looks good, so just keep wearing it like this!” Student Yue Yang rushed over, the hands of this evil wolf unable to control themselves as they started to touch her.

“Wait till the cakes finish rising…” The slave found that a certain wolf had begun to become excited again.

“It’s too late!” A certain wolf approached directly, engaging in an ‘attack’.

“I like this, but this position is not that great. For goodness’s sake, this bad guy is too silly. Little slave, let’s work hard and defeat this bad guy!” This was a counterattack declaration of a certain foolish love goddess.
