chapters.title: Chapter 869 Witnessing History; Witnessing Miracles
chapters.body:
Chapter 869 Witnessing History; Witnessing Miracles

Chapter 869: Witnessing History; Witnessing Miracles

After taking a break with the fair-skinned beauty, Yue Yang has been rid of all his exhaustion. He was now full of energy as he continued embarking on his journey throughout the Beast Valley.

In the Beast Valley, Stone Pushing Field.

The third test was not the same as the first two. In fact, it is known to be a very difficult test. Although it was nothing like the previous tests of the Spirit Beast Great Hall and the Battle-Beast Shells, it was easily considered life-threatening. Here, there was no time limit, but this Stone Pushing Field could be regarded as the most difficult test for the beasts. This was because this test site in particular, gave trials that revolved around the beast’s wisdom and intelligence. No matter how powerful the beast was, it would be impossible to pass if it lacked the appropriate amount of wisdom.

In fact, there were many instances where the master who waited outside collectively calculated along with their beasts in order to find the correct answer.

There were even beasts who were too dense and lacked too much intelligence that they weren;t able to pass the test because they couldn’t follow instructions well enough!

The reason lies in the execution of the answer. Without wisdom, even the most fundamentally correct execution cannot be done!

In the Stone Pushing Field, the most difficult test that was collectively and mutually agreed upon was none other than this ‘stone Pushing’ test.

Precisely because of this, the challengers have granted the name ‘Stone Pushing Field’ for the third test site!

If there was a question like ‘You can collect one piece of gold a day and the amount would double up the next day. How much gold can be collected in a month?’, it would take a fool to figure it out for a long time. Then, something like ‘Fire and wind multiplied by water and earth would be fire wind water earth; wind and earth multiplied by water and fire would be wind earth water fire. If that is the case, how much would wind fire water earth be?’ would take ages for both beast and master to calculate an answer for. They would try to calculate the sums to the point where hope would slip away gradually. This would be because they didn’t understand the formula or they didn’t have enough wisdom.

In front of these topics, one could only sigh.

Even challengers who have passed the previous tests had no choice but to go back empty-handed when they were up against this odd and unique challenge.

There were also relatively easy tests in the Stone Pushing Field. For example, ‘a certain number multiplied by eight and then plus nine is equal to 987654321. What is this number?’ This was a simple test, but even passing this test would grant the beast a minimum intelligence evaluation and would not offer it any rewards.

To be rewarded, the beast must challenge the Ten Major Questions.

Among them, the four-elements question just now was the simplest one of the Ten Major Questions. Some challengers have managed to calculate it as they passed the level, but it has never been made public, remaining a well-kept secret of the Beast Valley for thousands of years.

Among the Ten Major Questions, the most difficult one was the Stone Pushing question!

Its topic seemed very simple on the surface. Give the beast 20 cobblestones. The beast has to push and arrange every four cobblestones in a straight line. At least 20 stones must be placed out of 16 rows. 16 lines were the basic requirement. If 18 lines were arranged, then the reward of the Beast Valley Law would be doubled. If 20 lines could be arranged, the reward of the Beast Valley Law will be the spiritual enlightenment of the ‘Light of Wisdom’. Lastly, if more than 20 lines could be arranged, the reward will be the spiritual enlightenment of the ‘Glorious Light of the God’. The only problem was that no one in the history of the Beast Valley has ever managed to obtain the final tempting reward.

Like the Battle-Beast Shells in the second level, this Stone Pushing test has become a dead end for thousands of years.

Anyone could attempt the test at any time.

There was no penalty for failure, nor would there be any form of fatal punishment. Despite that fact, no one has been able to achieve success.

“Don’t worry about pushing the stone, there is no limit to that. We can try to challenge other things first, such as ‘doubling the amount of gold question’ because I know the answer,” Ryoma and the Sickle Weasel were the two most excited witnesses. In fact, it wasn’t just them, but many beasts who have watched Yue Yang perform better than the previous challengers at the Battle-beast Shells by breaking a record that hasn’t been broken for hundreds of thousands of years, also surrounded the Stone Pushing Field, hoping to be the first to receive the good news.

“I think I’ll just let her try it out alone!” Student Yue Yang smiled slightly. He didn’t accept Ryoma’s kindness and instead, opted for the Reaper Mantis to take the test herself.

“Mhmm!”

The Reaper Mantis knew that the owner had the ‘answers’ from the Human-Faced Tiger, but she didn’t look at it.

Instead, she accessed her own wisdom to try to think and calculate.

Collect one gold a day and it doubles the next day. How much gold will you receive one month later? The Reaper Mantis picked up a dead branch with her small hand and gently counted it on the ground.

In the beginning, her calculation speed was very fast, which made many of the monsters and residents feel ashamed as they watched her.

Gradually, her calculations slowed down. In order to be accurate, she carefully checked the calculations to prevent errors. She didn’t want one error in her calculations to consolidate the next. She had learned this kind of calculation by the sidelines from Yue Yang when he taught Yue Bing, Yue Shuang and the others. At that time she wasn’t really intelligent enough, so all she did was blatantly memorise his words until she got to a level of wisdom that could gradually interpret his methods.

After ten minutes or so, she finally got the real answer.

In order to ensure a pass on the first try, the Reaper Mantis checked the calculation backwards once more.

Finally, she looked at Yue Yang. Under his smiling gaze, she flew into the Pushing Stone Field, approached the test monument and pushed the round stones as 53680912.

The test monument immediately flashed a bright light, indicating that the answer to this question was correct and the challenger had passed the test. There was thunderous applause that broke out in the audience. Some of the beasts who had stayed outside were both excited and impatient at the same time. They couldn’t see the answer from outside, and they couldn’t understand the way the Reaper Mantis had calculated on the ground. They had to applaud vigorously while looking around, hoping someone would know about the answers to ease the regrets in the hearts of these failed challengers. Those who knew of the answers however, groaned in pride. Who would just announce the answers for the likes of you? If you were such a big shot, try solving it yourself!

The successful completion of the first question greatly encouraged the Reaper Mantis.

If it weren’t for her being cautious, she estimated that she would be able to figure out the answer in five minutes. However, her results weren’t too bad either.

There were so many former challengers around her. They knew of this question regardless of whether they completed this test successfully or not, and they knew that it wasn’t a very easy question to solve either. According to a certain someone, a challenger had used 100 years to successfully accumulate the numbers by using the most basic superposition methods.

The difference between their levels of wisdom was the variation between 100 years and ten minutes.

Although not everyone had to spend 100 years, they were beasts. In the entire Beast Valley, the number of beasts who actually didn’t require their masters to aid in figuring out this question could be counted in one hand!

“Let’s work hard!” The Reaper Mantis who successfully took the first step clenched her small fist excitedly.

The rest of the morning was her moment to shine.

One by one, the questions that were even unable to be answered by the residents of the Beast Valley were all successfully calculated by her. With her efforts, the problems have been solved one after another. The onlookers of both beasts and residents broke into a thunderous applause whenever she solved a question. Towards the very end, they even hyped her up and shouted frantically to make her energetic!

Solving simple questions was no longer the goal of the Reaper Mantis. Now, what she really wanted to go against was the Ten Major Problems!

Throughout the ages, countless challengers have been stuck at the ‘Wind Fire Water Earth’ question. After two hours of thinking and calculations, the Reaper Mantis had finally obtained the answer.

She flew into the test monument. Soon after, the others saw a golden light rising up into the sky for a long time. This was a special vision that would appear upon the completion of one of the Ten Major Problems. The audience, who originally thought that this little thing would be frustrated by the question, had a new surge of respect towards her. Wind Fire Water Earth— among the residents of Beast Valley, one million gold was offered to anyone who could solve it. However, it was rather a pity that those who know of the answer would never agree to sell it. Who would have thought that without the need of the owner’s help, and just solely relying on the efforts of the Battle Beast itself, one could successfully solve one of the Ten Major Problems that even the elites of the challengers could not successfully solve? Although it is a Holy Beast, this little one is way too intelligent, isn’t she?

“Woohoo!” The Reaper Mantis flew out and threw herself into Yue Yang’s arms, crying with joy.

The more she used her intelligence for the test, the faster she felt that her brain power improved.

This was an invisible growth.

When she recalled Yue Yang’s usual teachings and remembered that she could break through the most difficult things just now, she couldn’t help but burst into tears. It wasn’t really due to her wisdom levels, but it relied mostly on her master’s teaching and nurturing. Outsiders may not understand, but she knew clearer than anyone how much her master had contributed to her success!

The said ‘master’ stretched out his hand and stroked her little head, “Be good, don’t cry, you have done a good job. These tests are actually nothing much either. If it was not for a lack of time, I fully believe that you can complete them all.”

If Yue Yang didn’t show his abnormal ability in the Battle-Beast Shell test, they would have started to ‘boo’ him insanely!

The Ten Major Problems were simple?

If these are simple tests, then there would be nothing difficult in the world!

However, for a crazy person who could pass all levels of the Battle-Beast Shells in one go, no one amongst the onlookers dared to question his words.

This kid is an evildoer. Maybe for him, the Ten Major Problems are considered very simple… Although they didn’t fully believe it, the onlookers and residents did not dare object as all of them silently proceeded to watch. Only Ryoma and the Sickle Weasel, as well as the silently gazing Poisonous Queen Bee, have the strongest confidence in Yue Yang. The three believed that Yue Yang would never brag about this kind of thing. He only said so because he was 100% sure that he was able to do so.

“Memorise the questions and do them slowly in the future. Now, there is not much time left. Let’s try to get this done by the afternoon because there will be a special training plan in the evening!” Yue Yang stood up and stretched.

He sent a secret order to the Reaper Mantis.

The Reaper Mantis was completely puzzled, but as soon as she flew into the Pushing Stone Field and arrived at the test monument, she placed the correct answer according to Yue Yang’s request. As a result, a flash of golden light was illuminated towards the sky!

After she flew back, Yue Yang issued a second secret order as if he didn’t need any thought at all.

Another golden light rose ahead. Everyone looked at Yue Yang as if they had seen an actual monster.

They had seen their fair shares of insane people, but they really hadn’t seen someone with this level of insanity before!

The Ten Major Problems were easier to solve than him eating beans. The onlookers found that if there wasn’t a time difference between the Reaper Mantis flying out and in, this kid could even answer everything at once and illuminate all ten lights in one go. It would have been slightly acceptable had he calculated in the morning, but this kid has been sleeping all day. Even the Ten Major Questions were recited to him by Ryoma and the Sickle Weasel not long ago.

What kind of brain and intelligence was required to reach this state?

Was he still human?

He is simply a God!

No, he may be even more demonic than the legendary God!

If possible, the onlookers really wanted to open up Yue Yang’s head to see if the structure inside was different from others.

It’s okay to have a gap in intelligence, but it can’t be that far, right? If that was the case, what would become of the people who proclaimed themselves as ‘intelligent’ all this time? This kind of defeat in IQ would be a permanent blow to their mentality. Even an entire lifetime of living in the shadows wouldn’t be able to lessen the embarrassment!

“I… I respect you completely…” The Eagle King had tears streaming down his face. Comparison was really a pain in the neck. It was already a blow if the beast was intelligent, but her master was even smarter— how was anyone going to survive after knowing so?

“Hurray!” Ryoma and the Sickle Weasel were so excited to the point that they almost fainted. They decided to break through the Beast Valley with this young man. They have never been so lucky nor have they ever been correct in their judgements throughout their entire lives!

Only the Poisonous Queen Bee remained slightly calmer than most.

Without revealing the close relationship between her and Yue Yang, she had also watched all this scene play out deliberately coldly.

The other monsters and residents were already frantic and shouted together, “Pushing Stone, Pushing Stone, Pushing Stone, Pushing Stone…” Yue Yang smiled confidently, his grin as bright as sunshine.

All the beasts or residents who saw this smile became riled up. At this moment, no one saw Yue Yang as an enemy, and instead, there was pride in their hearts. Everyone was moved after seeing him break an unprecedented record. They knew they weren’t able to break the records themselves, but that was fine, because they were able to see someone break it in front of their eyes personally.

The young man who was about to break the ancient record stood in front of them.

Yue Yang raised his hand and the audience became silent.

Everyone was holding their breath.

Afraid that a slight breath will destroy the whole process of pushing the stone.

Obtaining Yue Yang’s secret order, the small face of the Reaper Mantis was shining with excitement as she deliberately flew three more times to barely vent the excitement in her heart. When she glided down beautifully, she pulled the twenty round stones into place mysteriously, arranging them into a wonderful pattern. Immediately, the entire Stone Pushing Field burst into a golden light. However, it wasn’t over yet. Under Yue Yang’s order, the reaper Mantis continued to arrange the cobblestones.

Following the completion of the pattern of 16 rows, the wonderful patterns of 18 rows were displayed in the Stone Pushing Field. For the second time, golden light overflowed the entire Stone Pushing Field.

“Twenty lines, twenty lines!”

Everyone was roaring in glee, hoping that Yue Yang would continue and break the unbreakable record. They wanted him to put out a pattern of twenty lines and achieve the reward of the Light of Wisdom! Yue Yang raised his hand, and the commotion of all the onlookers immediately the cut of a knife, silenced with a slash. Even the excitement gasps were firmly suppressed. Everyone was waiting as they watched Yue Yang’s hands. Under his guidance, another one of the so-called unbreakable records will turn into dust and become history!

Witnessing history being made; witnessing miracles. These weren’t only accomplished once, but they were done both yesterday and today. Perhaps, there would be a chance for them to witness the miracles of this young man one more time tomorrow.

========================================================================

========================================================================

[TL note]:

Wheeee and another update! This daily update thing will probably go on for a little longer than September (gotta keep up with the donated demands) so yea. Honestly, I think even if I am not updating daily, it’s not going to decrease very drastically, but we’ll see. At any rate, do enjoy this chapter!!

-Sterling

chapters.title: Chapter 870 Black Tides Of Death
chapters.body:
Chapter 870 Black Tides Of Death

Chapter 870: Black Tides of Death

When the Reaper Mantis bathed in the light of the rewards of the Law, the audience was full of joy.

The Eagle King lost control of his voice as it asked repeatedly, stammering, “You-you… how did you do it?”

Yue Yang didn’t answer and only gave a smile.

How should he explain it?

Was Yue Yang going to tell it that he had read similar topics in the books on Interesting Mathematics and World Numerical Mathematics before traversing worlds? Besides, with his knowledge inheritance and the wisdom of the Supreme Realm, solving these problems were practically in the grasp of his fingertips.

Because the beasts and the residents were too chaotic and hyped up, Yue Yang had to return to the Grimoire World for a moment for some tranquil silence.

This way, they could also have time to vent their excitement.

Otherwise, if this goes on, they would probably turn crazy in no time,

The most important thing was that the Reaper Mantis, who had basked in the Law’s rewards of the Stone Pushing Field, was granted the spiritual enlightenment ‘Glorious Light of the God’ and was going to evolve. She needed an adaptation time to integrate the newly developed wisdom and to process the newly awakened abilities. With the reincarnation of the Beast Valley, her evolution to a Holy Beast and the Shower of Light, the Reaper Mantis felt the luckiest at the moment since her birth.

The eggs of her many siblings had failed to hatch, and only she had successfully hatched.

Originally, with her aptitude, she could not be sanctified into a Holy Beast.

Even if Yue Yang tried his best to help her cultivate.

However, at her most difficult time, she ushered in the happiest moments of her life. She entered the Beast Valley and was reborn. With a new start, all the progress she had made before turned into potential. Paired with her master’s dedicated nurturing, becoming a Holy Beast after entering the Beast Valley was only a matter of ‘when’.

Actually, it turned out that the first person Yue Yang wanted to train in the Beast Valley was not her, but the Spirit of Fire and Smoke.

But because of the incident in the Desire Valley, the Spirit of Fire and Smoke fell into a deep slumber after absorbing ample amounts of Divine Power of Calamity and the energy of the realm itself. Only then, did this opportunity knock on her doorstep and create an entirely new ‘her’!

If this isn’t luck, then what is it?

When the Reaper Mantis fell into a short sleep, her small face was still covered with tears of joy, similar to a sheer white Jasmine flower accented with drops of dew.

In the Beast Valley, Pushing Stone Field.

Some of the beasts and residents have already left to return to their Lords.

Most of them stayed in place, talking about all sorts of emotion-evoking miracles that had occured. What surprised them most was none other than the fact that Yue Yang actually announced the answer in public. Although there was only one reward for the Light of Wisdom and the Glorious Light of the God and that was already obtained by the Reaper Mantis, it would be impossible for the other beasts to get the same reward. But even so, the announcement of this answer has sated thousands of years of regret of the challengers that failed previously. At the very least, they were now aware of the answer. For future challengers, they could use this piece of information as a business preposition as well— to sell it for the right price and exchange it for what they desired.

It doesn’t matter if there would no longer be a reward as it was still necessary to pass the test.

With the answer in hand, there was no need to worry about stating a price.

Just as the beasts and the residents were enthusiastically studying the answers disclosed by Yue Yang, a group of dark clouds floated in the sky, enveloping the sky in darkness all of a sudden.

“What?”

The Eagle King and the Poisonous Queen Bee stopped their research at the same time.

Even someone dim-witted would know that this was not a good occurrence.

They raised their heads and looked to the sky.

The Poisonous Queen Beescanned the audience, trying to find any indication of something going wrong.

The Human-Faced Tiger clenched its fists as its eyes revealed a fierce look, “This is very similar to Ji Wu Ri’s ‘Arrival of the Black Sun’. It seems to be the guys from the Central Palace!”

The Eagle King was stunned, “But Ji Wu Ri has left. Not only him, but even Zhong Hua has also left.”

The Human-Faced Tiger sneered, “They did leave, but there are still two Palace Masters, Ran Feng and Wan Mo. Eagle and Bee, don’t you two realize what this is? It was a premeditated attack!”

“What you’re saying is…someone wants to attack us?” The Poisonous Queen Bee frowned.

“Who is it?” The Eagle King was stunned.

“Who’s not here?” The Human-Faced Tiger gritted its teeth and grunted, “Today is the day of witnessing a miracle occurring in the Pushing Stone Field. None of the Three Chiefs of the residents came to watch and there are only three of us among the Beast Kings. To be honest, I was a little hesitant initially and I always felt that something was amiss. When the level was cleared without any resistance, I became even more weary. Unexpectedly, it turned out to be this way. As soon as Yue Tai Tan and his beast left, those of us who wanted to ally with him had fallen into a cunning trap…”

“You mean the Lion King? I don’t think so. It is conservative and never really had the ambition to expand its influences!” The Eagle King still couldn’t believe it.

“The Lion King is indeed a conservative being, but it wouldn’t blatantly watch us rise in power. Today, even if this matter does not involve it directly, things must have been tacitly agreed upon. We are in trouble. If we don’t cooperate sincerely, I believe we will become the energy improvement sources for the humans of the Central Palace!” The Human-Faced Tiger portrayed a solemn expression.

“Let’s talk about it, what do you want to do?” The Poisonous Queen Bee decided to listen to the Human-Faced Tiger’s opinion.

“Can’t we have everyone evacuate immediately?” The Eagle King was shocked.

“If it were you, would you set a big trap to enclose the enemy and then make it easy for the enemy to escape? The sky is already dyed black, and that would be Ji Wu Ri’s ‘Black Sun Beast’. He didn’t take it away, but left it to Ran Feng and Wan Mo… If it weren’t for that, would the Lion King be nowhere to be found? And if it weren’t for that, would the Toad King afford to act arrogantly?” The extremely intelligent Human-Faced Tiger immediately caught the point of the problem.

“Good!”

Behind a distant rock, an ugly big head appeared.

And it was none other than the King Toad.

Even if he had died once in the Battle-Beast Shells, he retained his status as a resident and had one more chance to live as a human. Just like what the Human-Faced Tiger had said, he was very domineering and arrogant. He stood on top of his toad’s head and clapped his palms vigorously, “As expected of the smartest Human-Faced Tiger, getting to the root of the issue in one go!”

Seeing the King Toad appear, many of the beasts and residents turned pale with fright.

This toad wasn’t all that terrifying.

The most threatening part was Ji Wu Ri’s beast, Black Sun. Just to cultivate this beast of his, no one actually knew how many beasts and residents he had killed to accomplish that sole purpose.

If the people in the Central Palace really have joined forces with the Toad King with him leading the way, the Beast Valley will probably be involved in another bloody war.

The Toad King waved his hands vigorously, “All of you can scram, I’m not interested in fighting with you small fries!”

As soon as the beasts and the residents heard of such amnesty, they immediately flew up and fled in embarrassment in all directions, eager to grow another two legs to aid their escape.

Ryoma and the Sickle Weasel were smart, however. After hearing the conversation between the Human-Faced Tiger and the Eagle King, they realized that the situation was bad. They saw all the beasts running away defeatedly, so they immediately shouted, “Don’t panic, that’s the enemy’s strategy to defeat us by breaking us apart. If you want to survive, you must stay by the side of the three leaders in unity and join hands with them to resist the enemy. Otherwise, it would be impossible to resist the Black Sun with our personal strength alone. With the Toad King leading the way, where exactly can we escape?”

Hearing the shouts of the two, the somewhat sensible beasts and residents all understood.

Many people immediately returned to Ryoma and the Sickle Weasel’s sides.

Some were hesitating.

Most of the beasts and residents still believed in the words of King Toad more, intending to take advantage of this chaotic opportunity to escape with their lives.

The dark clouds receded.

A huge Black Sun appeared, shining with a very strange and terrifying black light. This is not the real sun, but the Battle-type Beast Black Sun that was cultivated by Ji Wu Ri.

Black Sun: Level 8 Heaven Rank. It is a special and giant Battle-beast that has a round spherical shape of 5,000 meters in circumference. It is capable of operating alone, absorbing all energy rays and possesses a combat height of 10,000 meters. Within the same body, accompanied by the Level 5 Heaven Ranked ‘Dark Cloud’ special auxiliary type Battle-Beast, it has several special effects— Weathering, Drought, Scorched Earth, Light of Death, Sun-Shielding Dark Clouds, Energy Absorbing Light Wave, Black TIdes of Death, Blood Tears and Rain Flowers.

The terrifying Black Sun, of course, could not have been cultivated in the Beast Valley within just a few months.

Even Ji Wu Ri could not do it.

In fact, this was not the first time he had set foot in the Beast Valley. He had entered the trial ground many times before he intercepted and killed Captain Cook who opposed the Central Palace. Black Sun was the Battle-Beast he cultivated when he first entered. After thousands of years of growth, it had finally reached the terrifying 8th Level of the Heaven Rank.

Although it was not a growth of wisdom, nor did it become a Holy Beast, it had infinitely accumulated enough strength to be considered invincible in the Beast Valley.

Of course, among the many beasts that Ji Wu Ri possessed, it was only the weakest one.

In order to protect the lives of his subordinates and allow Ran Feng and Wan Mo to pass the levels smoothly, Ji Wu Ri left it with them.

“Crackle, crackle…” The Black Sun suddenly emanated an extremely dazzling black light.

The terrifying light had completely flooded the skies and the Earth. No one was able to open their eyes, but even if they could, it was no different than struggling to see anything like a blind person.

Thousands of beams of light shot out from the surface of the Black Sun.

The beasts were fleeing everywhere in panic. They knew that should one strand of black light come into contact with them, they would die agonisingly.

Less than half of them could avoid the ‘Black Tide of Death’ attack of the Black Sun.

Ryoma and the Sickle Weasel avoided several beams of light in a row. The slow-moving Rhinoceros had its tail cut off by the beam of light before it vaporized and disappeared. There was no possibility of resisting them. Had it not been for the Bobcat to push the Rhinoceros away from the most critical juncture or the response timings of Ryoma and Sickle Weasel, the rhino would have been killed on the spot just now. The Black Tides of Death that erupted from the Black Sun was not something that the military could play defense for.

A Battle-Beast of the 8th Level of the Heaven Rank could easily kill the beasts in the Beast Valley in seconds, let alone a super-giant special type of beast like the Black Sun.

Of course, Battle-Beasts like the Black Sun that are able to kill the entire audience upon arrival was a rare occurrence in the Heaven Realm too..

It was cultivated by Ji Wu Ri himself.

Natural born abilities are so extraordinary!

“If you think you can kill us in this way, that would be ridiculous!” The Eagle King was angry. Who wouldn’t have a trick or two up their sleeves? It was still a Beast King after all.

“Really? I know, Eagle King. You have good strength, but if you think for a moment that this is my trump card, then you are wrong! Please come out— the trap has been laid, the prey is already here so please enjoy this feast of death to your heart’s content,” The Toad King bowed respectfully.

In front of him, a dozen more shadows appeared out of nowhere.

========================================================================

========================================================================

[TL note]:

Wheep! Update! Enjoyyyyy reading!!!! Imma finish my assigments… Look forward to the next update!

-Sterling

chapters.title: Chapter 871 There Will Be Someone Who Would Stand Up!
chapters.body:
Chapter 871 There Will Be Someone Who Would Stand Up!

Chapter 871: There Will Be Someone Who Would Stand Up!

Amongst the dozen or so shadows, a few continued to stay in place while some had disappeared instantly.

The dark clouds in the skies rolled down like they had a will of their own.

It swept across the entire earth and everything was soon covered by dark clouds. Even if it had the existence of the supervision, the Eagle King could not see its own fingers.

Countless beasts and residents who had escaped the initial attack of the Black Sun’s ‘Black Tides of Death’ were suddenly attacked by randomly fatal blows of the Dark Cloud. Amidst the darkness that existed without a trace of light, screams rang out one after another.

The Human-Faced Tiger blasted out a wave of light energy.

The light energy shone briefly for a few seconds in the dark world that was shrouded by the Dark Cloud.

However, the Black Sun in the sky emanated a huge black ball of light, which swallowed the light energy thrown by the Human-Faced Tiger at once.

The world plunged into darkness once more. With those few seconds of light however, Ryoma and the Sickle Weasel managed to lead the Rhino, the Bobcat and the others to successfully escape to the sides of the Human-Faced Tiger, the Poisonous Queen Bee and the Eagle King. At this moment, it was undoubtedly the safest to be around the three leaders. If you were alone, you would probably follow in the footsteps of the dead very soon.

“Move east!” Due to the situation being extremely severe, the Eagle King made a decision without hesitation.

“I’ll cover you,” The Human-Faced Tiger and the Poisonous Queen Bee also thought that moving east was a good choice.

Three kilometers to the east, there is a pond full of clear water, which has been provided for the aquatic beasts to moisten their bodies. The Black Sun was the strongest in the sky, but it was almost invincible if it fought on the ground, leaving no room for confrontation.

So, the only possibility was to enter the water.

No matter what kind of light it was, it would be refracted when entering the water and its power would be greatly reduced.

If they could escape to the East pond and make the strongest Black Sun lose the possibility of launching an attack, then there would still be the possibility of self-protection.

The Toad King naturally heard the conversation between the Eagle King and Human-Faced Tiger as he laughed wildly, “Okay, what a clever idea, it really deserves a round of applause! The problem is, would it be possible for you to escape to the pond that is three kilometers away? Under the Black Tides of Death and the Light of Death, all of you are nothing but easy prey! Haha, run away then— make a pitiful whine as you run away in pain. The way to survive is just ahead, I will cheer for you! I hope that you have successfully escaped into the pond after I kill the remnants!”

The Eagle King almost exploded its lungs out of extreme rage, but it couldn’t refute his words.

Although its eyes could not see the beings ahead, it could feel that there were two extremely powerful creatures right in front of them.

Although their strengths were not comparable to the Black Sun, they were by no means weak either.

If the Eagle King guessed correctly, they should be the Battle-Beasts cultivated by the two Central Palace Masters Ran feng and Wan Mo, the ‘Fire Tyrant’ and the ‘Golden Worm King’. These two Battle-Beasts not only possessed a certain amount of wisdom, but they have also reached the 6th Level of the Heave Rank. The Eagle King was sure that if it fought them alone, it would be a stretch to go up against one of them; but if the two of the beasts faced it at once, it knew that it wouldn’t stand a chance.

The Human-Faced Tiger had the same feeling.

There was a kind of unfavourable tug on its heartstrings as the last of its ancestry.

In addition to the Fire Tyrant and the Golden Worm King, there were also several other powerful Battle-type Beasts that were quietly surrounding them.

They weren’t very strong, but the Black Sun and Dark Cloud were in the distance, whereas the Fire Tyrant and the Golden Worm King were near. They were already pushed to the utmost limit, so adding the other beasts into the equation was like piling more weights on their backs. It would be hard for them to make a confrontation. What should they do?

Someone must stand up and block the first wave of attacks before it is possible for more people to escape.

If everyone was dependent on each other, the consequences would be the annihilation of the entire army.

The most worrying thing was the silent ‘bomb’ of the Poisonous Queen Bee. If it had to choose the scariest person among the five Beast Kings, the Human-Faced Tiger would definitely not choose the lion king, nor would it choose the toad king. Instead, it would opt to select the Poisonous Queen Bee. She was the most ruthless, most savage, most self-reliant and least trusting out of everyone in the entire Beast Valley. Even her subordinates were not truly loyal to the Poisonous Queen Bee because she never truly believed in anyone. The Human-Faced Tiger wouldn’t believe it if someone like the Poisonous Queen Bee didn’t have any form of relation with the Toad King.

In the case that the Poisonous Queen Bee was a chess piece of the Toad King, it would be over for them all.

The Human-Faced Tiger could trust the Eagle King. It could trust anyone, but it just couldn’t bring itself to trust the Poisonous Queen Bee.

“Now, someone must stand up and join me in resisting the enemy. From the beasts and the residents, we would also need two or three people to help us out,” The Human-Faced tiger swallowed hard, secretly guarding against the Poisonous Queen Bee while proposing combat, “Preferential consideration for having special skills!”

“This…”

If it was a normal fight, many people would take the initiative to stand up.

But now, staying to resist the enemy and letting the companions escape was equal to walking on the road towards death.

The problem would be that if no one stayed behind to resist the enemy, then the whole army would be wiped out, resulting in a worse scenario.

The Eagle King also swallowed nervously.

Its logical reasoning is telling itself to stay behind, but the shadow of death shook its will again. No one wanted to die. In this case, everyone wanted to escape, and even the Eagle King was no exception.

The Beast Valley had never been a place to show greatness. On the contrary, it had always been a gathering of selfish beings.

No one believed in anyone!

No one was willing to sacrifice for others. The three kings did not speak, whereas Ryoma and the Sickle Weasel felt that the air was more suffocating than death itself. The enemy was slowly approaching, and the other fleeing companions were slayed by the Black Sun, engulfed by darkness one after the other. The beasts and the residents who escaped alone were probably dead too. When the Black Sun finishes massacring the runaways, it would be their turn soon enough.

The dozens of beasts and residents that gathered together, including the Bobcat and Rhino, were silent.

No one had the courage to say that they were staying.

The Poisonous Queen Bee suddenly coughed, “Someone has to stay for the others, so I’ll stay!”

“Wh- what?” The Human-Faced Tiger was shocked. In fact, it was waiting for the Eagle King to say something, not the expression of the Queen Bee. If the Queen Bee did not immediately cast an attack towards them, the Tiger would have thought that it wasn’t a bad outcome. It never would have thought that the Poisonous Queen Bee actually offered to stall the enemy, which was why the Human-Faced Tiger couldn’t believe its ears.

“Are you serious? Bee, are you really deciding to stay?” The Eagle King’s astonishment was no lesser than the Human-Faced Tiger.

“I know for a fact that everyone is a little scared of me, thinking that I may be a traitor. Maybe in the past, I was a bit unscrupulous in doing things. But now, death is imminent. Maybe we will die in the next moment and become the nourishment for others to cultivate their Battle-Beasts, so what use is there if we are still fighting? There’s really no point to prove at all, so why should I stay? It is not an act of greatness or sacrifice, but rather a necessary choice. If I resist them here, I would need to face the enemy’s attack; if you retreat to the pond, you would also need to face the enemy. The only difference between our battles would be that your fight would be slightly closer to the pond! I don’t care where I fight, but the TIger who is more familiar with water warfare can fully utilise its potential there… And, most importantly, the Golden Worm King belongs to the insect beast category, which would make it a little easier for me to restrain it. Both Tiger and Eagle will face some difficulties with that. After thinking about it this way, it only makes sense if I stay behind. ” The Human-Faced Tiger and the Eagle King were both shocked and moved by the words of the Poisonous Queen Bee.

Who would have imagined that at the moment of life and death, the most selfish Poisonous Queen Bee would volunteer to fight for everyone.

Whereas the Lion king, who has always been like everyone’s umbrella [1] , all but disappeared.

T/L Note: [1] Used to describe someone who is reliable, sheltering others from pain like how an umbrella shields you from rain.

The Human-Faced Tiger felt its eyes water and became slightly hot, “Bee…”

It wanted to apologise.

If it had known that the Poisonous Queen Bee had such courage and mindset, then it would have sincerely befriended her long ago.

Just now, as it pondered over the fact of whether or not the Poisonous Queen Bee was a traitor, it wanted to launch a preemptive strike against her. Now in comparison, the Human-Faced Tiger felt ashamed beyond comprehension.

How did he dare to call himself a man?

T/L Note: Got another gender clarification y’all! Don’t know if you guys notice but it’s been hard to call everyone ‘it’ and making sure they don’t sound confusing ?

He couldn’t even compare to a selfish woman like the Poisonous Queen Bee.

The Eagle King also felt the heat rise in its heart, blurting, “Bee, I will stay too, to fight the enemy with you. Let the Tiger lead everyone away. My life will accompany yours to the end. If we manage to get out of this alive, I am willing to be your friend— a true friend. We don’t have to be wary of each other any longer, and we don’t need to have our internal fights either!”

The Poisonous Queen Bee declined the request of the Eagle King, “I understand your kindness, but the retreating team must have one to lead and one to pick up the rear. You and the Tiger, who are both at the Leader levels, are the best candidates. Don’t waste time and go away now! If there is someone who is willing to stay behind, I would need two or three companions to help me intercept the enemies together. I can only contain the Golden Worm King and the Fire Tyrant for a short time, so I hope someone will stand up and intercept the few beasts behind…”

The Sickle Weasel was so emotionally driven that it couldn’t suppress its feelings anymore.

Its emotions were like a volcanic eruption, giving it an unpleasant impulse, “Someone like me is already tired of living. Death is inevitable for me as it’s just a matter of time. As a properly gallant man, I would rather die on the battlefield than die out of shock. Count me in!”

T/L Note: One by one, everyone’s finally opening up about their gender omg yayyyy.

Ryoma had lived in the Beast Valley for thousands of years. Yet, this was the first time he felt a rush of heat in his heart.

Before the Sickle Weasel spoke up, he hesitated a little bit. In other words, he was also a resident. He was left with his life, and perhaps he still had a chance. But when the Sickle Weasel roared, he felt that his blood was boiling, so he stood up and shouted, “That’s right! It’s up to God to decide if I am going to live or die! He can have my life if he wants, but a small price must be made!”

In addition to Ryoma and the Sickle Weasel’s courageous volunteering, the Rhino, Bobcat and a few others clamored to stay behind as well.

At that moment, everyone seems to have forgotten that the way of survival in Beast Valley was by being selfish.

They seemed to have forgotten that once they are killed, they will truly die.

After a short and fierce quarrel, it was determined that the Poisonous Bee Queen, Ryoma and the Sickle Weasel were left behind to block the enemy. The remaining dozen or so beasts, led by the Eagle King and the Human-Faced Tiger, would quickly flee towards the pond. As soon as the Human-Faced Tiger arrived at the pond, he would immediately use the ‘Sliding Waves’ and the ‘Return of the Vortex’ to rescue the three of them out of danger.

“I already know of your escape plan. It’s great, but is there anyone who decides to stall the enemy? Hahahahaha, I was wrong, I really shouldn’t be asking such mentally retarded questions! Everyone knows that the people of the Beast Valley are the most selfish and most afraid of death, haha! Do you know why this Lord is stronger than you? Do you know why this Lord can kill you when you can only whine like a poor worm? The reason is simple— because I am very smart and I know how to forge an alliance and to find friends to cooperate with, unlike you. One by one, all of you were naively thinking that if you protect yourself, you can live a little longer… Haha, it’s really ironic— those who want to live longer would never trust others, but in the end, the lack of friends is what kills you!” The Toad King who had participated in the massacre just now has returned with great vigour.

He didn’t know, but within a few minutes, the Eagle King, the Human-Faced Tiger and the Poisonous Queen Bee, including the remaining beasts and residents, had all undergone completely different changes!

Based on the Toad King’s past experience, he probably wouldn’t believe it to be true without knowing their previous dialogues. But then again, he wouldn’t believe them either even if he had heard their discussions. Were there really fools who would sacrifice themselves for others in Beast Valley? Even if there was someone like that, perhaps that person had already died several thousands of years ago, right?

========================================================================

========================================================================

[TL note]:

It’s been a month since I’ve started tl-ing LLS, so it’s not unfamiliar territory (not much anyway, still some confusion though) but please do let me know if there were terms that I have used incorrectly like the names etc. Thanks and look forward to the release!

-Sterling

chapters.title: Chapter 872 You Seem To Have Forgotten Someone?
chapters.body:
Chapter 872 You Seem To Have Forgotten Someone?

Chapter 872: You Seem To Have Forgotten Someone?

Boom boom boom!

The Fire Tyrant and the Golden Worm King attacked consecutively with repetitive heavy blows. The Poisonous Queen Bee struggled to withstand them and faced the risk of being defeated at any moment. On the other side, Ryoma and the Sickle Weasel, who were responsible for keeping the enemies stalled, were brutally attacked by the Giant Bear and the Two Golden Apes, unable to fight back.

“Let’s go!” The Human-Faced Tiger held back the warmth in his eyes and rushed to the toad frantically.

“Come with me!” The Eagle King also understood that the Poisonous Queen Bee, the Sickle Weasel and Ryoma’s sacrifice would be in vain if they didn’t take action immediately.

It soared into the sky.

When the Human-Faced Tiger was withstanding himself against the Toad King, the flaming claws of the Eagle King waved up and down as if it was a dance.

Even the Toad King, who was fighting with his own toad beast, had to retreat temporarily when he encountered the Eagle King who was desperately attacking. According to the previously negotiated plan, the Human-Faced Tiger would rebound himself backwards and blast through the encirclement of the Toad King. This would allow his teammates, the Bobcat, the Rhino and the others to be able to advance towards the east pond.

As long as the ‘Sliding Waves’ and the ‘Return of the Vortex’ could be performed in time, the Eagle King would surely be able to escape.

Compared to the Poisonous Queen Bee, Ryoma and the Sickle Weasel, who were under the interception of the Fire Tyrant, the Golden Worm king, and the Toad King, they were considered to be in a much more fortunate situation.

“Hurry up!” The Human-Face Tiger slammed and intercepted several black shadows. While covering the retreat of his companions, he jumped high, avoiding the trajectory attacks of the Black Sun’s Light of Death. Then, he proceeded to slam his head towards the safe pond that everyone cowered towards.

The power of the will to survive ignited the Human-Faced Tiger with an unprecedented amount power and speed that he has never experienced before.

Boom!

He plunged into the pond and no one had time to stop him.

However, it was the fact that the huge pond of water was now nothing but a scarce drought that made the others feel afraid— not a single drop of water was left in the once full-rimmed pond. The bottom of the pond was dry and cracked, as if it had been exposed to the sun for several months. The Human-Faced Tiger knew about the power of the Black Sun, but he never would have thought that it has the terrifying ability to instantly dry up a pond. Without water, the Human-Faced Tiger cannot use the Sliding Waves, and it would be more unlikely to use the Return of the Vortex. A muddy and sandy Human-Faced Tiger found himself in the middle of a dry pond.

It dried up and formed cracks. The originally thriving fish inside the pond were now nothing but a pile of bones.

There is not even a drop of water around.

The angry Human-Faced Tiger couldn’t help but let out a wailing cry towards the sky!

God, this is too cruel. The pond that was supposed to protect the lives of his teammates is now dried up entirely. He couldn’t use the Sliding Waves and the Return of the Vortex, so does that mean that they were done for?

“Hahahaha, what a fool!” The Toad King let out a nauseous laugh, taunting triumphantly, “Now do you understand? Little bugs are destined to never be able to fight the strong. No matter how cunning you are or how persistent you remain— it’s pointless. Strength will determine everything! All your little tricks are so ridiculous in front of the Black Sun and the battle beasts of the two Palace Masters! Cry all you want for now, as it would be the only thing you can do before your death!”

“I’ll kill you!” The Human-Faced Tiger now wanted to tear up the Toad King.

“Let’s go! Just leave! I will go save the Bee. Anyone that can escape counts as a win,” The Eagle King got out of the Dark Clouds, instantly understanding the feeling of the Human-Faced Tiger.

“I’ll cover you…” The Human-Faced Tiger’s capable and loyal old courtier, the Electric Tentacle Squid, rushed in front of its leader and advanced towards the Toad King. However, there was too big of a gap between its power and the Toad King’s. With just one blow, the Toad King hit it hard and the Squid retreated. With tears welling in the Human-Faced Tiger’s eyes, he held the old man with his arms as he clenched his fists and glared at the Toad King. He gritted his teeth and uttered cruelly, “I’m not leaving anymore, my goal is to kill this Toad even if it costs my life. If you don’t intend to leave, then let’s fight him together. Before I die, I’ll stop at nothing to have a gnaw at some toad meat!”

“Okay!” The eight tentacles of the Electric Tentacle Squid instantly raided, tightly entangling the Human-Faced Tiger’s body as sparks of lightning flashed on his frame.

He was stunned.

The intense electric current bursts on his body caused the Human-Faced Tiger’s skin to scorch quickly.

The pain in his body could not suppress the surprise and distress of his voice as he yelled angrily, “It turns out that you are the hidden mole in our group. Why? How many years have I treated you like I would a brother? I gave you a fair share of everything I owned, but you repay me with betrayal?”

A freezing cold Frost Sword was edged towards him.

Easily, the sword penetrated the Human-Faced Tiger’s heart from the front.

Together with the toad beast, the Toad King impaled the Tiger with a sword in his hand. He laughed, “Fool! I really doubt that you have lived in Beast Valley for all these years. With your naivety, how did you survive up until now? I really am curious! No matter how good you are to the Squid, it is only your subordinate. No matter how many things you give it, you will only reward it after you have picked the best. You and it will never be of the same standing. You are one of the Five Kings, yet, it is just your assistant. To put it in a worse way, it is nothing but your servant…Do you think it will be willing to be a servant forever? Especially since it had accumulated thousands of years worth of power, do you think it will really be satisfied with the status quo? Let me tell you, Tiger, you never understand why your subordinates betray you because you underestimated the enterprising spirit of a low-ranked being. When it has an opportunity to become a superior, it will betray without hesitation. As long as it abandons the past, it will have a future. Tiger, maybe you won’t believe it, but let me tell you the truth— the Squid was the one who came to me on the initiative and it had also thought about the plan. Otherwise, how would we know about your Sliding Waves and Return of the Vortex skills? Or how would we be able to dry up the pond in advance?”

The Human-Faced Tiger turned his head and stared at the Electric Tentacle Squid.

The cold air of the Frost Sword spreaded from its heart, and within a few seconds, the Human-Faced Tiger turned into an ice sculpture.

The Electric Tentacle Squid shot out eight lightning bolts expressionlessly and directed it on the ice sculpture. The entire frozen body of the Human-Faced Tiger was shattered by the strong electric current, leaving only the head of the wronged.

It rolled and rolled.

Until it reached the tip of the Eagle King’s legs.

“Tiger!” The Eagle King saw that the Human-Faced Tiger faced an end like this. It couldn’t help but scream towards the sky, “I will kill the Toad and the Squid to avenge you!”

“Don’t embarrass yourself! You can’t even protect yourself, and yet you dared to speak of false promises?” The Toad King swung the terrifying iFrost Sword and joined forces with the Electric Tentacle Squid to attack the Eagle King once again.

The Eagle King rose to the sky amidst the dozens of attacks.

It slammed down a lightray from the Light of Death of the Black Sun, scattering feathers all over its body for a long time.

However, it was gravely injured. But with a piercing wail to the sky, it rushed to escape towards the Pushing Stone Field.

Possessing the skill of ‘Soaring Skies’, it was almost impossible to kill the enemy if it wasn’t executed with a single move. Of course, the biggest target of the Toad King’s plan was not the Eagle King, but the Poisonous Queen Bee. After all, the Eagle King was the weakest among the Five Kings and it possessed super-powerful escape skills. Focusing the attack on the Eagle would be really unwise.

After today’s heavy damage, the Eagle King would probably take a long time to recuperate. With that in mind, the Toad King thought that the Eagle would probably not be able to return to the battlefield for some time.

The real threat was the deadly Poisonous Queen Bee.

“Hurry up!” Ryoma hit the back of the Sickle Weasel with a heavy blow, pushing him a kilometre ahead.

“Let’s go together…” The bloody Sickle Weasel wanted to rush back, but Ryoma burst out with a flash of light. His speed increased tenfold in an instant and the Sickle Weasel was pushed along with the second hit. The Winged Unicorn under his mount was forced to pass through the Black Tides of Death with one leg forcibly broken and a body full of wounds that were not healed. Several black shadows attacked together as they knocked down the severely injured Unicorn together. Amidst the tears of the Sickle Weasel, the Winged Unicorn let out a sharp cry as it was struck by the Black Sun’s Light of Death, self-destructing almost instantaneously.

“I am a resident, and I still have one chance as a beast! You want to play with my life? Then let’s die together!”

Ryoma yelled frantically.

Under his seat, the Winged Unicorn that let the Light of Death penetrate through the now exploded body , a burst of devastating shockwaves soared into the air, forming a huge mushroom cloud.

Lightning hissed all over, trying to suppress the shockwaves, spreading as the besieging shadows panicked and fled.

The shockwave was like a wild beast with its mouth wide open, swallowing all the fleeing enemies into it.

Boom… The open space outside the Stone Field presented a huge pit of scorched earth that was deeply sunken.

Within a kilometer, any life will die.

There was a severed and bloodied limb that fell from the sky in front of the Toad King, which shocked the conspirator.

Perhaps for fear that the Bobcat and the Rhinoceros would also self-detonate and because of the self-destruction of the Winged Unicorn, a gap in the encircling circle was created. This had even led to the escape of the Bobcat, the Rhino and the others. When the Black Sun used the Light of Death to pursue them in haste, a crow flew out of nowhere. Its black feathers scattered all over the sky and blocked the fatal blow.

“Let them run! They can run today, but they can’t outrun tomorrow! Let’s take the Bee down today!” The Toad King jumped near the Black Sun as the Fire Tyrant and the Golden Worm King joined forces to battle against the Poisonous Queen Bee, who was on the verge of withstanding attacks. The Toad waved his gleaming sword in hand as he charged.

“I would rather die than surrender…”

The Poisonous Queen Bee rushed to the Golden Worm King that had the most suppressive attributes and stung the poisonous sting into its body severely.

This was her most poisonous shot which had no cure.

Of course, this ‘extremely poisonous’ needle was also executed in exchange for the cost of her life. After the sting, the Poisonous Queen Bee will consume all the vitality of her body regardless of her injuries. The poison needle was also destined to be unable to be retracted, forever remaining in the body of the enemy.

With the Poisonous Queen Bee desperate sting, the Golden Worm King screamed.

The Toad King was extremely vicious and he swung his sword, cutting off the stinged half of the Golden Worm King abruptly.

Despite having half of its frozen body cut off, the poison was still able to flow, instantly turning it into a shade of jet black. If it weren’t for the lethally sharp weapon of the Toad King and his own viciousness, the Worm might have been able to die under the fatal attack of the Poisonous Queen Bee. The Worm King let out a pained cry after being cut off and returned to its master’s side; whereas the Fire Tyrant, who had gladly accepted the a shining gem that shone like the sun from the Toad King, was also happily returning, not bothering to spare a glance at the Poisonous Queen Bee that was slowly dying.

Even the blind could tell that the Poisonous Queen Bee would most definitely die.

Her tail was completely broken and separated. Just like the half needle that was stuck on the Golden Worm King’s body, the latter half of her stinger was broken as well.

However, the saddest part was not her injury, but the fact that all the power of the Poisonous Queen Bee was lost in that sting to be transformed into toxins that could kill the enemy. It was a pity that the Toad King had a sword in his hand and the Worm King did not really die.

“The Sun Gem is in our hands, so we will be leaving the valley now. Garrison, you lot should be okay? It doesn’t matter if you’d take longer. After passing through the Beast Valley, you all should directly return to the Central Palace. The next few levels are not something you can help with either,” The Fire Palace Master Ran Feng who hid in the dark took the Sun Gem, nodded to the Black Sun in the sky and disappeared from the Stone Pushing Field along with Wan Mo, the Fire Tyrant and the Golden Worm King.

“Are you from the Central Palace?” The Poisonous Queen Bee asked weakly before she died.

“Not before, but I’m smart. I am aware of current affairs and I have won the appreciation of Lord Ji Wu Ri. Later, I will be the Deputy Head of the Central Palace in the Beast Valley. I bet you envy me a lot, don’t you? Hahaha! With the backing of the Palace, paired with the fact that I am still a resident, once my beast evolves its wisdom, I can leave the Beast Valley. As for those of you who would be buried in the Beast Valley, I will miss you…”

The pupils of the Poisonous Queen Bee gradually dissipated. She was already dead, unable to hear the proud and crazy laughter of the Toad King.

His laughter echoed in the sky above the entire Stone Pushing Field.

Echoing off against the corpses on the ground, this triumphant laughter of his sounded exceptionally harsh.

The whole plan was perfectly realized. Along with the Fire Tyrant who got its Sun Gem, Ran Feng, Wan Mo and the Black Sun are going to leave the Beast Valley. They’ll proceed to the next level to catch up with Ji Wu Ri and conspire an attack against Captain Cook.

The Human-Faced Tiger and the Poisonous Queen Bee have died tragically on the spot and the Eagle King was seriously injured. That meant that the only one left was the cowardly and fearful Lion King.

As for the residents, Darius had successfully killed the two other leaders with the cooperation of the Black Sun.

With the Deputy Master’s Palace Garrison and the two Palace Elders, as well as the help of Wan Mo and the residents, how difficult would it be to dominate the Beast Valley and turn it into the Central Palace’s target?

Hahaha… The Toad King didn’t think he had any reason not to laugh.

“You seem to have forgotten someone, haven’t you?” Student Yue Yang waited for a long time, before he finally couldn’t help it and reminded him.

========================================================================

========================================================================

[TL note]:

Eyyyy, it’s another strenuous week! Hope everyone’s fine and all. Remember to stay happy and healthy; anything else is secondary, so I hope these dailies are at least givig you the slightest bit of energy to keep going!

Enjoy!!!

-Sterling

chapters.title: Chapter 873 Do You Think I Would Tell You That I Am A Spy?
chapters.body:
Chapter 873 Do You Think I Would Tell You That I Am A Spy?

Chapter 873: Do You Think I Would Tell You That I Am A Spy?

“It’s you?” When the Toad King looked at Yue Yang, he was slightly shocked before he burst into laughter, “I didn’t forget you, I didn’t forget you! Not only did I not forget you, but I also designed a game for you specially. If it weren’t for your beast’s reward after obtaining the first kill, why should I give the Sun Gem by hand? If it weren’t for you, why would I need to obtain help from external forces? Although your appearance disrupted the plans I made thousands and hundreds of years ago, it also made the two Palace Masters, Ran Feng and Wan Mo, feel that there was an unstable factor. Hence, they took the initiative to stay and clean up the Beast Valley, so I guess it can be said that thanks to your arrival’s blessing, I can enter the Central Palace more smoothly…”

“Should I give a word of congratulations?” Yue Yang didn’t seem to see the Deputy Palace Master’s Garrison who was one with the Giant Bear and the two Palace Elders who were one with the Golden Ape, slowly edging towards him.

“Of course I know that your beast is an elemental body and a Holy Beast with high intelligence. It would definitely be difficult to kill her, that goes without saying. So, I especially prepared a big meal for her,” The Toad King sneered repetitively. With a wave of his hand, almost a hundred beasts under his command quickly formed an encirclement. A faithful confidant even took out some type of ‘Black Scepter’ and inserted it on the ground to form a particularly strange black energy field.

In this energy field, everything seems to have slowed down.

Even the sound of laughter became intermittent.

Yue Yang didn’t need to look at it to know that this was the ‘Wind Stopping Battle Rune Array,’ one of the ten famous Battle Rune Arrays in the Heaven Realm. It was also one of the killing moves used by the Central Palace’s army to launch an attack.

Unless the hidden energy core of the Wind Stopping Battle Rune Array is destroyed, the people in the field will not be able to leave.

In other words, it was necessary to kill the person who has the core of the Wind Stopping Battle Rune Array in order to successfully break the formation. Yue Yang looked at the Toad King. It was the only existence in the field that was not under the field’s influence, so the core would naturally be on his body. If you use the Heavens Eyes Transverse skill, Yue Yang could see that there was a gleaming gem in the belly of the Toad King that connected with the entire battle formation.

To break the formation, the Toad King must be killed.

In the Wind Stopping Battle Rune Array that slowed down movement by almost ten times, it was really a rather difficult problem to kill the Toad King, who experienced no harmful effects on his body.

The Deputy Palace Master’s Garrison who was one with the Giant Bear and the two Palace Elders who were one with the Golden Ape did not remain unaffected either, but the extent was relatively minor. They all had Black Scepters or the Wind Stopping Crystal. The influence of the battle formation on them was estimated to be no more than 10% to 20%. No matter how far away, the loyal confidants in the encirclement circle also have the crystals on their bodies. They were slightly more affected than the Deputy Palace Master’s Garrison and the two Elders. But, they were only 30% affected. However, Yue Yang and the Reaper Mantis’s action power have been reduced by at least ten times.

“Use the combination of the Frost Demon Sword and the Wind Stopping Battle Rune Array. If you still can’t kill her, then this Lord still has one treasure that has never been shown to others, and that is this… the Energy-Absorbing Bracelet!” The Toad King laughed wildly as he put on a glittering bracelet onto his human-like wrist.

Energy-Absorbing Bracelet, also called the Conversion Bracelet.

It could draw the enemy’s elemental energy and slowly transform it into another type of energy.

During the conversion process, the enemy will not be able to use elemental energy, and even some elemental beasts that have been converted to opposite attributes will die on the spot.

If the fire elemental energy of a fire guard is absorbed and converted into water element or ice element, then the fire guard will definitely automatically explode and die without the need to fight. On the contrary, if the ice element of an ice puppet is transformed into a fire element, it will die as well.

For some Battle-type Beasts that do not rely on elemental power, the Energy-Absorbing Bracelet was not very useful.

After all, its conversion speed was too slow.

However, for pure elemental beasts, this holy Energy-Absorbing Bracelet was the most terrifying existence in the world!

In the Heaven Realm, the Energy-Absorbing Bracelet is a treasure that remains the talk of the town. Most of the time, it was also called the ‘Element Disaster Bracelet’ by the warriors of the Heaven Realm!

After rebirth, the Reaper Mantis, who transformed into an elemental body, was going to have a hard time facing this bracelet. If there was no restriction of the Wind Stopping Battle Rune Array, she could still fight or retreat. Now that they were trapped in the Wind Stopping Battle Rune Array, encountering the Energy-Absorbing Bracelet, and even shown a sharp and devastating Frost Demon Sword, Yue Yang is indeed falling into a tough spot under the Toad King’s mockery.

“Do you know why I didn’t come to the Stone Pushing Field to prevent you from getting the Law’s reward? Hahaha, because the more rewards your Holy Beast gets, the more energy I get after the first kill— this is the best cultivation method. When the level, strength and wisdom have reached a certain level, no matter how large the number is. Even if I kill a hundred, no, even if I kill a thousand beasts, the gains obtained will not be enough to compare to yours. Damn you little Holy Beast, do you know how long I have waited for this moment? Do you know how much effort I spent to set up today’s perfect game? How well-intentioned I am. If I put in this much effort into things and God didn’t retur me with heaps and benefits, would there still be anything reasonable in this world?”

The Toad King patted his belly and let out a creepy laugh.

Yue Yang frowned.

He scanned his surroundings, seemingly looking for a perfect time to escape

However, the Toad King was very calm as he shook his ugly fingers, “Don’t dream anymore, in the Wind Stopping Battle Rune Array, you will never succeed in escaping unless you kill me. I can intercept you at any time as you are the ones who live a life slower than a snail! Open your eyes and look around— can you see clearly? All my people! The Human-Faced Tiger and the Poisonous Queen Bee you once worked with are dead and the Eagle King fled without a trace. The position of the Three Kings had been filled in by me. Those who refused to surrender have long died under my sword. Smart young man, everyone praises how smart you are, but now no matter how smart you are, what can you do? You who are intelligent, what do you have to fight me?”

Yue Yang snorted coldly, “What if I said that I do have something??”

The Toad King laughed wildly.

He laughed wildly and almost died of laughter as if he had heard the best joke in the world, “Hahahahahahahaha, I’m going to laugh till my death! What else do you have, let me see! I know you want to use Pandora’s Box, and yes, I know that you have it, but that’s useless. Just now before leaving, Ran Feng and Wan Mo secretly sprinkled the ‘Forbidden Spirit Sand’ in this space. Although this is a time-limited treasure, in the next ten minutes, you and your beast will not be able to use any sort of treasure. Young man, don’t ever think that you are the only intelligent person in this world. I’m not stupid either, so I will never let you take out Pandora’s Box, let alone break it stupidly!”

Yue Yang was angry and he shouted, “What? I’m going to kill you!”

The Toad King laughed triumphantly, “Anger. Instead of wasting your breath on so much anger, let’s address it as a verbal struggle of the weak. Come and kill me, I’ll wait here. Come on, I’m waiting to see how you would kill me! Do you want a knife? Or should I crane my neck? Hahaha!”

Just when the Toad King smiled proudly, a person who shouldn’t be able to make a move, made a move.

The giant shadow was like a mountain.

The fear was so deadly that it could destroy the power of a large mountain as he slammed hard on the Toad King’s head.

With just one blow, the Toad King’s head was blasted into dross, and the huge toad eyes splashed out to thousands of meters away, reaching the edge of the Wind Stopping Battle Rune Array.

Even the toughest long tongue of the Toad had also been broken into several sections.

The Toad King, who had lost his head, slowly collapsed under the eyes of everyone,before he finally hit the ground with a bang, “You?”

The two Palace Elders who were one with the Golden Ape were shocked to find that the one who shot and killed the Toad King turned out to be none other than the Deputy Palace Master’s Garrison who was one with the Giant Bear beast. How could the Deputy Palace Master’s Garrison kill the Toad King? What is going on?

The Garrison who had become a Giant Bear remained silent but jumped high.

A pair of giant palms tried to target and hit the two Golden Ape companions.

“Are you crazy?” The two Palace Elders were about to jump back to avoid them,but they were shocked to discover that there was a difference behind them. From the back, there was a shadow respectively as they clung onto each other, but they didn’t know what skill control is. For a while, the two Palace Elders who had turned into Golden Apes realized that they were unable to move their whole bodies and could only watch the giant palms arrive at their faces.

Boom!

The heads of the two Golden Apes were smashed into states that resembled rotten watermelons by the Garrison, who merged with the Giant Bear.

In a few seconds, the Garrison who had integrated with the beast Giant Bear and was covered with the blood of his companions, strode in front of Yue Yang in huge strides. He kneeled down in the most pious and respectful posture in the world, before kowtowing three times in a row.

When he stood up again, it was to spit on the Toad King’s body with a disdainful face, “Idiot. Do you think that I would casually tell you that I am actually an undercover agent?”

The audience was shocked.

Everyone was stunned.

In the sky, dark clouds gathered again at some unknown point of the day.

This was not a harbinger of the coming of the Black Sun, but the punishment of the transformation of the beast after three beast deaths in the Law of Beast Valley.

When Yue Yang picked up the Energy-Absorption Bracelet and the Frost Demon Sword on the ground in a leisurely manner, a purple flash of thunder from the Law struck down and hit the Toad King’s corpse. It turned out that the evil man who was one with the toad was still experiencing the stun of the guard’s heavy palm. Hence, he wasn’t able to escape at all, and could only take the strike of lightning directly in that posture!

Of course, even if he managed to escape, he would not be able to escape the punishment of the Law.

From now on, the Toad King will truly become a Toad.

If he dies, he will die forever as there will be no possibility of being resurrected again.

“Scarlet Rose!”

The Reaper Mantis took the Frost Demon Sword thrown away by Yue Yang, and immediately froze the Toad King who was still in his weak phase. At the same time, she opened a hollow blood hole with a crossed rose pattern in his stomach.

The Toad King was so scared that he desperately wanted to escape.

Even under a layer of ice with the speed as slow as a tortoise, he just wanted to leave everything behind and make a run for it.

A fist hit the King Toad’s face severely, directly denting half of King Toad’s head. The dizzy Toad King saw an angry and full-bodied Human-Faced Tiger standing in front of him. He was terrified to the point where goosebumps formed all over his skin.

Wasn’t the Human-Faced Tiger dead?

Is this an illusion before death? Or is it an aftereffect of the Law’s punishment?

The Toad King had no time to think as he suddenly felt that a needle was stinging into the spine of his back. The Toad opened his eyes forcefully, and when he saw it, he was inexplicably frightened. This time he saw the supposedly dead Poisonous Queen Bee with his own eyes. She was stinging him!

How is this possible? Impossible, both the Bee and the Tiger are dead. As a beast, no matter who it is, it would be impossible to be resurrected.

“I am a resident like you, but I have never died even once. All of my previous deaths were an illusion to begin with!” The Poisonous Queen bee sneered.

“On the contrary, I am a real beast,” The Human-Faced Tiger said angrily.

“However, as long as there is water, I won’t really die. Thank you for killing me with an ice sword, otherwise, I would have truly died!” The Human-Faced Tiger thought for a while and added, “Squid must have never told you about this secret, as that would be because it had absolutely no idea that I have a final trick up my sleeve.”

“Smart Toad King, you are not the only person who will set up traps. Although you are smart, you should know that others are not fools!” Yue Yang smiled slightly. His smile was as bright as the sun under the gaze of the many dumbfounded beasts, but everyone knew that somehow, this kid’s smile was more terrifying than the Devil’s? Yue Yang ignored how others looked at him as he slowly explained to the Toad King, “Although I didn’t know that the Human-Faced Tiger’s life-saving trick was ‘Water Recovery,’ his skills and attitude were all within my calculations. In addition, it did not prevent me from using the Stone Pushing Field as a location of planning. Finally, I will tell you the good news. In fact, there are many ways to open Pandora’s box. For example, the composition of your Wind Stopping Battle Rune Array can be one of the triggers. So, take a breather to enjoy the curse of the Divine Power of Calamity; I think you will like it!”

“…” The Toad King could no longer speak as his eyes were filled with a lifeless expression.

========================================================================

========================================================================

[TL note]:

Honestly, wow. Beast Valley has taken up a lot of chapters. We’re gonna be moving on (I hope), so yes, it better be 5th Valley soon, we’re only halfway hahaha. At any rate, that was just me ranting because there were too many unidentified-gendered beasts and I had to type ‘it’ all the time.

Enjoy the chapter though! Lots of love from Translator and Proofreader-san!

-Sterling
