chapters.title: Chapter 874 Guilty Conscience?
chapters.body:
Chapter 874 Guilty Conscience?

Chapter 874: Guilty Conscience?

In the Beast Valley.

It has been half a month since the Toad King was annihilated.

Today is the day where Yue Yang and the Reaper Mantis were preparing to leave the valley. In half a month, Yue Yang and the Reaper Mantis had ventured almost all over the terrain in the rear section of the Beast Valley, where they even visited the Double-Headed Black Dragon that guarded the Wisdom Fruit Tree to say hello.

Student Yue Yang didn’t really care much about things like the Wisdom Fruit.

In the Tong Tian Tower, many Wisdom Fruits mature every year. Even small areas produced them, let alone the larger forces such as the Golden Elves, the Eastern Demon Race, the Sea Race, the Demon Race and the Underworld Race. If Yue Yang offered to exchange by using Martial Spirit Pills, he wouldn’t need to say much, yet a hundred or more Wisdom Fruits would be collected by the respective Kings of each race. The Wisdom Fruit is only precious in the Beast Valley.

The Reaper Mantis, as a Holy Beast, had gone through the double restart phases of the Holy Fruit of Wisdom and the Glorious Light of the Gods. Her wisdom had already leapt infinitely close to that of a Divine Beast, but her strength was still far behind the required level. For the time being, she is considered extremely Holy but has not yet reached the level of a Quasi-Divine Beast. So, eating one or two Wisdom Fruits would prove to be of little use to the Reaper Mantis’s current level.

Therefore, Yue Yang didn’t even think of obtaining a Wisdom Fruit that was guarded by the Double-Headed Black Dragon at all.

Instead, he made a deal with the Double-Headed Black Dragon with a Martial Pill.

In exchange, he would obtain the entire row of teeth that the dragon had for a thousand years.

“I’ll admit that the dragon scales can be free, but even the dragon horns are free?” The Double-Headed Black Dragon was very depressed. It really wanted to swallow the kid in one bite, or burn him into ash with a breath of fire, but this idea was doomed to fail. As a guy who had guarded the Beast Valley for tens of thousands of years, his eyesight is very sharp and he could tell at a glance. Even if there was no Law of protection behind this kid, he was no weaker than himself. According to its potential and wisdom, the future of this kid was limitless. There might even be a day where the dragon would ask for favours from him! The Double-Headed Black Dragon bargained in the transaction, “Or I will give you another bottle of dragon blood. The dragon horns, dragon scales and dragon blood altogether would be used in exchange for ten of your Martial Spirit Pills. My dragon blood is very pure as I have the blood of ancient ancestry. My father is the Ancient Dragon!”

“You might as well rob someone!” Yue Yang resolutely opposed it.

“I’m good with eight, then,” The Double-Headed Black Dragon also knew that it was not so easy to win. This kid’s Martial Spirit Pills were of top-notch quality— if it missed the opportunity, the dragon was the one who would be at a loss.

“No,” Yue Yang didn’t bother to bargain and left directly.

“Don’t just leave, let’s talk this out,” The Double-Headed Black Dragon hurriedly stopped him, “Or I will use two bottles of dragon blood for your six Martial Spirit Pills. That with a pair of dragon horns and a hundred dragon scales.”

“With only that amount, you can only exchange it for one pill,” Yue Yang finally made a counter offer, but this kind of counter offer made the Double-Headed Black Dragon almost choke itself to death.

“Do you treat my blood as boiled water?” The Double-Headed Black Dragon was furious. After all, he was also of noble blood from the Ancient Dragon. If this rumour was spreaded out, it would make it a laughingstock.

“If you don’t change it, two bottles of dragon blood are nothing. If I had the time, I would just kill one by myself. By that time, it would be fine to own two large barrels, Yue Yang sneered.

“Don’t be like this…or, I can exchange two bottles of dragon blood for five pills, and I will exchange another Moon Gem for one more,” The Double-Headed Black Dragon decided to suffer a bit. Anyway, over the years, only this kid had the ability and the guts to make it suffer. For the sake of a new realm, even if it knew that this was a loss, it also recognized it. The Double-Headed Black Dragon also took out a treasure that it had been contemplating for a long time before finally deciding to do so, “Look at this Dragon Whistle. With it, you can maneuver ancient dragons and flying dragons below the Heaven Rank.”

“Trash,” Student Yue Yang was rather shocked, but he dismissed it on the surface.

“Do you actually know what a treasure is?” The Double-Headed Black Dragon almost exploded his lungs out of anger.

Although this ‘Dragon Whistle’ was only a Gold-Ranked treasure, its role was infinite and was far beyond the level of its rank. If it was not restricted to controlling those beneath the Heaven Rank, this treasure would have outweighed any Holy-Ranked treasure.

For an extremely strong cultivator, the use of the Dragon Whistle was very small, being borderline useless.

However, the extremely strong must have a group of subordinates, right?

With this ‘Dragon Whistle’, anyone could summon ancient dragons and flying dragons that were below the Heaven Rank to form a dragon army. Blowing this Dragon Whistle at any time, he would be able to summon the dragon army that had a maximum number of 10,000 under his command to his side. With such an outstanding quantity and with the quality of the flying units in hand, even fools would be able to rule an area for themselves in the Heaven Realm.

The Double-Headed Black Dragon had used a lot of energy to snatch it from the hands of a challenger.

It never thought that the kid Yue Yang had the audacity to dismiss Dragon Whistle.

This really made it infuriated!

Yue Yang had his reasons, “I don’t lack a mount. What good is there for a person like this young master riding a dragon below the Heaven Rank? I would be so ashamed! Let’s also talk about riding a dragon— it’s uncomfortable. It’s not like there’s no dragons where I live, it’s just that I am quite bored of them already. With all of that leisurely energy, I might as well take a luxury airship.”

The Double-Headed Black Dragon felt speechless for a while as it understood a little bit now.

Why didn’t this kid know about the pricelessness of treasures?

The reason was very simple. This kid is probably the eldest young master of a super influential family. He might even be the eldest young master of that particular race from the legends. So why would he ever desire a mere Dragon Whistle when he probably hasn’t ever lacked anything since birth?

“With this Dragon Whistle, forming a dragon army out of pride wouldn’t be less astonishing however,” The Double-Headed Black Dragon felt that it was too much of a waste to keep the trause here. In order to increase the value of the treasure of Dragon Whistle, it added some bargaining chips, “If you are willing to exchange, then I will give you another Dragon Contract!”

“I still have to use the Dragon Contract to contract with a dragon? They are the ones that line up and beg for me to make a contract with them. Do you think I accept any kind of beast? It must be a beautiful Battle-Beast! To Hell with your dragon items; scram aside! Unless I were to sew a puppet out of your teeth, I’m not going to make a deal with no benefits ” Student Yue Yang harrumphed.

“This…”

The Double-Headed Black Dragon started to believe Yue Yang’s words in the slightest.

This kid looked like a strong dude. He didn’t like the Dragon Contract, but adored a beautiful Battle-type Beast— it was very possible for him to be an important figure.

All prodigal sons looked like this!

The more the Double-Headed Black Dragon looked at Yue Yang, the more it felt that this kid was a prodigy. Of course, it couldn’t control what kind of personality student Yue Yang has, but it couldn’t care less either. But he probably isn’t a failure, otherwise he wouldn’t be able to offer that many Martial Spirit Pills. Maybe his family had worked hard to make the little amounts of the Martial Spirit Pills and left it for him to use in emergencies, but he didn’t bother to take it seriously.

Thinking of this, the Double-Headed Black Dragon felt that the Martial Spirit Pills that had been delivered to its doorstep should be taken.

Finally, it descended another step, “Three bottles of dragon blood and the Dragon Whistle. Plus, the dragon horns,dragon scales, and I will chip in the Indestructible Dragon Claws. Also, I will add in a Moon Gem and a Star Stone in exchange for ten pills!”

Yue Yang pretended not to hear the dragon as he dug his ears slowly with the tips of his fingers.

The Double-Headed Black Dragon was cheeky, trying not to be enraged, “Four bottles of dragon blood; I’ll add one more bottle on top. How about it?”

“A bucket of dragon blood would be acceptable…” Student Yue Yang put forward a condition that made the Double-Headed Black Dragon want nothing more than to kill him.

“A bucket of dragon blood? Even the smallest bucket is enough to fill ten bottles. What do you think my blood is? That is dragon blood, not spring water. Besides, I will die if I provide a bucket of blood for you all at once, ” The Double-Headed Black Dragon was very mad.

“For you, big guy, a bucket of dragon blood is nothing. At worst, it would be similar to your menstruation!” Yue Yang said. With that, everyone else who was watching the negotiation at a distance wanted to just collapse..

“I’m a man!” The blue veins on the Double-Headed Black Dragon’s head violently popped.

T/L Note: I love this gender clarifying thing the author is doing for these few chapters.

“I was making an analogy,” Student Yue Yang suddenly put on a grinning expression, “To this day, I haven’t seen a dragon shed blood in front of my eyes before. If I don’t get to see it today, I will not give up on that…” This time, not only did the others like the Poisonous Queen Bee, Ryoma and the Sickle Weasel from a distance wanted to collapse, but even the Double-headed Black Dragon himself wanted to do so as well. He had never seen such a psychologically apt person before. He wondered where he got his arrogance and nonchalance from— he was simply a scourge to the heavens!

However, the Double-Headed Black Dragon really believed him.

It’s not surprising that this young master, who as a child, had all of his wishes and desires granted and was believed to be the jewel of his elders. Becoming a little crooked after growing up didn’t seem out of the picture.

In order to satisfy student Yue Yang’s wishes and for the Martial Spirit Pills that he was about to obtain, the Double-Headed Black Dragon had to make a sacrifice as a pool of blood gushed from his neck.

“There’s nothing much to look at!” Yue Yang curled his lips boredly after seeing it.

“If you keep talking, I’ll end you!” The Double-Headed Black Dragon felt that the child was too used to arrogance. It would not end well if the dragon didn’t try to teach him a lesson.

“Well, for the sake of you crying, I’ll give you ten Martial Spirit Pills!” Yue Yang took out a mutton jade bottle and counted it. He found that there were as many as eleven Martial Spirit Pills. He was going to pour one of them out, but the Double-Headed Black Dragon was quick to grab it. Fearing that this kid Yue Yang would turn his back on him, his other claw quickly threw out dragon teeth and dragon horns and piled them in front of him. Then, he finally hung the Dragon Whistle on Yue Yang’s neck. Even before Yue Yang was aware, he had also stuffed the Moon Gem and the Star Stone into his pockets.

Yue Yang was about to speak, but the Double-Headed Black Dragon held his hand tightly with his claws as he announced with a smile on his face, “The transaction is successful!”

As for Yue Yang’s deadly stare, the Double-Headed Black Dragon simply turned a blind eye to that.

Stupid boy, you have to be a bit of a rascal in business propositions.

You won’t be able to survive being a man of culture!

He found that he liked to see the dejected look on the arrogant kid Yue Yang. As soon as he saw his slumped shoulders and listless form, he couldn’t help patting his shoulder with its paws and comforted him, “Young man, suffering is a blessing in disguise, you should understand this truth. Hey, where are you going? Don’t you want this dragon blood? You’re really leaving, and you seriously don’t want this anymore?”

Student Yue Yang was very sad, looking like an innocent child who was cheated by others,”No, I don’t want them anymore.”

Listening to his tone, the Double-Headed Black Dragon had a trace of guilt.

Am I bullying this little guy too much?

He could be considered a senior who was tens of thousands of years old, yet this kid is still a small bean sprout who has just emerged. It seemed to be a bit too rogue to him… Of course, it was impossible for him to return the Martial Spirit Pills. After thinking about it, he spat out a blazing golden flame again and handed it to Yue Yang, “A child will always be a child, what use is there to cry? I suppose you were rather pleasing to look at, so I’ll give this to you! This is the Dragon Flame that I have condensed for thousands of years. It is the most powerful flame in the world and it will never die!”

“Isn’t the everlasting flame the Nirvana Flame?” Student Yue Yang said, his expression stating that if he wanted to deceive others, he should at least try to be professional.

“The Nirvana Flame is unique as it is something unattainable. Except for that, it is indeed my ‘Dragon Flame’ that is the most powerful. At any rate, it is a good thing!” The old Double-Headed Black Dragon blushed as he continued bragging. Thank Goodness that no one here had seen the Nirvana Flame !

“Really?” Student Yue Yang heard this and asked dubiously.

“Of course, you take it back and study it slowly. If your beast can absorb it, it will increase its strength!” The Double-Headed Black Dragon motioned to the onlookers in the distance to come over and help move the dragon teeth and the dragon horns. Then, he made an excuse to take a rest and sent student Yue Yang out of its dragon domain. After Yue Yang went far away, he laughed triumphantly

Boy, no matter how smart you are, how can you compare to this ten-thousand year old dragon? The dragon teeth were all replaced, and they were not worth anything at all; the dragon blood of his would be restored within a few days, and he would have an ample amount of it by then. It is a pity, though, that the Dragon Whistle and the Dragon Flame were needed. However, with these eleven Martial Spirit Pills, he could at the very least break through and improve by one level. Even having one pill would be worth the amount of items he gave Yue Yang, let alone eleven!

The more the Double-Headed Black Dragon thought about it, the more proud he became and yet, the more unhappy he got.

That kid was indeed very clever and hard to strike a deal with.

However, compared with himself, he is still far behind!

Seeing Yue Yang’s face at a loss, Ryoma and the Sickle Weasel were still oddly curious. They discreetly asked the Poisonous Queen Bee, “Was it really a loss? Why do I think that it was a big profit?”

The two asked very quietly, but they dared not let Student Yue Yang hear it.

After hearing this, the Poisonous Queen Bee rolled her eyes, “Are you both going to become pigs after you died once? Do you think the Third Young Master will do business at a loss?”

Ryoma and the Sickle Weasel suddenly realized and hurriedly slapped themselves. To ask such silly things, they really were becoming denser the longer they were alive.

Yue Yang held a negative opinion, “It’s a real loss. If you don’t even have a bit of acting skills or if you all could cooperate a little bit better, I could at least double the gain! I said earlier that you all shouldn’t follow along, but you all wanted to. That made the old guy see some signs and he clung to it. Otherwise, how could there only be such a small thing!”

“Third Young Master, this is already a lot. We have cooperated with you to squeeze twice as much profit from him. The old dragon must be feeling so miserable and helpless. Even if we did have the acting skills, we will feel uneasy in our conscience!” Although the Sickle Weasel felt that he himself was a bad person, he would feel a sense of guilt had the profits been doubled.

“Maybe there might even be a scourge!” Ryoma thought about forcing a double profit and instantaneously, he remained at war with himself.

“That is the sophistry of the incompetent!” Student Yue Yang directly roasted them. “If you don’t have the ability, why would you still learn to speak of conscience?”

“…” Ryoma and the Sickle Weasel looked at each other in tears.

========================================================================

========================================================================

New update!! And also, it’s been like two months woohoo! At this point there’s more new characters that are emerging so I’m kind of making the glossary instead of referring to it. I’ll try my best to provide them as accurately as I can, so let me know if any of the names seem awkward or don’t flow all that well!

At any rate, enjoy the chapter! Hope you guys have a great day/night ahead of you; and if things aren’t that great, I hope the mere thousands of words on this page can make your day go a bit better! Enjoy!!

chapters.title: Chapter 875 Hui Tai Lang, Scurrying On A Mission
chapters.body:
Chapter 875 Hui Tai Lang, Scurrying On A Mission

Chapter 875: Hui Tai Lang, Scurrying On A Mission

“Are you sure you don’t want to leave?” Before leaving the Beast Valley, Yue Yang asked the Human-Faced Tiger and the Eagle King, who was yet to recover, once more.

“We have no one in the outside world and we have no one to worry about either. There would barely be any difference in us going out compared to remaining here. The most important thing is that after experiencing so many years of being trapped in the Beast Valley, we have become slightly uncomfortable with the changes of the outside world… But by staying here, we might be able to do a few things. Darius and the Lion King are willing to split the ownership of the Beast Valley into three parts, in which the Eagle King and I are going to team up as one party to take a third of the share. Although our strength has been slightly weaker, protecting ourselves won’t pose an issue. Besides, there are still many residents and beasts that remain loyal to us, too. If we leave, it’s going to be worrisome for them,” The Human-Faced Tiger smiled and shook his head, declining Yue Yang’s kind invitation, “Rather than going out and being a trivial speck of a person, it’s better for us to stay here in the familiar Beast Valley as a small leader. I practically recognise every single plant and tree here, anyways. After living in the Beast Valley for so many years, this place has become my home, so I’m a bit reluctant to leave.”

“Maybe I will go out in the future, but not now,” The Eagle King also expressed its gratitude to Yue Yang.

“Sure thing, you’re free to choose whatever,” Yue Yang nodded and turned to leave.

The Poisonous Queen Bee, Ryoma and the Sickle Weasel, who have been temporarily contracted under the Reaper Mantis, waved goodbye to the many beasts who came to send them off.

Unlike the three of them, the contract could allow up to ten beasts to leave the Beast Valley. This in turn, made the Cheetah brothers, the Bobcat, the Rhino, the Elephant and the others go through their fair share of ideological struggles.

Some beasts, like the Human-Faced Tiger and the Eagle King, have thought of the Beast Valley as their home and were unwilling to leave.

For example, the old Mandrill ‘Long Hair’.

Some of the decliners turned out to be residents, as they would have to let their beasts die once or twice more before they themselves could become a beast.

This had also discouraged many residents. Only one resident named ‘Wind Fox’ committed suicide twice, exchanging its life to earn one of the ten precious places. The last place was taken by the original strategic tank of the Lion King, the Crow. If it hadn’t been for the Crow that day when the Toad King was in a fit of a massacre, the Sickle Weasel, the Bobcat and the Rhino would have died long ago.

When the Crow expressed its wants to Yue Yang, there was no objection to the owner of the tenth place.

“Goodbye, my brothers,” Ryoma waved to his former friends, thinking about regaining his freedom soon and about the various things that occurred in the Beast Valley. For a moment, he couldn’t help but cry on the spot.

“Goodbye!” Almost all of the beasts and residents came to see them off.

Although there were only ten people who left this time, it also brought a glimmer of hope to the residents of Beast Valley and the beasts.

If there was a challenger like Yue Yang, who was able to train his beast into a Divine Beast, then there would still be the possibility of leaving the Valley.

Those who stayed in the Beast Valley knew that the possibility of this recurring was very slim, but at the very least, it wasn’t a desolate hope. An insane challenger like Yue Yang may never be there again, but even if one fails to cultivate a Divine Beast, a very wise Battle-Beast would have the opportunity to take people out of here. Compared with the Divine Beast, it’s nothing more than the added advantage of being able to bring out ten people instead of one. The Divine Beast could bring along ten people, whereas everything else that was not a Divine Beast would only be able to take one person out. But even so, it was not a futile wish.

After leaving the Beast Valley, Yue Yang and the Reaper Mantis returned to the outside world.

The Poisonous Queen Bee, Ryoma, the Sickle Weasel and the others all faded back to their original forms in a burst of golden light, becoming human once again.

It turned out that the beasts that were cultivated in the Beast Valley had completely faded away and dissipated, leaving Ryoma and the Sickle Weasel all but one Magic Crystal. If it weren’t for the Magic Crystals in their hands, Ryoma and the Sickle Weasel and they even flashed a weird thought that they had really stayed in the terrifying beast valley?

Was everything real?

Was all that a reality and not a dream?

No matter what, they had reverted back into their bodies, which made them jump in joy. They couldn’t help but hug each other tightly, cheering as tears flowed freely. They shouted fervently and vented this excitement of regaining their freedom, “I’ll say, Sickle Weasel, is there anyone who is still waiting for you among your family members? If so, let’s go over there, then! Hey, wait! How are you from the Skyfire Clan? Were you not from the Night Wind Clan?” Ryoma yelled when he saw the real body of the Sickle Weasel.

“You also lied to me! You said you were from the Di Li Clan; who would have ever thought that you were from the Lin Bao Clan!” The Sickle Weasel also felt that he had been deceived.

“What’s the matter with them?” Yue Yang was surprised.

“It’s okay, the two clans are just natural rivals. Skyfire against Lin Bao— not a bad combination. I think they will start fighting in a little while!” The Poisonous Queen Bee herself has not changed much as she was originally a hybrid of bee and a human. Before she even finished speaking, Ryoma and the Sickle Weasel glared at each other intensely, as if they were about to start a fight.

“You two fight all you want!” Student Yue Yang yawned and waved his hand casually, “I want to go back to sleep for a while, so just do what you need to!”

“How shall we find you in the future?” The Poisonous Queen Bee asked the question that rang throughout everyone’s thoughts.

“Why don’t you tell us a location and we’ll lead the clan over!” Ryoma and the Sickle Weasel both felt that forming a good bond with Yue Yang would be the most promising for their futures.

“Who cares about you? Don’t even think about following this Young Master now that you’re out of the Beast Valley! Scram!” Student Yue Yang was angry as he didn’t want to work as a babysitter. Besides, there is no salary of which he would be compensated with. Who in the right mind would commit to handling such stressful and tiresome troubles? Did they think of him to be someone who was as kind as that idiot, Hai Da Fu? Someone who accepts being a leader at every second of the day? Dream on!

Yue Yang reprimanded them, making the tearful atmosphere of the farewell disappear immediately.

All of them fled in fright and no one dared to provoke the Third Young Master of the Yue Family. They knew that he was still resenting them for the fact that he hadn’t earned enough from the Double-Headed Black Dragon. At this moment, whoever provokes him will be very unlucky.

After Yue Yang left, the Poisonous Queen Bee asked everyone to gather and whispered a secret silently, “Conqueror City. He once accidentally revealed that several of his companions were training in the Conqueror City, so it would be impossible to follow him. Think about it this way— your skills are not good enough. You couldn’t break through the beast Valley, and you even needed someone to pull you out of there. If you have a younger cultivator in your clan that possesses great potential, then there might still be some hope. Okay, I’m going to leave, you two can continue to fight!”

The Poisonous Queen Bee also swished and disappeared into the sky.

Everyone looked at each other.

Finally, they nodded unanimously.

Only fools wouldn’t mix with the Third Young Master of the Yue family. Even if they don’t expect the rise of their own clan, they could at least be sheltered with the backing of the strong, which would enable their position to be stable and prosperous.

“Ceasing our fight is unacceptable, but you are too weak. I’m afraid you will fall to the ground with a few punches and that would be very boring,” Ryoma sneered at the Sickle Weasel.

“I’m afraid that after two or three of my punches, you will find your teeth scattered all over the floor. If you have the ability, fight me! Whoever loses will be a tortoise!” The strength of the Sickle Weasel is very different from that of Ryoma’s. However, after experiencing life and death with the former resident, there were no longer any grudges between them and it was just a slur of words from his brazen mouth. The two punched each other’s chest first, and when the other party groaned in pain, they laughed again.

At the same time, they stretched out their hands and hugged each other’s shoulders tightly like close friends, laughing and cursing all the way.

The rest of the onlookers who were watching on the sidelines were asked a question by the Rhino, “They’re not fighting anymore, so what should we do?”

The Crow was the first to chase after them, “Who knows what will happen in the future, don’t think about things too deeply! I’m going to drink some booze!”

“Wait for us…”

The few remaining people also hurried to catch up.

They all came out of the Beast Valley, after all. Hence, they didn’t opt to care about their families or clans for the moment. Thousands of years have already passed, what is a few days more to them? They should celebrate first!

Conqueror City.

Student Yue Yang found Fatty Hai and the others as he didn’t hesitate to train them like pitiful dogs.

He couldn’t help but show them a rarely small act of compassion, “After training for so long, you have made very little progress— you guys have literally soiled the reputation of the Tong Tian Tower. For the namesake of this Young Master, I’ll have to do something about this… How about I give you a bit of the ancient dragon’s blood to level up? Otherwise, I wouldn’t dare go into public and admit that I actually know you guys.”

Fatty Hai was angry, “Hey, my progress is obviously huge. And as a boss, I have set an example for the others, but Ye Kong, that primate, is an extreme scumbag. Even if he is just an underling, he will bring shame to the Tong Tian Tower, but I am most definitely the best performer. Look at my baby, she is almost a Holy Beast!”

The Wind Breath Seabird was indeed breathtaking as she had successfully taken the form of a beautiful woman’s head.

A portrait of beauty.

Her whole appearance was a human face atop the body of a sea beast, but she did not look evil at all. On the contrary, her aura resembled that of a Holy Beast.

However, her progress had nothing to do with Fatty Hai. Although Fatty Hai’s progress was great, it was not comparable to Xue Tan Lang.

While Fatty Hai was desperately bragging about her future ‘Beautiful Holy Beast’, the Reaper Mantis appeared out of nowhere and made him dumbfounded. After a long time, he trembled and asked in disbelief, “This is the Death Mantis that went absolutely crazy and killed Fei Long? No way, what’s going on here? How did you become so small, and you even reached the Extremely Holy Quasi-Divine Beast rank. I don’t want to live anymore, you are too much of a bully; it wasn’t easy for me to cultivate a Holy Beast, you know? Couldn’t you let me bask in my own happiness for one or two days before you hurt me like that. Wi- with you appearing like this, how am I, the genius young man of the Tong Tian Tower who has been recognised by the Heaven Realm, supposed to live?”

“…” Student Yue Yang was speechless.

“Fatty, you’re itching again, aren’t you?” Ye Kong couldn’t help but want to punch someone, and Hui Tai Lang had also rushed to help.

Even Xue Tan Lang and Prince Tian Luo couldn’t help but stretch out their middle finger towards the despised Fatty Hai. It’s not that they haven’t seen someone who grinded on their nerves, but this Fatty Hai was infuriating and asking for a beating to a whole other level.

It was definitely a shame that such a person represented the Tongtian Tower!

The veterans were also stunned, but not because they saw the Reaper Mantis.

They heard Yue Yang talk about using the blood of the ancient dragon to improve Fatty Hai. According to their observations and judgments, Fatty Hai’s potential has been fixed to a certain extent. Even if he could improve, it would be limited. Besides, the blood is rooted and is very strong, so it would be very difficult to alter it with foreign objects. Originally they felt very sorry for Fatty, but now they heard that Yue Yang still had a way to continue helping him to improve, they couldn’t help being shocked in secret.

Looking at Yue Yang more seriously, they found that this kid was already very different from when he first came to Conqueror City.

He seemed to be close to the Divine Realm now?

Youngsters were known to make rapid progress, but it is impossible to reach this level, right?

Originally, they wanted to ask him, but Yue Yang didn’t give them a chance. He smiled mysteriously before he used the Three Realms Compass to leave instantly and return to the Tong Tian Tower.

Only when Hui Tai Lang saw the Reaper Mantis lightly pounding Yue Yang’s back to massage it, did he feel a sense of crisis. Hence, he hurriedly followed up and returned to the Tong Tian Tower together. No matter what, the job of flattering the master has to be entrusted to himself, and he couldn’t let that little girl take it away. As the most loyal beast right beneath the seat of his Master, Hui Tai Lang definitely did not allow others to challenge his own work.

When it comes to performance, Hui Tai Lang was definitely ranked first!

“Buried Sword Valley, I’ll leave it to you to follow along. If you encounter a suitable rune, it will be yours!” Yue Yang felt that it was also time to send Hui Tai Lang on a mission to save it from being too idle.

“Ahhh!” When he heard it, he was almost moved to death’s end. The Master is treating me the best, after all. He patted himself on the chest loudly, indicating that he would get the job done.

He was no longer going to the Tian Luo Empire.

He made a turn midway throughout his journey and bid farewell to Yue Yang before he went to the Da Xia Empire.

Let’s not waste time, I’ll have to prioritise finding the old fox Shui Dong Liu. Then, the Buried Sword Valley will be my possession!

========================================================================

========================================================================

[TL note]:

Heyyy it’s the last day of September, so dailies will stop today. But seriously, don’t worry about it. I think my pace will be updating like, i don’t know, at least 3-5 times a week, so honestly there wouldn’t be much of a difference haha.

So yep, new update!! At this point there’s more new characters that are emerging so I’m kind of making the glossary instead of referring to it. I’ll try my best to provide them as accurately as I can, so let me know if any of the names seem awkward or don’t flow all that well!

At any rate, enjoy the chapter! Hope you guys have a great day/night ahead of you!

-Sterling

chapters.title: Chapter 876 Is Happiness That Easy To Find?
chapters.body:
Chapter 876 Is Happiness That Easy To Find?

Chapter 876: Is Happiness That Easy To Find?

Tian Luo Palace.

After Yue Yang returned to the Tong Tian Tower, the first person he wanted to see was no one else but Si-niang.

It’s a good thing to know Pandora from the Desire Valley, but thinking back to the beginning, she almost killed me with the Divine Power of Calamity and the Law of the Desire Valley. Thinking about it, it’s really a bit scary. If I never came back, what would become of Si-niang and Bing Er? How sad would Wu Xia and Qian Qian be? Of course, all those assumptions were untenable… Just having time to recall the initial situation made Yue Yang have a heart throbbing emotion surge in his chest, desperately wanting someone to comfort him.

Who could release the negative state of Yue Yang’s heart most?

Wu Xia, Qian Qian, Luo Hua, Yi Nan, Sky Law, Yue Yu, etc…It could be any of them.

Although Bing Er, Shuang Er, Bao Er, Niu Niu and the others still needed Yue Yang to take care of them, having them jumping around and laughing made his mood slightly better, even if they were unaware of the fact.

However, there was no doubt that the person who could inspire Yue Yang the most and eliminate his negative emotions was Si-niang.

The weakly soft Si-niang, gentle like water, demure and virtuous, born with a kind of maternal brilliance.

Even if she didn’t say anything and just looked at Yue Yang, he could feel her resolute support for him through her gaze.

That kind of confidence, that kind of encouragement; they were indescribable. As long as Yue Yang sees Si-niang, he will automatically know what to do next.

As long as he sees her, Yue Yang will always feel warmth in his heart, like a wandering and helpless child returning home. No matter what kind of blows he receives or what sort of worries he has on the outside, they will disappear in an instant, not even leaving a trace.

Yue Yang returned to the garden.

He happened to see the Drunken Cat Big Sis who was also coming out of the teleportation array, both of them slightly shocked. What a coincidence?

“What a bad time for you to come back. Wu Xia and Qian Qian have already accompanied Bing Er to comprehend some ancient runes, and Yue Yu went to visit her instructor. The others are busy cultivating at the stairway, so no one has the time to accompany you,” The Drunken Cat Big Sis quickly reacted, and before Yue Yang could speak, she said, “Don’t look at me, I’m not free. His Majesty’s birthday is approaching and I have to go back to make arrangements.”

“I’m free,” The little panda Niu Niu ran over for fear that Yue Yang would be disappointed. She wrapped her arms around Yue Yang’s arm and raised her pink face, “I’ll be with you with Shuang Er— we are all free!”

“How obedient of you!” Yue Yang hugged Niu Niu and gave a loud kiss on her smooth and small forehead.

“Go and finish your homework instead of patronising all day to play. Didn’t you just say you were coming back to study with Shuang Er?” The Drunken Cat Big Sis was like a stern mother, and the scared little panda girl spat out her little pink tongue but didn’t dare to pester Yue Yang anymore. She hurriedly ran in, preparing to find Yue Shuang first. After finishing today’s homework, she would find a way to sneak out and play with her brother.

At the turning corner, she stopped and made a secret gesture towards Yue Yang, indicating that he should wait for her.

It wasn’t until she saw him nodding his head that she jumped in happily.

Drunken Cat Big Sis was refuting hilariously when she saw it, “How old are you? Still playing with children?”

Student Yue Yang grinned and retorted, “A person with childlike innocence will not grow old… His Majesty’s birthday? Can I join?”

The Drunken Cat Big Sis snorted very nicely, “It’s not for you! If His Majesty didn’t invite you, you can’t be cheeky and show up uninvited. Otherwise, it will make things messy. If it wasn’t for Si-niang living here, your frequent visits wouldn’t have tarnished the reputation of His Majesty!”

Yue Yang pretended to be confused, “What’s the bad effect?”

Drunken Cat Big Sis almost wanted to strangle him alive with her hands, but finally, she tried to hold back, “Anyway, it’s not a good thing. Who else in the Dragon Continent wouldn’t know that you’re a pretty playboy anyways?”

Yue Yang was angry.

“Hey, His Majesty’s numerous beautiful ladies in the harem and Jun Wu You, the old man that clearly has an entire collection of concubines, unable to truly finish counting them. Compared with them, what am I? I’m not even a scum! Let’s talk about it. In the Soaring Dragon Continent or Tong Tian Tower, which of the emperors did not have a dozen women? Compared with them, I am an innocent and dedicated good boy, okay…” This was the self-defense of the transverse man.

“You’re an innocent and dedicated good boy?” The Drunken Cat Big Sis was about to faint.

“Compared with other kings, I would really dare to say yes,” Student Yue Yang’s skin was thicker than the city wall— what a quibble with all but two sentences!

“You! How can you compare with others?” When Drunken Cat Big Sis heard it, she suddenly became angry, “Those stinky men can fool around all they like, but you should be different. You should set a good example for everyone!”

“Cut! It’s better not to be this kind of ‘good role model’!” Student Yue Yang waved his hand disdainfully.

“What?” The Drunken Cat Yu Sis stared at Yue Yang angrily.

“I just want to remind you that I am also one of the cunning men from the criticisms of your mouth…” Yue Yang raised his hand and replied weakly.

“So? Just because you’re a cunning man, can that give you the right to be a playboy” The Drunken Cat Big Sis grasped this key question.

“Can’t it?” Yue Yang asked, blinking his eyes.

“I’m really mad!” Drunken Cat Yu Sis looked at this kid’s face and there was a trace of change momentarily, which was absolutely stunning. She pushed Yue Yang away and rushed to leave, yelling angrily, “Don’t talk to me anymore, I won’t bother to care about you!”

“This girl…” Yue Yang scratched the back of his head, and suddenly felt that Yu Sis was a bit strange. She was not like this normally, so what happened?

No one was around— otherwise, he would have asked clearly.

Yue Yang returned to Si-niang’s residence and saw her bidding goodbye to someone else. He was a little curious; who was looking for Si-niang?

She turned around and saw Yue Yang.

Suddenly, she was overjoyed.

She was in a very good mood. She let Yue Yang sit down with a smile on her face, and while gently combing his long hair, she said joyfully, “After several parents’ discussions, we have finally set a date. Leaving them with an engaged status for too long is rather unfair to Wu Xia and Qian Qian. Of course, you youngsters have your own ideas. If you don’t want to publicise the wedding, we can approve it, but you would have to meet up with your elders to settle things down. It’s not that we are uneasy with how you handle things, but we elders all hope to be able to spread the branches and leaves earlier [1] , with grandchildren around our knees. There are always endless wars outside, but the Tong Tian Tower is now peaceful, so you should take care of these happy events. In the future, there will be a little baby who can justify your standings too… The marriages’ how-to’s and the customs of different races vary, but we don’t care about this anyway, it’s your generation’s stuff to deal with. Whatever the format is, you can hold it in a simple manner or a grand one. Regardless of the courtesy, we just want to confirm it.”

T/L Note:[1] Family tree. (Referencing to a tree’s branches)

Yue Yang heard her say so and he knew that he couldn’t hide.

He had no choice but to nod.

Seeing his promise, Si-niang couldn’t help but hold him in her arms with joy, tears dripping down her face, “San Er, Si-niang’s biggest wish in this life is to see you grow up, marry a wife, and give birth to children in the future. If you can have a baby for me to hold and care for in the next two years, then I will have no regrets!”

She thought it would take some lip services to make him nod in agreement.

Who would have thought that he agreed as soon as he mentioned it.

That really surprised her— how could he become so ‘obedient’ after coming back from the Heaven Ream?

Si-niang’s heart jolted and she understood a little. She immediately turned Yue Yang gently over her body, wiping away the tears from the corner of her eyes and stared at him with wet orbs, “San Er, did you encounter something in the Heaven Realm? Tell me, okay? You must not hide anything from me!”

Yue Yang smiled, “In fact, it’s nothing. It’s just a small accident, but it’s okay…”

He briefly talked about the experiences of the Desire Valley and the Beast Valley to Si-niang.

Through this kind of confession, the negative emotions that had originally emerged in Yue Yang’s heart disappeared instantly and became invisible.

Si-niang was surprised and delighted. She couldn’t help but patted her chest with her hands, soothing the heart that was about to pop out of fear. She patted Yue Yang lightly on top of his head, criticizing with a bit of grotesqueness, “Since there were ways to clear the Levels better, why do you have to do extra work? You will scare me to death if you keep this up! You must never be like this again in the future because you have to think about everyone else. If anything ever happens to you, how would we survive in the future? Of course, you’re not fully to blame on this matter; this is fate, after all… Meeting Pandora is also a kind of fate, all destined to turn out to be true. Sometimes, we want to escape but we can’t run from the shackles of fate. But with Sister guiding us from above, we will surely be able to have some good luck in the future!”

Yue Yang suddenly buried his head in her arms, as if he was asleep, and gently closed his eyes.

An infinitely tender expression appeared on Si-niang’s face and her long eyelashes slightly closed.

Gently, she caressed his black hair and his cheek, her voice like the sound of nature under the stars, “Go to sleep, San Er. You had to shoulder everything at home and you have been very tired; this Si-niang knows. But there was no other way— you are the backbone of the family and I want to help you, but…Go to sleep, I am here. You don’t have to be afraid of anything, because everything will be fine!”

In the brilliance of her gentle motherhood, Yue Yang was intoxicated.

It’s not that he was asleep, but rather, he was caught in that unspeakable spiritual world. It was quiet, peaceful, ethereal, and worry-free… Is this the heart of Si-niang?

In such a peaceful spiritual world, even if I slept for 10,000 years, I don’t think I would feel lonely!

When Yue Yang woke up, he found himself lying flat on a bench with his head resting on Si-niang’s knees. His hands were around her waist and he slept like a child. Before he opened his eyes, he heard the voice of Drunken Cat Yu Si, and quickly continued to stay half asleep, only to hear her tremblingly pleading, “Can you cross out my name? Si-niang, I don’t want to marry him!”

“Why?” Si-niang’s voice was as soft as still flowing water.

“Wu Xia, Qian Qiani, and Luo Hua are all on the list. What would it look like if my name was up there together with theirs!” Drunken Cat Yu Sis’s voice had a little cry.

“Is this about the main wife position?” Si-niang asked.

“No, it’s not,” Drunken Cat Yu Sis quickly denied, “Wu Xia is the best candidate; even Qian Qian agrees with this.”

“Then you don’t like my San Er?” Si-niang asked deliberately.

“It’s not that… It’s just that my identity is so different from him. Besides, he always teases me and I don’t know what he is thinking. Si-niang, my heart is very confused, so let me think about it, okay? Please help me persuade His Majesty. It’s alright to care, but I want to make my own decisions about this matter. By the way, don’t let him know. If things don’t happen, I don’t know how to face him in the future. …Si-niang, you are the best, so please help me!” Drunk Cat Yu Sis was anxious as she took Si-niang’s hand and looked at her pitifully with red eyes.

“What are you worried about? I know about your troubles, but it’s totally fine. Go back and think about it, silly child. Who knows when this absurdity will end? Perhaps a lifetime of happiness will come after. Is happiness really that easy to find? If you care so much about what others think, wouldn’t your life be more strenuous? Wu Xia, Qian Qiani and Luo Hua are able to let go, so why are you so stubborn? Silly child, you will only suffer if you are like this!”

Si-niang softly comforted the Drunken Cat Yu Sis and stretched out her hands to hug her gently.

Giving her a little peace of mind.

The emotions of Drunken Cat Yu Jie gradually calmed down. When she saw Yue Yang’s sleeping face and the corners of his lips curled slightly, seeming to have seen some pleasure in his dream, as if he was silently laughing at her even within the depths of a dream. It seemed to be able to see through the abyss of her heart at a glance, and then deliberately laughed at her, too. Suddenly, her heart trembled and it was difficult to control it.

“Si-niang, I’m going back, let me think about it first!” Drunken Cat Yu Sis didn’t dare to look at him again, for fear that she would not be able to look away as she stood up and flew away.

“What a silly child!” Si-niang couldn’t help but to laugh at her.

========================================================================

========================================================================

[TL note]:

New update!! And also, it’s been like two months woohoo! At this point there’s more new characters that are emerging so I’m kind of making the glossary instead of referring to it. I’ll try my best to provide them as accurately as I can, so let me know if any of the names seem awkward or don’t flow all that well!

At any rate, enjoy the chapter! Hope you guys have a great day/night ahead of you!

-Sterling

chapters.title: Chapter 877 Washing Mother'S Feet For The First Time
chapters.body:
Chapter 877 Washing Mother'S Feet For The First Time

Chapter 877: Washing Mother’s Feet For The First Time

Yue Yang hadn’t seen the Drunken Cat Yu Sis three days after the overheard conversation.

Instead, it was the little panda girl Niu Niu and the naughty girl Yue Shuang who had a lot of fun.

At night, the panda who was usually obedient had climbed onto Yue Yang’s bed and hugged him, repeatedly annoying him along with Yue Shuang. He rarely ever had the chance to live a peaceful life like this ever since his traversing between worlds. During the day, he accompanied the two little girls to go absolutely livid, but from time to time, he taught them all kinds of knowledge in between, which made them learn about many things without realising it. Sometimes, he would go to the kitchen to help Si-niang wash some vegetables or cut up some meat. Although that messy behaviour of his caused Si-niang to drive him out of the kitchen more often than not, he still enjoyed every second of it.

His most exaggerated behavior was to personally bring over a large basin of water. Then, together with Shuang Er, they would wash Si-niang’s feet together.

He said it was to teach Shuang Er to have the habit of filial piety.

Si-niang couldn’t resist their good intentions, so she had to agree.

There was Yue Yang on one side and the little girl on the other, washing Si-niang’s feet for the first time.

Although Si-niang smiled, she wiped her tears from time to time, especially when she looked at the little girl Yue Shuang. The young girl was sweating profusely and her body was covered with water. Yet, she insisted on continuing, and this made Si-niang eager to embrace the little girl as she cried tears of affection.

Drunken Cat Yu Sis hid in the corner and peeked for a long time.

Finally, she disappeared silently.

Yue Bing came back rather quickly, accompanied by Xue Wu Xia and Princess Qian Qian.

She didn’t know that the ancient rune was reserved for her by Yue Yang, so she reported to her older brother excitedly that her two sisters-in-laws had helped her absorb the rune’s energy, providing her with a new breakthrough in her realm. She felt that she was taking advantage of her brother, but she was still a little proud. Since her brother wanted to absorb the ancient runes’ energies, she naturally couldn’t let her brother go too far. Helping Yue Yang to absorb the rune’s energies was one of the only things that she could offer help with.

This was also considered progress, wasn’t it?

That’s what Yue Bing thought in her heart. If she knew that the ancient rune was reserved for her by Yue Yang, she would have definitely been anxious.

But it was precisely because she wouldn’t accept the power of the ‘Ancient Forest’ that made Yue Yang keep it a secret from her.

“It seems like something is wrong!” Princess Qian Qian, who had keen sixth senses, expressed suspiciously.

“No,” Student Yue Yang sweated a little.

“Are you hiding something from us?” Xue Wu Xia also used her criminally lawful smile to interrogate him. In fact, she has the Book of Truth, which meant that as long as she could see Yue Yang, she would be able to know a bit of the truth. Her words were just meant to back the Tigress up only.

“I wouldn’t dare do so even if I had the guts that could fill an entire water tank!” Student Yue Yang quickly explained that he was actually a good boy who did good deeds without leaving a name to refer back to.

“The problem is that you are bolder than the sky!” Princess Qian Qian saw through these little tricks at a glance.

“Brother, confess and we’ll be lenient,” Even Yue Bing joined the interrogation enthusiastically.

“At this point, I can’t hide it any longer. In fact, I agreed to their forced marriage and it’ll be in three months. You know very well that I am a lone ranger and I am used to being solo, so how was I meant to go against these senior and sly wolves? I had no choice but to raise my hands and surrender,” The expression of ‘I’m not to blame for being a traitor’ was portrayed on his face.

“I see it turned out to be so, congratulations brother!” Yue Bing felt happy for her brother from the bottom of her heart as she congratulated Princess Qian Qian and Xue Wu Xia.

“Are there going to be wedding candies soon?” The only reason the little girl thinks that marriage is good is because there would be a lot of wedding candies to eat. When she heard that her brother was about to get married, she was almost drooling.

“Little girl, what would you know of marriage? Stand aside!” Yue Bing reprimanded.

In fact, there was always a blank space in her mind when it was about what it meant to get married.

Marriage was something that Yue Bing had never thought of— it was too far away for her anyway, for someone who worked hard to cultivate and follow in the footsteps of her elder brother. However, she knew that if her brother was officially married, then her several sister-in-laws would just be wedded officially… Was that the only difference? Even now, her sister-in-laws were living and practicing together with her brother!

Yue Bing didn’t think about it too much, she just felt that what the elders asked to do was also beneficial to her brother, so it must be right.

When Princess Qian Qian and Xue Wu Xia heard the news, they still couldn’t help but become embarrassed as their cheeks flushed despite having caught wind of the news early on.

Xue Wu Xia recovered faster from the embarrassment.

She nodded, expressing her acquiescence and calmed down.

On the contrary, Princess Qian Qian, the rogue Tigress, felt that Yue Yang might have agreed a little too quickly and did not ask for her opinion. But perhaps it was because she felt that he had spoken out in public, not giving her time to have some form of mental preparation.

Raising a fist that was as fair as snow, she aimed a punch at him, words untrue when she said, “Who promised to marry you?”

Yue Yang grabbed her fist, “Tigress, do you still want to run?”

At this time, Qian Qian’s face was so red that her neck was burning as she glared at him in embarrassment, “The kids are watching! Let go!”

Yue Bing hid her face when she heard the words, pretending not to see them, “I didn’t see anything…”

The little girl was not as cooperative as her. She secretly opened her fingers and peeked, laughing out, “I see, my brother wants to kiss sister Qian Qian but I saw everything. Haha, I’m going to tell my mother!” Yue Bing did not wait as the little girl yelled. She lifted her up and suppressed her smile, “Little girl, what sort of chaos are you trying to create? Your brother isn’t kissing anyone, so don’t speak of nonsense! By the way, I brought candied fruit, but if you want to eat it, I will give it all to Niu Niu!”

“I want it, I want it all! At most, you can just give Niu Niu a small portion of it… Wow, my sister is the best!” The little girl Yue Shuang immediately showered her sister with flattery.

Princess Qian Qian, who was forcefully kissed by Yue Yang, rolled her eyes angrily.

A heroic female swordsman with a flushed face, half ashamed and half annoyed, plus a little bit of a girlish anger. “How does it feel?”, one may ask, but Yue Yang couldn’t describe it. He only felt that Princess Qian Qian, the rogue Tigress, had never been this adorable!

He couldn’t help but laugh, and the even more embarrassed Princess Qian Qian bit him madly.

Xue Wu Xia stood quietly on the other side of Yue Yang.

Looking at this beloved man quietly, she doesn’t need to take the initiative. She just waited momentarily for him to turn around and kiss herself gently.

Even if a bunch of girls expressed their desire to stay by his side, he will not forget about the one who was waiting for him wordlessly.

Because of fate and destiny, he couldn’t own all of himself either as there is always a place for him by her side. Just like in the deepest parts of his heart, he always has himself.

Yue Yang turned his face and pecked her lips gently, as if he was a dragonfly dancing on water.

The thoughts of the two people exchanged heartily in this light kiss.

“How jealous! He is so gentle with Sister Xue— completely different from how he was with me!” Although Princess Qian Qian felt that the way of making Yue Yang a strong kiss was more suitable for herself, she wouldn’t indulge in him so much had he kissed her the way he did with Xue Wu Xia! However, seeing the boy being so affectionate, she couldn’t help but protest.

“Come on, Tigress, I will compensate you well!” Student Yue Yang took out a pair of small pig figurines, eager to embrace each other.

“No one is missing out!” Qian Qian punched the boy and blasted the boy directly.

In the corner, the shadow of Drunken Cat Yu Sis disappeared in a flash.

Whether it was Princess Qian Qian, who was keen on the sixth senses, or Xue Wuxia, who had an infinitely minded perception, it didn’t matter. They probably noticed anyway, but there was no way out for her.

Everyone should have their own little secrets, shouldn’t they?

At night, Yue Yang and the little girl held out the basin again and wanted to wash Si-niang’s feet.

Yue Bing turned red all of a sudden— even after she grew up, she had never washed her mother’s feet! She rushed up excitedly, squeezed between her brother and sister as she started watering her mother’s feet while wiping her tears. The pink and fair-skinned face of hers was now blurred with tears.

Even Princess Qian Qian and Xue Wu Xia were dumbfounded, let alone herself.

Xue Wu Xia only reacted after a long time before she nodded to Princess Qian Qian. Then, she knelt down gently, taking the towel in Yue Yang’s hands to gently wipe Si-niang’s feet.

Princess Qian Qian was still a bit hesitant. She waited until Si-niang, who was hiding her face and sobbing, hugged Shuang Er to her knees before she looked at Yue Yang again. Then, she saw him nodding as she slowly squatted down, taking it with a trembling hand while taking over Yue Shuang’s position… Yue Bing cried and became a tearful child. While sobbing, she scrubbed her mother’s skin. Her movements were rather awkward yet gentle. She didn’t dare to use any strength as if it would be considered an err to use the slightest bit of strength.

In the shadow of the corner, Drunken Cat Yu Sis covered her face with her hands.

Without saying a word, she had already burst into tears.

On the second day, Princess Qian Qian and Xue Wu Xia both bid farewell to Yue Yang.

“I just want to go back and have a look, so don’t get me wrong. I don’t miss that old guy in any way!” Princess Qian Qian just didn’t admit defeat. In fact, since she met Yue Yang, her father-daughter relationship with Jun Wu You had already eased by a lot. Her words clarified that she would not forgive her pesky father, but besides telling Yue Yang of her own changes, she was no longer the stubborn Princess Qian Qian in front of others. After a series of battles, it made her realize that if she doesn’t treat her father better now and a big battle breaks out again, there will come a day where her father would leave her forever. Time would not rewind, and she wouldn’t be able to have the chance to be filial.

“Is it really unnecessary for me to accompany you back?” Yue Yang looked at Princess Qian Qian and asked Xue Wu Xia again.

“Next time, let’s forget about it today. We are not going back to stay for a long time, perhaps just lazing around for just a day or two and feeling the atmosphere back at home for a little bit,” Xue Wu Xia gave Yue Yang a hug and whispered in his ear to remind him, “I will continue to interrogate you when I come back; don’t think that you really concealed it from us yesterday.”

“No, don’t touch me!” Princess Qian Qian struggled desperately, but Yue Yang insisted on holding on to her. Although Yue Bing and Yue Shuang were hiding their faces and not looking at them, they both peeked through their fingers and this made her feel the most embarrassed. Isn’t this setting up a bad example for the kids?

“Your Highness, my customs are like these— meeting gifts were all hugs and kisses!” Student Yue Yang said that he must abide by the customs.

“Why don’t you hug Fatty Hai?” Princess Qian Qian gave him a fist contemptuously.

“Nonsense, these custom kisses are only for beauties!” Yue Yang snorted coldly.

“Where was this custom learned?” Princess Qian Qian was speechless.

“He probably invented it himself!” Xue Wu Xia knew Yue Yang best.

“Then I will invent another one… whoever decides to present such an unpleasant custom in the future will deserve a beating!” Princess Qian Qian wanted to punch Yue Yang again, but who would have thought that he had been on guard this time. He opened her fist and snatched her into her arms as they stood chest to chest, face to face before they kissed each other deeply. If it weren’t for Princess Qian Qian who bit onto Yue Yang’s lips, he wouldn’t have let go.

“Children, don’t look,” Yue Bing smiled and covered Yue Shuang’s eyes.

“It’s just a kiss, what’s so special about it? I kiss my brother every day!” The girl Yue Shuang expressed disdain as she clung onto Yue Yang and kissed him twice. It was loud and unusual, her innocent behavior causing everyone to laugh.

In the corner, another peeping shadow flashed past.

Faintly, there was the sound of laughter that couldn’t help being suppressed.

========================================================================

========================================================================

[TL note]:

New update!! Like I said, will be posting at least 3-5 times this month, but honestly I’m kinda taking it easy for a bit. I didn’t realise that Welp and I have been translating and proofreading daily to keep up with the demand, so we’re kinda pacing things slowly for the month a bit. Thanks for understanding!

And also, it’s been like two months woohoo! At this point there’s more new characters that are emerging so I’m kind of making the glossary instead of referring to it. I’ll try my best to provide them as accurately as I can, so let me know if any of the names seem awkward or don’t flow all that well!

At any rate, enjoy the chapter! Hope you guys have a great day/night ahead of you!

-Sterling
