chapters.title: Chapter 882 The Danger Inadvertently Invades
chapters.body:
Chapter 882 The Danger Inadvertently Invades

Chapter 882: The Danger Inadvertently Invades

As an incredibly powerful person, a dependent race was indispensable.

No matter how lonely and strange a dictator is, there will always be loyal supporters behind him.

As the saying goes, ‘I would rather be a head than a cow in the back row’. Although there is some truth, it was all but expressed from a young junior who had not been involved in the world. Perhaps it was an individual who was isolated and unaided that came up with such an idea. If one was in a large family and was used to using family advantages and relationships that ordinary people don’t have, then one would have completely different ideas. Almost all children of the family would hope to be able to join forces as it would be best to be able to vote under the shield of the strongest. The ‘big tree’ would serve as a great backer for shade and coolness.

Especially for the clan leaders, sect masters and princes who have mastered the act of shouldering the destiny of a clan, the issues they have to consider were definitely of a further comprehension than ordinary people.

According to Fatty Hai’s statement, as the cow in the back row, it would seem slightly unpleasant.

But what exactly is the cow in the back row?

It’s none other than pure awesomeness!

Although Fatty Hai’s words have a slight connotation, the reality was truly as such.

After classmate Yue Yang complained with Jun Wu You, the Old Fox and the others, he knew that he could no longer remain lazy and accepted it in his heart. As an almighty person, the countless sources of dependence in the rear was certainly not of a small amount. The collection of all the resources and development was most definitely much stronger than fighting alone.

It was better to have a group of followers that loyally supported him than to have a group of competitors who were jealous and eager to strike.

The best was to be taken by him, leaving all but a mouthful of soup for them to eat.

If that was not enough still, it would be too stupid.

Accompanied by Jun Wu You and the Old Fox, he met various representative envoys of the races from the Tong Tian Tower such as the Golden Elves, Taurens, Dwarves, Pigmen, Golden Toad Race, Underworld Race, Demon Race, Eastern Goblin Tribe and many more. Witnessed by many decision-making authoritative bodies from the Warrior Guild and the Innate Alliance paired with the auspices of Elder Nan Gong, a series of cooperation letters were signed.

In fact, it was none other than a dependency contract amongst the alliances of the Tong Tian Tower.

On the surface, all the ethnic groups and tribes took the initiative to send their best students and children to join Yue Yang’s Dragon Knight Legion Army reserve in order to celebrate his wedding. In fact, it was a way of surrendering and entrusting their most outstanding children to the superhuman Yue Yang. It didn’t matter whether they were called Dragon Knights or not as long as they were named under his name. Rather, everyone would have the same opportunity to compete for his attention and guidance! As for the extent to which the children of various races can improve and to what extent they can grow would no longer be under their control.

“I declare that the Dragon Knight Legion Army of Titan Merchant Guild’s Yue Yang is officially established today!” Elder Nan Gong announced loudly and held the contract aloft after it was signed by Yue Yang. He represented the Innate Alliance of the Tong Tian Tower and became a witness of history.

“Clap, clap, clap!”

The representative special envoys of all etthnic groups clapped with excitement.

Today’s signing ceremony was of extraordinary significance. They believed that after ten thousand years, the younger generations would also be grateful for the grand work done by their predecessors.

Before Yue Yang signed the contract, there had never been a race that would seek similar contract approvals among the alienated races of the Tong Tian Tower. Even Empress Fei Wen Li, the Prison Emperor Zhan Feng, and the Sleeping Princess Ye Meng were mainly dependent on their own clans as well. Empress Fei Wen Li had the lowest point of identification as she truly ever believed and recognized in her family of Serpentines, never bothering about the livelihood or the concerns of the other clans. Sleeping Princess Ye Meng was rather similar to her, accepting only descendants of the Heaven Stairway and almost ignoring all other races.

The Prison Emperor Zhan Feng was slightly better. Generally, he was open to accept anyone, but his priorities were focused slightly more towards humans— especially human warriors of the Soaring Dragon Continent.

It was the first time in history to have someone like Yue Yang who cared not what was written on paper— someone who didn’t care whether one hailed from the Sea Race or the Demon Race, someone who didn’t bother about the identities of a Tauren or a human; someone who couldn’t care less about the origins of the Gu Feng Continent or the Ao Jia Continent, or the fact that the warrior was of a Level 1 Ranker or a Level 10 Ranker.

All the races certainly knew that the Soaring Dragon Continent would receive the most care and priorities, but even so, they could understand it completely.

Absolute fairness was an impossible feat. It was an unprecedented initiative to be treated equally and fairly in all aspects.

Could the Golden Elves and the people from the Golden Toad Race be absolutely equal?

Even if Jia De, Yue Yang’s Titan Merchant Guild’s acting manager and also the most powerful fatty among the Golden Toad Clan, saw Lin En, Anna, and Bao Er among the Golden Elves, flattery would be smoothly delivered as well! The natural advantages of certain races could not be denied. The irony of it would be just like a ratman who was used to being a slave yet wanting to be treated like a Heavenly Dragon under the pretense of absolute fairness. Would that be possible?

“I won’t speak of any extra nonsense, and I don’t like talking about empty words or arbitrarily— those irrelevant things will only waste our time. Here, I will just say one thing. With me, Yue Yang, no matter what race you’re from, excellent talents will obtain the best growth. I don’t care how many geniuses and Innate Rankers there are in the Tong Tian Tower. That is because the Tower is very weak in comparison to the entire universe, so utterly weak to the point where I could use the word ‘small’ to describe it accurately! Dear special envoy representatives, please go back and convey my voice— to all of the young with high aspirations, come! Let us conquer the Heaven Realm together. No matter how long it takes, one day, the Tong Tian Tower will become the best in the Heaven Realm! If you think that having such a life filled with challenges is meaningful, then join me!”

“Ahhhh!!” After Yue Yang said so, the representatives that were present in the ceremony were going crazy.

“Haha!” Jun Wu You and the Old Fox looked at each other and smiled.

The new generation of the Prison Emperor had finally been reincarnated in the Tong Tian Tower!

There was no longer any suspension for the rise of not only the Soaring Dragon Continent, but for all the races of the Tong Tian Tower as well!

In the beginning, all the allies and races actually wanted to wait a while and lay back, but no one ever thought that Yue Yang’s realm would improve so quickly.

In the blink of an eye, he had achieved the realm of the Innate Supreme.

Even the best geniuses or the super-worldly geniuses like the Prison Emperor, whose talents have never resurfaced for a thousand years, required hundreds of years to achieve that sort of cultivation level. This kid rushed through the Innate Supreme Ranks silently, and for three years or so, he had successfully reached the Realm of the Innate Supreme. It is said that now he is about to aspire to the legendary Divine Innate stages. Although there were no precedents before, no one doubted Yue Yang’s insane genius mind wouldn’t be able to achieve the milestone of the Divine Supreme Realm. What’s the point of waiting for Yue Yang to be promoted to the Divine Innate Stages and then cling to him stupidly?

At that point in time, the entire Heaven Realm would be bickering to offer him words and actions of flattery, let alone the Tong Tian tower alone.

If they could attach themselves with him now, when Yue Yang is promoted to the Divine Innate Realm in the future, then all the attached races would emerge as heroes with completely different statuses!

It would be a long journey to conquer the entirety of the Heaven Realm, but with this opportunity, should they even worry about the rise of the various tribes of the Tong Tian Tower? It would only be a matter of time. Sending off the special envoys of the various races, Yue Yang met the tycoons of the various schools of the Soaring Dragon Continent again.

Different from the former, these people had long acquiesced that they were the attachments of the Yue Clan.

There was no need to say anything about them but to give each person a flying dragon directly!

Each family would also be given a place.

The Flying Dragons were summoned by Dragon Whistle from the Wyvern Valley anyways, hence it didn’t cost a single cent. These Flying Dragons were eager to follow the strong instead of staying in the enclosed Wyvern Valley all the time. When Yue Yang returned to the Wyvern Valley with Queen Qi Ge, he could gather them without the use of a Dragon Whistle. For hundreds of Flying Dragons with boundless potential, Yue Yang directly used the Quasi-Divine Flying Dragon King’s Magic Crystals and Dragon Blood to help them improve into Flying Dragon Kings. As for the dozen or so with the most potential, Yue Yang ‘generously’ gave them the real Dragon Blood, which directly promoted them into Golden Ranked Flying Dragons.

When the Flying Dragons heard of the Ancient Dragon’s Blood as a prize should they perform well, they went crazy on the spot.

With the Ancient Dragon Blood, wouldn’t it be possible to be promoted into the legendary Heavenly Flying Dragon and Flying Dragon Emperor?

With temptation and hope on the line, all of them were naturally happy.

Even if they didn’t have all of this, they would still serve Yue Yang under the leadership of the Heaven Realm Female Draconians, not to mention the ultimate temptation of an Ancient Dragon’s Blood!

In the same way, Yue Yang tempted a Giant Golden Dragon in the Heaven Realm. Under the temptation of Yue Yang’s fists and Ancient Dragon Blood, the Giant Golden Dragon that was already considered strong in the Heaven Realm succumbed and became a nominal mount. However, there was nothing particularly bad about it; after all, so many other ordinary beasts couldn’t even have the chance to be the Third Young Master’s mount even if they desired to.

When can I really change my job to become the owner’s official sole mount … the Giant Golden Dragon thought so.

But even it knew that things were not that easy.

Because, among Yue Yang’s Battle Beasts, any one of them chosen at random would most definitely overpower its strength. It dared to say that Hui Tai Lang, Tao Tie and the Star Gathering Heavenly Scorpion would most definitely obtain its share of time as a mount.

Yue Yang didn’t need too much to take care of affairs. As a master, he doesn’t have to do anything; otherwise, why would he want followers?

After the signing and making the promise, student Yue Yang left the hall, leaving behind the Giant Golden Dragon as a model and went to Jun Wu You’s palace to soak in the hot springs with Princess Qian Qian. Perhaps it was because Sister Xue knew of a certain wolf and a certain Tigress’s actions at night, that the girl who rarely went for outings and liked to read silently had also expressed that she wanted to go together, which nearly shattered Yue Yang’s dream of the duo in a world.

“Bro, I’m trying to make a living, but is it that hard for me to enjoy a beauty’s company? Can you not stare at me like this? At most, I will pay for the next supper!” While Tigress was going to change her clothes, Yue Yang had a showdown with Xue Wu Xia. The Tigress had finally expressed her wants, so he wanted her to raise her hands high [1] and leave him a way out!

T/L Note: [1] Surrender.

“I will not hinder you two,” Xue Wuxia said that she was going to just be a passer-by.

“With you there, Tigress can’t let go. If she wants to give in to her desires, it will be difficult,” Yue Yang would only tell Xue Wu Xia this kind of truth. Anyway, the two of them have the same mind, so as long as they tapped into their emotions, it was the same regardless of him speaking up.

“What’s the matter with the Little Slave?” Xue Wu Xia smiled and asked a question that everyone had almost forgotten.

“Well, it’s a long story. I can’t finish explaining even if you gave me three days and three nights to do so,” Yue Yang scratched the back of his head. Pushing down the Young Slave was already a matter, but involving Pandora in his desires was also another matter.

“Speak slowly, Master, this little girl will rub your back for you. Is this kind of strength comfortable..?” Xue Wu Xia looked like she was doing her best to serve him as Princess Qian Qian came out in a bath towel, sighing, “Oh, The Third Young Master is really lucky to have the Miss Xue of the Xue Family rub his back personally. How enjoyable!” She looked calm on the surface, but the sourness of her aura could turn the entire hot springs into sour plum soup.

“Tigress, Sister Xue, don’t fret, things were actually like this!” Yue Yang said in detail about what happened in the Desire Valley, and of course, the process of pushing them down were all but briefly mentioned.

“So that’s how things went!” Princess Qian Qian followed Yue Yang’s tone and said so. She gave him a sneerful hum before finally letting him go.

“It’s rather pitiful for Pandora. Why don’t you let her come out into the hot springs so we can just have a chat?” Xue Wu Xia asked one last question, which was about the Reaper Mantis. After passing through the Beast Valley, the Reaper Mantis, who entered the Gates of Reincarnation and evolved into a human body, had now risen countless times in strength as she surpassed the realm of the Holy Beast and advanced towards Divinity.

However, she still needed a name.

At that time in the Beast Valley, there were only two of them, so it didn’t really matter if she didn’t have a name.

Now that they have come out of the Beast Valley, Xue Wu Xia and Princess Qian Qian felt that she must have a name so that she could be respected enough.

Several of Yue Yang’s nominations were rejected by Princess Qian Qian. In the end, Xue Wu Xia said, “The Reaper Mantis had always been the luckiest. Accidents have occured since her birth and all her siblings died, leaving her to be the only one left. Then, she met you and was reborn again as you guided her along the way. Then, she had the opportunity to enter the Gates of Reincarnation of the Beast Valley, where she not only obtained a human body, but she had also broken the record of obtaining the Glorious Light of the God and the Holy Fruit of Wisdom. Finally, she broke through her realms and evolved further ahead of a Holy Beast. This proves that sister Reaper Mantis is indeed lucky.”

Princess Qian Qian was amused, “You call that lucky?”

Xue Wu Xia shook her head, “Of course, her luck was entirely due to the fact that she had followed the right owner! With Yue Yang, her luck has been magnificent. Then, let’s call her ‘Future’! After all, she is a lucky child with the blessings of the ‘Future’!”

“Thank you Mistress Wu Xia for the name!” The Reaper Mantis flew out and dashed towards Xue Wu Xia’s shoulders in favor, leaning in and gratefully kissing her fair-skinned face to show her gratitude.

“You little prick, you could have imitated anyone else but you just had to pick up a thing or two about flattery from Hui Tai Lang!” Princess Qian Qian laughed.

“Is Hui Tai Lang a weird wolf? His life seems to be threatened…” The little slave who was helping Xue Wu Xia rub Yue Yang’s back, asked abruptly.

Of course, this was not what she wanted to say.

It was Pandora.

Although the Divine Power of Calamity and the Goddess of Doom have indeed changed, her ability to predict still remained.

When Yue Yang heard it, he jumped up and became anxious, “What’s the matter? His life is in danger even in a place like the Soaring Dragon Continent? Not good, he’s going to the Buried Sword Valley. Could it be that something still exists in the Buried Sword Valley?”

Xue Wu Xia and Princess Qian Qian looked at each other as they said in unison, “Could it be the Lord of Fire?”

Yue Yang was anxious as he threw aside his anticipated trip to the fragrant hot springs.

The two women also knew that the situation was critical, so they immediately helped to dress Yue Yang. Even if his bath towel slipped off his body, they no longer cared about it. Yue Yang opened his arms, hugged Xue Wu Xia and Princess Qian Qian in his embrace and said apologetically, “I’ll make up for your hot spring bath in the future. Today, I have to save Hui Tai Lang!” The two girls and the little slave, under the guidance of Reaper Mantis named ‘Future’, entered the world of Yue Yang’s Grimoire and dressed themselves with clothes and swords, quickly preparing to meet the enemy with Yue Yang.

Yue Yang directly used the Three Realm Compass to teleport to the periphery of the Buried Sword Valley at the fastest speed.

[TL note]:

At this point there’s more new characters that are emerging so I’m kind of making the glossary instead of referring to it. I’ll try my best to provide them as accurately as I can, so let me know if any of the names seem awkward or don’t flow all that well!

At any rate, enjoy the chapter! Hope you guys have a great day/night ahead of you!

-Sterling

Chapter 883: We Would Be The Best Combination Team In The World!

The drilling of the Mountain Earthworms caused the tunnel to be full of twists and turns.

Because of the abnormal energy spreading about in unusually large circles of various places, it felt like walking into a maze. If this occurred before, Yue Yang would definitely feel excited about these energy-varied areas everywhere and attempt just about anything to try and come closer to the truth of what happened that year. However, he was currently so anxious to the point where he didn’t care about checking his surroundings at all. Just like an arrow being released from the bow hold, he plunged straight to the point.

“What’s the matter? What happened?” Xia Hou Wei Jie, the eagle-eyed man who was stationed at the end couldn’t help but become astonished when he saw Yue Yang rushing forward like a shooting star.

“Where is Hui Tai Lang?” Besides the fact that the energy in the entire central area had some oddities to it, there was also a horrible wave of energy vortex.

If he did not see Hui Tai Lang, then he must have entered the energy vortex.

Naturally, Xia Hou Wei Jie knew that Hui Tai Lang had indeed entered the vortex. In fact, he had eaten chicken legs with him as they went exploring the day before. He originally assumed that things would be okay. With the strength of a Divine Beast, it shouldn’t be a problem for him to explore the Buried Sword Valley that had been in ruins for thousands of years. But he didn’t expect Yue Yang would frantically be searching for him just a day later.

Even full of anxiety.

He had never seen Yue Yang wear that sort of expression before so his entire body tensed up suddenly, “I’ll go in and clear up the way for you!”

Yue Yang hurriedly stopped him, “It’s dangerous inside. It’ll be extremely life-threatening if you go in, so just stay here.”

Xia Hou Wei Jie unsheathed his own sword with a shrill and stopped Yue Yang with a solemn expression, ” Losing Xia Hou Wei Jie means nothing to the Soaring Dragon Continent; but it cannot afford to lose you, the Third Young Master of the Yue Clan! If you don’t agree to let me become your scout, I would rather die right in front of you”

“Fine, be careful!”

Yue Yang glanced at Xia Hou Wei Jie and saw the persistence in his eyes.

He had no choice but to agree with a nod of his head.

Just as Xia Hou Wei Jie turned around and was about to rush into the energy vortex, Yue Yang instantly made a sneak attack against him.

Xia Hou Wei Jie had focused his entire body and mind on the energy vortex, completely letting his guard down against Yue Yang as a palm of a hand diagonally intercepted the base of his neck. Moreover, even if he was on guard, with the gap between his strength and Yue Yang’s, he wouldn’t be able to withstand his sneak attack. In fact, Yue Yang didn’t have to lie to him as he could have also stunned him forcibly. However, he was worried that if the blow was too heavy, it would have caused the eagle-eyed man to suffer some severe damage.

Clap!

Xia Hou Wei Jie’s body stagnated abruptly and he slowly fell to the ground.

Yue Yang formed a gust of wind with his palm and skillfully blew his body into the tunnel that was situated a hundred meters away.

He took another deep breath and suppressed the worry in his heart. This was to restore himself to the invisible state of the Innate Supreme to make sure he would be in his best condition upon entering the energy vortex that leads to an unknown place.

The energy vortex completely penetrated through the limitations of space, chaotically connecting several dimensions.

There was hardly any choice for Yue Yang but to enter the first dimensional space at the fastest speed. He found that the world inside was not all that big as the entire space alienated an unknown form of energy. It was terrifying, similar to the state of a gunpowder barrel— the slightest abnormality will cause a devastating explosion. The second dimensional space that he chose to go in was a shattered space. It was estimated that it was formed by the skies of the Buried Sword Valley. However, Yue Yang quickly escaped from the chaos of destruction inside. All of his clothing was tattered by the shattered space’s energy vortex, smithereens turning into fly ash and disappearing.

Yue Yang repeatedly explored six mutated spaces, but found nothing.

In some spaces, remaining traces of the ruins were found, perhaps originating from the buildings of the Buried Sword Valley.

Yue Yang didn’t have time to study the remnants of these ancient buildings, knowing that they might be completely destroyed in the next moment because of the abnormal changes caused by his own intrusion. But, he honestly couldn’t care less about that.

Nothing was as important as the life of Hui Tai Lang.

Although Yue Yang usually complained and scolded him, kicking him a few feet away when he was unhappy, in his heart, Hui Tai Lang definitely did not own a position that was as simple as a watchdog. To some extent, YUe Yang seemed very similar to him, at least in terms of tenacious survival will. As a transcending man, perhaps no one else besides Xue Wu Xia and Princess Qian Qian knew just how much effort he had to put in to guarantee his likelihood of survival and to be ahead. Even though Jun Wu You and Old Fox knew that Yue Yang was a hard worker, they still felt that Yue Yang was an immeasurably peerless genius that could make crazy progress without practicing as hard as the others.

In fact, Yue Yang only appeared lazy on the surface. However, the effort he put in that was unbeknownst to the public was definitely more than any other person that was of the same age as him.

His laziness on the surface was just a disguise against his real life.

He was undoubtedly a genius, but the main reason behind his rapid progression and elevation into the higher ranks were because of his efforts.

The same could be said when it came to Hui Tai Lang.

At first glance, Hui Tai Lang seemed to be the laziest among all of the Battle Beasts. Apart from being clever and flattering, he was almost always asleep. However, he was the most outstanding amongst all beasts, second only to Xiao Wen Li and he was also the first to achieve the Divine Beast status.

In fact, Hui Tai Lang’s hard work in growth and fighting were actually absolutely impossible for ordinary Battle Beasts to attempt.

Like Yue Yang, he had a very strong sense of impending crisis as he was always worried that he would lose everything he has now if he didn’t work hard enough. Although he had become a Divine Beast, he was not someone who would surrender but he was not prideful and complacent either. For greater improvement, he had never regarded himself as a superior beast or a destructive demon wolf that was capable of swallowing the world. Instead, his own persona that he insisted on was a mere watchdog that would lose everything should he lose his own master.

It was precisely because his heart had always placed himself on the edge of the bottom line of safety that he would never be satisfied with the status quo.

There was no contract between them except the roles of a human and a beast. Yet, the two resonated with each other.

Yue Yang thought that seeing Hui Tai Lang was like seeing another version of himself. His struggles in surviving in this world was no different from his own.

This was especially true for Hui Tai Lang.

Seeing the master was like seeing the hope of the future.

If he didn’t have the master who had provided him with everything, then the role he admired and the goal that he had always pursued in his heart would disappear. His whole world would be completely turned upside down as well. The Third Young Master of the Yue Clan who looked down upon the world had to exist for himself to exist.

When Yue Yang anxiously looked for Hui Tai Lang, the latter was also missing his master.

“Boom!”

In the mouth of Hui Tai Lang was an extremely giant Battle Beast ‘Volcanic Whale’ that was 5,000 meters long, 800 meters wide and 300 meters high.

Even with his Power of Destruction ability, the demon wolf could not swallow such a huge monster.

The level of the Volcanic Whale was as high as Heaven Rank Level 6.

But what made him feel afraid was the fact that the strength exerted in the Sea of Flames of this Volcanic Whale was far beyond that of the Heaven Rank Level 6. If it manages to return to its own Sea of Flames, it would be the start of Hui Tai Lang’s fall. He, who had already been severely injured, had no second option. He could only rely on his strongest ability, using the Power of Destruction, to devour what was ahead of him.

He swallowed the Volcanic Whale into its belly starting from its head. Using the strength of his own head and neck, he tried to engulf the entirely erect Volcanic Whale which was thousands of meters long, desperately preventing it from returning to the Sea of Flames.

Only in this way could he restrain this Volcanic Whale that could easily bite back.

It struggled desperately, but Hui Tai Lang was stable like a mountain.

If there were no third party interferences and only the Volcanic Whale’s existence, Hui Tai Lang had enough patience to consume this extremely giant whale. Even if it took hundreds and thousands of years with a very low digestion rate, it could still be done.

“Hahahahaha!”

“Hahaha!”

There was a triumphant laughter that echoed in the entire world of the Sea of Flames.

Every burst of laughter shook the Sea of Flames, causing a spark of fire to burst with every echo.

The owner of this laugh was a giant that was nearly a thousand meters high and composed entirely of extreme flames. He was taller than the Giant Titan that Hui Tai Lang had seen before, this was the master of that Volcanic Whale— the Lord of Fire.

Although his human body had been completely destroyed, the powerful soul of the Lord of Fire and the idea of transcendence that was comparable to the Gods easily cultivated the body with extremely intense flames and reorganized himself. The entire Sea of Flames were not only his natural ability, but also its domain of power. In this Sea of Flames, both him and his summoned beasts were invincible.

If it weren’t for the motives of subduing Hui Tai Lang, the Lord of Fire would not make a move that was as simple as summoning a Volcanic Whale to fight.

“Struggling is meaningless, come to me!” Even without a human body, he still had the strength of a Level 8 Innate Supreme. The remaining strength was no less than the Nine Headed Ocean Demon King who led a crowd to destroy the Tong Tian Tower back in the day. The diva, in some aspects, even exceeded her power.

“…” Hui Tai Lang’s mouth, throat and belly were all stuffed fully by the Volcanic Whale’s mass. He swallowed over the load, making it unable to make any sound at all.

” I already understand your persistence and your intentions. Yes, I don’t want to hide my preferences, so to summarise it up, I admire you very much. Think about it, you and I can be the best combination duo ever! You are the World-Exterminating Demon Wolf whose main attribute is fire, and I am the Lord of Fire who is only a sliver away from becoming a God. If I become the God of Fire in the future, you will be the mount of the God of Fire. Apart from me, you would become the strongest Fire Beast in the world! Your will and wisdom surprised me, but it also made me experience a kind of natural joy and appreciation for your talents. In such a short time, you were able to come up with countermeasures against the Volcanic Whale. And even though you knew I was watching from the sidelines as an owner, you still dared to swallow it boldly… Make a contract with me and be my beast, for I will give you the best things in the world. No matter what you need, I will satisfy you! I dare say that you are the destined beast of my resurrection and you are the opportunity for me to become a God in the future!” The Lord of Fire patiently inked a contract on the forehead of Hui Tai Lang as he tried to persuade him.

“…” Hui Tai Lang had no other way except to resist it with his will.

“Maybe you are not used to being under the commands of other people, or maybe you are trying to test my patience. Hahaha! Let me tell you, after I escaped the seal, I have stayed here for tens of thousands of years and never had a trace of boredom linger within me. My patience is beyond the tolerance level of mere ordinary people. And, as you must know, people with the Supreme Will would not change their minds very easily. Come on, let’s make a contract! We would truly be the best combination team in the world!” The Lord of Fire persuaded him over and over again in a very patient manner.

“…” Hui Tai Lang refused repeatedly as well. When the Lord of Fire invaded his mind with a powerful surge of mental power, he used his feelings of missing his master, Yue Yang, as a shield to resist the impact of the opponent’s Supreme Will.

It would be fine if the master was here.

With him here, even if he flies and kicks it casually, it would be much easier for me to replenish some energy.

This guy talks too much and is nagging all day like a toothless old woman. It’s better to be with the master— he would scold and beat us accordingly while he does things quickly and neatly without any muddling. If the master is here, I don’t know if he would be very angry at the fact that I have gotten into trouble again this time. If I knew that the trouble this time was this powerful, I would have escaped sooner.

Hui Tai Lang knew that his master was busy with his marriage and would not come in a short time, but he still wanted to see him suddenly appear in front of him and give him a big surprise!

Even if he was already a beast, he could afford to be alone.

But that kind of habitual dependence on his master would still be indispensable!

========================================================================

This translation is presented by Nocturne Translations.

At any rate, enjoy the chapter! Hope you guys have a great day/night ahead of you!

-Sterling

We are looking for Chinese, Korean, and Japanese translators. Join us on Discord and look for Mystique to guide you through recruitment.

Chapter 884: Evolve, Chaos Ghost

After Yue Yang entered a certain mutated space, Xiao Wen Li emerged out of nowhere.

Her expression was solemn as she even started staring ahead rather nervously.

Yue Yang hadn’t seen this expression of hers for a very long amount of time, especially after she had inherited the information of her previous life and recovered part of her memory that made her willpower even more indestructible. If something could make her nervous at this stage, it would be… Yue Yang felt his surroundings carefully, secretly noting that the situation was probably as bad as it looked. The entire space seemed to be similar to a domain that belonged to someone else, where the mutated energy had completely turned into a world of fire.

Even if it was the work of a God, it would be weird to own such a huge spatial domain, wouldn’t it?

He couldn’t see the end of the fire even with his Heaven Eyes Transverse skill.

Under his feet was nothing but a boundless sea of flames.

There were countless volcanoes hidden on the bottom of the sea, and from time to time, a burst of magma fire would burst into the sky. The billowing thick smoke and volcanic ash obscured the sky, and even Yue Yang couldn’t see what was beyond the black clouds as all he could do was take note of an entirely different change in the energy.

The hot air pierced into his lungs like a burning knife as the heavily sulfuric smell of the burning flames caused an almost choking sensation.

“This seems like someone else’s spatial domain, but it’s impossible for a domain to be this large. Besides, if this is a manifestation of domain power, then we should feel a kind of restriction against our wills,” Yue Yang was slightly deprived of his ability to see through this mutated world. Out of caution, he called out to the already-prepared Princess Qian Qian and Xue Wu Xia for a discussion out of caution.

“I feel very disturbed. It’s like a very strong destructive energy is devouring this world,” Princess Qian Qian frowned.

“The Book of Truth doesn’t have any notable hints either,” Xue Wu Xia flipped through the Book of Truth and shook her head.

“You two go back first, then. If the fight cannot be won, I’ll be able to run faster by myself,” Yue Yang was not the kind of dumb person who would die if he doesn’t win. He was a clever man who slowly flies the kite [1] to death if he doesn’t win.

T/L Note: [1] A gaming tactic used for long-ranged players using the distance advantages to lure enemies towards them, but never fully being able to reach. Once the enemies are exhausted, the player can finish them off easily.

To put it in a nicer form of speech, this kind of tactic was known as an art of patient harassment.

But in harsher words, it was a nasty type of despicable escorting.

In short, it was impossible for Yue Yang to fight the enemy recklessly in the case of insufficient strength. He was not a stupid kid who will revert to having zero IQ when he got angry. He would pretend to not to be able to withstand the opponent’s attack even if he had enough power to trample over his enemies to make them have a false sense of security. Things like having an honest fight against honour didn’t apply to Yue Yang. Putting the enemy’s corpse into eighteen poses and then standing on top of it singing, “After I hurt you, I will pass by with a smile,”— that was the style of student Yue Yang.

Princess Qian Qian had looked down upon him for such shameless actions before, but because of the many things she had experienced, she found that the enemies were getting stronger than  before. If he were to remain as an honest child, a hundred lives wouldn’t be enough for Yue Yang to sacrifice. Gradually, she changed her viewpoints and agreed with his combat strategy, finally fully meeting his tactical needs.

Xue Wu Xia on the other hand, disregarded the importance of his tactics and prioritised the final victory.

To a certain extent, she and Yue Yang have similar thoughts.

Before returning to the Grimoire World, Xue Wu Xia suddenly spoke of a possibility, “You said that this might be a realm, but I think that it might be truly possible.”

Princess Qian Qian was shocked, “If this was indeed a realm, who can possibly be the owner? It’s impossible for even a God to have such a huge spatial domain, right?”

Xue Wu Xia nodded, “We have never seen the domain of the Gods, so I won’t mention it for the time being. But I think that it’s really possible for this Sea of Flames to be a domain. However, I don’t think that it’s a spiritual manifestation of the domain, but that of a trait or a certain power. If this Sea of Flames is a manifestation of a domain power of someone that had perfect control over fire, then it can somewhat be explained. At the beginning, this Sea of Flames was probably normal; it might have been slightly larger than our own domains, but not this exaggerated. But if this perfect fire-controlling person uses the power of this domain to expand gradually for months and years, without anyone to stop them, the Sea of Flames would keep expanding until it becomes what it is today.”

After Yue Yang listened, he fell into deep thought.

After a long time, he nodded in agreement, “Yes, this is most likely the expansion of the Lord of Fire’s domain power. Because this is his real domain, paired with the fact that he used the energy of the Sea of Flames for expansion, there was no suppression of the will of any other domains.”

Princess Qian Qian’s thoughts were also reflected, “If this is the case, then you have to be more careful. This Sea of Flames is very dangerous.”

Xue Wu Xia, “Yes, although this Sea of Flames doesn’t have the power to suppress our wills, it must have an increasing effect for its owner regardless, because this person was very likely to be a master of fire control. That basically means that the person who fits into that criteria the most is none other than the Lord of Fire, so I don’t recommend using  the Nirvana Flames for the first time. Let’s not discuss the effects of using the Flame of Nirvana for the time being. For a master of fire control, seeing the Nirvana Flame would mean that they would do everything to have a chance to obtain it. If it couldn’t be taken, then he or she would use any and every form of means to eliminate the owner of the Nirvana Flame. To avoid this, I think it’s best not to use the Heaven’s Fury Fire Lotus and just stick with Frost and Purple Electricity.”

Yue Yang listened to this far-sighted suggestion.

In order to prevent any accidents from happening, such as being too late to escape, he persuaded Xiao Wen Li to go back as well.

If Hui Tai Lang wasn’t there, Yue Yang didn’t want to go to war with an old immortal such as the Lord of Fire. He would have most definitely turned around and run away as soon as he encountered him.

If he was there, Yue Yang’s plan of rescue was to immediately use the Three Realms Compass to escape this hell-like World of Fire. In this kind of place, fighting against the Lord of Fire or any old immortal like him was simply a fruitless task.

“Hui Tai Lang wouldn’t be so stupid to enter this kind of world that consisted dof the Sea of Flames, let alone take the nitiative to provoke the Lord of Fire? He has always been a coward, so he shouldn’t be here!” Yue Yang muttered to himself. The more he explored the Sea of Flames, the more shocked he became. This Sea of Flames was truly not as simple as a radius of tens of kilometers; it was really a world. Yue Yang has carried out a dozen consecutive teleportations that carried him throughout distances close to a thousand kilometers, but there seemed to be no edge for the Sea of Flames.

“Whoo!”

Just when Yue Yang was about to discuss with Xue Wu Xia and Princess Qian Qian, the manifestation of the accumulated chaotic energy and the Power of Divine Calamity that he obtained in the Heaven Realm’s Desire Valley appeared as the Spirit of Flames and Smoke.

The spirit that was used to pass through the Beast Valley had now awakened from her deep slumber.

From the world’s purest Nirvana Flame, the chaotic energy of the source of the universe and the most destructive Power of Divine Calamity, she has now transformed into a new super-elemental Battle Beast— Chaos Ghost.

Perhaps it was because she had sensed a tremendous amount of fire attributed energy, which made her feel instinctively ‘hungry’ after she had just evolved.

With a stroke of her hands, the Sea of Flames within a radius of ten kilometers all transformed into a pillar of fire and rose into the sky.

It was a kind of spectacular sight.

Even Yue Yang has never seen a scene like this unfold, much less outsiders. A blazing flurry of flames rose to the sky as millions of fire streams seemed to flow backwards and infinitely to the body of the Chaos Ghost.

Because she has the chaotic energy that was capable of absorbing all the fiery heat of the current world, she had evolved from the Skyfire Ghost to the Chaos Ghost, which was equivalent to having an infinite stomach that could engulf all the flames in the world. Even if more flames rushed in, she would not refuse it. Instead, she would absorb it frantically as she didn’t know how much heat was possessed by the Sea of Flames under her feet. The Chaos Ghost had already drawn a lump of fire that was accumulated in the form of a waterfall within a radius of ten kilometers. However, using that amount in comparison towards the actual Sea of Flames was like a drop of water in an ocean— a minute amount that barely made a difference.

“Okay, you can slowly absorb it after we save Hui Tai Lang. I asked you for your help before, you just ran off to sleep; now that I don’t need your help, you come out instead!” Yue Yang gave the Chaos Ghost a small lecture.

“Hmph!” Chaos Ghost’s self-control has always been mediocre, but if there was one person in the world who could give her orders, it was Yue Yang!

Facing the Sea of Flames, she acted like a person who was graced with the presence of street foods after starving for three days and nights.

Even as Yue Yang criticized her, she sucked dozens of mouthfuls of pure heat energy before reluctantly stopping.

He asked her to go back into the Grimoire World. After the advancement and evolution, although the strength of the Chaos Ghost had skyrocketed, her self-control ability had not been significantly improved, so she shook her head and rejected Yue Yang’s request. She might be worried that Yue Yang would not ever summon her out again. Although she could not stop Yue Yang from advancing to find Hui Tai Lang, she was reluctant to go back. Her behaviour was just like a hungry person who didn’t dare to steal any form of gourmet food, but was also reluctant to leave.

Well, I can’t do anything about it. Yue Yang shook his head before he finally gave in to her being by his side.

Among the many Battle Beasts, she was the most worried.

With her weak self-control, being able to not absorb the fire energy in the face of the Sea of Flames was already very impressive.

“Whoo!” The Chaos Ghost teleported along with Yue Yang several times before she suddenly pointed to a direction to the southeast with a finger lit with flames, indicating that she had sensed the presence of Hui Tai Lang.

“Huh?” Yue Yang felt strange, I haven’t even sensed Hui Tai Lang, so how did she feel it? How can I say that I am also an Innate Supreme with the added abilities of the Heaven Eyes Transverse? Did my senses actually lose against her who has just advanced and evolved? You know, her previous sensitivity was the worst among the Battle Beasts!

After the evolution, the Chaos Ghost gradually condensed into the flames of a delicate human face before suddenly, a burst of red flames representing her anger was formed.

Under Yue Yang’s gaze, she sent out a wave of energy carrying the Divine Power of Calamity to the Sea of Flames.

In an instant, the entire Sea of Flames was immediately engulfed by a huge flame tornado thousands of meters high and tens meters in diameter, sweeping towards the far southeast at extreme speed.

Yue Yang understood that in this world of Sea of Flames, the Chaos Ghost had also gained an increase of fire energy. Presumably, she had sensed the existence of Hui Tai Lang through the Sea of Flames. Through Chaos Ghost’s attack, Yue Yang also captured a piece of information that there were indeed enemies that Hui Tai Lang was fighting against. He was probably caught in a difficult fight against a strong enemy. Otherwise, Chaos Ghost would not be so eager to help out even when she was this far away from him.

Did Hui Tai Lang really run into the Lord of Fire?

This damned dog. Why didn’t it run away after seeing that kind of immortality?

When Yue Yang thought about it, he didn’t get angry but he was really provoked by the True Monarch Fierce Fire. If it weren’t for Pandora’s prophetic ability that made him aware, he would have died in this Sea of Flames once he came searching!

“Let’s go, you are responsible for blocking the enemy. When Hui Tai Lang is rescued, then only will we settle matters with him! This damned brat hadn’t been beaten for a while, so I think his skin is probably itching!” Yue Yang was happy and angry as he rushed out first, followed closely by the Chaos Ghost. They trailed behind the flame tornado that was getting bigger and faster, not only using this flame tornado with the Divine Power of Calamity, but also to ascend to the peak state in the fastest time.

Although he didn’t know the strength of the Lord, seeing the very evident creation of the Sea of Flames, Yue Yang felt that this battle may be the hardest battle in his life!

Chapter 885 : Innate Or Insane?

Yue Yang had never seen such a scene before.

When he saw Hui Tai Lang, his entire being was stunned.

What he saw was a large mountain of flesh that appeared to be higher than the Tie Ling Mountain in the outside world towering towards the sky. Bursts of volcanic magma and ash erupted from time to time. If Yue Yang didn’t have the Heaven Eyes Transverse, he wouldn’t have been able to tell that this product was also an actual beast. Everyone would feel like this was a volcano no matter who looked at it— however, there was no doubt that it was a beast.

Yue Yang finally saw the legendary Volcanic Whale, a kind of beast that no longer existed in Tong Tian Tower.

He had never thought that he would see it in this way… Under the mountain of flesh, he discovered that Hui Tai Lang had become a giant wolf of several hundred meters, opening his mouth like a fool and was biting onto the Volcanic Whale. With the beast in his lips, he held his head up to face the prehistoric beast towards the sky.

For goodness sake!

Yue Yang became nervous as he saw what happened.

Even if you want to bite something and swallow it whole, why couldn’t you find a smaller target? How can a prehistoric behemoth that is several kilometers long be swallowed? Besides, this Volcanic Whale has a strength of a 6th Heaven Rank. Even if it doesn’t struggle, with your strength, wouldn’t it be too much of a whimsical thought to digest it?

Worst of all, this place was still their home. Although the Sea of Flames weren’t able to burn Hui Tai Lang, the gain to him was very small, whereas the Volcanic Whale was born as a Battle Beast that thrives in the Sea of Flames. Yue Yang really didn’t know how Hui Tai Lang managed to bite and lift up the Volcanic Whale, but this method was definitely equivalent to drinking poison for the sake of quenching thirst.

“Rumble rumble rumble…”

A huge vortex suddenly appeared in the Sea of Flames under Yue Yang’s feet.

The burning magma revolved like water and the vortex that was several thousand meters in size appeared beneath his feet. The sight was rather spectacular.

There seemed to be a human face faintly flashing under the whirlpool.. Before Yue Yang could look at it intently, there was an unimaginable human face bursting out of the sea. It opened its mouth filled with magma and sharp teeth, wanting to swallow him up desperately.

Although this human face was rather incomparable with the Volcanic Whale, it was also a super giant monster.

After opening its mouth, the size was bigger than a football field.

Moreover, in that revolting and greedy mouth, there was a kind of force that held people back and prevented them from escaping. It was capable of absorbing flame, magma, thick smoke, lava and whatnot.

The speed of the sneak attack was extremely fast.

Yue Yang didn’t react. The big mouth closed instantly, swallowing both Yue Yang and the Chaos Ghost. Only when the human-faced demon appeared out of the Sea of flames did Hui Tai Lang realise that there was another enemy all along, remaining hidden from his sight behind the flames. It turned out that in his eyes, the suspiciously hidden human-faced demon resembled the appearance of a fisherman with the body of a fish.

Besides having a hugely disproportionate mouth, this monster fish had a strange face that resembled a burning stone and there was even a tentacle on top of its head.

There was a ball of magic crystal that exuded pure energy on the tip of its head.

The whirlpool made a sneak attack and jumped out of the Sea of Flames to engulf Yue Yang’s odd-faced fishman.

Then, it retreated back into the flames proudly.

It was about to slap the fiery lava with its powerful tail and was preparing to dive back into the shield of the fire, all in hopes to wait for another victim.

Suddenly, the mouth that had just swallowed up a bunch of junk started to swell up. And just like a volcanic eruption, the fishman’s huge mouth suddenly opened, spouting countless sources of flames in the form of waves. Just as the flame tornado that was about to disappear from a distance changed its power and appearance,  it suddenly became a hundred times stronger, drawing almost half of the Sea of Flames away. The odd-faced fishman had no time to escape into the depths of the Sea of Flames, so it couldn’t do anything but allow the situation to unfold.

Even if the strange-faced fishman was a fire sea creature that had the strength of a 4th Heaven Rank, it was not enough to see through the camouflaged flame tornado that carried the Divine Power of Calamity.

Chaos Ghost angrily watched a hand popping out from the strange-faced fishman’s mouth.

Several golden thunderbolts dropped from a very high altitude.

The bolts directly blasted the head of the fishman that was stuck in the depths of the flame tornado. The fishman with the strange face vomited again, spewing out all of the junk that it had swallowed before, but Hui Tai Lang did not see Yue Yang.

“What are you looking at? Did you really think that this Young Master would seriously let a spoiled fish consume me?” Yue Yang’s real figure appeared above the head of Hui Tai Lang.

Under his surprise gaze, Yue Yang gave him a fierce kick.

This heavy kick was so familiar, and it was so timely as well.

Hui Tai Lang received the greatest boost from Yue Yang as both his courage and strength doubled from before.

The master is here, I can finally let go of this! Hui Tai Lang immediately vomited the Volcanic Whale that had just been bitten,releasing the terrifying clump of meat that could not be swallowed as he regained his freedom. Now, he truly understood the value of freedom. In fact, they were in a mutually uncomfortable scenario— the Volcanic Whale was having a hard time, but Hui Tai Lang was also feeling very uncomfortable, especially when there was a Lord of Fire that constantly used his mental power to force a contract between them. He felt that the time he spent in that position was no less than an hour. Relying on the Innate True Qi and the small power of the Law transmitted by Yue Yang, Hui Tai Lang immediately doubled in size happily.

A powerful head bump knocked away the Volcanic Whale that looked like a clump of flesh.

Hui Tai Lang wanted to tell Yue Yang as soon as he could.

The biggest enemy was not the Volcanic Whale, but the Lord of Fire who just hid himself and sneaked off. That guy was the most terrifying existence.

But he didn’t have time to speak. Except for the large head shake that he did after bumping the Volcanic Whale, he used his entire frame to shield over Yue Yang’s head, subconsciously blocking the possibly heavy blow from Lord of Fire for his master.

Boom!

The giant palm of fire that appeared out of the Sea of Flames without warning had slapped Hui Tai Lang away.

The first action after its successful blow was to close the giant palm homeopathically, as if trying to squeeze a little ant to death, trying to pinch the comparatively small student Yue Yang to death.

Compared with the Lord of Fire’s palm, Yue Yang was really considered smaller than a little ant.

No matter how he looked at it, Yue Yang wouldn’t be able to escape from the grasps of his palm.

So, he closed his palms and tightened it hard into a fist.

The squeezing motion formed a high temperature and intense inflammation that was a thousand degrees higher than that of the Sea of Flames. The temperature had reached the ultra high heat of melting gold, sparkling stones and gasifying everything.

Hui Tai Lang that was sent flying was about to drop back, but the Volcanic Whale that fell into the Sea of Flames immediately recovered its combat power as its tail twitched vigorously. Hui Tai Lang that was hit was once again swept away like a meteor as he disappeared into the sky. The Lord of Fire emerged from the Sea of Flames, but his face did not portray the joy of killing the enemy.

On the contrary, he wore a strange expression.

He looked at his right hand that was formed by fire, only to be surprised to find that his fist that had strangled the enemy was incredibly frozen. It turned out that his fingers and palms that were made in the form of hot flames were now gradually frozen into ice. From the interior to the exterior, it spreaded slowly until his entire right hand was frozen. A kind of humiliating anger flashed in the eyes of the Lord of Fire. Except for a certain rival back then, no one had ever frozen the palm of his hand.

No, even the rival back then failed to do this.

There was no increasing support for the Sea of Flames and the body of the fire energy element back then either.

A person who could perfectly control the flames had his own hand turned into ice by the enemy. What else is this if it wasn’t shameful?

The will of the Lord of Fire erupted and the entire frozen fist instantly ‘smashed to pieces’ forcefully. The icy fragments that dispersed all over the sky were completely wiped out in the raging flames surrounding it that carried his anger and rage.

Only Yue Yang, who had been ‘strangled’ just now, remained standing in a calm and collected manner.

The corners of his lips maintained his ever-present smile as if nothing had happened and everything was business as usual.

“Who are you?” The Lord of Fire didn’t understand Yue Yang’s identity, but he could guess one thing. This weird young man probably knew Hui Tai Lang. Otherwise, the wolf wouldn’t risk himself to save him. Moreover, when Hui Tai Lang saw him, he was completely energised, ridding himself entirely from the mental lock.

“It doesn’t matter who I am; the matter is who are you? Don’t you know that Hui Tai Lang is my watchdog? You’re still looking into the gaze of the owner when you’re beating up the dog, so it’s obvious that you’re asking for a fight if you’re beating up my family’s watchdog in front of me!” Yue Yang took out the ‘I am a gangster, are you afraid now?’ look, but the Lord of Fire frowned when he heard this kind of bullshit.

“He’s your watchdog? Nonsense, you don’t have a contract with it at all!” The Lord of Fire was a little confused. Could it be that after ten thousand years, the Tong Tian Tower has a super power like the Buried Sword?

This kid looked like a pupil—if it weren’t for a second generation ancestor, it would be impossible for him to have such strength at such a young age. But this kid didn’t seem to be the type who lies. If he used a beast as a watchdog, then the owner behind it would probably be a really strong man like that of the Buried Sword. It wasn’t all that weird for those who bore the blood of their powerful ancestors to be a prodigy, despite its probabilities being one out of ten thousand.

Originally, the Lord of Fire wanted to kill Yue Yang in seconds, but he was now afraid that he might be a bit too eager to shoot him. In case his death would provoke a certain powerful enemy that he could not afford to, he suppressed his anger a little and asked, “Who are you? Why do you not greet me upon the sight of a strong senior cultivator? Was this how your family educated you?”

“The adults only educated me in the way that I should be careful when I see people with unpredictable intentions. My civility and politeness depends on people’s character. For a senior who makes a sneak attack, I think it wouldn’t be too late to figure out his identity before deciding if I should respect them. Whether you are an Innate or whether you’re insane, I do not know you. So, who exactly are you?” Yue Yang asked with a sneer.

“When this Lord captures you, I will be sure to let you know!” The Lord of Fire expanded his mind infinitely, spreading across the entire Sea of Flames.

Finally, he discovered that there were no other enemies besides Yue Yang in the Sea of Flames.

This was nothing but a child that ran away from home to venture on a journey to improve cultivation. With no adults to look out for him, there was no need to ponder about decisions too much.

Maybe it was a bit too soon to go in for the kill, but it was very necessary to slow down and interrogate him slowly to know about the progression of the outside world. The ice attribute energy of this boy was very powerful— and if he was a descendent of one of the family lines of his enemies, all the more reason not to let him go.

However, the enemy had died with him for many years, so there should not be many future generations.

Perhaps, an inheritor among the line of descendents.

There were many talented people in the Tong Tian Tower. At every certain age, one or several super-powerful people like him would be born. It was considered a normal occurrence— after all, it would have been weirder if there were none!

The Lord of Fire felt a certain threat, but he also got a little excited. If there were no stronger opponents than himself in the future generations, doesn’t it mean that the entire Tong Tian Tower would belong to him? Today, this kid must be captured and interrogated about the modern situation of the Tong Tian Tower. If the Tong Tian Tower did not have a strong person who surpasses him, it was about time for himself, who had been in hiding for many years to recover his strength, to go out and seize the ownership of the entire Tower.

“Boy, let this God teach you in the place of your family! I’ll educate you on the meaning of politeness!” The Lord of Fire laughed triumphantly. Maybe the super strong man who helped nurture this kid would be a bit tricky to deal with, but there is nothing to be afraid of a mere kid that has a backing! With his strength alone, there’s nothing that could possibly scare me!

Chapter 882: There Will Be Nothing I Regret More In Life

Boom, boom!

When the Lord of Fire and Yue Yang were testing the waters around each other, Chaos Ghost was already fighting with the fishman.

If the Chaos Ghost originally only retained her strength as the Skyfire Ghost, it would be impossible for her to fight against the fishman that was at Level 4 of the Heaven Rank.

But now, things are different. By absorbing the Chaotic Energy and the Divine Power of Calamity in the Desire Valley, she had evolved into a Chaos Ghost of a super elemental body. In addition to the Nirvana Flame, she now owns the source of power from the Chaotic Energy and the most destructive Divine Power of Calamity in the world. The three energies were perfectly merged in her body, allowing her to become the newly evolved Chaos Ghost which is one of Yue Yang’s top beasts.

Against her, the fishman was rather unlucky.

There was no advantage against her at all.

Even the most powerful engulfing ability had no effect on the super-elemental body.

If the Chaos Ghost was really swallowed, it would only make his stomach turn into a mess.

It turns out that the fire energy that specializes in killing and injuring was better than a tonic for the Chaos Ghost. Burning her with the flames were the equivalent actions of her having a hearty meal. The Chaos Ghost would be even more happier should the fire burn brighter and stronger.

The fishman’s third ability was very deadly to other Battle Beasts. It was known as ‘Dazzling Lure’ that came with an extreme mental deception ability. However, it did not work at all when used against the Chaos Ghost. As a spirit herself, she was void of rich human emotions and was not under the illusion of emotional manipulations. Hence, no matter how ‘dazzling’ the attack was, she wouldn’t be affected in the slightest.

On the contrary, the Chaos Ghost had various restraints against the fishman that was of a higher level and had a larger size.

If she still remained as the former Skyfire Ghost, without the source of the Chaos Energy being absorbed by Yue Yang, her absorption of fire energy would not be able to reach the same infinite capacity as it was now.

This was not the most important point.

The most unlucky thing for the fishman was the fact that the Chaos Ghost could wield a little bit of the Divine Power of Calamity.

Even if it was the slightest amount, it was more than sufficient for the fishman to encounter 18 years of misfortune and more.

“Huhu!”

“Roar! Howl, howl!”

The Chaos Ghost tightly locked the fishman in the flame tornado that she controlled. The attacks of the flames and wind blades could not harm him, but the Divine Power of Calamity was slowly infiltrating. No matter how stupid the fishman was, he knew that he was going to lose. He formed explosions of shockwaves desperately, shaking away the Chaos Ghost that was constantly drawing fire energy from his body and wanting nothing more than to escape the flame tornado cage.

But this flame tornado was a bit similar to the realm of the Chaos Ghost. Under her will, the fishman could not easily escape.

If it weren’t for the rescue of the Volcanic Whale’s swish of a tail, the Chaos Ghost would have most definitely absorbed the fire energy of the fishman to the final drop, leaving him to be nothing but a husk of a dried ‘fish’.

“This spirit beast belongs to you?” The Lord of Fire was about to attack Yue Yang, but when he looked at the Chaos Ghost, he immediately expressed a look of greed— a gaze similar to that of pirates seeing the greatest treasure. In the depths of its eyes, another kind of pity was reflected. How great would it be if this spirit beast was not a Guardian Beast! A super-elemental beast like this was indeed more suitable for me than the previous demon wolf.

With the Divine Power of Calamity as her origin and chaotic energy as her body, this super-elemental ghost-bodied Battle Beast was simply everyone’s dream beast.

Most importantly, she even owned the Nirvana Flame, which was something that even he would not be able to obtain that easily.

That’s the Nirvana Flame!

Although it was only a trace, it was more than enough.

With that eternal Nirvana Flame, she was an immortal existence… How can such a beast belong to someone else? I have worked so hard to search for power and cultivate for many years, but in the end, all that amounts to nothing compared to a mere sheltered kid. The demon wolf has unlimited potential— he was not even fully grown, yet he had already become a Divine Beast. This Chaos Ghost also has infinite potential. Chaos Energy, Divine Power of Calamity and the Nirvana Flame were all immeasurable existences. Having all three of them together in a perfect unison is practically breaking the hearts of other cultivators.

“You must die!” The Lord of Fire glared at Yue Yang with hatred.

“For?” Yue Yang pretended to be puzzled.

“These two beasts being under your ownership are like treasures being covered in dust! Such precious commodities are entirely ruined by you! A demon wolf beast was actually used to become a mere watchdog, and you even kicked him over and over again. And this Chaos Ghost! As a guardian Beast, you didn’t even bother to give her any extra guidance or cultivation, letting her do as she pleases…” The Lord of Fire was as angry as a rich young master witnessing a poor child playing with precious stones as marbles [1] . He couldn’t take it for even a second longer.

T/L Note: [1] I believe it means not knowing the value of something precious and just fooling around with it.

“Well, jealousy can be cured, but it’s a shame that you act that way even though you’re a senior!” Student Yue Yang raised his middle finger, especially despised at his words and actions. He doesn’t have the right to control how he trains his beasts— the Lord of Fire could just remain infuriated and envious all he wants, and it’s best if he could injure himself internally while he’s at it too.

“Junior, go to Hell!” The Lord of Fire became very angry when he heard Yue Yang.

“How boring, who would want to fight with you?” Yue Yang soared into the sky. His speed was so fast that he surpassed the thousand-meter-high Lord of Fire in an instant. He paused at an altitude of about 2,000 meters, the dark and oddly-shaped clouds serving as his background as he started beckoning to the Lord of Fire, “Before I leave, as a young master of a later generation with great morals and upbringing. I would like to give you a word of advice. Senior, you should take some medication! However, you can’t eat too many brain-damaging tablets. Just take a few tablets of them at a time, remember that you can’t eat it as a meal!”

The Lord of Fire was trembling with anger as he curled both of his hands into fists.

The black clouds immediately burned like a fire, moving drastically like boiling water.

Thousands of huge meteorites flew out from the black clouds, dragged out with black and red tracks as they concentrated on blasting towards Yue Yang.

The group of meteorites burning all over the sky looked like a rain of fire, smashing into Yue Yang’s entire frame.

The Lord of Fire clamped both of his hands together and all the meteorites gathered, turning into a dense and seamless meteorite ball around Yue Yang.

The Volcanic Whale on the surface of the Sea of Flames leaped high. It raised its head and opened its mouth,swallowing the stone ball composed of countless meteorites. Its attack and cooperation with the Lord of Fire could be described as a tacit understanding.

However, what was swallowed was only Yue Yang’s phantom.

Yue Yang’s true body had already unsheathed the Tao Tie Blade as he levitated high in the skies. Then, he made a big attack that was known as ‘Slash: Lord of Rivers and Mountains’ and brought his blade down overwhelmingly.

The target was not to aim at the extremely huge Volcanic Whale, but it was directed at the odd-faced fishman that was being beaten up by the Chaos Ghost to his North. The sword’s energy had not yet reached its target, yet it had already split the Sea of Flames into a huge seam that was thousands of meters long. The fishman monster screamed, bursting out a spherical flame shield all over his body to prevent himself from expanding. He slammed around with flashing tentacles, emanating a dash of dazzling light that blinded others to the point where they couldn’t open their eyes. It was all done under the intention of interfering with Yue Yang’s attack.

“Howl!”

Yue Yang’s heavy blow suddenly stagnated.

The one who was responsible for the kill was none other than Hui Tai Lang, who had been quietly accumulating strength to restore himself to his best condition.

He flew from the side and plunged into the Sea of Flames, lifting up the huge body of the fishman that was sheltered in the flame shield.

When Yue Yang’s Tao Tie Blade resumed its slashing and split the flame shield, Hui Tai Lang suddenly turned his body upside down. With a pair of sharp claws, he severely tore open the fishman’s weakest belly.

“How dare you!” It was unlikely that the Lord of Fire would sit back and watch all of this unfold by the actions of Yue Yang and Hui Tai Lang.

An overweight punch knocked Hui Tai Lang, distorting his senses as he flew 10,000 meters away.

The Lord of Fire then flicked his finger towards Yue Yang who had proceeded in an attempt to kill the fishman from behind with the Tao Tie Blade.

Yue Yang fell into the Sea of Flames. At the moment when the Volcanic Whale’s giant tail hit him hard, his entire being bounced up like a bullet ricocheting off a board. Ignoring the pursuit of the Lord of Fire, he used the Tao Tie Blade in his hand to immediately make another move again. This style was a slash toward the sky— Second Slash: Heaven and Earth Collapse!

The terrifying sword qi drew an oblique cross on the wound that Big Gray Wolf tore, which further aggravated the damage on the belly of the strange-faced fishman.

Blood splattered as it sprinkled everywhere

The Lord of Fire laughed like a lunatic.

The severely injured fishman fell into the Sea of Flames and initially rolled in pain, but soon, he returned to normal.

The horrible wound of the oblique cross-shaped bloody skin and flesh was healed without medicine in the Sea of Flames. When the fishman swam out of the vortex of the Sea of Flames, his belly was unexpectedly smooth and it seemed like it had never been injured. It turned out that through the partial absorption of the Chaos Ghost and the intense pounding of Yue Yang and Hui Tai Lang, his strength had already depleted. But, it was completely recovered through the aid of the Sea of Flames, making him become even stronger and more vigorous than before.

“Hahahaha! You really are a sheltered kid who stays at home and only lives under the protection of adults! Did you think that everything in the world would baby you in the way that you were used to living in? Without the protection of the adults behind you, you would be nothing at all. Let me tell you, in my domain, the Sea of Flames, all my beasts are immortal! No matter how much damage they receive, they will instantly recover. Even if they died in battle, they could easily be resurrected. Do you know why I have spent thousands of years creating this Sea of Flames? The reason is simple— because I want to create a world of fire that will never die, a world where I am invincible!” The Lord of Fire laughed.

“Bark bark!” Hui Tai Lang whispered twice to Yue Yang, saying that he did his best just now.  Truth be told, it wasn’t the fact that he didn’t work hard, but this guy was too abnormal.

“It turns out that you are not part of the Sea of Flames domain, but a kind of ‘fire-attribute-ignition domain’. As long as it was a fire-attributed Battle Beast, in this Sea of Flames-like domain, you can continue to recover their health,” Yue Yang finally saw through the true power of the Lord of Fire with his Heaven Eyes Transverse.

“So what if you understand? In this flame world, because of the abnormal amounts of energy, no matter how powerful one may be, anyone who enters must wait until the day of the energy transfer before leaving. Do you know how long it takes till the next energy transfer? It is almost two months later! Did you really  think you could still escape between my fingers for such a long time? Just now, I just tested your ability; what comes next is the real attack of Hell!” His body immediately increased its energy by at least ten times.

Even the mere explosive momentum caused Hui Tai Lang to fly up to a kilometer away in an inverted position.

Yue Yang used the Tao Tie Blade to resist, but even he slowly moved back by three hundred meters. Only the Chaos Ghost with the super-elemental body stayed in place without feeling a change.

With his hand on the surface of the Sea of Flames, the Lord of Fire drew a huge flame rune array with a radius of 10,000 meters in diameter. Yue Yang frowned when he saw this formation. This was not a rune pattern that he was familiar with; instead, it seemed to be a very special and very strange ancient rune pattern.

Using the energy of the Sea of Flames as the source, the giant rune formation was completed, immediately bursting out with irresistible power.

Even if Hui Tai Lang and Yue Yang resisted strongly, they were instantly pressured to fall onto the surface of the Sea of Flames.

With every meter deeper, the feeling of the power of mighty power doubled.

What kind of pattern is this ancient rune formation of fire energy? Yue Yang felt that if he didn’t find its core principle, he would have no insight into the truth. Then, he would not be able to find flaws or leave the surface of the Sea of Flames smoothly. With the strength of the Lord of Fire, the Volcanic Whale and the fishman, fighting them on the inferior terrain of the surface of the Sea of Flames was simply abuse.

Hui Tai Lang was also in a hurry and couldn’t fly. Merely relying on four legs with each of the opponents being behemoths, he would be at a disadvantage when it came to fighting!

He hurried to Yue Yang’s side, hoping that he would kick himself and instill some energy for him to become huge.

It’s best to send a little bit of the power of the Law over and kill that wretched fishman!

Yue Yang didn’t do that, but he seriously considered it for a few seconds. Finally, he silently threw a special flame into the mouth of Hui Tai Lang. In this Sea of raging Flames, his movements were totally inconspicuous.

Besides, the Lord of Fire didn’t even look at a dying opponent.

He just made a flame portal, summoning more Battle Beasts to deal with the enemy. The Lord of Fire was watching Hui Tai Lang, who was said to be the best combination team in the world should they be partnered together. He also glanced at the Chaos Ghost who remained unaffected by the fire array runes. If she was not a Guardian Beast, things would have been great. The Lord of Fire then sighed, not for the first time, in his heart.

The beast that I dreamt of is right in front of me, but unfortunately, it does not belong to me, and it will never be possible to obtain it in any way.

I’m afraid that there will be nothing I regret more in this life!
