chapters.title: Chapter 887 - This Is A Transcendant Mythical Beast?
chapters.body:
Chapter 887 - This Is A Transcendant Mythical Beast?

Whitelist us. Ad revenue gives additional support to the translator and keeps the site running.

Interested in being a part of the Nocturne TL team?

We are looking for Chinese, Korean, and Japanese translators. Join us on Discord and look for Mystique to guide you through recruitment.

========================================================================

Chapter 887: This Is A Transcendent Mythical Beast?

Just as the Volcanic Whale and the fishman were preparing to attack Yue Yang together, he suddenly disappeared.

The rune patterns flickered for a while and the coercion increased greatly.

But only Hui Tai Lang could be locked in place as the real target Yue Yang had disappeared without a trace at some point. The Chaos Ghost shook the flame tornado that was controlled by her will, sucking in an enraged Hui Tai Lang in it before she then accompanied the flame tornado’s rotation and soared into the sky. Under the intense gaze of the Lord of Fire, she pierced through the black clouds and disappeared.

It wasn’t like the Lord of Fire did not make efforts, but as he exceeded his momentum on several occasions, the flame rune patterns also did the same, emanating more than ten times the pressure.

The Chaos Ghost and Hui Tai Lang seemed to be nonexistent.

It didn’t seem to be working at all.

The escape of Hui Tai Lang and the Chaos Ghost was not the most surprising part. After all, both of them were of fire attributes and the flame rune array could not exert the greatest power against the coercion of the fire attributed beasts. Besides, the energy of the rune array was none other than fire energy anyways.

The suprisement of the Lord of Fire was due to Yue Yang’s disappearance. Where the heck is that young and arrogant boy?

He is a warrior with the ice attribute and he just so happened to be in conflict with the attribute of the rune array, which means that he should be under the greatest pressure. So, how could he escape? Besides, even if he could escape, how could he hide his eyes and emotions from me? The Lord of Fire was confused. He expanded the domain with his will and searched the entire space, but still, he found nothing. The arrogant boy seemed to have never taunted him before and completely disappeared.

“Look around! Find him! As long as he is still in the World of Fire, it is impossible to escape from my grasp!” The Lord of Fire was really angry.

The Volcanic whale and fishman, as well as a few other fire-attributed Battle Beasts that have just been summoned, divided into the West and East units, searching for the traces of Yue Yang.

The Lord of Fire also summoned a Level 3 Blazing Eagle, ordering it to penetrate the black clouds to pursue the Chaos Ghost and Hui Tai Lang. The Chaos Ghost is a Guardian Beast, which meant that it was impossible for him to make a contract with her, so it was useless no matter how much he desired it to happen. However, Hui Tai Lang was still an excellent choice for the Lord of Fire.

If Hui Tai Lang joins in, the strength of the Lord of Fire would greatly increase.

At this time, tstudentstudent Yue Yang was taking Hui Tai Lang and the Chaos Ghost to walk through the dark clouds.

There was a strange feeling in his heart which made Yue Yang insist on walking upwards in the dark clouds. Although he had found the other party’s flaws, he also observed the truth of the flame rune patterns with his Heaven Eyes Transverse skill, but Yue Yang did not stop as to not reveal his location to the Lord of Fire. After he had insight into the truth of the flame rune patterns, he had a thought that he wanted to find out about the secrets in the World of Fire. When Yue Yang escaped from the rune patterns and entered the dark clouds, he sensed that there was a special energy hidden behind the dark clouds that were positioned extremely high and extremely far away, almost as if the energy was beckoning for him.

Maybe that was not a real calling, but an innate response to the flame rune patterns.

What is that?

Was it not just a dark cloud on the top of the sky of the Fire World?

He didn’t know how long he had been flying. Suddenly, a bright light appeared in front of Yue Yang, Hui Tai Lang and the Chaos Ghost.

There were endless white clouds in front of him. If Yue Yang looked back, he would see the sight of black clouds behind him and white clouds in front of him. In fact, they were very similar— both views were filled with an endless stream of clouds besides the d=fact that they were in different colours.

Yue Yang and Hui Tai Lang felt as if they had passed through a certain obstacle that was completely invisible as another strange feeling appeared. The closer they got to the sea of white clouds, the more they could feel the vastness of water energy. The Chaos Ghost stopped flying with a bit of repulsion. She saw that Yue Yang had no intention of returning to the black sea of clouds and immediately returned to his Grimoire World, refusing to move forward as if she was very disgusted with the white sea of clouds ahead.

Even Hui Tai Lang was a little upset, let alone her.

It seemed as if he had fallen into a puddle, making his whole body drenched like a soaked puppy.

Of course, the repulsion was just a mere feeling. Yue Yang kicked him, motioning for him to follow and to not be as headstrong as the Chaos Ghost.

A human and a wolf flying forward at a very fast speed, resolved to explore the truth— why was there such ample water in the World of Fire?

It was the same as traveling through the dark clouds.

The duo were too tired to walk through the sea of white clouds.

The sight that came into Yue Yang’s eyes surprised him and he almost exclaimed.

He had been flying towards the sky, but suddenly he found that he had reached another world— a water world with only water.

It was completely different from the wWorld of Fire where the Lord of Fire was livingliving. The water was full of green aquatic plants and there were countless various insects flying around. From time to time, silver fish leapt out of the water and played with each other cheekily.

In this endless space, all Yue Yang saw was water.

Yue Yang and Hui Tai Lang turned around and looked up.

The firmament of the sky was brimming with boundless white clouds.

In the extreme distance, it seemed like there had just been a light drizzle as there was a rainbow hanging in the distance. The two completely different Worlds of Water and Fire were actually combined together. The most ingenious thing was that these two incompatible worlds were actually in the same place as they were self-contained and merged with each other. If one didn’t see it with their own eyes, they wouldn’t believe that it was true.

“What kind of world is this?” Yue Yang stepped on the surface of the lake and found that the water energy here was sufficient, not any less than the Sea of Flames in the World of Fire.

“This is the Hourglass World, where there is fire on one side and water on the other. Every three months, the hHourglass wWorld would carry out a phase of energy conversion. Of course, the water and the fire on the opposite side will not disappear nor exchange; only the location of the space will be changed. I don’t know the specific truth, but in the boring wait of thousands of years, I calculated it.”

On the surface, there was a clump of clear water that was transforming into the form of a human. It appeared that the water form resembled a woman, and it had even started to talk.

The strangest thing was that this female water person was still holding onto a sapphire blue umbrella. This umbrella has a sub-sacred item level of existence, Yue Yang had a feeling when he saw the woman holding this sub-sacred umbrella. The strength of the water woman should not be below that of the Lord of Fire.

Yue Yang changed his previous arrogant attitude towards the Lord of Fire to a polite tone, “Senior is the Fairy Qi Luo of that year, right? This junior Yue Titan is the younger generation of Soaring Dragon Continent.”

The female water person holding the treasured umbrella made Yue Yang exploit his identity with a bit of surprise but he immediately composed himself and returned to normal, “Unexpectedly, after so long has passed, there are still people who remember my name. Is the Tong Tian Tower so prosperous now? A young man like you possessing the power of an Innate Supreme rank is truly such a feat!”

Hui Tai Lang turned his head and covered his mouth as he laughed.

There was only one person like Yue Yang in the entire Tong Tian Tower, a miracle that only occurred once every 10,000 years.

If it weren’t for Yue Yang who could take out those guys in the lower Heaven Realm, the current Tong Tian Tower would simply be a laughingstock to the warriors of the Heaven Realm.

However, Yue YangYue Yang glared at him angrily and motioned for him to not be rude. Hui Tai Lang hurriedly held back his laughter and tried to forcibly suppress his smile, trying not to let the giddy feeling burst into obnoxious laughter.

In response to the question of the ‘Fairy Qi Luo’, Student Yue Yang pretended to be very obedient, “Yes, the Tong Tian Pagoda is very prosperous now and there are so many young people like me. The unlucky people in the Heaven Realm described us prodigies to be as common as stray dogs, with Innate Supremes walking around everywhere! I am in a better state now as I used to be a useless child of the family. Because of the slow progress I made, people ignored me for many years!” Student Yue Yang lied blatantly.

When the woman with the umbrella heard it, she sighed, “Unexpectedly, the Tong Tian Tower is prospering like this now. In the past, the warriors of the Demon Race and the people of the Heaven Stairway were always struggling with those of us who were from the Soaring Dragon Continent as they fought for many years. Many younger generations and geniuses were sacrificed in the battle. When our generation was annihilated and ceased to exist, the warriors who taught us a lesson were really happy! It is a pity that I am trapped in this Hourglass World and can never leave. Otherwise, I really want to come out to witness the grand occasion!”

Yue Yang immediately controlled the flow of the conversation, “Senior, how did a powerful existence like you can’t break through the space of this Hourglass World?”

The woman holding the umbrella water shook her head, “This is the punishment of the ancient ancestors. The feud between me and the fool, the Lord of Fire, caused serious consequences as we almost destroyed the Soaring Dragon Continent. An ancient ancestor heard about our brawls and was infuriated. He appeared in our 985th duel, directly annihilating both of us and then throwing us into this Hourglass World to punish us with imprisonment. Here, there is only the extreme balance of water and fire. I can never meet and fight again with the Lord of Fire, nor can we ever leave this Hourglass World. Young man, although I don’t know which senior told you of our story, I want to advise you that this is not a safe world. The  Lord of Fire is an ambitious tyrant. He hates everything, especially an outstanding young man like you; he most definitely wouldn’t let you go!”

“Lord of Fire? If you’re talking about the maniac man of fire, I have already seen him. He was indeed very powerful, but that was due to the influx of the Sea of Flames. Although I can’t beat him, there is still no problem in escaping from him,” Yue Yang smiled slightly.

“Unexpectedly, you went to his side first and even had a fight with him before you came over. Young man, you are an ice warrior; shouldn’t you be unable to leave the World of Fire on the opposite side? And this demon wolf, he should be the extinct ‘World Demon Wolf’, right? He’s so friendly with you, why don’t you make a contract with him? You know, the effect of contracting a beast is sometimes more useful than self-cultivation!” Ask.

“The contract is a good idea, but he will no longer be free,” Yue Yang waved his hand, “I have enough Battle Beasts, so there is really no need for this method.”

“Do you have so many beasts to the point where you can’t contract anymore?” The woman holding the umbrella was shocked.

“There are still a lot of vacancies, but maybe there will be better choices in the future,” Student Yue Yang was a bit embarrassed to say that he would not contract with beasts that were beauties in front of a senior who was at least 10,000 years old. Of course, him telling lies were like people eating cabbage— he was long used to just finding another excuse to cover his deceit.

“Ambitious. Are there really many young people like you? It’s incredible. There is a kind of shock in my heart that I have never experienced before as I have never heard of someone who doesn’t intend to contract a Divine Beast. That’s right, young man, how many Divine Beasts do you have?” When the umbrella water woman heard Yue Yang answer a few casually, she was shocked on the spot.

Finally, after a long time, she murmured, “How many Divine Beasts do you truly own? I was ranked in the top ten of the entire Tong Tian Tower back then, and there was not a single Divine Beast in my hands. How many do you really have?”

Yue Yang grabbed the back of his head with a little embarrassment, “There are indeed a few, and there are also a few who have the potential to be promoted to Divine Beasts. Because of the cultivation method, it is nothing to be promoted to a Divine Beast… This Hui Tai Lang here was the first to be promoted, but becauseI took care of it less towards the end, paired with the fact that the following Divine Beasts received different karmic encounters which forced their strength to increase rapidly, he got a little bit weaker.”

Senior water woman was stunned, “I really can’t believe it unless you summon another one.”

Yue Yang usually didn’t brag like that. He showed off his strength today mainly because he wanted to beg for a favour from this epic ancestor. Hence, he behaved very obediently as if he was born a good boy by nature.

Hui Tai Lang naturally cooperated with his owner and also pretended to portray the aura that said, ‘“Pay attention, I am a good wolf‘”.

When Yue Yang summoned Xiao Wen Li, the little snake demon Lolita, from Grimoire World, the senior water woman who was most likely tQi Luo Fairy immediately screamed, “This is a Transcendent Mythical Beast! Oh my God, was she born through your power? Impossible, how could you own a Transcendent Mythical Beast? What kind of person are you? No, you are not from the Tong Tian Tower— you’re probably from the legendary race!”

========================================================================

This translation is presented by Nocturne Translations.

========================================================================

At this point there’s more new characters that are emerging so I’m kind of making the glossary instead of referring to it. I’ll try my best to provide them as accurately as I can, so let me know if any of the names seem awkward or don’t flow all that well!

At any rate, enjoy the chapter! Hope you guys have a great day/night ahead of you!

chapters.title: Chapter 888 - Six Divine Weapons
chapters.body:
Chapter 888 - Six Divine Weapons

Whitelist us. Ad revenue gives additional support to the translator and keeps the site running.

Interested in being a part of the Nocturne TL team?

We are looking for Chinese, Korean, and Japanese translators. Join us on Discord and look for Mystique to guide you through recruitment.

========================================================================

Chapter 888: Six Divine Weapons

When Yue Yang heard it, he started sweating profusely in secret.

This Fairy Qi Luo, who was not up-to-date with the complicated surge of information circulating in the Tong Tian Tower, judged his identity even more clearly than ordinary warriors. Of course, no matter what she guessed, Yue Yang would not admit it; and. noIt doesn’t matter whether she was able to escape from this place or not, sticking to the secrecy of the final secret was a necessary bottom-line measure. And fFrom this point, Yue Yanghe had also formed a kind of vigilance. The martial artists of the Heaven Realm and the people from the Central Temple were also not deceived by the identity of the Yue Clan’s Third Young Master— were they investigating him?

It was especially convenient for those in the Central Temple to investigate certain things in the Heaven Realm, after all.

It seems that I will have to deal with it more carefully in the future to refrain from making the same mistake with an exploited identity.

There would definitely not be any trouble with the Ancient Demon King, but the Scarlet Emperor still remains.

It would be better if the Scarlet Emperor concealed his name and lived in seclusion without letting the people of the Central Temple find out about his hidden existence. Yue Yang was more worried about whether or not he was familiar with the Clown. He was also pondering if the Clown was related to the traitor of the Tong Tian Tower and the fact that he might also have a network of clues and connections with various tribes and clans of the Guang Ming Continent.

If that was the case, then the issue of his identity would be exposed sooner or later.

His exposed identity would then be tantamount to announcing that the Tong Tian Tower would be rising in the ranks. By then, he believed that the people from the Central Temple would probably head towards the Tower to kill him by any means.

It seemed that it was time to take action. Before the Central Temple paid further attention to the Tong Tian Tower, before he cleared the ten levels of the Land of Trials, and before Empress Fei Wen Li could break through the Black Hole Seal, Yue Yang did not want the Central Temple to discover his own secrets. Although the Tong Tian Tower was irrefutably rising, it was just like a seedling that had sprouted recently— a small leaf emerging on the hard ground. Before it growsgrew into a towering tree, it could not withstand any storms.

“I am a child of the Yue Clan, one of the four major families in the Soaring Dragon Continent,!” Yue Yang exclaimed himself asexclaimed as a child of a family that took pride in their family name and honour.

“The four major families of the Soaring Dragon Continent? I have only heard of the four major families of the Heaven Realm,” The woman with the water umbrella  smiled.

“…” Yue Yang pretended to be speechless.

In fact, he was certain that Fairy Qi Luo would have never heard of the four major families of the Soaring Dragon Continent. It would be strange if she had actually heard of it!

Perhaps after seeing Yue Yang’s unhappy expression, the woman holding the umbrella water gentlyumbrella gently waved her hand as she said apologetically, “I have no intention of offending your family. Although the level is slightly lacking compared to the four major families in the Heaven Realm, your family must be rather remarkable to be able to nurture such talent like you. Young man, can you let me know why you came here? Why did you come to this Hourglass World?”

Yue Yang lifted his spirits after hearing this.

Now we’re talking business.

At least this senior believed that he was a descendant of the Soaring Dragon Continent. Had she firmly believed that he was from the Heaven Realm, things would have been messy. Without her cooperation, the matter would have been hard to deal with, after all.

Yue Yang hurriedly gave her a bow and spoke with sincere words, “Senior, this is what happened. I came here under the guidance of several seniors to find the truth about the Buried Sword Valley. I wonder if this senior knows Grandmother Sha? Besides her, there were also Master Feng and Uncle Yu.”

The woman holding the umbrella shook her head and waved her hand, “I don’t know them, but maybe the three seniors that you mentioned are all my juniors!”

She briefly talked about the matter with the Lord of Fire.

“At the time, things were done for the six artifacts made by Zhen Ren that he exhausted painstaking efforts to create. The Lord of Fire kept attracting the strong cultivatorcultivators of the Heaven Realm, breaking through the defensive formation of the Buried Sword Valley and attacking the entire place itself. My husband wanted to retreat from the enemy, so he used his life as a sacrifice, exerting the greatest power of the sacred instruments that were known as ‘Fifth Divine Clock’ and ‘Sixth Divine Seal’, killing two Celestial Peak enemies on the spot. We retreated from the enemy and I succeeded in capturing the severely wounded Lord of Fire. At that moment, he deceived us by pretending to feign guilt. In order to resolve this hatred, I released the Lord of Fire and expelled him from the country. Unexpectedly, he soon returned. Except for my husband who died in battle, no one else could successfully use the Six Divine Weapons. Moreover, the Fifth Divine Clock went missing after my husband died in the battle. So, we were no longer able to form the strongest defense formation to defend against the enemy, and in turn, the enemy invaded.”

“The powerful ‘Tian Yu’ from the Central Temple and his disciple. ‘Ji Wuri’, took away the ‘Fourth Divine Armour’ among the six artifacts and another unidentified Heavenly Realm powerhouse took away the ‘Third Divine Mirror’. When more enemies were preparing to split up the First Divine Sword, the Second Divine Sceptre and the Sixth Divine Seal, an invisible expert from the Tong Tian Tower was furious. He used an above-all-ranked divine tool , the ‘Five-Colored Divine Light’ on them, killing most of the three thousand powerful enemies that resulted in a Thunder Tribulation. And for some reason, the unknown expert used five-color divine light to fight against that Thunder Tribulation, eventually causing the Five-Coloured Divine Light to shatter into pieces and scatter throughout the Soaring Dragon Continent…”

“The Five-Colour Divine Light was really scattered in the Soaring Dragon Continent?” Yue Yang asked urgently as this news was too important for him to lose track of.

“I’m not too sure about this. Maybe some of them were looted and stolen by the powerhouses of the Heaven Realm, but at that time they did see the artifacts scatter and turn into a stream of color. Their actions led to an intense war to break out, alarming the Ancient Gods that there was a danger and risk of the fight destroying the earth. Hence, the Ancient Gods’ wills split the Buried Sword Valley into various spaces and decomposed their numerous destructive forces. I don’t know how the other warriors are doing, but the Lord of Fire and I were sealed into this world at the same time. After countless years of observation, I finally understand that this world is like an Hourglass; fire on one side, water on the other and the transitioning period of three months,” Fairy Qi Luo, who was holding onto the umbrella, smiled, “Indeed, I didn’t care as long as I could kill the Lord of Fire, even if it meant destroying the world in the process. If I hadn’t been that desperate, maybe things wouldn’t be like this.”

“I can understand. Besides, the Soaring Dragon Continent had not been destroyed,” Yue Yang comforted the other side in turn. In fact, he estimated that the Soaring Dragon Continent had probably been destroyed more than once prematurely, but after each destruction, a new powerhouse rebuilt it, allowing it to regain its direction towards brilliance.

“Because I have been imprisoned here for 10,000 years, I don’t know anything about the outside world. My body and treasures were annihilated at that time, where only this hand-made umbrella was left behind,” Fairy Qi Luo combined the sapphire blue sub-artifact and handed it to Yue Yang, “Young man, I’ll give this umbrella to you. Although it is not a divine tool, it is also a good treasure. Leaving it here would only waste its power; maybe it can play a bigger role if it is given to a talented youngster like you,”

“No, I can’t ask for your treasured umbrella,” Yue Yang quickly refused.

“Meow meow?” Hui Tai Lang looked at him blankly. Why is the master changing his attitude today? Why won’t he accept the treasures that were delivered to the door?

“This umbrella is really a waste to me. Giving it to you is also my act of wanting to find a descendant for myself. I will never be able to leave this world in this life and my only regret is that there is no descendant of mine who will inherit the mantle. I hope you can go out for me to find an excellent female heir like you and let her inherit my mantle,” Fairy Qi Luo handed over the umbrella for the second time.

Yue Yang still waved his hand, “Let’s talk about looking for a descendant later as I may not be able to find a descendant that satisfies you. I will find a suitable candidate in the future and bring her here.It will not be too late for you to pass this on to her when she arrives.”

Fairy Qi Luo nodded slightly, “I understand what you think, but I don’t want my heir to enter this Hourglass World. If she becomes my heir, she may be imprisoned here forever, which is equivalent to things being useless. Actually, I’ve recorded everything in this Qi Luo Umbrella. If Qi Luo Umbrella recognizes someone, then she is my heir and there is no need to bring her over. I don’t need to meet the heir —all the etiquette in the world is void and it doesn’t matter to me. As long as she can inherit my strength and knowledge and have some achievements in the future, that is already the greatest expectation in my heart.”

Yue Yang asked strangely, “You don’t want her to come in?”

Fairy Qi Luo smiled slightly, “After you leave, I think I will fall asleep again. I might sleep for 1000 years, maybe 10,000 years even. I will no longer remain nostalgic towards everything in the outside world. As long as I stay with my husband in my dream through his remnants of the Divine Consciousness, that will be enough for me.”

An unfortunate and infatuated woman.

This was Yue Yang’s evaluation of Fairy Qi Luo.

Of course, this misfortune did not originate from her herself, but the six artifacts left by Zhen Ren in the Buried Sword Valley.

Yue Yang pondered for a long time before taking over Fairy Qi Luo’s umbrella and shouldering this heavy responsibility. He doesn’t know who the Qi Luo Umbrella will recognize, but as there were so many outstanding women, there would always be one that would be compatible.

He thought for a while.

When Fairy Qi Luo was about to sink into the water to sleep, Yue Yang stretched out his hand to stop her and said, “There are two reasons as to why I’m here. I only told you one, but after hearing the truth about Buried Sword Valley, I think it is necessary. I gothave three artifacts with me, please take a look. Is this one of the six artifacts of Buried Sword Valley?”

Xiao Wen Li knew what Yue Yang was thinking: he wanted to know of the seal of the Prison Emperor that Yue Yang had not been able to truly recognize.

“The Sixth Divine Seal?” Fairy Qi Luo looked at him as she was stunned.

“Is this the seal of one of the Six Divine Weapons of that year?” Yue Yang’s eyes were bright.

“I don’t know what has happened in these 10,000 years, but this artifact has undergone many changes. Maybe after many unpredictable battles, it may have evolved and mutated. It looks almost completely different from before,” The fairy stretched out her water-like arms and fingers, just like a mother stroking her beloved baby. She gently touched the Prison Emperor’s Divine Seal as her eyes were full of love, “No matter what it becomes, I am sure—this is one of the six artifacts that my husband used to kill the giants of the Heaven Realm back then!”

“We call it the Prison Emperor Divine Seal now— just imagine a senior called the Prison Emperor. This senior used this and two other artifacts to defeat a powerful enemy when the Tong Tian Tower was on the brink of death. Because of that, the Tong Tian Tower is what it is now,” Yue Yang was relieved now— it wasn’t the Prison Emperor’s Divine Seal that was weak, the problem laidlay with him who couldn’t fully utilise the Seal’s potential.

This divine seal could indeed kill the giants of the Heaven Realm.

Later, the Prison Emperor used three divine tools to seal the three giants of the Heaven Realm, which could also be used to prove history.

If I can obtain the true recognition of this artifact and exert its power by 100%, what’s the big deal about the giants of the Heaven Realm then? And what would Ji Wu Ri mean?

Since the Prison Emperor Divine Seal was one of the six divine weapons, things would be easy to handle.

Yue Yang summoned Princess Qian Qian and Xue Wu Xia from the Grimoire World, beckoning them to greet a senior that prospered 10,000 years ago.

At any rate, enjoy the chapter! Hope you guys have a great day/night ahead of you!

chapters.title: Chapter 889 - The Little Boss On The Avenue Of Cultivation
chapters.body:
Chapter 889 - The Little Boss On The Avenue Of Cultivation

Whitelist us. Ad revenue gives additional support to the translator and keeps the site running.

Interested in being a part of the Nocturne TL team?

We are looking for Chinese, Korean, and Japanese translators. Join us on Discord and look for Mystique to guide you through recruitment.

========================================================================

Chapter 889: The Little Boss On The Avenue Of Cultivation

Princess Qian Qian and Xue Wu Xia were okay with the idea.

After all, the two of them had already met many seniors, so they were already mentally prepared before they came out.

However, Fairy Qi Luo, who had been imprisoned for 10,000 years, was not aware of what had happened in the outside world all this time. When she saw the artifact in the hands of the two women, she was shocked again, “Y-you got the approval of the Divine Sword? That’s impossible! The Divine Sword never recognises a woman as the master of the sword! Also, why is the head missing from the Divine Sceptre? How pitiful! The most important part— the Dragon Head of the Divine Sceptre, is also lost… Without the Divine Pearl of the Dragon Head, the power of the current Divine Sceptre is much weaker than it was before!”

Princess Qian Qian, Xue Wu Xia, and Yue Yang looked at each other. The Prison Emperor’s Divine Scepter had been like this since it was taken over. They didn’t understand what was the Dragon Head and the Divine Sceptre that she had been talking about.

As for Princess Qian Qian’s recognition from the Divine Sword, it could be explained.

This was because the Divine Sword recognised Yue Yang.

However, because the Prison Emperor’s last will was to ‘very kindly’ help his future generations strengthen the contract, a rather problematic error was made. Yue Yang, who was truly recognised as the owner, could not use the Divine Sword no matter what he did. Instead, Princess Qian Qian, who had the Emperor’s blood running in her veins, became the inheritor of the Prison Emperor as she took ownership of the Divine Sword.

Yue Yang was not most concerned about that fact; the most important thing to him was that the artifact itself had the ability to evolve and mutate.

The different owners throughout every generation did not have the same power threshold, which proved that it was mainly combined with the characteristics of the owner to exert its power. If it was done well, the owner might just be able to reach the realm of the original Buried Sword.

Perhaps even beyond that level… If things really operated like that, it would be such a waste to not teach the bandits from the Central Temple a lesson and reclaim the Divine Armour when I own the three artifacts!

In fact, it was not the six artifacts that Yue Yang cared about most. What Yue Yang wanted to prove most was that the Prison Emperor could use the Six Divine Weapons. In other words, if the Prison Emperor could become the master of the artifacts, then he could certainly do better. If there were more than three artifacts, such as obtaining the Divine Mirror, the Divine Armour, and the Divine Clock, then he would have the opportunity to gather a full set!

Thinking about it, it would be rather improbable to own the Divine Sword but not the Divine Armour.

It turned out that Ji Wu Ri and his Master, Tianyu, snatched it away… As for the guy who stole the Divine Mirror, there was no relevant information on the culprit yet.

“You are all very good children; it seems that Tong Tian Tower has really risen in the ranks. I couldn’t believe it when I saw this little guy, Yue Titan,” Fairy Qi Luo embraced the two girls very lovingly and stroked their beautiful backs as she kissed their hair, “If my heirs could be like you, that would be great. Although I truly adore you so much, because you are all in this Hourglass World, I cannot grant you everything I have. Maybe after you leave, you can accept it, but here, don’t try to challenge the supreme masjesticity of the Ancient Gods. Children, I am very happy to see you. After meeting you, even if I fall into deep sleep again, I can finally tell my husband that everything is settled through our dreams,”

“Out of six artifacts, at least three artifacts are now in the hands of this little guy, Yue Titan. In this way, he might be able to surpass him back then! As for the two of you, both of you are definitely more useful than I was back then to provide your assistance and support towards your lover. Children, I bless you from the bottom of my heart— you must work hard and be happy, as the future of the Tong Tian Tower belongs to you!”

“Thank you!” Princess Qian Qian and Xue Wu Xia were moved by the predecessor’s blessings.

Only those who have experienced the beauty of unforgettable love will know what is the most precious thing in the world. Fairy Qi Luo was still in love after 10,000 years of separation, and her blessing conveyed the hope of the predecessors for future generations. As a senior who was unable to live her ‘happily ever after’, she magnanimously blessed the juniors to live happily and wholeheartedly.

Fairy Qi Luo embraced the two women warmly and showered them with blessings from the bottom of her heart.

Finally, she turned her face and looked at Yue Yang, “Lucky little guy, what was the second thing you mentioned?”

Yue Yang refrained from asking for more information about the Five-Coloured Divine Light. One of the reasons would be because Fairy Qi Luo wouldn’t know as she was already sealed up; two, 10,000 years have passed and too many things have happened. All these changes have altered too much from the past by being inhumane since long ago. Why did the ‘Green’ of the Five-Coloured Divine Light end up in the Twelve Zodiac Temples of the Tong Tian Tower?

Where were the remaining four Divine Lights?

Could it be that Jiu Xiao also owned one of the Divine Lights? Otherwise, how could he fake a ‘Black Light’?

All kinds of questions were suppressed in Yue Yang’s heart. It was not that he had the opportunity to not ask, but he had the feeling that Fairy Qi Luo didn’t know the truth either. He would be disappointed if he didn’t obtain a satisfactory answer, after all.

He adjusted his mentality, restoring the state of the indestructible mind of Innate Supreme before nodding to Fairy Qi Luo and bowing slightly, “That’s it, I hope to open up a channel here for this senior to combine the water energy here with the fire. Merging water with the fire attributes of the Lord of Fire would probably neutralise the effects. Hence, the water world where this senior is located may undergo earth-shaking changes, so this junior would like to ask your opinion.”

When Yue Yang said this, Fairy Qi Luo understood.

This daring and wise young man wanted to use the water of the world to submerge the Sea of Flames on the Lord of Fire’s side.

The problem is, even if she agreed and was willing to transmit the water of the entire water world, she was afraid that it would not be able to completely extinguish the Sea of Flames.

One was because the fire energy in the Sea of Flames was too large to even imagine. Even if the water could be transported, it would only evaporate into vapour and rise into the air, which would not be of any use against the fire. The second point would be the existence of the very strong Lord of Fire over there. She wouldn’t be able to help and could only rely on the three of them, which may be difficult to complete this kind of transmission. The third and the biggest problem would be the possibility of not having enough conversion power. This would result in the water to possibly turn into fire energy to be used by the Lord of Fire, or it might just revert  back to the Water World.

In other words, although this young man’s idea was good, it was difficult to implement.

Fairy Qi Luo glanced at Yue Yang. Not directly denying it, she just smiled and asked, “It looks like you are pretty sure about that plan, can you tell me what kind of plan it is?”

“Senior, his Domain Power is Creation, although the scope is a little bit smaller. If combined with this junior’s Divine Consciousness, coupled with the guidance of Qian Qian’s Divine Sword, we are sure to be able to instantly transmit the water within a range of ten kilometers to the Sea of Flames. As for the issue of energy conversion, even if there isn’t a Creation Domain, the Storm Mermaid Beast under Xiao Wen Li, or my Blizzard Goddess Beast, there is still this one,” Xue Wu Xia showed her wrist. It was the energy-absorbing bracelet from one of the spoils that Yue Yang seized from the hands of the Toad King. Whether it was used by Yue Yang or Xue Wu Xia, they both possessed the Divine Consciousness, which would be their enemy’s worst nightmare.

The energy-absorbing bracelet was also called the Conversion Bracelet, used to extract the enemy’s elemental ability and convert them into another elemental energy.

With ordinary people’s mental power, it would be impossible to transform such huge amounts of energy. It would have been barely acceptable to use it against a Beast, but with the mental powers of Yue Yang and Xue Wu Xia raising their Domain Power and using the bracelet’s ability, the enemies wouldn’t even be able to cry even if they wanted to. Yue Yang didn’t use it previously in the Sea of Flames because he didn’t have the greatest assurance that it would have been effective.

After all, the Lord of Fire was a rather tricky opponent.

Even though he had been dead for at least 10,000 years, his soul and energy possessed the fire attribute, which was second only to the existence of the Heaven Realm’s Giants.

Without the assurance of success, Yue Yang didn’t want to go to war with this guy head-on. Now that he found out about the Water World, talked with Fairy Qi Luo, obtained the secrets of many artifacts and the information of the Five-Coloured Divine Light, Yue Yang’s confidence greatly soared. He no longer was determined to only bring Hui Tai Lang out of the world of the Sea of Flames, but he desired to have a showdown with the Lord of Fire!

If he was able to take down the Lord of Fire, then Yue Yang would definitely improve further. He might even try his best to fight against the Giants of the Heaven Realm in the future or even against Ji Wu Ri and others from the Central Temple.

“I am about to fall asleep. Together with my husband’s lingering thoughts, I don’t care what this Water World becomes. Children, do whatever you want and don’t worry about me. Unfortunate people like me should have passed long ago, it’s just the Law of the Ancient God’s punishment that had been torturing me with such a coercive force that didn’t allow it to happen. Children, in any case, please don’t set foot in this Hourglass World that easily, because I am really worried that the Ancient God’s coercion will affect you and bring an unknown impact towards your future. You need to know that some forbidden areas are to stay away from and remain respected. Okay children, goodbye. To be able to see you, my heart no longer has any worries or regrets…”

Fairy Qi Luo slowly sank into the Water World in the form of a water woman.

In fact, this was just the ‘water human form’ maintained by her mind. The real ‘her’ had long ceased to exist. Her consciousness did not break free of the seal like the Lord of Fire, instead, she voluntarily stayed in the seal and continued to fall asleep.

Xue Wu Xia took the Qi Luo Umbrella in Yue Yang’s hand, gently opened it a little and then closed it.

She looked at Princess Qian Qian who nodded and said nothing.

Princess Qian Qian suddenly gave Yue Yang a rarely expressed hug. Her plump lips leaned in towards his ears and she said in a flattering tone that Yue Yang had never heard of before, “Why don’t you give this umbrella to Sister Yu? I think Sister Yu is so gentle, so she must be the best candidate to inherit the position of Fairy Qi Luo! I know that Luo Hua, Yi Nan and some of the others are suitable as well, but the most compatible one is probably Sister Yu. I will find a more suitable one in the future and give it to Luo Hua and Yi Nan, okay?”

Although Yue Yang was trapped in the gentle township of Tigress’s sugar-coated bust, he was not confused in his heart, “Tigress, why are you suddenly saying something nice for Sister Yu?”

“This is the secret between us ladies!” Princess Qian Qian refused to answer.

“Really?” Yue Yang guessed that this Tigress must have done something to annoy Yue Yu, and now she wants to mend the relationship between the two parties. Otherwise, she would not persuade him like this. Even if it was to convince him to give the Umbrella to Yue Yu, she wouldn’t have ever used a tone of flattery.

However, what did Tigress do to provoke Yue Yu, someone as calm and gentle as water?

It was impossible for ordinary things to provoke and anger Yue Yu.

So what exactly did Tigress do?

Yue Yang was really curious, but he also knew that to want Tigress to take the initiative to share the situation with him would be even more improbable than conquering the sky!

Faintly, he also had a strange feeling. He felt that it was related to him, so he didn’t dare to ask directly, for fear that it would make everyone embarrassed.

“No take-backs, you petty brat!” Although Princess Qian Qian said so, she quickly took the Qi Luo Umbrella in Xue Wu Xia’s hand and happily put it in her storage ring. Then, she leaned over to Yue Yang’s cheek and gave him a quick kiss, “Thank you, Third Young Master!”

“Lady Xue…” Yue Yang leaned over to Xue Wu Xia, motioning for her to kiss him too.

“If I still have some remaining strength after we finish fighting the Lord of Fire, I will kiss you as many times as you want,” Xue Wu Xia is not easy to deal with. Although she didn’t blatantly refuse him, Yue Yang thought that it would be impossible to have energy remaining after a fight with the Lord of Fire. Then, doesn’t that mean her words were basically said for nothing? Of course, having a sliver of hope is better than having no hope at all. There are little beauties waiting, so no matter how difficult it is, I would have to face it, wouldn’t I? Besides, Lady Xue was capable of keeping her word, unlike Tigress that constantly bails.

Yue Yang felt his own motivation doubled— whether it was to challenge himself or to pick up girls and immerse in their presence, he would first have to slaughter the stupid Lord of Fire.

The little boss on the avenue of cultivation; who would fight with him if not me?

chapters.title: Chapter 890 - Fire And Water, Were Never Meant To Mix
chapters.body:
Chapter 890 - Fire And Water, Were Never Meant To Mix

Chapter 890: Water And Fire, Were Never Meant To Mix

The Lord of Fire had been very upset these past few days.

The reason was that the arrogant kid and the uncontracted demon wolf with unlimited potential could not be found. Although the Flame Condor, Fuel Bat, and Wildfire Crow under his command have searched every nook and cranny of the dark clouds, they have found nothing. The Lord of Fire was sure that the kid and the wolf were both hiding in the clouds, but they just couldn’t seem to be found.

The searching expedition over the Sea of Flames also ended in failure.

His Battle Beasts such as the Volcanic Whale, the odd-faced fishman, and the Deep Sea Fire Dragon Eel did not find any traces of their enemies.

It was almost as if the arrogant kid had never shown up… However, when the Lord of Fire pictured his opponent’s face, he gritted his teeth with hatred. At the most optimum timing, the prey that was almost similar to a cooked duck and was about to die tragically by his own hands, had actually flown away.

This kind of behavior was like a slap in the face and was absolutely unbearable by the Lord of Fire. He hated himself for not putting his entire force into that last attack.

At that time, all he needed to do was to use all his strength and do his best to deliver a fatal blow.

By then, his enemy would be obliterated to the point where the faintest traces of Yue Yang would cease to exist!

Unfortunately, the possibility of killing the enemy within seconds had been missed, destined to be impossible.

“Boy, you better not let this Lord encounter you again. Otherwise, I will stop at nothing to kill you!” The Lord of the Fire could only express his infuriated words of anger in his heart. Without the enemy or a target, he couldn’t do anything even if he had all the power in the world.

“Caw, caw, caw…”

Both of the Level 2 Heaven Ranked Wildfire Crows flew back suddenly with a little panic.

What’s going on?

Did you find that arrogant kid and that demon wolf?

The Lord of Fire was overjoyed. It would be fine with him even if Yue Yang had left; however, missing out the chance to approach the Divine Beast Hui Tai Lang which had no contract would have pained him desperately. At that time, if the Lord of Fire didn’t pretend to be so forceful and didn’t use the Volcanic Whale to contain him, things might be different. He should have used his utmost strength to severely injure Hui Tai Lang and capture the demon wolf, which he would take his own sweet time to subdue him with a plan afterwards—  that would have been a better outcome compared to his current situation!

Towards the southeast, around 2000 kilometers away, the enemy was found.

This was the intelligence report brought back by the two panicked Wildfire Crows.

Regarding the timidness of these two Wildfire Crows that made them appear like mere fidgeting mice, the Lord of Fire became a bit speechless. What was there to be afraid of? As long as they were in the Sea of Flames and in his own domain, they could be slowly resurrected should they be killed. His own domain was none other than a resurgence domain— the greatest blessings towards all of the fire-attribute beasts in the world!

Of course, the Lord of Fire also knew that the combination of Yue Yang and Hui Tai Lang would not be easy to deal with. It would be normal for both the Wildfire Crows to lose.

Moreover, the other party also has a Chaotic Ghost. If it were not for the fact of having the same fire attributes and the infinite recovering ability of the Sea of Flames, the two Wildfire Crows of a mere 2nd Level of the Heaven Rank probably wouldn’t even have been able to return. The Lord of the Fire was not too anxious as he had already found the enemy.

Kid, you can’t live in the air forever, right? Besides, you’re surrounded by volcanic ash, so I don’t think you’d be able to hold your breath for your entire lifetime.

The Volcanic Whale, fishman and the Fire Dragon Eel formed a semi-circle. Dozens of volcanic spirits that have just reached the Heaven Rank also formed a large net, ready to encircle the enemy. The Lord of Fire brought the Flame Condor himself and recalled the Fuel Bat. Under the leadership of the Wildfire Crows, he set off to the southeast. This time, he was ready to entirely annihilate the enemy. Even if the demon wolf refused to surrender,  he would kill the opponent and would not let the enemy escape for a second time from his own hands. Although the Lord of Fire had a great mindset, he was extremely angry when he saw Yue Yang and Hui Tai Lang, deeply regretting the fact that he didn’t finish the two annoying brats off in seconds during their first encounter!

But what greeted the eyes of the Lord of Fire was a vast sea.

That’s right, it was the sea.

The sky seemed to have a big hole pierced through it. A waterfall of several thousand meters high and 100 meters wide rushed straight down from the dark clouds, causing earth-shattering tremors.

The Sea of Flames that were initially situated within 20 kilometers had now become a vast ocean. The boiling lava has cooled down into black reefs or small islands. There were also places where the residual heat had not extinguished. It looked like it was in a volcanic state and appeared to be cooling off, but the midsections were desperately billowing with smoke.

It was pouring with rain in a larger area.

Nearly a hundred kilometers in the periphery, a cycle of water and fire was formed.

As it rained, the water turned into water vapor when heated. Then, it rose to the sky again before descending.

Rumble!

There were bursts of lightning and thunder.

When the golden lightning tore through the black and heavy clouds and dropped the torrential rain that had never been seen since the formation of the Sea of Flames, the heart of Lord of Fire seemed to be torn in the same way. He didn’t understand where this kid got so much water from, or why hadn’t the water disappeared in this fiery world and turned into fire energy. Originally, even if the speed was slow, all this water energy would have transformed into fire energy as it was basically the law of the formation of the Sea of Flames World— an irreversible existence.

The Lord of Fire couldn’t figure out how all this happened, but he didn’t think much about discovering the truth now; he  just wanted to find Yue Yang and put him to death immediately.

His heart could no longer take the agony of waiting, even if it was one more second.

“Spread out!”

The entire Sea of Flames World spewed several thousand meters of molten lava into the sky under the Lord of Fire’s hand gesture.

The heavy rainfall at a normal temperature was nothing compared to these molten smelt that were thousands of degrees high in temperature.

A thousand-meter-long molten lava, like a ski trail, swept across the lake behind the curtain of rain that was dozens of kilometers wide. It directly paved a blazing lava avenue on the Sea of Flames that had gradually cooled its surface.

The Lord of Fire angrily stepped onto this burning trail. The Volcanic Whale moved a little slower and did not keep up with him in time, but the fishman with a strange face seized this opportunity and rushed to the forefront. Spouting the same kilometer-long molten slurry, it formed a road for the Lord of Fire to walk on. Its speed of emitting the trail was very fast, but the scale was much smaller. It often jets three or four times before it could barely allow the Lord of Fire to slide on it.

When it reached the edge of the vast ocean lake, it found that no matter how many times it vomited, the water surface would not give way to its fire.

The vast water energy made its efforts seem like a clay-sculpted cow falling into the sea [1] .

T/L Note: [1] Unable to return, or fruitless efforts. A cow made of clay would just sink and mold into the water.

“Ahhhhhhh!”

The Lord of Fire was completely angry and furious.

Not only did the arrogant kid didn’t hide, but he dared to trick him from right under his nose— it was a sin worthy of death!

He raised its arms angrily towards the sky, causing the small island that had gradually cooled and turned into an extinct volcano erupted. The power of the explosion shook the entire surface of the water and set off thousands of meters of turbulent waves on the surface. The large amounts of lava sprayed out like a monster vomiting, flipping and twisting in midair before falling into the water. Then, under the control of the unmatched spirit of the Lord of Fire, it turned into a pillar of igneous pier.

As soon as these igneous piers entered the water, they quickly became cold and hardened, turning into stone.

However, more high-temperature lava splashed up from behind, forming a huge and wide lava bridge on top of them.

The strange-faced fishman saw that there was an opportunity for providing meritorious service, so it spit out desperately to aggravate the formation of the lava bridge deck. The Flame Condor and the Wildfire Crows circled the huge waterfall that descended from the sky at high speed, intending to find the source of the water to help their owner to block it.

Rumble!

Several sparks of purple lightning crackled in the sky.

They directly clashed against the heads of the Flame Condor and the Wildfire Crows, completely blasting them away.

It turned out that the Flame Condor that was at a Level 3 of the Heaven Rank that wouldn’t bother to bat an eyelash against normal lightning attacks, ended up having its body singed into a hue of black as it wailed in pain and tumbled, feathers scattering all over the place. The two Level 2 Heaven Ranked Wildfire Crows were in a worse position. They never intended to brave themselves to get close to the high-altitude waterfall, but under the orders of their owner, there wasn’t a chance to refuse. They were struck with a flash of electricity and nearly passed out, only regaining some form of will to struggle as their bodies neared the water surface. With their crooked flying postures and the power of purple electric remnants crackling and smoking on their bodies, one could only imagine how much pain they were in.

“Caw, caw, caw!” The two crows just flew back to the lava bridge and fell head-on, almost tumbling into the water out of control.

“F*ck…” The Lord of Fire was so angry that a 10-meter high burst of flame appeared above his head.

“Hey, you’re here? How about it? My swimming pool is doing pretty well, right? Although it’s a bit small, it’s pretty nice to dip yourself in for a bit!” Student Yue Yang flew down from the sky, smiling. He wore an expression of happiness, as if towards an old friend that he hadn’t seen for a long time.

“You think you can keep your life by getting a little bit of stagnant water here?” The Lord of Fire laughed furiously.

“Of course it’s not as simple as keeping me alive. If you don’t mind, I want to make a sea here. When you die, it would be so cool if you can think about being buried through a sea burial. This is not an honor that ordinary people can enjoy. Normally, you must be a sailor or a pirate to have such burials; so when a passerby like you would stroll into the depths of the afterlife like a veteran army gets a sea burial, you have me to thank! “Yue Yang’s face portrayed the, “It’s for your own good,” expression, as if he was the legendary good samaritan man who liked to be nosy but also enjoyed involving himself in others’ affairs.

“Hmph, you don’t have that chance!” The Lord of Fire felt that even if he was mentally disabled, he wouldn’t let this kid continue to pour water into his Sea of Flames.

“Hmph, hmph!” Hui Tai Lang replied with two scoffs.

“Hmm! Then let’s try…” Yue Yang also joined in on the fun. Princess Qian Qian saw that this pair of living treasures were way too outrageous. Even after conversing for such a long time, they only spewed nonsense and hadn’t even gotten to the actual topic. Hence, she lifted her leg and kicked Yue Yang and Hui Tai Lang into the water one after the other. Princess Qian Qian had always let her actions do the talking, not speaking of any sort of nonsense at all. The Prison Emperor’s Divine Sword was held in her hand as the divine power field fully erupted, causing four forces to appear around her at the same time. The power of the Azure Dragon Saint Force was intertwined in the sky like a grid of electrical networks, whereas the Vermilion Bird Saint Force brimmed with anger from behind her; the Black Turtle Saint Force made the entire world bask in the cold as the White Tiger Saint Force and her White Tiger Holy Beast were doubly blessed, which made the power of the Prison Emperor’s Divine Weapon explode to the extreme.

“W-what?” The Lord of Fire was both shocked by the Divine Sword, which was one of the Six Divine Weapons, in the hands of Princess Qian Qian. He was also afraid of the display of this horror that made him reminisce of the past—the time when his own friend used the Six Divine Weapons to defeat him and killed the Giants of the Heaven Realm.

“Flash, Azure Dragon Power!”

Princess Qian Qiam shouted, as if it was the cries of the army on a battlefield.

As soon as the Divine Sword was cut down, the world was also eclipsed. Even the strong strange-faced fishman and Volcanic Whale were shocked and scurried off to hide, not daring to face the wrath of the Divine Sword’s deadly slash!

========================================================================

This translation is presented by Nocturne Translations.

At any rate, enjoy the chapter! Hope you guys have a great day/night ahead of you!

chapters.title: Chapter 891
chapters.body:
Chapter 891

Chapter 891: Extinguishing The Fire

The Lord of Fire stretched out his hand and suddenly grabbed the volcanic spirit beside him, throwing him into the air.

The volcanic spirit involuntarily rushed towards the sword slash of Princess Qian Qian. It also felt that its life was in danger. If it couldn’t attack the enemy, death would be inevitable. This was not the blazing Sea of Flames, but a lake full of water underneath. Hence, no matter how strong it may ever be, a volcanic spirit made entirely of hot fire wouldn’t be able to survive the impact of falling into a body of water.

“Roar!”

The volcanic spirit erupted with maximum energy as it looked like a meteorite on fire, speeding up and flying towards Princess Qian Qian.

At the very least, both parties should sustain some injuries!

However, it underestimated what was called the power of the Divine Weapon. The Prison Emperor’s Divine Sword in the hands of Princess Qian Qian gathered thousands of thunder and lightning on the tip of the sword, slashing it down with a single move from a very high altitude. Her actions made it seem like it was as simple as cutting tofu with a sharp knife, where in reality, the sword cut through the Heaven Ranked volcanic spirit in half.

She rushed through the two halves of the volcanic spirit as the Prison Emperor’s Divine Sword in her hand was not stagnant at all.

She just became faster and fiercer, making a downwards swing from at an altitude of 2 kilometers, slashing towards the Lord of Fire.

“Small bugs!”

The Lord of Fire sneered.

After the experiment with the volcanic spirit just now, he discovered that this female swordsman was not able to exert 100% of the power of the Divine Sword. If this artifact truly exerted 100% of its power, nothing in the world could ever compare with its strength as the ultimate attack. The Lord of Fire confidently stretched out his right hand that was completely unprotected, raising it to hold Princess Qian Qian’s sword.

Through the burning fingers and body of the Lord of Fire, the power of the Divine Sword made a deep crevice of a 1-kilometer-mark on the lake.

However, the Lord of Fire, who was able to catch the slaying Divine Sword, was not hurt in the slightest.

Even if he no longer had a human body, the Lord of Fire also had the Level 8 strength of an Innate Supreme. If the Prison Emperor’s Divine Sword in Princess Qian Qian’s hands couldn’t exert the true power of the sword, then he could simply ignore her attacks.

“Little flea, let’s see how this Lord will squeeze you to death!” The Lord of Fire closed his five burning fingers, intending to strangle the tiny Princess Qian Qian in the palm of his hand.

“Boom!”

There was a Blizzard Goddess General who jumped out of nowhere. The moment Princess Qian Qian had occupied the attention of the Lord of Fire, the ice energy that was capable of ruining the world had been condensed, seeming to be even more terrifying than a hurricane passing by. She swung a heavy punch and managed to hit the back of the Lord of Fire’s head. With just one punch, the lava from the Lord of Fire’s head splashed all over the sky.

[T/N: I nearly forgot he was a freaking giant, and is made out of fire and lava, so I’m here to remind that, yes he’s made out of fire and lava]

The Lord of Fire shook his body, trying to get up and stand still.

However, it was impossible to do so. The kilometer-high body of his fell over the bridge of flames in pandemonium.

The burning lava spewed out of his face and scattered all over, eventually dripping into the water just like how a mortal’s human blood would be freshly spilled.

It was too late for the Volcanic Whale and the fishman to rescue him.

Moreover, according to their knowledge, it was unexpected that there was a Goddess General hiding in the dark to launch a sneak attack. Her attack was preemptive, not to mention that it was done sneakily and she was also a natural enemy of the opposite attribute. The Lord of Fire would have to reach the realm of the Fire God if he wanted to take the blow without falling over.

Once the Storm Goddess General succeeded, the beasts that have been in ambush for a long time such as Xiao Wen Li, Hui Tai Lang and the Chaotic Ghost, immediately surged forward to attack

Xiao Wen Li stood behind Yue Yang and summoned the Four Great Guardian Beasts— Stone Element Medusa, Storm Mermaid, Thunderbolt Naga, and Ice Serpent Demon. The Four Great Beasts also immediately set off the wind and waves. Among them, the Storm Mermaid was the most threatening in that aspect. She immediately blew the conch shell of the storm, causing violent winds to form. Under the thunder and lightning of the Thunderbolt Naga, a storm broke out immediately and the rain that was pouring down felt like arrows, sweeping away the entire world. The most important thing was that the lake was now full of water energy, which made the Volcanic Whale, the fishman, the Fire Dragon Eel and other beasts, who relied on the force of fire to sustain their vitality, to stoop to their lowest point of combat.

Flying fire beasts like the Fire Eagle, Fuel Bat and the Wildfire Crows soared below, hiding in the edge of the huge body of the Volcanic Whale. They were unwilling to fight the storm, and they were even more afraid of becoming the first target of their enemies to finish off.

Hui Tai Lang emanated the power of coercion of the Divine Beast.

Remembering how his body was crushed and bombarded onto the lava bridge paved by the Lord of Fire, he directly blasted several Heaven Ranked volcanic spirits into the air.

The deck of the bridge was now cracked like a spider web. Upon seeing that it hadn’t collapsed, Hui Tai Lang added another swipe of his claws to it. The bridge pier broke and the deck collapsed into a ragged hole, but the entire bridge deck was still holding on despite crumbling. Hui Tai Lang was furious and he made his head deform like a drill. Plunging into the bridge deck with his head, he ploughed out several hundred meters, directly destroying a section of the deck.

Compared with the brutal strength of Hui Tai Lang, the Chaotic Ghost did not do this.

She focused on a target.

Grabbing a Volcanic spirit with the Divine Power of Calamity, she frantically absorbed most of the opponent’s fire energy and threw the hapless guy into the cold lake.

The Golden Blood Python King and the Golden Tiger Shark were leisurely cruising at the bottom of the lake. As soon as the guy who had its energy extracted and stiffened fell into the water, they immediately rushed on frantically, dragging it into a deeper and colder lake in the depths.

The Volcanic Whale spewed molten lava that was even more terrifying than that of a volcano, but the Storm Mermaid greeted it with a sea wave that was a thousand-feet high.

She cooled the lava into rocks and dropped them one by one.

When the fishman opened its huge mouth and was about to swallow the Xiao Wen Li who was gathering water energy, Hui Tai Lang appeared behind it and opened his mouth that was larger than that of the fishman. It was as if the fishman could see the faint shimmers that resembled a black hole in his throat. Under the blessing of Yue Yang’s power of the Law, Hui Tai Lang directly turned into a world-destroying Demon Wolf, trying to swallow the fishman in one bite.

The fishman’s body was really too big. Although it was far less in mass compared to the Volcanic Whale, it was not something Hui Tai Lang could swallow in one bite.

His mouth was bulging.

The hapless fishman still had its body and tail exposed. It was struggling desperately and Hui Tai Lang also tried to engulf it with effort, but both of them were in a stalemate. The Flame Condor spewed out a terrifying flame that could burn the entire world. Just like the violent storm summoned by the conch shell of the Storm Mermaid, it was also stagnant and the air was full of heat. Hui Tai Lang had fire on his back that burned into the sky, but he had inflammation attributes. Besides, as a World Extinguishing Demon Wolf among the Divine Beasts, he could only use fire against it. However, it did not hurt as it was not a fatal blow at all.

The Flame Condor saw that its fire-breathing attack was ineffective, it immediately hovered down from the sky.

The sharp claws scratched Hui Tai Lang’s eyes.

Hui Tai Lang was pinning a struggling fishman, so he wouldn’t be able to deal with the actions of the Flame Condor. With its attack, they fell into the water below.

It was not afraid of water anyways. At most, it looks like a falling dog, but the fishman couldn’t stand it. It was not an ordinary aquatic fish, but a fish of fire that lives in a Sea of Flames. Falling into a body of water was similar to the state of ordinary fish falling into the Sea of Flames.

The threat of death made its struggling attempts increase by a hundredfold.

The huge water column that was hundreds of meters high was shaken. Hui Tai Lang, whose mouth was desperately unable to bite, appeared awkward in the water’s depths as well. Of course, it was impossible for him to let go, so things only depended on who would finish their energy consumption first. With Yue Yang by his side, even if it was the Volcanic Whale, he had the confidence to kill any enemy that comes in his path, let alone the fishman. He maintained his deadly bite; no matter how hard his enemy struggled, he wasn’t going to let go.

“Wow!”

A huge hand suddenly reached out from the lake as water vapour emerged as well.

After fishing from the bottom of the lake, Hui Tai Lang and the fishman that he kept his grip on were both grasped onto the large hand.

The Lord of Fire was definitely worthy of being old and immortal as he had recovered all of a sudden. The Lord of Fire who fished out Hui Tai Lang smashed him with his giant hands and grabbed the wolf’s tail. Swinging it up and down, together with the fishman, several hundred meters of the deck of the bridge was smashed in seconds. Hui Tai Lang felt such excruciating pain to the point where he couldn’t help but let go of his mouth, causing him to vomit and spit out the fishman that has about half of its life remaining. The Storm Goddess General launched a second attack and hit the back of the Lord of Fire. This time, the Lord of Fire was already prepared as another giant hand blocked the attack. With its towering and giant body, he harshly slammed the Storm Goddess General into the water.

The two bodies in the fist and impact of the Lord of Fire were frozen. But even when covered in frost, the raging flame maintained its burning fire.

At this moment, Xiao Wen Li, who had not attacked, started to make a move.

The Dual Icicle Blades dragged out a kilometer’s length of silver light, slashing on the icy back of the Lord of Fire.

Crushed icicles splashed all over the sky.

“Hah!”

The guardian beast’s vigour erupted frantically, making the Lord of Fire throw Xiao Wen Li backwards directly.

However, her Divine Beast’s Will made him gnaw his teeth and crack his mouth. He felt that there was a wave of freezing ice deep into his bone marrow which was extremely uncomfortable.

Xue Wu Xia has been standing up for a long time. With her fair-skinned hand held high, within ten kilometers of the realm of her spiritual consciousness, countless water dragons rose up into the sky, drenching and soaking the Battle Beasts such as Volcanic Whale, Flame Condor and Fire Dragon Eel. Princess Qian Qian’s Divine Sword slashed, slicing an obstructive volcano spirit in half. Then, she swung the sword against the Flame Condor. The cunning and self-conscious Flame Condor naturally refused to withstand the power of the Divine Sword, so it immediately rushed through several water dragons. Flying close to the lake, it managed to escape a fatal blow.

The truly unfortunate one was none other than the fishman who was just vomited out of Hui Tai Lang’s mouth.

It was still dizzy, and when its head was severely chopped by Princess Qian Qian, the light ball above its head was cut off. Its head was also cut by the sword’s energy, reaching a crevice with a depth of ten meters.

Hui Tai Lang looked at it and was overjoyed.

Immediately, he opened his huge mouth again and swallowed the severely damaged fishman for the second time.

The body immediately resembled a lazy donkey rolling around. They fell into the water and swam far forward desperately, no longer allowing the Lord of Fire to have a second chance to rescue it.

“All of you can just die!” The Lord of Fire was furious. He raised his whole body strength, blasting Xue Wu Xia with his burning hands together with his palms. Now, he understood a little bit. The truly terrifying one was not the Chaotic Ghost that could use the Divine Power of Calamity, nor the Demon Wolf that devours all things. Not even the human female swordsman who slashes the world with a Divine Sword was as scary as the female sage who was silently holding onto a book, suppressing his abilities by covering the entire space with a realm.

The only General who could threaten his life was actually summoned by her.

If she doesn’t die, he wouldn’t even be able to escape this lake smoothly.

Xue Wu Xia’s hands stretched out and an ultimately cold energy burst out from her body. When she put her palms together, she could eradicate the giant hands that tried to attack her. In an instant, the ultimately cold energy that could freeze all things now froze the Lord of Fire’s hands.

The Lord of Fire’s eyes widened in astonishment. There was nothing in the world that couldn’t be frozen besides the Nirvana Flame with the amount of coldness the power emanated.

Maybe it won’t last long, but who is this human woman who can obtain this ultimate cold energy?

Was she the disciple of Fairy Qi Luo?

At the moment when the Lord of Fire’s hands were frozen, student Yue yang who had been a walking passerby all this time, finally made a move.

He silently stuck to the forehead of the Lord of Fire and he could most definitely swallow him up if he just opened his mouth. However, he uttered a horrified roar for the first time. The reason was because he suddenly discovered that the most inconspicuous man in front of him had the power of the Nirvana Flame! If there wasn’t any ice sealing his hands, the Lord of Fire would have used his greatest strength in his life to escape. The Nirvana Flame is not a flame that he can resist and manipulate; it is a sacred fire that controls all the flames in the world… No, it was even better than the legendary Fire God’s Divine Fire.

“You have also dragged on for tens of thousands of years, it’s time for you to close your mouth and lie quietly in the coffin,” Yue Yang broke out a pillar of Nirvana from the forehead of the Lord of Fire as he watched. With this pillar of Nirvana passing through his mouth, it came out from the back of his neck and went straight to the sky, but he was helpless. At this moment, it discovered that an Eternal Wheel was shining brightly over his head.

A more terrifying Wheel of World Destruction was oncoming and the Lord of Fire screamed when his head was cut in half by the Wheel.

It’s over… He even saw the young man who he had completely underestimated, who was trying to pierce the ‘Fire Eukaryote’ in his head with a white, shining Sword Qi.

If I was not trapped in this water world, if there was no female sage who was capable of summoning the Goddess General, if there was no female swordsman holding the Divine Sword to attract my attention… If I wasn’t too arrogant in holding onto my strength and evaluated the enemy’s power incorrectly… If iI was still in the Sea of Flames, I am afraid that nothing will happen; but It’s too late— it’s too late to realise it now!

chapters.title: Chapter 892
chapters.body:
Chapter 892

Chapter 892: I Have A Hunch

A day later.

After splitting open the head of the Lord of Fire and extracting the Fire Eukaryote, the huge body that had lost consciousness fell into the lake. There, it remained soaking in the icy cold water for an entire day before gradually hardening into rock.

Because Yue Yang needed to use the Creation Domain, Energy-absorbing Bracelets and the White Splendid Frost to convert the fire energy of the Fire Eukaryote, he had no time to participate in the final expulsion of the battle. If it weren’t for being trapped in a disadvantaged terrain and wrongly estimating Yue Yang’s attack methods, it wouldn’t have been that simple of a process to defeat the Lord of Fire. The most important thing was that the Lord of Fire had sufficient power, but without the cooperation between a human body and the Supreme Will, it was difficult to exert his true power. Or, if he was still fighting in the sea of his own superior terrain, he would have no problem recovering. In the field of combustion, he could have maintained his invincibility while being able to protect himself.

Under the dual suppression of Yue Yang’s small but pressuring power of the Law and the Innate Invincible Sword Qi, the Lord of Fire was defeated.

His defeat didn’t seem like that of a strong opponent.

Of course, it was an unspoken rule that those who ignored or underestimated the ultimate skill of the Nirvana Flame, the Eternal Wheel and the World-Exterminating Wheel would be punished.

To possess the Nirvana Flame and the World-Exterminating Wheel, paired with Yue Yang’s strength, the powers have been continuously multiplied and progressed. It evolved faster than any other ability. With time, the abilities could be exerted to their full potential.

With Yue Yang’s current strength, any one of the three powers that he casted out would be an immensely powerful existence towards those below the Divine Rank.

“Ho, ho…”

The powerful soul expelled from the Fire Eukaryote carried a very strong sense of unwillingness and resentment.

Even with Yue Yang’s current strength, it couldn’t be eliminated.

Moreover, the Law of this Hourglass World did not allow the Lord of Fire and the Fairy Qi Luo to ‘escape’ regardless of their forms.

At least, before Yue Yang’s will was stronger than the Will of the Ancient God, it was impossible for him to take away the Lord of Fire, just like how it was impossible for him to bring the Empress Fei Wen Li out of the Black Hole Seal Space. Of course, the Black Hole’s Sealing Space was much stronger— there was absolutely no way to break it and there weren’t any faults to pick at either.

In order to ensure that the Lord of Fire could no longer use his reignition domain to resurrect himself, Yue Yang deposited the Lord of Fire’s soul in the belly of a puppet beast. Then, the puppet beast sank into the depths of the lake, sealing it firmly with ice that would not melt for more than 10,000 years. Even if there was any force that could break the ice and release the Lord of Fire stored in the puppet beast, Yue Yang, the maker and sealer, would be the first to know of it. Maybe, when he enters a state of Divine Supremacy in the future, there would be no need for this ‘old-fashioned’ seal; however, using this kind of seal for the present Yue Yang was the best choice for now.

The huge body made up of volcanic magma of the Lord of Fire had been cooled into stone.

It laid quietly at the bottom of the lake, 10,000 meters away from the surface.

In the middle, Yue Yang drew a giant celestial rune formation, which was very similar to the Giant Flame Rune Formation. The only difference was that this rune needed water energy for maintenance instead of fire energy.

“Are you done?” When Yue Yang finished re-sealing the Lord of Fire and broke out from the surface of the water, he found that Princess Qian Qian, who had gone out to pursue the enemy before, was back. The Tigress seemed to be in a good mood, handing Yue Yang a towel to wipe off the water droplets on his body. Later, seeing that Yue Yang’s actions were too sloppy, she snatched it up again and helped him in an extremely rare act of affection. Looking like a conscientious young wife, she smiled and said, “Without Sister Yu and the others, you can’t even take care of yourself. To Hell with the nonsense of being the ‘Number One Genius of the Tong Tian Tower’, you might as well be called the ‘Number One Idiot’ or something…”

“I’m giving you a chance to cultivate your hands-on ability,” Student Yue Yang laughed loudly.

“And who would ever require that chance of yours?!” Tigress gave him a scornful look, but continued to keep her hands busy.

“How are the results?” Yue Yang enjoyed Princess Qian Qian’s service like a senior master. The only thing that was missing would be to have someone move a master’s chair for him to lie down on.

“I only killed two Fuel Bats as the condor was too fast. When the Lord of Fire fell, it immediately betrayed its master and fled at a speed that I couldn’t catch up to. Hui Tai Lang was still swallowing the fishman and couldn’t help, so Xiao Wen Li went to chase it personally,” Princess Qian Qian dried Yue Yang’s hair. Then, she took off his clothes and draped over a new set of attire for him. Usually with other people around, she never expressed her care towards Yue Yang. But now, as there were only the two of them, she was not fierce at all; instead, she acted like a gentle and caring wife. The only thing that remained the same was that her words still expressed her dissatisfaction towards losing.

“Where is the Fire Dragon Eel?” Yue Yang was more concerned about the two Battle Beasts. One of them was the Flame Condor that had wisdom and very good potential. If Yue Yang didn’t want to keep it, he would definitely kill it as soon as possible.

Another beast was the Deep Sea Fire Dragon Eel, who was even stronger than the Flame Condor.

However, its shortcomings were also very obvious.

The Fire Dragon Eel was a super giant Battle Beast with pure fire attributes. It couldn’t enter the water, nor could it fly for a long time. Hence, it would be restricted by many terrains in an actual fight, unlike the Flame Condor that could fight in every location besides water. In terms of cultivation value, oversized beasts were not as good as smaller beasts as the chances of them transforming into Divine Beasts in the future were really slim.
