“Subdued. When the Storm Goddess grabbed its tail, it immediately descended,” Princess Qian Qian lowered her head to help Yue Yang wipe his body as she responded to his question.

“It’s loyalty is not high. When other beasts attacked us, it was the only one gradually opting to hide in the rear. I’m guessing that it was not a beast of the Lord of Fire, but as it was sealed together in this Sea of Flames, it had no choice but to succumb to it,” Yue Yang raised his eyebrows. Not being able to catch up to the Flame Condor is fine; at the very least, they weren’t returning from this trip empty-handed. Besides obtaining the Qi Luo Umbrella, he also managed to acquire the Fire Dragon Eel that was considered a pretty good beast.

When Princess Qian Qian was putting on Yue Yang’s undergarments, she found that something stood upright like a gun. It was arrogant and murderous, as if a big battle was about to be waged at any time.

Her fair cheeks could not help but become a shade of red.

With a little bit of embarrassment and a little bit of anger, she spat out, “What do you want to do? What are you thinking about all day?”

She stretched out her hand and patted it lightly, but when she touched it just now, she quickly retracted his hand as if it was hot. Yue Yang laughed, “This is a natural reaction. If it doesn’t get erected when there are beautiful women around me, how would there be any hope for me in the future?!”

He stubbornly took her little hand again, insisting on letting her touch it.

Princess Qian Qian first resisted with all her strength, but found that she couldn’t overpower Yue Yang. As she quickly touched him, her hand retracted as if she encountered a snake bite. Her face flushed and even her neck became hot before she turned her head and looked around. Realising that Xue Wu Xia hadn’t returned, her tone suddenly became louder, “What’s the big deal about this? it’s not like I haven’t seen it before; I even kissed it!”

She accidentally exposed a big secret.

Yue Yang was stunned.

Princess Qian Qian knew that she had made a mistake and became even more flustered, so she hurriedly waved her hand to argue, “That was just a bet with Lady Xue. She said she dared to kiss it, so naturally I can’t admit defeat.”

“Why didn’t I know about this?” Student Yue Yang was filled with regret— why did he miss such a beautiful moment?

“You were unconscious and you couldn’t wake up…” Princess Qian Qian saw that his face was filled with regret and she couldn’t help but feel the warmth of a growing love forming in her heart. She hugged him and kissed him gently on the lips, “Alright, I also know that it’s not right to be angry with you, but you always seem to annoy others! Let’s just finish this with a kiss and then everyone will be even. I won’t be angry with you and you’re not allowed to be angry with me either!”

“One more kiss,” Student Yue Yang would never be satisfied with the status quo.

“No, Lady Xue is coming back soon,” Princess Qian Qian refused and looked around anxiously. She hurriedly dressed Yue Yang in fear that Xue Wu Xia would see her helping Yue Yang to dress himself.

“She won’t come back so quickly… I have the feeling that she is still fighting in a very far place! Hey, she chased that Volcanic Whale, right?” Yue Yang hugged the soft Tigress in his arms to mold while the iron was still hot [1] . His tongue pierced her lips and he gave her a suffocating deep kiss. When his bad hand got into her clothes, he woke up Tigress from her trance. She grabbed his big hand and gasped slightly, “No, she really is coming back soon. You won’t stop as soon as you start, and if I let go, you are going to take my clothes off…You bad boy. At night, I will let you hug me in your arms. If Lady Xue sees us doing it in broad daylight, I don’t have the guts to face her anymore. Hurry up and get dressed, she will be back soon- Oh my God, she’s already back…”

[T/L Note: Refers to taking action during an opportunity like how one hits an iron when its hot to form a shape or a different body]

In the distant sky, there was a star twinkling.

In a flash, a figure landed in front of Yue Yang and Princess Qian Qian. It was none other than Xue Wu Xia who was holding the Book of Truth.

She looked at Yue Yang and Princess Qian Qian with a smile without saying a word. Yue Yang was cheeky as he said nothing at all, but Princess Qian Qian, who was still blushing, said with a guilty conscience, “It’s a good time that you’re back, this kid is wet like a drenched chicken under the rain! This Princess is not going to serve him, so I think it’s best if Sister Xue does it!”

Xue Wu Xia stepped up and abruptly pulled out Yue Yang’s hand that had touched Princess Qian Qian just now. She gave it a whiff with her little nose.

She didn’t speak either as she just smiled and looked at Princess Qian Qian.

But the Princess’s face turned red as she strongly argued, “He forced it…”

Student Yue Yang also raised his hand, “Yes, I forcefully touched it and I can prove it!”

Princess Qian Qian was embarrassed and angry. She stomped on him severely before grabbing his big hand and stretching it out to Xue Wu Xia, “You can’t favour one over another, you should touch her as well!”

She thought that Xue Wu Xia would scream in shock and flee. Who would have thought that Xue Wu Xia didn’t have any signs of being flustered as she still smiled. Instead, she graciously held Yue Yang’s hand, guiding him to touch her towering breasts gently with a light squeeze. Seeing this, Princess Qian Qian was stunned as she never thought that Xue Niu was so brave.

Student Yue Yang had a happy expression on his face, almost ecstatic to the point where he would faint.

I can’t believe this is true!

“Actually, it’s okay to kiss a couple secretly, I won’t be jealous either,” Xue Wu Xia naughtily teased Princess Qian Qian. After finishing, she suddenly exclaimed, “I didn’t think about it before, but after the confrontation with the Lord of Fire, I realised that only when the Innate Supreme power was combined with the human body that it could become the real Supreme Power. It is no wonder that the Holy Beasts and the Divine Beasts would eventually transform into humans because the human body is so important.”

“Indeed. The human body is seemingly the weakest— it has no horns, no fangs, no sharp claws, no scales, no various outstanding external specialties; only wisdom. Precisely because of that, however, it starts off at the weakest point. Once it grows and progresses to its strongest ability, that will make one truly powerful. Without a human body, even if you have a super powerful ability, you wouldn’t be able to use it to its full potential at 100%. For 10,000 years, the Lord of Fire probably did not realize that all kinds of combat skills, as well as the various types of combat methods that could only be exerted by the human body, have completely disappeared,” Yue Yang concluded before he asked Xue Wu Xia, “Why did you suddenly think of all this?”

“I was thinking of the Volcanic Whale that I captured just now. Its size and level was no less than that of mine or even the Storm Goddess General, but it was defeated so badly that there was barely any form of retaliation. Although the Storm Goddess may need a few days to defeat it completely, there is almost no chance of the Volcanic Whale reversing the tides, just like how the Lord of Fire did not have any opportunity to fight back in your hands. If the Volcanic Whale and the Lord of Fire possessed human bodies, I am afraid that things would not have been so simple…” Xue Wu Xia put on Yue Yang’s coat and carefully arranged his collar for him, “In the future, our enemies will be getting stronger and stronger. If we stop speeding up our progress and slow down our pace to step into the realm of supremacy, I’m afraid we won’t be able to help much.”

“We will definitely step into the Supreme Realm. I have a hunch…” Princess Qian Qian had a strong sense of intuition towards their talents. She felt that one of them among the two would be able to ascend into the Supreme Realm in a very short period of time. However, she couldn’t tell who it may be.

chapters.title: Chapter 893
chapters.body:
Chapter 893

Chapter 893: The Secret Of The Gemini Mask

With the assistance of Yue Yang, Xue Wu Xia and Princess Qian Qian’s consecutive attacks, the Storm Goddess General was finally able to defeat the Volcanic Whale.

The Volcanic Whale would have preferred death compared to surrender.

However, the blow was too painful to bear. The Storm Goddess General made the Volcanic Whale freeze like how humans would preserve their salted fish, but the most terrifying thing was the torture of Yue Yang’s small power of the Law and the Pandora’s Box. The strength of the small power of the Law and the Divine Power of Calamity were double blows to the Volcanic Whale— so much so that its only wish was to die but even that wish couldn’t be fulfilled. Then, it had been endlessly tortured by Yue Yang’s various experiments. Finally, it found out that Hui Tai Lang, who had swallowed the fishman into his belly, did not seem satisfied with his meal and looked like he could have another serving. Hence, the Whale had no choice but to lower its head and surrender to the Storm Goddess General.

Xiao Wen Li, who chased the Flame Condor, fought much faster than the Storm Goddess General.

The Flame Condor with higher wisdom knew that the outcome would be inevitable.

Under Xiao Wen Li’s restraining talents, it had been injured several times and had no power to fight back, wailing and surrendering long ago.

The Chaotic Ghost was focused on consuming the fire energy, whereas the two Wildfire Crows were willing to surrender. However, she ignored them and continued slaughtering the volcanic spirits. She chased them into the Sea of Flames, hunting down the two Wildfire Crows like a fisherman sprinting for fish. If it weren’t for the delay as she killed the volcanic spirits, the two Wildfire Crows might not have survived.

The two frightened Wildfire Crows formed into a circle and fled to Yue Yang’s side to seek shelter.

Facing opponents like the Chaotic Ghost, there is only one outcome should they not surrender.

And that was to be swallowed directly.

“Unfortunately, I didn’t get more information…” What Yue Yang wanted most were not a few Heaven Ranked Beasts, but more ancient secrets. Especially with regard to the secrets of Six Divine Artifacts and ancient runes—the more there were, the better.

“Let’s take it slow. Maybe after entering the Gods’ Ruins, we will be able to truly open the secret door of the ancient times,” Xue Wu Xia comforted Yue Yang softly.

“How do we deal with these beasts?” Princess Qian Qian asked this question. It was certain that they would be taken out as leaving them here was basically the equivalent of letting the tiger go back to the mountain [1] . Of course, Yue Yang would not do such a thing. The problem was that the beasts such as the Volcanic Whale, Fire Dragon Eel, Flame Condor, and the Wildfire Crows were not only very high-level beasts, but they were also mature with little cultivation value. After all, not every beast that entered the Beast Valley had the blessings to be reborn through the Gates of Reincarnation.

[T/L Note: meaning something was done in vain.]

For Yue Yang, these beasts were still pretty good at the moment and could be used well. However, in the future, they will definitely be lesser if compared with the beasts of higher potential such as Hui Tai Lang and the Chaotic Ghost.

He didn’t like beasts with such obvious displays of advantages and disadvantages.

The fact that beasts were super huge alone made him lose his interest in cultivating them.

Yet, the beasts that surrendered were all extremely large and gigantic.

Not mentioning the viewpoints of training, just bringing them out into the Soaring Dragon Continent alone was a painfully troubling task. If these powerful and huge beasts rolled and pranced around casually in the Soaring Dragon Continent, earthquakes would also occur and affect many places.

Therefore, even if they were taken out, they could not be placed in the Soaring Dragon Continent.

Placing them in the Heaven Realm might just encourage them to escape at some point as well.

So that’s not good either.

After thinking about it, Yue Yang decided to put these ‘unexpected’ beasts on the sixth floor of the Tong Tian Tower’s Thunder Fortress, where the lava lake would be their paradise.

“This guy is too big and terrifying! However, it is majestic and is at the 6th Level of the Heaven Rank. It is also an extremely giant Battle Beast. Putting its name into the public was a great move!” To Yue Yang’s surprise, the Old Fox, Jun Wu You and other elders went to the Thunder Fortress to watch after hearing the rumours. If it weren’t for Yue Yang’s objection, they also would have liked to move the Volcanic Whale, which would splash thousands of meters of magma all over as long as it moved, to the Soaring Dragon Continent and settle it down.

“Master is so great…” Fat Toad Jia De trembled with excitement.

As a servant of Yue Yang, his status has also risen.

Not only did the merchants want it, but the innate warriors will give a polite nod when they see it.

Because Yue Yang had a good harvest this time, the Elder Nan Gong, Sky Execution, the Dragon Emperor, the Emperor of the Underworld and a few others also came to watch. There, they found that Yue Yang had captured a Volcanic Whale that was around a kilometre long, a Flame Condor, a Deep Sea Fire Dragon Eel and even managed to subdue two 2nd Level Heaven Ranked Wildfire Crows that were as timid as mice.

In the end, Sky Execution exchanged the treasure ‘Great Sky Demon Orb’ of the Sky demon Palace for the two Wildfire Crows for the newly promoted second strongest Innate Elder Heaven Rank, Sky Crime.

The Underworld Emperor drooled as he wanted to make exchanges as well.

But his treasure ‘Eye of the Underworld’ was only a Holy treasure. Without the power of a sub-divine tool like the Great Sky Demon Orb, he could only watch Sky Crime make a contract with the Wildfire Crows. As for the Fire Dragon Eel and the Flame Condor, things were even more out of his league. The strength of these two were too strong and intelligent and he wasn’t sure if he could completely subdue them. If they were to run away someday, he would definitely cry even if he couldn’t form tears. Yue Yang was also interested in the ‘Eye of the Underworld’, so he patted his chest and promised the Underworld Emperor that he would find a powerful and valuable beast for him.

The Great Demon King Baruth, who came a little later, also wanted to exchange a Battle-type Beast with Yue Yang.

However, he didn’t want anything else but a black dragon.

It was also said that riding the black dragon was a tradition of the Demon King passed down since ancient times. Was the black dragon easy to control too? Yue Yang received the ‘Demon Bottle’ and stopped making complaints.

“Because of cultivation reasons, I won’t go to the Land of Trials right away for the time being. I will be walking around in the Heaven Realm these days. If I encounter a suitable beast, I will definitely show it to you. Believe my insights, I promise that I won’t be wrong! “Student Yue Yang secretly squealed with joy. These Elders have a bunch of precious treasures, so he would have to try harder to squeeze them out of their hands.

“It’s still important to cultivate, so just let these kinds of things take their places naturally!” Elder Nan Gong valued Yue Yang the most and advised him not to be too distracted.

“Naturally. I will look for some again when I have time, but I believe that a suitable war beast captive will be available soon!” The Underworld Emperor was very confident in Yue Yang. If Yue Yang told him the truth about the Innate Supreme Lord of Fire and his pretense as a formidable opponent in the Sea of Flames, he guaranteed that the Emperor of the Underworld would be scared half to death.

“Is it true that no one wants the Fire Dragon Eel and the Flame Condor?” Yue Yang wanted to make the final sale.

“It’s easy to deal with the strong, but when their wisdom was too high, it would be difficult to truly tame an adult beast with intelligence,” The Dragon Emperor even hinted that if Yue Yang didn’t want to contract the two of them, he better kill them to avoid future troubles.

Although the two Battle-type Beasts, the Deep Sea Fire Dragon Eel and the Flame Condor indeed have a certain level of wisdom, they wouldn’t maintain being Holy Beasts.

There was still a little bit of cultivation value in them, after all.

Chaotic Ghost had always wanted to eat them and absorb their fire energy, but Yue Yang didn’t give her this opportunity. Instead, he let the Reaper Mantis of the super-elemental body form a contract with them. If the Reaper Mantis and the two Beasts evolve into Divine Beasts, the three of them would probably be able to take on anything as a group as long as they joined forces and cooperated with one another. This was the best solution that Yue Yang finally thought of— to have one junior bring up two seniors. If it were not for the restrained attributes, any enemy would have a headache dealing with them!

Hui Tai Lang had a bulging belly, but no one knew that he had eaten a giant fishman.

It hasn’t been digested until now.

The onlookers also patronised a few of the Battle-type Beast prisoners, but no one paid attention to him.

It was not until he returned to Tian Luo Palace that Little Shuang Er discovered the dog’s [2] abnormality.

[T/L Note: I know he’s a wolf but think of it as Shuang Er being familiar with Hui Tai Lang (cuz he seriously behaves like a pet puppy) and is also the sister of his Master— she gets perks to call him a dog, I guess]

“Brother, what’s the matter with the dog? Look at him, did he eat something wrong? Why can’t his mouth close together?” Yue Shuang stood on tiptoe as she stroked Hui Tai Lang’s forehead with little effort.

“This is the result of gluttony!” Yue Yang said, making Xiao Shuang Er’s face pale with fright.

In a certain way, the little girl’s slanderous mouth was a match for Hui Tai Lang’s gluttony.

Hearing that ‘gluttony’ made him look like this, she became so frightened that she hurriedly covered her small mouth in fear that her mouth would be like his. Because of the long-term dislocation of the chin, his mouth was damaged and he couldn’t close it for a while.

Hui Tai Lang’s mouth was crooked, but he was very proud— not anyone could have swallowed that 4th Level Heaven Ranked fishman.

Once the fishman was digested, his strength would be greatly improved.

A crooked mouth for a few days is nothing!

“What? Don’t you want the candy?” Yue Yang took out the candy to tempt the little girl as usual, but she was afraid that she would eat too much and become unable to close her mouth like Hui Tai Lang. She desperately refused and nearly cried. In the end, it was Xue Wu Xia who took her to find Si-niang, and Yue Yang was finally at peace. In the name of not disturbing Yue Yang’s practice, Princess Qian Qian diligently took the Qi Luo Umbrella to find Yue Yu.

“Study it slowly. If you find out about any secrets, we can discuss it afterwards,” Princess Qian Qian left with light steps, looking very happy.

“The Great Sky Demon Orb is such a good item! The Eye of the Underworld is also good. The Demon Bottle given by Baruth has a peculiar energy, but it seems to be a treasure from ancient times. I’ll just study it as well then,” Yue Yang had initially wanted to research the ancient flame rune pattern painted by the Lord of Fire. However, Sickly Beauty and Yue Yu were not there and he was unwilling to spend time repeating the information, so he would wait for them to come back before he started to study it. As for the Great Sky Demon Orb that was exchanged for the Wildfire Crows, Yue Yang didn’t see any more secrets for the time being, but he discovered that the treasure of the Eye of the Underworld seemed to be capable of inlaying within the hollow crevice between the eyebrows of the Gemini Mask.

Could it be that there was an eye in the middle where the Gemini Mask was hollowed out?

Because of the seal, the Gemini Mask turned out to be just a gold-level treasure.

After Yue Yang used the Nirvana Flame to reshape its appearance many times, the originally broken and shattered mask was almost completely restored as its power was already close to that of a sub-divine artifact level.

It turned out that Yue Yang thought it was the center of the brow area that was cracked with a perfectly hollow circular arc. He tried using whatever he had, but he never found a suitable filler. Hence, he always thought that the middle part was broken and lost. It wasn’t until the Underworld Emperor took out the treasure, the Eye of the Underworld and Yue Yang comparing the two did he find that the objects added up.

The final seal of this Gemini Mask couldn’t be unlocked, so what kind of secrets did it contain?

What exactly is the truth?

chapters.title: Chapter 894
chapters.body:
Chapter 894

Chapter 894: Your Majesty, You Are So Proud

Yue Yang studied the Gemini Mask for a long time. However, he still couldn’t find the answer.

Although he had an inkling of an aura fragment that made him feel like he was getting closer to the truth, he was unable to grasp onto it. His mind wandered in a misty haze, desperately trying to connect the dots.

In the end, he decided to talk to His Majesty. Based on Si-niang’s inadvertent tone of voice during lunch hours, His Majesty seemed to have asked about the progress of the ‘Beast Bracelet’ recently. This, on the other hand, proved that His Majesty, who was labelled as ‘secretly enthusiastic’ by Yue Yang on their last meeting, was starting to forgive him.

In any situation, one must strike when the iron is still hot. This was a concept that student Yue Yang understood very well.

Yue Yang became rather preoccupied in his research. He put aside the thought of having regularly timed meals as he immersed himself in his studies till 3 in the morning.

In the dead of night, student Yue Yang sneaked into His Majesty’s palace again.

This time, when the female officer on duty saw him, she was no longer surprised. In fact, she still pretended that she wasn’t aware of his presence and let him sneak in without notifying of his arrival. Yue Yang however, was very conscious. First, he moved a stool and sat in front of His Majesty’s bed. Patiently, he waited for ten minutes without making a sound. Suddenly, a pillow was thrown out from the gauze tent, hitting Yue Yang’s face, “It’s you again! Brat, you’re always running to me in the middle of the night! I-I really want to kill you!”

“Don’t be angry,” Student Yue Yang took the pillow and hugged it in his arms. Then, passed the semi-finished Beast Bracelet in his hand, “Look at this. Under your enlightenment, I have completed half of it. Your palace is kind of peaceful— I get inspired every time I need to use my wits here.”

“I’ll deport you to the pool of the Abyss Blackwater Lake. It will be quieter there and you will be even more inspired!” His Majesty was furious.

“Alright, it was my fault last time, I apologise. I think you are actually quite good— you probably don’t belong to the secret-enthusiast type, nor do you seem obscene like Fatty Hai. You should be the same as me, the romantic type— a chic and unrestrained leaf among the suave flowers. Otherwise, how could we have such a tacit understanding between us, you know? We can be named ‘confidants in the aspect of picking up girls’!” Yue Yang patted his chest in elation. He implied through those gestures that “a woman is easy to have, but a friend is hard to find, so don’t worry about these trivial matters”.

“Say it again and I’ll smoke you!” His Majesty’s voice was distorted with anger.

“We’re both men here, so let’s just forget about some random stuff that has been said and don’t take it too seriously. Besides, anger can hurt the liver easily . If your liver is not good, your kidney won’t be good; and if the kidney is not good, then there is no hope for life any longer.” Yue Yang said that a man should be slightly more open-minded.

“You…” Your Majesty was speechless. What the heck is he talking about?

“Let’s study this war Beast Bracelet. Although it has not been officially completed, I believe you can see its characteristics now. I am going to make a space like a storage ring in it. It doesn’t need to be large, just enough to let the beasts rest inside. Putting it this way, it seems to resemble a bronze Grimoire. Of course, this space cannot be upgraded, at least not automatically. When a warrior contracts a Beast with suitable attributes, this will be the home of the beast. The rune pattern and jewel outside here are the energy that is used to create summoning patterns and maintain the rune. Of course, this is insufficient; I’m just here to make a small example as the real finished product is not good enough yet. But I think you should understand well enough that I was just eager to discuss the details with you. That’s the entire reason why I rushed here, after all!”

“There is no need to discuss the summoning of the pattern and the jewel. I think the most difficult thing is the method of communication between the souls of the martial artists and the beasts?” His Majesty saw that this kid was talking about official business, so it was not easy to get angry at him.

“That is the most critical part. I would have to discuss with Wu Hen, Wu Xia, and Sister Yu on how to construct the best soul induction rune pattern on the Beast Bracelet without harming the soul. I have a vague idea on how to go about it, but it’s not perfect yet so I didn’t dare to bring it forward. In fact, it’s because of your harsh criticisms that I’m this scared!” Yue Yang portrayed a scared expression on his face.

“With your daring nature, how long will you be afraid for?” His Majesty couldn’t help but mock him.

“Almost all men act the same way. If you see a beautiful snow-white body, you would be tempted!” Yue Yang laughed, “As a wise man once said, ‘both food and lust are good’— my self-control is already considered great.”

“Go on, keep on bragging!” Your Majesty couldn’t stand Yue Yang’s attitude. Could he be even more shameless than this?

“Bragging? No, I have always despised bragging falsifiers; I always speak truthfully,” Yue Yang’s words almost made His Majesty fall.

“Okay, okay… I know exactly what kind of person you are, spare me the details. Let’s return the topic to the Beast Bracelet!” His Majesty felt powerless towards this kid’s shamelessness. But having said that, His Majesty sincerely admires Yue Yang for his talents and wisdom— not just anyone could craft a Beast Bracelet like this. Even if it has the same design, no one could really make an identically functional copy. Yes, this is where His Majesty had no choice but to recognise Yue Yang for his abilities.

“I want Your Majesty to help me with two small favors,” Yue Yang finally explained his intentions.

“Let’s talk about it!” His Majesty became vigilant.

If it is an unequal treaty, you must never agree to it.

You know this kid’s character, don’t you?

He was even more terrifying than a big tiger. Once you let him know the truth, he might start to push his boundaries/

His Majesty decided that if this kid made any unreasonable conditions, he would be kicked out of his bedroom immediately and never be allowed to come again.

Yue Yang pondered for a moment, making His Majesty feel even more guilty. It’s over, did this kid suspect that something was amiss? I should have driven him away last time, but I was too soft-hearted.

His Majesty was slightly anxious.

Suddenly, he heard Yue Yang say, “The first aspect that I need help with is about the Beast Bracelet. If the warrior can more accurately contract a beast that matches with his or her own attributes, although I have a bit of experience, I hope you can share your experience. I need more information about the beasts and the characteristics of the warrior to make a tester suitable for various needs. You probably are aware but this is very important. If this measurement goes wrong, the cultivator’s entire life would be affected.”

When His Majesty heard the words, his heart relaxed, “Okay, but as it’s abrupt, I can’t say too much yet. I will prepare something throughout these few days. Then, I will write down my experience and have someone bring it to you!”

Yue Yang was so happy that he threw down the pillow and cheered, “That’s great! I knew you would agree.”

Seeing Yue Yang that ecstatic made His Majesty smile as well.

Putting aside the desired lust, this kid is still a child to be satisfied with such simple requests. No wonder she would say that he was actually a very nice boy—that’s true indeed. His Majesty suppressed his smile and added, “Not only my experience, but I can also involve several Guardian War Gods to participate in this matter and fully cooperate with you.”

Yue Yang pretended to wipe his tears, “I’m so touched! My tears are about to flow out, give me a moment!”

His Majesty was at a loss for words.

“What about the second condition?” Seeing that this kid was being whimsical, he couldn’t help but laugh. Pretending to be serious, His Majesty coughed slightly, saying that Yue Yang should hurry up and get to the point under the pretense of wanting to rest early.

“Ah, it’s very simple. I want Your Majesty to know about the Eye of the Underworld. I want to know its origin and later mutation,” This was Yue Yang’s true purpose.

“Why do you bother me with every single matter? I don’t know anything about this!” His Majesty became a little angry.

“I think you should know… It’s because I can’t find anyone to ask. The Night Empress is not here and I dare not ask Zhi Zun about such trivial matters,” Before Yue Yang finished speaking, His Majesty was furious, “You don’t dare to bother Zhi Zun, but you have the guts to bother me? Am I particularly good at being bullied by you? I’m warning you, don’t make me angry; otherwise, I have the ability to deal with you! Just ask Nan Gong about this kind of thing; he’s the one who’s reading books every day to the point where he’s ironically dense!”

“Isn’t your place closer? I’m too lazy to go to Elder Nan Gong’s place. Besides, you can just tell me about it right here— it’s killing two birds with one stone,” Student Yue Yang smiled happily, causing His Majesty to feel like he was punched in the face but with a lump of cotton. He thought that there was really no way to be mad at someone who smiled just as widely as Yue Yang did.

“What do you want from the Eye of the Underworld?” His Majesty was surprised.

“You see, I found that the Eye of the Underworld fits precisely with my Gemini Mask, but it can’t be inlaid, so I came to ask for some advice. I think if I can put it in, maybe I can find a way to break the last seal. In that case, maybe my Gemini Mask will evolve or revert its position into a Divine Weapon” Yue Yang’s words were full of honesty.

“I know a little about the Eye of the Underworld, but I don’t want to tell you!” His Majesty felt that when it was time to punish this kid; if he wouldn’t plead hard, he wouldn’t tell him and let him go through a period of anxiousness.

“Big brother, I beg you, please?” For the Divine Weapon, Yue Yang was really anxious.

“You’re calling me big brother?” His Majesty was very speechless.

“No, you got it wrong. I address you as ‘Your Majesty’, did you expect me to change it? Should I call you big sister instead of big brother then? [T/L Note: He’s being sarcastic] ” Yue Yang questioned.

“You should have a better attitude at pleading,” His Majesty felt a bit smug. Who knew there would come a day where you’re prancing in my hands. If you don’t plead to me with intent, don’t think I’ll exploit this secret to you. Even if you ask Nan Gong, you’d have to come back for the truth because he doesn’t know all of it.

“The wisest god in the world, oh the handsome, brave, gallant and heroic Tian Luo Emperor, please tell the ignorant me the secret of this Eye of the Underworld!” Student Yue Yang attempted flattery.

“Keep talking until I stop you,” His Majesty snorted softly.

“Your Majesty, you are arrogant!” Student Yue Yang did not cooperate.

“You…Get out right away…” His Majesty’s calm and cool mood was shattered. Initially, his heart was softening and he was going to spare the kid some trouble and tell him. Who would have thought that this kid was this infuriating; would it kill him to give the Emperor a moment of satisfaction?

“I was wrong, I was wrong,” Yue Yang yelled. His Majesty saw him express regret so eagerly so he decided to give him a chance and listen to what wants to say. Student Yue Yang bowed immediately. His attitude was quite respectful, but the words were not quite right, “I was wrong, I was really wrong, I shouldn’t have done that. I should’ve known that Your Majesty enjoys flattery, and yet I failed to give you the satisfaction of being praised for your nobility. This is my fault and this failure is mine to bear. I was wrong and I will change henceforth… Your Majesty, I promise you this time, I will definitely succeed in satisfying you and give you bursts of immense pleasure…”

“You’re asking for death!” His Majesty was furious. He rushed out of the gauze tent for the second time, threw a kick and blasted the bent-over student Yue Yang like a shooting star. Bursts of pleasure? Can this kid be any more hateful? I haven’t even dealt with you for calling me a secret-enthusiast the last time!

chapters.title: Chapter 895
chapters.body:
Chapter 895

Chapter 895: The Enlightenment of Drunken Cat Yu Jie

Although he could not obtain the secret of the Eye of the Underworld from His Majesty, Yue Yang was not worried; he would definitely say it himself when his anger died down.

I shouldn’t have to worry about this, and I can’t worry about this either!

Xue Wu Xia had a few lengthy discussions with Si-niang these few days, but no matter how much Yue Yang pried, she wouldn’t give in.

The Tigress Princess Qian Qian went to the Heaven Stairway to look for Yue Yu, but she never came back. She is probably trying to persuade Yue Yu, but what the hell is going on? Yue Yang was puzzled. Finally, he was too lazy to think, so he had to bury his thoughts and concentrate on the research of the Beast Bracelet. If Yue Yu doesn’t return, no one else could be an assistant for Yue Yang. In the end, Drunken Cat Yu Jie couldn’t bear to see him struggle, so she ran over to help.

She initially thought that this was going to be an easy job. Who would have thought that after Yue Yang had inadvertently caused several explosions as he tried it out several times, scaring her half to death!

The probability of failure of this experiment was too high!

Fortunately, she only came here to help for a few days. If this went on for a long time, Drunken Cat Yu Jie felt that she might just go crazy. She also guessed that it was because of Yue Yu’s presence that Yue Yang was able to pull through with a smile on his face.

“You crazy man, don’t study it any more; this is definitely not right, so let’s just change it!” Drunken Cat Yu Jie had seen Yue Yang fail three times, yet he still insisted on proceeding with the same experiment, which led her to become unable to bear with it any longer as she came forward with an objection. Originally, she had assured Yue Yang that no matter what he did, she would not object to it; yet the tables turned before a day of work was even over.

“Failure is a normal process. If the topic of research had not experienced hundreds of failures, it would not stand on its own feet. Even if the research was truly completed, it must be tested in all aspects. Forget it, I won’t explain too much; it’s just a waste of saliva to explain this to a dense lady like you,” Student Yue Yang portrayed an expression of contempt, looking like a high-ranker that glared upon civilians that dared to question the nobility’s authority. Basically, his facial expressions said ‘this master’s words are reasonable’.

“…” Drunken Cat Yu Jie was amazed by his usual authority of coercion. Finally, his tempt was met with nothing but an overwhelming silence.

“I’ll have you know that in fact,carrying out this experiment is very difficult, so the most important thing is to have a good memory. The steps cannot be wrong either—there can be no flaws at all. If you have a memory like mine, things will be fine. Huh? How strange. Where did my Red Flame Demon Crystal go?” Student Yue Yang was talking to himself.

“What happens if a wrong procedure is made?” Drunken Cat Yu Jie was shocked when she heard him explain.

“It will explode!” Yue Yang replied without raising his head.

“Just now, did you say that the Red Flame Demon Crystal was gone?” Drunken Cat Yu Jie was sweating profusely and she felt a wave of coldness behind her back.

“I found it; I just forgot to put it in the rune pattern at the bottom level just now, but my Blue Ice Demon Crystal is nowhere to be found…” Student Yue Yang searched for it within a 3-feet-scope.

“Crap!” Drunken Cat Yu Jie remembered that this kid had just put the Blue Ice Demon Crystal into the middle rune pattern. Frightened, she turned around and fled, but it was too late.

Rumble!

A violent explosion exploded from the rune pattern.

The shock wave caused Drunken Cat Yu Jie to tumble towards the corner, nearly buried alive by the debris of the explosion.

When she got up, she noticed that a tear in her clothing caused a large hole to form from her back to her buttocks. Although she was okay, she felt the cool air blowing her back.

Looking at Yue Yang again, she saw his head singed. Like a slab of bacon that was being hung, he was dark and barely visible. She was only vaguely able to tell that it was a human being. The Drunken Cat Yu Jie waited for Yue Yang to descend from his levitation as she realised that his entire body was coated in a layer of soot— only his eyes and teeth had a shade of white. Then, Drunken Cat Yu Jie yelled at Yue Yang very frantically, “Didn’t you say you have a good memory?”

Yue Yang scratched his hair,”My memory is indeed good, but I’m not usually the one who remembers where the crystals are placed; it was normally sister Yu who arranges those things. I only ever needed to hand her the items she wanted,” With that said, Drunken Cat Yu Jie blushed. Looking back, she seemed to be a little nonchalant when she cooperated with him. Because of the several explosions, her mood was affected. It seemed that she was the root of the problem as it was her who held the Red Flame Demon Crystal and the Blue Ice Demon Crystal before passing them to him.

Perhaps the failure of this experiment was not because of him, but because of me… The Drunken Cat Yu Jie, who realized that she was wrong, felt very guilty and didn’t get angry with him anymore. Of course, it was impossible for her to admit her mistakes directly!

She decided to go out and wash her face, adjust her mentality and get a change of clothes at the same time before coming back to cooperate with his experiment.

I have to make sure to cooperate with him 100% seriously this time.

When the Drunken Cat Yu Jie went out to wash the mud stains off her face, adjusted her mentality and condition. She slipped into a new set of clothes and returned to the laboratory. There, she found that Yue Yang, who was still scorched, had already started another experiment. She hurried up, rushing to clean up the messy explosives on the ground and handed him the items he needed according to his needs.

Boom!

A deafening explosion sounded again and the shock wave blasted Drunken Cat Yu Jie who was cleaning up and slammed her onto the wall.

It turned out that the things that she had packed up were once again scattered all over the house. It looked like she didn’t clean up very much; rather, it became even more messy.

Drunken Cat Yu Jie almost shed tears.

Is it really that difficult to want to do something successfully?

She gritted her teeth and continued to clean up. When she finished her work, she found that Yue Yang had made a larger and more complicated rune pattern. Because of the extremely precise energy painting and control, he hardly paid attention to anything else in a timespan of ten minutes. Even when he was speaking, he kept his eyes on that rune pattern. Seeing him sweating profusely, with a face so scorched to the point where fairer trails of skin were formed when beads of sweat trickled down his head, she couldn’t help but feel herself becoming soft-hearted. In fact, this kid was very serious in his work. Although he was usually a bit lustful, he was very serious when it came to handling the experiment, as if he was completely replaced by another person!

Drunken Cat Yu Jie remembered that she had visited Yue Yang when Yue Yu was aiding him by his side, so she also followed Yue Yu’s example. She brought a towel over and handed him to wipe off his sweat.

“Idiot, don’t block my eyes when you’re wiping my sweat!” Yue Yang cursed.

“You-” The Drunken Cat Yu Jie wanted to say that he could do it himself if he didn’t like the way she did it! But the words that rushed to her lips were choked as she swallowed them back. When Yue Yu wiped his sweat, he wouldn’t scold her, would he? She has always been gentle and caring; she knew what to do and what not to do. Hence, she needed to be humble as well.

Although she was slightly wronged, Drunken Cat Yu Jie endured it.

She carefully wiped the sweat for him before bringing a glass of water over to give him a drink.

Who would have thought that as Yue Yang was intensively studying, he shouted angrily, “Stay away from me! Don’t bother me even if the sky is falling apart!”

Her kindness was struck by lightning!

The Drunken Cat Yu Jie was brimming with hatred. She almost poured the glass of water over his head, but she endured her annoyance. She guessed that Yue Yu probably wouldn’t bother him at a time like this, but she was wrong. Placing the water aside, Drunken Cat Yu Jie waited for a long time. She felt that the water still had to be drunk no matter what— otherwise, with his vigorous sweating, he might dry up out of dehydration. What can I do? What would Yue Yu do if she was here?

Feed him with a spoon?

No, he definitely doesn’t have time to be fed with spoonfuls of water. Besides, it’s too slow anyways.

If this doesn’t work, what should I do?

What does Yue Yu usually do?

She must have a way, because Yue Yu wouldn’t ever bear to see her little brother being thirsty… Drunken Cat Yu Jie thought for a long time before she finally had an idea. She remembered the straw that Yue Yang made for Little Shuang Er to blow bubbles with. Yes, that would most definitely be okay!

Thinking of this, Drunken Cat Yu Jie hurried to look for it in the house, but to no avail. She immediately rushed out and ran into the room of Si-niang and Little Shuang Er, where she ransacked the little girl’s treasure chest to find a few straws that were no longer used. It was too late to return the little girl’s treasure chest to its original position as she ran back hurriedly. Then, she placed the straws in the cup before handing it over. Seeing that Yue Yang really didn’t have time to pay attention to himself, he lifted the straw and took it to his lips.

“One more cup,” Yue Yang didn’t praise her. He studied the rune pattern with the full concentration of his entire mind, so he didn’t have time to say much. At this time, the rune patterns were flashing in a series as complex as stars, endlessly changing. Yue Yang did everything he could to memorise it as the change in the situations couldn’t be delayed for even a second.

“Okay!” The Drunken Cat Yu Jie was overjoyed when she heard his words. She then immediately rushed to pour another glass of water.

Halfway throughout the process, she found that a semi-torn sleeve was too troublesome, so she just tore the fabric off.

After she finished tearing the sleeves, she remembered one thing. Yue Yu would usually come out of the laboratory wearing sleeveless clothes. She guessed that the long sleeves were easily torn off because of the work that was induced, or perhaps she chose to just wear sleeveless clothes. As Drunken Cat Yu Jie turned back after refilling his water, she found that the light flashing on the rune array was going haywire.

Oops, it’s going to explode.

She first thought of avoiding immediately, but when she looked at Yue Yang, he stared intently at the runes this time. If he wanted to avoid any explosion, then no explosion would be able to affect him. With domain power, he could also resist any explosion that ever occured the experiment. But he didn’t leave as he kept staring at the final changes of the rune patterns, not caring about enduring the upcoming explosion.

Rumble!

The large eruption was expected.

Drunken Cat Yu Jie put her hands in front of the door, resisting the shock wave of the big explosion.

Although her newly changed clothes became riddled with defects once again, she found that it didn’t matter at all… Now she somewhat understood Yue Yu’s mentality when she cooperated with Yue Yang in his experiments.

As long as it could help him succeed, would she bother to deal with anything else?

A piece of clothing meant nothing if she could help!

Besides, in the house, no one except him would see her. Besides, this kid had no time to look at himself either even as the clothes on his body were torn to pieces. Who would see him? What made Drunken Cat Yu Jie enlightened the most was the fact that she remembered the rune pattern had only 2-Level changes before the first explosion occurred. Later, when she was about to lose her temper and leave, the rune patterns had already gone through the upper middle 3-Level changes. And just now, in addition to the upper, middle and lower three layers, there was also an auxiliary pattern around each rune…In other words, even though he seemed to fail again and again, he was actually improving!

He would rather bear the brunt of the explosion, but insist on exploring the truth.

It was precisely this kind of spirit and this kind of attitude that made his research progress well time and time again.

Other people always admired the success of the Third Young Master of the Yue Clan, but they never knew how much sweat and hard work this kid has spent on the road to success. Drunken Cat Yu Jie was moved as she watched him.

His memory must be extremely good, so why did he mistake the two materials that were so different between the Red Flame Demon Crystal and the Blue Ice Demon Crystal? This was not a joke, but rather that he became too focused. He solely concentrated too much on recording the changes in the rune pattern that caused the reality outside of the spirit to be confused. Hence, he had mistaken the entirely different materials between the Red Flame Demon Crystal and the Blue Ice Demon Crystal .

When he starts an experiment, he would be completely devoted to it, to the point where he could forget everything else even as he suffered the thirst for water.

Because of that, Yue Yu, who knew him best, needed to help and cooperate with him!

“Come again, let’s do it again!” Drunken Cat Yu Jie suddenly came to her senses. She suppressed the touched feelings in her heart and moved forward, patting Yue Yang on the shoulder, “You restore the rune patterns and I will give you the materials. This time, I won’t make any more mistakes!”

“Huh?” Yue Yang glanced at her strangely, seemingly very puzzled. Wasn’t she very angry just now? Yet, she seems to be in a good mood now. What’s going on?

“Let me wipe some of your sweat first!” Drunken Cat Yu Jie realized that she had never been this gentle as she carefully wiped his blackened face with a towel. She controlled her actions, trying not to affect the process of his recovery from the rune pattern. Seeing Yue Yang’s coat blown up so badly, she’d rather just tore it off.

Forget it, it’s not like I haven’t seen this kid’s body. Anyway, he’s carrying out an experiment, so when on Earth would he have the time to be bothered with something as measly as this? Besides, Yue Yu didn’t mind— so what was there to be afraid of?!

“Boom…”

“One more time!”

“Boom!”

“I have nothing else to do, so do it again!”

With the wholehearted cooperation of Drunken Cat Yu Jie, Yue Yang made continuous progress in the research on the rune pattern of the Beast Bracelet.

Three days later, Princess Qian Qian invited Yue Yu back from the Heaven Stairway. When the two women pushed open the crumbling door of the laboratory, they were surprised to find that an entirely naked Drunken Cat Yu Jie was tenderly wiping off Yue Yang’s sweat, who was also in a state of nudity. The two of them were completely immersed in the experiment process, completely unaware of Princess Qian Qian and Yue Yu who entered.

Princess Qian Qian was dumbfounded; she had never seen Drunken Cat Yu Jie’s gentle and warm side.

As for Yue Yu, she was smiling…

chapters.title: Chapter 896 Choices... What Do I Do?
chapters.body:
Chapter 896 Choices... What Do I Do?

Chapter 896: Choices… What Do I Do?

When Drunken Cat Yu Jie woke up, she opened her eyes and found herself lying on a bed.

Princess Qian Qian was sitting on the edge of the bed, thinking about something.

I’m pretty sure I was doing experiments with Yue Yang, right?

Drunken Cat Yu Jie reacted like this initially. Then, she remembered that after cooperating with Yue Yang to complete the study of the 72-star spiral pattern, she fainted because of severe overexertion.

Although the 72-star spiral pattern was only divided into the top, middle and lower three composite patterns on the battlefield, being able to complete it was also a breakthrough for the treasure of the Beast Bracelet. Taking it as the research standard point,she believed that the other two patterns would also be successful breakthroughs soon. Fortunately, she finally made a small contribution— before fainting, she helped him complete the most difficult 72-star spiral map. She sighed, sat up, and found that she was naked.

Only then did she remember that because of the consecutive explosions, both of their clothes had been torn away long ago.

At that time ,she was absorbed in the energy of the moment and didn’t feel anything, but now she felt embarrassed and shy. At that time, she spent three days entirely naked with him… It was unthinkable and she didn’t know how Princess Qian Qian would think of her henceforth.

“Are you awake?” Princess Qian Qian turned around and said with a smile, “It seems that you are exhausted. I came to see you several times, but I didn’t expect you to only wake up now,”

Princess Qian Qian poured a cup of tea for Drunken Cat Yu Jie and passed it over.

Drunk Cat Yu Jie pulled the quilt slightly embarrassingly and covered her body. While receiving the tea, she found that this was Qian Qian’s room. Immediately realizing that she had been carried out of Yue Yang’s laboratory, the knowledge made her even more embarrassed. She had a sip of tea to moisturize her throat and calm her chaotic emotions. After sorting out her words in her head, she explained in a low voice, “I was too involved and I forgot…”

Princess Qian Qian laughed, “Sister Ye, you don’t have to explain anything to me. Let’s not think about the fact that you were doing a good thing to help him out and became too immersed in your tasks; even if it was not for a research experiment, I won’t be jealous of what happens between you and him. After all, you are the new bride who was personally chosen to be wed to Yue Yang. Besides, you even got Si-niang’s approval as well.”

“How can I do that when I am practically two generations older than you? Although you all call me by the term ‘sister’, that’s just something that you guys addressed quite simply. If we were to truly compare our ages, I’m much more of a senior than a sister,” It was hard to stop herself from being shy as she was most afraid of bringing up this topic. She didn’t dare to disobey His Majesty’s words and she also respected Si-niang; and when it came to that bad boy Yue Yang, she wasn’t technically doing things against her will either. Although he had many shortcomings and was lustful like a wolf, on the surface she appeared very annoyed, but in fact she didn’t dislike him at all. It would even be the best choice to be able to marry him— if her seniority wasn’t a generation or two higher than Wu Xia, Wu Hen and Qian Qian, she would have accepted the orders of the elderly seniors like how Luo Hua and Yi Nan acqueised to their seniors request.

“Why are you still mentioning seniority? Among the Hundred Flowers Clan, your Ye family has the weakest lines of heritage. It’s hard enough for His Majesty and the Night Empress who were already bearing the curses over their frames; if you still refuse to marry and have a baby with that bad guy, I am afraid that the Ye family line will lose its place among the Hundred Flowers Clan!” Princess Qian Qian became serious.

“Don’t mention this matter for the time being,” Drunken Cat Yu Jie buried her head in the quilts out of embarrassment.

“In the past, Wu Xia and I didn’t know the truth about its history, so we didn’t know that it was so serious. Only now did we discover that if it weren’t for the appearance of that big brat, I am afraid that the Hundred Flowers Clan would have truly become the history of the Tong Tian Tower. In fact , looking back, our encounter with him was probably due to the arrangement of fate. Perhaps, in the dark, it was the mercy of the Ancient Gods and also Yue Yang’s mother’s years of hard work; otherwise, how could we have been so lucky?” Princess Qian Qian sighed.

“Do you think so?” Drunken Cat Yu Jie raised her head and looked at Princess Qian Qian’s face in amazement.

“Do you not think so?” Princess Qian Qian asked with a smile.

“Perhaps, maybe…” Drunk Cat Yu Jie didn’t dare to look her in the eyes squarely. She lowered her head, her voice trembling as she replied. She felt her tone getting softer and softer, to the point where it was almost inaudible towards the end.

“Since this is all determined by destiny, what do you have to worry about? Besides, the pursuit of happiness is not that easy. You must be as brave as Yi Nan, as enthusiastic asLuo Hua, as tolerant as Wu Hen, and in the end, you have to work like Wu Xia,” Princess Qian Qian stretched out her hand and lightly gave Drunken Cat Yu Jie’s shoulders a few pats, “I know you can figure it out. From now on, we will all work hard together to revitalize the Hundred Flowers Clan. Have a good rest, I will go out to practice some swordsmanship first!”

“Qian Qian…” Seeing her heroic figure, Drunken Cat Yu Jie called her name out of a sudden impulse, but when Princess Qian Qian looked back, she shook her head and waved her hand, “I’m fine, there’s nothing wrong!”

“Actually, as long as you do it, you will be able to do well,” Princess Qian Qian smiled dazzlingly, “With your results, Sister Yu, Wu Hen, Wu Xia and you have helped him in completing the soul contract pattern of the Beast Bracelet. Now, there are only two small problems. One is to test it on an actual person; the second problem would be the final material synthesisation. In view of your outstanding performance, Wu Xia decided to leave these two tasks to you!”

“No! Y-you can’t do this!” Drunken Cat Yu Jie felt surprised,happy, embarrassed and anxious at the same time.

This clearly meant that she would be given the greatest credit.t

There was also the opportunity to create solitude between herself and him.

Although they had good intentions, it was too embarrassing for her to do it. It;s way too awkward, I haven’t even thought of it yet…The experiment had no choice but to initiate lots of physical contact between the two of us. Qian Qian, Wu Xia and the others might just be laughing at me behind my back!

When Drunken Cat Yu Jie thought of this, her face burned with shame as she wanted nothing more than to find a crevice somewhere to squeeze herself into.

“Mom, are you sick?” The panda girl Niu Niu ran in with a big kite in her hand. She seemed to be playing with Shuang Er as they passed by, but she didn’t forget to greet her mother.

“I’m not sick, go play!” Under normal situations, she would have asked Niu Niu to practice cultivating and lessen her playtime, but today, she stroked the top of Niu Niu’s head lovingly and sent this ‘baby girl’ to play. The little panda girl Niu Niu was overjoyed and cheered when she heard this. However, before she went out, Drunken Cat Yu Jie called her again, “Niu Niu, do you like your brother?”

“I like him! Except for her mother, Niu Niu likes her brother the most!” When Niu Niu talked about Yue Yang, her face instantly became sweet

“That’s good to know… go play!” Drunken Cat Yu Jie waved her hand and the little panda girl leaped in joy. She ran out the door and Drunken Cat Yu Jie heard her saying to Little Shuang Er, “Mom stopped crying today and she let me play, how great! Let’s go and play with brother!”

“My brother just fell asleep and my mother said that we shouldn’t bother him, so let’s go find Xiao Wen Li and fly a kite together!”

“Okay……”

Hearing Niu Niu playing with joyful laughter, Drunken Cat Yu Jie couldn’t help but feel ashamed again.

Had Niu Niu seen me cry in secret all this time when I was in a bad mood? Did she ever tell Yue Yang about it? If he knew about it, he would definitely think of nonsense, right? This time, it was truly embarrassing. If he had really known about her crying secretly at night, he would definitely make fun of her in the future. So she decided that even if this matter was ever brought up in the future, she wouldn’t ever admit to it.

Lying down again, Drunken Cat Yu Jie experienced a kind of ease that she had never felt before.

The invisible but large rock that seemed to tug at her heart seemed to have disappeared at some point.

Marriage?

Although it was His Majesty’s arrangement, she definitely wouldn’t marry him. I’ll just let him fuss all he wants; I would never agree to him no matter how many times he asks. Anyway, my name cannot be written with Qian Qian and others. Otherwise, how would others think of me!

Amidst the waves of joy and shame, Drunken Cat Yu fell asleep very easily.

In her sleep, she seemed to have dreamt of something interesting.

A slight smile hung on her beautifully sculpted lips.

If Niu Niu could see her expression now, she would have definitely noticed that her mother hadn’t smiled amidst a dream for a very, very long time now.

When she woke up again, Drunken Cat Yu Jie suddenly had the urge to see Yue Yang immediately, but she resisted it and deliberately refused to see him. After three days, she pretended that nothing happened, not even mentioning his name in front of Princess Qian Qian and the others. However, when they discussed matters that concerned him, Drunken Cat Yu Jie would intentionally or unconsciously pay more attention to listen to them. She heard Yue Yu had helped him finalize the soul contract rune pattern of the Beast Bracelet and the design was completely flawless and traceless. After hearing the three standard prototypes of the Beast Bracelet were completed, she couldn’t help but sigh in her heart— Indeed, I expected no less of the gentle and caring Yue Yu. Within a day, she had even helped him make the standard prototypes; yet, it took me three entire days just to experiment with an upper rune pattern array. It seems that compared to Yue Yu, I am really far behind!

That evening, at 1am.

“Are you asleep?” Yue Yang knocked on Drunken Cat Yu’s room door.

“I’m asleep, what do you need?” Drunken Cat Yu Jie was thinking about the various things she had experienced with Yue Yang during his research. Her body was slightly hot, but she didn’t expect that he would come looking for her. She was shocked as she trembled slightly, “If it’s not important, we can talk tomorrow; I want to turn in!”

She was afraid that he would do something arrogant after barging into her room.

If that’s the case, she didn’t know if she could refuse him.

Although His Majesty was the one who made the arrangement, Si-niang had agreed as well. Besides, Qian Qian and Wu Xia did not object to the marriage proposal, but she was not ready for this. T-this is going too fast!

Yue Yang suddenly pushed the door open, causing Drunken Cat Yu Jie to panic as he pulled her from the bed and said, “Sister Yu refused to be my first test subject. Qian Qian and the others have also disappeared into thin air. If I ever catch any of them, I’m going to whip their small butts. Kitty, help me out!”

“Don’t call me Kitty, that’s not my name!” Drunken Cat Yu Jie was anxious. She didn’t think it was bad for him to call her Kitty, but she felt that it was too affectionate.

“Hurry up!” Yue Yang’s mind was not hung up on the way he addressed her at all as he hurriedly pulled her away.

“Wait for me to get dressed!” Sister Drunken Cat Yu Jie found that she was still wearing her pyjamas. She wanted to get rid of his hand and change into her formal clothes.

“It’s too troublesome, this is fine!” Yue Yang didn’t think there was anything wrong with wearing pyjamas at night. Besides, this Drunken Cat Yu Jie looked great in her pyjamas. Although her hot curves and sexy figure were slightly hidden, she had another unusual charm to it, so he didn’t think that there was anything wrong with her current look.

“Hey… slow down! I’ll just go with you, just slow down…” Drunken Cat Yu Jie realised that her heart was beating like a drum. Although she wanted to refuse, she couldn’t help but walk with him. Of course, she would not admit that she had a faintly anticipated eagerness that was rooted deep within her heart as she was only willing to think that she was forced by the barbaric man to come and help.

After entering the laboratory, Drunken Cat Yu Jie immediately immersed herself with the role while Yue Yang was making preparations.

She picked up the plan from the table and looked at it.

Preparing to be familiar with the whole process at the fastest speed was essential in order to cooperate with him as much as possible.

Who would have ever thought that upon seeing it, she immediately covered her mouth and was shocked. According to the design plan of Wu Xia, Wu Hen, and Princess Qian Qian, the first experimental subject of the Beast Bracelet must have an all-rounded contact with Yue Yang and communicate with each other. If it’s just skin-to-skin and heart-to-heart communication, the standards would be barely tolerable, but the most important thing is that the first test subject must initiate a double cultivation with Yue Yang at no less than a lover’s level. This was to make sure that he had the best perception while exploring the Soul World.

No wonder Yue Yu refused to cooperate with Yue Yang’s experiment! With this kind of experiment done, things would be no different from them being two lovers. If Yue Yang, the big pervert, couldn’t control himself and make an attempt to initiate further contact during the process, what should I do?

Even if I didn’t intend to come here, I am indeed present, it’s just that what I have to do was far beyond my imagination.

Could it be that tonight marks the end of my virgin body?

When Drunken Cat Yu Jie thought so, her body couldn’t help trembling slightly. She wasn’t ready for it yet, so should she just give herself to him like this? T-this is too fast, right? Should I tell him that I can’t be his first test subject and bolt out the door, or should I fully cooperate with his research in accordance with the plan that they made?

This decision could very well determine her future life.

What exactly should I do?

[TL note]:

At this point there’s more new characters that are emerging so I’m kind of making the glossary instead of referring to it. I’ll try my best to provide them as accurately as I can, so let me know if any of the names seem awkward or don’t flow all that well!

At any rate, enjoy the chapter! Hope you guys have a great day/night ahead of you!

-Sterling
